product.title: L-Glutamine
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is glutamine? It is the most abundant free amino acid within the human muscle and blood. It can be found circulating in the blood, as well as stored in the skeletal muscles and liver, in concentrations ranging from 10- to 100-fold higher than any other amino acid. (1)Glutamine is a building block for protein and involved in many vital functions. It is required for rapidly dividing cells, including those of the gut, and is a precursor of the brain neurotransmitter glutamate.Certain factors such as heavy exercising can lower the glutamine levels in the body. Glutamine supplements cause a rapid rise in cellular glutamine levels and glutamine stores in muscle.Why it works:Glutamine is utilized in a number of vital functions, including protein synthesis and production of the nucleotide units that make up DNA and RNA. It is an important energy source for cells lining the gut and immune cells and critical for healthy gut and immune function. (1,2) It is also a precursor of the brain neurotransmitter glutamate. (3,4)Because of its importance in many cellular functions, glutamine is consumed at especially high rates during activities involving intense exercise. (1) People who engage in heavy exercise can affect their glutamine levels, causing stress to their body and immune systems. (5,6)Supplementing with glutamine can be important to a serious athlete, someone challenged with muscle loss or someone who wants to help maintain optimal immune function and energy level under heavy stress. (6,7)Glutamine can also act as a fuel for some tissues as well as for components of the immune system such as lymphocytes and macrophages.The science behind the product:The function of glutamine in stimulating glycogen synthase, the enzyme that controls the synthesis and storage of glycogen fuel in muscles and liver, may provide a mechanism by which glutamine supplements promote enhanced fuel stores. (5)Studies indicate supplementing with glutamine can effectively raise glutamine concentrations in circulation and in muscle tissue, promote a healthy inflammatory response and support antioxidant defenses to maintain muscle health. (8,9)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Branched Chain Amino Acids
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: BCAAs (Branched Chain Amino Acids) are a group of three essential amino acids that must be obtained through diet since the body cannot produce them. They are needed to support protein synthesis after breaking down muscles.Life Extension's Branched Chain Amino Acids is a great choice for active individuals who want to take a natural supplement to improve their sports performance. It can promote better recovery after exercise, both mentally and physically, and provide energy for the body.Why it works:If you are following a rigorous exercise program, chances are that your need for physical and mental recovery will become greater over time. This is where BCAAs come into the picture. There are a variety of amino acids, but only L-leucine, L-isoleucine and L-valine are called “branched chain amino acids". BCAAs are obtained through protein-rich foods like meat, dairy, and legumes or supplements. BCAAs can help enhance protein synthesis in both liver- and muscle cells. Because they can be oxidized in the powerhouse of the cell, the mitochondria, these amino acids can also promote energy and serve as fuel sources for skeletal muscles. While they are a popular supplement for athletes and exercise enthusiasts, their muscle-supporting and cognitive benefits can be had by anyone.The science behind the product:Supporting muscle strength, endurance & recoveryAthletes rely on BCAAs for a reason! Research shows they can help: (1,2)Maintain & build muscle strengthEnhance endurance & muscle functionPromote physical performanceSupport cognitive functionEncourage muscle recoveryHowever, BCAAs aren’t just for strength or endurance athletes – they can benefit anyone looking to support their health.Supporting a strong immune systemA healthy immune system is essential for peak performance, and BCAAs play a key role in maintaining immune function. (3,4) Again, their benefits go beyond athletics: BCAAs can promote immune health for everybody. (5) Branched Chain Amino Acids can help keep you at your best by supporting muscles, brain & immune defenses!How to use: To be used by adults 18 years and older.Take four (4) capsules daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: L-Glutamine Powder
product.description:
Glutamine is the most abundant free amino acid within the human muscle and blood. It is a building block for protein and is involved in many vital functions. Glutamine is required for rapidly dividing cells, including those of the gut, and is a precursor of the brain neurotransmitter glutamate.It also acts as a fuel for some tissues as well as for components of the immune system such as lymphocytes and macrophages.Certain factors such as heavy exercising can lower the glutamine levels in the body. Glutamine supplements cause a rapid rise in cellular glutamine levels and glutamine stores in muscle.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Taurine Powder
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Taurine can support the cardiovascular- and nervous systems and promote cognitive and liver health (encouraging bile salt production in the liver). It can also encourage water and calcium movement across cell membranes, which can help maintain cell membrane stability. A daily serving of 1/4 level teaspoon mixed in juice or water can provide benefits. This product also comes as capsulesWhy it works:Taurine is one of the body’s most abundant free, intercellular amino acids and is produced by the body itself. Produced from the amino acid L-cysteine, researchers have described it as “one of the most essential substances in the body.” Taurine is found many places in the body but especially in the tissues of the central nervous system, where it appears to play a regulating role. However, taurine is lacking in many diets and, in case of illness, may not be sufficiently produced by your body. In fact, the levels drop by as much as 80% with age! Therefore, adding this nutrient to your dietary regime, can help restoring youthful taurine blood levels.According to published research, taurine has been shown to: Support insulin sensitivity and healthy glucose metabolismHelp maintain intracellular electrolytes balance (particularly calcium)Support eye/vison health and hearing functionHelp maintain central nervous system healthEncourage cell membrane stability & water balance (osmoregulation) Promote optimal liver function and healthy bile salt formation Help maintain cognitive function and neuron integrity Encourage heart health and function Promote skeletal muscle health Boost exercise capacity Reduce chronic inflammationHelp prevent diabetic problems The science behind the product:Taurine for heart healthStudies suggest that taurine promotes cardiovascular health in a variety of ways. It can help maintain already healthy blood pressure, heart rhythm, and vascular function and encourages healthy heart muscle contractions. Dietary taurine can also help promote normal insulin response and support already healthy blood glucose levels. Nervous system health and taurine Taurine is especially concentrated in the excitable tissues of the central nervous system. It plays an important neuroprotective role, in part through its ability to maintain water and electrolyte balance across cell membranes, inhibit oxidative processes and promote a healthy inflammatory response. Supplementation with this nutrient can also promote healthy cognitive function, retinal health, and support hearing. It can protect inner ear cells from damage by normalizing the flow of calcium ions they require for proper function. Muscle health, aging and taurineTaurine may support skeletal muscle health and has been shown to support exercise performance and help maintain muscle mass and function as we age. Evidence indicates that taurine supports healthy aging and promotes longevity. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Arginine Ornithine Powder
product.description:
L-Arginine and Ornithine BenefitsThe amino acids drginine and ornithine have been found to support muscle mass and strength, and promote healthy body composition in exercising adults. (1-3) But that’s not all they can do:L-arginine is a semi-essential amino acid known for its role in the production of nitric oxide (NO). Arginine is converted to nitric oxide by your immune cells and the endothelial cells that line your blood vessels. Because of this, arginine can promote vascular relaxation, help maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels, and encourage a healthy immune response. (4,5)L-ornithine is a non-essential amino acid that the body actually makes out of arginine. Our cells use ornithine to produce proline, which is needed for collagen formation, as well as nitrogen-based compounds called polyamines that help support gene expression and promote healthy cell growth, division and survival. (6-8)Both arginine and ornithine can help your cells convert ammonia, an unwanted byproduct of protein metabolism (such as after exercise), into urea, a compound that can be safely excreted via the kidneys. (7)

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: L-Carnitine
product.description:
Mitochondria are the energy factories of the human cells needed to keep us vibrant, healthy, and young. Optimal functioning of mitochondria is dependent on normal levels of carnitine. However, over time these levels go far down and, as a consequence, cells produce less energy and less metabolic activity. (1)That means that our body ages much faster. The answer to this problem is carnitine supplementation because carnitine can help:To maintain activity at the cell level, that fosters the process of fat being turned into energy within the mitochondria (2)To prevent excess accumulation of cellular debris, that is responsible for cell death (3)To support a healthy concentration of nitric oxide, which helps endothelial cells relax and maintain blood flow, supporting proper blood pressure (4)To maintain healthy body fat composition, which in turn supports insulin sensitivity and healthy blood sugar levels already within normal range (5-6)To support brain cells’ natural defences against age-related memory and cognitive de-cline (7)

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine (NAC)
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:N-acetyl-L-cysteine (NAC) can support immune function, bronchial, respiratory health, and liver health. This nutrient also serves as a precursor to glutathione, a potent antioxidant in the body that protects the cells from oxidative stress. Why it works:All-round health benefits N-acetyl-L-cysteine is a highly absorbable nutrient known for its powerful benefits for whole body health. (1,2)It plays a key role in replenishing your body's glutathione levels. N-acetyl-L-cysteine and glutathione have powerful antioxidant effects, helping to protect cells from free radicals.Respiratory, bronchial, liver & immune healthNormal liver, immune, and breathing functions are all essential to your well-being. Without a good breathing function, your body will not get the oxygen it requires to function normally. N-acetyl-L-cysteine can promote healthy respiratory function as well as bronchial health. (3,4) Furthermore, it's shown to support liver health and boost immune system health. (5,6)The science behind the product:N-acetylcysteine is derived from the simple amino acid cysteine which can offer significant protection against a broad number of toxins. (7) These include acrolein (found in cigarette smoke and auto exhaust), paraquat (a toxic herbicide). Moreover, N-acetylcysteine helps the body synthesize glutathione. Glutathione is one of the body’s most important antioxidants because of its location within the cell, which enhances its potential to scavenge free radicals. Boosted glutathione levels have shown particularly positive effects on those people with weak immune systems. (7) Numerous placebo-controlled studies suggest that supplementing with N-acetyl-L-cysteine can positively impact energy production, well-being and quality of life. (8) Each capsule of Life Extension's N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine delivers 600 mg of this fast-absorbing nutrient. How to use: Take one (1) capsule one to three times daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for comprehensive support for your respiratory, liver, and immune health? N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine (NAC) can help promote bronchial comfort, encourage natural detoxification processes, and maintain robust immune defenses throughout your body. This nutrient also serves as a vital precursor to glutathione, one of the most potent antioxidants your cells produce. By helping to replenish glutathione levels, NAC can guard against oxidative stress and protect your cells from damage.

Why this formula works: N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine is a highly absorbable form of the amino acid cysteine, delivering powerful advantages for whole-body wellness. This formula provides 600 mg per vegetarian capsule, making it easy to support your daily health needs. NAC plays a crucial role in replenishing your body's glutathione reserves. Both NAC and glutathione offer powerful antioxidant effects, helping to shield your cells from free radicals that can contribute to aging and various health concerns. Normal liver function, immune response, and breathing capacity are all essential to your well-being. Without optimal respiratory function, your body cannot obtain the oxygen it requires to perform at its best, making NAC's respiratory support particularly valuable.

Backed by science: Protection against toxins and free radicals N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine is derived from the simple amino acid cysteine, which offers significant protection against a broad spectrum of environmental toxins. These include acrolein found in cigarette smoke and auto exhaust, as well as paraquat, a toxic herbicide commonly encountered in modern life. Moreover, NAC helps your body synthesize glutathione. What makes glutathione so special? Its location within your cells enhances its potential to neutralize harmful free radicals before they cause damage. Respiratory and bronchial health Research demonstrates that NAC can promote optimal respiratory function and encourage bronchial comfort. This makes it particularly valuable for maintaining easy breathing and lung wellness, especially when you're exposed to environmental challenges or seasonal concerns. Liver detoxification and immune support Your liver works tirelessly to filter toxins and maintain your body's chemical balance. Studies show that NAC can encourage liver health while also boosting immune system function. This dual action helps your body defend itself more effectively against daily challenges. Energy, well-being, and quality of life Boosted glutathione levels have shown particularly positive effects for individuals with weakened immune systems. Numerous placebo-controlled studies suggest that supplementing with NAC can positively impact energy production, overall well-being, and quality of life. Each capsule of this formula delivers 600 mg of fast-absorbing NAC to help you maintain optimal antioxidant protection and support multiple aspects of your health simultaneously.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Glutathione, Cysteine & C
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Glutathione, Cysteine & C is a mix of antioxidants and vitamin C, which works together in preventing free radicals from damaging your cells, and provides detoxifying agents. Furthermore, Glutathione can also help neutralize free radicals. Simultaneously, it also provides all of the many health benefits of essential Vitamin C, which supports proper iron absorption, collagen formation and more.Why it works:Oxidative stress is believed to be a key cause of bodily aging. Toxins from the environments we as humans live and work in can be metabolized into compounds known as free radicals. Free radicals can react with normal cellular structures which in turn can cause damage and cell death. One of nature’s best defences against free radicals are antioxidants. These compounds sacrifice themselves when reacting with free radicals, preventing them from damaging your cells.Glutathione, Cysteine & C are all antioxidants and can provide a good defense against free radicals by working together, while simultaneously providing you with the health benefits of the essential vitamin C.Glutathione is one of the body’s most important and powerful antioxidants [1]. It is a multifunctional molecule which is naturally produced by your body. Glutathione is composed of three amino acids (L-glutamic acid, L-cysteine and glycine) and can be found in every cell. It can protect the cells by neutralising free radicals. Glutathione works closely together with vitamin C, which keeps glutathione in its reduced form so that it can continue to provide free radical-quenching effects [2-5].Cysteine also helps synthesize glutathione [6-9]. Cysteine plays a crucial role in many bodily functions and acts as a detoxifying agent, promoting a normal functioning immune system.Vitamin C is a vital cofactor to the formation of collagen, the connective tissue which supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth [10-12]. Vitamin C can be found in citrus fruit, and also has antioxidant properties as it can eliminate free radicals from your body and help protect tissues from oxidative stress.The science behind the product:L-cysteine is a conditionally essential amino acid, one of only three sulfur-containing amino acids. Taurine and L-methionine are other two sulfur-containing amino acids. Cysteine plays a role in the sulfation cycle, acting as a sulfur donor in phase II detoxification and as a methyl donor in the conversion of homocysteine to methionine [13-15].Glutathione is a peptide molecule synthesized in the body from the three amino acids known as L-glutamic acid, L-cysteine and glycine. Vitamin C plays an important role to keep glutathione in its reduced form so that it can continue to provide free radical-quenching effects [2-5].Vitamin C is a white, crystalline, water-soluble substance found in citrus fruits. Vitamin C is an antioxidant which scavenges free radicals in the body and protects tissues from oxidative stress [10-12,16-20]. Vitamin C also supports the absorption of iron, while preventing its oxidation [21,22].How to use:Take one (1) capsule one to three times daily on an empty stomach, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: L-Arginine Caps
product.description:
L-arginine is a semi-essential amino acid. It is involved in numerous areas of human biochemistry/body activities that contribute to overall health, including ammonia detoxification, hormone secretion, and immune modulation. Arginine is also well known as a precursor of nitric oxide (NO), a component that delivers messages between body cells and partly controls blood circulation. As a result, when nitric oxide is synthesized by L-arginine, the arterial system is able to retain its youthful elasticity. At the same time, the immune system becomes stronger and Arginine also helps in maintaining your bones and tissues healthy. L-ornithine, a metabolite of arginine may contribute to the latter purpose too.Some studies suggest that arginine and ornithine stimulate growth hormone (GH) evidenced by an increase in muscle strength during intense workouts. Other studies show the same effect for Ornithine alone. Some studies confirm that a combination of ornithine with acetyl-L-carnitine enhanced the GH release, while a low dose of the given combination is insignificant. The minimum dose required seems to be 5-9 grams.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Glycine
product.description:
The simplest amino acidGlycine is the simplest and most omnipresent amino acid in your body and provides many and varied benefits. It can help maintain a healthy function of the central nervous system and promote relaxation and the normal function of muscles. Most of the glycine in the body becomes incorporated in proteins, but free glycine acts as a neurotransmitter involved in regulating appetite, behavior, and general homeostasis. Glycine has fundamental rolesThis amino acid has crucial roles in support of:Healthy gene expressionCellular antioxidant processes and regulated oxidative stress Immune system functionGrowth, developement, and survivalDetoxification, by combining with toxic substances and converting them to easy-to-excrete harmless formsGlycine for sleep, memory & moodResearch shows that, when taken before bed, this amino acid may promote healthy quality sleep without causing daytime drowsiness.While being involved in growth, glycine can have a calming effect on your brain and positively impact attention, cognition, memory, mood and mental health. Glycation, metabolism, blood pressure & moreGlycine has been demonstrated to inhibit protein glycation and production of advanced glycation end-products (AGEs). Evidence from laboratory and clinical trials shows that glycine may help support healthy glucose and fructose metabolism.Research also shows glycine may help maintain normal blood pressure. A study that included more than 4,000 subjects found higher glycine levels were correlated with cardiovascular protection and better metabolic health.Moreover, glycine has been shown to support health of the gastric and intestinal lining. And, like other one-carbon molecules, glycine has been linked to longevity.High dose glycine for optimal benefitsFor optimal effects the recommended intake for adults is one (1) to three (3) grams of glycine. Studies suggest that even much higher doses are safe to take. However, most glycine products are only available in 500 mg capsules, making them costly. For that purpose, Life Extension introduced glycine supplements in easy-to-swallow 1000 mg capsules.

Health benefits overview: Glycine is the simplest amino acid in your body, yet it offers remarkably diverse wellness advantages. This essential building block can help promote restful sleep, encourage relaxation, and maintain optimal nervous system function without causing daytime drowsiness. Beyond sleep support, this amino acid can contribute to vital processes throughout your body. From helping regulate appetite and behavior to encouraging immune function and cellular antioxidant activity, glycine plays fundamental roles in supporting your overall health and vitality.

Why this formula works: While most glycine in your body becomes incorporated into proteins, free glycine acts as a neurotransmitter that influences brain activity and helps maintain overall balance in your system. This dual role makes it particularly valuable for whole-body wellness. For optimal benefits, research suggests adults need 1 to 3 grams of glycine daily. Studies indicate that even higher doses are safe to take, yet many products only offer 500 mg capsules, making them costly and inconvenient. This formula delivers 1,000 mg per easy-to-swallow capsule, providing you with an efficient and economical way to meet recommended intake levels. The convenient high-dose format means fewer capsules and better value for comprehensive health support.

Backed by science: Sleep quality and relaxation without drowsiness Are you tired of lying awake at night, struggling to fall asleep? Research demonstrates that glycine, when taken before bed, can promote deep, quality sleep while leaving you refreshed and alert during the day. This amino acid exerts a calming effect on your brain by modifying neurotransmitter system activity. Rather than sedating you, it helps your nervous system naturally transition into restful sleep, making it an ideal choice if you want sleep support without next-day grogginess. Cognitive function, memory and mood balance Glycine can positively impact your attention span, cognitive performance, and memory function in meaningful ways. Its role as a neurotransmitter helps regulate brain activity patterns associated with learning and information processing. While this amino acid participates in growth processes, it simultaneously offers mental wellness benefits. Studies show it can help maintain balanced mood and promote mental clarity, supporting your cognitive health as you navigate daily challenges. Detoxification and cellular protection Your body constantly encounters potentially harmful substances that need to be neutralized and eliminated. Glycine can help support natural detoxification by combining with toxic compounds and converting them into harmless forms that your body easily excretes. This amino acid also plays crucial roles in cellular antioxidant processes and regulated oxidative stress. By helping maintain balanced oxidative activity, glycine can contribute to protecting your cells from damage over time. Metabolic health and cardiovascular wellness Evidence from both laboratory research and clinical trials suggests glycine can help encourage optimal glucose and fructose metabolism in your body. This metabolic support extends to cardiovascular health as well. Studies show glycine may help maintain normal blood pressure levels. In fact, research involving more than 4,000 participants found that higher glycine levels were associated with better cardiovascular protection and improved metabolic wellness markers. Immune function and digestive health Glycine has fundamental roles in supporting your immune system function and maintaining the integrity of your gastric and intestinal lining. This makes it valuable for both immune defense and digestive comfort. Additionally, like other one-carbon molecules, glycine has been linked to longevity pathways in research studies. It can help prevent protein glycation and the formation of advanced glycation end-products (AGEs) that accumulate with aging.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: D, L-Phenylalanine Capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glanceFirst of all, what is phenylalanine? It's an essential amino acid, which means your body can’t produce enough of it on its own, so it must come from external sources. Phenylalanine supports the production of important neurotransmitters such as dopamine, norepinephrine, and epinephrine. These hormones are often reduced by age, stress, and certain drugs and need to be replenished. Supplementing with phenylalanine can therefore offer a wide range of cognitive health benefits.Why it worksD,L-Phenylalanine is a 50/50 blend of its two forms, the stereoisomers D-phenylalanine and L-phenylalanine. These stereoisomers are converted to L-tyrosine in the liver.The process continues in the brain and adrenal glands, where L-tyrosine is converted into neurotransmitters called catecholamines, which are the healthy hormones dopamine, norepinephrine, and epinephrine (adrenaline), which again can promote mood and neurotransmitter health.The science behind the product:The brain chemistry supportCatecholamines are a class of molecules that act as neurotransmitters and hormones in various body regions. These chemical messengers include dopamine, norepinephrine (noradrenaline), and epinephrine (adrenaline), which are derived from the amino acid tyrosine. These tyrosine-derived neurotransmitters play diverse roles in the brain and body: Epinephrine: This is made (from tyrosine) in the adrenal medulla and functions as a neurohormone and is known as adrenaline. (1)Norepinephrine: In addition to acting as a neurotransmitter that can promote healthy mood and sleep, it's known to protect brain cells by promoting a healthy inflammatory response, inhibiting oxidative stress and supporting healthy neuronal growth and connectivity. (2)Dopamine: While this hormone is often linked to reward and motivation, it's also recognized as mediator of higher-level cognitive capacities. (3,4) Phenylalanine supplementationThe decline in brain catecholamine production that occurs with aging may be a contributing factor in normal age-related cognitive decline. (3,5) Providing catecholamine precursors such as phenylalanine can promote and protect brain health. (6) The enzyme that catalyzes the conversion of tyrosine to dopamine may work more efficiently if its co-factors vitamins B6 and C are included. (7,8) Phenylalanine supplementation can promote healthy neurotransmitter synthesis, and clinical trials have demonstrated that it can encourage positive moods. (9,10) Since both norepinephrine and epinephrine can cause smooth muscle (arterial) contraction, care with blood pressure should be taken when supplementing with phenylalanine.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: L-Lysine
product.description:
What is lysine, or L-lysine? It's an essential amino acid that the body can’t produce on its own and must obtain through the diet. It plays a vital role in protein synthesis and works together with other essential amino acids to support growth, maintain lean body mass, and help preserve the body's nitrogen balance. While most people consume adequate amounts of lysine, intake may be lower in some plant-based diets, particularly if foods such as beans and lentils are not consumed regularly. Athletes and highly active individuals may also have increased requirements for essential amino acids. Research shows that supplementation with lysine can support healthy calcium metabolism, helping the body use calcium effectively to maintain strong bones and healthy blood vessels. Lysine has also been studied for its role in promoting eye health and protecting tissues from the effects of glycation. Moreover, lysine may help promote a healthy stress response. Studies have shown that lysine, especially when combined with arginine, can help support normal hormonal responses to stress and contribute to overall well-being.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Tryptophan Plus
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is tryptophan? Let’s turn to the hormone serotonin. This hormone cares for the connection between nerve cells and is naturally found in the brain and digestive tract. Serotonin positively impacts your mood and sleep. To produce and maintain optimum serotonin levels your body requires tryptophan, an amino acid your body cannot produce. The basis for Optimized Tryptophan Plus is premium L-tryptophan that has undergone significantly more rigorous manufacturing processes than regular tryptophan material. This is to ensure the highest quality – to powerfully support healthy tryptophan levels in your body. In addition to an optimal amount of high-quality L-tryptophan, this formula has been enriched with nutrients that assist in maintaining your body's tryptophan activity. Why it works:A lack of sleep can cause stress, and stress can lead to a lack of sleep. Studies indicate that tryptophan supports healthy sleep patterns and mood. (1-3) The ideally amount of premium tryptophan in Optimized Tryptophan Plus can help break this cycle by supporting optimal sleep and promoting a healthy mood.Tryptophan also encourages the body’s healthy response to stress. (4) Moreover, tryptophan and serotonin can help support satiety, the feeling of being “full”, to help support healthy weight management. product.title: L-Tryptophan
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: To produce and maintain optimal levels of the neurotransmitter serotonin, your body needs the essential amino acid tryptophan. Life Extension's L-Tryptophan provides 500 mg of this amino acid, crafted under strict quality standards to ensure purity and effectiveness. Why it works:Poor sleep fuels stress, and stress disrupts sleep, a cycle that can be hard to break. L-tryptophan can help promote restful sleep, balanced mood, support a healthy stress response, and more. This premium quality L-tryptophan formula can help maintain healthy tryptophan levels in the body.The science behind the product:About L-tryptophanSerotonin is a neurotransmitter closely linked to positive mood and restorative sleep. (1-3) To produce and sustain healthy serotonin levels, your body needs the essential amino acid tryptophan, but it cannot make it on its own. Sleep, stress & satiety Research shows that tryptophan supports healthy sleep cycles and mood. (2,5,6) It also contributes to a balanced stress response. (7) Moreover, it's shown to promote satiety, which is the feeling of fullness. (8) How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: To produce and maintain optimal serotonin levels, your body requires tryptophan, an essential amino acid it cannot manufacture on its own. L-Tryptophan provides 500 mg of this critical nutrient per capsule, crafted under strict quality standards to ensure purity and effectiveness. This formula can help promote restful sleep, balanced mood, and a healthy stress response. By supporting optimal tryptophan levels in your body, this supplement addresses multiple interconnected aspects of your wellness simultaneously.

Why this formula works: Poor sleep fuels stress, and stress disrupts sleep, creating a vicious cycle that can be challenging to break without proper nutritional support. L-tryptophan can help you address both sides of this equation by providing the raw material your body needs to produce serotonin, the neurotransmitter closely linked to both positive mood and restorative sleep. This premium-quality formula delivers the essential amino acid your body cannot create independently. Since tryptophan is classified as essential, you must obtain it through diet or supplementation to maintain optimal levels. Each capsule contains 500 mg of L-tryptophan, manufactured to meet stringent quality standards. This ensures you receive a pure, effective form of this vital amino acid that your body can readily utilize for serotonin production and other important biological processes.

Backed by science: Serotonin synthesis and neurotransmitter balance Serotonin functions as a neurotransmitter that plays fundamental roles in regulating your mood and sleep patterns. To produce and sustain optimal serotonin levels, your body depends entirely on receiving adequate amounts of tryptophan from external sources. Without sufficient tryptophan intake, your brain cannot manufacture the serotonin it needs for balanced emotional states and restful sleep. This makes L-tryptophan supplementation particularly valuable for maintaining the biochemical foundation of mental and emotional wellness. Sleep cycle support and restorative rest Do you find yourself struggling to fall asleep or stay asleep through the night? Research demonstrates that tryptophan can help promote healthy sleep cycles by providing the building blocks for serotonin production, which in turn influences your sleep-wake patterns. Studies show this essential amino acid encourages natural sleep rhythms without causing the dependency issues associated with some sleep medications. By supporting your body's natural sleep mechanisms, tryptophan can help you achieve more restorative rest. Mood balance and emotional wellness The connection between tryptophan and mood regulation centers on serotonin, often called the "feel-good" neurotransmitter. Research indicates that maintaining adequate tryptophan levels can help encourage balanced mood states and emotional stability. By ensuring your brain has sufficient raw materials to produce serotonin, tryptophan supplementation may help maintain positive emotional well-being. This makes it a valuable nutrient for those seeking natural approaches to mood support. Stress response and satiety Beyond sleep and mood, tryptophan contributes to other important aspects of your health. Studies show it can help maintain a balanced stress response, helping your body react appropriately to daily challenges without becoming overwhelmed. Additionally, research demonstrates that tryptophan can promote satiety, the feeling of fullness after eating. This effect on appetite regulation adds another dimension to the comprehensive wellness benefits this essential amino acid provides.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: AppleWise
product.description:
The benefits of plant polyphenols are well known to health enthusiasts. These natural plant constituents block oxidative damage that leads to inflammation and accelerated ageing process. Recent studies by three separate laboratories have concluded that polyphenols extracted from apples extend life-span by up to 12%.Apples, especially their peel, are rich in an array of polyphenols. One particular major compound found in the skin of many apple species, phloridzin, has been shown to act as a powerful agent against destructive processes in your body, such as glycation. This compound also facilitates communication between cells and supports healthy glucose levels in individuals with levels within normal range.Additional research has shown that apple polyphenols can increase the protective endogenous antioxidant, paraoxonase, thereby inhibiting lipid peroxidation and inflammation. Apples contain further compounds that support healthy glucose metabolism and and slow the absorption of dietary fat from the intestines. AppleWise Polyphenol Extract is extracted from the highest quality organically grown apples.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:CoQ10 and Shilajit found in Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support can help support cellular energy production by supporting the mitochondria, the “powerhouse” of the cell. It can also contribute to maintaining normal heart, brain, and kidney health as well as that of other cells. The formula has been designed for enhanced absorption of CoQ10 in the body.Why it works:The body has a lot of organs, such as the heart, brain, and kidneys, which require lots of energy to maintain normal function. Unfortunately, cell energy production is known to decrease with age. Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support is truly unique in that it supports the mitochondria, the “powerhouse” of the cell, directly, thereby supporting highly energy demanding organs such as the heart, brain, and kidneys.CoQ10 is required to play an important role in maintaining normal cell energy production levels, as it converts fats and sugars into energy which is useful for all cells in your body. Sustaining adequate levels of CoQ10 is therefore crucial as the body's production of CoQ10 declines significantly with advancing age (1). Ubiquinol CoQ10 is used in this formula, because it absorbs up to 8 times better than ubiquinone CoQ10.Shilajit has been clinically shown to further increase CoQ10 absorption, promote cardiovascular health, and help restore youthful cellular energy.The science behind the product:CoQ10 has been shown to have powerful antioxidant properties. It can protect important proteins (2) and mitochondrial DNA (3) from oxidative damage. (1)Research done with middle-aged mice showed that ubiquinol was shown to be 40% more effective in slowing measurements of aging, compared to ubiquinone. (4)A combination of CoQ10 and shilajit showed a 56% increase in energy production in the brain, so 40% better than CoQ10 alone. Additionally, it was shown that a 144% increase in energy production in muscle cells, so 27% better than CoQ10 alone. (5)Researchers have demonstrated that combination of ubiquinol CoQ10 and shilajit can provide unparalleled effect and support heart health and youthful cellular energy production better than CoQ10 alone.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for a way to support your energy levels naturally? Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support™ pairs ubiquinol CoQ10 with shilajit to promote the cellular energy your body needs daily. This formula can enhance mitochondrial function, the energy centers of your cells. Beyond vitality, it can support heart health, cognitive function, and kidney wellness while delivering maximum absorption through the advanced ubiquinol form.

Why this formula works: Your body's organs, especially your heart, brain, and kidneys, require significant energy to maintain optimal function every day. As you age, however, your natural capacity for cellular energy production gradually diminishes, which may affect how energetic you feel. CoQ10 serves an essential function in maintaining cellular energy levels by transforming fats and sugars into energy that fuels all your body's activities. This formula targets your mitochondria directly, supporting the powerhouse structures within every cell that generate the energy you need. Keeping CoQ10 levels sufficient becomes vital because your body produces less of it as years pass. This formula features ubiquinol, which absorbs up to 8 times more effectively than standard ubiquinone CoQ10. The addition of shilajit clinically boosts CoQ10 absorption further and can help restore youthful cellular vitality while promoting cardiovascular wellness.

Backed by science: Antioxidant defense for cellular protection Research confirms that CoQ10 offers potent antioxidant benefits for your cells. It shields vital proteins and mitochondrial DNA from oxidative stress caused by free radicals, which helps preserve cellular integrity as you grow older. Ubiquinol delivers superior anti-aging effects Scientific studies involving middle-aged mice revealed that ubiquinol proved 40% more effective at slowing aging measurements than ubiquinone. When you choose this superior form, you ensure optimal results for maintaining your wellness and vitality. Shilajit amplifies energy production Clinical trials demonstrate remarkable outcomes when pairing CoQ10 with shilajit. Research shows this combination achieved a 56% increase in brain energy generation, outperforming CoQ10 alone by 40%. For muscle cells, the pairing produced an impressive 144% enhancement in energy output, exceeding standalone CoQ10 by 27%. Comprehensive heart and cellular wellness Scientific evidence confirms that combining ubiquinol CoQ10 with shilajit delivers exceptional results for cardiovascular health and youthful cellular energy. This powerful synergy provides advantages that exceed what CoQ10 achieves independently, supporting your active, vibrant lifestyle at any age.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Blueberry Extract with Pomegranate
product.description:
Blueberries seem to have the strongest antioxidant ability among fruit. Combating oxidative stress and inflammation, they improve cognitive capacity and help to maintain healthy blood flow and vascular function. These fruit are known for two of its most active compounds. One of them, anthocyanins, is considered one of nature’s most potent antioxidants. The second one, Pterostilbene, helps to maintain healthy lipid and glucose levels that are already within healthy ranges. Through its unique biological effects and antioxidative potential, pterostilbene helps maintain healthy DNA structure.To augment the benefits of this healthful fruit, extracts of AuroraBlue® wild Alaskan blueberries have been added. They provide more potent ingredients than cultivated blueberries. As a result, Blueberry Extract possesses nearly 10 times the antioxidant capacity of cultivated berries. Blueberry Extract with Pomegranate contains potent doses of pomegranate extract in just one capsule. Pomegranate fruit contains beneficial antioxidants and compounds that support arterial health.

product.title: Optimized Quercetin
product.description:
Quercetin is a dietary flavonoid that supports the healthy function of cells and is found in red grape skins, red onions, apples, buckwheat, among others. Studies have shown that it can help to reduce inflammation and supports immune response during seasonal changes. This compound demonstrated the capability to support a healthy cardiovascular system, by protecting the integrity of your vascular endothelium, and healthy blood pressure levels, already within a normal range. This phytonutrient can also support healthy cholesterol levels and healthy blood glucose levels.Quercetin can encourage a healthy immune response by inhibiting inflammatory factors and supporting whole-body healthy, particularly during seasonal changes. Optimized Quercetin also integrates vitamin C and camu-camu berry extract to offer further immune function support.Optimized Quercetin is a proprietary formulation that sets the "gold standard" for high-quality quercetin derived from a food-source blend.

product.title: Alpha-Lipoic Acid with Biotin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is alpha-lipoic acid? Alpha-lipoic acid is an antioxidant produced naturally in the body. It can also be obtained from healthy foods like spinach, broccoli and beets. (1)Being successfully used in Europe, Alpha-lipoic acid can support energy production and sugar metabolism and, by binding to metals, help your body get rid of ingested toxins. According to research, damage caused by free radicals is a major issue that leads to the aging of our organs. Alpha-lipoic acid can be very effective in eliminating free radicals and, by extension, delaying the aging process. Why it works:Alpha-lipoic acid has been called the universal antioxidant due to its ability to act in both, the extra-cellular fluid and the cell, and can boost glutathione levels (2). This antioxidant may also provide benefits for the liver, nerves and can protect against oxidation. It can also promote healthy function of mitochondria, your cells’ energy generators. Research indicates that lipoic acid supplementation can help support the body’s ability to process blood sugars and insulin, and support nerve health. (3)This formula also contains biotin, a B-vitamin that complements lipoic acid’s role in supporting metabolic health. (4)The science behind the product:One of the most beneficial activities of alpha-lipoic acid is to enhance the functions of other essential antioxidants, by recycling them. This seems to be achieved by, for example, quenching tocopherol radicals or by reducing vitamin C, or increasing the levels of ubiquinol (a derivative of CoQ10) and glutathione. These steps help to regenerate vitamin E. In clinical studies there have been no reported serious side effects, even at high doses. Some patients have experienced allergic skin reactions and possible hypoglycaemia in diabetics. R-lipoic acid is biologically more active than alpha-lipoic acid, with slightly higher costs.Lipoic acid is a tried-and-true supplement that has been around a long time. Many clinical studies have validated its benefits. For instance, it’s been shown to improve markers of metabolic health and to support the health of the delicate cells that line the inside of blood vessels called endothelial cells. (5,6)Get the antioxidant benefits of alpha-lipoic acid with the added support of biotin in a twice-a-day capsule form to promote liver and nerve health and protect against oxidation.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Blueberry Extract Capsules
product.description:
The Blueberry Compounds Anthocyanins and Pterostilbene Blueberries contain powerful health-promoting compounds called anthocyanins and pterostilbene that both can inhibit oxidative stress and promote a healthy inflammatory response. (1,2) Anthocyanins are some of nature’s most powerful antioxidants. They can protect cells and other vulnerable biological structures from oxidizing free radicals.Pterostilbene can help maintain already healthy lipid (cholesterol) and glucose (blood sugar) levels. (3,4) Moreover, pterostilbene can help maintain healthy DNA structure (5) through its intriguing biological effects and antioxidative potential. Brain Health and Blueberry ExtractResearch has demonstrated that blueberries may promote healthy brain and cognitive function. (6-8)Wild blueberry extracts have been shown to inhibit oxidative stress and promote a healthy inflammatory response in brain cells to support memory health.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Buffered Vitamin C Powder
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Buffered Vitamin C powder contains the essential Vitamin C nutrient which can help reduce oxidative stress, support collagen formation, promote iron absorption and support the immune system.Simultaneously Buffered Vitamin C also contains the essential minerals calcium, magnesium, zinc and potassium to produce a reduced-acid solution that is non-irritating to the stomach and intestinal lining.Why it works:Vitamin C is an essential mineral that the body cannot produce, and is required at higher-than-normal levels during times of stress [1-4]. Vitamin C is a white, crystalline, water-soluble substance found in citrus fruits. As an antioxidant, vitamin C can scavenge free radicals in the body and helps protect tissues from oxidative stress as well as support the immune system [5-12]. Vitamin C also promotes the absorption of iron, while inhibiting its oxidation in the body [13,14]. Furthermore, Vitamin C is a vital cofactor to the formation of collagen, the connective tissue that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth [8-10]. It can also help aid physical stresses on the body such as ingestion of heavy metals [15-20] cigarette smoking [21-24] and extreme temperatures [25-30] also signal the need for increased vitamin C intake [31].Vitamin C Powder contains four buffering minerals, in addition to ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) which promotes whole-body health. When mixed with water, Buffered Vitamin C powder produces a reduced-acid solution that is non-irritating to the stomach and intestinal lining. The minerals make this solution a more pleasant-tasting and healthful drink. The substances used in this product make it effervesce for a short while when mixed with water.The science behind the product:The human body does not produce vitamin C which must be received from foods and supplements [32]. Vitamin C levels may drop during stress situations [32], why higher vitamin C intake can be necessary during times of stress [1-4]. A lack of vitamin C has been linked to duration of colds along with immune system problems [32]. A lack of vitamin C can broadly affect various key aspects of maintaining a proper immune function [32].Studies suggest that vitamin C is crucial for normal formation of bone proteins. And it also shows that intake of the vitamin C plays a role in preventing bone loss [32].How to use:Mix one (1) teaspoon of BUFFERED VITAMIN C POWDER into a glass of water.Wait for the fizz to stop before consuming.The minerals buffer out the normally acidic vitamin C to make a pleasant tasting drink.To ensure product consistency store tightly closed in a cool, dry place.When mixed with water, the substances used in this product give bubbles off for a short while.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Fast-Acting Joint Formula
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Fast-Acting Joint Formula contains three innovative ingredients formulated to provide joint health comfort in just days and protect your joints. Why it works:Joint stiffness and discomfort can stand in the way of even simple everyday tasks and is a common issue in older people. Fast-Acting Joint Formula contains a triple-action combo Cynatine® FLX, Decursinol-50®, and Hyal-Joint® that works together to support healthy, comfortable joints in days, instead of the several weeks or the months it can take with supplements like glucosamine and MSM to produce beneficial effects. The three unique ingredients in Fast-Acting Joint Formula work together to help inhibit inflammatory factors, lubricate joints, and support the growth of healthy joint tissue.Furthermore, this formula helps enhance joint comfort, shields your joints against free radical assault, protects against normal joint wear and tare and helps support the growth of healthy joint tissue. The science behind the product:Fast-Acting Joint Formula contains potent forms of: Cynatine® FLX – this peptide form of the protein keratin can promote healthy joint tissue in order to provide shock absorption, while supporting the body’s oxidative defenses. This can help maintain healthy joint structure and function. (1)Decursinol-50® – this clinically-studied ingredient is an extract of the Korean angelica plant and has been shown to promote a healthy inflammatory response. (2)Hyal-Joint® – this patended mixture of hyaluronic acid, collagen, and other glycosaminoglycans can lubricate joints by promoting natural occurring viscosity of the synovial fluid that cushions joint cartilage. Furthermore, it can also support the growth of healthy joint tissue. How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Two (2) capsules can be taken if needed until desired effect is obtained, then take one (1) capsule daily thereafter.May provide added benefit when taken with ArthroMax or other joint support formulas.

product.title: Theaflavin Standardised Extract
product.description:
An increasing number of scientists recognize the critical need to protect the arterial wall from low-density lipoprotein (LDL) oxidation and inflammation. According to research, black tea contains two compounds, theaflavins and thearubigins that support arterial health. Theaflavin Standardised Extract contains many natural elements found in tea leaves that help to maintain normal levels of cholesterol.Theaflavins have been shown in human studies to protect against LDL oxidation and favourably affect healthy circulation. Scientists have also found that black tea possesses strong antioxidant properties, protecting cells and tissue from free radical damage. In addition, theaflavins seem to help in regulating inflammation in the body.

product.title: Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate, 90 caps
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The essential mineral magnesium is involved in more than 300 biochemical reactions in the body, among others, supporting brain health when aging. (1)It’s smart to supplement with magnesium – as most people don’t get enough from their diet and less optimal levels of magnesium also increase with age. (2,3)However, not all magnesium supplements are easy for your brain to absorb. Life Extension’s Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate was developed based on the latest scientific research to provide maximum benefits for your brain and cognition.Notice, you can also get this product as powder. Why it works:Magnesium supports cardiovascular- and bone health, encourages energy metabolism, promotes mood, and it plays a crucial role in the nervous system and brain. (1)Not all magnesium is easily absorbed into the central nervous system. Magnesium L-threonate is an ultra-absorbable form of magnesium and therefore brilliant for supporting memory and maintaining cognitive function. The science behind the product:Not all magnesium supplements are readily absorbed into the central nervous system. But Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate is a form of magnesium that has been shown to be better absorbed into the brain. (1)Magnesium L-threonate for healthy memory & cognitive functionA 12-week placebo-controlled randomized study involving 44 participants between 50 and 70 years of age demonstrated significant improvements in cognitive and executive function among those who consumed 1.5 to 2 grams of magnesium L-threonate daily. By the end of the trial, those receiving magnesium L-threonate improved by 9 years of brain age. (4)In preclinical studies, magnesium L-threonate enhanced the function of signaling pathways necessary for a healthy memory. (5)Moreover, in animal studies, magnesium L-threonate was indicated to encourage short and long-term memory and help maintain effective function and quantity of synaptic connections between brain cells. (1,6)Maintaining optimal magnesium levels with magnesium L-threonateThe magnesium L-threonate, contained in Neuro-Mag®, boosted magnesium levels in the cerebrospinal fluid (the liquid around your brain and spinal cord) by about 15% in just 24 days in an animal study. (1)The suggested daily dose of Neuro-Mag® provides 2,000 mg of magnesium L-threonate, the preferred form of magnesium to promote memory and cognition. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you concerned about maintaining sharp memory and cognitive function as you age? Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate can help promote brain health by delivering magnesium in a form that effectively reaches your central nervous system. This essential mineral is involved in more than 300 biochemical reactions throughout your body, with crucial roles in supporting cardiovascular health, bone strength, energy metabolism, and mood. Most importantly, magnesium plays a vital role in your nervous system and brain function.

Why this formula works: Most people don't get enough magnesium from their diet, and levels naturally decline with age. It's important to supplement, but not all magnesium is created equal when it comes to brain support. This formula contains magnesium L-threonate, an ultra-absorbable form that crosses the blood-brain barrier more effectively than standard magnesium supplements. This means more magnesium reaches your brain where it can make a real difference. The suggested daily dose provides 2,000 mg of magnesium L-threonate, specifically chosen to help maintain memory and encourage optimal cognitive function. This form has been shown to boost magnesium levels in the cerebrospinal fluid, the liquid surrounding your brain and spinal cord.

Backed by science: Superior absorption for brain health Not all magnesium supplements are readily absorbed into your central nervous system. Neuro-Mag® uses a specialized form of magnesium that has been demonstrated to reach the brain more efficiently than conventional forms, making it ideal for cognitive support. Clinical evidence for memory and cognitive function What does the research show? In a randomized placebo-controlled trial involving 44 adults aged 50 to 70, participants receiving 1.5 to 2 grams of magnesium L-threonate daily showed markedly improved cognitive and executive function in just 12 weeks. Preclinical studies reveal that magnesium L-threonate enhances the function of signaling pathways necessary for optimal memory. In animal studies, this form of magnesium was shown to encourage both short-term and long-term memory while helping maintain effective function and quantity of synaptic connections between brain cells. Rapid increase in brain magnesium levels How quickly can you expect results? Animal research demonstrates that magnesium L-threonate boosted magnesium levels in the cerebrospinal fluid by approximately 15% in just 24 days, showing its remarkable ability to deliver this essential mineral where your brain needs it most. Whole-body wellness benefits Beyond brain health, magnesium supports cardiovascular function, encourages bone health, promotes energy metabolism, and helps maintain balanced mood. By choosing a highly absorbable form like magnesium L-threonate, you're ensuring your body can utilize this vital mineral effectively across all these important systems.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

In animal studies, this form of magnesium was shown to encourage both short-term and long-term memory while helping maintain effective function and quantity of synaptic connections between brain cells. Rapid increase in brain magnesium levels How quickly can you expect results? Animal research demonstrates that magnesium L-threonate boosted magnesium levels in the cerebrospinal fluid by approximately 15% in just 24 days, showing its remarkable ability to deliver this essential mineral where your brain needs it most. Whole-body wellness benefits Beyond brain health, magnesium supports cardiovascular function, encourages bone health, promotes energy metabolism, and helps maintain balanced mood. By choosing a highly absorbable form like magnesium L-threonate, you're ensuring your body can utilize this vital mineral effectively across all these important systems.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Optimized Ashwagandha Extract
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is ashwagandha? It's an exotic herb used in India for stress relief for hundreds of years. (1) Ashwagandha, also called Withania somnifera, is demonstrated to have calming and neuroprotective effects. Optimized Ashwagandha is made with Sensoril®, which is a clinically studied ashwagandha extract standardized to the active compounds known as withanolides that make this herb so good for overall well-being.Why it works:Chronic stress is tough on both our bodies and minds. Many degenerative diseases and premature aging, are associated with chronic nervous tension. Ashwagandha can help your body manage the effects of stress.Moreover, nervous tension can generate oxidative damage. Ashwagandha is a powerful antioxidant that can seek out and annihilate free radicals, which cause oxidative stress and play a role in premature aging. The science behind the product:Optimized Ashwagandha Extract contains Sensoril® Ashwagandha extract made from both the root and leaf and is standardized to 32% oligosaccharides and 10% withanolide glycoside conjugates.Clinically proven for stress reliefAshwagandha is one of the most researched botanicals for stress management, shown to support a healthy stress response, cognitive function, mood, and overall well-being. (2-7) In a 60-day clinical trial with 130 adults experiencing chronic stress, participants took varying doses of Sensoril® ashwagandha extract or a placebo. Those taking ashwagandha showed significant improvements in stress-related symptoms, with higher doses providing greater benefits. (2) It also helped balance stress hormones like cortisol and DHEA.Ashwagandha for mind, mood & memory support Stress can impact memory, focus, and mood. (8) In the same study, ashwagandha improved cognitive function, reduced feelings of worry and irritability, and enhanced concentration. Higher doses led to stronger results, including reduced muscle tension linked to stress.Boosting energy & well-being Ashwagandha also improved energy levels and overall well-being. Participants reported less fatigue and better vitality within 30 days, with even greater improvements after 60 days – none of which were observed in the placebo group. (2)How to use:Take one (1) capsule twice daily on an empty stomach, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Ashwagandha is an exotic Indian herb used for hundreds of years to promote stress relief and overall wellness. This formula can help your body manage the effects of chronic stress while supporting cognitive function, emotional balance, and vitality. Optimized Ashwagandha Extract features Sensoril®, a clinically studied extract standardized to the active compounds called withanolides. These powerful plant nutrients deliver calming and neuroprotective effects to support your well-being during stressful times.

Why this formula works: Chronic stress takes a toll on both your mind and body. Many age-related concerns and premature aging are associated with ongoing nervous tension, making stress management essential for long-term health. Ashwagandha can help your body adapt to stressful situations more effectively. Beyond managing stress responses, nervous tension generates oxidative damage throughout your system. This formula provides powerful antioxidant protection that seeks out and neutralizes free radicals. By fighting oxidative stress, ashwagandha can help protect against cellular damage that contributes to premature aging.

Backed by science: Clinically proven stress relief & hormone balance Ashwagandha ranks among the most extensively researched botanicals for stress management. In a comprehensive 60-day clinical trial involving 130 adults experiencing chronic stress, participants received varying doses of Sensoril® ashwagandha extract or a placebo. Those taking ashwagandha demonstrated significant improvements in stress-related symptoms, with higher doses providing greater benefits. The extract also helped balance key stress hormones like cortisol and DHEA, supporting your body's natural stress response system. Cognitive function & mood support Stress can significantly impact your memory, focus, and emotional state. In the same clinical study, ashwagandha improved multiple aspects of cognitive function while reducing feelings of worry and irritability. Participants experienced enhanced concentration and mental clarity. Higher doses produced stronger results, including reduced muscle tension linked to stress, demonstrating the mind-body connection this herb supports. Energy & overall well-being Do you struggle with fatigue despite getting adequate rest? Ashwagandha can promote natural energy levels and overall vitality without stimulants. Study participants reported less fatigue and better energy within 30 days of supplementation. These improvements became even more pronounced after 60 days, with none of these positive effects observed in the placebo group. Neuroprotective antioxidant properties This formula provides robust antioxidant activity to protect your brain cells from oxidative damage. The neuroprotective effects of ashwagandha can help maintain cognitive health as you age, supporting long-term brain function and mental performance. Optimized extraction with Sensoril® This formula contains Sensoril® ashwagandha extract made from both root and leaf material. It's standardized to 32% oligosaccharides and 10% withanolide glycoside conjugates, ensuring you receive consistent, therapeutic levels of the active compounds responsible for ashwagandha's extensive health benefits.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Vegetarian DHA
product.description:
Brain health, learning, and healthy moodThe omega-3 fatty acid DHA (docosahexaenoic acid) comprises 40% of the polyunsaturated fats in the brain.Brain synapses, the connections that allow neurons to communicate, contain a higher concentration of DHA than nearly any other tissue in the body. (1) DHA promotes the development of neuronal features essential for learning. (2)Studies show that DHA is necessary for producing essential neuroprotectins that support healthy cell signaling in the brain. (3,4) Researchers are particularly interested in how adequate DHA levels in healthy individuals may promote normal mood and behavior in both adults and children, as well as normal cognitive function at any age. (2,3,5)Eye health and much moreDHA is also a major structural in the eye retina, accounting for up to 60% of the total polyunsaturated fatty acids (PUFAs). (1) Extensive research shows that this vital fatty acid plays a crucial role in our bodies, including promoting a healthy inflammatory response, supporting brain blood flow, enhancing cardiovascular health, maintaining a healthy metabolism, and more. (6-9)DHA from sustainable algae sourcesResearch has discovered that DHA levels in body tissues are significantly lower in vegans and vegetarians compared to those who eat animal-sourced foods regularly. (10) That is why taking a supplement becomes necessary. So, Life Extension has developed a premium DHA formulation derived from sustainable algae sources.Made with highly refined DHA oil, derived entirely from algae cells, it meets the most rigid standards of vegan and vegetarian diets and is ideal for anyone who wishes to supplement their DHA intake.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Ginkgo Biloba Certified Extract™
product.description:
What is in Ginkgo Biloba Certified Extract™?This vegan, non-GMO formula has been concentrated and dual-standardized for (per dose): 24% ginkgo flavone glycosides6% total terpene lactones<1ppm ginkgolic acid Bioactive compounds Ginkgo leaf extracts contain numerous compounds, including ginkgo flavone glycosides, terpene lactones and trilactones, proanthocyanidins, and many more. (1)It's these bioactive compounds that are thought to make ginkgo such a cognitive function powerhouse.Promoting memory & cognition Ginkgo extract is one of the most studied supplements for cognition and memory. It's shown to support your ability to accomplish daily tasks and help maintain quality of life. (2-6)

Health benefits overview: Looking for ways to maintain sharp memory and mental clarity as you age? Ginkgo Biloba Certified Extract™ can help promote cognitive function and encourage optimal circulation throughout your body. This vegan, non-GMO formula contains concentrated and dual-standardized ginkgo extract. Research shows it can help you accomplish daily tasks more effectively and maintain your quality of life.

Why this formula works: Ginkgo leaf extracts contain numerous compounds, including ginkgo flavone glycosides, terpene lactones and trilactones, proanthocyanidins, and many more. It's these bioactive compounds that make ginkgo such a cognitive function powerhouse. This formula has been concentrated and dual-standardized to provide 24% ginkgo flavone glycosides, 6% total terpene lactones, and less than 1ppm ginkgolic acid per dose. This precise standardization ensures you receive consistent levels of the beneficial compounds. Ginkgo extract is one of the most studied supplements for cognition and memory. Studies show it can help maintain your ability to accomplish daily tasks and promote overall quality of life.

Backed by science: Powerful bioactive compounds What makes ginkgo so effective for cognitive support? Ginkgo extract contains flavone glycosides, which are potent antioxidants. The flavonoids can help promote the release and uptake of brain neurotransmitters, the chemical messengers that allow your brain cells to communicate effectively. Antioxidant protection for your cells Ginkgo biloba contains high levels of antioxidants that can protect mitochondria in your cells. These antioxidants may help ease inflammation and guard against oxidative damage. This cellular protection is particularly important for tissues that require significant energy, including brain and vascular tissues. Memory and cognitive function Are you concerned about maintaining mental sharpness as you grow older? For decades, ginkgo biloba has shown that it can help protect against common age-related concerns like memory loss, confusion, and mental fatigue. These effects are linked to improved blood supply and reduced tissue damage from lack of oxygen and free radical production. Ginkgo extract can help relax blood vessels to encourage circulation while also inhibiting the processes that produce free radicals. Circulation support Ginkgo extract can help promote circulation by encouraging blood vessel relaxation. This improved blood flow benefits not just your brain, but your entire body. Better circulation means more oxygen and nutrients reach your tissues, supporting overall wellness and vitality.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Citicoline (CDP-Choline)
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is CDP-choline? CDP-choline stands for cytidine-5’-diphosphate choline and is an essential nutrient involved in many physiological processes such as communication within and between our cells. Choline is also required for the structural integrity of cell membranes.Despite the fact that our body can produce the substance in small quantities, a substantial portion of the population consumes inadequate amounts of choline, and dietary intake of the nutrient becomes increasingly important for brain health as we age. (1,2)Why it works:Choline is a substance needed by our brains to produce acetylcholine, a major brain/motor neurotransmitter that facilitates communication between neurons – a basic part of healthy brain function. This neurotransmitter is essential to healthy cognition, attention, memory function and more. Unfortunately, our brain cells absorb less choline as we age.Citicoline (CDP-Choline) can provide a form of choline that readily passes through the blood-brain barrier (BBB) directly into the brain, where cells can easily use it to nourish cellular membranes and support neurotransmitter production.The science behind the product:CDP-choline can promote the synthesis of neurotransmitters, particularly acetylcholine, in the brain, which is believed to explain many of its beneficial effects. (3)In the brain, choline serves as a precursor to acetylcholine, a major neurotransmitter that is important for signal transmission between nerves and implicated in cognitive processing.CDP-choline is also a neuroprotectant and a promoter of neuroplasticity, with a track record of supporting healthy cognition, memory and overall function in numerous clinical trials. (3-5)In addition to its clinically studied brain power benefits in older adults, low doses of citicoline have been shown to support a healthy mood. (6)CDP-choline can also support phosphatidylcholine production, an important phospholipid for nerve growth, function, and cellular membrane repair. (3)How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you concerned about maintaining sharp cognitive function as you age? Citicoline (CDP-Choline) can help promote youthful mental clarity, memory, and attention by providing an essential nutrient involved in cellular communication throughout your body. Despite the fact that our bodies can produce this substance in small quantities, many people consume inadequate amounts of choline. Dietary intake becomes increasingly vital for brain health as we grow older.

Why this formula works: Choline is a substance your brain needs to produce acetylcholine, a major neurotransmitter that facilitates communication between neurons. This neurotransmitter is essential for optimal cognition, attention, and memory function. Unfortunately, your brain cells absorb less choline as you age. Citicoline (CDP-Choline) provides a form of choline that readily passes through the blood-brain barrier directly into your brain. Once there, cells can easily use it to nourish cellular membranes and encourage neurotransmitter production. This formula delivers citicoline in convenient vegetarian capsules, making it easy to support your cognitive wellness daily.

Backed by science: Neurotransmitter synthesis and brain communication CDP-choline can promote the synthesis of neurotransmitters, particularly acetylcholine, in your brain. This is believed to explain many of its beneficial effects. In the brain, choline serves as a precursor to acetylcholine, a major neurotransmitter important for signal transmission between nerves and implicated in cognitive processing. Neuroprotection and cognitive support What makes citicoline particularly valuable? CDP-choline is both a neuroprotectant and a promoter of neuroplasticity, with a track record of maintaining cognitive function, memory, and overall brain health in numerous clinical trials. Studies show it can help you accomplish daily tasks more effectively and maintain quality of life as you age. This makes it one of the most researched nutrients for brain wellness. Mood and emotional well-being In addition to its clinically studied cognitive advantages in older adults, low doses of citicoline have been shown to encourage balanced mood. This emotional wellness component adds another dimension to the overall brain health benefits this nutrient provides. Cell membrane support CDP-choline can also promote phosphatidylcholine production, an important phospholipid for nerve growth, function, and cellular membrane repair. This structural support helps maintain the integrity of your nerve cells, allowing them to communicate effectively and respond to signals properly. Your cell membranes require ongoing maintenance to function optimally, making this aspect of citicoline's benefits particularly important for long-term brain health.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
