product.title: PS Caps
product.description:
What is phosphatidylserine? Phosphatidylserine (PS) is an essential component of healthy nerve cell membranes and is an especially important part of the membranes of brain cells. (1) Why PS supplement works Supplemental PS is shown to cross the blood-brain barrier and support the optimal structure and function of brain cells. In this way, phosphatidylserine can promote healthy memory, focus, attention, concentration, and cognition. (2) It has been demonstrated in clinical trials that PS supplementation can support cognitive performance, as well as memory and attention. (3,4)

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Acetyl-L-Carnitine
product.description:
What is acetyl-L-carnitine?Acetyl-L-carnitine is a form of L-carnitine that can help to decrease the effects associated with aging. L-carnitine a derivative of amino acids, is found in nearly all body cells. Its main role is to turn fat into energy by assisting in the transport of fatty acids into the mitochondria, the energy powerhouses of our cells. Under normal circumstances, it is produced by our bodies. However, aging causes a decline in the production of cell energy. Acetyl-L-carnitine and L-carnitine are absorbed into the bloodstream efficiently. Both of them are effective at promoting the burning of fatty acids for energy production and are efficiently used by cells. (1-5)This form of carnitine can also cross the blood-brain barrier and guard against oxidative damage and against toxins, like amyloid-beta peptide, in the brain. The benefits of acetyl-L-carnitineIt may support youthful memory function, improve mitochondrial structure and function, inhibit age-related oxidative damage and restore the activity of key enzymes.Acetyl-L-carnitine can also have wide-ranging benefits for nervous system wellness, including the central and peripheral nervous systems, and cognitive health, as well as positive mood. (6-11) It has been shown to promote peripheral nervous system comfort and support healthy mood, energy, and overall well-being. (12-17)

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for ways to maintain youthful cellular energy as you age? Acetyl-L-Carnitine can help promote efficient energy metabolism by encouraging the transport of fatty acids into your mitochondria, where they're converted into vital fuel for your cells. This specialized amino acid derivative can also support brain health, memory function, and nervous system wellness. It offers unique advantages for cognitive protection and mood balance throughout your body.

Why this formula works: As we age, our natural carnitine levels decline, which can impact cellular energy production and overall vitality. What makes this formula different is that acetyl-L-carnitine has an added acetyl group, allowing it to cross the blood-brain barrier more easily than standard L-carnitine. This formula delivers 500 mg of acetyl-L-carnitine per vegetarian capsule. Each serving can encourage the conversion of dietary fats into usable energy while promoting optimal mitochondrial function. By helping to maintain youthful fatty acid transport, this supplement can support your body's natural energy systems and guard against age-related oxidative stress.

Backed by science: Cellular energy and mitochondrial health Acetyl-L-carnitine plays a vital role in energy metabolism by helping fatty acids move into your mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells. Without adequate carnitine, your cells struggle to produce the energy they need for optimal function. Brain and cognitive support Unlike regular L-carnitine, the acetyl form crosses the blood-brain barrier efficiently. Once in the brain, it can help maintain the synthesis of acetylcholine, a neurotransmitter essential for learning and memory. Research indicates that acetyl-L-carnitine can promote youthful brain energy production and phospholipid metabolism. It may also encourage healthy acetyl-coenzyme A levels, which your body uses to produce acetylcholine. Nervous system wellness This nutrient can support both central and peripheral nervous system comfort. Studies suggest it may help maintain nerve health and promote positive mood by encouraging optimal neurotransmitter balance. Anti-aging and oxidative protection Acetyl-L-carnitine can guard against oxidative damage in the brain and throughout your body. It may help protect against harmful substances like amyloid-beta peptide while supporting the activity of key enzymes that decline with age. When combined with nutrients like CoQ10 and alpha-lipoic acid, acetyl-L-carnitine can offer even greater anti-aging advantages. Together, these compounds can encourage youthful mitochondrial structure and cellular function.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: DMAE Bitartrate
product.description:
DMAE for Memory, Learning & Brain functionDMAE (2-dimethylaminoethanol) is a precursor, a compound the body uses to make choline. Choline is needed for optimal production of acetylcholine, which is the main neurotransmitter involved in memory and learning.Choline is also needed to synthesize the phospholipid phosphatidylcholine. Phosphatidylcholine concentrates in the brain, and maintaining healthy levels of brain phospholipids may be an important strategy for youthful brain function during aging. (2-4)DMAE for Cell & Mitochondrial MembranesCell membrane integrity is crucial to every structure and function in your body. Phosphatidylcholine, supported by DMAE, is used to build and rejuvenate cell and mitochondrial membranes. DMAE has also shown the ability to neutralize free radicals, which may add to its ability to protect cell membrane integrity. (1)

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bifido GI Balance
product.description:
What are Probiotics?Probiotics are live microorganisms, and the name literally means “for life”. Traditional diets (like the Mediterranean diet) with foods that contain probiotics have been shown to promote health and longevity. They are key role in promoting healthy digestion and supporting the optimal functioning of a wide range of body systems. (1) Extensively Studied for Gut HealthDifferent probiotics have distinct functions and need to be carefully formulated to target specific health concerns. (2) Bifidobacteria, a specific group of probiotic bacteria, offer many positive effects on the gastrointestinal (GI) tract and overall body health. (3-4) This formula includes the strain Bifidobacterium longum BB536®, which has been shown in multiple clinical studies to promote a healthy intestinal environment and balance of microorganisms in the gut, known as the microbiota, which benefits overall health. (6-9) Other Great Health BenefitsB. longum BB536® is one of the most studied probiotics for its positive effects on immune health, including supporting the body's defense against seasonal immune challenges. (7) Moreover, B. longum BB536® is also shown to support a healthy inflammatory response. Each capsule of Bifido GI Balance contains two billion colony-forming units (CFUs) of viable, healthy bacteria.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Extraordinary Enzymes
product.description:
Please note that this product has a limited shelf life. The product is sold with a minimum shelf life of 6 months and a maximum of 12 months.Human studies suggest that supplementary enzymes may improve digestion and help minimize post-meal issues. Since proteins, plant fibres, and fats are broken down differently, a proper spectrum of enzymes is necessary for optimal digestion.Extraordinary Enzymes provides a potent array of enzymes, formulated to adapt to a variety of stomach acid pH conditions and support digestion. With a total of twelve different enzymes, this unique formula supports the digestion of any food that causes you discomfort. It also assists in converting food into energy and absorbing nutrients more efficiently. Unlike commercial supplements, Extraordinary Enzymes does not contain amylase. The reason is that amylase breaks down starches into glucose, which is rapidly absorbed into the bloodstream.Extraordinary Enzymes facilitates the digestion of healthy vegetables that are often avoided because of digestive discomfort.Most people need one capsule before the two heaviest meals, which provides 400 mg of natural digestive enzymes each day.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Esophageal Guardian
product.description:
Many individuals have tried different remedies in an attempt to soothe their digestive tracts. Some still have an issue with gastric distress, resulting in discomfort along the oesophagus. A novel solution is now available in the form of what scientists call raft-forming alginate. This blend of natural ingredients in Oesophageal Guardian protects the oesophagus against stomach acids in a unique way. The mechanism behind Oesophageal Guardian involves the formation of a temporary physical barrier between the stomach and the oesophagus. Alginic acid forms a gel with a foam layer that sits above the contents of the stomach.Two other natural ingredients in this formula, calcium carbonate and magnesium carbonate‚ create lift in the foam and make it firmer. This foam barrier has been proven to offer maximum support to the oesophagus, while neutralising stomach acid.The foam barrier develops in less than a minute after chewing and swallowing two natural berry flavour tablets of Oesophageal Guardian. The relief it provides lasts for up to 4 hours. Quite simply, Oesophageal Guardian Natural Berry Flavour delivers the fastest-acting, longest-lasting and most advanced technology available to support delicate oesophageal and stomach tissues against gastric distress.

product.title: Eye Pressure Support with Mirtogenol®
product.description:
The importance of eye health supportThe eye is one of the most sensitive organs in the human body. As you grow older, the fluid contained within the chambers of your eyes may gradually and imperceptibly increase.This has been shown to contribute to many unwanted age-related vision issues. Get help maintaining healthy eye pressure with targeted support!An advanced eye nutrient formulaAt the core of Mirtogenol®’s eye health-promoting power are two plant-based ingredients: Mirtoselect® European bilberry extractPycnogenol® French Maritime Pine bark extractIn a study, this Mirtogenol® extract blend showed up to a 24% reduction in already-healthy eye pressure. (1)Eye Pressure Support with Mirtogenol® benefitsThe premium extract Pycnogenol® is known to promote endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS), the enzyme responsible for producing nitric oxide. Nitric oxide can help relax blood vessels, enable efficient blood flow throughout the body.The combination of European bilberry and French maritime pine bark can:Support healthy blood flow throughout the body, including the the tiny vessels of your eyes.Promote healthy fluid pressure inside the ocular chamber, helping to maintain eye pressure already within the normal range. (1-5)

Health benefits overview: Are your eyes feeling the effects of aging? Eye Pressure Support with Mirtogenol® combines European bilberry and French maritime pine bark extracts to help maintain eye pressure already within normal range. As you age, fluid within your eye chambers may gradually increase, potentially contributing to vision concerns. This vegetarian formula can promote optimal blood flow to the tiny vessels of your eyes while supporting overall vision health.

Why this formula works: Your eyes represent one of the most sensitive organs in your body, requiring specialized nutritional support as you grow older. Mirtogenol® features two powerful plant-based ingredients working synergistically for eye wellness. The premium pine bark extract Pycnogenol® promotes endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS), the enzyme responsible for producing nitric oxide. This compound helps relax blood vessels, enabling efficient blood flow throughout your body, including to your eyes. Clinical research demonstrates this Mirtogenol® blend showed up to 24% reduction in already-healthy eye pressure. The combination of bilberry and pine bark can support optimal circulation to the delicate blood vessels serving your eyes.

Backed by science: Clinical evidence for eye pressure support Research studies confirm that the Mirtogenol® extract blend demonstrates remarkable effectiveness for maintaining eye pressure already within normal range. Clinical trials revealed up to 24% reduction in already-healthy eye pressure, providing significant support for your vision wellness. Bilberry extract benefits European bilberry extract (Mirtoselect®) supplies powerful anthocyanin compounds that support eye health. These plant nutrients can promote healthy blood flow throughout your body, with particular benefits for the tiny vessels nourishing your eyes and supporting optimal visual function. Pine bark for circulation French maritime pine bark extract (Pycnogenol®) provides proanthocyanidins that encourage healthy blood vessel function. Scientific evidence shows this premium extract promotes nitric oxide production, which helps relax blood vessels and enables efficient circulation to all tissues, including your eyes. Synergistic eye protection The combination of bilberry and pine bark creates a synergistic effect for eye wellness. Together, these plant extracts can promote healthy fluid pressure inside the ocular chamber, helping maintain eye pressure already within normal range while supporting overall vision health as you age.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Vitamin B3 Niacin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Niacin is known as vitamin B3 because it was the third B vitamin identified. Since the 1950s, it has been recognized for its ability to help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels, making it one of the most researched nutrients for cardiovascular support. Each capsule of our Vitamin B3 Niacin delivers 500 mg of this vital nutrient. Why it works: Niacin, or vitamin B3, offers a wide range of health benefits. Research shows it supports the metabolism of glucose, fats, and alcohol, helps maintain cholesterol levels already within the normal range, and promotes cellular energy production. The science behind the product: Niacin is the sole B vitamin that can be synthesized in the liver from the amino acid tryptophan. On average, 1 mg of niacin can be synthesized from the ingestion of 60 mg of tryptophan. Key benefits of vitamin B3 (niacin): Cell energy – as a vitamin B coenzyme, niacin is central to the metabolic pathways that produce energy at the cellular level. Efficient metabolism – B3 is required for breaking down dietary fat, carbohydrates, and alcohol. (1,2) Cholesterol – the beneficial effects of niacin on blood lipids are also well-documented, helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range. (3,4) How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Vitamin B3 Niacin can help maintain cholesterol levels already within the normal range, making it a valuable nutrient for cardiovascular wellness. Since the 1950s, niacin has been recognized as one of the most extensively researched nutrients for heart health. Each capsule provides 500 mg of this essential B vitamin. This formula can promote cellular energy production and encourage efficient metabolism of glucose, fats, and alcohol throughout your body.

Why this formula works: Niacin offers a comprehensive range of health benefits backed by decades of scientific research. This vitamin plays crucial roles in metabolic processes that convert food into usable energy at the cellular level. The formula can help maintain cholesterol levels already within the normal range while supporting blood lipid profiles. These cardiovascular benefits make niacin a cornerstone nutrient for heart wellness. Beyond heart health, this B vitamin participates in essential metabolic pathways. It encourages the breakdown of carbohydrates, fats, and alcohol, helping your body efficiently process nutrients for optimal cellular function.

Backed by science: Unique B vitamin synthesis Niacin is the only B vitamin your liver can synthesize from the amino acid tryptophan. On average, your body requires approximately 60 mg of tryptophan to produce just 1 mg of niacin, making direct supplementation a more reliable way to maintain optimal levels. Cellular energy production As a B vitamin coenzyme, niacin is central to the metabolic pathways that generate energy at the cellular level. It serves as a precursor for NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide), a crucial molecule involved in hundreds of enzymatic reactions throughout your body. Efficient metabolism support Vitamin B3 is required for breaking down dietary fats, carbohydrates, and alcohol into compounds your cells can use. This essential nutrient participates in metabolic processes that transform the food you eat into energy and building blocks for cellular health. Cardiovascular health The beneficial effects of niacin on blood lipids are well-documented in scientific literature. Research demonstrates this nutrient can help maintain healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range, supporting overall cardiovascular function and heart wellness.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: D-Ribose Powder
product.description:
The primary source of energy for all cellular processes is a molecule known as ATP (adenosine triphosphate). Healthy active cells constantly replenish their supply of ATP to produce vital cellular energy.However, under conditions of stress, injury, or aging, critical body tissues, such as the heart and skeletal muscles, cannot produce ATP quickly enough for optimal performance. D-ribose, a carbohydrate molecule found in every living organism, facilitates the production of ATP.In studies conducted on healthy athletes, supplying cells with D-ribose quickly restored ATP levels to normal. By helping to rapidly refill depleted energy, it may be especially beneficial for heart health.D-Ribose Powder and D-Ribose Tablets can help speed up energy recovery, increase energy reserves, and maintain healthy energy levels in heart and muscle tissue

product.title: TMG Powder
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all; what is TMG? Trimethylglycine (TMG), also known as glycine betaine, refers to three methyl groups attached to each molecule of glycine.When a TMG methyl group is donated to a molecule of homocysteine, it becomes a beneficial amino acid, methionine.Wheat bran is the main dietary source of TMG, with smaller amounts available in other cereal grains. (1) TMG can also be made in the body from choline, an essential nutrient found in eggs, soybeans, and many other foods. (2,3)While working to promote healthy levels of homocysteine, alone or in conjunction with other nutrients, TMG has been attested as an important nutrient for cardiovascular health.Why it works:TMG has been linked to heart health by supporting already-healthy homocysteine levels to promote healthy cardiovascular function. (7,9)By having a positive impact on your homocysteine levels, TMG can help you stay healthy by supporting multiple systems throughout your body.TMG has also been associated with healthy blood pressure and mitochondrial function. (2,10-12) Moreover, it has also been found to promote healthy liver function. (13)The science behind the product:In the 1950s, TMG was discovered to be beneficial to the heart, and it seems to function similarly as some of the B vitamins (B6, B12, and folate). And like B vitamins, TMG is a methyl donor, providing extra methyl groups to hasten the conversion of homocysteine back to methionine. (4-6)When a TMG methyl group is donated to a molecule of homocysteine, it converts it to the non-toxic amino acid, methionine. (7)The role of TMG in healthy homocysteine metabolism is even more important when B vitamin levels are low. (8) Some evidence suggests TMG may be more efficient at regulating homocysteine levels than folate. (9)Research showing TMG's ability to promote healthy levels of homocysteine already within normal range, alone or in conjunction with other nutrients, confirms its status as an important nutrient for cardiovascular and overall health. (7,9)Studies show TMG can support a healthy inflammatory response by inhibiting the expression of NFkappaB, TNF-alpha, and other inflammatory proteins, which may partially explain its positive impacts. (14)Because intestinal microbes can make various by-products from TMG, the health of the gut microbiome influences the effects of TMG in the body. (15,16)If you want TMG capsules instead of powder, you can find it hereHow to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: No Flush Niacin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is niacin? It's a coenzyme that is called “B3” because it was the third B vitamin to be discovered.Niacin has many benefits, among others to help metabolize the foods you eat and promote healthy cellular energy production.No-Flush Niacin can allow true niacin activity without the characteristic niacin flush.Why it works: Niacin (vitamin B3) is an essential nutrient with important functions for maintaining cardiovascular, neurological and overall health.Niacin supplements containing nicotinic acid can cause uncomfortable flushing, though. The special form of niacin used in No Flush Niacin, inositol hexanicotinate, can help deliver the niacin in a way that it doesn't cause the flushing many people experience.The science behind the product:How inositol hexanicotinate worksNo Flush Niacin contains inositol hexanicotinate, a special form of niacin. Inositol hexanicotinate consists of six molecules of niacin chemically linked to an inositol molecule. Some of the ingested inositol hexanicotinate is hydrolyzed in the body to slowly release free niacin and inositol. (1,2)However, because much of it remains intact in the body, it's thought that inositol hexanicotinate may exert direct effects in addition to those of its constituent inositol and niacin fractions, without causing the characteristic niacin flush. (2)More facts about vitamin B3 niacinMetabolism: Niacin is a water-soluble nutrient crucial to energy transfer reactions, particularly the ones that help your body metabolize glucose (sugar), fat and alcohol. (3,4) Vitamin B3 is required for the body to utilize dietary fats and carbohydrates and to metabolize alcohol. (3,4)Cellular energy:Vitamin B coenzymes (such as niacin) are crucial to the metabolic pathways that generate cellular energy. (4) Niacin helps metabolize the foods you eat and promotes healthy cellular energy production.Cholesterol: Niacin can have beneficial effects on blood lipids, helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range. (5,6) This attribute was identified in the 1950s. This makes niacin one of the most-studied nutrients for this purpose. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Advanced Lipid Control
product.description:
Healthy benefits at a glance:Heart health should be on everyone’s mind, and when we become older, it is more difficult for us to keep our blood lipid levels under control.Researchers have studied amla fruit extract, an extract of Indian gooseberry, and found it to support endothelial function, as well as help maintain healthy cholesterol and triglyceride levels.Amla is also shown to fight oxidative stress, which in turn can support a healthy vascular endothelium, the delicate inner lining of your arteries and veins. Why it works:Each dose of Advanced Lipid Control contains 500 mg Capros® amla.This standardized extract contains tannins that have been shown to promote healthy endothelial function, support a healthy inflammatory response, fight oxidative stress, and help maintain healthy levels of all three key blood lipids, LDL, high-density lipoprotein (HDL), and triglycerides, as well as C-reactive protein. (1-7)Science behind the product:In a 12-week clinical trial, individuals were divided into three groups. One group took a placebo twice daily, another took 250 mg of amla extract twice daily, and the third group took 500 mg of amla extract twice daily. In the group taking 500 mg twice daily of amla extract, reported (5). LDL cholesterol decreased 21,8% Protective HDL increased 22,2% Triglycerides decreased 19,2% Total cholesterol decreased 11,1%

product.title: Forskolin
product.description:
What Is forskolin? It's a compound extracted from Coleus forskohlii, an ancient medicinal plant. Forskolin's basic mechanism of action is the activation of an enzyme, adenylate cyclase. This enzyme increases cyclic adenosine monophosphate (cAMP) in cells. The cAMP compound is crucial for healthy cellular function, perhaps the most important cell-regulating compound in your body. This is because cAMP supports communication between cells in response to extra-cellular stimuli.Cellular cardiovascular, and metabolic health Activating cAMP and maintaining healthy levels and function of cAMP has been shown to help maintain cellular signaling and healthy cell energy, promote cardiovascular and metabolic health, support healthy cell division in skin and other tissues.It may also help maintain a healthy weight. Cellular nutrient with clinical studies In clinical and laboratory research, forskolin has been shown to support cardiac muscle strength, normal blood vessel dilation and healthy cerebral blood flow.Extracts of Coleus forskohlii have also been found to support healthy fat metabolism and body composition, support normal immune activity in skin and stabilize airway openness.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract
product.description:
People who try to limit carbohydrate exposure can still experience higher-than-desired blood sugar levels throughout the day. The reason is that blood sugar can surge to high levels after meals. This high level can last for hours, even a day!Studies show that in people with normal fasting glucose levels, maintaining healthy glucose levels after meals may provide additional support for cardiovascular and metabolic health. CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract is a non-GMO supplement that can help maintain already-healthy glucose and insulin levels after meals.Green coffee extract addresses this widespread problem, by limiting the blood sugar rise after a meal. This is made possible by a green coffee compound, chlorogenic that inhibits the release of an enzyme responsible for excess glucose in the blood. Another means by which chlorogenic acid helps is by inhibiting an intestinal enzyme that breaks apart complex sugars and enhance their absorption into the bloodstream. Studies show that gaining control of after-meal surges may provide additional support for cardiovascular and metabolic health.Why CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract? Coffee originates from a berry grown on trees. Its green seeds become coffee beans that have a higher amount of phenolic acids than the berry. Many benefits of the coffee beans are destroyed during the roasting process. CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract (GCA®) is produced from organically grown green Arabica coffee beans through a patented extraction process. The resulting GCA® (green coffee extract) is standardised to 50% chlorogenic acids for maximum potency, maximum effect in helping to maintain healthy glucose levels. A 200 mg clinical dose of this extract was shown to induce a 14% drop in glucose spikes within 30 minutes after meals. This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program. Results may vary.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Garlic
product.description:
Garlic has been valued for centuries for its many beneficial abilities. Garlic is known throughout the world as an amazing flavor enhancer, but it also boasts multiple health benefits for the body. As an important cell detoxifier, it contains compounds that prevent the formation of blood clots in your body. Among other health benefits are stimulating immunity and lowering inflammatory activity. Clinical studies show that as much as 5-10 grams of garlic extract is effective in enhancing human immune responses. Optimised Garlic capsules contain 10,000 ppm allicin, a key health-promoting component of non-aged garlic. In fact, studies have highlighted allicin’s involvement in immune response and oxidative stress.

product.title: Super Bio-Curcumin® Turmeric Extract
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Use the curcumin extract in Super Bio-Curcumin® to help support your immune- and inflammatory response regulation and benefit from the many other health benefits that extracts from the superfood turmeric can bring to your body.Super Bio-Curcumin® Turmeric Extract contains unique curcumin extract that is absorbed up to 7 times more easily and stays twice as long in your bloodstream as conventional curcumin supplements. Why it works:Turmeric, where curcumin comes from, is no less than a true superfood. Curcumin extracts can inhibit inflammatory factors in the body, support your digestive function, and encourage healthy cell division. It can also contribute to maintaining normal, healthy brain (1-11), platelet, and pancreatic function. (12-17)And while doing all of this, it can also help to fight free radicals (12,18) and encourage the maintenance of a stable hormone balance.Life Extension's ultra-potent curcumin formula contains the highly-absorbable BCM-95® extract, which brings out the maximum health benefits of curcumin.The science behind the product:Curcumin promotes your body's healthy response to inflammation by inhibiting key inflammatory factors such as NF-kappaB. This is a protein molecule that acts like an "on-switch" in genes governing the body's pro-inflammatory responses. In relation to this, curcumin has been shown to exert powerful inhibitory effects on NF-kappaB activation. (19-24)Furthermore, clinical trials suggest that curcumin can promote healthy bowel function and joint health. (10, 25-34)Moreover, curcumin can also benefit your mind. Curcumin extract can promote the health of the immune system by inhibiting histamine release from mast cells. (18,35-38) In some studies, curcumin supported healthy brain function and offered neuroprotective benefits. (1-11)Curcumin also supports pancreatic function by encouraging pancreatic islet health. Curcumin's multifaceted benefits even include antioxidant (39-40) protection as well as hormone balance support.Finally, research indicates that curcumin can help protect against estrogen-mimicking chemicals (41-46), inhibit free radicals, and promote normal cell growth.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Curcumin from turmeric is a remarkable botanical extract that can support multiple aspects of your wellness. This formula can help regulate your body's inflammatory response while promoting immune system balance, joint comfort, and cognitive health. Super Bio-Curcumin® delivers enhanced bioavailability through its proprietary BCM-95® extract. Your body absorbs this specialized curcumin formulation up to 7 times more effectively than standard options, and it remains active in your bloodstream twice as long, ensuring you receive optimal benefits from every serving.

Why this formula works: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, functions as a superfood with extensive research supporting its wellness applications. This extract can inhibit key inflammatory factors while encouraging healthy cell division throughout your body. Curcumin's benefits extend to supporting normal brain, platelet, and pancreatic function. It also provides antioxidant protection against free radicals and helps maintain balanced hormone levels. Life Extension's BCM-95® extract represents a breakthrough in curcumin delivery, maximizing the compound's natural health-promoting properties.

Backed by science: Inflammatory response regulation Curcumin promotes your body's balanced inflammatory response by inhibiting NF-kappaB, a protein molecule that acts as an "on-switch" for genes governing pro-inflammatory reactions. Clinical studies demonstrate that curcumin exerts powerful inhibitory effects on NF-kappaB activation, helping maintain healthy inflammatory pathways throughout the body. Joint and digestive support Multiple clinical trials suggest that curcumin can encourage healthy bowel function and promote joint wellness. The compound's ability to modulate inflammatory factors contributes to improved comfort and mobility in joints while supporting optimal digestive system performance. Cognitive and neuroprotective benefits Research indicates that curcumin extract can promote healthy brain function through multiple mechanisms. Studies show neuroprotective effects that may help maintain cognitive performance. The compound supports mental clarity and brain health as you age. Immune system modulation Curcumin can benefit your immune response by inhibiting histamine release from mast cells. This action helps maintain balanced immune function without overstimulation, supporting your body's natural defense systems. Pancreatic function support This formula encourages pancreatic health by supporting the wellness of pancreatic islets. Maintaining optimal pancreatic function is essential for metabolic balance and overall vitality. Antioxidant protection Curcumin provides robust antioxidant activity, helping protect your cells from oxidative stress caused by free radicals. This protection supports cellular integrity and promotes healthy aging processes throughout the body. Hormone balance maintenance Research indicates that curcumin can help protect against estrogen-mimicking chemicals found in the environment. The compound supports healthy hormone metabolism and encourages normal cell growth patterns. Superior absorption with BCM-95® This formula features BCM-95®, a patented curcumin extract enhanced with turmeric essential oils. This combination delivers up to 7 times greater absorption than conventional curcumin supplements and maintains therapeutic blood levels twice as long, ensuring you receive maximum benefits from each capsule.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Rhodiola Extract
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Rhodiola (Rhodiola rosea) can help optimize ATP production in the mitochondria. Clinical studies show it can increase both physical and mental performance.This formula uses only authentic rhodiola rosea species, two potent compounds found in the rhodiola extract used in clinical trials.Why it worksA common complaint among older adults is the loss of physical and mental energy. As people age, their cells produce less energy, and cientists believe it to be a critical factor behind many health problems. (1,2)Rhodiola has demonstrated a remarkable ability to promote production of cellular energy and fight fatigue. This is made possible by enhancing the activity of mitochondria, the powerhouses of the cells, providing more of the energy the whole body requires for everyday function. (3)The science behind the product:Physical & mental performanceClinical trials suggest that Rhodiola rosea can promote both physical capacity and cognitive function. (4-8) This includes enhancing endurance and resiliency, associative thinking, memory, focus, calculation, and audio/visual perception speeds. (7,9) A healthy stress responseRhodiola is an adaptogen, which means that it can impact the body's stress response in a healthy way. (6,8,10-12). Research shows that it can help handle daily physical and mental stressors more effectively. Clinically studied, standardized extractRhodiola Extract contains an extract standardized to 3% rosavins and a no less of 1% salidroside, matching the concentrations used in research. (7)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Rhodiola can help optimize ATP production in your mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells. Clinical studies demonstrate that this adaptogenic herb can increase both physical and mental performance naturally. This formula uses only authentic Rhodiola rosea species, featuring the two potent compounds found in the rhodiola extract used in clinical trials. These active ingredients work together to promote cellular energy metabolism and fight fatigue.

Why this formula works: Are you experiencing a loss of physical and mental energy as you age? This common complaint among older adults stems from cells producing less energy over time, which scientists believe plays a critical role in many age-related health concerns. Rhodiola has demonstrated a remarkable ability to promote cellular energy production and combat tiredness. This adaptogenic herb enhances mitochondrial activity, providing more of the energy your whole body requires for everyday function. By supporting your cellular powerhouses, rhodiola can help you maintain the vitality and stamina you need for an active lifestyle. This natural approach to energy enhancement works with your body's own systems.

Backed by science: Physical performance & endurance Clinical trials suggest that Rhodiola rosea can promote physical capacity and resilience. Research demonstrates enhanced endurance during exercise and improved recovery from physical exertion, making this herb particularly valuable for maintaining an active lifestyle as you age. Cognitive function & mental clarity Rhodiola supports multiple aspects of your cognitive performance. Studies show improvements in associative thinking, memory retention, focus, and calculation abilities. The herb also enhances audio and visual perception speeds, helping you stay mentally sharp throughout your day. Adaptogenic stress response support Rhodiola functions as an adaptogen, which means it can impact your body's stress response in a beneficial way. Research shows that this herb helps you handle daily physical and mental stressors more effectively, promoting balanced resilience without overstimulation. ATP & mitochondrial function The secret behind rhodiola's energy-promoting effects lies in its ability to optimize mitochondrial function. By enhancing ATP production in these cellular powerhouses, the herb provides sustained natural energy without relying on stimulants or causing crashes later in the day. Clinically studied standardized extract This formula contains rhodiola extract standardized to 3% rosavins and no less than 1% salidroside. These concentrations match those used in successful clinical research, ensuring you receive therapeutic levels of the active compounds responsible for rhodiola's remarkable health benefits.

product.title: Melatonin, 3 mg
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports.Natural production of this hormone declines with age. (1-3) This can disturb your circadian rhythm and, as a result thereof, your quality of sleep. (4-6) Research shows that it does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health.Why it works:Melatonin is a hormone that is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock”. (7,8) Melatonin is primarily synthesized in your pineal gland and is released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, studies show that it also has many other health advantages: Sleep support The body’s own production of melatonin is reduced with the natural aging process. That’s why supplementation with this hormone can be a natural solution for people in advanced age who have trouble sleeping. Supplementing with this hormone can help people who deal with sleep trouble and help them balance their circadian rhythm. Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl), and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it also supports other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it provides protection against a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11) Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin can therefore support the immune system as a whole. (12,13) Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20) The science behind the product:Melatonin can be delivered in a variety of ways, from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery.This melatonin product contains a high 3 mg dose of immediate-release melatonin. The immediate-release form of melatonin can help initiate sleep faster and induce more restful and regenerative sleep.How to use:Take one (1) capsule 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Melatonin is naturally secreted from the pineal gland at night, and should be taken at night for optimal results.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders).Use caution if combining with alcohol.This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant.Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Health benefits overview: Achieving quality sleep is crucial for your physical health, mental clarity, and overall well-being. Melatonin, 3 mg can help regulate your circadian rhythm – your body's natural sleep-wake cycle – which naturally declines with age. Beyond promoting restful sleep, this formula offers remarkable antioxidant protection, DNA defense, immune system enhancement, and cognitive health advantages. Do you struggle to fall asleep or wake up feeling unrested?

Why this formula works: Melatonin is a hormone naturally produced in your pineal gland, derived from the amino acid tryptophan. It primarily regulates your circadian rhythm, commonly known as your "body clock," with synthesis occurring mainly at night to facilitate easier sleep onset. As you age, natural melatonin production declines, which can disrupt your sleep patterns and overall health. Supplementation can help restore optimal levels, balancing your internal clock while providing additional benefits for cellular protection, immune function, and brain health. Research shows that melatonin offers a range of scientifically validated advantages beyond just helping you sleep better.

Backed by science: Are you looking for a natural solution to support your nightly routine? Sleep quality enhancement This immediate-release 3 mg formula can help you fall asleep faster and experience more restful, regenerative sleep. Natural melatonin production diminishes with the aging process, which is why supplementation offers a science-backed approach for maintaining healthy sleep patterns. This formula can help those who experience difficulty falling asleep by supporting your body's natural circadian rhythm. The immediate-release form delivers melatonin quickly to help initiate sleep more efficiently. Powerful antioxidant defense Research demonstrates that melatonin possesses robust antioxidant properties. It scavenges common free radicals – specifically hydroxyl and peroxyl radicals – more efficiently than many other antioxidants. Additionally, it enhances the effectiveness of other antioxidants in your body, raising overall protective capacity throughout your system for comprehensive cellular defense. Cellular DNA protection Melatonin plays a critical role in safeguarding cellular DNA. It provides defense against peroxynitrite, a particularly aggressive free radical that attacks DNA strands inside cells. By neutralizing this threat, melatonin can help inhibit oxidative damage at the cellular level, promoting long-term cellular integrity and youthful function. Immune system activation This hormone can help activate T-helper cells, which regulate how other immune cells respond to foreign molecules and potential threats. By stimulating these crucial immune regulators, melatonin can support your immune system's overall function and responsiveness, helping you maintain optimal wellness throughout the year. Cognitive function support Age-related cognitive changes are a natural part of aging, but melatonin levels in the body may correlate with cognitive health maintenance. Melatonin supports the brain's intrinsic antioxidant defense system and can help counter factors that contribute to age-related cognitive decline, including free radical activity in brain tissue. This makes it an essential nutrient for maintaining mental sharpness as you age.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

Health benefits overview: Getting quality rest is fundamental to your physical well-being, mental clarity, and overall vitality. If you struggle with falling asleep or staying asleep throughout the night, your body's natural circadian rhythm may need support. Melatonin, 300 mcg can help encourage restful sleep patterns while offering additional wellness benefits. Beyond promoting better sleep quality, this gentle formula can support antioxidant protection, DNA health, immune function, and cognitive vitality as you age.

Why this formula works: Your body naturally produces melatonin, a hormone derived from tryptophan that helps regulate your sleep-wake cycle. However, natural production of this vital hormone declines as you get older, which can disrupt your circadian rhythm and compromise sleep quality. This low-dose formula delivers 300 mcg of melatonin per capsule, making it ideal if you're seeking subtle sleep support without higher concentrations. The gentle potency allows your body to restore natural sleep patterns without overwhelming your system. Melatonin is primarily produced in your pineal gland and released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Supplementing with this hormone can be an effective natural solution for maintaining balanced sleep cycles, especially as production naturally decreases with age.

Backed by science: Sleep quality and circadian rhythm balance Do you find yourself tossing and turning at night, unable to drift off peacefully? Research demonstrates that melatonin supplementation can help people who experience sleep difficulties restore their natural circadian rhythm and enjoy more restful nights. As your body's own melatonin production diminishes over time, supplementing with this hormone becomes particularly valuable for promoting consistent sleep-wake patterns. This can help you fall asleep more quickly and maintain deeper, more restorative rest throughout the night. Powerful antioxidant protection and DNA defense Beyond its well-known sleep benefits, melatonin functions as a potent antioxidant in your body. Studies show it scavenges common free radicals, including hydroxyl and peroxyl radicals, with remarkable efficiency compared to other antioxidants. Melatonin also enhances your body's overall antioxidant defense system by supporting other antioxidants working throughout your cells. Importantly, it provides protection against peroxynitrite, a specific type of free radical that attacks DNA strands inside cells, helping to maintain cellular DNA integrity and reduce oxidative damage. Immune system enhancement Your immune system depends on coordinated cellular responses to function optimally. Melatonin helps activate T-helper cells, which play a crucial regulatory role in coordinating immune responses to foreign molecules and potential threats. By encouraging T-helper cell activity, melatonin can strengthen your body's natural defense mechanisms. This immune-supporting effect adds another dimension to the comprehensive wellness benefits this hormone provides beyond sleep promotion. Cognitive wellness and brain health Are you concerned about maintaining sharp memory and mental clarity as you age? Evidence suggests that melatonin levels in the body may correlate with age-related cognitive health, making adequate levels particularly important for brain vitality. Melatonin can encourage your brain's natural antioxidant protection systems and help counter factors that contribute to cognitive decline over time, such as free radical accumulation in brain tissue. This makes it a valuable nutrient for supporting long-term cognitive function and mental sharpness.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Fucoidan with Maritech® 926
product.description:
Fucoidan is a little-known molecule, found in edible seaweeds. Native to the Japanese diet, it has been the subject of research attention.Almost 900 published studies confirm its potential for a healthy immune function, cell communication, and maintenance of tissue. Fucoidan is considered to be one of the key nutrients behind the exceptionally long, healthy lives enjoyed in Okinawa, Japan. Maritech® 926 fucoidan is sourced from hand-harvested, wild seaweed from the pristine ocean waters of Patagonia. A cutting-edge water extraction process ensures the provision of the critical nutritional benefit of Undaria pinnatifida. This is the species of seaweed used in the majority of scientific fucoidan studies. A single vegetarian capsule of Optimised Fucoidan with Maritech® 926 provides the same amount of fucoidan typically consumed daily by the Japanese. Most people require just one capsule per day, yet ageing individuals seeking to enhance the benefit may choose two.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Reishi Extract Mushroom Complex
product.description:
Highly absorbableMushroom extracts have been used for years. Reishi Extract Mushroom Complex is standardized for triterpenes and polysaccharides. This ultra-bioavailable formula includes spores to enhance your body's natural defenses and support a healthy immune system. Comprehensive mushroom extract This full-spectrum extract contains compounds that stimulate the body's hematopoietic stem cells, T cells, and other critical immune factors. (1-7)Reishi’s triterpenes, polysaccharides, and other constituents can promote the activation of cell surface receptors that regulate immune cell function. (8-10)Powerful antioxidant supportMoreover, reishi mushrooms have been demonstrated to encourage the production of antioxidant enzymes such as superoxide dismutase (SOD), catalase, and glutathione. These antioxidants can help fortify the body’s natural defenses against free radicals and oxidative stress. (11)

product.title: Peony Immune
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:A healthy immune system is essential to the health of your body. However, many people fail to make sure that their immune-system is always functioning normally, which may not be the case as the body ages. Being used in China for more than a millennium, from White Peony offer a component (paeoniflorin) that is now highly regarded as being important for your immunity.Peony Immune White Peony Root Extract is a standardized product that contributes to a balanced responsiveness, sensitivity, and strength of the immune system. While naturally helping with inflammation (proven by research), the compounds in this product promote immune homeostasis (optimal immune health).Peony extracts in Peony Immune can support normal immune-system function, thereby contributing to securing normal immune system responses. Why it works:A healthy and normal functioning immune system is absolutely essential to staying young and vital. The fact is that the body depends on balanced immune-cell activity to maintain effective, responsive, and capable of modulating immunity [1].White peony root extract found in Peony Immune is a standardized extract of active white peony compounds which have been shown to help maintain immune system balance, which is needed to stay healthy and help maintain a young, vital lifestyle. In fact, extracts from the white peony root have been used in China for supporting immune balance for more than 1,200 years [2].When talking about your immune system it is always a good idea to be proactive. White peony extracts in Peony Immune can contribute to normal over-all immune health if taken in accordance with the recommended use, and help enhance immune-system preparedness. The science behind the product:Researchers now emphasize a bioactive white peony extract component called paeoniflorin which can support your immune system [3-5].Peony Immune White Peony Root Extract is a standardized extract of active white peony compounds. Furthermore, a host of human clinical trials have showed that these compounds promote a healthy and balanced inflammatory response [6-10].Glucoside extract from the white peony root has shown an ability to bring an over-excited immune system back to normal.How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Specially-Coated Bromelain
product.description:
Health benefits at a glanceFirst of all, what is bromelain? It's a group of natural enzymes found in the stem of the pineapple that are shown to help calm inflammation in the body.The vegetarian tablets in Specially-Coated Bromelain can provide optimal absorption of bromelain, promoting joint health and mobility.Why it works:Bromelain propertiesBromelain can help regulate fluid balance by inhibiting inflammatory cytokine production and stopping neutrophil migration, which is the movement of certain immune cells (white blood cells) that can worsen inflammation.Research also shows that bromelain can promote healthy circulation by supporting blood thickness (viscosity) and platelet activity. (1,3)Enteric-coated to bypass the stomachHowever, bromelain has to be enteric-coated so that it will not be activated in the stomach and used as a digestive enzyme. Such specially coated bromelain tablets pass into the small intestine, where they are absorbed into the bloodstream to provide benefits, such as a healthy inflammatory response to support comfort and function of the joints. (4)The science behind the product:Backed by clinical studies for joint healthAccording to research, enteric-coated bromelain is at least as effective as other approaches in supporting joint comfort, function, and health, and is well tolerated. (5)One study even found that bromelain is more effective than other methods for maintaining joint function at rest (41 percent for bromelain vs. 23 percent for other methods). Another clinical trial showed that specially coated bromelain resulted in an overall increase in general well-being, along with improvement in comfort and physical function. (6-7)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Bromelain is a group of proteolytic enzymes naturally derived from pineapple stems, recognized for its ability to promote a balanced inflammatory response. Specially-Coated Bromelain can help maintain comfortable joint function and mobility throughout your daily activities. The enteric-coated tablets ensure optimal absorption by bypassing stomach digestion, allowing the enzymes to work systemically. This formula can encourage healthy circulation and support overall joint wellness.

Why this formula works: The key to bromelain's effectiveness lies in its unique proteolytic enzyme activity and special enteric coating. Bromelain helps regulate your body's fluid balance by inhibiting inflammatory cytokine production and controlling neutrophil migration, which are immune cells that can contribute to excessive inflammation. Research demonstrates that bromelain can promote optimal circulation by supporting healthy blood viscosity and platelet activity. However, without proper enteric coating, bromelain would simply be activated in the stomach and used as a digestive enzyme, missing its systemic benefits. The specially coated tablets pass intact through your stomach into the small intestine, where they're absorbed into the bloodstream. This delivery system ensures you receive the full joint comfort and inflammatory balance support that bromelain offers.

Backed by science: Clinical evidence for joint health Studies show that enteric-coated bromelain is at least as effective as other approaches in supporting joint comfort, function, and overall health. Clinical research demonstrates that this natural enzyme is well tolerated by most individuals seeking joint support. Superior effectiveness for joint function One notable study found that bromelain demonstrated 41 percent effectiveness for maintaining joint function at rest, compared to only 23 percent for other common methods. This significant difference highlights the unique properties of bromelain enzymes in supporting your joint health. Enhanced well-being and physical function Another clinical trial revealed that specially coated bromelain resulted in an overall increase in general well-being among participants. The study also showed measurable improvements in comfort levels and physical function, allowing individuals to maintain their active lifestyles more comfortably. How the enteric coating works The enteric coating is essential for bromelain's systemic activity. Without this protective layer, stomach acid would activate the enzymes prematurely, limiting them to digestive functions only. The coating allows bromelain to reach your small intestine intact, where it can be absorbed and deliver its inflammation-balancing and circulation-supporting benefits throughout your body.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Huperzine A
product.description:
This standardized extract from the Chinese club moss has potent beneficial effects on the metabolism of acetylcholine, a neurotransmitter well known for its importance to memory, cognition, and attention, with additional implications for brain aging and longevity. (1-4) In fact, Huperzine A powerfully modulates the activity of acetylcholinesterase, the enzyme that destroys acetylcholine. Huperzine A can cross the blood-brain barrier, indicating its excellent oral bioavailability, and it has a long duration of bioactivity. This makes Huperzine A both powerful and promising as a neuroprotectant. (1-4) Multiple clinical trials show that huperzine A can promote cognitive and memory function, in both the elderly and younger individuals. (5-8)This supplement is standardized for maximum efficacy.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Black Cumin Seed Oil
product.description:
As we age, a balanced immune and inflammatory response becomes critical to guarding our health. Research has shown Black Cumin Seed Oil to be particularly effective. Scientists have determined that black cumin seeds contain a broad spectrum of active compounds. When combined, they provide powerful and wide-ranging immune support and help with inflammation. Black Cumin Seed Oil has been proven to support the normal effectiveness of a number of biological factors involved in inflammation.An aging healthy immune system needs to orchestrate the activity of macrophages and helper T-cells. Black Cumin Seed Oil was also shown to support the optimal function of this vitally important defensive activity. By acting on both immune and inflammatory factors, Black Cumin Seed Oil supports a healthy immune system, so important in our elderly years, and facilitates a healthy inflammatory response.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Water-Soluble Pumpkin Seed Extract
product.description:
Water-Soluble Pumpkin Seed Extract offers a plant-based approach to promote prostate and urinary tract health. Solution for Bladder and Urinary ProblemsAging individuals frequently encounter a weakening of the bladder and its sphincter muscle that controls the release of urine, and it's common to experience urinary challenges. (1,2) Studies demonstrate that ingestion of water-soluble pumpkin seed extract can significantly improve the structural support of the bladder and the function of the sphincter muscle. (3-10) The data supporting the benefits of water-soluble pumpkin seed extract is particularly significant in studies conducted on women. Additionally, studies on aging men have also shown positive results. (6,9,10) A Powerful and Patented Method The pumpkin seed has a long history of being used for helping to maintain healthy bladder function.Japanese scientists have patented a technique to extract the water-soluble components of pumpkin seeds, which are absorbed much more efficiently into the bloodstream.These water-soluble pumpkin seed extracts seem to be the active components that relieve urinary discomfort experienced by many maturing women and men.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Cran-Max®
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Research suggests that cranberry proanthocyanidins may support a healthy urinary tract. This formula also contains polyphenols from Hibiscus sabdariffa to enhance cranberry's benefits.Together, these compounds can provide powerful urinary system health support.Why it Works:The anatomy of the female urinary tract differs greatly from that of men, resulting in the need for special nutritional support for women. Cranberry can provide this assistance. (1-5)Especially significant are the cranberry proanthocyanidins, which possess unique molecular features that specifically improve urinary health and provide numerous whole-body health benefits. (6-10)The Science Behind the Product:Cran-Max® whole cranberry fruit concentrateClinical studies show that cranberry not only can promote a healthy urinary tract (1-5) but also provide strong protection against oxidative stress. (11) A patented manufacturing process ensures that each capsule of Optimized Cran-Max® delivers the complete nutritional profile of the whole cranberry. The recommended dose of two capsules per day provides the proanthocyanidin equivalent of four 8-ounce glasses of cranberry juice.The Ellirose™ Hibiscus sabdariffa extract Ellirose™ is an innovative compound from Hibiscus sabdariffa flower and can offer a wide range of health benefits.This species is native to Africa, and its flower and calyx (the green floral envelope surrounding the blossom) are rich in anthocyanins and flavonoids, as well as many other valuable nutrients. (12)How to Use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Cran-Max®
product.description:
The Powerful Advantages of CranberriesThe anatomy of the female urinary tract differs greatly from that of men. As a result, they need additional nutritional support.Cranberries have been known for this benefit for decades, and many clinical studies demonstrate that cranberries can support a healthy urinary tract. (1-5) Additionally, the cranberry fruit protects against oxidative stress. (11) Especially notable are cranberry proanthocyanidins, which have unique molecular properties that specifically enhance urinary system health and provide whole-body benefits. (6-10)Whole Cranberry Fruit ConcentrateA patented manufacturing process ensures that each Cran-Max® provides the synergistic, complete nutritional profile of the whole cranberry. Each capsule delivers 500 mg of cranberry concentrate and contains potent polyphenols, organic acids, and antioxidants.Benefits of Cranberry Juice Without the CaloriesThe supplement is formulated from whole cranberries using an innovative extraction process and patented delivery system, ensuring that a higher concentration of the active nutrients reaches the bloodstream. No sugar is added.Each capsule is packed with powerful nutrients providing the same benefits as drinking four 8-ounce glasses of cranberry juice cocktail but without the calories. Plus, Cran-Max® requires just one dose per day!

product.title: Milk Thistle (Silymarin-Silibinins-Isosilybin A &/ B)
product.description:
The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions and keeps it clean of harmful substances. It is also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body. Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever. In Europe and Asia, herbal liver tonics have been in common use for centuries. Being validated through research, the benefits of these herbs contain compounds that assist in antioxidant activities, in stabilising cell membrane, enhancing bile secretion. Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body. Milk thistle (one of the herbs) extract has been long valued for supporting healthy liver function and is also a powerful antioxidant. (1-3)Silibinins, one of its compounds, received until recently most attention from research. Advanced extraction technology enables now to isolate and test other constituents too. Among the tested compounds, a silymarin constituent called isosilybin B proved to be the most efficient in maintaining healthy cell division. (4-10)Milk Thistle (Silymarin-Silibinins-Isosilybin A &/ B) contains standardised, top-grade potencies of silymarin, silibinins, isosilybin A and isosilybin B, providing the full spectrum of milk thistle’s liver- and prostate- supportive compounds. (8-13)The botanical extract in Milk Thistle (Silymarin-Silibinins-Isosilybin A &/ B) is a triple standardised milk thistle extract. In addition to an optimal 80% standardisation of the main active compounds, silymarin flavonolignans, this formula is further standardised to three highly active isomers (silibinins and isosilybin A and B).

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Chromium with Crominex® 3+
product.description:
Chromium is a critical micronutrient recognised for its vital role in maintaining healthy glucose metabolism. This advanced chromium complex, Crominex® 3+, has been optimised with a standardised extract of Indian gooseberry and a proprietary form of the adaptogen shilajit.Crominex® 3+ can help support:Normal cellular glucose absorption (1-3)Healthy endothelial function (4-6)Healthy lipid and triglyceride levels already within normal range (7-10)Normal cellular energy production (10)

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Magnesium Caps
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Magnesium is one of your body’s most important minerals. It is required as a cofactor in numerous of enzymatic processes within cells, and we need it for more than 300 biochemical reactions.Magnesium Caps contains three different forms of magnesium: oxide, citrate, and succinate. This delivers the daily dose of magnesium your body needs to support heart and bone health, healthy energy metabolism, brain function, and much more. Why it works: Cardiovascular health & blood pressure: Magnesium helps relax the smooth muscles in blood vessels, reducing vascular resistance and promoting healthy blood flow and cardiovascular function. Magnesium promotes a healthy inflammatory response and healthy endothelial function and helps inhibit oxidative stress to support cardiovascular health. (1) Magnesium also helps maintain healthy blood pressure levels. (2) Brain & nervous system: Magnesium plays a key role in the nervous system and encourages healthy brain function. Magnesium can also regulate the signaling of serotonin and other neurotransmitters, and adequate magnesium intake may promote a healthy mood. (3,4) Bone health & density: Along with calcium and other minerals, magnesium is an essential component of a healthy bone matrix. A well-mineralized bone matrix helps maintain strong, healthy bones. (5); Metabolic health & more: Magnesium intake promotes many healthy metabolic factors, serum lipid profiles, and more. (6,7) Moreover, magnesium helps protect against free radical production. (8) The science behind the product: Magnesium Caps provides one of the highest concentrations of elemental magnesium per capsule available on the market. Due to it being inexpensive, it is recommended for everyone to supplement with at least 500 mg of magnesium per day. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Magnesium stands as one of your body's most crucial minerals, essential for supporting wellness from head to toe. Magnesium Caps can help maintain cardiovascular function, bone strength, and brain health while supporting energy metabolism throughout your day. This formula delivers 500 mg of elemental magnesium in three complementary forms: oxide, citrate, and succinate. Together they can promote over 300 biochemical reactions your body depends on for optimal function.

Why this formula works: Your body relies on magnesium as a vital cofactor in countless enzymatic processes within cells. Without adequate magnesium, these essential reactions slow down, potentially affecting how you feel and function daily. This formula provides one of the highest concentrations of elemental magnesium per capsule available. Magnesium helps relax smooth muscles in blood vessels, promoting healthy blood flow and cardiovascular wellness while supporting balanced blood pressure levels. Beyond heart health, magnesium plays a key role in your nervous system, encouraging optimal brain function. It can also help regulate neurotransmitter signaling, including serotonin, which may promote a balanced mood throughout your day.

Backed by science: Cardiovascular and blood pressure support Research demonstrates that magnesium helps relax smooth muscles in your blood vessels, reducing vascular resistance. This promotes optimal blood flow and cardiovascular function, supporting your heart's natural rhythm and performance. Brain and nervous system wellness Studies show magnesium encourages healthy brain function through its role in the nervous system. Clinical evidence indicates that adequate magnesium intake may promote balanced mood by regulating serotonin and other neurotransmitter signaling pathways. Bone health and density Along with calcium and other minerals, magnesium serves as an essential component of a healthy bone matrix. Research confirms that a well-mineralized bone matrix helps maintain strong, dense bones as you age, supporting your skeletal health and mobility. Metabolic health and antioxidant protection Scientific studies reveal that magnesium intake promotes numerous healthy metabolic factors and balanced serum lipid profiles. Additionally, magnesium helps defend against free radical production, providing antioxidant support for your cells and tissues.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Zinc Lozenges
product.description:
Zinc is an essential mineral needed for many of your body’s functions, such as healthy protein synthesis and the biochemical activity of over 300 essential enzymes.Among these functions are antioxidant properties, promoting healthy immune and reproductive organs, and taste sensitivity. Besides, zinc supports proper development during pregnancy and childhood.Maintaining adequate levels of zinc is equally important to aging adults. As people grow older, their immune function declines, partly due to the decreasing size and function of the thymus gland.Evidence suggests that zinc may help maintain the thymus gland's healthy function in elderly people. Moreover, a zinc deficiency in elderly adults may contribute to age-related immune decline and immunosenescence.Zinc Lozenges provide premium-grade zinc in a pleasant citrus-orange naturally flavored tablet. It delivers 18.75 mg of high quality zinc in the forms of zinc oxide and zinc gluconate to offer powerful support for immune health and function.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Boron
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is boron? Boron is a trace mineral needed for optimal health. It doesn't get the attention that other more recognized nutrients receive, but it plays an important role in supporting healthy aging. For instance, as we get older, supporting bone health needs to become a higher priority in order to maintain a healthy and active lifestyle. Boron is shown to have beneficial effects on supporting bone health and nervous system function. (1,2) Why it works:Boron can help maintain optimal bone metabolism, as well as promote optimal immune function, nervous system health, and antioxidant activity. (1-4) Research suggests humans require a minimum of 1 mg of boron per day to maintain optimal health, but despite its prevalence in fruits, vegetables, legumes, and nuts, it appears many people don’t get this amount on a regular basis. (1,5) A daily intake of 3 mg boron per day is recommended to support bone health. (6)The science behind the product:A lack of boron can result in the limited absorption of calcium and this mineral can often be underutilized. Boron encourages healthy bone growth and mineralization.This effect appears to be due in part to the activation and stabilization of vitamin D and positive impacts on supporting estrogen metabolism. (5-7) In healthy men, boron was found to encourage free testosterone levels. (8) Boron supplementation has been shown to help maintain joint comfort and maintain healthy hormone activity. (1) In a randomized controlled trial, boron supplementation was found to inhibit discomfort at the beginning of the menstrual cycle, presumably by helping to promote a healthy inflammatory response. (9) How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Boron is an essential trace mineral that can play a crucial role in maintaining your bone strength and overall vitality as you age. This often-overlooked nutrient can help promote optimal bone metabolism while encouraging healthy immune function and nervous system health. By incorporating boron into your daily routine, you can support your body's ability to maintain strong bones and balanced mineral absorption. Research shows this mineral may also help maintain comfortable joints and encourage healthy hormone activity throughout your body.

Why this formula works: While boron is found naturally in fruits, vegetables, legumes, and nuts, many people don't get enough from diet alone. The amount varies significantly based on soil quality and geographical location, making supplementation a reliable way to ensure adequate intake. Each capsule delivers 3 mg of boron – the daily amount research suggests is optimal for encouraging bone health benefits. This precise dosage can help your body maintain proper mineral balance and support multiple body systems simultaneously. Boron works synergistically with other nutrients in your body, particularly calcium, magnesium, and vitamin D. This mineral can help activate and stabilize vitamin D while promoting the effective absorption and utilization of calcium and magnesium for robust skeletal support.

Backed by science: Bone strength and mineralization support Boron can encourage healthy bone growth and mineralization by helping your body retain calcium and magnesium more effectively. Studies demonstrate that adequate boron intake may help maintain bone density and the structural integrity of the spongy inner layer of bones that contributes to overall skeletal strength. This mineral appears to work by activating and stabilizing vitamin D, which is essential for calcium absorption. Research indicates that boron deficiency can lead to decreased bone volume and reduced skeletal resilience, highlighting the importance of maintaining optimal levels. Hormone metabolism and balance Research suggests boron can play a beneficial role in encouraging healthy estrogen and testosterone metabolism. In healthy men, boron supplementation has been associated with maintaining free testosterone levels within normal ranges. For women, studies indicate that boron may help ease occasional discomfort at the beginning of the menstrual cycle, presumably by promoting a balanced inflammatory response. This makes it a versatile mineral for supporting hormonal wellness across different life stages. Immune function and antioxidant activity Beyond bone health, boron can encourage optimal immune system function and nervous system vitality. This mineral has been shown to promote antioxidant activity within your cells, helping protect against oxidative stress that accumulates over time. Joint comfort and mobility Clinical evidence demonstrates that boron supplementation may help maintain joint comfort and flexibility. By promoting a healthy inflammatory response and supporting connective tissue integrity, this mineral can contribute to your overall physical comfort and mobility. Cognitive support Emerging research suggests boron may help promote cognitive performance and short-term memory, particularly in older adults. This adds another dimension to the comprehensive health benefits this trace mineral can provide.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
