product.title: Iron Protein Plus
product.description:
The Importance of IronIron is an important mineral and an integral part of many proteins and enzymes that maintain good health. It is an essential component of proteins involved in oxygen transport and the regulation of cell growth and differentiation. (1)An iron deficiency limits oxygen delivery to cells, resulting in fatigue, poor work performance, and decreased immunity. Conversely, excess amounts of iron can result in toxicity and even death.Iron SupplementationTo supplement with iron protein succinylate has been shown to promote healthy red blood cell formation and support healthy oxygen-carrying capacity of blood, hemoglobin. Iron Protein Plus includes the iron protein succinylate. This form of iron is not only well-tolerated in people with sensitive stomachs, but it’s also highly absorbable. (2) That one-two combination makes Iron Protein Plus an ideal formula for anyone who needs to supplement their iron intake.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bone Restore, 120 caps
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The natural aging process can lead to a deficiency in calcium. Many people don't obtain enough calcium to offset the calcium deficit that normal aging can spur on. Bone Restore can help you maintain strong and healthy bones by providing three forms of calcium: dicalcium malate, calcium fructoborate, and calcium bisglycinate chelate, plus extra nutrients for strong bones. Moreover, this supplement is delivered in a capsule that ensures full breakdown during digestion. Why it works:The calcium carbonate and calcium citrate in Bone Restore are ideal for calcium supplementation. However, for calcium to be effective, it's not enough to just supplement with just this mineral.Dietary calcium has to be accompanied by sufficient amounts of other nutrients such as magnesium, vitamin D3, manganese, boron, silicon, and zinc to have the highest possible impact on bone health. These nutrients are essential cofactors for maintaining normal bone health.The science behind the product:Many forms of calcium are not well-absorbed. (1) Bone Restore provides 700 mg of easily absorbed calcium. It also contains 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 and trace minerals for bone health support:Vitamin D is essential for absorbing calcium from the digestive tract into the bloodstream, thus it is vital for helping maintain healthy bones and teeth. Magnesiumis needed to maintain strong bones and a healthy vascular system. (2) Bone Restore delivers 300 mg of magnesium from magnesium oxide. Zinc, manganese, and silicon are essential for healthy bone maintenance and connective tissues (manganese). You have to have sufficient intake of these elements to support healthy bone formation. (3-5) Boron is a trace mineral that supports bone and joint strength. This formula contains patented Fruitex B® OsteoBoron®, made from a novel calcium/carbohydrate/boron complex. (6)How to use:Take four (4) capsules daily. Scientific studies suggest calcium supplementation in divided doses, with food in the morning and evening, may yield the best results. Maintaining an optimal vitamin D blood level also helps to maximise calcium absorption.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bone Restore with Vitamin K2
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Most people are aware that calcium supports your bones. But what you might not realize is that dietary calcium requires adequate amounts of other vital nutrients to be most effective.Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 can help maintain bone health and strength with highly absorbable calcium, vitamins K2 and D3, and important minerals like magnesium, boron, zinc, manganese, and silicon. Why it works:Although calcium is the most abundant mineral in the body and is a key component in building bone and teeth, most people don’t get enough calcium to offset the amount being lost over the course of aging.Postmenopausal women commonly experience loss of bone mineral density but older men can also face this issue.Moreover, many forms of calcium are not well-absorbed. Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 provides three types of calcium that are easy for the body to absorb. Loss of bone density is not just associated with calcium deficiency alone. Vitamin D3 and K2 are essential for helping maintain strong, healthy bones and teeth.Also adequate amounts of important minerals like magnesium, zinc, manganese, silicon, and boron must be available in the body so that calcium and phosphorus can be used to build bone strength. The science behind the product:Three types of calciumSome forms of calcium supplements are better absorbed than others. (1) Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 provides a total of 700 mg of three types of easily absorbed calcium: Calcium carbonateCalcium citrate malateCalcium bisglycinateThese are delivered in a capsule that ensures better utilization by the body. Vitamins K2 & D3Vitamin D is essential for absorbing calcium from the digestive tract into the bloodstream. (2,3) And vitamin K2 helps maintain bone density by promoting calcium transport from the bloodstream into bone. (4-6) Hence, vitamins D3 and K2 are essential for maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Magnesium, zinc & other bone-healthy mineralsMagnesium is necessary to maintain strong bones. (7) Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 offers 300 mg of magnesium from magnesium oxide. Zinc, manganese and silicon are essential for healthy bone maintenance. (6,8,9) You have to have sufficient intake of these elements to encourage healthy bone formation. (6,10) Boron is a trace mineral with beneficial effects for bone and joint strength. (9,11) This formula contains patented Fruitex B® OsteoBoron® made from a calcium/carbohydrate/boron complex similar to what’s found in fruits and vegetables.How to use:Take four (4) capsules daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Scientific studies suggest calcium supplementation in divided doses with food in the morning and evening may yield the best results.Maintaining an optimal vitamin D blood level also helps maximize calcium absorption.

product.title: Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Selenium is trace mineral essential to normal bodily functioning.Sodium selenite, L-selenomethionine, and selenium-methyl L-selenocysteine found in Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E are forms of this mineral that supports longevity, heart- and brain health, and is vital in forming certain antioxidants. This formula also contains vitamin E for synergetic health promoting effect.Why it works:Selenium is an important factor to fight one of the primary causes of premature aging: oxidative damage. Levels of several health-promoting minerals, including selenium, have been shown to be high among some of the world’s longest-living people. (1)Selenium comes in many different forms. Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E provides the body with three unique forms of selenium together with vitamin E for health and longevity support. Each form of selenium acts differently to support healthy cell division, and vitamin E has been shown to work synergistically with selenium. (2)The science behind the product:Antioxidant, thyroid & immune support Selenium plays a crucial role in safeguarding your body against oxidative damage. This is due to its role in the production of glutathione peroxidases, a group of powerful antioxidant enzymes. (3)Moreover, selenium can contribute to maintaining normal thyroid and immune function in healthy individuals. (4,5)Healthy cell division, heart & brain healthSelenium is a vital nutrient for supporting healthy cell division. (6) However, its ability to promote a healthy inflammatory response and quench free radicals has led researchers to explore its beneficial effects related to other conditions involving oxidative damage, particularly for heart and brain health. (7,8)How to use: Take one (1) capsule per day with food, or as recommended by your healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Tri Sugar Shield™
product.description:
Many ageing individuals experience rising blood sugar levels. Despite a healthy diet and exercise, it can happen due to many factors, such as the rapid conversion of starch into glucose. The result affects even health-conscious, active people, as they age.An all-natural approach has been designed to support the natural balance of key glucose pathways. Tri Sugar Shield provides three plant-derived nutrients that offer unrivalled optimal support for healthy glucose metabolism in ageing individuals. Life Extension Tri Sugar Shield™ contains the following three nutrients: Sorghum Bran Extract - a grass plant found in Southern Asia that helps maintain healthy blood sugar levels, by regulating four different mechanisms:Balancing the rate of sugar manufacture in the liver (gluconeogenesis);Promoting insulin sensitivity;Regulating PPAR-gamma, a metabolic thermostat that controls glucose metabolism;Regulating the enzyme alpha-amylase, which in turn controls the release of sugar found in starch. Mulberry leaf extract - used in Chinese traditional medicine for centuries. It targets three different mechanisms:Targeting the alpha-glucosidase enzyme to regulate conversion of starch into glucose;Supporting glucose transporter GLUT4 that moves glucose out of the bloodstream and into muscle and liver cells;Promoting insulin sensitivity.Phloridzin - a natural polyphenol found in various fruit trees. It helps to maintain healthy blood sugar levels, by:Targeting carrier protein SGLT1, in turn helping to block the absorption of glucose into the bloodstream;Targeting carrier protein SGLT2, which supports glucose elimination via urine.By targeting these diverse glucose pathways, Life Extension® Tri Sugar Shield™ delivers the widest possible support to help to naturally stabilise already healthy glucose levels.

product.title: Enhanced Stress Relief
product.description:
Lemon balm extractStress is pervasive in modern society. It can have real physiological effects on your body, and it's hard to find a natural antidote. The encouraging news is that lemon balm (Melissa officinalis), an herb in the mint family, has been shown in several studies to support a healthy stress response, mood and healthy sleep patterns. (1-3)As a perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region, it induces calming effects while enhancing memory and attention.Relaxation-promoting effects of L-theanine Green tea has long been thought to help relieve stress. (4) Modern science indicates that L-theanine, one of the key compounds in green tea, is responsible for this effect. (5-7) L-theanine can encourage a calming effect in the brain. This amino acid can modulate signaling of several neurotransmitters, including GABA, an inhibitory neurotransmitter involved in calming pathways in the brain. (8)A wealth of health-enhancing benefits Research shows that L-theanine has numerous health-enhancing effects, including promoting healthy cognitive function. (9)L-theanine has been shown to inhibit glutamate signaling in the brain. (5) Glutamate is an excitatory neurotransmitter.

product.title: Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Make sure that you get the quality of sleep you deserve with Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin, which contains the active ingredients bioactive milk peptides and Sendara®, a proprietary blend of ashwagandha and amla (Indian gooseberry). These ingredients can help you support normal sleep and contribute to reducing stress, respectively.Why it works:Scientists attribute high stress levels in today’s everyday life as being a major culprit when it comes to sleep-related difficulties. And to add insult to injury, the quality and duration of sleep is declining as we grow older — and that at a time when we need the health benefits of a good night's rest more than ever.Decades of clinical research documents that a good night’s rest supports nearly all systems of the body, including: skin health and youthful appearance [1-4] healthy collagen formation [5-8] insulin levels already within normal range [9-11] healthy body weight [12,13] glucose levels already within normal range [14,15] blood pressure already within normal range [16,17] healthy cell division [18-20] cardiovascular health [21-24] and mood improvement [25-27]. That’s why Life Extension has developed Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin, which contains two natural compounds shown to support restful sleep, promote a healthy response to stress, and target sleep debt-related factors associated with skin aging.The science behind the product:Enhanced Sleep® without Melatonin contains two natural compounds that can promote better sleep and youthful appearance. First compound is bioactive milk peptides are popularly used in Europe to promote good and restful sleep patterns. Published studies present that this compound can also promote relaxation, support daytime cognition and help with stress [28-30]. Researchers published a study about women who experienced sleep-related difficulties. Sixty-three women participated in the study. It was revealed that 65,5% of women experienced improvement in their symptoms with 150 mg per day of bioactive milk peptides [31]. In another similar study men and women who took 150 mg per day of bioactive milk peptides for one month experienced a 50% improvement in sleep quality [32]. Additionally, study participants needed 30% less time to fall asleep after 4 weeks [32].Sendara® is a nutrient complex that consists of ashwagandha and Indian gooseberry extracts. These plant-based compounds acquired essential clinical validation. Indian gooseberry can provide antioxidant support and was used to maintain youthful skin health and appearance in many skin care products [33-36]. Ashwagandha can also promote a healthy response to stress. One clinical study reported that it can provide a 62% relaxation support with just 125 mg per day [37].How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.May be taken during daytime for stress or before bed to help with sleep.

product.title: Bioactive Milk Peptides
product.description:
Bioactive Milk Peptides (Lactium®) are a cutting-edge nutrient complex consisting of patented bioactive peptides, naturally found in milk. Used widely in Europe to promote sustained and restful sleep patterns, these bioactive milk peptides seem to promote relaxation, help with stress and support daytime cognition.A group of 63 women with sleep-related difficulties experienced 65.6% improvement in their symptoms with just 150 mg per day. In another study, the same 150 mg dose induced substantial improvements of sleep quality and stress response in 165 healthy adults. And in a third study, a group of healthy men and women taking daily 150 mg experienced sleep improvement after two weeks and after 4 weeks they needed less time to fall asleep.Use Bioactive Milk Peptides daily to help deal with the stress and pressures of every-day life, or before bedtime, to support relaxation. Each capsule contains the very same patented Lactium® formula Europeans have used for years to help with sleep and stress-related issues.

product.title: Optimized Saffron with Satiereal®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance First of all; what is saffron? It’s a spice made from the dried red stigmas (the thread-like parts) of the saffron crocus flower, Crocus sativus. Its naturally occurring plant compounds have been studied for their ability to support mood, appetite control, and healthy weight management. Optimized Saffron features a novel extract of saffron stigma that can help support weight management goals in just 8 weeks. The supplement is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian. How it works Sticking to healthy eating habits to maintain a healthy weight isn’t always easy. Everyday stress, emotional factors, and bad habits can lead to unnecessary snacking, even when you eat well and exercise regularly. Optimized Saffron can impact neurotransmitter signals to help you fight the urge to snack between meals or eat late at night, so you can stay on track with your weight management goals. This clinically studied, caffeine-free saffron stigma extract can promote satiety – the feeling of fullness – helping curb cravings. The science behind the product Controlling cravings naturally Saffron extract is shown to help reduce between-meal snacking, late-night cravings, and stress eating, making it easier to manage your appetite. (1) Clinically studied saffron extract In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study, researchers evaluated Satiereal®, a patented saffron stigma extract, in healthy, mildly overweight women. Participants had similar ages, body weights, and snacking habits at the start of the eight-week trial. (2) The women took either Satiereal® or a placebo twice daily while continuing their usual diets without calorie restrictions. Compared with the placebo, the Satiereal® group reported significantly fewer snacks and achieved greater weight loss after just eight weeks. (2) Take control of cravings – start today! How to use Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts. Intended for adults aged 18 years and older. To get the most from this supplement, use it alongside a healthy diet and regular exercise. Individual results may vary.

product.title: Mega Lycopene
product.description:
Lycopene can show a wide range of health-supportive properties, many of which may stem from its function as a powerful antioxidant.In fact, lycopene's multi-targeted impact on human health has led to its being described as among the most important nutrients for a long life.Lycopene has been shown to play a vital role in maintaining cardiovascular health, including the function of the lining of arterial blood vessels (the endothelium), promoting a healthy inflammatory response, and helping to maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels. (1-3)Studies indicate that greater lycopene consumption may help maintain prostate health, and may also help support normal cellular proliferation. (4,5) In addition, lycopene has been shown to help support healthy insulin sensitivity and to encourage longevity. (6,7)

product.title: HepatoPro
product.description:
The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions and keeps it clean of harmful substances. It is also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body. Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever. Endogenous phospholipid is an integral part of all cell membranes and essential for their structural and functional integrity. The chemical structure of a soybean extract, called PPC (polyenylphosphatidylcholine), corresponds to that of endogenous phospholipid. It integrates in the cell membrane and becomes the cell’s constitutive element. PPC has antioxidant, cytoprotective and fluid-regulating effects and has been shown to enhance cell membrane function throughout the body.It is believed that PPC’s beneficial effect is based on its ability to be incorporated into liver cell membranes to restore its structure. This results in an increase in membrane fluidity and transport activity across the membrane. PPC is also incorporated into blood lipoproteins, helping to extend its benefits beyond the liver, to promote arterial health. Mounting evidence suggests that its supplementation beneficially supports the critical process of reverse cholesterol transport. This process is a well-documented function of high-density lipoprotein (HDL), that involves the transport of cholesterol from the arterial walls to the liver for processing. Research also supports PPC’s critical role in helping to reduce LDL oxidation. In fact, a growing body of research shows that PPC can help maintain healthy lipoprotein profiles. HepatoPro contains PPC (polyenylphosphatidylcholine). Each 900-mg PPC softgel is well-absorbed when taken orally and has no known contraindications, side effects, or drug interactions.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex®
product.description:
Health benefits with a glance:Boswellia serrata is an Indian plant containing compounds that can inhibit inflammatory factors to promote joint, arterial, and cellular health. 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian. Why it works:The Boswellia extract contains compounds shown to directly target 5-LOX, an enzyme responsible inflammatory reactions. 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® provides a standardized, highly absorbable Boswellia extract, AprèsFlex®. Each capsule delivers 100 mg of this innovative extract, and most people need only one capsule a day. The science behind the product:5-lipoxygenase (5-LOX) is an enzyme that converts fatty acids into leukotrienes. (1) Since 5-LOX levels increase over time, excess 5-LOX has been connected to some of the common effects of normal ageing. (2) Boswellia extract can inhibit 5-LOX Boswellia Serrata extract is shown to inhibit 5-LOX at the cellular level. Research reveals that the compound AKBA (3-O-acetyl-11-keto-ß-boswellic acid) is crucial for this beneficial action. (3) However, boswellia compounds are poorly absorbed into the bloodstream. To address this issue, the formula uses AprèsFlex®, which is a standardized form of Boswellia extract. AprèsFlex® absorbs into the blood 52% more than previously available Boswellia extracts. (4) Increase 5-LOX levels due to diet The typical Western diet is rich in omega-6 fatty acids like red meat, poultry, eggs, and dairy products, along with high-glycemic carbohydrates.These foods add to 5-LOX levels by triggering the production of arachidonic acid. The body produces 5-LOX enzymes in response to arachidonic acid. (1) The benefits of inhibiting 5-LOX 5-LOX creates compounds like leukotriene B4 out of arachidonic acid. Inhibiting leukotriene B4 can help support joint, arterial, and overall health. (5) It is also demonstrated to promote healthy cell division in studies. (6) Each 100 mg vegetarian capsule of 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® is standardized to provide 20% of active AKBA from Boswellia. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for natural ways to maintain joint comfort and arterial health as you age? 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® can help promote comfortable joints, encourage cardiovascular wellness, and maintain balanced cellular function throughout your body. This Indian plant extract contains compounds shown to target inflammatory factors. By addressing the 5-LOX enzyme, this formula can help you maintain optimal overall health.

Why this formula works: The Boswellia extract in this formula contains compounds that directly target 5-LOX, an enzyme responsible for certain inflammatory reactions. Since 5-LOX levels naturally increase over time, addressing this enzyme becomes increasingly important as you age. 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® provides a standardized, highly absorbable form of Boswellia extract. Each vegetarian capsule delivers 100 mg of this innovative extract, and most people need only one capsule daily. What sets AprèsFlex® apart from other boswellia supplements? It absorbs into your bloodstream 52% more effectively than previously available extracts, ensuring your body can utilize its beneficial compounds.

Backed by science: Understanding 5-LOX and its effects 5-lipoxygenase is an enzyme that converts fatty acids into compounds called leukotrienes. Because 5-LOX levels increase over time, excess 5-LOX has been connected to some common effects of normal aging. How boswellia extract works Boswellia serrata extract is shown to inhibit 5-LOX at the cellular level. Research reveals that the compound AKBA is crucial for this beneficial action. However, standard boswellia compounds are poorly absorbed into your bloodstream, which is why this formula uses the innovative AprèsFlex® form. Superior absorption with AprèsFlex® Why does absorption matter so much? AprèsFlex® is a standardized form of Boswellia extract that absorbs into the blood 52% more than previously available extracts. This means your body can actually utilize the beneficial compounds rather than having them pass through your system unused. The role of diet and 5-LOX levels Did you know that the typical Western diet can contribute to increased 5-LOX levels? Foods rich in omega-6 fatty acids like red meat, poultry, eggs, and dairy products, along with high-glycemic carbohydrates, add to 5-LOX levels by triggering arachidonic acid production. Your body produces 5-LOX enzymes in response to arachidonic acid. Benefits of inhibiting 5-LOX 5-LOX creates compounds like leukotriene B4 out of arachidonic acid. Inhibiting leukotriene B4 can help maintain joint comfort, encourage arterial wellness, and promote overall health. Studies also demonstrate it can help maintain balanced cell division. Each 100 mg vegetarian capsule is standardized to provide 20% of active AKBA from Boswellia. This formula is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian, making it suitable for various dietary preferences.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:This formula can promote prostate health by combining saw palmetto, beta-sitosterol, and boron. Why it works:Many men will endure some form of prostate-induced discomfort over the course of their lifetimes. Decades of research have demonstrated saw palmetto as a key nutrient for prostate health. The standardized extracts of saw palmetto and beta-sitosterol in PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol have been clinically studied for their ability to support prostate function and promote healthy hormone metabolism.The science behind the productBeta-sitosterol from palmetto and pinePalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol combines saw palmetto extract with an added boost of beta-sitosterol (from pine) and boron to support a healthy prostate: Extracts of the saw palmetto berry (Serenoa repens) have been found to support men’s urinary flow and comfort. (1,2) The saw palmetto berry is rich in the bioactive compound beta-sitosterol, which has also been found to help promote a healthy urinary stream in men. (3,4) Boron has been added to support healthy hormonal metabolism. (5) How to use:Take one (1) softgel daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Soy Isoflavones
product.description:
Menopause and SoyWhen estrogens and other hormones decline during menopause, women start to experience a variety of symptoms such as hot flashes along with more serious complications such as bone loss.After menopause, it therefore becomes especially important for women to support heart health, bone strength, and metabolism. Soy can play a helpful role!For decades, research has highlighted the benefits of soy, have been proven to have many beneficial effects in postmenopausal women. (1)Soy Isoflavones BenefitsSoy contains phytoestrogens, which are plant compounds with estrogen-like effects, known as isoflavones. Soy isoflavones, such as genistein, daidzein, and glycitein, have shown a range of positive effects. (1-4)Compounds like genistein and daidzein selectively activate estrogen receptors, primarily targeting Erβ in bone, urogenital tissue, and the cardiovascular system, rather than Erα, which is found mainly in breast and uterine tissues. (5)This selective action makes soy isoflavones beneficial for postmenopausal women by helping to (1-9): Maintain bone densityPromote heart healthSupport metabolismEncourage healthy cellular signallingKeep healthy blood lipid and glucose levelsMoreover, soy isoflavones can also help fight oxidative stress, contributing to wellness and longevity no matter what stage of life you are in.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Liver Efficiency Formula
product.description:
The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions to keep it clean of harmful substances. It is also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body. Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever.Liver Efficiency Formula features two state-of-the-art molecular energisers shown to promote healthy liver function. Schisandra chinensis is one of them and is native to Asia where numerous studies have validated its system-wide benefits. Researchers have discovered that the lignans in Schisandra fruit support healthy levels of glutathione, the cell’s own antioxidant defence system. Schisandra’s bioactive compounds have been shown to be readily absorbed in the intestine.Extramel® is the second compound, a fruit concentrate derived from non-GMO muskmelon (Cucumis melo). Cucumis melo is a natural source of superoxide dismutase (SOD), one of your body’s most powerful free radical neutralisers. Extramel®’s efficacy and safety are backed by published research, according to which, it led to better energy levels, physical performance and mood, after only four weeks.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: CinSulin® with InSea2® and Crominex® 3+
product.description:
Many ageing people are exposed to excess glucose calories that can affect even those who are health-conscious. Life Extension offers an enhanced natural approach: CinSulin® with InSea2® and Crominex® 3+. CinSulin® - Scientists worldwide are excited over a novel form of cinnamon that supports healthy glucose metabolism. Scientists at the US Department of Agriculture have been quietly studying it for more than a decade. The cinnamon extract contained in this CinSulin® formula has proven to experienced decline in fasting blood glucose after only two months. This novel cinnamon extract also produced a significant decrease in after-meal glucose spikes after ingestion of carbohydrates.Cinnamon polyphenols have been found to assist in supporting healthy blood glucose and inhibit overconsumption. The bad news is that cinnamon naturally contains fat-soluble compounds, known as aldehydes. The good news is that Life Extension has identified a purified water-soluble cinnamon extract. InSea2® - Researchers have long known of the many health benefits of seaweed extracts. Recently a form of seaweed extract, called InSea2®, has been discovered that blocks the action of glucosidase and amylase. They are enzymes that your body uses to break down carbohydrates into glucose, facilitating its transport into the bloodstream.Crominex® 3+ - Long known for its role in maintaining healthy glucose metabolism, chromium has been optimised with Indian gooseberry extract and a form of the adap-togen shilajit. The name of this advanced chromium complex is Crominex® 3+, which helps to support:Normal cellular glucose absorption;Healthy endothelial function;Healthy lipid and triglyceride levels;Normal cellular energy production.Combined with CinSulin® and InSea2®, it creates an unrivalled formula that affords optimal support for healthy glucose metabolism in ageing individuals.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Ginseng Energy Boost
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is ginseng? It is an adaptogenic herb that can promote healthy energy, but only fermented ginseng extract gets the most out of ginseng’s biologically active components. The fermented bioavailable Panax ginseng extract used in Ginseng Energy Boost can deliver a stimulant-free “Get up and go”-boost of healthy energy and can also support positive mood and the stress response.Why it works: Ginseng has been used for health support for centuries. Panax ginseng (also known as Asian, Chinese, or Korean ginseng) is highly respected and popular for its abilities (supported by evidence) to manage stress and balance oxidative processes. (1,2) Ginseng is also reported to help your body produce cellular energy—and the better quality the ginseng, the more energy there will be. Ginseng Energy Boost uses the best of the best.The science behind the product: Panax ginseng extract and ginsenosides Pre-clinical research indicates Panax ginseng extract can support positive mood by helping to regulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis responsible for stress responsiveness, balance hormone levels, preserve healthy levels of brain growth factors, protect against oxidative stress and encourage a healthy inflammatory response. (3-5) Other studies suggest ginseng may promote exercise endurance. (6) It is indicated by a growing body of research that ginsenosides, compounds from ginseng, can support mitochondrial energy production and healthy glucose metabolism. (7-9) Studies also show ginseng and ginsenosides may support healthy neurological function. (10,11) Fermented ginseng and Compound K Fermented ginseng is a process shown to support availability and absorption of the biologically active compound made from ginsenosides, Compound K. (12-14). In one study, Compound K levels were more than 15 times higher with fermented ginseng (compared to the unfermented kind). (15) A placebo-controlled trial with healthy men and women showed that taking a fermented ginseng supplement for 14 days, promoted moderation of the exercise-induced stress response and supported healthy antioxidant activity in the body. (16) Ginseng Energy Boost uses the best For enhanced potency and maximum effectiveness Ginseng Energy Boost uses Panax ginseng that has been fermented. This supplement can provide 200 mg of fermented Panax ginseng extract per dose to encourage production of ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the fuel your cells use for energy.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Creatine Capsules
product.description:
What is creatine?Creatine is a compound derived from amino acids, naturally present in meat and seafood. The human body also produces it, primarily in the liver and kidneys, using the amino acids L-arginine, glycine, and S-adenosylmethionine. Once produced, creatine is transported through the bloodstream to support energy production in cells across the body.Each serving of Creatine Capsules contains 500 mg of easily absorbed creatine monohydrate.Creatine in the skeletal muscles95% of the body’s creatine is stored in skeletal muscles, with smaller amounts found in the brain and testes. Around two-thirds of this intramuscular creatine is converted into phosphocreatine, which serves as a phosphate reserve for the production of cellular energy (ATP). In healthy individuals, muscle creatine is continuously broken down and replenished at a rate of about 1 to 3 grams per day. (1,2)Research shows that creatine supplementation can enhance muscle mass, strength, and performance across various age groups and types of physical activity. (1,2) It has been shown to improve both upper and lower body muscle strength. (3,4) Creatine influences muscle tissue in several ways, and multiple mechanisms have been suggested to explain the enhanced exercise performance observed after creatine intake:Optimizing energy metabolism by maintaining higher levels of the body's energy currency, adenosine triphosphate or ATP (5) Promoting protein metabolism in muscle cells (6,7) Inhibiting tissue damage by inhibiting oxidative stress (2,6,8)Creatine benefits with agingMultiple clinical studies have shown that creatine positively impacts strength, body composition, and muscle performance in older adults, particularly when combined with resistance training. (1,2)A systematic review found improvements in upper and lower body strength, physical performance, and body composition after 12 weeks of creatine supplementation alongside resistance exercise in healthy older individuals. (9) Creatine has even been shown to benefit non-exercising seniors. (10) Research reveals that the advantages of creatine extend beyond muscle health. Evidence suggests that creatine supplementation can support neurological and cognitive health, promote a healthy mood, and offer neuroprotective effects. (11,12)Additionally, creatine has been reported to support healthy metabolism of lipids, glucose, bone, and homocysteine in older adults. (1)

Health benefits overview: Looking to enhance your physical performance and maintain muscle strength as you age? Creatine Capsules can help promote exercise endurance, muscle power, and body composition through efficient cellular energy metabolism. This amino acid derivative can also encourage cognitive function and guard against age-related decline in muscle performance. Research demonstrates advantages for both active individuals and older adults seeking to maintain vitality.

Why this formula works: Creatine is naturally produced in your liver and kidneys, but levels decline with age. This formula delivers 500 mg of easily absorbed creatine monohydrate per vegetarian capsule to help replenish what your body needs. Around 95% of your body's creatine is stored in skeletal muscles, where it's converted into phosphocreatine. This serves as a vital phosphate reserve for producing ATP, the energy currency your cells rely on. By maintaining optimal creatine levels, this supplement can help your muscles perform better during exercise and support healthy aging. Whether you follow a plant-based diet or simply want to optimize your fitness, creatine supplementation offers proven results.

Backed by science: Muscle strength and performance Multiple studies show that creatine supplementation can enhance muscle mass, strength, and physical performance across various age groups. It has been shown to improve both upper and lower body muscle power, making it valuable for anyone engaged in resistance training or athletic activities. Cellular energy metabolism Creatine influences your muscle tissue through several mechanisms. It helps optimize energy metabolism by maintaining higher levels of ATP, the molecule your cells use for fuel. This means more available energy during physical activity and faster recovery between sets or workouts. Additionally, creatine can promote protein metabolism in muscle cells and help inhibit oxidative stress that leads to tissue damage. These combined effects contribute to improved exercise capacity and muscle function. Benefits for healthy aging Are you concerned about maintaining muscle mass and strength as you get older? Clinical studies reveal that creatine positively impacts body composition and muscle performance in older adults, particularly when combined with resistance training. A systematic review found improvements in physical performance and body composition after just 12 weeks of creatine supplementation alongside resistance exercise in healthy older individuals. Remarkably, creatine has even shown benefits for non-exercising seniors. Cognitive and neurological support The advantages of creatine extend beyond muscle health. Research indicates that creatine supplementation can encourage neurological and cognitive function, promote balanced mood, and offer neuroprotective effects. Your brain requires significant energy to function optimally, and creatine helps support that demand. Studies have also reported that creatine can help maintain optimal metabolism of lipids, glucose, bone tissue, and homocysteine in older adults, contributing to overall wellness beyond just muscle support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.health_benefits_overview: Looking to enhance your physical performance and maintain muscle strength as you age? Creatine Capsules can help promote exercise endurance, muscle power, and body composition through efficient cellular energy metabolism. This amino acid derivative can also encourage cognitive function and guard against age-related decline in muscle performance. Research demonstrates advantages for both active individuals and older adults seeking to maintain vitality.
product.why_this_formula_works: Creatine is naturally produced in your liver and kidneys, but levels decline with age. This formula delivers 500 mg of easily absorbed creatine monohydrate per vegetarian capsule to help replenish what your body needs. Around 95% of your body's creatine is stored in skeletal muscles, where it's converted into phosphocreatine. This serves as a vital phosphate reserve for producing ATP, the energy currency your cells rely on. By maintaining optimal creatine levels, this supplement can help your muscles perform better during exercise and support healthy aging. Whether you follow a plant-based diet or simply want to optimize your fitness, creatine supplementation offers proven results.
product.backed_by_science: Muscle strength and performance Multiple studies show that creatine supplementation can enhance muscle mass, strength, and physical performance across various age groups. It has been shown to improve both upper and lower body muscle power, making it valuable for anyone engaged in resistance training or athletic activities. Cellular energy metabolism Creatine influences your muscle tissue through several mechanisms. It helps optimize energy metabolism by maintaining higher levels of ATP, the molecule your cells use for fuel. This means more available energy during physical activity and faster recovery between sets or workouts. Additionally, creatine can promote protein metabolism in muscle cells and help inhibit oxidative stress that leads to tissue damage. These combined effects contribute to improved exercise capacity and muscle function. Benefits for healthy aging Are you concerned about maintaining muscle mass and strength as you get older? Clinical studies reveal that creatine positively impacts body composition and muscle performance in older adults, particularly when combined with resistance training. A systematic review found improvements in physical performance and body composition after just 12 weeks of creatine supplementation alongside resistance exercise in healthy older individuals. Remarkably, creatine has even shown benefits for non-exercising seniors. Cognitive and neurological support The advantages of creatine extend beyond muscle health. Research indicates that creatine supplementation can encourage neurological and cognitive function, promote balanced mood, and offer neuroprotective effects. Your brain requires significant energy to function optimally, and creatine helps support that demand. Studies have also reported that creatine can help maintain optimal metabolism of lipids, glucose, bone tissue, and homocysteine in older adults, contributing to overall wellness beyond just muscle support.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Super Absorbable Tocotrienols
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Cells are the central organism in any living thing, but few people think about protecting their body at the cellular level.Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols can do exactly that by protecting cell membranes and the DNA in cells against oxidative damage. Furthermore, it can also contribute to overall body health by supporting healthy cell division. Why it works:Many people do not know that vitamin E contains eight different compounds. Commercial vitamin E supplements only focus on four of these compounds, while leaving out the other four compounds called tocotrienols, which are actually rich in therapeutic and antioxidant benefits.Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols softgels contain tocotrienols that are extracted from red palm oil from the Elaeis guineensis tree. Because of their unique structure, tocotrienols provide potent antioxidant benefits throughout the body. The fact is that tocotrienols shield DNA from oxidative damage while protecting cellular membranes.Moreover, scientists have discovered that tocotrienols support healthy cell division, promote a healthy lipid profile protect brain function and even support healthy hair growth.Through a highly absorbable and patented delivery system Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols provides the most bioavailable red palm oil tocotrienols available on the European supplement market today. The science behind the product:Research has shown that tocotrienols have the ability to support a wide range of organ systems such as the bones, the heart, the liver and the brain. It was found that tocotrienols play a role in promoting new artery formation, improving insulin sensitivity, protecting vital brain circuitry.Human research reports that tocotrienol supplementation can improve the lipid profile and promote healthy levels of total and LDL cholesterol. At the same time, tocotrienols protect the lipids in the blood against oxidation which can lead to arterial damage. How to use:Take one (1) softgel two times daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Biotin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Biotin, sometimes referred to as vitamin B7, is a member of the water-soluble B-complex family, normally only required in small amounts. It is essential for healthy skin, hair and nails, supporting healthy hair and nails in people who are deficient.Why it works:Biotin is used as a cofactor of enzymes involved in fatty acid metabolism, gluconeogenesis, and amino acid catabolism, and is essential in maintaining internal balance.It is essential for production of the protein keratin, and can therefore support healthy hair, skin and nails (1-4). Biotin is also needed for cellular energy production as a cofactor for the TCA-cycle, or Krebs cycle, enzymes (5,6).A growing body of evidence further suggests biotin may play an important role in gene expression (6).The science behind the product:Biotin is used as a cofactor in the body, supporting the activities of enzymes involved in fatty acid synthesis, gluconeogenesis (the generation of glucose from non-carbohydrate sources) and amino acid breakdown. Biotin plays an important role in metabolic functioning as a coenzyme carrier of activated carbon dioxide in the TCA cycle (also known as the Krebs cycle). In its coenzyme form, biotin synthesises glucose from non-carbohydrate sources, and synthesises and breaks down certain fatty acids and amino acids.How to use:It is important to note that biotin supplements can interfere with certain hormone and other lab tests (7,8). Be sure to consult your health care provider if you take supplemental biotin and need lab tests.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Ascorbyl Palmitate
product.description:
What is ascorbyl palmitate? Ascorbyl palmitate (AP) is a unique fusion of ascorbic acid and palmitic acid, creating a fat-soluble form of vitamin C, which means it can interact with lipid-based molecules. While ascorbic acid makes 40% of the ascorbyl palmitate molecule by weight, their activities cannot be directly compared since these two molecules function differently within the body. Benefits of ascorbyl palmitate This lipid solubility sets it apart from the water-soluble ascorbic acid found naturally in foods, enabling ascorbyl palmitate to penetrate cell membranes and other biological barriers that standard vitamin C cannot easily cross. This distinctive property allows it to deliver free radical-scavenging ascorbic acid to parts of the body that would otherwise remain out of reach. (1,2) Research shows that ascorbyl palmitate can (3-7): Protect red blood cells, endothelial cells, and delicate brain and nerve tissue against free radical damageKeep high levels of circulating ascorbic acid for extended periods compared to standard ascorbic acid Promote maintenance of intracellular ascorbic acid concentrations Enhance the capacity to protect lipids and DNA from oxidative stress and free radical damage Better inhibits protein glycation within human cells when compared to ascorbic acid

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Inositol Caps
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is inositol? It's is a biomolecule the body makes from glucose and a key intermediate of secondary messengers and a primary component of cellular membrane phospholipids, involved in several biological processes. It has been found to be essential for calcium and insulin signal transduction, and serotonin activity regulation.Why it works:Inositol (also known as myo-inositol) is involved in neurotransmitter modulation, which may promote mood and emotional health.It's also found in plant foods such as legumes, whole grains and vegetables, and inositol is thought to be one of the reasons these foods confer their health benefits. But because phytates are indigestible by human enzymes, getting inositol requires microbial digestion — or supplementation.The science behind the product:Inositol is a primary component of cell membrane phospholipids. Both membrane-bound and free inositol are important for supporting many cell functions and participate in maintaining cellular responses to external signaling. (1)For example, inositol can help support insulin responsiveness, which in turn support healthy lipid and glucose metabolism. (2,3) Meta-analyses of clinical trials in women have shown inositol supplements can help encourage healthy insulin response and glucose metabolism, as well as support already-healthy hormone levels and reproductive system health. (4-6)Inositol-based compounds are involved in neurotransmitter activity modulation, giving inositol potential benefits in promoting mental and emotional health. Some research indicates inositol may be beneficial for supporting stable moods. (7-9)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Inositol Caps delivers myo-inositol, a vital molecule your body naturally produces from glucose that serves as a key component of cell membranes and cellular signaling pathways. This essential compound can help promote balanced mood and emotional wellness while encouraging optimal metabolic function. Beyond mood support, inositol plays fundamental roles in calcium and insulin signal transmission, as well as serotonin activity regulation. These cellular functions contribute to various aspects of your overall health, from hormonal balance to reproductive system wellness.

Why this formula works: Inositol functions as a critical component in neurotransmitter modulation, which gives it the ability to promote mental and emotional health. This molecule participates in how your brain processes signals that influence mood stability and emotional well-being. While you can find inositol in plant foods like legumes, whole grains, and vegetables, obtaining adequate amounts through diet alone presents challenges. These plant sources contain inositol, which human enzymes cannot digest directly. Your body requires microbial digestion in the gut to release inositol from these food sources, making supplementation a more reliable approach. Each capsule provides 1,000 mg of readily available myo-inositol, ensuring you receive consistent therapeutic levels without depending on digestive variables.

Backed by science: Cell membrane structure and cellular signaling Are you looking for comprehensive cellular health support? Inositol serves as a primary component of cell membrane phospholipids, the building blocks that form the protective barriers around every cell in your body. Both membrane-bound and free inositol are essential for maintaining optimal cell functions and supporting cellular responses to external signals. This makes inositol crucial for ensuring your cells can communicate effectively and respond appropriately to various biological needs throughout your body. Insulin responsiveness and metabolic support Research demonstrates that inositol can help encourage insulin responsiveness, which in turn supports balanced lipid and glucose metabolism. This metabolic support extends to helping your body process sugars and fats more efficiently. Meta-analyses of clinical trials in women have shown that inositol supplements can help promote optimal insulin response and glucose metabolism. These same studies indicate inositol may help maintain already-healthy hormone levels and encourage reproductive system wellness. Mood stability and mental wellness Inositol-based compounds participate in neurotransmitter activity modulation, giving this biomolecule significant potential for promoting mental and emotional health. Research indicates that inositol may offer benefits for maintaining stable, balanced moods. By influencing how neurotransmitters function in your brain, inositol can help support emotional equilibrium. This makes it a valuable nutrient for those seeking natural approaches to maintaining mental wellness and positive mood throughout daily life. Serotonin regulation One of inositol's key roles involves regulating serotonin activity in your nervous system. Serotonin is essential for mood regulation, and inositol helps ensure this important neurotransmitter functions optimally to support your emotional well-being.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals
product.description:
Relief from constipationOccasional constipation is a common gastrointestinal issue, particularly affecting women and older adults. (1,2) Lifestyle factors can contribute to this, including low dietary fiber intake, lack of exercise, and stress. (3-5) Even changes in daily routines can disrupt gut motility and lead to temporary digestive discomfort. (6) Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals provides a dose-adjustable nutritional solution for immediate relief from occasional constipation. How it worksVitamin C is an antioxidant nutrient that helps protect against oxidative stress. Unabsorbed vitamin C acts as an osmotic agent, drawing water into the intestines and stimulating gut motility. (7,8) Magnesium is a trace mineral and cofactor in over 300 of enzymatic processes within cells. It helps maintain bone and muscle health, cognitive function and already-healthy blood pressure. (9,10) Like vitamin C, unabsorbed magnesium hasosmoticeffects in the intestines. (7,11) Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals doses can be adjusted for individual needs and used up to three times a week. Since it’s not a fiber, it never creates more fecal bulk than you can easily evacuate.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: L-Theanine
product.description:
What is L-theanine?Theanine is an amino acid primarily found in tea. Studies show it can cross the blood-brain barrier, and it's found to reduce anxiety by blocking excitatory stimuli at glutamate receptors in the brain while stimulating the production of the inhibitory, relaxing neurotransmitter GABA. (1) The calming effects and benefits of L-theanineIts benefits have been known around the world for centuries, particularly in East Asia. While ancient civilizations may have referred to L-theanine by different names, they understood and utilized its impact. (2)L-theanine is shown to produce calming, mood-enhancing effects by encouraging electrical brain activity commonly present when you are very relaxed, which sets you in a better mood.Moreover, L-theanine can modulate the formation of gamma amino butyric acid GABA (gamma amino butyric acid), a neurotransmitter that regulates the levels of two other neurotransmitters, dopamine and serotonin, and also promotes relaxation. (3) A pure theanine supplementLife Extension® L-Theanine contains only the pure L-theanine form of this amino acid. This formula provides 200 mg of soothing L-theanine in a convenient product.

Health benefits overview: L-Theanine is an amino acid primarily found in tea that can produce calming, mood-enhancing effects throughout your day. Studies show this remarkable compound crosses the blood-brain barrier to help reduce feelings of unease by blocking excitatory stimuli while encouraging the production of GABA, your brain's relaxing neurotransmitter. What makes L-theanine unique is its ability to create a state of alert relaxation. This means you can feel calm and centered without experiencing drowsiness or sedation, allowing you to maintain mental clarity and focus while enjoying emotional balance.

Why this formula works: Ancient civilizations in East Asia understood and utilized L-theanine's remarkable effects for centuries, even before modern science could explain how it works. This amino acid modulates GABA formation, a neurotransmitter that regulates dopamine and serotonin levels, the brain chemicals responsible for mood and emotional wellness. Each serving delivers 200 mg of pure L-theanine.

Backed by science: Blood-brain barrier penetration and anxiety reduction Do you struggle with feelings of tension or unease that interfere with your daily life? L-theanine's molecular structure allows it to cross the blood-brain barrier, where it can directly influence brain activity and neurotransmitter function. Once in your brain, L-theanine blocks excitatory signals at glutamate receptors while simultaneously stimulating the production of GABA, the inhibitory neurotransmitter that promotes relaxation. This dual action creates a balanced state where you feel calm yet mentally sharp. Mood enhancement through brain wave modulation Research demonstrates that L-theanine encourages specific patterns of electrical brain activity commonly present when you're very relaxed and at ease. These brain wave patterns correlate with improved mood states and emotional well-being. By influencing your brain's electrical activity, L-theanine can help put you in a better mood naturally. This makes it valuable for maintaining emotional balance during stressful situations or challenging days when you need extra support. Cognitive function and alert relaxation There's an important connection between how you respond to stress, your emotional state, and your brain's ability to sustain optimal cognitive function. The latest research suggests L-theanine plays a significant role in maintaining mental performance while simultaneously promoting relaxation. This unique combination means L-theanine can help you stay mentally alert and focused while feeling calm and centered. Unlike sedating substances that impair motor behavior and cognition, L-theanine enhances your ability to think clearly while reducing mental tension. Sleep quality improvement without sedation L-theanine has been shown to promote better sleep quality through its calming effects on the nervous system. What sets it apart from typical sleep aids is that it doesn't cause drowsiness during the day or impair your motor coordination and mental function. Your body can benefit from L-theanine's relaxing properties when you need rest, while still maintaining normal alertness and functionality during waking hours. This makes it an ideal choice for supporting both daytime calm and nighttime sleep quality.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Calcium D-Glucarate
product.description:
Health benefit at a glance:First of all, what is Calcium D-glucarate? It is the calcium salt of D-glucarate, a compound made in the body through the oxidation of glucose. D-glucarate is also found naturally in grapefruit, apples, oranges, and cruciferous vegetables. Calcium D-glucarate is also made in the body.In order to keep you healthy, your body needs to go through the process of detoxification. D-glucarate can help inhibit enzymes that reverse the detoxification process, helping your body detox the way it should.Why it works:By supporting effective detoxification, calcium D-glucarate can: Help maintain optimal hormone levels and promote clearance. (1-3) Encourage a healthy inflammatory response and offer antioxidant protection. (4-6) Support normal cell division in laboratory studies. (7-9) Help maintain already-healthy levels of cholesterol and other lipids. (2)The science behind the product:A byproduct of the oxidation of glucose, calcium D-glucarate plays an important role in the body’s healthy detoxification process (and -system).D-glucarate can be converted into another compound that helps the body clear steroid hormones and various toxins through a detoxification process called glucuronidation. This active D-glucarate metabolite works by inhibiting an enzyme that reverses glucuronidation.Your body uses glucuronidation to make a large variety of substances more water-soluble, and, by extension, allow for their subsequent elimination through urine or feces (via bile from the liver).How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Looking for ways to support your body's natural detoxification processes? Calcium D-Glucarate can help inhibit enzymes that interfere with your body's cleansing mechanisms, allowing it to eliminate unwanted compounds more effectively. This unique nutrient, naturally found in fruits and vegetables, can promote hormone balance, encourage cellular wellness, and maintain optimal cholesterol levels. By supporting your body's detoxification pathways, this formula offers comprehensive health advantages.

Why this formula works: Calcium D-Glucarate is the calcium salt of D-glucarate, a compound your body produces naturally through glucose metabolism. D-glucarate is also present in grapefruit, apples, oranges, and cruciferous vegetables, though supplementation ensures consistent levels. To maintain optimal health, your body must effectively process and eliminate various substances. D-glucarate can help inhibit enzymes that reverse the detoxification process, ensuring your system cleanses properly. By encouraging effective detoxification, this formula can help maintain balanced hormone levels, promote clearance of unnecessary compounds, and support overall cellular function. Each vegetarian capsule provides this beneficial nutrient in a convenient, absorbable form.

Backed by science: The role of D-glucarate in detoxification A byproduct of glucose oxidation, calcium D-glucarate plays a crucial role in your body's detoxification system. D-glucarate can be converted into another compound that helps eliminate steroid hormones and various toxins through a process called glucuronidation. This active metabolite works by inhibiting an enzyme that reverses glucuronidation. What does this mean for you? Your body uses glucuronidation to make numerous substances more water-soluble, which allows for their subsequent elimination through urine or feces via bile from the liver. Hormone balance and clearance Research shows that calcium D-glucarate can help maintain optimal hormone levels and promote their healthy clearance from your body. This is particularly important as hormone balance affects numerous aspects of wellness throughout your life. Inflammatory response and antioxidant support Studies indicate that this nutrient can encourage a balanced inflammatory response and offer antioxidant protection. These effects contribute to overall cellular health and help guard against oxidative stress that occurs naturally with aging. Cellular wellness Laboratory studies demonstrate that calcium D-glucarate can help maintain normal cell division patterns. This cellular support, combined with the detoxification benefits, makes it a valuable nutrient for comprehensive wellness. Cholesterol and lipid metabolism Research has shown that calcium D-glucarate can help maintain already-healthy levels of cholesterol and other lipids. This metabolic support adds another dimension to the overall health advantages this nutrient provides.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Chlorophyllin
product.description:
The DNA in every cell of your body suffers 10,000 oxidative hits per day, leading to the formation of different oxidative DNA lesions. According to human studies, lifestyle and environmental influences may profoundly affect outcomes of ageing.Environmental toxins (e.g., cigarette smoke, coal dust, diesel emission particles) are not the only concern, though. Food cooked at high temperature cause cellular damage too. Deep-fried food, including beef steak, hamburgers and bacon, leads to the formation of gene-mutating heterocyclic amines. So-called healthy food may contain small amounts of similarly undesirable substances.Chlorophyllin has been attested for its DNA-protective and antioxidant properties, inhibiting DNA adduction. It is also an antioxidant, helps to protect mitochondria and plays a role in preventing unavoidable dietary exposure to aflatoxin, a naturally occurring mycotoxin.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Biosil (Orthosilicic Acid)
product.description:
What is silicon?Silicon is a trace element that your body requires for the normal growth, development, and integrity of hair, skin, nails, mucous membranes, arteries, bones, cartilage, and connective tissue.Silicon helps with the formation of collagen, the fibrous protein matrix that provides support for tendons, ligaments, cartilage, and bones. Its best-documented action is facilitating bone mineralization.While high doses of silicon are exceptionally well tolerated, currently scientists estimate the human requirement for silicon to be between 5-20 mg per day.Silicon supplementation can be used for:Bones – maintaining bone density and strength by facilitating the deposit of calcium and other minerals into bone tissue.Joints – promoting cartilage development and the integrity of joints and ligaments.Cardiovascular health – for the strength and integrity of the arteries.Muscles – modifying the characteristics of endothelial relaxants and attenuating smooth muscle cell responsiveness to nitric oxide in rat aorta.Nails – helping them growing faster and harder.Hair – promoting growth of thicker and stronger hair.

product.title: Advanced Olive Leaf Vascular Support with Celery Seed Extract
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Advanced Olive Leaf Vascular Support with Celery Seed Extract is designed to support optimal cardiovascular health by a unique, dual-action formulation containing two bioactive compounds.Why it works:Olive Leaf extract contains a compound called oleuropein, which is a natural polyphenol with a multitude of health benefits. (1) It can help maintain already healthy blood pressure.It can also provide the distinctive tangy, pungent, almost bitter flavor found in high-quality extra virgin olive oils. (2)Celery seed extract contains a substance called 3-n-butylphthalide (3nB), which is shown to support a healthy inflammatory response that is essential to maintaining a healthy circulatory system.It’s also a potent antioxidant that can benefit vascular health by promoting healthy platelet function and helping to relax blood vessels, both of which promote healthy circulation. (5-10)The science behind the product:Olive Leaf extract, Oleuropein: Two clinical trials documented that supplementation with 1.000 mg per day of olive leaf extract resulted in an average 11.5 mm Hg decline in systolic readings and a 4.8 mm Hg drop in diastolic readings after eight weeks. (3,4)Celery seed extract (Apium graveolens): In a small clinical trial scientists using an equivalent amount of active compounds as found in this celery seed extract reported an average 8.2 mm Hg decline in systolic readings and 8.5 mm Hg drop in diastolic readings — after just six weeks. (11)While olive leaf and celery seed extracts demonstrate impressive support individually, Advanced Olive Leaf Vascular Support with Celery Seed Extract provides a combination of two bioactive compounds for dual-action vascular support.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Heart Health
product.description:
Health benefits with a glance:Probiotics are known for helping keep your digestive system balanced.FLORASSIST® Heart Health provides the probiotic Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 which has been shown in scientific studies to promote heart health by supporting already healthy levels of cholesterol, CRP, and fibrinogen.FLORASSIST® Heart Health offers easy-to-swallow capsules with no unpleasant aftertaste, a great addition to maintaining a heart-healthy lifestyle.Why it works:In clinical trials, L. reuteri 30242 has been demonstrated to support healthy cholesterol levels already within the normal range. Moreover, this novel probiotic has been shown to promote healthy levels already within the normal range of: ApoB-100, a protein found in LDL cholesterolC-reactive proteinFibrinogen, a protein involved in healthy clot formationScience behind the product:Supporting already-healthy cholesterol Probiotics have been part of traditional diets for thousands of years, such as fermented milk and vegetable products in form of yogurt and pickles. These foods are known to contribute to the optimal health and longevity of some studied populations. Today, scientific research has discovered heart health benefits for a specific probiotic organism, Lactobacillus reuteri 30242. This strain has been shown in clinical trials to help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels, including the important LDL cholesterol. (1,2) Encouraging healthy levels of apoproteinsIt's important to maintain already healthy levels of cholesterol and so is LDL cholesterol. However, you may not have heard about the importance of molecules called apoproteins that are part of cholesterol. Apolipoproteins B100 and A1 are, according to medical research, as important as cholesterol itself. (3) Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 has been demonstrated to encourage a healthy balance of apolipoproteins B100 and A1 for levels already within the normal range. (1,2)Promoting healthy levels of CRPC-reactive protein (CRP) is a powerful predictor of overall cardiovascular health. Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 is shown to promote healthy CRP levels already within the normal range. (2)Maintaining normal fibrinogen levelsFibrinogen is a protein and important contributor to blood clotting, and fibrinogen levels are often used as an indicator of cardiovascular wellness. Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 has been shown to help maintain fibrinogen levels already within the normal range. (2)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Enhanced Zinc Lozenges
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: The content of Enhanced Zinc Lozenges can look "intimidating", but these lozenges really are the “ace up your sleeve” when it comes to enhancing your immune system here and now. The size of these advanced, vegetarian, and peppermint-flavored zinc lozenges allows for them to dissolve slowly, releasing ionic zinc to support your body against immune challenges and to mount a robust immune response.As such, Enhanced Zinc Lozenges are not for daily use. Why it works:Zinc is a trace mineral that stimulates around 300 enzymes in the body and simultaneously fortifies the immune system.There’s more than one type of zinc preparation. The zinc acetate in this formula releases 100% of its zinc as ionic zinc, which is positively charged zinc ions. (1)This is the preferred kind of zinc, because it provides enhanced immune support, encouraging a strong immune response. (2,3) The science behind the product:How to choose the right zinc supplementLife Extension® Enhanced Zinc Lozenges are filled with zinc acetate and have no other ingredients that could reduce the delivery of these immune-supportive, positively charged zinc ions, making this a great immune-support supplement.The right dose of zinc acetateOne lozenge of Enhanced Zinc Lozenges provides 18.75 mg of zinc, as zinc acetate.Only a few are required for immune response support, therefore these special lozenges are not meant for daily use.So, make sure you have the bottle close by for immediate access! How to use:Completely dissolve in mouth one (1) lozenge every 2 wakeful hours, not to exceed 8 lozenges per day, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Do not use for more than 3 consecutive days.Do not chew or swallow lozenge.May cause nausea if taken on an empty stomach.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: EnergyGain™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Millions of people are affected by fatigue. Common complaints include low energy, unrefreshed sleep, head or muscle discomfort, and weakness. Stimulants such as caffeine offer only short-term relief with possible health consequences.EnergyGain™ was developed to provide a more effective solution to general fatigue and maintain healthy energy levels with bioactive polyphenol compounds called roburins that support healthy ribosomes, the small molecular factories in your cells that create proteins.Why it works:Support for cellular factoriesIn each of your cells, there can be as many as 10 million ribosomes, each creating proteins that are essential to cellular function and structure, including energy metabolism. (1)EnergyGain™ is a proprietary extract of French oak (Quercus robur) wood, and studies indicate that oak wood extract can promote ribosomal biogenesis, the body's natural way of producing new ribosomes to rejuvenate ribosome function. (2,9)One mechanism involved is the upregulation of important genes.Targeting general fatigueBy targeting complaints of general fatigue at the cellular level, this product can be an ideal option for those who would like to:Maintain energy levelsPromote ribosomal production of functional and structural proteinsSupport vital body activities affected by energy metabolismMinimize fatigue-related decline associated with agingThe science behind the product:In clinical studies, French oak wood extract has been shown to help relieve effects caused by general fatigue – to help combat weakness, promote healthy and refreshing sleep, support a positive mood, encourage energy levels, and relieve discomfort in the head, joints, and muscles. (4-6,8)The studies also indicated that French oak wood extract can help protect against oxidative stress often increased by general fatigue. (3,4,7)The following benefits were found:18% reduction in exhaustion and weakness44% reduction in unrefreshing sleep33% reduction in head discomfort51% reduction in joint discomfort63% reduction in muscle discomfortHow to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Triple Strength ProstaPollen
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:It’s never too early – or too late – to begin a nutritional regimen for prostate health, and a good way to start is Triple Strength ProstaPollen™. This innovative formula can support healthy urination patterns and prostate function. It contains concentrated pollen extracts specifically selected based on clinical research to provide prostate health support at any age.Why it works:Triple Strength ProstaPollen™ is made with two different types of concentrated pollen extracts, both of which have been studied and shown to support prostate health. (1-7)The science behind the product:The unique pollen extractsThere are two fractions in Triple Strength ProstaPollen™:Water-soluble Graminex® G60™Lipid-soluble Graminex® NAX™These help maintain healthy prostate structure and encourage a healthy inflammatory response to support prostate health. (1,3)A convenient once-a-day formulaTriple Strength ProstaPollen™ delivers a concentrated dose of pollen extract in a convenient, once-a-day softgel.And no matter how old you are, adding this formula to your daily routine can be a good idea.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Whether you're just starting to think about prostate health or looking to maintain what you've already achieved, it's never the wrong time to begin a nutritional regimen. Triple Strength ProstaPollen can help promote comfortable urination patterns and maintain optimal prostate function throughout your life. This innovative formula features concentrated pollen extracts specifically selected based on clinical research to deliver prostate health support at any age.

Why this formula works: As men age, prostate health becomes increasingly important for maintaining quality of life and overall wellness. Research has identified specific botanical compounds that can effectively support prostate structure and function. Triple Strength ProstaPollen combines two different types of concentrated pollen extracts, both clinically studied for their beneficial effects on prostate health. These natural compounds work together to address multiple aspects of prostate wellness. Your daily routine just got simpler with this convenient once-a-day softgel that delivers concentrated support for ongoing prostate health maintenance.

Backed by science: Water-soluble Graminex G60 extract This specialized pollen extract provides water-soluble compounds that have been clinically studied for their positive effects on prostate wellness. Graminex G60 can help maintain optimal prostate structure and encourage comfortable urinary patterns, making daily activities more enjoyable and worry-free. Lipid-soluble Graminex NAX extract Complementing the water-soluble fraction, Graminex NAX delivers lipid-soluble pollen compounds that work synergistically with G60. This dual-fraction approach ensures comprehensive support by addressing different aspects of prostate health through multiple pathways. Healthy inflammatory response support Both pollen extracts in this formula can encourage balanced inflammatory responses in prostate tissue. Maintaining optimal inflammatory balance is essential for supporting long-term prostate comfort and function as you age. Triple-strength concentrated formula Unlike standard pollen supplements, this formula delivers a concentrated dose that provides triple the support in just one convenient softgel daily. This advanced concentration means you get powerful prostate protection without taking multiple pills throughout the day.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.
