product.title: CHOL-Support™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Two liquid vegetarian capsules of CHOL-Support™ per day offer comprehensive cardiovascular protection by providing unparalleled support for an optimal cholesterol profile.Why it works:With age, the maintenance of an optimum balance between "good" and "bad" cholesterol, otherwise known as HDL and LDL becomes critically important for a healthy cholesterol profile.Two natural compounds have been discovered that help promote healthy levels of both LDL and HDL cholesterol in a safe way.The science behind the product:Artichoke leaf extract Polyphenolic compounds of artichoke leaf haven been shown in clinical trials to support optimal HDL/LDL ratios. Pantethine Clinical studies demonstrate that pantethine, the biologically active form of vitamin B5, safely maintains LDL and total cholesterol levels without reducing protective CoQ10 levels. CHOL-Support™ is formulated with a triple stan­dardized artichoke leaf extract and pantethine to maintain healthy HDL, LDL and total cholesterol levels. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Tear Support with MaquiBright®
product.description:
A commonly experienced problem with advancing age is the onset of eye discomfort. Contanct lenses, environmental factors, and computer use also increase the chances of dry, irritated, itchy eyes.Tear Support with MaquiBright® is a unique oral supplement that can support eye health from the inside out for systemic, continuous comfort. The formula can promote your body's natural mechanisms to facilitate the production of your own natural tears.The secret lies in the proprietary maqui berry extract and its supply of compounds called delphinidins. They can encourage natural defenses against chemical and light stimulation and ultraviolet (UV) light. (1,2)Research with healthy volunteers taking 60 mg of this extract per day experienced:A 45% increase in the production of tear fluid in both eyes (3)A 72% improvement in dry eye symptoms after 60 days (4)To support eye health, comfort, and lubrication all day long you can now take one vegetarian capsule in the morning instead of adding artificial tears in the form of drops throughout the day. Tear Support with MaquiBright® can in this way support you to get your eyes back to feeling and looking their best!

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Carnosine
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is carnosine? It's a dipeptide, a natural antioxidant in the body as well as available through food. Carnosine is made of the two amino acids beta-alanine and L-histidine. Although carnosine is naturally present, levels decrease with age. This anti-aging supplement contains 500 mg of carnosine to support longevity and exercise recovery.Why it works:Carnosine has the ability to suppress various aspects of aging and, as a result, delay some of the age-related conditions. It can promote overall health and recovery after workout, help the heart muscle contract more efficiently and inhibit glycation.The science behind the product:Carnosine: A key player in healthy agingThe dipeptide carnosine can help counteract glycation, a process linked to aging that damages proteins in the body. Glycation occurs when proteins or lipids bind with sugars in an uncontrolled, non-enzymatic way, leading to the formation of non-functional structures in the body.The process of glycation can contribute to wrinkled skin. Research shows that carnosine can inhibit the formation of advanced glycation end products, AGEs. (1)Protecting the membranes of muscle cellCarnosine levels in muscle cells are closely linked to lifespan. (1,2) While muscle cells (myocytes) naturally contain high amounts of carnosine, these levels drop significantly with age – declining by 63% from age 10 to 70. (4) This reduction may contribute to age-related muscle loss and decreased function. Moreover, carnosine plays a role in heart muscle health by helping regulate calcium signaling in heart muscle cells. (5) Given these benefits, Carnosine is a valuable addition to any comprehensive nutritional regimen. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Taurine
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Taurine can support the cardiovascular- and nervous systems and promote cognitive and liver health (encouraging bile salt production in the liver). It can also encourage water and calcium movement across cell membranes, which can help maintain cell membrane stability. A daily capsule of 1000 mg of taurine can provide multiple benefits. This product also comes as powder. Why it works:Taurine is one of the body’s most abundant free, intercellular amino acids and is produced by the body itself. Produced from the amino acid L-cysteine, researchers have described it as “one of the most essential substances in the body.” Taurine is found many places in the body but especially in the tissues of the central nervous system, where it appears to play a regulating role. However, taurine is lacking in many diets and, in case of illness, may not be sufficiently produced by your body. In fact, the levels drop by as much as 80% with age! Therefore, adding this nutrient to your dietary regime, can help restoring youthful taurine blood levels.According to published research, taurine has been shown to: Support insulin sensitivity and healthy glucose metabolismHelp maintain intracellular electrolytes balance (particularly calcium)Support eye/vison health and hearing functionHelp maintain central nervous system healthEncourage cell membrane stability & water balance (osmoregulation) Promote optimal liver function and healthy bile salt formation Help maintain cognitive function and neuron integrity Encourage heart health and function Promote skeletal muscle health Boost exercise capacity Reduce chronic inflammationHelp prevent diabetic problems The science behind the product:Taurine for heart healthStudies suggest that taurine promotes cardiovascular health in a variety of ways. It can help maintain already healthy blood pressure, heart rhythm, and vascular function and encourages healthy heart muscle contractions. Dietary taurine can also help promote normal insulin response and support already healthy blood glucose levels. Nervous system health and taurine Taurine is especially concentrated in the excitable tissues of the central nervous system. It plays an important neuroprotective role, in part through its ability to maintain water and electrolyte balance across cell membranes, inhibit oxidative processes and promote a healthy inflammatory response. Supplementation with this nutrient can also promote healthy cognitive function, retinal health, and support hearing. It can protect inner ear cells from damage by normalizing the flow of calcium ions they require for proper function. Muscle health, aging and taurineTaurine may support skeletal muscle health and has been shown to support exercise performance and help maintain muscle mass and function as we age. Evidence indicates that taurine supports healthy aging and promotes longevity. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Omega-3 Plus EPA/DHA Fish Oil, Sesame, Olive, Krill & Astax
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The omega-3 acids EPA and DHA can support your cardiovascular system, brain health, help reduce chronic inflammation, and more.The fish oil used in this formula has been gently purified by a proprietary process to rule out contamination with environmental pollutants.Moreover, this bestseller goes beyond fish oil. It's a comprehensive omega-3 formula with synergistic nutrients that enhance the omega-3 benefits.Why it works:Researchers have long known the health benefits of omega-3 fatty acids, which are abundant in the Mediterranean diet. Omega-3s can be obtained from a variety of sources, and studies also shows that omega-3 from different sources can have complementary benefits throughout the body, enhanching the health impact. DHA and EPA are the two most essential omega-3s. Super Omega-3 Plus provides the body with EPA and DHA from premium quality fish oil and concentrated oil from krill. The formula also include olive extract, sesame lignans, and astaxanthin. Together, all these nutrients can provide enhanced support of the omega-3 benefits. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements. The science behind the product:What are the benefits of omega-3s from fish oil?The essential omega-3 fatty acids can help: (1-4)Keep your heart and blood vessels functioning optimally Support healthy circulation and maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels Counteract inflammatory factors, promoting overall wellness.Promote already-healthy levels of LDL, HDL, and triglycerides. Higher omega-3 levels have also been linked to: (5-8) Healthy brain functionBalanced moodGraceful agingClean fish oil & concentrated krill oilLife Extension makes Super Omega-3 formula with pure, high-quality fish oil. Concentrated Antarctic krill oil (Euphausia superba) is added, delivering an advanced omega-3 supplement. Both fish oil and krill oil can help restore the omega-6/omega-3 balance in the body. What are the health benefits of astaxanthin? Astaxanthin is a red-orange carotenoid pigment naturally found in microalgae and krill oil. It's a powerful antioxidant shown to have widespread health benefits such as support joint, DNA, brain, heart, the immune system and mitochondrial health.Furthermore, it has also been shown to encourage healthy blood glucose levels for those already in the normal range and can protect sensitive cells in the eye.Polyphen-oil™ olive extract & sesame lignans The Mediterranean diet, full of olive oil and seafood, is associated with heart health and a healthy life span. (9-11) This has inspired Life Extension to combine a pure fish oil with sesame lignans and unique polyphenols from olive extract (fruit and leaf) and sesame lignans. The polyphenol-rich olive extract is concentrated and standardized to provide the benefits of olives’ heart health-promoting polyphenols. This olive extract provides a healthy dose one might find in a high-quality Mediterranean diet, providing the polyphenol equivalent of just over 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil. The role of sesame lignans is to augment the benefits of fish oil by several mechanisms such as guarding the unsaturated fatty acids in the body against oxidation and directing them towards pathways that help with inflammatory reactions.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all; what are enzymes? Digestive enzymes break down food, and they are essential to the absorption of nutrients from food and used in many bodily processes.However, the natural aging process can inhibit the production of digestive enzymes, making it harder for the body to absorb and use the nutrients from food. This can result in feeling bloated and other digestive discomforts after eating a large meal, as well as causing imbalances in the digestive system.Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics is good for anyone trying to up their intake of hard-to-digest veggies, legumes, fruit, or leafy greens.This innovative vegetarian and non-GMO formula can promote healthy digestion of hard-to-digest starches, sugars, and cellulose from vegetables, as well as proteins, fats, carbohydrates, and lactose. (1,2) Why it works:Research has shown that supplementing with digestive enzymes can promote optimal digestion and absorption of nutrients from the foods you eat. (1-3)The vegetarian-friendly Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics contains a scientifically formulated blend of 10 carefully chosen vegetarian digestive enzymes to help digest plant-based diets – veggies, legumes, fruit, or leafy greens – as well as macros such as protein, dairy, starches, and fatMoreover, the enzymes are combined with a beneficial probiotic strain B. coagulansthat can support the digestive tract and health, promoting a healthy microbiome and GI balance while suppressing less-beneficial bacteria at the same time, for overall better intestinal health, function, and digestivecomfort. The science behind the product:Supporting optimal health starts with optimal digestionThis digestive health formula contains a blend of 10 powerful digestive enzymes like alpha-galactosidase, protease 3.0 and lipase, and others to promote optimal digestion of main types of foods: Plant-derived carbohydrates & starches: Alpha galactosidase promotes carbohydrate digestion and supports GI comfort by breaking down oligosaccharides found in foods such as legumes (beans) and cruciferous vegetables, such as cauliflower, broccoli, cabbage, and others, which are notorious for causing occasional abdominal bloating and discomfort. Dietary fiber: Hemicellulase, xylanase, and pectinase help break down plant cell components to promote optimal digestion and nutrient absorption. Protein: Protease 3.0 helps digest proteins at acidic pH, like in the stomach. This enzyme helps break down stubborn protein and promotes the digestion of gliadin (a compound found in wheat). Protease SP helps break down most soluble proteins into smaller molecular weight peptides and free amino acids. Fats: Lipase is an enzyme that helps break down dietary fats. Dairy: Lactase is essential for digesting lactose from dairy products.Beneficial probiotic for better GI balance Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics also delivers the added benefits of the probiotic B. coagulans. Probiotics such as this one support digestive health and inhibit less beneficial bacteria, which in turn promotes digestive comfort. (4> How to use:Take one (1) capsule one to two times daily before the heaviest meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. For maximum benefit, take one capsule before you eat.

Health benefits overview: Do you struggle with digestive discomfort after meals? Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics can help promote optimal digestion and nutrient absorption from the foods you eat. This vegetarian formula combines 10 powerful digestive enzymes with beneficial probiotics to encourage comfortable digestion of plant-based foods, proteins, fats, and carbohydrates. The scientifically formulated blend can help reduce bloating while supporting a balanced gut microbiome for overall gastrointestinal wellness.

Why this formula works: Digestive enzymes break down food into nutrients your body can absorb and use. However, natural aging can inhibit enzyme production, making it harder for your body to extract nutrients from meals. When enzyme levels decline, you may experience bloating and digestive discomfort after eating, particularly with large or fiber-rich meals. This can result in imbalances throughout your digestive system. Research demonstrates that supplementing with digestive enzymes can promote optimal nutrient absorption. This formula delivers a comprehensive blend of vegetarian enzymes specifically chosen to digest vegetables, legumes, fruits, leafy greens, proteins, dairy, starches, and fats while supporting your gastrointestinal balance.

Backed by science: 10 powerful digestive enzymes for comprehensive food breakdown This formula contains a carefully selected blend of enzymes designed to help you digest all major food types. Alpha-galactosidase promotes carbohydrate digestion and encourages gastrointestinal comfort by breaking down oligosaccharides found in legumes and cruciferous vegetables like broccoli, cauliflower, and cabbage. These foods are notorious for causing occasional bloating and discomfort. Hemicellulase, xylanase, and pectinase work together to break down plant cell walls, promoting optimal digestion of dietary fiber and nutrient absorption from your vegetables and fruits. Are you eating more plant-based meals? These enzymes make it easier for your body to process high-fiber foods. Protein and fat digestion support Protease 3.0 helps digest proteins at acidic pH levels, like those in your stomach. This enzyme breaks down stubborn proteins and promotes the digestion of gliadin, a compound found in wheat. Protease SP works to break down most soluble proteins into smaller peptides and free amino acids that your body can readily use. Lipase is an essential enzyme that helps break down dietary fats, while lactase supports the digestion of lactose from dairy products. This comprehensive enzyme blend ensures comfortable digestion regardless of what's on your plate. Beneficial probiotic for gut balance Beyond digestive enzymes, this formula delivers the added advantages of B. coagulans, a beneficial probiotic strain. Probiotics like B. coagulans encourage digestive wellness and help inhibit less beneficial bacteria in your gut. This promotes a balanced microbiome, which in turn encourages digestive comfort and overall gastrointestinal function.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Arterial Protect
product.description:
The importance of plaque stabilityWith advancing age, plaque builds up in the walls of our arteries. Plaque is made up of lipids, proteins, white blood cells, cellular waste products, and calcium. (1) While the gradual accumulation of plaque causes the blood vessels to narrow over time, plaque can also become unstable and rupture, potentially damaging the inner lining of the arteries (endothelium) and blocking blood flow.The stability of this plaque plays a crucial role in maintaining proper cardiovascular health and function. Arterial Protect combines targeted extracts that can help stabilize plaque and combat oxidative stress.A clinically backed formulaArterial Protect offers a clinically tested combination of two extracts shown to support the health, structure, and function of arteries:Pycnogenol® French maritime pine bark extract has been shown to improve endothelial function and arterial blood circulation. Additionally, it's known to inhibit oxidative stress, inflammation, and platelet aggregation to promote arterial health. (2)Centellicum® Gotu Kola extract was found in placebo-controlled studies to enhance the stability of arterial plaque. (3,4) Stable plaque is characterized by a fibrous cap rich in collagen that holds the plaque in place. (1) This extract can also help inhibit inflammation and oxidation to support vascular health. (5)

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for comprehensive cardiovascular support? Arterial Protect can help maintain the stability of arterial plaque while promoting optimal blood vessel function throughout your body. This clinically tested formula combines French maritime pine bark extract and gotu kola to encourage endothelial health and balanced circulation. The targeted botanical extracts work synergistically to combat oxidative stress and promote vascular wellness.

Why this formula works: As we age, plaque naturally accumulates within arterial walls, composed of lipids, proteins, calcium, white blood cells, and cellular waste products. The stability of this plaque plays a crucial role in maintaining proper cardiovascular function. While gradual plaque buildup narrows blood vessels over time, unstable plaque poses additional concerns for your heart health. When plaque becomes unstable and ruptures, it can damage the delicate inner lining of arteries and potentially block vital blood flow. This formula delivers two targeted plant extracts that have been clinically tested to enhance plaque stability. By addressing multiple pathways, including oxidative stress and inflammation, these botanicals can help protect your cardiovascular system.

Backed by science: Pycnogenol® French maritime pine bark extract French maritime pine bark extract, known as Pycnogenol®, has been extensively studied for its cardiovascular benefits. This powerful botanical extract improves endothelial function, which refers to the health of your blood vessel linings. Clinical research demonstrates that it enhances arterial blood circulation, helping to ensure optimal blood flow reaches all parts of your body. How does this extract protect your cardiovascular system? Pycnogenol® works by inhibiting oxidative stress, a key factor in cardiovascular aging. It also helps manage inflammation and platelet aggregation, two processes that significantly impact arterial health and overall heart function. Centellicum® gotu kola extract Gotu kola extract, branded as Centellicum®, has demonstrated remarkable effects on arterial plaque stability in placebo-controlled clinical studies. The key to stable plaque lies in its fibrous cap, which is rich in collagen. This protective collagen layer holds the plaque securely in place, preventing rupture events. This botanical extract enhances collagen synthesis within arterial plaques, strengthening their structural integrity. Beyond plaque stabilization, gotu kola also helps inhibit inflammation and oxidation processes that can damage vascular tissues. By promoting denser, more stable plaques, this extract can help reduce cardiovascular risks associated with plaque rupture.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.backed_by_science: Pycnogenol® French maritime pine bark extract French maritime pine bark extract, known as Pycnogenol®, has been extensively studied for its cardiovascular benefits. This powerful botanical extract improves endothelial function, which refers to the health of your blood vessel linings. Clinical research demonstrates that it enhances arterial blood circulation, helping to ensure optimal blood flow reaches all parts of your body. How does this extract protect your cardiovascular system? Pycnogenol® works by inhibiting oxidative stress, a key factor in cardiovascular aging. It also helps manage inflammation and platelet aggregation, two processes that significantly impact arterial health and overall heart function. Centellicum® gotu kola extract Gotu kola extract, branded as Centellicum®, has demonstrated remarkable effects on arterial plaque stability in placebo-controlled clinical studies. The key to stable plaque lies in its fibrous cap, which is rich in collagen. This protective collagen layer holds the plaque securely in place, preventing rupture events. This botanical extract enhances collagen synthesis within arterial plaques, strengthening their structural integrity. Beyond plaque stabilization, gotu kola also helps inhibit inflammation and oxidation processes that can damage vascular tissues. By promoting denser, more stable plaques, this extract can help reduce cardiovascular risks associated with plaque rupture.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Dopa-Mind
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance: First of all; what is dopamine? Dopamine is an essential neurotransmitter that helps support mood and cognition. However, dopamine levels decline with age, corresponding to a decrease in mental performance. Dopa-Mind™ can help promote healthy dopamine levels. Why it Works:The wild green oat extract in Dopa-Mind™ has been shown to encourage more youthful cognitive performance in those where it is showing signs of waning, help maintain cognitive function in those whose minds are still healthy, and it may also support longevity.The Science Behond the Product:Dopa-Mind™ contains an extract of wild green oats that is demonstrated to help inhibit the monoamine oxidase-B (MAO-B) enzyme. This is important because age-related decline in dopamine is largely caused by rising levels of MAO-B. Published studies show that by inhibiting MAO-B, this bioactive wild green oat extract promotes healthy dopamine levels.This MAO-B inhibiting mechanism has been shown to support mental acuity and longevity. (1) In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial in aging volunteers with below-average cognition, researchers demonstrated that 1,600 mg of the same wild green oat extract found in Dopa-Mind™ produced a 74% improvement on a standard test of mental acuity. (1)Morover, research shows that 800 mg of the same extract supported mental processing time and speed. (2) In other research, this extract was found to promote cerebral artery dilation, encouraging the healthy blood flow vital to brain health. (3)How to Use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Thyroid Support Complex
product.description:
The thyroid functionThe thyrod gland acts as the body’s thermostat and is one of the major regulators of metabolism. The two main hormones it produces are T3 and T4, which travel through the bloodstream to reach almost every cell in the body.Optimal thyroid function can help improve energy levels, metabolism, healthy weight management, motivation, and concentration.Life Extension's Thyroid Support Complex formula combines critical nutrients that have been shown to support healthy thyroid function.Comprehensive thyroid supportThyroid Support Complex provides:Ashwagandha, an adaptogenic herb, demonstrated by research to support production of the thyroid hormone T4 in our body.Korean Ginseng, clinically shown to reduce the inactive, thyroid hormone-inhibiting reverse T3 form, and support healthy levels of T3 and T4.For further enhanced benefitsThe following additional nutrients are included in Thyroid Support Complex:Iodine and tyrosine, which are needed for the production of thyroid hormones.Vitamin A, an important nutrient for supporting healthy serum T3 levels.Vitamin B12, which is required in sufficient amounts for healthy thyroid activity.

product.title: X-R Shield
product.description:
Ionizing radiation such as cosmic radiation or X-rays from medical diagnostic imaging procedures can cause harm to human body tissues by mechanisms including direct DNA damage and the production of toxic free radicals. In addition to limiting and/or avoiding excessive ionizing radiation exposure from various sources (e.g. frequent medical diagnostic imaging procedures like CT and/or PET scans, recurrent transcontinental plane travel) whenever reasonable, additional cellular support during radiation exposure and subsequent free radical generation is helpful for optimal health.Research indicates that certain nutrients may help support the body’s cellular integrity in the context of ionizing radiation.The new X-R Shield provides the following protective nutrients:Lemon balm supports the production of 3 bodily enzymes that form a natural defense system against free radical and DNA damage: superoxide dismutase, glutathione peroxidase, and catalase.Ginkgo biloba supports the body’s capacity to counteract reactive oxygen species, which can interact with DNA. Spirulina supports the production of white blood cells in the bone marrow. These immune cells are essential for a healthy immune response. At least five days prior to ionizing radiation exposure (e.g. medical diagnostic imaging procedures or transcontinental plane travel) consider taking three capsules of X-R Shield one to three times daily and continue taking until the bottle is finished.

Arginine detoxifies ammonia in the cats’ kidneys and is also important for heart and pancreatic function and a healthy bowel.Just like humans, they require B vitamins to support the cardiovascular system. So, how can you be sure that you give your pet the best nutrition?Cat supplement with premium-grade nutrientsBesides high-quality commercial foods that are nutrient-enriched, food supplements are the best way for acquiring the vitamins and minerals necessary for long healthy lives.Just two scoops of Life Extension’s Cat Mix delivers the nutrients your pet needs to stay healthy and strong. Animals have unique physiological and structural systems and need specific food and nutrients for optimal health. Household pets are now considered family members who require special attention.Filling the need, the pet food industry has grown tremendously over the years. Yet, you have to wonder if you acquire the best nutrients for your dog. “Man’s best friend” is a perfect companion who can live a long active life, provided it is properly cared for. Just like humans, dogs need carbohydrates, fats, proteins, vitamins, minerals, and water in a balanced diet to stay healthy. Unfortunately, most dog foods are not necessarily ideal and some have been reported as containing ingredients unfit for animal consumption. Dogs can tolerate plant-based food, but they need a good amount of meat protein in their diets for their unique systems. Dogs are also affected by age-related issues, like us, thus needing certain nutrients. Carnitine, a derivative of amino acids, is found in nearly all body cells. Its main role is to turn fat into energy and is especially important for the cardiovascular system. Vitamin E has also been proven to be important for your dog’s health. So, how can you be sure that you give your pet the best nutrition? Besides high-quality commercial foods that are nutrient-enriched, food supplements are the best way for getting the vitamins and minerals necessary for long healthy lives. Life Extension’s Dog Mix is among the best products for protecting your pet’s health. Just two scoops per day provide the vitamins your pet needs to stay healthy and strong. Dog Mix contains significant amounts of high-grade nutrients usually reserved for the most expensive human supplements. It contains flavonoids, amino acids, antioxidants, probiotics, essential fatty acids, methylation enhancers and more. In fact, many commercial pet foods do not contain the vitamins, amino acids, phytonutrients and advanced antioxidants found in Dog Mix. product.title: Super Ubiquinol CoQ10, 60 softgels
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Mitochondria are the energy factories of the human cells and coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) is an essential component for healthy cell function. CoQ10 is required to extract energy from fats and sugars. However, the production of CoQ10 in our body declines as we age and we need to supplement the daily need. That is because CoQ10 in sufficient quantities helps the cells work efficiently and protect proteins, lipids and DNA from oxidation.Why it works:More people are supplementing with CoQ10 than ever before due to increased awareness about cholesterol lowering statin drugs. Many doctors, though, do not know that ageing can be a greater cause for CoQ10 decrease than statin drugs. What is even more worrying is the deficit caused by the dual effects of aging and statin drug use that can severely weaken the vitality of our cells. Another issue is that CoQ10 is difficult to absorb. When it comes to choosing a CoQ10 supplement, the primary factor is how many swallowed milligrams actually make it into your bloodstream. In severely ill patients conventional ubiquinone CoQ10 has been proven hardly detectable, while ubiquinol led to clinical improvements.The science behind the product:Scientific studies show that ubiquinol absorbs up to 8 times better than ubiquinone and higher levels of ubiquinol remain in the blood. Studies measuring exercise-induced fatigue have shown a 90% greater potency of ubiquinol compared to ubiquinone. In middle-aged mice, ubiquinol was shown to be 40% more effective in slowing ageing processes. Life Extension Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 offers the highly bioavailable ubiquinol form of CoQ10 in a patented delivery system with a superior absorption level.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you feeling the effects of declining energy as you age? CoQ10 is an essential component for optimal cellular function, required to extract energy from fats and sugars within your mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells. Super Ubiquinol CoQ10, 60 softgels can help maintain sufficient CoQ10 levels to support efficient cellular work and protect proteins, lipids, and DNA from oxidation.

Why this formula works: More people recognize the importance of CoQ10 supplementation than ever before, yet many don't realize that aging itself significantly reduces natural CoQ10 production. This decline can be even more concerning when combined with factors like statin drug use, which further depletes CoQ10 levels and can severely weaken cellular vitality. Another challenge with CoQ10 supplementation is absorption. When choosing a CoQ10 product, the critical question is: how many milligrams actually make it into your bloodstream? In severely ill patients, conventional ubiquinone CoQ10 has proven barely detectable in blood levels, while ubiquinol led to measurable clinical improvements. Your body needs a form it can truly absorb and utilize.

Backed by science: Ubiquinol: the superior bioavailable form Scientific studies demonstrate that ubiquinol absorbs up to 8 times better than conventional ubiquinone, with higher levels remaining in your bloodstream. This enhanced absorption translates to real-world benefits you can experience. Enhanced potency for energy and vitality Research measuring exercise-induced fatigue showed a remarkable 90% greater potency of ubiquinol compared to ubiquinone. In middle-aged mice, ubiquinol proved 40% more effective in slowing aging processes, demonstrating its superior biological activity. Patented delivery system for maximum absorption This formula combines the highly bioavailable ubiquinol form with a patented delivery system designed specifically to maximize absorption. This advanced technology ensures your body receives the full benefits of each softgel you take. Essential for aging adults and statin users As we age, natural CoQ10 production declines significantly. If you're taking statin medications, this decline becomes even more pronounced. Supplementing with a highly absorbable form becomes increasingly important for maintaining cellular energy, cardiovascular wellness, and overall vitality throughout your life.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: BioActive Folate & Vitamin B12
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Maintaining adequate folate- and vitamin B12 levels is crucial. BioActive Folate & Vitamin B12 provides clinically studied, biologically active forms of folate and vitamin B12 that your body can use directly. This is to maximize their benefits in supporting heart, brain, digestive health, and more.Note: A diet rich in folate may help lower the risk of brain or spinal cord defects in newborns. Women of childbearing age are advised to get 600-800 mcg of folate daily. Why it works:The vitamin B family is complex and provides numerous health benefits. What is folate? Folate is a form of B vitamin that plays an essential role in DNA health, red blood cell formation, vascular function, cognition, and more. Vitamin B12 supports the brain and promotes heart health and nerve cell growth by helping to keep homocysteine levels within the normal range. The science behind the product: Biologically active folate & vitamin B12 Bioactive Folate & Vitamin B12 capsules deliver folate as methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF) and vitamin B12 as methylcobalamin. 5-MTHF is the metabolically active form of folic acid. Unlike folic acid, it doesn’t need to be converted by the body before use. Research shows 5-MTHF is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid and can cross the blood-brain barrier, making it especially beneficial for neurological health. (1) Methylcobalamin is the bioactive form of vitamin B12, efficiently absorbed and utilized by the body and central nervous system. How folate supports the body Folate is found in abundance in leafy green vegetables. It plays a central role in the DNA synthesis needed for cell growth and new cell formation, and it also helps convert vitamin B12 to one of its bioactive forms. The health benefits include supporting healthy DNA function, helping maintain normal homocysteine levels for heart support, and promoting skin, GI tract, and immune system health. Folate also encourages a healthy endothelial function and can improve mild memory loss associated with aging. (2-6) Because folate is essential for cell division and protein synthesis, maintaining optimal levels is especially important for digestive health. Certain medications, such as long-term pain relievers, can interfere with folate metabolism. The important role of vitamin B12 Vitamin B12 is naturally present in animal-based foods such as dairy and eggs. Because of this, vegans and vegetarians are at risk of deficiency. In addition, the body’s ability to absorb B12 from food typically decreases with age. (7) Vitamin B12 promotes brain and cognitive health. It supports heart health by helping regenerate the amino acid methionine, which in turn helps maintain normal homocysteine levels. B12 also plays a role in nerve cell growth, methylation, and metabolism. And when combined with folate, it helps maintain the production of red blood cells (erythropoiesis) within normal range. (7) How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Advanced Milk Thistle, 60 gels
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Liver health formulas made with milk thistle have been in use for centuries. Advanced milk thistle extract contains phytonutrients that can fight oxidative stress and support liver health. The formula of Advanced Milk Thistle is combining silybin with phosphatidylcholine and other phospholipids, and it can enhance the absorption of milk thistle's active compounds, providing powerful liver health support.Why it works:Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body. Milk thistle extract is one of nature's most potent weapons to support liver health. Its bioactive compounds are known to stabilize cell membranes, assist in detoxification activities and neutralize a wide range of free radicals.Milk thistle contains powerful compounds that are beneficial not only for the liver, but for the overall health and vitality of the entire body. But the active compound in milk thistle, silybin, does not dissolve well in water, making it difficult for the body to absorb. Life Extension's milk thistle formula can overcome this roadblock by mixing silybin with a nutrient called phosphatidylcholine to boost uptake. Advanced Milk Thistle may provide advanced milk thistle benefits of silymarin, silibinins, and isosilybin A and B, as well as phospholipids to aid and promote absorption for enhanced health support. These compounds can deliver full-spectrum support for liver health.The science behind the product:Modern living puts a heavy load on the liver, making it critical to proactively maintain liver health. That’s where hepato-protective herbs such as milk thistle come in. The powerful formula of Advanced Milk Thistle:Milk thistle contains antioxidants that support not only liver health, but overall health. (1-3)Silymarin is extracted from milk thistle. This extract is a powerful free radical scavenger that promotes healthy liver function in its own right. (4-10) Advanced extraction technology has now allowed us to isolate other constituents within the silymarin extract itself and test their ability to support liver health and beyond. Silibinin is another compound present in our high-quality milk thistle extract. Made up of silybins A and B, it is the most biologically active flavonolignan component found in milk thistle extract. Its beneficial effects on the liver have been shown in pre-clinical and clinical studies. (8,11)Isosilybin: Other milk thistle extracts called isosilybin A and B have proven to be the most efficient at helping to maintaining healthy cell division. (12,13)Phosphatidylcholine and other phospholipids can enhance milk thistle’s delivery.Until recently the technology did not exist to harness the plant's full benefits. The problem had to deal with the main bioactive component of milk thistle, called silybin, which does not dissolve well in water. (14) This makes it difficult for the body to absorb all of it. (14,15) Scientists have overcome silybin’s poor bioavailability by integrating it into a phytosome. A phytosome is a tiny sphere made out of plant-derived phosphatidylcholine.Phosphatidylcholine is an ideal "carrier molecule" for silibin and facilitates its transport across the intestinal lining into the bloodstream. The silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex is absorbed much better than silibin aloine and its bioavailability to the liver is 10-fold greater. (8,15,16) Scientists believe that phosphatidylcholine molecularly bonds to silybin, helping to steer it through the cell membranes in the intestinal tract. (15) This can improve the delivery of the benefits of milk thistle extracts for liver health.Preclinical and clinical evidence showed that this silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex resulted in almost 5-fold greater concentrations of silybin in the bloodstream than silymarin alone, and its ultimate bioavailability to the liver, its target organ, is up to 10-fold greater than pure silymarin. (17-19)The milk thistle extract with phosphatidylcholine in Advanced Milk Thistle contains standardised concentrations of silybin and isosilybin A and B which are typically not found in other milk thistle extracts. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for ways to support your liver health in today's demanding world? Advanced Milk Thistle, 120 softgels can help promote optimal liver function while encouraging your body's natural detoxification processes. This time-tested botanical formula delivers powerful compounds that protect liver cells from oxidative stress and maintain vital liver health for overall wellness and vitality.

Why this formula works: Protecting your liver is essential for maintaining overall health and energy throughout your body. Milk thistle extract stands as one of nature's most potent allies for liver wellness, used successfully for centuries. These compounds deliver comprehensive support for liver health through multiple mechanisms. Your liver works hard every day, and milk thistle can promote normal liver function, encourage natural detoxification pathways, and is gentle enough for safe daily use.

This antioxidant-rich substance can help shield your liver from oxidative damage while maintaining optimal cellular function. Modern lifestyles place significant demands on liver health, making proactive support with botanicals like milk thistle increasingly important. Silibinin for advanced liver support Silibinin, composed of the biologically active compounds silybin A and B, represents another key component in this premium formula. Research has demonstrated meaningful benefits for liver wellness, offering an additional layer of protection beyond basic silymarin support. Isosilybin A and B compounds These specialized extracts have proven effective in promoting optimal cell division patterns. By including both isosilybin A and B, this formula provides fuller-spectrum support than standard milk thistle supplements, addressing multiple aspects of liver health simultaneously. Phosphatidylcholine-enhanced delivery system Here's where this formula truly excels: silybin has naturally low water solubility, making absorption challenging for your body. The solution involves incorporating silybin into a phytosome, a microscopic structure formed with plant-derived phosphatidylcholine. This phospholipid-based delivery system facilitates transport across your intestinal lining into the bloodstream, making it an ideal carrier for silybin. Clinically proven superior absorption The difference is remarkable: preclinical and clinical studies showed this silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex achieved almost 5 times higher bloodstream concentrations of silybin. Even more impressive, it delivered up to 10 times greater bioavailability to your liver compared to standard unformulated silymarin products.

product.title: Pomegranate Complete
product.description:
A large body of scientific researchFew nutritional sources have gained as much scientific validation as the superfood pomegranate! While the majority of research has focused on extracts from the fruit alone so far, the synergistic benefits of compounds specific to other parts of the plant – notably the seeds and flowers – now receive attention as well.A surprising number of benefitsThe advantages attributable to pomegranate include everything from supporting healthy prostate and breast tissue to promoting a healthy heart, joints, liver, and kidneys. Moreover, according to studies, pomegranate is one of nature’s most powerful antioxidants.Pomegranate can also help with inflammatory factors and combat age-related metabolic changes.Pomegranate CompleteThe healthy compounds in pomegranate aren’t all in the juice, which comes only from the pomegranate fruit.To support the health of the entire body, Pomegranate Complete combines pomegranate fruit polyphenols with biologically active compounds from other parts of the pomegranate plant: Punicanolic acid, a member of the triterpene family of essential oils and pomegranatate – two compounds that help deliver full spectrum pomegranate benefits.This superior formula therefore supplies the complete nutritional profile of the entire pomegranate plant. product.title: Silymarin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Silymarin is the major active compound from milk thistle extract ( Silybum marianum ), a member of the Compositae or daisy family. It's considered a flavonolignan mixture, a unique type of bioflavonoid, and an antioxidant that fights against damaging free radicals ― and in this way offers powerful antioxidant support for the liver. Scientific studies show that oral supplementation with silymarin can help support liver function and promote healthy liver cells. Silymarin has been shown to combat lipid peroxidation in the liver.Why it works:The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions and keeps it clean of harmful substances. It's also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body, recycling compounds (such as iron) from red blood cells, synthesizing plasma proteins, producing important hormones, secreting bile, and converting sugars into glycogen. The liver is also responsible for the body’s natural detoxification processes.Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever. In Europe and Asia, herbal liver tonics have been in common use for centuries. Being validated through research, the benefits of these herbs contain compounds that assist in antioxidant activities, in stabilizing cell membrane, enhancing bile secretion. Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body.Life Extension's Silymarin is formulated with the same ingredients as clinical studies to help support healthy liver function.The science behind the product:Hepato-protective compounds such as silymarin are beneficial not only for the liver but also for the overall health and vitality of the body. (1-3) Silymarin, a mixture of flavonolignans extracted from the milk thistle, can help inhibit oxidative stress, which supports healthy liver function. (4-10) Pre-clinical evidence suggests that silymarin can also promote a healthy inflammatory response at the cellular level. (11,12)Life Extension formula also contains a citrus complex from the peel and fruit of bitter orange rich in bioactive flavonoids. (13,14) Flavonoids are polyphenol compounds that inhibit oxidation to promote a healthy liver. (15)How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Uric Acid Control
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Uric acid is formed when the body breaks down purines, which are organic compounds serving functions in our genetic material and other activities such as neurotransmission. Most purines are made naturally in the body, and the rest come from the diet. Ayuric® is a clinically studied, vegan, water-soluble product from a tannin-rich extract derived from the edible fruit of the Terminalia bellerica tree that can help keep uric acid levels within a healthy range. Why it Works:The standardized extract, Ayuric® , has been shown to support healthy concentrations of two critical enzymes involved in uric acid metabolism: Xanthine oxidase and inducible nitric oxide synthase (iNOS).One capsule of Uric Acid Control provides 500 mg of the same patent-pending Terminalia bellerica extract. The suggested dose is one capsule twice daily.The Science Behind the Product:In a 24-week randomized placebo-controlled trial, volunteers with elevated uric acid levels who received twice-daily capsules of 500 mg T. bellerica extract demonstrated a notable 9.8% average decrease in uric acid levels after only 4 weeks. At the end of the study, uric acid levels were reduced by a remarkable 28,4%, with no reported adverse side effects. (1)This decrease in uric acid levels enabled 89% of the participants who were taking the extract to achieve targeted uric acid serum levels. Further, evidence from pre-clinical studies suggest that the bioactive compounds in T. bellerica may also help support a healthy response to inflammatory factors and has antioxidant properties. (2,3)How to Use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Shade Factor™
product.description:
Safeguard your skin from the inside outLife Extension offers an oral supplement to help protect against harmful solar radiation. Shade Factor combines three unique ingredients to support the body’s natural immune response to UV exposure: Nicotinamide, Polypodium leucotomos extract, and Red Orange Complex®.These nutrients can complement topical sunscreens – which are useful and effective at skin cancer prevention – by protecting even hard-to-reach areas of one’s skin. And unlike lotions and sprays, Shade Factor won't wash off when you swim or sweat.Nicotinamide & fern extract promote healthy DNA function after UV exposureOur bodies have multiple systems that can repair damage to our genetic material inflicted by ultraviolet radiation. Nicotinamide plays a significant role in boosting the production of cellular energy that these systems require to function properly. In addition, nicotinamide has been shown to support the natural immune response needed to protect against the age-related effects of ultraviolet exposure.During a decade of research, an extract of the fern Polypodium leucotomos has been demonstrated to inhibit cellular changes in the skin that can lead to premature aging from outdoor activity.Red Orange Complex® can support natural photo-protectionShade Factor also contains Red Orange Complex™, an extract obtained from three red orange varieties. Active compounds, including flavanones, anthocyanins and hydroxycinnamic acids, as well as ascorbic acid work together to support the body's natural photo-protection against the age-related effects of ultraviolet radiation.How to use Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Biosil, 60 caps
product.description:
What is silicon?Silicon is a trace element that your body requires for the normal growth, development, and integrity of hair, skin, nails, mucous membranes, arteries, bones, cartilage, and connective tissue.Silicon helps with the formation of collagen, the fibrous protein matrix that provides support for tendons, ligaments, cartilage, and bones. Its best-documented action is facilitating bone mineralization.While high doses of silicon are exceptionally well tolerated, currently scientists estimate the human requirement for silicon to be between 5-20 mg per day.Silicon supplementation can be used for:Bones – maintaining bone density and strength by facilitating the deposit of calcium and other minerals into bone tissue.Joints – promoting cartilage development and the integrity of joints and ligaments.Cardiovascular health – for the strength and integrity of the arteries.Muscles – modifying the characteristics of endothelial relaxants and attenuating smooth muscle cell responsiveness to nitric oxide in rat aorta.Nails – helping them growing faster and harder.Hair – promoting growth of thicker and stronger hair.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: California Estate Extra Virgin Olive Oil
product.description:
The heart-healthy olive oil polyphenols Not all olive oil is the same. Life Extension's unfiltered, cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil comes from hand-picked olives at the peak of ripeness and milled within hours of harvest. Olive oil is rich in monounsaturated fatty acids, primarily oleic acid, which are less prone to oxidation compared to other fatty acids. This is a key reason behind olive oil’s numerous health benefits.Research has shown that consuming two tablespoons of olive oil daily can improve markers of cardiovascular health. (2)Polyphenols, the potent antioxidant compounds in olive oil, contribute significantly to its beneficial effects. (3) Hydroxytyrosol, a polyphenol found in olive oil, has been shown to promote cardiovascular health. (4,5)This olive oil provides more than 600 mg/kg of naturally occurring olive polyphenols – 3 times the amount in conventional store-bought olive oils.Supporting healthy lipid levelsOlive oil can help maintain healthy levels of good HDL cholesterol. (6,7) Its polyphenols may also help prevent the oxidation of LDL cholesterol, supporting overall blood vessel health. (8) Promoting healthy endothelial function Olive oil polyphenols can support cardiovascular health by maintaining the health of endothelial cells, which line the inside of blood vessels. (9,10)Evidence suggests that these polyphenols encourage healthy endothelial function after meals, particularly in individuals with a hereditary gene variant affecting their endothelium. (11) Maintaining healthy blood pressure Research shows that the polyphenol content in olive oil may benefit blood pressure health. (12,13)A one-year study found that increased consumption of extra virgin olive oil, as part of a Mediterranean diet, supported healthy blood pressure levels already within the normal range. (14)

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Miraforte with Standardized Lignans
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Testosterone is crucial for a man's overall well-being, and when you're young, testosterone levels are abundant. But as men age, the production of this vital hormone decreases. Super Miraforte with Standardized Lignans can help maintain healthy levels of this key hormone with botanical extracts including Chrysin, Nettle root, Muira puama, and more.This formula includes black pepper extract to maximize nutrient absorption and is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO. Why it Works:Testosterone is crucial for building muscle, boosting strength, and maintaining sexual health in men. (1,2) However, many men experience a significant decline in testosterone compared to healthy youthful levels. (3) This again can impact mood, cognitive function, sexual health, and more. (4,5) Moreover, factors like diet, biology, and the environment can lead to excess estrogen. That's why a comprehensive men's health supplement should also support healthy estrogen balance.This advanced men’s health formula can encourage youthful testosterone levels by combining potent plant extracts shown to impact testosterone with zinc, a mineral associated with healthy amounts of free testosterone. It can also promote overall sexual health and help inhibit testosterone to estrogen conversion. The Science Behind the Product:The ingredients in Super Miraforte with Standardized Lignans are: Maca root: A plant from South America that has been shown in clinical and pre-clinical studies to encourage healthy sexual performance. (6-8)Chrysin: A flavonoid found in plants, honey, and bee propolis, known to stop the enzyme aromatase, which converts testosterone into estrogen. Chrysin can in other words help inhibit testosterone to estrogen conversion. (9,10)HMRlignan™ Norway spruce extract: A source of lignan compounds, which are converted to enterolactone in the digestive tract. Enterolactone is then absorbed into the bloodstream. (11,12) Blood levels of enterolactone have been shown to be related to youthful testosterone ratios. (13,14)Stinging & dwarf nettle root extracts: As men age, they develop a higher ratio of estrogen to testosterone, and both of these hormones play a vital role in men’s prostate health and function. (15,16) Nettle extract has been demonstrated in numerous clinical trials to support healthy urination and prostate function. (17)Muira puama extract: A plant from South America that has a long-established reputation for promoting healthy male sexual function. Bioperine® black pepper: An extract that can help enhance the absorption of other active plant compounds. (18)Zinc: An essential trace mineral with many health benefits, including supporting a healthy testosterone balance. (19) How to Use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) with d-Limonene, 60 softgels
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The nutrient CoQ10 (coenzyme Q10) plays an essential role in supporting a healthy mitochondrial function because it's required in the body to convert macronutrients such as carbohydrates, proteins, and fat into energy for the cells.CoQ10 with d-Limonene can promote cardiovascular health and cellular energy production. The formula provides an affordable way to get your daily dose of CoQ10.Why it works:When the body starts to age, the production of CoQ10 decreases, which on the other hand can result in lower production of energy. The good news is that CoQ10 can easily be supplemented.This CoQ10 supplement is enhanced with D-limonene, which is a compound found in orange peel oil. It can encourage the stability of CoQ10, so that it can stay in your body longer.The science behind the product:Cellular energy with CoQ10A deficiency of CoQ10 affects the cell mitochondria (cell's “powerhouse”) negatively. This is because CoQ10 is a vital componant in transporting electrons from food molecules into ATP molecules, the body's main source of energy.When CoQ10 levels are optimized in the body, the cells can therefore function optimally. (1,2) Research indicates that CoQ10 supplementation is a very effective way to support high-energy organs in the body, including heart, liver, kidneys, and brain. CoQ10 is a potent antioxidantIn addition to promoting cellular energy, CoQ10 has powerful antioxidant proterties, helping to protect cell membranes, lipids, and other vital components from oxidative stress. (3-4)How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The natural aging process can lead to a loss of essential nutrients that maintains healthy eyes. MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron contains three key carotenoids and an extract to help prevent light damage and promote vision health. Why it works:Nutrients that your eyes need are often hard to come by. Moreover, our bodies can sometimes lose the ability to synthesize these nutrients as we age.MacuGuard® Ocular Support contains the cartenoids lutein, trans-zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin, plus alpha-carotene. These powerful cartenoids can help protect light-absorbing cells, the delicate photoreceptor cells in the retina's macula, from light damage. Furthermore, a saffron extract is added to promote sharp vision. The science behind the product:Vital cartenoids for healthy visionThe density of the macular pigment is vital to healthy vision. However, the density of macular pigment naturally declines with age, and some people lose the ability to synthesize meso-zeaxanthin from lutein over time.That's why MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron contains lutein and trans-zeaxanthin and meso-zeaxanthin, as well as alpha-carotene, another eye health carotenoid that has been associated with protection of the macula and retina.Lutein and the two types of zeaxanthin are very well-known to help preserve the health of the macula and act as defenders against excessive oxidative stress. They help keep eyes functioning well, even over time, including night vision. Evidence also suggests that alpha-carotene helps support the macular pigment.Phospholipids for carotenoids: optimal absorptionGetting these eye-healthy nutrients where you need them most is a huge part of supporting your vision health. This formula contains phospholipids, which are an important part of every cell membrane in the body. These phospholipids can help promote absorption and accumulation of lutein and zeaxanthin. Good absorption is crucial for these nutrients to make it into the retina of the eye. Vision-enhancing benefits of saffron Multiple studies have shown that individuals with age-related vision concerns, experienced improved visual acuity supplementing with saffron. This was measured both by advanced technical testing and on the Snellen eye chart that is commonly used by doctors to test vision. How to use:Take one (1) softgel daily, with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner

Health benefits overview: Are you concerned about maintaining your vision health as you age? Natural aging can lead to a loss of essential nutrients that maintain optimal eye function. MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron contains three key carotenoids and a saffron extract that can help prevent light damage and promote visual wellness throughout your life.

Why this formula works: Your eyes need specific nutrients that are often difficult to obtain from diet alone. As we age, our bodies can sometimes lose the ability to synthesize certain vision-supporting compounds naturally. MacuGuard® Ocular Support delivers the carotenoids lutein, trans-zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin, plus alpha-carotene. These powerful compounds can help protect light-absorbing cells in your retina's macula from damaging light exposure. Furthermore, a saffron extract is added to promote sharp visual acuity and clarity.

Backed by science: Essential carotenoids for vision protection The density of your macular pigment is vital for maintaining clear vision. However, macular pigment density naturally declines with age, and some people lose the ability to synthesize meso-zeaxanthin from lutein over time. This formula provides all three forms directly, ensuring your eyes get comprehensive carotenoid support. Three-way carotenoid protection Lutein, trans-zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin are well-documented for helping preserve macular health and acting as defenders against excessive oxidative stress. They help keep your eyes functioning optimally over time, including supporting night vision. Alpha-carotene adds an additional layer of support for your macular pigment and retinal health. Phospholipids for enhanced absorption Getting these eye-healthy nutrients where you need them most is crucial for supporting your vision wellness. This formula contains phospholipids, which are important components of every cell membrane in your body. These phospholipids can help promote absorption and accumulation of lutein and zeaxanthin, ensuring optimal delivery to your retina. Saffron extract for visual acuity Multiple studies have shown that individuals with age-related vision concerns experienced improved visual acuity when supplementing with saffron. These improvements were measured both by advanced technical testing and on the standard Snellen eye chart commonly used by doctors to assess vision quality.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron and Astaxanthin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glanceHealthy vision is a crucial part of ensuring the quality of life as we age. MacuGuard™ Ocular Support with Astaxanthin combines ingredients that have been shown to protect eye health in an absorption-enhanced formula. (1-3)Essential for healthy eyes: CarotenoidsThe nutrients our eyes need are often hard to obtain in sufficient quantities from food alone. For instance: carotenoid nutrients found in vegetables such as lutein and specific forms of zeaxanthin make up our macular pigment which is essential to healthy eyesight. This part of the retina protects underlying lightsensing cells from damage by excess blue and ultraviolet light. Unfortunately, the density of the macular pigment naturally declines with age, and some of us lose the ability to produce meso-zeaxanthin from lutein over time.That’s why MacuGuard™ Ocular Support with Astaxanthin contains lutein as well as trans-zeaxanthin and meso-zeaxanthin. (4)Lutein and the two types of zeaxanthin are very well-known to help preserve the health of the macula and act as defenders against excessive oxidative stress. They help keep eyes functioning well, even over time, including night vision. (3,5,6)In addition, alpha-carotene has been added based on new evidence that it helps support the macular pigment.Fighting eye fatigue: AstaxanthinThe potent antioxidant astaxanthin that crosses the blood-eye barrier has been shown to counteract free radical damage, support vascular health within the eyes and may play a protective role against eye fatigue. Japanese scientists have clinically studied astaxanthin. They’ve demonstrated that 6 mg of astaxanthin supplementation daily helped promote visual sharpness and eye health. (7)Vision-boosting benefits: SaffronThis formula also features saffron extract. Multiple studies showed that individuals with age-related vision concerns, experience improved visual acuity (sharp vision) supplementing with saffron. (8-10)Optimal absorption: Phospholipids for carotenoidsGetting these eye-healthy nutrients where you need them most is a huge part of supporting your vision health. This formula contains phospholipids, which are an important part of every cell membrane in the body. This can help promote absorption and accumulation of lutein and zeaxanthin. Good absorption is crucial for these nutrients to make it into the retina of the eye. (3) Make this innovative formula a part of your nutritional regimen – and help safeguard your eyes for years to come!

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for comprehensive support to maintain healthy vision as you age? MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron and Astaxanthin combines ingredients clinically shown to protect eye health in an absorption-enhanced formula. This innovative blend can help safeguard your eyes for years to come through multiple protective mechanisms.

Why this formula works: Your eyes need specific nutrients that are often difficult to obtain in sufficient quantities from food alone. Carotenoid nutrients like lutein and specific forms of zeaxanthin make up your macular pigment, which is essential for maintaining clear vision. This part of your retina protects underlying light-sensing cells from damage caused by excess blue and ultraviolet light. Unfortunately, macular pigment density naturally declines with age, and some people lose the ability to produce meso-zeaxanthin from lutein over time. That's why this formula provides all three carotenoid forms directly, along with alpha-carotene, saffron extract, and astaxanthin for comprehensive eye protection.

Backed by science: Essential carotenoids for macular protection MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron and Astaxanthin contains lutein, trans-zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin. These three carotenoids are well-documented for helping preserve macular health and acting as defenders against excessive oxidative stress. They help keep your eyes functioning optimally over time, including supporting night vision. Alpha-carotene for additional support Alpha-carotene has been added based on evidence that it helps support healthy macular pigment. This additional carotenoid provides an extra layer of protection for your retinal health, working synergistically with the other eye-health nutrients. Astaxanthin for eye fatigue relief The potent antioxidant astaxanthin crosses the blood-eye barrier and has been shown to counteract free radical damage while supporting vascular health within your eyes. Japanese scientists have clinically demonstrated that 6 mg of astaxanthin supplementation daily helped promote visual sharpness and eye health while playing a protective role against eye fatigue. Saffron extract for visual acuity Multiple studies have shown that individuals with age-related vision concerns experienced improved visual acuity when supplementing with saffron. This remarkable botanical has been measured to enhance sharp vision both by advanced technical testing and on standard eye charts. Phospholipids for optimal absorption Getting these eye-healthy nutrients where you need them most is crucial for supporting your vision wellness. This formula contains phospholipids, which are important components of every cell membrane in your body. These phospholipids can help promote absorption and accumulation of lutein and zeaxanthin, ensuring optimal delivery to your retina.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Tart Cherry with CherryPURE®
product.description:
Tart cherries are packed with anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants responsible for their dark pigmentation. In addition to promoting cellular health in general, including heart and brain health, they also promote faster recovery of muscle function after exercise. That means faster relief from the minor aches, stiffness and discomfort that can follow intense exercise as well as everyday muscle exertion.A study found that tart cherry juice decrased muslce symptoms related to exercise and reduced exercise-induced loss of strength over the days following a workout. In another study, marathon runners experienced significantly faster recovery of strength and muscle function when given tart cherry juice.Add Tart Cherry with CherryPURE™ to your regimen and enjoy all the muscle-supporting benefits of tart cherries without the calories!Benefits at a glance:Supports muscle recovery after exerciseFaster relief from stiffness and aches associated with muscle exertionLoaded with antioxidants called anthocyaninsSupported by numerous scientific studies

product.title: Standardized European Bilberry Extract
product.description:
Many age-related problems of the eyes are caused by compromised circulation. Bilberry extracts exhibit antioxidative as well as neuroprotective properties and have been shown to improve circulation in the capillaries, the smallest blood vessels of the body. The anthocyanins content of bilberry may be especially beneficial for night-time visual acuity.

product.title: Se-Methyl L-Selenocysteine
product.description:
A key micronutrient for selenproteinsSelenium is an essential trace mineral involved in numerous biological functions. In the body, it's incorporated into enzymes and proteins to form selenoproteins, such as the antioxidant enzyme glutathione peroxidase. This enzyme uses four units of selenocysteine to neutralize free radicals through glutathione. (1,2)By balancing cellular oxidation and reduction reactions, glutathione peroxidase and other selenoproteins help safeguard tissues and cells from oxidative stress and promote healthy cell function and division. (1-3)Selenium & thyroid functionSelenium, as selenocysteine, is also a component of enzymes involved in activating thyroid hormones. Selenium can support metabolism, mood, and cognitive health by protecting thyroid gland function and optimizing thyroid hormone synthesis and activity. (2,4,5)Immune health & vitamin synergyKeeping an optimal selenium status contributes to immune regulation by stimulating T cells, natural killer (NK) cells, and other immune cells. Selenium also encourages healthy inflammatory immune activity and works synergistically with vitamin E to protect lipids and promote immune health. (2,6-9) Its bioavailability and absorption are enhanced when taken with vitamins A, C, D, and E. (2)An organic compound Se-methyl L-selenocysteine (MSeC) is a plant-based selenium compound found in garlic and broccoli and has demonstrated positive effects on cell function. (1) It's more bioavailable than inorganic selenium salts typically used in supplements. Unlike selenomethionine, MSeC is closely related to the physiologic form, selenocysteine, that is needed to produce selenoproteins such as glutathione peroxidase. (11,12)

Health benefits overview: Se-Methyl L-Selenocysteine can help you maintain optimal cellular protection through its role in supporting antioxidant enzyme production. This plant-based selenium compound works closely with your body's natural defense systems to encourage healthy cell function and division throughout your tissues. By promoting selenium-dependent processes, this formula can support your thyroid health, immune system activity, and overall cellular resilience against oxidative stress.

Why this formula works: Your body relies on selenium to produce selenoproteins, specialized compounds that perform vital protective functions. Se-methyl L-selenocysteine offers a highly bioavailable form of this essential trace mineral, making it easier for your system to utilize compared to inorganic selenium salts. Unlike selenomethionine, this plant-based compound is closely related to selenocysteine, the physiologic form your body needs to create important selenoproteins like glutathione peroxidase. This antioxidant enzyme uses four units of selenocysteine to neutralize harmful free radicals through glutathione pathways. The formula delivers selenium in a form found naturally in garlic and broccoli, providing you with a plant-based source that has demonstrated positive effects on cellular function.

Backed by science: Essential trace mineral for selenoproteins Selenium serves as a key micronutrient that gets incorporated into enzymes and proteins to form selenoproteins. These specialized compounds include the powerful antioxidant enzyme glutathione peroxidase, which plays a crucial role in protecting your cells from oxidative damage. By balancing cellular oxidation and reduction reactions, selenoproteins help safeguard your tissues and promote healthy cell function throughout your body. Plant-based bioavailable compound Se-methyl L-selenocysteine (MSeC) is an organic selenium compound naturally present in vegetables like garlic and broccoli. Research shows this form offers superior bioavailability compared to inorganic selenium salts typically used in supplements. Its structure closely resembles selenocysteine, the physiologic form needed to produce selenoproteins, making it highly efficient for your body to utilize. Thyroid hormone activation and metabolism Selenium, as selenocysteine, serves as a component of enzymes involved in activating thyroid hormones. This formula can support your metabolism, mood, and cognitive health by protecting thyroid gland function and optimizing thyroid hormone synthesis and activity. Adequate selenium status is essential for maintaining balanced thyroid performance. Immune system regulation and response Maintaining optimal selenium levels contributes to immune regulation by stimulating T cells, natural killer (NK) cells, and other immune system components. This mineral encourages healthy inflammatory immune activity and works synergistically with vitamin E to protect lipids and promote robust immune health. Your selenium absorption and bioavailability are enhanced when taken with vitamins A, C, D, and E. Cellular antioxidant protection Through its incorporation into glutathione peroxidase and other selenoproteins, selenium can help defend your cells against DNA damage, which is a major contributor to accelerated aging. This antioxidant support extends to multiple tissue types, helping maintain cellular integrity and promoting longevity at the cellular level.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

This mineral encourages healthy inflammatory immune activity and works synergistically with vitamin E to protect lipids and promote robust immune health. Your selenium absorption and bioavailability are enhanced when taken with vitamins A, C, D, and E. Cellular antioxidant protection Through its incorporation into glutathione peroxidase and other selenoproteins, selenium can help defend your cells against DNA damage, which is a major contributor to accelerated aging. This antioxidant support extends to multiple tissue types, helping maintain cellular integrity and promoting longevity at the cellular level.
