product.title: Nanoemulsified CoQ10
product.description:
CoQ10 can promote youthful cellular energyCoenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) is a potent antioxidant and essential for the function of our mitochondria, the energy factories of human cells. It's required to convert energy from food into usable cellular energy, ATP, the universal energy currency of our cells. Because of this, CoQ10 is most concentrated in high-energy organs such as the heart and the brain.Maintaining adequate levels of CoQ10 can be a key part of supporting overall health. Unfortunately, CoQ10 levels in our body decline as we age, which can result in diminished cellular vitality of vital organs such as the heart. Sufficient quantities of CoQ10, on the other hand, help the cells work efficiently and protect proteins, lipids, and DNA from oxidation. Supplementation is therefore a good solution.Support for heart health and moreCoQ10 is known for cardiovascular supportIt can also encourage healthy function nervous systemsAlso, CoQ10 can promote respiratory healthIt can support the brain and eyesTo promote oral health, massage into the gums.Unsurpassed Absorption of CoQ10Traditional CoQ10 supplements are notoriously hard to absorb, and regular liposomal encapsulation does not suit this compound.The innovative chemistries of Quicksilver Scientific have solved this problem, resulting in a CoQ10 product with power that you feel quickly and clearlyIn other words; the CoQ10 absorption is dramatically improved with a nanoemulsified format and begins absorbing as soon as it hits the tongue.Refrigerate upon receipt.

Because CoQ10 is most concentrated in high-energy organs such as your heart and brain, maintaining adequate levels can be a key part of supporting overall health.

It can also encourage healthy function in your nervous system, promoting neurological wellness throughout your body. Additionally, CoQ10 can promote respiratory health, supporting optimal lung function. It can also support your brain and eyes, two organs with high energy demands that benefit from adequate CoQ10 levels. This advanced delivery system creates tiny particles that can be absorbed immediately, bypassing the digestive challenges that limit traditional CoQ10 supplements. product.title: Liposomal Methyl B-Complex
product.description:
The importance of B vitaminsB vitamins are a group of 8 water-soluble vitamins such as B1 (thiamin), B2 (riboflavin), B3 (niacin), B5 (pantothenic acid), B6, B7 (biotin), B9 (folate), and B12 (methylcobalamin). They play an essential role in many metabolic reactions such as releasing energy from carbohydrates, fat, and protein. This energy is needed in every cell in the body. The body does not store them, so they need to be replaced daily. A deficiency of one B vitamin can affect the optimal functioning of organ systems throughout the body. Vitamin B12 and B2, in particular, are crucial for maintaining healthy brain and cognitive function.An innovative B complexLiposomal Methyl B-Complex provides folinic acid which can be utilized even by those who are not able to properly metabolize regular folate along with bioavailable forms of the vitamins. This formula also includes TMG (trimethylglycine), which serves a vital role in methylation and whole-body health. Furthermore, it contains and milk thistle to support the liver and detoxification.Efficient liposomal delivery The Quicksilver Delivery Systems can provide rapid nutrient absorption and unparalleled bioavailability.Age, low stomach acid, and genetic variation can weaken absorption of B complex vitamins, and this liposomal formula can therefore deliver, for instance, B12 faster and more efficiently.

Health benefits overview: B vitamins are a group of 8 water-soluble vitamins such as B1 (thiamin), B2 (riboflavin), B3 (niacin), B5 (pantothenic acid), B6, B7 (biotin), B9 (folate), and B12 (methylcobalamin). They play an essential role in many metabolic reactions such as releasing energy from carbohydrates, fat, and protein. Are you looking to support your daily energy and mental clarity? This energy is needed in every cell in your body, and your body does not store B vitamins, so they need to be replaced daily.

Why this formula works: A deficiency of one B vitamin can affect the optimal functioning of organ systems throughout your body. Vitamin B12 and B2, in particular, are crucial for maintaining healthy brain and cognitive function. Liposomal Methyl B-Complex provides folinic acid which can be utilized even by those who are not able to properly metabolize regular folate along with bioavailable forms of the vitamins. This formula also includes TMG (trimethylglycine), which serves a vital role in methylation and whole-body health. How does this formula enhance absorption? Age, low stomach acid, and genetic variation can weaken absorption of B complex vitamins, and this liposomal formula can deliver B12 faster and more efficiently.

Backed by science: B vitamin complex for essential metabolic support The 8 B vitamins in this formula work together to support your energy production and overall vitality. These water-soluble vitamins play critical roles in converting the food you eat into usable cellular energy. Because your body cannot store them, daily replenishment is essential for maintaining optimal health and preventing deficiency-related issues. TMG for methylation and cellular health TMG (trimethylglycine) serves a vital role in methylation, a biochemical process that helps maintain healthy cell function throughout your body. This important compound supports numerous physiological processes that are essential for your overall wellness. Milk thistle for liver support and detoxification Furthermore, this formula contains milk thistle to support your liver and detoxification processes. The liver plays a crucial role in processing nutrients and removing toxins, making this addition particularly valuable for comprehensive health support. Advanced liposomal delivery system The Quicksilver Delivery Systems can provide rapid nutrient absorption and unparalleled bioavailability. This advanced technology solves the common absorption challenges associated with traditional B-complex supplements, ensuring that your body receives and utilizes these essential nutrients effectively.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Liposomal Methyl B-12
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance Vitamin B12 is an essential nutrient for many body systems. But vitamin B12 is notoriously difficult to absorb by the gut. The cutting-edge delivery technology in this formula can dramatically boost the absorption. Each dose of Liposomal Methyl B-12 delivers 1000 mcg of methylcobalamin. Why it works Vitamin B12 is important to keep your energy levels steady and required for proper neurological function and DNA synthesis – both critical for memory, focus, and mood regulation. Together with folate, vitamin B12 helps in the formation of red blood cells and the maintenance of normal homocysteine levels, thereby supporting heart health. In some people, the liver can’t convert cyanocobalamin (which is the common supplemental form of vitamin B12) into adequate amounts of methylcobalamin (methyl B-12), one of the biologically active forms of B12. Liposomal Methyl B-12 contains this active form that your body can use directly. However, age, low stomach acid, and certain genetic variations can reduce the body’s ability to absorb B-complex vitamins, especially vitamin B12. To address this, this liposomal formulation is designed to deliver B12 more efficiently into the bloodstream. The science behind the product More about B12 Vitamin B12 is present in foods of animal origin, including dairy products and eggs. Thus, vegans and vegetarians are more prone to a deficiency of this important nutrient. In addition, older adults and those with reduced levels of stomach acidity have difficulty absorbing vitamin B12 from dietary sources. As a result, vitamin B12 deficiency is common. The metabolically active form of vitamin B12, methyl B-12, plays a crucial role in supporting methylation, a fundamental biochemical process that influences everything from energy production to DNA regulation. It also contributes to the body’s natural production of glutathione, the body’s “master” antioxidant, essential for cellular protection and detoxification. Superior liposomal delivery Quicksilver’s unique delivery system uses tiny, stable liposomes that begin absorbing right in the mouth. This helps the nutrients absorb quickly, bypassing the absorption barriers in the digestive tract, avoiding being broken down by the digestive system. This delivery technology can help your body make the most of this powerful vitamin, supporting your mood, memory, healthy methylation, detox, and more.

Health benefits overview: Do you struggle with low energy, poor concentration, or concerns about getting enough vitamin B12? Liposomal Methyl B-12 can support steady energy levels, neurological function, and DNA synthesis with 1000 mcg of methylcobalamin delivered through cutting-edge liposomal technology. This formula can help maintain proper red blood cell formation and normal homocysteine levels for cardiovascular wellness. The superior absorption provided by liposomal delivery ensures your body receives the full benefits of this essential nutrient.

Why this formula works: Vitamin B12 is critical for energy production, memory, focus, and mood regulation through its role in neurological function and DNA synthesis. Together with folate, B12 helps form red blood cells and maintain normal homocysteine levels, supporting heart health. Many people cannot effectively convert cyanocobalamin, the common supplemental form of B12, into adequate amounts of methylcobalamin, the biologically active form your body uses directly. Age, low stomach acid, and certain genetic variations can significantly reduce B12 absorption from traditional supplements. Are you absorbing the B12 you're taking? This liposomal formulation addresses absorption challenges by delivering methylcobalamin more efficiently into your bloodstream, bypassing common digestive barriers that prevent adequate uptake.

Backed by science: Methylcobalamin for active B12 support Methylcobalamin, the metabolically active form of vitamin B12, plays a crucial role in supporting methylation, a fundamental biochemical process that influences everything from energy production to DNA regulation. This form can be used directly by your body without requiring conversion. Methyl B-12 contributes to the body's natural production of glutathione, often called the body's master antioxidant. Glutathione is essential for cellular protection and detoxification, helping your cells defend against oxidative stress and eliminate unwanted compounds. B12 deficiency and who needs supplementation Vitamin B12 is present in foods of animal origin, including dairy products and eggs. Vegans and vegetarians are more prone to deficiency of this important nutrient due to limited dietary sources. Older adults and those with reduced stomach acidity have difficulty absorbing vitamin B12 from dietary sources. This makes B12 deficiency surprisingly common, particularly among people over 50 and those following plant-based diets. Revolutionary liposomal delivery technology Quicksilver Scientific's unique delivery system uses tiny, stable liposomes that begin absorbing right in the mouth. This innovative approach helps nutrients absorb quickly, bypassing the absorption barriers in your digestive tract and avoiding degradation by digestive enzymes. Traditional B12 supplements must pass through the digestive system, where various factors can limit absorption. The liposomal delivery method can dramatically boost bioavailability, helping your body make the most of this powerful vitamin for supporting mood, memory, healthy methylation, detoxification, and overall vitality.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Micellized Pure PC®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is PC? It stands for phosphatidylcholine, a naturally occurring substance and a primary building block in the body. It's one of several so-called phospholipids that are structural elements of all cell membranes, facilitating membrane integrity and healthy cell function.Sufficient levels of phosphatidylcholine have been shown to support many bodily processes and enhance physiology.Why it works:Micellized Pure PC® can nourish the very foundation of optimal wellness, the cell. It can offer the ultimate building block to cell membranes, support cognitive sharpness, and help energize mitochondria.It can also help maintain liver detox, bile movement, toxin flushing, and cholesterol metabolism. The science behind the product:Phosphatidylcholine — an acetylcholine precursorPhosphatidylcholine (PC) is known to replenish cell membrane structure and function. It's also a normal constituent of bile and promotes fat emulsification, absorption, and transport.Its metabolism provides choline to the body which is needed by the brain to produce acetylcholine, a major neurotransmitter (involved in memory and alertness) that transmits signals between nerve cells. Due to its status as a acetylcholine precursor, phosphatidylcholine can be especially effective for supporting cognitive function.Exclusive absorption enhancement procesMicellized Pure PC® can provide immediate effect with superior delivery. This direct-access PC is micellized into extremely small droplets that are more easily absorbed into the bloodstream and cell membranes, after ingestion.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. Refrigerate upon receipt.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking to support your cells from within? Micellized Pure PC® can help restore and maintain cell membrane integrity throughout your entire body. This phosphatidylcholine formula can promote cognitive sharpness, energize mitochondrial function, and encourage healthy liver detoxification. With its superior absorption technology, you get direct cellular nourishment that can enhance your overall physiology.

Why this formula works: This formula delivers phosphatidylcholine in an advanced micellized form for exceptional bioavailability. The tiny droplets are designed to absorb rapidly into your bloodstream and reach cell membranes efficiently. Phosphatidylcholine serves as a fundamental building block for all cell membranes in your body. It can also support bile production and movement, which helps maintain healthy cholesterol metabolism and toxin elimination. As a precursor to acetylcholine, this nutrient can enhance neurotransmitter activity that supports memory, focus, and mental alertness. Your brain relies on this essential compound for optimal cognitive performance.

Backed by science: Phosphatidylcholine for cell membrane health Phosphatidylcholine (PC) is a primary phospholipid that forms the structural foundation of cell membranes throughout the body. Research shows that adequate PC levels can support membrane fluidity, integrity, and function across all tissues. This essential compound plays a vital role in cellular repair and regeneration processes. By providing structural support to membranes, phosphatidylcholine can help maintain optimal cellular communication and nutrient transport. Choline production for brain function When metabolized, phosphatidylcholine provides choline, which the brain uses to synthesize acetylcholine. This important neurotransmitter facilitates nerve signal transmission and can support cognitive processes including memory formation and recall. Studies suggest that sufficient choline intake can contribute to mental clarity and alertness. Your nervous system depends on this nutrient for efficient communication between nerve cells. Liver support and bile production As a natural component of bile, phosphatidylcholine can promote healthy fat emulsification and digestion. This process is essential for proper absorption and transport of dietary fats and fat-soluble nutrients. The liver relies on phosphatidylcholine for detoxification pathways and metabolic processes. This formula can help maintain healthy bile flow, which supports the body's natural elimination of toxins and metabolic waste products. Micellized delivery system This formula utilizes Quicksilver Scientific's proprietary micellization process, which transforms phosphatidylcholine into extremely small droplets. These nano-sized particles can bypass traditional digestive processes for more direct absorption. The enhanced bioavailability means more of the active ingredient reaches your cells where it's needed. This advanced delivery system ensures you get maximum benefit from every dose.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Dr. Shade’s Bitters No.9
product.description:
Healthy digestion and bitter herbsHealthy digestion is essential to the body's absorption and utilization of food. The process of digestion is accomplished in the GI tract using secretions from accessory glands such as the liver and the pancreas.Herbal bitters have been used in many cultures to promote digestion and appetite. One of their mechanisms of action is to stimulate bitter receptors in the mouth and GI tract to increase saliva, bile, and other digestive secretions. The blend of Dr. Shade’s Bitters No.9 This is a proprietary, liposomal blend of liposomal bitters herbs can complements any meal, and it is specially formulated to promote healthy gall bladder/bile flow and robust liver function. While bile is an extremely important digestive substance, good bile flow is also essential for detoxification.The blend contains:Dandelion has been shown to support detoxification by upregulating antioxidant pathways, aiding in healthy kidney function, helping enhance urinary elimination of toxins, and having hepatoprotective properties. This bitter herb has also been shown to support a balanced inflammatory response, another critical aspect of optimal detoxification. Milk thistle is a traditional Western herb that contains a powerful bioactive compound called Silymarin. In addition to supporting a healthy liver and bile flow, silymarin has been shown to support phase II detoxification by activating the Nrf2 pathway, promoting glutathione production.Gentian is a full-bodied bitter botanical, containing the bioactive compounds gentiopicroside and gentiolactone. These compounds have been shown to be hepatoprotective in endotoxicity, supporting healthy bile flow and upregulating antioxidant enzyme activity.Burdock root is a hearty root vegetable with long use in Traditional Chinese Medicine and Western herbalism. This root has been shown to restore healthy inflammatory response as well as demonstrate hepatoprotective activity.Solidago, a flowering plant with tiny, bright yellow blossoms, is known for supporting urinary tract health. It aids in healthy excretion and toxin elimination while supporting the activity of glutathione S-transferase, a critical enzyme in phase II detoxification. The bioactive polyphenols in Solidago have also been shown to offer antimicrobial benefits.Essential oils of sweet orange, myrrh, juniper, and clove: The essential oil of myrrh, a resinous substance derived from the Commiphora mukul tree, supports healthy bile flow by increasing the expression of the human bile salt export pump and promotes a healthy microbial balance. Juniper and Clove essential oils support microbial balance in the GI, and sweet orange essential oil supports antioxidant activity.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Nanoemulsified DIM
product.description:
DIM (Diindolylymethane) is a compound typically created in the body after eating cruciferous vegetables such as broccoli, cabbage and Brussels sprouts. The published effects on hormonal balance, immune function, and detoxification make DIM an exiting nutrient. DIM has been shown to lead to the preferential formation of estrogen metabolites that are correlated with healthy breast, endometrial, and cervical tissues. It also helps the liver neutralize potentially harmful estrogen metabolites and estrogen-like environmental chemicals.However, DIM is difficult to absorb and metabolize. This is why we created a liposomal DIM—for improved absorption. Our Golden Particle Delivery™ system ensures that DIM lives up to its full potential, giving your body the maximum benefit.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: VenoFlow™
product.description:
Why circulation mattersHealthy blood flow is powered by your heart, but regular physical activity also plays a vital role in keeping your circulatory system functioning optimally. A sedentary lifestyle, whether due to a lack of exercise or healthy individuals who sit for hours at work (or long travels), can negatively impact circulation and cardiovascular health. (1-4)Nattokinase for clotting, circulation & heart healthNattokinase is a naturally occurring enzyme derived from natto, a traditional Japanese food made from fermented soybeans. Research shows that nattokinase can support the body’s natural clotting processes, promote healthy circulation, and help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range. (5-12)Pycnogenol® for endothelial & vascular healthPycnogenol®, a French maritime pine bark extract, is rich in procyanidin flavonoids, which are phytonutrient compounds with strong antioxidant properties. They can encourage healthy endothelial function and blood flow by protecting the delicate vascular walls from oxidative stress. (13-17)Pycnogenol® can also support healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, promoting optimal circulation, healthy platelet function, and a balanced inflammatory response. (15,18,19)A smart choice for your lifestyleWhether you're a frequent traveler, desk-bound professional, or simply someone seeking better circulation, VenoFlow™ is a smart addition to your daily wellness routine. Pycnogenol® is a registered trademark of Horphag Research Ltd.Support Circulatory Health with VenoFlow™.

Health benefits overview: Optimal blood flow is essential for your overall health and wellbeing, powered by both your heart and regular physical activity. Unfortunately, a sedentary lifestyle can negatively impact circulation and cardiovascular function, whether you're sitting at a desk all day or embarking on long journeys. Are you concerned about maintaining healthy circulation in your legs and extremities? VenoFlow™ can help promote optimal blood flow, encourage vascular health, and maintain blood pressure already within the normal range through its scientifically researched blend of nattokinase and Pycnogenol®.

Why this formula works: VenoFlow™ combines two powerful, clinically studied ingredients that work synergistically to promote circulatory health. Nattokinase is a naturally occurring enzyme from fermented soybeans that can help maintain the body's natural clotting processes and encourage healthy blood flow. Pycnogenol®, a French maritime pine bark extract rich in procyanidin flavonoids, delivers potent antioxidant benefits. These plant compounds can promote healthy endothelial function and protect delicate blood vessel walls from oxidative stress. Together, these ingredients provide comprehensive support for your circulatory system, helping you maintain optimal vascular health no matter your lifestyle.

Backed by science: Nattokinase for natural clotting and circulation Nattokinase is derived from natto, a traditional Japanese food made from fermented soybeans. Research demonstrates that nattokinase can help maintain your body's natural clotting processes while promoting healthy circulation. Studies also show it can help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range, offering multi-faceted support for cardiovascular wellness. Pycnogenol® for endothelial and vascular protection Do you want to protect your blood vessels from daily oxidative stress? Pycnogenol®, a French maritime pine bark extract, is rich in procyanidin flavonoids with powerful antioxidant properties. These compounds can encourage healthy endothelial function and promote optimal blood flow by defending vascular walls against oxidative damage. Supporting nitric oxide and inflammatory balance Pycnogenol® can also help maintain healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, which is crucial for optimal circulation. Additionally, this extract promotes healthy platelet function and encourages a balanced inflammatory response, providing comprehensive vascular support for your active lifestyle. Perfect for modern lifestyles Whether you're a frequent traveler, office professional, or simply someone looking to maintain optimal circulation, VenoFlow™ offers targeted support. Each vegetarian capsule provides 1,000 mg of nattokinase and 150 mg of Pycnogenol®, delivering clinically researched doses in a convenient once-daily format.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

VenoFlow™ can help promote optimal blood flow, encourage vascular health, and maintain blood pressure already within the normal range through its scientifically researched blend of nattokinase and Pycnogenol®.

Nattokinase is a naturally occurring enzyme from fermented soybeans that can help maintain the body's natural clotting processes and encourage healthy blood flow. Pycnogenol®, a French maritime pine bark extract rich in procyanidin flavonoids, delivers potent antioxidant benefits. These plant compounds can promote healthy endothelial function and protect delicate blood vessel walls from oxidative stress. Together, these ingredients provide comprehensive support for your circulatory system, helping you maintain optimal vascular health no matter your lifestyle.
product.backed_by_science: Nattokinase for natural clotting and circulation Nattokinase is derived from natto, a traditional Japanese food made from fermented soybeans. Research demonstrates that nattokinase can help maintain your body's natural clotting processes while promoting healthy circulation. Studies also show it can help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range, offering multi-faceted support for cardiovascular wellness. Pycnogenol® for endothelial and vascular protection Do you want to protect your blood vessels from daily oxidative stress? Pycnogenol®, a French maritime pine bark extract, is rich in procyanidin flavonoids with powerful antioxidant properties. These compounds can encourage healthy endothelial function and promote optimal blood flow by defending vascular walls against oxidative damage. Supporting nitric oxide and inflammatory balance Pycnogenol® can also help maintain healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, which is crucial for optimal circulation. Additionally, this extract promotes healthy platelet function and encourages a balanced inflammatory response, providing comprehensive vascular support for your active lifestyle. Perfect for modern lifestyles Whether you're a frequent traveler, office professional, or simply someone looking to maintain optimal circulation, VenoFlow™ offers targeted support. Each vegetarian capsule provides 1,000 mg of nattokinase and 150 mg of Pycnogenol®, delivering clinically researched doses in a convenient once-daily format.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Liposomal Ultra Vitamin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glanceUnique, state-of-the-art multivitamin blend delivers maximum absorption and effectiveness. The formula includes many active forms of B vitamins, along with a comprehensive blend of stable, metabolically active vitamins and antioxidants. Three of the most potent carotenoids known, lutein, zeaxanthin, and lycopene, are included to expand the spectrum of protection. Why it works:Unlike standard vitamin blends, Quicksilver Scientific® uses the most absorbable, most stable and metabolically active forms of all the basic vitamins. The blend includes the highly bioactive B vitamins, vitamin D3 for maximum effect, both forms of vitamin K, and trimethylgycine to promote methylation and liver detoxification. It also includes vitamin C as sodium ascorbate, a form well tolerated by those with gastrointestinal sensitivities. Tocotrienols, part of the vitamin E family, offer unusually potent antioxidant activity, and the three specialized carotenoids may extend antioxidant protection, particularly safeguarding the eye and vision. Because the absorption of standard oral formulations of vitamins and antioxidants can vary, Dr. Christopher Shade, Ph.D.-doctor of philosophy-has developed Liposomal Ultra Vitamin, which allows for direct absorption into the bloodstream. The science behind the product:With the world's most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific's supplements can help nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their essential ingredients faster and more efficiently. How to use:Take 1 teaspoonful once daily.Hold in mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat at desired dosage or as directed by a health care professional.Take on an empty stomach, at least 10 minutes before meals.Use within 30 days of opening.If pregnant, consult a health care professional before use.

Health benefits overview: Looking for a multivitamin that goes beyond basic nutrition? Liposomal Ultra Vitamin can deliver maximum absorption with its state-of-the-art blend of metabolically active vitamins and antioxidants. This comprehensive formula includes bioactive B vitamins along with specialized carotenoids – lutein, zeaxanthin, and lycopene – that can extend antioxidant protection. The blend can particularly safeguard your eye health and vision while supporting cellular function throughout your body.

Why this formula works: Unlike standard vitamin blends, this formula uses the most absorbable, stable, and metabolically active forms of essential vitamins. The blend includes highly bioactive B vitamins and vitamin D3 for maximum effect. Both forms of vitamin K are included, along with trimethylglycine to promote methylation and liver detoxification. Vitamin C appears as sodium ascorbate, a form well tolerated by those with gastrointestinal sensitivities. Tocotrienols from the vitamin E family offer unusually potent antioxidant activity. Because absorption of standard oral vitamin formulations can vary, Quicksilver Scientific has developed this liposomal delivery system that allows for direct absorption into your bloodstream.

Backed by science: Active B vitamin complex for energy and cellular health B vitamins play essential roles in energy metabolism and cellular function throughout the body. This formula provides bioactive forms of B vitamins that your cells can use immediately without requiring conversion. These active B vitamin forms can support healthy energy production, nervous system function, and the formation of red blood cells. Your body relies on adequate B vitamin levels for optimal metabolic processes and cognitive performance. Vitamin D3 for bone and immune support Vitamin D3 is the most effective form of vitamin D for maintaining optimal blood levels. This fat-soluble vitamin can promote calcium absorption, bone mineralization, and immune system function. Research shows that vitamin D3 plays crucial roles beyond bone health, including supporting cardiovascular wellness and healthy cell division. Do you get enough sunlight exposure for adequate vitamin D production? Dual vitamin K forms for cardiovascular and skeletal wellness This formula includes both vitamin K1 and K2, which serve complementary roles in your body. Vitamin K1 supports blood clotting, while K2 can help direct calcium to your bones and teeth rather than soft tissues. The combination of both K forms can promote cardiovascular health and skeletal strength. Vitamin K2 works synergistically with vitamin D3 to maintain balanced calcium metabolism throughout your body. Trimethylglycine for methylation and liver function Trimethylglycine (TMG) serves as a methyl donor, supporting cellular health processes throughout your body. This nutrient can encourage optimal methylation, which is essential for DNA production, detoxification, and neurotransmitter synthesis. TMG also supports liver health by promoting healthy fat metabolism and detoxification pathways. Your liver relies on adequate methylation support for efficient processing of metabolic waste products. Sodium ascorbate vitamin C for gentle antioxidant protection Vitamin C is a powerful water-soluble antioxidant that can protect cells from oxidative stress. This formula uses sodium ascorbate, a buffered form of vitamin C that's gentle on sensitive digestive systems. Beyond antioxidant activity, vitamin C supports collagen formation, immune function, and iron absorption. The buffered form ensures you get antioxidant benefits without gastrointestinal discomfort. Tocotrienols for potent vitamin E activity Tocotrienols are members of the vitamin E family that offer exceptionally strong antioxidant properties. These compounds can provide cellular protection that exceeds standard tocopherol forms of vitamin E. Research indicates that tocotrienols can support cardiovascular health, brain function, and cellular longevity. Their unique molecular structure allows them to move freely through cell membranes, providing comprehensive antioxidant coverage. Specialized carotenoids for vision and cellular protection Lutein, zeaxanthin, and lycopene are three of the most potent carotenoids known to science. These plant compounds accumulate in specific tissues where they provide targeted antioxidant protection. Lutein and zeaxanthin concentrate in the macula of your eyes, where they can help filter harmful blue light and protect retinal cells. Are you concerned about maintaining sharp vision as you age? Lycopene, found abundantly in tomatoes, offers additional antioxidant support for cardiovascular and prostate health. Advanced liposomal delivery for superior absorption Quicksilver Scientific's phospholipid delivery system represents the world's most advanced absorption technology. The liposomal encapsulation protects vitamins during digestion and facilitates rapid uptake into your bloodstream. This technology can nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine while delivering essential nutrients faster and more efficiently than conventional supplements. The result is enhanced bioavailability that maximizes the benefits of each ingredient in this comprehensive formula.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Pantothenic Acid
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is pantothenic acid? It's vitamin B5, a water-soluble vitamin from the B group of 8 vitamins. This essential nutrient is the most important component of coenzyme A, which assists in several metabolic pathways and is necessary for the transfer of fats to and from cells.Vitamin B is naturally present in some foods, added to others, and available as a dietary supplement.Why it works:Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) is critical for human health. It plays a central role in lipid, amino acid, glucose metabolism, and mitochondrial energy production, as well as in the synthesis of hemoglobin, neurotransmitters, cholesterol and steroid hormones, and other proteins and lipids. (1-4)The science behind the product:The main function of pantothenic acid is the synthesis of the ubiquitous cofactor called coenzyme A (CoA) and acyl carrier protein. (5-6)The importance of coenzyme A regulating cell signaling and gene expression has also been recognized. (2,7)Pantothenic acid is only mildly acidic but is often available in combination with calcium to neutralize its acidity and increase its preservation stability. Its calcium salt has a more neutral pH and longer storage life. (8)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ is the cellular longevity breakthrough you've been waiting for. It helps rejuvenate aging cells and encourages the body's response process for cells that have already aged. Formulated by a partnership between Life Extension® and Insilico Medicine, Inc., GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ can help turn back the clock at the cellular level. GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ can activate anti-aging pathways, promote youthful cellular metabolism, and combat aging at the cellular level. Why it Works:Cell aging, or cellular senescence, is part of the natural aging process. However, when healthy cells begin to age, they no longer function optimally. Many of the factors that have to do with overall bodily aging can be directly attributed to the effects of cellular senescence.When combatting cellular senescence, we encourage cellular energy production, support a healthy, system-wide response to inflammation and promote organ vitality. GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ inhibits this natural part of aging at the cellular level, by providing compounds that have an impact on the biological pathways that are associated with the normal aging process. The Science Behind the Product:LE and the medical technology company Insilico Medicine, Inc. has established a unique partnership to develop the GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ formula.Insilico Medicine, Inc. used a highly innovative algorithm to create a database of 200+ so-called geroprotectors, which have been shown to prolong lifespan, by targeting certain pathways in the body that can affect the natural aging process. Each compound in the database got a score, signifying its ability to impact pathways associated with cell aging. Looking at the scores in the database, Insilico Medicine's computerized algorithm identifiedN-acetyl-L-cysteine (NAC), Myricetin (an antioxidant naturally found in berries, fruits, and herb), the polyphenol EGCG found in green tea, and Gamma-tocotrienol as being especially powerful "geroprotector" nutrients which can help protect the body from the effects of cellular senescence. (1, 2)These compounds were then scientifically tested and demonstrated efficacy at inhibiting signs of cellular senescence. How to Use:Take one (1) softgel daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.CautionConsult your healthcare provider before use if you have a bleeding disorder, are taking anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications, or beta-blockers.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: FLORASSIST® Oral Hygiene
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:FLORASSIST® Oral Hygiene is an innovative formula that combines the healthy probiotics S. salivarius BLIS M18™ and Lactobacillus plantarum L-137 (Immuno-LP20®).These ingredients can encourage healthy microbial balance and healthy immune function and support optimal oral health.Why it works:Maintaining good oral hygiene is important for overall health. Brushing and flossing your teeth regularly goes a long way, but often it is still not enough to achieve optimal oral health. Since the mouth is the major gateway to the body, maintaining good oral hygiene is important for overall health.FLORASSIST® Oral Hygiene provides healthy bacteria to colonize the mouth and inhibit the growth of unwanted mouth bacteria, plus an innovative bacteria to support the health of the gums and teeth and oral immunity. (1-3) This can help create a healthy environment in the mouth. Because FLORASSIST® Oral Hygiene comes in lozenge form, it quickly provides healthy targeted ingredients to the oral cavity. The science behind the product:Patented probiotic strains for optimal oral healthScientists have evolved an innovative approach to achieve maximum oral health. FLORASSIST® Oral Hygiene contains the clinically studied probiotic strain S. salivarius BLIS M18™ as well as an extract of heat-treated Lactobacillus plantarum L-137 (Immuno-LP20®), shown to support oral immune function and a healthy inflammatory response. Mazimizing the oral pH with a lozenge Dissolving one lozenge of FLORASSIST® Oral Hygiene in the mouth daily can maximize the oral health by optimizing oral pH, inhibiting inflammation to support oral health and supporting healthy bacterial colonization throughout the mouth. (1-3) How to use: Dissolve one (1) lozenge in the mouth daily, preferably after brushing teeth, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Nanoemulsified D3K2
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Vitamin K and vitamin D deficiency can lead to less calcium being deposited in the bone matrix and the calcification of tissue. D3K2 contains two super-absorbable forms of vitamin D and vitamin K, which can work together to support normal, healthy bones and counteract calcification of tissues. This liquid supplement contains 2,500 international units (IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per spray and 90 µg of vitamin K2. Why it works: Vitamin D3 for the immune system, bones, muscles & teeth Vitamin D is one of the most important vitamins in the body and is essential for overall health and mood. It contributes to the normal function of the immune system, supports muscle function, and helps maintain healthy bones and teeth.It is also essential for the absorption and utilisation of calcium and phosphorus, which in turn contribute to normal blood calcium levels. Vitamin D also plays an important role in cell division . Vitamin K2 complements vitamin D3 Vitamin K is a group of fat-soluble vitamins that contribute to maintaining healthy bone density, promoting arterial health, and supporting heart health . Both vitamins are essential for the body, and they are also dependent on each other to function optimally. A deficiency in vitamin K and vitamin D has been linked to the calcification of soft tissue and reduced bone mineral density. This is because vitamin D promotes the absorption of calcium, while vitamin K plays a role in directing calcium into the bones. D3K2 by Quicksilver Scientific offers an effective way to replenish these vitamins. By using an advanced nanoemulsion system for maximum absorption, this formulation combines ideal ratios of vitamin D (cholecalciferol D3) and vitamin K2 (menaquinone MK-7) to support and maintain healthy levels year-round. The science behind the product: Vitamin D is mostly recognized as being essential to the function of the human immune system and to maintaining healthy bones. However, the health benefits of vitamin D stretch much further than covering these two areas of concern. Vitamin D receptors can be found in at least 36 types of body tissue and can also influence the gene expression of thousands of genes. Some of these genes include those that are associated with detoxification enzymes in the body. Research has indicated that vitamin D3 is better at raising the body’s serum 25(OH)D concentration than vitamin D2 (calciferol).Liposomal delivery bypasses GI absorption barriers and begins circulating the body as soon as it hits the tongue. How to use:Take 1 to 2 pumps by mouth once daily.Hold in the mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach, at least 10 minutes before meals.Use within 6 months of opening.If pregnant, consult a physician before use.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) with d-Limonene
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The nutrient CoQ10 (coenzyme Q10) plays an essential role in supporting a healthy mitochondrial function because it's required in the body to convert macronutrients such as carbohydrates, proteins, and fat into energy for the cells.CoQ10 with d-Limonene can promote cardiovascular health and cellular energy production. The formula provides an affordable way to get your daily dose of CoQ10.Why it works:When the body starts to age, the production of CoQ10 decreases, which on the other hand can result in lower production of energy. The good news is that CoQ10 can easily be supplemented.This CoQ10 supplement is enhanced with D-limonene, which is a compound found in orange peel oil. It can encourage the stability of CoQ10, so that it can stay in your body longer.The science behind the product:Cellular energy with CoQ10A deficiency of CoQ10 affects the cell mitochondria (cell's “powerhouse”) negatively. This is because CoQ10 is a vital componant in transporting electrons from food molecules into ATP molecules, the body's main source of energy.When CoQ10 levels are optimized in the body, the cells can therefore function optimally. (1,2) Research indicates that CoQ10 supplementation is a very effective way to support high-energy organs in the body, including heart, liver, kidneys, and brain. CoQ10 is a potent antioxidantIn addition to promoting cellular energy, CoQ10 has powerful antioxidant proterties, helping to protect cell membranes, lipids, and other vital components from oxidative stress. (3-4)How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for an affordable way to support your cellular energy as you age? CoQ10 plays an essential role in supporting optimal mitochondrial function because it's required to convert macronutrients like carbohydrates, proteins, and fats into energy your cells can use. CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) with d-Limonene can promote cardiovascular health and cellular energy production, providing a cost-effective solution for maintaining your daily CoQ10 needs.

Why this formula works: As your body ages, natural CoQ10 production decreases, which can result in lower energy levels throughout your system. The encouraging news is that CoQ10 levels can easily be maintained through supplementation. This formula is enhanced with d-limonene, a beneficial compound found in orange peel oil. D-limonene can encourage the stability of CoQ10, helping it stay active in your body for longer periods. By combining these two components, you get an affordable option that delivers meaningful support for your cellular energy needs.

Backed by science: CoQ10 for cellular energy production A deficiency of CoQ10 negatively affects your cell mitochondria, often called your cells' powerhouses. CoQ10 is a vital component in transporting electrons from food molecules into ATP molecules, your body's primary source of energy. When CoQ10 levels are optimized, your cells can function at their best, supporting high-energy organs including your heart, liver, kidneys, and brain. Powerful antioxidant protection Beyond promoting cellular energy, CoQ10 offers potent antioxidant properties. It can help protect your cell membranes, lipids, and other vital cellular components from oxidative stress, providing an additional layer of defense for your overall wellness. D-limonene for enhanced stability The addition of d-limonene, derived from orange peel oil, serves an important purpose in this formula. This natural compound helps stabilize CoQ10, allowing it to remain effective in your system for extended periods. This enhancement means you get more value from each dose you take. Cost-effective daily support While many CoQ10 supplements can be expensive, this formula offers an affordable way to maintain adequate CoQ10 levels. You don't have to compromise on quality to stay within your budget when supporting your cellular energy and cardiovascular health.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The essential mineral magnesium is involved in more than 300 biochemical reactions in the body, among others, supporting brain health when aging. (1)It’s smart to supplement with magnesium – as most people don’t get enough from their diet, and less optimal levels of magnesium also increase with age. (2,3)However, not all magnesium supplements are easy for your brain to absorb. Life Extension’s Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate was developed based on the latest scientific research in order to provide maximum benefits for your brain and cognition.The product comes in a delicious tropical-flavored powder, which is easy to mix into drinks. Notice, you can also get this product as capsules. Why it works:Magnesium supports cardiovascular- and bone health, encourages energy metabolism, promotes mood, and it plays a crucial role in the nervous system and brain. (1)Not all magnesium is easily absorbed into the central nervous system. Magnesium L-threonate is an ultra-absorbable form of magnesium and therefore brilliant for supporting memory and maintaining cognitive function.The science behind the product:Not all magnesium supplements are readily absorbed into the central nervous system. But Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate is a form of magnesium that has been shown to be better absorbed into the brain. (1)Magnesium L-threonate for healthy memory & cognitive functionA 12-week placebo-controlled randomized study involving 44 participants between 50 and 70 years of age demonstrated significant improvements in cognitive and executive function among those who consumed 1.5 to 2 grams of magnesium L-threonate daily. By the end of the trial, those receiving magnesium L-threonate improved by 9 years of brain age. (4)In preclinical studies, magnesium L-threonate enhanced the function of signaling pathways necessary for a healthy memory. (5)Moreover, in animal studies, magnesium L-threonate was indicated to encourage short and long-term memory and help maintain effective function and quantity of synaptic connections between brain cells. (1,6)Maintaining optimal magnesium levels with magnesium L-threonateThe magnesium L-threonate, contained in Neuro-Mag®, boosted magnesium levels in the cerebrospinal fluid (the liquid around your brain and spinal cord) by about 15% in just 24 days in an animal study. (1)The suggested daily dose of Neuro-Mag® provides 2,000 mg of magnesium L-threonate, the preferred form of magnesium to promote memory and cognition. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Magnesium is a vital mineral that participates in over 300 biochemical reactions throughout your body, playing an essential role in brain health as you age. Most people don't obtain adequate magnesium from diet alone, and these levels tend to decline further with age. Are you looking for a magnesium supplement that truly reaches your brain? Neuro-Mag® Magnesium L-Threonate can help support memory, cognitive function, and mental clarity through its exceptional ability to cross the blood-brain barrier and deliver meaningful brain health benefits.

Why this formula works: Not all magnesium supplements are created equal when it comes to brain absorption. While traditional magnesium forms struggle to enter the central nervous system, magnesium L-threonate is specifically designed for maximum brain bioavailability. This ultra-absorbable form can promote healthy memory function and encourage cognitive performance. By delivering more magnesium directly to where your brain needs it most, this formula helps maintain optimal brain cell connections and mental sharpness. Each serving provides 2,000 mg of magnesium L-threonate in a delicious tropical-flavored powder that easily mixes into your favorite beverages.

Backed by science: Enhanced brain absorption for cognitive support Magnesium L-threonate has been shown to cross the blood-brain barrier more effectively than other forms of magnesium. In animal studies, this specific form increased magnesium levels in the cerebrospinal fluid by approximately 15% in just 24 days, demonstrating its superior ability to reach brain tissue where it matters most. Memory and executive function improvements Want to maintain sharp thinking as you age? A randomized placebo-controlled trial involving 44 adults aged 50–70 revealed impressive results. Participants receiving 1.5–2 grams of magnesium L-threonate daily showed markedly improved cognitive and executive function in just 12 weeks compared to the placebo group. Supporting brain cell communication In preclinical research, magnesium L-threonate enhanced the function of signaling pathways necessary for healthy memory formation. Animal studies further indicated that this form can help maintain both short-term and long-term memory while encouraging optimal function and quantity of synaptic connections between brain cells. Convenient tropical-flavored powder This formula comes as an easy-to-use powder with a refreshing tropical flavor that mixes smoothly into water, juice, or smoothies. For those who prefer capsules, this same powerful formula is also available in vegetarian capsule form.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Wellness Code® Plant Protein Complete & Amino Acid Complex
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Wellness Code® Plant Protein Complete & Amino Acid Complex is a pea protein powder that is suitable for vegetarians and people who are lactose intolerant since it is also a dairy-free protein powder. This supplement is for people who want to supplement their exercise programs with a high-quality protein powder. Furthermore, this formula also contains branched-chain amino acids for fast muscle recovery after exercise and gluten-free oat bran fiber for easy digestion.Why it works:It can be difficult for people who are vegetarian or lactose intolerant to find protein powder which they can use in conjunction with a regular exercise program. The problem with most protein powders is that they are based on milk, thus not being suitable for people vegetarians or lactose intolerance.Now however, Wellness Code® Plant Protein Complete & Amino Acid Complex offers a solution to this issue.This is a sustainably sourced dairy free pea protein powder, is gluten-free and is made from pea protein. Peas is an often overlooked source of protein but delivers an astonishing 18g of high quality protein per 100g. Moreover, pea protein is great at promoting satiety, boost energy, support lean muscle mass and for supporting weight management. A dairy free protein powder, this protein powder is also suitable for people who are suffering from lactose intolerance.Furthermore, Wellness Code® Plant Protein Complete & Amino Acid Complex is also free from allergens such as soy, and comes with a great vanilla taste. It also contains the essential branched-chain amino acids L-valine, L-leuicine, and L-isoleucine which researchers have shown to be able to support lean muscle mass and a healthy liver function.Wellness Code® Plant Protein Complete & Amino Acid Complex contains gluten free oat bran and prebiotic blue agave. These two ingredients promotes a healthy digestion, supports the immune system, and limits appetite.Finally, natural enzymes have also been added to the formula to ensure that the plant proteins in this product are being easily digested. The science behind the product:The branched-chain amino acids L-valine, L-leuicine, and L-isoleucine are all found in Wellness Code® Plant Protein Complete & Amino Acid Complex. These amino acids promote the synthesis and recovery of skeletal muscles after exercise and also helps prevent muscle fatigue [1-3]. Moreover, branched-chain amino acids also fuel for the muscles during times of metabolic stress, support a healthy liver function [4-7] and also promote longevity.How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bone Restore, 60 tabs
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:The natural aging process can lead to a deficiency in calcium. Many people don't obtain enough calcium to offset the calcium deficit that normal aging can spur on. Bone Restore can help you maintain strong and healthy bones by providing two forms of calcium, calcium carbonate, and calcium citrate plus extra nutrients for strong bones. Moreover, this supplement is sugar-free and easy to take because of its delicious chewable, chocolate-flavored tablet format.Why it Works:The calcium carbonate and calcium citrate in Bone Restore are ideal for calcium supplementation. However, for calcium to be effective, it's not enough to just supplement with just this mineral.Dietary calcium has to be accompanied by sufficient amounts of other nutrients such as magnesium, vitamin D3, manganese, boron, silicon, and zinc to have the highest possible impact on bone health. These nutrients are essential cofactors for maintaining normal bone health.The Science Behind the Product:Bone Restore chewable tablets contains 700 mg of calcium, 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3, plus trace minerals for bone health support:Vitamin D is essential for absorbing calcium from the digestive tract into the bloodstream. (1,2) Magnesium is needed to maintain strong bones. As much as 60% of all of the magnesium in the body is stored in the skeleton. (3) Bone Restore chewable tablets contain 300 mg of magnesium from magnesium oxide. Zinc, manganese, and silicon are essential for healthy bone maintenance and connective tissues (manganese). (4-6) You have to have sufficient intake of these elements to support healthy bone formation. (5,7) Boron is a trace mineral that supports bone and joint strength. (6,8)Supporting bone health has never been so delicious!How to Use:Chew two (2) tablets daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Scientific studies suggest calcium supplementation in divided doses with food in the morning and evening may yield the best results.Do not swallow tablets whole.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: ComfortMAX™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: If nerve cells experience disturbances, it can harm how the brain perceives physical discomfort. ComfortMAX™ contains PEA and honokiol, which can inhibit inflammation of the nerve cells, promote healthy neurotransmitter levels in the brain, and thereby help reduce discomfort. Why it works: Many people experience different kinds of physical discomfort. Such discomfort can affect mood, mobility, and overall life quality. The reasons for physical discomfort may vary a great deal, but all people experience it in the same way. Peripheral nerves deliver sensory information, such as itches, changes in temperature, and physical pressures, directly to the brain.If the peripheral nerve cells are disturbed, it can enhance physical discomfort. ComfortMAX™ has a breakthrough formula that contains PEA (palmitoylethanolamide) and honokiol, which is an extract from magnolia bark. These compounds can inhibit inflammation in the nerve cells and promote healthy neurotransmitter levels in the brain. Because they promote nerve comfort in two complementary ways, the ComfortMAX™ formula entails a pioneering step in maintaining calm and healthy nerve cells. The science behind the product:The ComfortMAX™ formula contains two active ingredients that can help calm nerve cells. Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) is a unique type of fatty acid that is produced by the body. The body’s own production of PEA occurs as part of maintaining a healthy inflammatory and immune response. PEA plays a role in inhibiting the secretion of inflammatory compounds from certain types of white blood cells called mast cells. As the body ages, the amount of mast cells decreases. This causes the remaining mast cells to work even harder. The added workload can, in turn, make them overly sensitive. Such sensitivity can activate inflammatory processes that are linked to nerve discomfort. PEA inhibits inflammatory compounds from being released by the mast cells. At the cellular level, PEA can therefore promote the body's own response to uncomfortable nerve stimuli.In a randomized, controlled trial study, 636 patients were followed over three weeks. Each patient was given 600 mg of PEA daily. Three weeks later, scores that measured comfort and quality of life in relative terms had improved dramatically. Honokiol is a natural lignan compound derived from many different types of magnolia. Many of these have been used in traditional Asian medicine for hundreds of years. Scientists have recently discovered that honokiol can support nerve health and comfort. Honokiol can support GABA receptors, which have a “calming effect” in the brain. This in turn, affects the way that the brain perceives discomfort. How to use:Take one (1) AM tablet in the morning and one (1) PM tablet before bed, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: FLORASSIST® Prebiotic
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable is a prebiotic fiber supplement in an easy-to-eat chewable tablet form with a delicious strawberry flavor. The formula provides fuel for a kind of good bacteria in your GI tract called bifidobacteria (a probiotic). It can stimulate the growth of these beneficial microorganisms by supplying xylooligosaccharides (prebiotics). Bifidobacteria occur naturally in the human gastrointestinal tract and use this type of prebiotic as fuel. Thus, this prebiotic fiber supplement can enhance the effectiveness of beneficial bacteria and support a balanced gastrointestinal tract.FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable is also the perfect complement to your probiotic supplement. Why it Works:Probiotic bacteria are excellent at promoting a healthy digestive environment. In order to work, the probiotics also need to have fuel in the first place. The FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable formula contains scientifically validated PreticX™ prebiotic fiber which helps probiotics thrive. PreticX™ contains 70% xylooligosaccharides which can help optimize the growth potential of beneficial bifidobacteria. (1)Bifidobacteria are beneficial to the digestive system because they help metabolize the dietary carbohydrates that the body itself is unable to digest. Moreover, bifidobacterial can promote health by providing critical energy for the cells in the colon lining, and by modulating specific components in the immune system. (2, 3)Although bifidobacterial occur naturally in the human gastrointestinal tract, they tend to be most abundant in younger people. They also decrease rapidly with progressing age.A good way to address this issue is to take a prebiotic supplement, which provides fuel for probiotics. The xylooligosaccharides in this prebiotic fiber supplement are an ideal prebiotic source. At a low dose, they can support the growth of bifidobacteria. The Science Behind the Product:Many prebiotics require very large doses for full effect, but too many prebiotics in your system may cause digestive issues such as bloating and other types of gastrointestinal discomfort. (4) By having a low dose of xylooligosaccharides, one will have a lower risk of developing these gastrointestinal issues as a result of prebiotic supplementation.This highly purified prebiotic is derived from non-GMO corn cob. How to use: Take one (1) tablet daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Estrogen for Women
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Menopause can lead to both physical and mental discomforts for women. Menopausal symptoms include hot flashes, night sweats, and mood issues. Estrogen for Women has a specially designed formula that includes a blend of soy isoflavones and potent botanicals such as broccoli, licorice and chaste berry extracts, Dong quai, and more, all in just a single tablet. These extracts can support healthy estrogen metabolism and reduce menopausal discomforts. Why it Works:Many women experience both physical and mental discomforts when they hit menopause. The root cause of menopause is rapidly changing estrogen levels. This hormone is predominant in the female body and is responsible for a large number of processes. The onset of menopause can lead to hot flashes, night sweats, increased agitation, and even depression, and are all too common for menopausal women.Now however, research has indicated that extracts from plants such as hops, licorice, and broccoli may reduce menopausal discomforts. Moreover, these extracts can also support a healthy estrogen metabolism, which is under stress both during and after menopause. (1-8)Estrogen for Women is based on a formula which includes a patented hops extract as well as extract from licorice, broccoli, the Dong quai plant, and chasteberry. Furthermore, the formula has been enhanced and with standardized lignans, which has been clinically shown to block some of the undesirable effects that estrogen may have on the body. The Science Behind the Product:The Natural Estrogen formula contains the following ingredients:Standardized Soy Isoflavone Extract: Soy compounds called phytoestrogens are demonstrated to offer a variety of health benefits. Lignan Extract has been clinically shown to block some of the unwanted effects of estrogen. (3)Licorice Extract has been clinically shown to reduce the severity and frequency of hot flashes related to menopause. (4)Broccoli Extract has been found to maintain healthy cell division as well as modulating estrogen. (5)Dong Quai is in Chinese traditional medicine believed to help with menopausal and menstrual discomforts. (6)Chasteberry Extract (Vitex Agnus-castus) has been shown to support the hormonal balance and the balance of neurotransmitter, both of which are important for menopausal discomforts relief. (7,8) How to use:Take one (1) tablet in the morning, with or without food, or as recommended by your healthcare practitioner.Those taking any estrogenic product should include as part of their diet cruciferous vegetables such as broccoli, brussels sprouts, cabbage, and/or cauliflower.Women should also use a natural progesterone cream when taking this product.Caution:Do not take in case of pregnancy, lactation, or estrogen-dependent tumors.

Health benefits overview: Are you experiencing the challenges that come with menopause? Estrogen for Women can help ease the physical and mental discomforts associated with this natural transition, including hot flashes, night sweats, and mood fluctuations. This comprehensive botanical formula combines soy isoflavones with potent plant extracts to support balanced estrogen metabolism and promote comfort during menopause.

Why this formula works: Menopause brings rapidly changing estrogen levels, and this hormone plays a vital role in numerous bodily processes. These hormonal shifts often result in uncomfortable symptoms like hot flashes, night sweats, increased agitation, and even feelings of depression. Research indicates that botanical extracts from hops, licorice, and broccoli may help reduce menopausal discomforts. These plant compounds can also encourage optimal estrogen metabolism, which experiences significant stress both during and after menopause. This formula delivers a carefully selected blend of standardized botanicals in a single convenient tablet. Each ingredient works synergistically to address multiple aspects of menopausal wellness, from hormonal balance to cellular health.

Backed by science: Standardized soy isoflavone extract Soy contains plant compounds called phytoestrogens, which offer a variety of wellness benefits. These naturally occurring substances can provide gentle support during hormonal transitions, helping your body adapt to changing estrogen levels more comfortably. Lignan extract for balanced hormone activity Clinical studies show that lignan extract can help block some of the unwanted effects associated with estrogen. This protective action supports healthy cellular function while promoting balanced hormone metabolism throughout your body. Licorice extract for hot flash reduction Research demonstrates that licorice extract can reduce both the severity and frequency of hot flashes related to menopause. This time-honored botanical provides meaningful relief from one of the most common and bothersome menopausal symptoms. Broccoli extract for cellular wellness Broccoli extract has been found to maintain optimal cell division while modulating estrogen activity. This cruciferous vegetable compound offers dual benefits by supporting both hormonal balance and healthy cellular processes. Dong quai for traditional support In traditional Chinese medicine, Dong quai is valued for helping with menopausal and menstrual discomforts. This respected botanical has been used for centuries to ease women's health concerns during transitional periods. Chasteberry extract for hormone and mood balance Chasteberry extract (Vitex Agnus-castus) supports both hormonal equilibrium and neurotransmitter balance, two factors that are essential for menopausal comfort. This powerful botanical can help ease the emotional and physical challenges associated with hormonal fluctuations.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Dr. Shade’s BitterX
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Dr. Shade’s BitterX is the upgraded version of Dr. Shade’s Bitters No. 9.This product brings an even stronger formulation of detoxification supporting bitter compounds, using Quicksilver Scientific’s patented liposomal delivery form for higher-than-normal bioavailability and absorbability. Why it works:Dr. Shade’s BitterX is the follow-up product to the popular liposomal detox product Dr. Shade’s Bitters No. 9. Dr. Shade’s BitterX provides even better support for digestive and overall health with it’s slightly more bitter blend of herbs. These herbs work synergistically together to support the body’s detoxification process even more effectively.The ingredients in Dr. Shade’s BitterX stimulate bile flow to move toxins out of the body and support the liver and kidneys, two major detoxification organs. Furthermore, its botanicals are lightly flavored with a touch of sweet essential orange oil.The active compounds from dandelion, gentian root, solidago, and myrrh are delivered with the liposomal delivery format called “Quicksilver Delivery Systems™.This unique liposomal delivery system heightens the bioavailability and absorbability of the active compounds in this product and can, therefore, have a stronger effect on the activation of the transporting compounds that are essential to the move of bile and toxins from the liver and out through the gallbladder. The science behind the product: Dr. Shade’s BitterX contains the following ingredients: Dandelion that can stimulate hepatic protection, renal-, and bile flow. Gentian that can promote healthy bile flow, and has been shown to increase levels of glutathione as well as other antioxidant-supporting enzymes. Solidago that for a long time has been used as a supporting ingredient for the urinary system. It can also promote diuresis and, through this, the elimination of toxins. Moreover, it can increase glutathione S-transferase activity. Glutathione S-transferase is a critical enzyme in phase II detoxification. Myrrh that in this product comes in an oleo gum resin form. It can support bile flow and the balancing of microbes. How to use: Take 2 to 4 pumps by mouth three times daily. Hold in the mouth 30 seconds before swallowing. Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by healthcare professional. Take on an empty stomach, at least 10 minutes before meals.

Health benefits overview: Dr. Shade's BitterX can deliver enhanced detoxification support through a potent formulation of bitter botanical compounds. This upgraded version utilizes Quicksilver Scientific's patented liposomal delivery for superior bioavailability and absorption. The formula can stimulate bile flow to move toxins out of your body while supporting liver and kidney function, two major detoxification organs. Are you looking for comprehensive cleansing support that works synergistically?

Why this formula works: This product represents the next evolution of the popular liposomal detox formula Dr. Shade's Bitters No. 9. Dr. Shade's BitterX can provide even stronger support for digestive and overall wellness with its more bitter blend of herbs. These botanical ingredients work synergistically together to encourage your body's natural detoxification processes more effectively. The active compounds stimulate bile flow to transport toxins out while supporting liver and kidney health. The botanicals are lightly flavored with a touch of sweet essential orange oil for pleasant taste. Active compounds from dandelion, gentian root, solidago, and myrrh are delivered through Quicksilver Delivery Systems, which heightens bioavailability and can therefore have a stronger effect on activating the transport mechanisms essential for moving bile and toxins from the liver out through the gallbladder.

Backed by science: Dandelion for liver and kidney protection Dandelion is a traditional botanical that has been used for centuries to support detoxification pathways. This plant can stimulate hepatic protection, encourage healthy kidney function, and promote optimal bile flow throughout your digestive system. Every part of the dandelion contains beneficial compounds that can aid your body's natural cleansing processes. Research shows dandelion may help support healthy cholesterol levels and promote the elimination of metabolic waste products through enhanced urinary function. Gentian root for bile flow and antioxidant support Gentian root is one of the most bitter herbs known to traditional medicine. This powerful botanical can promote healthy bile flow, which is essential for proper digestion and toxin elimination. Studies demonstrate that gentian has been shown to increase levels of glutathione as well as other antioxidant-supporting enzymes. Glutathione is your body's master antioxidant, playing a crucial role in protecting cells from oxidative stress and supporting phase II detoxification pathways. Solidago for urinary system and detoxification Solidago has a long history of use as a supporting ingredient for the urinary system. This botanical can promote diuresis – the increased production of urine – and through this process, encourage the elimination of toxins from your body. Moreover, solidago can increase glutathione S-transferase activity, a critical enzyme in phase II detoxification. This enzymatic action helps your liver convert potentially harmful compounds into forms that can be safely eliminated from your system. Myrrh for bile flow and microbial balance Myrrh appears in this formula as an oleo gum resin, a form used in traditional medicine for thousands of years. This aromatic resin can support healthy bile flow, which is essential for fat digestion and the elimination of fat-soluble toxins. Additionally, myrrh can help maintain the balance of microbes in your digestive tract. A balanced gut microbiome is essential for optimal digestion, nutrient absorption, and immune function throughout your entire body. Quicksilver Delivery Systems for enhanced absorption The advanced liposomal delivery technology transforms these bitter compounds into tiny, easily absorbed particles. Unlike conventional supplements, this system protects the active ingredients during digestion and facilitates rapid uptake into your bloodstream. This heightened bioavailability means more of the beneficial compounds reach your cells where they're needed most. The result is more effective activation of the cellular transport mechanisms that move bile and toxins out of your liver and through your gallbladder for elimination.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
