product.title: Rainforest Blend Whole Bean Coffee
product.description:
Life Extension has found a way to deliver rich, delicious coffee while retaining this incredible plant’s nutritional profile.HealthyRoast® coffee-roasting processRainforest Blend is made using a patented, 100% natural process called HealthyRoast®, which helps to preserve the naturally occurring antioxidant polyphenols. Moreover, the HealthyRoast® process retains the natural compounds found in the coffee beans that help protect the stomach from distress.Sourced from verdant tropical climatesLife Extension’s Rainforest Blend consists of 100% USDA certified organic Arabica coffee beans, prepared in small batches and expertly packaged whole for your convenience.Try it for yourself and taste the difference!

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:CoQ10 and Shilajit found in Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support can help support cellular energy production by supporting the mitochondria, the “powerhouse” of the cell. It can also contribute to maintaining normal heart, brain, and kidney health as well as that of other cells. The formula has been designed for enhanced absorption of CoQ10 in the body.Why it works:The body has a lot of organs, such as the heart, brain, and kidneys, which require lots of energy to maintain normal function. Unfortunately, cell energy production is known to decrease with age. Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support is truly unique in that it supports the mitochondria, the “powerhouse” of the cell, directly, thereby supporting highly energy demanding organs such as the heart, brain, and kidneys.CoQ10 is required to play an important role in maintaining normal cell energy production levels, as it converts fats and sugars into energy which is useful for all cells in your body. Sustaining adequate levels of CoQ10 is therefore crucial as the body's production of CoQ10 declines significantly with advancing age (1). Ubiquinol CoQ10 is used in this formula, because it absorbs up to 8 times better than ubiquinone CoQ10.Shilajit has been clinically shown to further increase CoQ10 absorption, promote cardiovascular health, and help restore youthful cellular energy.The science behind the product:CoQ10 has been shown to have powerful antioxidant properties. It can protect important proteins (2) and mitochondrial DNA (3) from oxidative damage. (1)Research done with middle-aged mice showed that ubiquinol was shown to be 40% more effective in slowing measurements of aging, compared to ubiquinone. (4)A combination of CoQ10 and shilajit showed a 56% increase in energy production in the brain, so 40% better than CoQ10 alone. Additionally, it was shown that a 144% increase in energy production in muscle cells, so 27% better than CoQ10 alone. (5)Researchers have demonstrated that combination of ubiquinol CoQ10 and shilajit can provide unparalleled effect and support heart health and youthful cellular energy production better than CoQ10 alone.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Feeling tired and sluggish despite getting enough sleep? Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support™ brings together ubiquinol CoQ10 and shilajit to support the cellular energy your body depends on. This formula can promote mitochondrial health, targeting the energy factories within your cells. Beyond energizing your body, it can also help maintain heart function, brain wellness, and kidney health through superior ubiquinol absorption.

Why this formula works: Organs like your heart, brain, and kidneys consume tremendous amounts of energy to keep functioning properly throughout the day. Sadly, your body's natural cellular energy production weakens as you age, which can affect how you feel. This formula supports your mitochondria, the microscopic power plants inside cells that generate energy for every bodily function. CoQ10 is essential in this energy-creation process, converting the fats and sugars you consume into the fuel your cells use. Preserving adequate CoQ10 levels matters because your body's natural production drops significantly over time. This formula delivers ubiquinol, absorbing up to 8 times more effectively than standard ubiquinone CoQ10. Shilajit further amplifies this absorption and can help restore youthful cellular energy while supporting heart function.

Backed by science: Potent antioxidant capabilities Studies verify that CoQ10 delivers substantial antioxidant protection for your cells. Research demonstrates it defends critical proteins and mitochondrial DNA from oxidative harm caused by free radicals, supporting cellular integrity as time passes. Ubiquinol shows superior effectiveness for aging Scientific investigations with middle-aged mice established that ubiquinol was 40% more effective at slowing aging measurements than ubiquinone. Selecting this advanced form gives you enhanced support for protecting your vitality and overall wellness. Shilajit enhances energy generation dramatically Clinical research uncovers impressive findings when CoQ10 teams up with shilajit. Trials show this pairing achieved a 56% boost in brain energy creation, performing 40% better than CoQ10 by itself. Muscle cells experienced an extraordinary 144% increase in energy output, exceeding CoQ10 alone by 27%. Exceptional heart and cellular advantages Scientific validation confirms that the ubiquinol CoQ10 and shilajit combination delivers remarkable outcomes for cardiovascular wellness and youthful cellular energy. This synergistic pairing provides results that surpass what CoQ10 accomplishes on its own, empowering your vibrant, active lifestyle.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Calcium Citrate with Vitamin D
product.description:
The essential & abundant calciumCalcium is the most abundant mineral in the body and an essential mineral. It's primarily found in bones and teeth, and in bone formation, calcium forms crystals that provide strength to maturing bone. Calcium is for more than bonesCalcium is needed for more than just healthy bones; it's also important for muscle contraction, blood vessel contraction and expansion, the secretion of hormones and enzymes, and sending messages through the nervous system.Studies have proven its impact on heart health as a result of increased calcium intake. In addition, scientific evidence suggests that increased intake of calcium may help to maintain optimal weight as well.The best absorption of calcium Calcium is often inadequately supplied, inefficiently absorbed, or excreted faster than it is being assimilated. The citrate salt of calcium has been documented to be well absorbed and utilised by the body. This is the form recommended by many doctors and nutritionists.Calcium citrate dissolves easily even if stomach acid is low. Many people naturally produce less acid as they age, so calcium citrate is a good choice for older adults. The addition of vitamin D3 is also critically important, because it stimulates calcium absorption and promotes healthy bone density. However, as people age, they often lose the ability to make vitamin D3.Recommendations regarding calcium intakeIt's recommended to not take calcium and other minerals with fibre, because fibre can interfere with their absorptionThere is evidence that calcium from supplements and dairy foods may inhibit iron absorption. However, it has been very difficult to distinguish between the effects of calcium on iron absorption and other inhibitory factors, such as phytate. Although current understanding of this suggests that the inhibition of calcium on absorption of iron is of short duration and the body has adaptive mechanisms.Calcium supplements are best taken during meals. They should always be taken with a full glass of water, juice or other liquid to enhance solubility.If calcium-containing formulas are taken only once per day, they may be best taken in the evening.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Immune & Nasal Defense
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Seasonal changes can increase the number of microscopic stimuli like the amount of pollen, dust, or pet dander in the air. This can, in turn, cause your immune system to overreact which can result in discomforts in the eyes, airways, and skin.Our immune system is our body’s built-in line of defense. Coincidentally, it also reacts to harmless things in your environment such as those mentioned above.This supplement contains EpiCor®, a yeast fermentate of S. cerevisiae, and L. rhamnosus CRL1505, a probiotic strain, that can encourage multiple aspects of a healthy immune response, so you can also stay comfortable when seasonal changes occur.EpiCor® was discovered when factory workers at a yeast fermentation plant had better work attendance than their office counterparts. Moreover, FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian.Why it works: Our immune system operates with the best interests of our body at heart. However, sometimes "things" in environmental factors like pollen and other seasonal challenges, test out immune system. We want our immune system to produce immunoglobulin A (IgA) in order to help protect us. At the same time, our immune system should ignore harmless things in our environment, otherwise it may produce an excess of histamine — a compound that affects airflow in nasal passages. So to prepare for any immune system challenge, we need to promote a healthy immune response to the world around us. That’s where FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense comes in. The science behind the product: FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense contains a unique combination of ingredients that can help balance your immune system during seasonal changes:From Brewer's yeast: EpiCor® of S. cerevisiae Scientific discoveries can happen when you least expect it. For instance, factory workers at a yeast fermentation plant took fewer sick days compared to their colleagues in office settings. Research revealed that those on the factory floor had heigher levels of secretory IgA and natural killer cell activity than those working than those working in a cubicle. Secretory IgA and natural killer cells both play vital roles in maintaining a robust, healthy immune system.EpiCor® is a fermentate of from S. cerevisiae, a microorganism more commonly recognized as brewer's yeast. Its discovery was purely coincidental as mentioned above, and since then EpiCor® has been the subject of a half-dozen clinical studies.EpiCor® serves to enhance the body's natural immune response. Curiously, EpiCor® also lends a hand to the immune system in dealing with innocuous environmental factors like pollen. In one study, subjects took either 500 mg of EpiCor® a day or a placebo for five weeks.Subjects in the EpiCor® group who normally experienced an immune response to changes in their environment reported none of those same effects while taking EpiCor®. (1) In two additional studies, individuals taking EpiCor® reported reduced duration and intensity of immune reactions compared to those receiving a placebo. (2,3) EpiCor® appears to work by promoting natural killer cell activity as well as the production of secretory IgA, two little-known but absolutely essential parts of your body’s immune defenses. In one study, subjects taking 500 mg of EpiCor® a day for 8 weeks saw an increase in secretory IgA. (1) In another study, EpiCor® increased markers of natural killer cell activity, after just a single 500 mg dose. (4)The probiotic strain Lactobacillus rhamnosus CRL-1505Lactobacillus rhamnosus CRL1505 stands out as a unique probiotic strain originally isolated from goat's milk and discovered in the northwestern region of Argentina. This particular strain, L. rhamnosus CRL1505, plays a significant role in promoting a robust immune response, to the extent that it is administered annually to more than 300,000 school children in Argentina for this very purpose. (5,6)In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial involving hundreds of Argentinian school children, subjects receiving L. rhamnosus 5 days a week for 6 months had nearly 50% less recorded instances of immune challenge compared to those taking a placebo.This same study found that the L. rhamnosus group also had 47% higher levels of secretory IgA, which supports a healthy immune response. (5)How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: EsophaCool™
product.description:
A large number of adults experience gastrointestinal discomfort caused by stomach acid rising into the poorly protected esophagus as well as inflammatory processes in the esophagus itself. Many conventional regimens can disrupt healthy digestion, inhibit the production of stomach acid, and lead to deficiencies of nutrients such as magnesium. Focusing on the esophagus, not the stomach.With three complementary ingredients, EsophaCool neutralizes acid in the esophagus but leaves digestive acid production in the stomach alone. In addition, the formula promotes a healthy muscle tone in the esophagus to help reduce digestive discomfort and encourages a healthy esophageal inflammatory response.Calcium carbonate promotes a healthy ph balance in the esophagus, without lowering gastric acidity significantly. When chewed, rather than swallowed, calcium carbonate has minimum effect on stomach acid, which allows that acid to do play its important role in digestion undisturbed. Research indicates, that chewable calcium also supports the muslce movement of swallowing and helps to block the backwards flow of fluid from the stomach. Magnesium carbonate adds further support for esophageal comfort and provides supplementary magnesium to the body.GutGard® DGL deglycyrrhizinated licorice root extract eases gastric discomfort in the esophagus by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory factors such as leukotrienes, prostaglandins, and interleukins. Licorice has also been shown to raise the production of protective mucous, which serves as a barrier between the delicate lining of the esophagus and the acid stomach contents.This unique, natural on-the-go formula provides fast-acting relief from gastric discomfort. So be sure to have EsophaCool chewable tablets handy for your next meal

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Thrivagen
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Chronic stress can have a deep impact on the female hormone balance and upset women's health. This can lead to disturbances in the female body such as an imbalanced menstrual cycle, lower libido, mood swings, and trouble sleeping. Thrivagen is a liposome supplement specifically designed with a unique combination of sixteen different herbal extracts to support the female hormone balance and help lower the impact of stress on the female body. Why it Works:The draining effect of chronic stress on the female body can increase the need for supplementing with antioxidants and nutrients in order to keep healthy.Adaptogens are a type of nutrients that are particularly well-suited for supporting the woman’s body in times of stress. The adaptogens in Thrivagen help promote processes that help the body deal better with stress. It does so, by helping the body to deliver a balanced response to stressors as well as promote sleep quality and inhibit mood swings. Thrivagen contains an adaptogenic blend of no less than sixteen nutrients that includes energy supporting herbal extracts from: AcaiAmerican GinsengAshwagandhaAsian Licorice RootAstragalus RootCatubaChaste Tree BerryGuaranaHimalayan GojiJiaogulanPeruvian MacaReishi MushroomRhodiola RoseaSchisandra FruitShatavariWild CeleryIt contains herbal extracts especially well-suited for the female endocrine system and women's health such as Chaste Tree Berry, Shatavari, and Wild Celery.Chaste Tree Berry extract (Vitex Agnus-Castus) has long been used to support the hormone balance in women. It is also used to promote a normal menstrual cycle and also plays a role in helping to reduce common menopausal-related issues and discomforts.Shatavari (Asparagus Racemosus) is a plant traditionally used in the Ayurvedic tradition. As it helps provide natural phytoestrogens, it can help promote a normal hormonal function in women and may help prevent mood swings induced by hormonal imbalances, as well as support women's health in general.Wild Celery extract (Angelia Archangelica) can promote a regular and normal menstrual cycle and can also help reduce menstrual discomforts. Furthermore, since it is a bitter, it also helps promote a healthy digestive system function.This herbal formula can also help enhance women’s libido. The Science Behind the Product:The herbal extracts in this product are carefully calibrated in special ratios so that their potential effect can be maximized.The herbs in this product are encapsulated in liposome spheres. These spheres are made of lipids, which are the same material the cell membranes are made from. Since all 16 herbs in this product are delivered in single microscopic liposome spheres, they can readily be transported directly into the cells for delivery of the active ingredients.This means that you only have to supplement with a much lower amount of the active ingredients compared to a traditional, similar herbal formula. Furthermore, because the herbal extracts are delivered with the Quicksilver Delivery Systems®, the potency of the herbal nutrients are also higher than conventional herbal formulas. In other words; this highly absorbable liposomal adaptogenic tonic offers fast uptake and equal or greater potency than standard dry herbs or tinctures, for results you can feel. How to Use: Take 2 pumps twice daily. Repeat to desired dose or as directed by a healthcare professional.Hold in mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.May be mixed into a small amount of water. Best taken on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before meals.Once opened, use within 60 days.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Male Vascular Sexual Support
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Dissatisfaction with sexual health can lead to lower life quality in men with this health issue. Kaempferia parviflora is a black ginger extract, a member of the ginger family, that has been used to promote this area of men's health for years. Male Vascular Sexual Support contains KaempMax™ Kaempferia parviflora and can support healthy male sexual function and promote healthy male sexual response. This is a once-daily supplement.Why it works:K. parviflora, found in Male Vascular Sexual Support, is also known as Thai Black Ginger and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used to promote male sexual health for years, but only now has it been studied in the west.The results are impressive: two clinical studies show promise for male sexual function, response, performance and satisfaction with results seen after 30 days. (1,2)The science behind the product:Benefits of K. parvifloraK. parviflora works by promoting nitric oxide synthesis, which can relax blood vessels and enable healthy blood flow, the key to healthy male sexual response. (3,4)It can also encourage a healthy brain response to sexual stimuli and help to inhibit an enzyme that can affect male sexual response. (1,5) And it does both of these things independently of hormone levels.Clinical studiesK. parviflora extract was used in an eight-week randomized, double-blind clinical study, and it promoted a healthy male sexual response as compared to placebo. (2)Impressed by these results, formulators at Life Extension® set out to confirm the study's findings. In our own clinical study, subjects taking KaempMax™ K. parviflora extract standardized to 5% of the active compound 5, 7-dimethoxyflavone, for 30 days, reported healthy sexual function and satisfaction. (1)This black ginger extract did not significantly affect hormone levels in either clinical study, making it an excellent complement to testosterone-supportive health regimens. (1,2)How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Male Vascular Sexual Support can help address dissatisfaction with sexual health that may impact your quality of life. This formula features Kaempferia parviflora, a black ginger extract from the ginger family that has been traditionally used to promote male wellness for years. This once-daily supplement contains KaempMax™ K. parviflora extract that can support optimal male sexual function and encourage natural sexual response. The science-backed formula offers targeted support for men seeking to enhance their intimate health naturally.

Why this formula works: K. parviflora, also known as Thai black ginger, is native to Southeast Asia and has been used to promote male sexual health for generations. Only recently has Western science begun studying this traditional botanical with impressive results. Two clinical studies demonstrate promising outcomes for male sexual function, response, performance, and satisfaction with visible results appearing after just 30 days. Are you looking for natural support that delivers measurable benefits? The key advantage of this formula is that it works independently of hormone levels, making it an excellent complement to testosterone-supportive regimens. You can incorporate this supplement into your wellness routine without concerns about hormonal interference.

Backed by science: How K. parviflora supports male health K. parviflora works by promoting nitric oxide synthesis, which relaxes blood vessels and enables optimal blood flow, the fundamental key to natural male sexual response. This mechanism addresses one of the most critical physiological factors in male intimate wellness. Additionally, this extract can encourage balanced brain response to sexual stimuli and help inhibit an enzyme that may affect male sexual response. Remarkably, it accomplishes both functions independently of hormone levels, offering you versatile support. Clinical evidence In an eight-week randomized, double-blind clinical study, K. parviflora extract promoted optimal male sexual response compared to placebo. The positive results prompted Life Extension to conduct confirmatory research to validate these findings. In the follow-up clinical study, subjects taking KaempMax™ K. parviflora extract standardized to 5% of the active compound 5,7-dimethoxyflavone for 30 days reported improved sexual function and satisfaction. This black ginger extract did not significantly affect hormone levels in either clinical study. Could you benefit from this clinically validated approach to male wellness? The research demonstrates real-world results for men seeking natural intimate health support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Fast-Acting Liquid Melatonin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports. Natural production of this hormone declines with age. (1-3) This can disturb your circadian rhythm and as a result thereof your quality of sleep. (4-6) Research shows that it does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health.Why it works:Melatonin is a hormone which is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock”. (7,8) Melatonin is primarily synthesized in your pineal gland and is released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, studies show that it also has many other health advantages: Sleep supportThe body’s own production of melatonin is reduced with the natural aging process. That’s why supplementation with this hormone can be a natural solution for people in advanced age that have trouble sleeping.Supplementing with this hormone can help people who deal with sleep trouble and helping them balance their circadian rhythm.Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl) and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it also supports other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it provides protextion againt a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11)Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin can therefore support the immune system as a whole. (12,13)Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20) The science behind the product:Scientific research has in recent years demonstrated that there is more to melatonin than it merely being helpful in promoting high-quality sleep. What is also interesting about melatonin, is that it can be delivered in a variety of fashions, ranging from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery. This melatonin product contains a high 3 mg dose of melatonin per serving (1 ml). How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Fast-Acting Liquid Melatonin can help you achieve essential bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being through better sleep. Quality sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin naturally supports. Natural melatonin production declines with age, disrupting your circadian rhythm and sleep quality. Beyond sleep support, research demonstrates melatonin offers antioxidant protection, DNA safeguarding, immune system activation, and cognitive health benefits.

Why this formula works: Melatonin is a hormone naturally produced in your body, derived from tryptophan, that primarily supports your circadian rhythm or "body clock." It's synthesized in your pineal gland and released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. While melatonin is known for promoting restful sleep, studies reveal it provides numerous additional health advantages. Natural melatonin production reduces with aging, making supplementation a viable solution for people experiencing sleep difficulties. Are you struggling to fall asleep or stay asleep throughout the night? Supplementing with this fast-acting liquid formula can help balance your circadian rhythm for improved sleep quality.

Backed by science: Liquid delivery for rapid absorption This melatonin product delivers a substantial 3 mg dose per 1 ml serving in convenient liquid format. Scientific research demonstrates that melatonin can be delivered in various forms, ranging from traditional capsules to liquid formats, each offering unique absorption characteristics for different needs. Antioxidant protection and cellular DNA support Research shows melatonin possesses strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges your body for common free radicals like hydroxyl and peroxyl, working more efficiently than many other antioxidants while supporting additional antioxidants to raise overall protection. Melatonin is also vital for supporting cellular DNA by providing protection against peroxynitrite, a specific free radical that attacks DNA strands inside cells. This helps inhibit oxidative damage to your cells at the most fundamental level. Immune health activation Melatonin helps activate T-helper cells, which regulate immune responses of other cells throughout your body. These cells help coordinate responses to foreign molecules, meaning that by activating T-helper cells, melatonin can support your immune system as a whole. Cognitive health support Cognitive decline is a natural consequence of aging, but the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might correlate to melatonin levels in your body. Melatonin supports your brain's own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors that can accelerate age-related cognitive decline, such as free radicals in brain tissue. Could better sleep and comprehensive cellular protection transform your overall wellness?

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Resveratrol Elite™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Resveratrol is a phytonutrient, a polyphenol compound, found in several plants, most notably red grapes, some berries, and Japanese knotweed. This "multi-tasker" anti-aging nutrient is good for your heart, mind, and cellular health.Quercetin is a bioflavonoid nutrient that can support your heart and immune system. Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ gives you a healthy dose of both, and this supplement is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.Why it works:Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ can help you take advantage of resveratrol's longevity properties without having to drink seven glasses of red wine to reap its benefits! A wide range of studies have revealed numerous benefits associated with resveratrol intake, including: (1-3)Promoting longevityProtecting heart healthEnhancing brain functionEncouraging immune and anti-inflammatory effectsSupporting healthy insulin sensitivityImproving metabolic healthHowever traditional resveratrol has low bioavailability. This advanced formula contains a highly bioavailable trans-resveratrol, so it's absorbed more easily by your body.The trans-resveratrol is combined with a high-bioavailability form of the phytonutrient quercetin that can promote healthy cellular function and cardiovascular health and has also been shown to encourage a healthy immune response.Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ allows your body to make the most of the health benefits of these super-nutrients. The science behind the product:Resveratrol is a widely recognized longevity and anti-aging supplement. (4) Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ contains trans-resveratrol, the form known for its beneficial biological effects. (1,5-7) Enhanced bioavailability of resveratrolIn its free form, resveratrol has poor bioavailability. To solve this problem and maximize its benefits, the trans-resveratrol (from Japanese knotweed) is combined with a hydrogel coating of galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds. This protects resveratrol once you have ingested it. As a result the resveratrol’s bioavailability is shown to increase an amazing 10x than traditional, unformulated resveratrol. It can circulate longer throughout the body, delivering much more of this longevity nutrient's multiple benefits to your cells. (8)Resveratrol's positive impact on heart healthProtecting cells from oxidative stress is one of the ways resveratrol can promote heart health. (9) By reducing oxidative stress in the cardiovascular system, resveratrol can contribute to improve endothelial health and function, which is vital for a long and healthy life. (10)Resveratrol's influence on brain healthMoreover, resveratrol has shown promising potential in supporting brain health and cognition. In a randomized controlled trial, it demonstrated positive effects on neurological and metabolic function, as well as brain blood flow. These additional benefits further emphasize how resveratrol can enhance essential aspects of healthy aging and longevity. (11)Complementing resveratrol with quercetinThe Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ formula also contains quercetin, a phytonutrient that complements resveratrol's actions. Quercetin is an important bioflavonoid that also can help inhibit oxidative stress and promote a healthy inflammatory response. Furthermore, it can support cardiovascular health and help maintain already healthy blood pressure levels. Quercetin can also promote neurological health and proper cell division. (12-15)How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ can help you harness the longevity benefits of resveratrol, a powerful anti-aging phytonutrient found in red grapes and Japanese knotweed. This advanced formula combines resveratrol with quercetin, creating a multi-tasking nutrient blend for your heart, mind, and cellular health. Quercetin is a bioflavonoid that can support cardiovascular wellness and encourage balanced immune system function. This vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO supplement delivers comprehensive support for healthy aging without compromise.

Why this formula works: Traditional resveratrol suffers from poor bioavailability, meaning your body struggles to absorb and utilize it effectively. This formula solves that challenge with an advanced delivery system that increases absorption by an impressive 10 times compared to standard resveratrol. Wide-ranging research demonstrates resveratrol can promote longevity, protect cardiovascular health, enhance brain function, encourage balanced immune and inflammatory responses, support insulin sensitivity, and improve metabolic wellness. Are you ready to experience these comprehensive anti-aging benefits? The highly bioavailable trans-resveratrol combines with a superior form of quercetin to promote optimal cellular function and cardiovascular health. This synergistic pairing can also encourage a balanced immune response, delivering maximum value from these super-nutrients.

Backed by science: Enhanced bioavailability with advanced technology Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ contains trans-resveratrol, the form associated with beneficial biological effects. In its free form, resveratrol has limited bioavailability, but this formula features a protective hydrogel coating of galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds. This innovative coating protects resveratrol after you ingest it, allowing it to circulate longer throughout your body and deliver more longevity benefits to your cells. Clinical research demonstrates this technology increases bioavailability by an amazing 10 times compared to unformulated resveratrol. Cardiovascular protection through cellular defense Resveratrol protects cells from oxidative stress, which is one key way it can promote heart health. By reducing oxidative stress in your cardiovascular system, resveratrol can help improve endothelial health and function, which is vital for a long and vibrant life. Brain health and cognitive support Research reveals resveratrol shows promising potential in supporting brain health and cognition. In randomized controlled trials, it demonstrated positive effects on neurological and metabolic function, as well as brain blood flow, emphasizing how resveratrol can enhance essential aspects of healthy aging and longevity. Quercetin's complementary benefits The formula also contains quercetin, a phytonutrient that complements resveratrol's actions. This important bioflavonoid can help inhibit oxidative stress and promote balanced inflammatory response, support cardiovascular health, maintain already optimal blood pressure levels, encourage neurological health, and promote proper cell division. Could your wellness routine benefit from this scientifically advanced combination of longevity nutrients?

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Clinical research demonstrates this technology increases bioavailability by an amazing 10 times compared to unformulated resveratrol. Cardiovascular protection through cellular defense Resveratrol protects cells from oxidative stress, which is one key way it can promote heart health. By reducing oxidative stress in your cardiovascular system, resveratrol can help improve endothelial health and function, which is vital for a long and vibrant life. Brain health and cognitive support Research reveals resveratrol shows promising potential in supporting brain health and cognition. In randomized controlled trials, it demonstrated positive effects on neurological and metabolic function, as well as brain blood flow, emphasizing how resveratrol can enhance essential aspects of healthy aging and longevity. Quercetin's complementary benefits The formula also contains quercetin, a phytonutrient that complements resveratrol's actions. This important bioflavonoid can help inhibit oxidative stress and promote balanced inflammatory response, support cardiovascular health, maintain already optimal blood pressure levels, encourage neurological health, and promote proper cell division. Could your wellness routine benefit from this scientifically advanced combination of longevity nutrients?
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: The One®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what are mitochondria? They are the energy-generating factories of your cells.However, mitochondria can be worn down because of stress, infections, toxins, and aging, resulting in a lower energy output which can leave you fatigued and deprived of energy. The One® from Quicksilver Scientific contains a powerful and unique mitochondria-supporting formula for optimal cell performance, proliferation, and energy output.Why it works:Being the powerhouses of the cells, mitochondria convert food into nearly all of the energy that the body uses for all functions. This type of energy is called ATP (Adenosintriphosphat), and up to 95% of the energy that the body uses is ATP. That’s why making sure that you have healthy mitochondria cannot only help your cells perform effectively but also help increase the energy output of the mitochondria — leaving you both energized and revitalized.The One® from Quicksilver Scientific contains a proprietary herbal formula in liposomal form. It contains CoQ10, PQQ, resveratrol, and DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols which can all help protect and promote healthy mitochondria. In turn, this increases the energy output of them and helps increase mitochondrial biogenesis, which is the natural formation of new mitochondria.Moreover, The One® also contains a mix of 13 adaptogenic herbs that can support the body’s response to stress and sudden high demands of energy, like when one has to perform physically.The science behind the product:The nutrients in this product are delivered using the patented liposomal delivery system called Quicksilver Delivery Systems™ from Quicksilver Scientific.Liposomes are tiny vesicles that contain nutrients. These microscopic spheres are made of lipids, the same material that the cell membranes are made of. When nutrients are delivered this way, they can bypass the cell membrane and deliver nutrients directly inside the cell. This helps to increase bioavailability considerably.Moreover, when nutrients are delivered like this, it simultaneously nourishes the cell membrane and helps the cell absorb nutrients, as well as ridding itself of toxins.The One contains a carefully crafted combination of active ingredients that can all contribute to enhancing mitochondrial energy production and cell performance:Adaptogenic herbsThe One® contains a mix of adaptogenic herbs that can support the body's response to stress or help the cells produce more energy on occasions when the body suddenly needs more energy than normal, such as when the body is under intense physical stress (e.g. when exercising).The liquid herbal blend in this product includes maple sap syrup and extracts from: Acai BerryGynostemma Rhizome (Jiaogulan)Goji BerryMaca RootAmerican Ginseng RootSchisandra FruitChinese Licorice RootRhodiola RootAstragalus RootReishi Fruiting BodyCatuaba BarkGuarana SeedAshwagandha RootPyrroloquinoline Quinone (PQQ) PQQ can encourage mitochondrial biogenesis, the natural formation of new mitochondria. Moreover, PQQ can also help protect the neurons (brain cells) and promote cardiovascular health.ResveratrolResveratrol can stimulate certain pathways that lead to mitochondrial biogenesis. Furthermore, it has also been demonstrated to mimic beneficial caloric restriction effects on the metabolism.Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) CoQ10 is known as an antioxidant which is particularly suited for protecting mitochondria against free radicals. Such free radicals can break down the cells gradually. By binding to free radicals, CoQ10 can inhibit free radicals from wreaking havoc on the mitochondria.Moreover, CoQ10 also plays a central role in the generation of cellular energy why CoQ10 is also a part of this formula.DeltaGOLD® TocotrienolsDelta tocotrienols support the body’s antioxidant levels together with PQQ. They do so, by promoting Nrf2, which regulates cellular antioxidant production.Read more about the product hereHow to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Mitochondria are your cells' energy-generating powerhouses. However, stress, infections, toxins, and aging can wear down these vital structures, resulting in lower energy output that can leave you fatigued. The One® from Quicksilver Scientific can provide powerful mitochondria-supporting nutrition for optimal cell performance, proliferation, and energy production. Do you feel your energy levels declining as daily demands increase?

Why this formula works: As the powerhouses of your cells, mitochondria convert food into nearly all the energy that your body uses for every function. This cellular energy is called ATP, and up to 95% of the energy your body utilizes comes from this source. Making sure you have optimal mitochondria can help your cells perform effectively and increase energy output, leaving you both energized and revitalized. This formula contains CoQ10, PQQ, resveratrol, and DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols in liposomal form, which can all help protect and promote healthy mitochondria. This enhanced support increases their energy output and encourages mitochondrial biogenesis – the natural formation of new mitochondria. Moreover, The One® also contains a blend of 13 adaptogenic herbs that can help your body respond to stress and sudden high demands for energy, such as during physical performance.

Backed by science: Liposomal delivery for enhanced bioavailability The nutrients in this formula are delivered using Quicksilver Scientific's patented Quicksilver Delivery Systems technology. Liposomes are tiny vesicles made of lipids – the same material that makes up your cell membranes. When nutrients are delivered this way, they can bypass traditional digestive breakdown and deliver active compounds directly inside cells. This approach increases bioavailability considerably while simultaneously nourishing cell membranes and helping cells absorb nutrients more efficiently. PQQ for creating new mitochondria Pyrroloquinoline quinone (PQQ) can encourage mitochondrial biogenesis, the natural formation of new mitochondria in your cells. This means you're not just protecting existing energy factories – you're building new ones. Moreover, PQQ can also help protect neurons (brain cells) and promote cardiovascular wellness. Are you looking for comprehensive cellular support that extends beyond just energy production? Resveratrol for metabolic support Resveratrol can stimulate certain cellular pathways that lead to mitochondrial biogenesis. This polyphenol compound activates mechanisms that encourage your body to create more energy-producing mitochondria. Furthermore, resveratrol has been demonstrated to mimic beneficial caloric restriction effects on metabolism. This unique property means you get metabolic advantages without actual dietary restriction. CoQ10 for antioxidant protection Coenzyme Q10 is recognized as an antioxidant particularly suited for protecting mitochondria against free radicals. These unstable molecules can gradually break down cellular structures, including your energy-producing mitochondria. By neutralizing free radicals, CoQ10 can inhibit oxidative damage from wreaking havoc on mitochondria. Moreover, CoQ10 plays a central role in the generation of cellular energy, making it an essential component of this comprehensive formula. DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols for cellular antioxidant production Delta tocotrienols work together with PQQ to enhance your body's antioxidant levels. They accomplish this by promoting Nrf2, a master regulator that controls cellular antioxidant production. This activation means your cells produce their own protective antioxidants rather than relying solely on external sources. The synergistic effect amplifies your body's natural defense systems against oxidative stress. 13 adaptogenic herbs for stress response The One® contains a carefully selected blend of adaptogenic herbs that can help your body respond to physical stress or produce more energy when demands suddenly increase, such as during intense exercise. These traditional botanicals have been used for centuries to enhance resilience and vitality. The liquid herbal blend in this product includes maple sap syrup and extracts from: Acai berry Gynostemma rhizome (jiaogulan) Goji berry Maca root American ginseng root Schisandra fruit Chinese licorice root Rhodiola root Astragalus root Reishi fruiting body Catuaba bark Guarana seed Ashwagandha root These botanicals work synergistically to support your body's natural ability to adapt to various stressors while maintaining optimal energy levels throughout the day.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Melatonin IR/XR
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Melatonin, know as the "sleep hormone" is is naturally produced in the body, primarily during the night. It's derived from tryptophan and plays a key role in regulating the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock” and sleep-wake cykle. However, people who struggle with sleep may not produce enough melatonin at the right time. (1-3) Melatonin IR/XR provides a dual-action formula to help you fall asleep quickly and stay asleep all night long. It combines immediate-release and extended-release melatonin for approximately seven hours of healthy sleep support. Why it works:Natural production of this hormone declines with age. Excessive screen use and daily stress can all also interfere with your circadian rhythm and as a result your quality of sleep.A lack of quality, restful sleep can impact cognitive function, metabolic health, and more. (4-6) Sleep difficulties may involve trouble falling asleep, or waking up in the middle of the night and being unable to fall back asleep.Melatonin IR/XR is an ideal sleep support supplement for people who have previously tried melatonin but still struggle with either falling asleep or staying asleep.Moreover, research shows that melatonin does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other health benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health. (7-17)The science behind the product:Each capsule of Melatonin IR/XR delivers 1.5 mg of MicroActive® Melatonin, a unique combination of immediate- and extended-release melatonin. Studies on immediate-release melatonin An analysis of 15 clinical studies shows that standard melatonin can help fall asleep faster, sleep longer, and enhance overall sleep quality compared to a placebo. (18) In one study, participants took 0.1 mg, 0.3 mg, or 3 mg of melatonin or a placebo 30 minutes before bed for three days. All three melatonin doses supported restorative sleep. (19)In a more recent randomized placebo-controlled trial, subjects who took 0.5 mg of fast-release melatonin for four weeks fell asleep faster and experienced healthy, restful sleep compared to a placebo. (20) Research on controlled-release melatoninIn a study examining controlled-release melatonin, 2 mg taken two hours before bed promoted healthy sleep compared to a placebo, while also reducing the time spent awake after falling asleep. (21) Another placebo-controlled study found that participants reported improved sleep quality after taking 2 mg of extended-release melatonin before bed. (22) Fall asleep and wake refreshedFor those who have struggled with other melatonin supplements, Melatonin IR/XR can promote the deep, restful, and uninterrupted sleep your body needs.So don’t lose valuable sleep – try Melatonin IR/XR today!How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders). Use caution if combining with alcohol. This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant. Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Health benefits overview: Melatonin IR/XR can help you experience deeper, more restorative sleep throughout the entire night. This formula delivers a unique combination of immediate and extended-release melatonin to address both falling asleep quickly and staying asleep for approximately seven hours. Beyond sleep, melatonin offers powerful antioxidant protection, immune system support, and cognitive health benefits. This dual-action formula is ideal for those who have struggled with traditional melatonin supplements and need comprehensive nighttime support.

Why this formula works: Natural melatonin production declines with age, and daily stress combined with excessive screen time can further disrupt your body's circadian rhythm. When your internal clock is off balance, falling asleep becomes difficult, and staying asleep can feel impossible. Melatonin IR/XR addresses both challenges with MicroActive® Melatonin technology. The immediate-release component helps initiate sleep onset rapidly, while the extended-release portion maintains optimal melatonin levels throughout the night. This ensures you can fall asleep faster and remain in deep, uninterrupted sleep for the full duration your body needs to restore and regenerate. Are you tired of waking up multiple times during the night?

Backed by science: MicroActive® Melatonin technology Each capsule delivers 1.5 mg of MicroActive® Melatonin, which combines both immediate and extended-release mechanisms in one advanced formulation. This proprietary technology ensures melatonin is released over approximately seven hours, mimicking your body's natural nighttime melatonin curve. Research on immediate-release melatonin A comprehensive analysis of 15 clinical studies demonstrates that standard melatonin can help individuals fall asleep faster, sleep longer, and experience enhanced overall sleep quality compared to placebo. In one notable study, participants who took melatonin doses ranging from 0.1 mg to 3 mg experienced restorative sleep benefits across all dosage levels. More recent randomized placebo-controlled research found that subjects taking 0.5 mg of fast-release melatonin for four weeks fell asleep faster and enjoyed restful, rejuvenating sleep. Could faster sleep onset transform your nightly routine? Studies on controlled-release melatonin Research examining controlled-release melatonin at 2 mg taken two hours before bedtime promoted optimal sleep patterns compared to placebo, while also reducing the time spent awake after initially falling asleep. Another placebo-controlled study revealed that participants reported significantly improved sleep quality after taking 2 mg of extended-release melatonin before bed. Beyond sleep: additional health benefits Melatonin functions as a powerful antioxidant that can protect your cells from oxidative damage and free radical stress. Research shows melatonin possesses antioxidant capacity exceeding that of vitamin E, offering cellular protection throughout your body. This hormone can also support immune system function, encourage DNA protection, and promote cognitive health including memory and mental clarity. Your body needs these comprehensive benefits for optimal wellness beyond just sleep support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Nanoemulsified Milk Thistle
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Milk thistle, or Silybum marianum, has been utilized worldwide for over 2,000 years for its remarkable ability to protect and support the liver and can promote healthy digestive function. Why it works:Milk thistle contains three phytonutrients (silybin, silydianin, and silychristin) together known as silymarin. Silymarin may prevent the absorption of toxins into the liver’s cells. It can support healthy digestive function and bile flow, thereby supporting gut health. It can help protect the body’s stores of glutathione, our primary endogenous antioxidant, which fights free radicals. The science behind the product: The key constituent of silymarin, silybin, has poor bioavailability in a typical oral formulation. In Nanoemulsified Milk Thistle, the extract is encapsulated in tiny, highly absorbable liposomes. The result is a formula with rapid uptake and optimal cellular delivery. With the world’s most advanced phospholipid (liposomal) delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific supplements actually nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently. How to use: Take 1-4 pumps as needed. Hold in the mouth for 30 seconds before swallowing.May be mixed into water. Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a health care professional. Best taken on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before meals. Use within 60 days of opening. Refrigerate upon receipt.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Liposomal Glutathione Complex
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Glutathione is the centerpiece of this elegant formula designed to enhance detoxification. This molecule is our most potent internal antioxidant and is present in almost every cell of the body with high concentrations in the liver. It's produced in the body from the three amino acids cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine.Milk thistle can support the liver and B vitamins promote metabolism and energy.Why it works: Glutathione is known as our body's master detoxifier and is constantly processing and removing toxins through the phase II detoxification pathway. This antioxidant and its associated enzymes can efficiently bind a wide range of toxins, including reactive oxygen species, peroxides, lipid peroxides, and heavy metals.Once captured and neutralized by glutathione, these toxins can be safely eliminated through the liver and gut. It can also recycle important antioxidants such as vitamins E and C can promote proper immune function.Nanoparticle milk thistle and trimethylglycine (TMG) can support and protect the liver. Both may support the liver’s stores of glutathione. B-complex vitamins are offered in highly bioavailable forms to meet the metabolic demand during detoxification, as well as help the body convert the food we eat into energy. The liposomes in this formula contain pure phosphatidylcholine, a lipid that is the primary building block of all cell membranes.The science behind the product:Dr. Shade has designed Quicksilver Scientific products around a groundbreaking detoxification concept that identifies the inhibition/elimination of toxicity, allergy, and infection as the key to a body in a natural and healthy state.Exceptional absorption & circulationBecause both glutathione and milk thistle have low bioavailability when taken orally, Dr. Christopher Shade, Ph.D., developed this product. Liposomal delivery systems have been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations.In addition to unsurpassed absorption rates, small liposomal and nanoemulsified particles can enhance lymphatic circulation, helping to bypass digestive enzymes and breakdown in the liver.The Quicksilver Delivery Systems®This delivery system can provide product with clear consistency only achieved with liposomes that are small (20-100 nanometers) and stable enough to pass between cells. These small vesicles begin absorbing as soon as they hit your mouth, so you can get high absorption of the product before it is altered by the harsh processes in the digestive system.Get ready for detox optimization at its finest!How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Glutathione is the centerpiece of this elegant formula designed to enhance detoxification. This molecule is your body's most potent internal antioxidant and is present in almost every cell with high concentrations in the liver. Milk thistle can help protect liver health and B vitamins promote metabolism and energy production. Are you looking for comprehensive detoxification support that works at the cellular level?

Why this formula works: Glutathione is recognized as your body's master detoxifier, constantly processing and removing toxins through the phase II detoxification pathway. This antioxidant and its associated enzymes can efficiently bind a wide range of harmful substances, including reactive oxygen species, peroxides, lipid peroxides, and heavy metals. Once captured and neutralized by glutathione, these toxins can be safely eliminated through your liver and digestive tract. It can also recycle important antioxidants such as vitamins E and C while promoting proper immune function. Nanoparticle milk thistle and trimethylglycine can help maintain and protect liver wellness. Both may encourage your liver's stores of glutathione. B-complex vitamins are offered in highly bioavailable forms to meet the metabolic demands during detoxification, as well as help convert the food you eat into usable energy.

Backed by science: Glutathione for master detoxification Glutathione is composed of three amino acids – cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine – that work together to form your body's most powerful detoxification molecule. This tripeptide operates in nearly every cell, with particularly high concentrations in your liver where most detoxification occurs. As the master detoxifier, glutathione works continuously through phase II detoxification pathways to neutralize and eliminate harmful substances. Its unique molecular structure allows it to bind with toxins, heavy metals, and free radicals, transforming them into forms that can be safely removed from your body. Milk thistle for liver protection Milk thistle has been used for centuries to support liver health and function. This formula utilizes nanoparticle milk thistle for enhanced absorption and effectiveness in protecting your liver cells. Research suggests milk thistle may help maintain your liver's glutathione stores, ensuring you have adequate levels of this critical detoxification molecule. The liver processes countless substances daily, and milk thistle can provide protective support during these demanding metabolic processes. Trimethylglycine for cellular health support Trimethylglycine (TMG) serves as a methyl donor, supporting vital cellular health processes throughout your body. This nutrient can help protect and maintain liver function while potentially enhancing glutathione production. TMG works synergistically with glutathione and milk thistle to provide comprehensive liver support. Your liver relies on methylation processes for efficient detoxification and metabolic function. B-complex vitamins for metabolic energy This formula includes B vitamins in highly bioavailable forms to support your body during detoxification processes. B vitamins play essential roles in energy metabolism, helping convert the nutrients from your food into ATP – the energy currency your cells use. During detoxification, your body's metabolic demands increase significantly. The bioavailable B-complex in this formula can help meet these heightened energy needs while supporting optimal metabolic function throughout the cleansing process. Quicksilver Delivery Systems for exceptional absorption Because both glutathione and milk thistle have traditionally shown low bioavailability when taken orally, Dr. Christopher Shade developed this advanced liposomal delivery system. Liposomal delivery has been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations. The liposomes in this formula are tiny vesicles (20-100 nanometers) made of phosphatidylcholine – the same lipid material that forms your cell membranes. This technology allows nutrients to begin absorbing as soon as they contact your mouth, bypassing harsh digestive processes that can degrade active compounds. In addition to unsurpassed absorption rates, small liposomal particles can enhance lymphatic circulation. This helps compounds bypass digestive enzymes and liver breakdown, ensuring more of the beneficial ingredients reach your cells intact and ready to work.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D found in Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint, can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce, especially during the winter. A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint offers a great taste and is ideal for people who have trouble swallowing pills.Why it works:When the skin is exposed to ultraviolet-B (UVB) rays from sunlight, the body starts synthesizing vitamin D3. Because of the winter season and application of sunblock during summer, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels may be inhibited. These factors underline the value of taking a daily vitamin D supplement. The convenient, mint-flavored liquid vitamin D formula in Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint can help maintain normal levels of vitamin D throughout the year.Moreover, since this vitamin D supplement comes in an easy-to-use bottle, receiving a daily supplement of vitamin D has never been easier.Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 50 µg/mcg (2000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per drop.Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Liquid Vitamin D3 can help you sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be challenging during winter months when natural production is limited. A daily supplement of vitamin D3 can promote optimal bone density, enhance cognitive health, encourage balanced cell differentiation, and support robust immune function. This unflavored liquid format is ideal for individuals who have difficulty swallowing pills. The convenient delivery system makes it easy to maintain consistent vitamin D intake for better overall health.

Why this formula works: When your skin is exposed to ultraviolet-B rays from sunlight, your body begins synthesizing vitamin D3. Winter seasons and sunblock application during summer can inhibit your body's natural vitamin D production, potentially leading to deficiency. These factors highlight the importance of daily vitamin D supplementation. The convenient, unflavored liquid vitamin D formula in this product can help maintain optimal levels of this essential vitamin throughout the entire year. Are you getting enough vitamin D to support your health needs? Since the easy-to-use bottle format makes supplementation simple, receiving your daily dose has never been more convenient.

Backed by science: Optimal vitamin D3 dosage This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 2000 IU (50 mcg) of vitamin D3 cholecalciferol per liquid drop. Life Extension recommends that adults supplement with at least 2000 IU of vitamin D daily, as most people have insufficient vitamin D levels. It's suggested you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round for maximum health benefits. Cognitive health support Vitamin D is essential for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Optimal serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and superior maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. Bone and immune health Vitamin D, along with vitamin K and essential minerals, is vital for facilitating calcium transport into the bone matrix. This is a crucial step in maintaining strong bones and teeth throughout your lifetime. Additionally, vitamin D plays a critical role in supporting your immune system's balanced function, helping your body defend against health challenges effectively. Heart health and blood pressure support Vitamin D helps regulate your body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream. It also promotes balanced inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages optimal endothelial function. Furthermore, vitamin D may help maintain already normal renin levels. Healthy renin levels contribute to maintaining blood pressure already within the normal range, supporting your cardiovascular wellness.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Grapeseed Extract
product.description:
Life Extension Grapeseed Extract uses authentic Masquelier’s grape seed extract, which was developed in 1947 and has undergone extensive scientific study and validation in the decades since. The formula contains ingredients found in grape seed and skin. Grape seed extract can help maintain your cells healthy, support healthy blood flow, and protect the central nervous system. This blend can also provide standardized trans-resveratrol, the polyphenol in red wine that has so many health benefits. Trans-resveratrol can work synergistically for greater anti-aging properties.Research funded by the Life Extension Foundation showed that a combination of low-dose (20 mg) resveratrol plus grape seed extract has increased life-span in animals, by mimicking a low-calorie diet.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Mega GLA Sesame Lignans
product.description:
Your body needs fatty acids to survive, though it is able to make all but two of them: linoleic acid (LA), in the omega-6 family, and alpha-linolenic acid (ALA) in the omega-3 family. These two fatty acids must be supplied from dietary sources and are therefore considered essential fatty acids (EFAs). Omega-6 fatty acids are well-supplied via the consumption of meat and vegetable oils. However, not all omega-6 fatty acids are of equal value. Arachidonic acid (AA), prostaglandin E2 (PGE2), thromboxane A2, and leukotriene B4 promote inflammation. In contrast, gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), found in evening primrose oil, borage oil, and black currant oil, benefits healthy prostaglandin (PGE1) formation reduces inflammation.Health-conscious people have been swallowing many borage oil supplements to obtain GLA, the parent of the biologically active DGLA (dihomogamma linolenic acid). Life Extension adds 10 mg of sesame lignans to each softgel of Mega GLA borage oil. Sesame lignans increase beneficial DGLA and decreases inflammation. Numerous studies document GLA’s multiple health effects. Enhancing this supplement with sesame lignans leads to more efficiency in the body, which means more people can use it.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Menopause Relief
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Menopause is caused by natural aging and is caused by an age-induced decrease in natural estrogen levels in the female body, offsetting a hormone imbalance in the female body. This sudden change in the estrogen balance can cause discomfort and signs of menopause such as hot flashes night sweats, and mood swings. The active ingredient in this product is a powerful Siberian rhubarb extract (Rheum rhaponticum L.) that can mimic estrogen. This helps to inhibit the effects of changing estrogen levels and can relieve common menopausal discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. (1-5)Menopause Relief offers comprehensive menopause relief in a soy-free, hormone-free, once-daily, enteric-coated vegetarian tablet. Why it works:Although menopausal discomforts vary from woman to woman, they are usually accompanied by discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. Other discomforts also include irritability, sleep disturbances, exhaustion, joint and muscle discomfort, vaginal dryness, issues with urinary health, and sexual function. These are all caused by a hormonal imbalance in estrogen hormone levels in the female body.Menopause Relief is a natural menopause supplement that contains a powerful standardized extract of Siberian rhubarb. Although this extract is not a hormone, it can simulate estrogen reactions in the body. Menopausal discomforts are offset by a rapid drop in estrogen hormone levels in the female body. However, research shows that the rhubarb extract in this product mimics estrogen activity in the female body. This can inhibit the intensity of common menopausal discomforts.Studies indicate that the active ingredient in Menopause Relief can produce up to 83% reduction in total menopausal discomforts! (3)The science behind the product:The Siberian rhubarb extract found in Menopause Relief is standardized for two unique compounds called rhaponticin and desoxyrhaponticin. Pre-clinical studies show that the Siberian rhubarb extract: Selectively activates a specific estrogen receptor, ER-β.Simultaneously, it leaves another estrogen receptor known as ER-α undisturbed (6)Scientists believe that this is why the Siberian rhubarb extract in this product can mimic the effect of estrogen, which in turn helps quell menopausal symptoms.Furthermore, the standardized extract in this product has been studied in randomized, placebo-controlled clinical trials in more than 400 women. The clinical studies of the rhubarb extract lasted between 12 weeks and two years. (1, 2, 5)After the trials had ended the women involved in the studies were asked to answer standardized research questionnaires which were designed to evaluate menopausal discomforts as well as their mood and emotional health. After examining the research results, researchers found that the Siberian rhubarb extract produced: Up to 83% reduction in total menopausal discomforts (3)Towards an 83 % reduction in hot flashes (5)Up to 66% reduction in irritability and mood swings (2)How to use: Take one (1) tablet daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Caution:Do not take if you have, or have a history of, estrogen-dependent tumors.

Health benefits overview: Menopause Relief can help you navigate the natural aging transition with greater comfort and ease. This formula addresses common menopausal discomforts caused by declining estrogen levels, including hot flashes, night sweats, and mood fluctuations. The active ingredient is a powerful Siberian rhubarb extract that mimics estrogen activity in your body without containing actual hormones. This natural, hormone-free approach can provide comprehensive relief from multiple menopausal symptoms in one convenient daily tablet.

Why this formula works: Menopausal discomforts vary from woman to woman, but hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings are among the most common challenges. Additional discomforts may include irritability, sleep disturbances, fatigue, joint discomfort, and issues with vaginal dryness. These symptoms occur when estrogen levels drop rapidly during the menopause transition, creating hormonal imbalance. Menopause Relief contains a standardized Siberian rhubarb extract that, while not a hormone itself, can simulate estrogen reactions in your body. Research demonstrates this rhubarb extract mimics estrogen activity, which can help reduce the intensity of common menopausal discomforts. Are you ready to experience relief from these challenging symptoms?

Backed by science: Standardized Siberian rhubarb extract The Siberian rhubarb extract in this formula is standardized for two unique compounds called rhaponticin and desoxyrhaponticin. Pre-clinical studies reveal that this extract selectively activates a specific estrogen receptor known as ER-β, while simultaneously leaving another receptor called ER-α undisturbed. Scientists believe this selective activation explains why the extract can mimic estrogen effects and help ease menopausal symptoms without the concerns associated with hormone therapy. This targeted approach offers you a natural alternative for managing menopause. Clinical research results The standardized extract has been studied in randomized, placebo-controlled clinical trials involving more than 400 women over periods ranging from 12 weeks to two years. Participants completed standardized research questionnaires designed to evaluate menopausal discomforts as well as mood and emotional health. The results were impressive: Up to 83% reduction in total menopausal discomforts Towards 83% reduction in hot flashes Up to 66% reduction in irritability and mood swings Could you benefit from these clinically demonstrated results? This formula offers you comprehensive support backed by rigorous scientific research. Hormone-free, soy-free formulation Menopause Relief provides natural menopause support without synthetic hormones or soy. The once-daily enteric-coated vegetarian tablet ensures optimal absorption and convenience for your daily routine.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Nanoemulsified Hista-Aid ®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin C can support normal immune system function and diamine oxidase (DAO), an enzyme that metabolizes and inactivates excess histamine.Flavonoids can inhibit histamine release from mast cells.Why it works:Because the uptake of the molecules in this formula can be limited by a breakdown in the digestive tract, or in the case of vitamin C, by gastrointestinal saturation, Dr. Shade developed Nanoemulsified Hista-Aid®.Liposomal delivery systems have been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations. In addition to exceptional absorption rates, small liposomal and nanoemulsified particles enhance lymphatic circulation, helping to bypass digestive enzymes and breakdown in the liver.Mast cells play a powerful role in allergies. Flavonoids are polyphenolic plant compounds that can inhibit mast cell activity and result in histamine release. Two of the most effective flavonoids are quercetin and luteolin.A centrepiece of this innovative formula is its novel focus on Nrf2, our body’s master antioxidant switch, which regulates over 200 genes involved in detoxification. Both DIM (Diindolylmethane) and quercetin, which this formula also contains, have been shown to help support Nrf2 activity.The science behind the product:Quicksilver Delivery Systems® utilizes modern science to unleash the curative power of nature.With the world’s most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific supplements can help to nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.How to use: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts.
