product.title: Ultra Energy®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Ultra Energy® is a natural energy supplement and contains a balanced blend of adaptogenic herbs, hand-tailored by expert herbalist Dan Moriarty of Sun Horse Energy®. This unique formula can help your body respond to high demand with resilience and vitality, not fight, flight, or exhaustion. With daily use, this product helps support resilience and a clear, balanced mind.It's packaged in Quicksilver's advanced liposomal delivery system for optimal bioavailability and absorption.Why it works:Ultra Energy® provides a proprietary liquid adaptogenic herbal mix that can support adrenal gland function and then spread its action through the entire body. It's gentle enough for everyday use.The blend's 13 herbs are known to help modulate the body’s daily pressures and cortisol response, including: Aacai berryGynostemma rhizome (Jiaogulan)Ggoji berryMaca rootAmerican ginseng rootSchisandra fruitChinese licorice rootRhodiola rootAstragalus rootReishi fruiting bodyCatuaba barkGuarana seedAshwagandha rootThe science behind the product:A celebrated reputation Adaptogens (or adaptagenic) are substances, often herbs or plant compounds, that for a long time have been recognized to promote: The body’s ability to handle stressRestoration of internal balance (homeostasis)Resilience to physical, emotional, or environmental challengesSustained energy: Instead of a quick boost, they support more stable, long-lasting energy throughout the day.The powerful botanicals in this supplement are sourced globally, from Russia, America, South America, Asia, and the Indian subcontinent. This is to create a formula that draws on the best adaptogenic traditions in each region.Efficient delivery and rapid uptakeBecause bioavailability and absorption of herbs vary, Dr. Shade developed this herbal blend. All thirteen herbs in Ultra Energy® are encapsulated in tiny, highly bioavailable liposomes. These small vesicles begin absorbing as soon as they hit your mouth, so you can get a high uptake of the product before it's altered by the harsh processes in the digestive system.A serving size of 1 ml (2 pumps) delivers 400 mg herbal blend, and each bottle contains 50 (400-mg) servings.How to use: Take 2 pumps twice daily or as directed by a healthcare professional.Hold in mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.May be mixed into water.Best taken on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before meals.Once opened, use within 60 days.

product.title: Nanoemulsified Cat's Claw Elite™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Cat’s Claw (Uña de gato) is the centerpiece of this innovative immune supportive formula, which is enhanced with plant-derived essential oils and extracts, Vitamin D and the fatty acid monolaurin, all designed to maximally protect the immune system.Why it works:How to boost your immune system? It's an age-old question. Plants all over the world protect themselves from pests by developing volatile oils that permeate their leaves, bark, or peel. These can offer many benefits to humans.Cat’s Claw is a climbing vine that thrives in the Peruvian rainforest—stretching as tall as a thousand feet. Medicinal use of the inner bark dates back 2000 years to the Inca civilization, and to this day South American Ashaninka priests regard the plant as sacred, using it for healing and in religious ceremonies.The most widely utilized strain of cat’s claw, Uncaria tomentosa, boasts a treasure trove of phytonutrients thought to be responsible for the vine’s reputed healing powers and the ability to strengthen immune defenses.Each 1 mL of Nanoemulsified Cat’s Claw Elite delivers 1000 IU of Vitamin D3 and 350 mg of a proprietary blend of Liquid Cat’s Claw bark extract (Uncaria tomentosa), phospholipids (from purified sunflower seed lecithin), monolaurin, Lemon Balm leaf extract, Lemon Balm leaf oil, Rose flower oil, Natural Mint oil. All of these ingredients offer a solution to the question of how to boost your immune system naturally.The fatty acid monolaurin is derived from lauric acid and is formed naturally in the human body in small quantities. Monolaurin works by binding directly to the envelope of invaders, preventing them from attaching and entering cells. Vitamin D is added to aid normal immune system function and bone health.The science behind the product:Because many herbs have low bioavailability when taken orally, Dr. Shade developed Nanoemulsified Cat's Claw Elite™. Liposomal delivery systems have been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations. In addition to exceptional absorption rates, small liposomal and nanoemulsified particles enhance lymphatic circulation, helping to bypass digestive enzymes and breakdown in the liver. The liposomes in this formula contain pure phosphatidylcholine, a phospholipid that is the primary building block of all cell membranes.Quicksilver Delivery Systems®Utilizes modern science to unleash the curative power of nature. With the world’s most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific supplements can help to nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.The Quicksilver Scientific Health SystemThe Quicksilver Health System is the result of Dr. Christopher Shade’s extensive research on liposomal detoxification methods. Dr. Shade has designed Quicksilver Scientific products around a groundbreaking detoxification concept that identifies the inhibition/elimination of toxicity, allergy, and infection as the key to a body in a natural and healthy state.The road to inhibition of these factors has three steps: Restore, Maintain, and Advance.You can read more about The Quicksilver Scientific Health System here.How to use: The correct directions can be found on the label which can be found on the QS product website.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Wellness Code® Muscle Strength & Restore Formula
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:As we age, muscle mass naturally diminishes, leading to decreased strength, mobility, and overall health. Muscle Strength & Restore Formula can help combat this! The formula provides 3,000 mg of HMB (a bioactive leucine metabolite) and 1,000 IU of vitamin D3 per serving, is supporting muscle maintenance and growth. Incorporate this convenient, flavorless powder into your daily routine by mixing it with water, your preferred beverage, or any of our protein shake mixes.Why it works:Maintaining skeletal muscle health requires keeping a balance between muscle growth (anabolism) and muscle breakdown (catabolism). As we age, our ability to rebuild muscle slows down, even when all the right amino acids (muscle-building blocks) are present.It is, however, possible to counteract such age-induced loss of muscle mass and strength by dietary supplementation. And this is where HMB (β-hydroxy β-methylbutyrate) and Vitamin D3 come into play:HMB amino acid leucine. HMB has been shown to help maintain muscle function and support muscle growth, especially for those over age 65. HMB has beneficial effects on muscle mass by helping to preserve the structural integrity of your muscles and supporting muscle growth. Furthermore, it also supports performance for both resistance and endurance training.Vitamin D3 also has well-documented benefits for muscle health and healthy bone density. Moreover, vitamin D3 promotes both the metabolism and healthy muscle function. Vitamin D also supports healthy mitochondrial function and energy consumption, which can also contribute to promoting muscle strength. Furthermore, vitamin D helps inhibit inflammatory factors that affect muscle health as well.Wellness Code™ Muscle Strength and Restore Formula is an excellent addition to your daily health regimen, regardless if you exercise regularly or not. Because keeping your muscles strong is important for everyone, the formula fits people of all ages.The science behind the product:Researchers have carried out several studies on HMB's muscle-building abilities.HMB's effect on muscle recoveryIn one such study, researchers tested if HMB played a role in preventing loss of muscle mass. As it happens, prolonged bed rest can result in a loss of muscle mass. Researchers, therefore, tested this by examining how quickly test subjects recovered muscle mass after they had been confined to their bed for ten days.The study was a randomized placebo-controlled study of both men and women. After the ten days of bed confinement, test subjects had to conduct eight weeks of rehabilitation training in the form of resistance training. Each group took either 3g a day of HMB or a placebo for 5 days before bed rest, up until the end of the study. The placebo group lost lean mass (that's muscle) during bed rest, but those given HMB during bed rest showed no such decline.HMB's effect on resistance trainingIn another randomized placebo-control trial, men and women received 3 g a day of HMB, or a placebo and trained for 4 weeks.At the end of the study, the HMB group had a greater increase in upper body strength than the placebo group. In another clinical study, supplementation with 3 g a day of HMB for 9 weeks provided a substantial benefit to lower-body strength when combined with resistance training.HMB's effect on muscle health in advanced ageStudies also indicate that HMB is useful to older people. In a 24-week, randomized, placebo-controlled study, adults 65 years and older were divided into two groups: one that exercised regularly and one that didn’t exercise at all.Both groups took either 3 g of HMB twice a day or a placebo. The non-exercise group that took HMB showed signs of improved muscle health. However, the exercise group's results were even better; they improved measurements of muscle function and lean mass.How to use: Mix one scoop with approximately 8 oz cold water or beverage of choice in a shaker cup or blender (preferably with your protein shake).Drink one shake daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Circadian Sleep
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Circadian rhythms influence every aspect of health – from sleep patterns and heart rate to blood pressure, hormone release, brain function, and even weight regulation. Nearly every cell in our body has an internal “clock” that responds to changes in light perception and exposure, helping create our circadian rhythm and our own inner body clocks. 'When the circadian rhythm is brought out of balance, you not only have trouble sleeping. A circadian balance that is “out of tune” for longer periods of time can also affect your overall health negatively because good sleep and a healthy circadian rhythm are so essential to good health. Circadian Sleep is a formula that uses a specially developed mix of melatonin and citrus peel extract to support normal circadian rhythms that help you sleep well and promote whole body health. Why it works:Your body clock (circadian rhythm) is best known for being an internal timekeeper that regulates your sleep-wake cycle. The body has two types of clocks that respond to this circadian rhythm, and they work together to manage all of the body’s systems:1) The central clock in the brain controls sleep, wakefulness, body temperature, and hormones according to the time of day.2) In addition, our individual cells contain a peripheral clock that regulates many critical biological processes, including liver function, blood pressure, new cell growth, and the release of hormones.However, aging, a hectic lifestyle, and many other factors can contribute to the disruption of both of your circadian cycles. Over time, this can affect your overall health. Circadian Sleep has been developed to help restore and reset both types of circadian rhythms, using two ingredients. While MicroActive® Melatonin targets the central body clock in your brain, nobiletin citrus peel extract can promote a healthy peripheral circadian rhythm in your organs. By using these two ingredients, Circadian Sleep can promote a body clock (circadian rhythm) in balance. Healthy sleep-wake cycles promote brain health and contribute to overall health. The science behind the product: Melatonin for central clock support The central clock in the brain operates on light detected through the eyes. With the first light of day, our body turns on the systems, ready for activity. With the arrival of nightfall, our systems begin to shut down and prepare for sleep. This activity is regulated in part through secretions of the sleep hormone melatonin from your brain’s pineal gland. This release of melatonin helps normalize hormone and neurotransmitter functions controlled by the brain and its central clock. Science has shown that the hormone melatonin plays a critical role in keeping the central clock in sync with the environment and can restore our circadian rhythms through healthful sleep. The central clock, in turn, aligns the peripheral clock, which thereby also supports whole-body health. When melatonin output is inadequate, it can result in sleep trouble. Nobiletin for healthy peripheral circadian rhythms Almost all cells in your body have their own circadian rhythm. The cellular circadian rhythm is also known as the peripheral circadian clock. Its pace is being set by the central circadian rhythm because it regulates your sleep-wake cycles.Nobiletin (a polyethoxylated flavone) is a compound that has been derived from the peel of young citrus fruits. Nobiletin is an interesting compound in relation to circadian rhythm support because it can activate a unique set of bodily regulators.It has also been shown to offer antioxidant protection to brain cells, which promotes brain health. Furthermore, it has also been shown to promote a healthy inflammatory response in the body. Pre-clinical studies have shown that nobiletin can help regulate peripheral circadian rhythms. It does so by activating unique receptors, which are known to play a role in regulating circadian rhythms, that exist throughout the body. Nobiletin has also been shown to promote whole-body health. In another pre-clinical study, nobiletin helped regulate the expression of a certain set of genes. This particular set of genes helps control the expression of other genes that control circadian rhythms in almost every cell in the body. This, in turn, supports a healthy metabolism, as well as liver, kidney, and brain health. It also helps maintain healthy blood pressure, cholesterol, and triglyceride levels. How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, before bedtime, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Melatonin is naturally secreted from the pineal gland at night and should be taken at night for optimal results.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Senolytic Activator®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Every person in the world has senescent (aeging) cells in their body. The older you get, the more senescent cells you have. The senescent cells can gradually affect the functioning of healthy and youthful cells around them.Senolytic Activator® contains a unique mix of black tea theaflavin, the plant-derived flavonoid apigenin, and ultra-absorbable forms of the bio-flavonoids quercetin and fisetin.Why it works:When cells become old or dysfunctional, they are supposed to die off to make room for new cells. But as we age, many cells become senescent instead. Cellular senescence is other words a natural part of the aging process.However, senescent cells can accumulate over time, affecting the day-to-day function of the healthy cells around them. They pump out toxic compounds that degrade nearby cells and incite chronic inflammation that causes systemic damage. Cellular senescence has become a major target for anti-aging research, and studies show that compounds called senolytics can remove senescent cells and slow down or even reverse aging processes. (1)The senolytics black tea theaflavins, apigenin, quercetin, and fisetin all target different biological pathways, helping to manage senescent cells. (2-4)Moreover, senolytic research indicates that intermittent dosing in pre-clinical studies is effective at improving healthspan. (4) That’s why Senolytic Activator instructions call for taking just three vegetarian capsules, once a week!The science behind the product:Senolytic Activator contains a unique combination of ingredients that offer a strategy for fighting senescent cells.Theaflavin – reducing the senescent cell burdenTheaflavins are compounds derived from Camellia sinensis (tea plant). Theaflavins have widespread health benefits, supporting healthy cell division and healthy inflammatory response. (5, 6)New research indicates that theaflavins may be especially helpful for reducing senescent cell burden. In pre-clinical models, theaflavins helped powerfully inhibit the accumulation of particular cell senescence biomarkers. (2)Quercetin – promoting cellular healthQuercetin can support endothelial and cardiovascular health, promote healthy immune function and more. (7, 8) The value of quercetin has been recognized for some time. But its potential to meaningfully impact whole body rejuvenation is just starting to be uncovered through its senolytic activity.The discovery that quercetin is a senolytic compound has drawn significant attention to this unique approach to combat aging. (4)Standard quercetin is hard to absorb. But this formulation features our new quercetin phytosome, a phospholipid sphere that encases the quercetin, aiding in its absorption and making it up to 50 times more bioavailable.Easy-to-absorb fisetin – boosting longevity at the cellular levelFisetin is terrific for whole-body health. It’s a powerful senolytic compound, meaning it can actively target senescent cells, the ones that no longer function optimally.Fisetin can help encourage the body’s natural pathways for clearing senescent cells, which allows healthy cells to flourish. (9)Another important aspect of cellular longevity is sirtuin function. Sirtuin proteins keep your cells performing at their best, but sirtuin activity declines with age. (10) Fisetin has been shown in preclinical studies to encourage youthful, healthy sirtuin function. (11-15)But during digestion, much of fisetin is rapidly converted into other compounds by a process called conjugation. That’s why we protected fisetin by combining it with galactomannans, a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seed.Doing so makes it up to 25 times more readily available than standard fisetin. (16) That means it circulates in your system longer and your body has more time to access fisetin’s many health benefits.Apigenin – a powerful additionApigenin, a natural flavonoid, is a powerful addition to Senolytic Activator® formula. Quercetin, fisetin, and theaflavins from black tea target senescent cells, but not all of them.The remaining senescent cells create compounds known collectively as the Senescence Associated Secretory Phenotype, or SASP. (17) Apigenin can help inhibit remaining senescent cells from making SASP to support cellular and tissue health, a critical aspect of healthy aging. (18)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: As you age, senescent cells accumulate in your body and can negatively impact the function of healthy cells surrounding them. Senolytic Activator® delivers a powerful combination of bioactive compounds designed to help your body address aging cells and promote cellular rejuvenation. This formula combines highly absorbable forms of quercetin and fisetin with black tea theaflavins and apigenin. Together, these ingredients can support your body's natural ability to manage senescent cells, promoting youthful cellular function and whole-body vitality.

Why this formula works: As cells age or become damaged, they should naturally die off to allow new cells to flourish. However, with aging, many cells enter a senescent state instead of dying off. These aging cells don't function properly and release harmful compounds that trigger inflammation and damage nearby healthy cells. Cellular senescence has emerged as a key target in longevity research. Compounds known as senolytics can help remove senescent cells and may slow or even reverse certain aging processes. This formula features multiple senolytics that work through different biological pathways to address senescent cells. Research suggests that intermittent dosing can be effective, which is why this formula requires just three vegetarian capsules once per week.

Backed by science: Theaflavins – targeting senescent cell burden Derived from the Camellia sinensis tea plant, theaflavins deliver broad-spectrum benefits for cellular health. These compounds encourage optimal cell division patterns and help maintain a balanced inflammatory response throughout your body. Emerging research highlights theaflavins' specific value for managing senescent cell burden. Pre-clinical studies demonstrate that theaflavins powerfully inhibit the accumulation of cellular senescence markers, making them an essential component of this anti-aging formula. Ultra-absorbable quercetin – promoting cellular rejuvenation Quercetin supports endothelial health, cardiovascular function, and robust immune system activity. While this flavonoid has long been valued for its health benefits, scientists are now discovering its potential to meaningfully impact whole-body rejuvenation through senolytic activity. Standard quercetin faces absorption challenges in the digestive system. This formula features quercetin phytosome – a phospholipid delivery system that encases quercetin to dramatically enhance uptake. Clinical studies show this advanced form delivers up to 50 times greater bioavailability compared to conventional quercetin supplements. Enhanced fisetin – encouraging cellular longevity Fisetin stands out as a particularly powerful senolytic compound that actively targets aging cells that no longer function optimally. By encouraging the body's natural pathways for clearing senescent cells, fisetin allows vibrant, healthy cells to thrive. Sirtuin proteins play a vital role in maintaining peak cellular performance, but sirtuin activity naturally declines with age. Pre-clinical research demonstrates that fisetin promotes youthful sirtuin function, supporting longevity at the cellular level. During normal digestion, much of fisetin undergoes rapid conversion through a process called conjugation, limiting its effectiveness. To protect fisetin and maximize its benefits, this formula combines it with galactomannans – specialized fibers extracted from fenugreek seeds. This innovative approach makes fisetin up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard forms, allowing it to circulate longer in your system. Apigenin – comprehensive senescent cell management Apigenin, a natural flavonoid, provides crucial complementary action to this formula. While quercetin, fisetin, and theaflavins target senescent cells effectively, some aging cells remain and continue producing harmful compounds collectively known as Senescence Associated Secretory Phenotype (SASP). Apigenin can help inhibit these remaining senescent cells from manufacturing SASP compounds. This supports cellular and tissue integrity throughout your body – a critical factor in maintaining optimal health as you age.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Cognitex® Alpha GPC
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Maintaining cognitive health is essential at any age. Cognitex® Alpha GPC is a foundational formula for healthy brain structure and function. The formula provides three nutrients that can support brain cells and cognitive function.Why it works: The essential brain nutrients in this formula are: 250 mg alpha-glyceryl phosphorylcholine (Alpha-GPC) can deliver nutrition to create the neurotransmitter acetylcholine 100 mg phosphatidylserine (PS) can support brain-cell-to-brain-cell connections 100 mg wild blueberry fruit extractThe science behind the product: Healthy levels of acetylcholine with Alpha-GPC Maintaining healthy levels of the neurotransmitter acetylcholine is essential to cognitive function. (1) Alpha-glyceryl phosphoryl choline (Alpha-GPC) is a crucial building block for the production of acetylcholine in the brain to support healthy cognition. (2-4) Phosphatidylserine supports brain cell structure and functionPhosphatidylserine (PS) is an essential component of healthy cell membranes. It's critical to brain metabolism and function and supports the communication between the brain and the cells. (5,6) PS can promote healthy cognition and memory, concentration, attention and more. (7-11) Enhance brain function with blueberryBlueberry phytonutrients can help inhibit age-related decline in cognitive and motor function. (12,13) Wild blueberry extracts have been shown to inhibit oxidative and inflammatory factors in brain cells to support memory health. (14,15)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Maintaining cognitive health is essential at any age. Cognitex® Alpha GPC is a foundational formula designed to support healthy brain structure and function. This formula provides three clinically studied nutrients that can support brain cells and cognitive function throughout your life.

Why this formula works: Are you looking to support your cognitive health as you age? This formula delivers essential brain nutrients in carefully calibrated dosages to promote optimal brain function. The essential brain nutrients in this formula include 250 mg alpha-glyceryl phosphorylcholine (Alpha-GPC) to deliver nutrition for creating the neurotransmitter acetylcholine. It also provides 100 mg phosphatidylserine (PS) to support brain-cell-to-brain-cell connections. Additionally, this formula features 100 mg wild blueberry fruit extract. Together, these three ingredients work synergistically to support your cognitive wellness.

Backed by science: Alpha-GPC for healthy acetylcholine levels Maintaining optimal levels of the neurotransmitter acetylcholine is essential to cognitive function. Alpha-glyceryl phosphoryl choline (Alpha-GPC) is a crucial building block for the production of acetylcholine in the brain to support healthy cognition. Phosphatidylserine supports brain cell structure and function Phosphatidylserine (PS) is an essential component of healthy cell membranes throughout your body. It's critical to brain metabolism and function, supporting the communication between your brain and your cells. PS can promote healthy cognition and memory, concentration, attention, and more. This makes it a valuable nutrient for maintaining mental clarity as you age. Wild blueberry enhances brain function Blueberry phytonutrients can help inhibit age-related decline in cognitive and motor function. Wild blueberry extracts have been shown to inhibit oxidative and inflammatory factors in brain cells to support memory health.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bio Quercetin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Quercetin is a highly versatile bio-flavonoid that can promote a wide variety of health aspects. But, like many phytonutrients, quercetin is difficult for the body to absorb. By combining it with fenugreek seed fibers, the bioavailability is significantly improved, compared to standard, unformulated quercetin. Why it works Quercetin has a long tradition of being used for relieving the effects of seasonal immune challenges. It is shown to promote heart health and offer support for the immune system and inflammatory response. The science behind the product Clinically backed for better bioavailability In a randomized clinical trial, bio-quercetin formulated with fenugreek fibers was compared to standard, unformulated quercetin. Results showed serum levels of total quercetin were up to 62 times higher, while free (unconjugated) quercetin reached levels up to 18 times greater. (1) Promoting cardiovascular & endothelial health Quercetin is shown to support cardiovascular health, promote endothelial function, and help maintain already-normal blood pressure. (2,3) It is also a strong antioxidant, inhibiting oxidative stress and promoting a balanced inflammatory response. (4,5) Strong immune system support Quercetin can promote a healthy immune function during seasonal challenges. In a clinical study, it helped physically fit older adults maintain a healthy immune response. (6)

Health benefits overview: Bio Quercetin can promote a remarkable range of health benefits throughout your body. This versatile bioflavonoid offers superior absorption compared to standard quercetin supplements, making it easier for you to experience its full potential. By combining quercetin with fenugreek seed fibers, the bioavailability increases dramatically. This advanced formulation can support cardiovascular wellness, immune function, and a balanced inflammatory response.

Why this formula works: Quercetin has been valued for centuries as a natural compound that helps address seasonal immune challenges. It promotes heart health while encouraging optimal immune system activity and a balanced inflammatory response throughout the body. However, standard quercetin faces a significant challenge – your body struggles to absorb it effectively. Like many phytonutrients, quercetin's benefits are limited by poor bioavailability when taken in conventional forms. That's why this formula combines quercetin with fenugreek seed fibers, creating a powerful synergy that enhances absorption. This innovative approach ensures you receive maximum benefits from every capsule.

Backed by science: Clinically proven superior bioavailability Are you getting the most from your quercetin supplement? In a randomized clinical trial, bio-quercetin formulated with fenugreek fibers was directly compared to standard, unformulated quercetin. The results were remarkable. Serum levels of total quercetin reached up to 62 times higher, while free (unconjugated) quercetin – the active form – achieved levels up to 18 times greater than conventional quercetin supplements. Cardiovascular and endothelial health support Quercetin demonstrates impressive benefits for your heart and circulatory system. Research shows it can support cardiovascular health, promote optimal endothelial function, and help maintain blood pressure levels already within the normal range. As a potent antioxidant, quercetin helps inhibit oxidative stress that can damage cells and tissues. It also promotes a balanced inflammatory response, which is essential for maintaining cardiovascular wellness over time. Robust immune system protection Your immune system works tirelessly to keep you healthy, especially during seasonal challenges. Quercetin can promote optimal immune function when you need it most. In a clinical study, quercetin helped physically fit older adults maintain a vigorous immune response. This demonstrates quercetin's value for supporting immune health across different populations and life stages.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: ArthroMax® Advanced with NT2 Collagen™ & AprèsFlex®
product.description:
Healthy joints with boswellia, collagen, glucosamine & boronThis comprehensive and innovative formula includes four clinically studied nutrients for joint support: AprèsFlex® BoswelliaThe compounds in Boswellia extract are demonstrated to bind directly to 5-LOX, an enzyme that transforms fatty acids into inflammatory factors like leukotriene B4. (1,2) Boswellia can inhibit 5-LOX activity at the cellular level. In a placebo-controlled clinical trial, Boswellia extract supported freedom of movement and helped relieve joint discomfort in just 8 weeks. (3) Another randomized clinical study found similar results with the benefits continuing for another four weeks. (4) Undenatured NT2 Collagen™NT2 Collagen™ is a form of undenatured type II collagen that can support a healthy inflammation response in tendons and cartilage. Research concludes that undenatured collagen helps relieve minor joint discomfort and encourages healthy, comfortable joint function. (5-7)One placebo-controlled, double-blind study found that undenatured type II collagen provided relief by 33% and increased joint comfort scores by 40% in just 90 days. (7) Glucosamine & BoronRandomized controlled clinical trials have shown that glucosamine helps maintain comfortable joint function and, used long-term, helps support healthy joint structure. (8,9) ArthroMax® Advanced with NT2 Collagen™ & AprèsFlex® also provides boron, a mineral that can promote healthy bones and joints.Moreover, this formula uses a special form of boron, calcium fructoborate, that in a clinical trial promoted joint function and comfort. (10)

Health benefits overview: ArthroMax® Advanced with NT2 Collagen™ and AprèsFlex® combines four clinically studied nutrients designed to support your joint health, comfort, and mobility. This comprehensive formula addresses multiple aspects of joint wellness through targeted ingredients that work synergistically. The innovative blend includes AprèsFlex® boswellia extract, NT2 Collagen™ undenatured type II collagen, glucosamine, and calcium fructoborate boron. Together, these ingredients can help relieve joint discomfort, promote freedom of movement, and maintain long-term joint structure.

Why this formula works: Joint discomfort often stems from inflammatory factors and deteriorating cartilage that impact your daily activities and quality of life. This formula targets these underlying causes through multiple complementary mechanisms to provide comprehensive support. AprèsFlex® boswellia extract works by binding to the 5-LOX enzyme, helping to inhibit the production of inflammatory compounds like leukotriene B4. NT2 Collagen™ can support a balanced inflammatory response in tendons and cartilage at the cellular level. Glucosamine helps maintain comfortable joint function and, when used long-term, can support the structural integrity of your joints. Are you ready to experience improved mobility and comfort in your daily movements?

Backed by science: AprèsFlex® boswellia for inflammation balance The compounds in boswellia extract bind directly to 5-LOX, an enzyme that transforms fatty acids into inflammatory factors. Clinical research demonstrates this mechanism can inhibit 5-LOX activity at the cellular level, addressing inflammation where it originates. In a placebo-controlled clinical trial, boswellia extract supported freedom of movement and helped relieve joint discomfort in just 8 weeks. Another randomized study found similar results, with benefits continuing for an additional four weeks beyond the initial trial period. NT2 Collagen™ for cartilage and tendon support NT2 Collagen™ is an undenatured form of type II collagen that can support optimal inflammatory response in tendons and cartilage. Research concludes that undenatured collagen helps relieve minor joint discomfort and encourages comfortable, functional joint movement. One placebo-controlled, double-blind study found that undenatured type II collagen provided relief by 33% and increased joint comfort scores by 40% in just 90 days. Could your joints benefit from this clinically validated support? Glucosamine for structural integrity Randomized controlled clinical trials demonstrate that glucosamine helps maintain comfortable joint function. When used consistently over time, it can support healthy joint structure, providing long-term benefits for your mobility and comfort. Boron for bone and joint strength This formula includes calcium fructoborate, a special form of boron that can promote optimal bone and joint health. Clinical trials show this mineral supports joint function and comfort, enhancing the overall effectiveness of the comprehensive formula.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Fast-C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Fast-C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome provides a very potent antioxidant formula that can amplify all the positive health impacts that vitamin C has on the body. The ingredients are delivered in an ultra-absorbable formula containing quercetin for extra antioxidant support. Moreover, a calcium-magnesium blend offers protection for sensitive stomachs, making this an ideal product for anyone wanting a super-charged vitamin C or antioxidant formula.Why it works:Vitamin C is a potent natural antioxidant that has a profound impact on whole-body health benefits. This essential nutrient supports immune health, heart health, iron uptake, collagen formation, and more. Moreover, Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome also contains quercetin which helps inhibit oxidative stress caused by free radicals and also inhibits inflammation [4,5].Quercetin also promotes both cardiovascular and endothelial health and helps maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range [6-11].The fact that Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome contains both quercetin and vitamin C, makes it an ideal vitamin C supplement since quercetin complements vitamin C’s whole-body health benefits.Furthermore, our innovative bio-quercetin ingredient in this supplement is encased in a phytosome - a tiny phospholipid sphere that makes it up to 50 times more bioavailable than traditional quercetin [12].Our Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome also contains calcium and magnesium which neutralizes acid. This makes Fast C® the ideal vitamin C supplement for people with acid-sensitive stomachs.Lastly, Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome also contains piperine which is a substance found in black pepper that augments the absorption and bioavailability of nutrients like vitamin C [13].The science behind the product:Research has been done on vitamin C and it has shown that vitamin C can be a powerful antioxidant [15-22]. It can scavenge free radicals, can provide protection from oxidative stress [3-10]. Vitamin C can also stimulate iron absorption [23, 24]. Furthermore, it can also participate in the formation of collagen that supports arterial walls, skin, bones and teeth [17-19]. Vitamin C also plays a role in protection against environmental and physical stresses such as ingestion of heavy metals [24-29], cigarette smoking [30-33], compromised immunity [34-41] and extreme temperatures [29, 42-44].There is a scientific evidence that specialized compounds in fruits and vegetables provide critical protection against free radical assault [45]. Quercetin is a bioflavonoid found in grape skins, onions, apples, buckwheat and other food sources.Quercetin has a long tradition of use relieving the effects of seasonal immune challenges, and has been shown in clinical trials to encourage a healthy immune response in physically fit adults [46, 47] Quercetin helps inhibit oxidative stress and inflammation [48,49]. Quercetin also promotes both cardiovascular and endothelial health and helps maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range [50-55].How to use: Take one (1) tablet once or twice daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Caution: Do not take more than 15 mg per day of Bioperine®.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Discomfort Relief
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Millions of people experience periods of physical discomfort (1). Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) is a unique fatty acid shown help inhibit occasional discomfort. (2)This compound naturally produced by your body. Discomfort Relief provides 600 mg of PEA into a easy-to-use, chewable tablet. Why it works:When you experience physical discomfort, your body is telling you that something is wrong. Repeated occasional physical discomforts can be debilitating and lower the quality of life. So while one should always pay close attention to such discomforts, there are two things that one can do to inhibit them. One can always address the underlying cause of physical discomforts as well as turn off discomfort signaling in the body.Discomfort Relief combines PEA in convenient chewables with a berry flavour. Simply eat one or two tablets per day if you experience occasional physical discomfort and minor pain. The science behind the product:The efficacy of PEA has been demonstrated in multiple clinical trials (3-5). For example: In a controlled trial that randomized 636 patients to placebo or PEA for three weeks, 600 mg of PEA every day significantly improved scores on assessments of relative comfort. (6) How to use: Chew one (1) tablet once or twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Do not swallow tablets whole.

product.title: Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium delivers a powerful combo of heart-friendly minerals that work in synergy to promote cardiovascular health and help maintain already healthy blood pressure levels.Get a healthy dose of both in one convenient supplement.Why it works:Supporting healthy blood pressure levels is a common health goal. Both magnesium and potassium, having been studied intensely studied, are vital for this purpose. However, many people don’t get enough of these essential minerals through their daily diet. (1-4)Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium combines the nutrients to help fill nutritional gaps and support heart health.The science behind the product:Magnesium for both immediate & sustained absorptionMagnesium plays a vital role in numerous biological processes throughout the body. It supports the health of your heart, arteries, bones, muscles, and more. (5-8) One of magnesium’s key functions is helping to maintain already healthy blood pressure by relaxing blood vessel walls and promoting optimal vascular function.It also helps inhibit inflammation to support arterial health.(2,8) Additionally, magnesium aids in the transport of potassium and calcium across cell membranes, important for maintaining a steady heart rhythm and overall cardiovascular function. (9) Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium combines magnesium oxide and magnesium citrate, delivering both fast-acting and extended release to support optimal absorption and long-lasting benefits.Potassium: Magnesium’s complement in heart healthPotassium plays a vital role in many of the same biological functions as magnesium. As a natural counterbalance to sodium, potassium promotes vasodilation, the widening of blood vessels, which supports healthy circulation. (10-12) It also helps the body eliminate excess sodium through urine, further benefiting cardiovascular health. (13) A comprehensive review of scientific evidence shows that potassium supplementation helps maintain blood pressure already within the normal range. (3,14) It’s also essential for transmitting electrical signals in the heart, supporting a steady and healthy heartbeat. (13,15) How to use: Take one (1) capsule once or twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner

Health benefits overview: Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium delivers a powerful combination of heart-friendly minerals working in synergy to promote cardiovascular health. This formula can help maintain blood pressure levels already within the healthy range. Get a balanced dose of both essential minerals in one convenient supplement designed to support your heart wellness goals.

Why this formula works: Are you getting enough magnesium and potassium in your daily diet? Supporting optimal blood pressure levels is a common health goal, and both magnesium and potassium are vital for this purpose after being extensively studied. However, many people don't obtain sufficient amounts of these essential minerals through food alone. Modern diets often fall short in delivering adequate mineral nutrition. Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium combines these nutrients to help fill nutritional gaps and encourage heart health. This targeted formula addresses a widespread dietary deficiency affecting cardiovascular wellness.

Backed by science: Magnesium for immediate and sustained absorption Magnesium plays a vital role in numerous biological processes throughout your body. It encourages the health of your heart, arteries, bones, muscles, and more. One of magnesium's key functions involves helping to maintain already-healthy blood pressure by relaxing blood vessel walls and promoting optimal vascular function. It also helps inhibit inflammation to support arterial health. Additionally, magnesium aids in the transport of potassium and calcium across cell membranes. This is important for maintaining a steady heart rhythm and overall cardiovascular function. This formula combines magnesium oxide and magnesium citrate, delivering both fast-acting and extended-release forms. This dual approach can support optimal absorption and provide long-lasting benefits throughout the day. Potassium as magnesium's complement for heart health Potassium plays a vital role in many of the same biological functions as magnesium. As a natural counterbalance to sodium, potassium promotes vasodilation – the widening of blood vessels – which encourages healthy circulation. It also helps your body eliminate excess sodium through urine, further benefiting cardiovascular health. A comprehensive review of scientific evidence shows that potassium supplementation helps maintain blood pressure already within the normal range. Potassium is also essential for transmitting electrical signals in the heart, supporting a steady and healthy heartbeat. The synergy between potassium and magnesium makes them ideal partners for cardiovascular support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: LipoCalm®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:LipoCalm® is a refined blend of botanicals and pure plant-based ingredients that can support your body’s natural relaxation response, helping create a calm mind and relaxed body.Why it works:The neurotransmitter GABA (gamma-aminobutyric acid) inhibits or slows down nerve impulses, and supplementation has been found to increase calming alpha-wave patterns during challenging mental tasks.Naturally sourced GABA has been shown to promote relaxation and reduce the time to fall asleep, as well as increase the time spent in deep sleep. Furthermore, it also promotes a healthy sleep cycle.LipoCalm® is a botanical-rich blend of skullcap extract, passionflower, pure Blue Egyptian chamomile oil, and the calming neurotransmitter GABA (as PharmaGABA®). For those who are sensitive to melatonin, this melatonin-free formula can be very helpful in promoting a calm mind, a relaxed body, and a restful night’s sleep.Because traditional oral formulations of botanicals may have low bioavailability, Quicksilver Scientific® developed liposomal LipoCalm®. Liposomal delivery systems protect molecules from breakdown while enabling more rapid uptake.The science behind the product:Quicksilver Delivery Systems® uses modern science to unleash the curative power of nature.With the world’s most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific® supplements can help to nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.Each 2 mL of liposomal LipoCalm® delivers 350 mg of a proprietary blend of gamma-aminobutyric acid (as PharmaGABA®), liquid skullcap herb extract (scutellaria lateriflora), Liquid Passion Flower extract (passiflora incarnata), and blue chamomile flower oil.A serving size is 4 pumps. Each bottle contains 25 servings.Enjoy day or night when relaxation is needed.How to use: Take 4 pumps as needed. Hold in mouth for 30-90 seconds before swallowing. May be mixed into water. Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional.Best taken on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before meals.Use within 60 days of opening.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Clear Way Cofactors®
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:This proprietary blend of concentrated botanical extracts, enzymes, and vitamins contains unique cofactors that may support detoxification. A diverse array of nutrients are designed to activate your metal detoxification pathways and stimulate natural antioxidants.Why it Works:The botanicals in this product include an Indian superfruit; herbs that are known to be neuroprotective and neuroregenerative as well as fruits and barks with impressive ability to support glutathione synthesis. In addition to the comprehensive cellular protection delivered by the antioxidants in this formula, high-potency nattokinase is included to help break down biofilms which are local colonizations of the body with microorganisms. Biofilms may impair detoxification and absorption of nutrients.Moreover, this product also contains R-Lipoic Acid, vitamin B1, vitamin B5, vitamin B6 and selenium for further protection. The Science Behind the Product:Every 3 capsules of Clear Way Cofactors® contain a potent proprietary blend of highly concentrated extracts of:Pine Bark Haritaki Pomegranate Gotu Kola Bacopa Dandelion Root Bladderwrack Nattokinase It also contains R-Lipoic Acid, vitamins B1, vitamin B5, vitamin B6 and selenium How to Use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Super K
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin K1, K2, MK-4 and MK-7 found in Super K can contribute to fighting against age-related calcification of arteries and your heart, and can simultaneously promote bone health.Why it works:Vitamin K supports bones and fights arterial calcification but it can be difficult to sustain sufficient vitamin K. (1-5) If you are on a diet which limits your intake of vitamin K rich food sources such as meat, egg yolks, dairy, and leafy green vegetables, taking a Vitamin K supplement is essential to your health.Furthermore, Super K can make it easier to get enough vitamin K. It does this by including vitamin K1, two forms of vitamin K2, MK-4 and MK-7. The MK-4 form is the most rapidly absorbed type of vitamin K. Combining these two forms of vitamin K2 provides both rapid and sustained absorption of this critical nutrient, so your healthy blood levels are maintained throughout the day. This K2 complex, plus a strong dose of K1, makes this comprehensive formula an excellent way to get your vitamin K.The science behind the product:Sometimes it can be challenging to obtain enough vitamin K2 through the diet. However, the effects of getting sufficient amounts of vitamin K should not be underestimated. Researchers in Rotterdam conducted a large clinical trial study on heart health, about vitamin K2. 4,800 study participants were enrolled in the seven-year-long study. (6,7)It was revealed that people with proper intake of vitamin K2 had a 57% lower chance of dying from heart disease when compared to people who consumed much less vitamin K2. (6,7)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Super K combines vitamin K1, K2 (MK-4), and K2 (MK-7) to help fight age-related calcification of arteries and your heart. Simultaneously, this comprehensive formula can promote bone health by directing calcium to where your body needs it most.

Why this formula works: Are you getting enough vitamin K to support your bones and cardiovascular system? Vitamin K supports bones and helps fight arterial calcification, but it can be difficult to sustain sufficient vitamin K levels through diet alone. If your diet limits vitamin K-rich food sources such as meat, egg yolks, dairy, and leafy green vegetables, taking a vitamin K supplement becomes essential to your health. Super K makes it easier to get enough vitamin K by including vitamin K1, plus two forms of vitamin K2: MK-4 and MK-7. The MK-4 form is the most rapidly absorbed type of vitamin K. Combining these two forms of vitamin K2 provides both rapid and sustained absorption of this critical nutrient, so your blood levels are maintained throughout the day.

Backed by science: Rotterdam study demonstrates vitamin K2 cardiovascular benefits Sometimes it can be challenging to obtain enough vitamin K2 through diet alone. However, the benefits of getting sufficient amounts of vitamin K should not be underestimated. Researchers in Rotterdam conducted a large clinical trial study on heart health and vitamin K2. Nearly 4,800 study participants were enrolled in the seven-year-long study. It revealed that people with proper intake of vitamin K2 had a 57% lower chance of dying from heart disease when compared to people who consumed much less vitamin K2.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: BioActive Complete B-Complex, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Get the most of one of nature’s best metabolism and energy supporters: Vitamin B. BioActive Complete B-Complex offers a wide spectrum of the benefits that different types of vitamin B can provide in just two vegetarian capsules – and that at a much higher potency than many regular vitamin B supplements. From metabolic support to supporting heart- and nerve health, the versatility of vitamin B makes it a true nutritional wonder. The product contains all of the many health benefits associated with vitamin B in a single formula.Why it works:Your body needs B vitamins to help release energy from the foods you eat, such as carbohydrates, fat and protein. In other words, B vitamins help to optimize the conversion from foods to energy in your system. (1-3) BioActive Complete B-Complex packs a punch of different types of vitamin B, making sure that you can get all the benefits that vitamin B can provide your body. It provides a high potency at dosages that are scientifically studied and formulated with bioactive forms of every single nutrient found in BioActive Complete B-Complex, which ultimately can help inhibit vitamin B deficiency and provide you with an unparalleled product.The science behind the product:Vitamins participate in many critical metabolic functions in the body. Folic acid and Vitamin B12 play a role in red blood cell production. (2)BioActive Complete B-complex can help to maintain proper organ function and provide other important benefits. This is why you should choose this vitamin B complex to receive the ideal dose of daily B-vitamins.BioActive Complete B-Complex contains:Thiamine (vitamin B1 converts food into usable energy for your body, playing an essential role in metabolism.Riboflavin (vitamin B2) is converted to its active form called riboflavin-5'-phosphate which the body uses for energy production. It also provides antioxidant activity.Niacin (vitamin B3) helps produce hormones and supports healthy energy transfer reactions within the cells. It also affects healthy metabolism of glucose, fat, and alcohol. Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels.Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) promotes the synthesis of hemoglobin (red blood cells), hormones, neurotransmitters, and the oxidation of carbohydrates and fatty acids.Pyridoxine HCI & Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate (vitamin B6) helps metabolize amino acid and fat. Along with vitamin B5, it produces neurotransmitters and hemoglobin (red blood cells). Additionally, B6 also plays a role in gluconeogenesis, the formation of glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.Biotin (vitamin B7) regulates gene expression and is required for the metabolism of fatty acids and carbohydrates. Moreover, it plays a role in maintaining metabolic homeostasis or the balance between your body's many unique chemical pathways and processes.Folate/folic acid (vitamin B9, or for superior absorption, 5-MTHF) is vital for cell growth, amino acid metabolism, production of red and white blood cells, healthy cell division, and proper fetal growth and development to reduce the risk of birth defects. It also helps your body make and maintain healthy DNA. Furthermore, BioActive Complete B-Complex contains the compound para-aminobenzoic acid (PABA), which can encourage the synthesis of folic acid.Vitamin B12 (cobalamin or methylcobalamin) is important for neurological function, heart health, development of red blood cells, production of DNA, and promoting healthy homocysteine levels. Methylcobalamin is the form of B12 that is biologically active in the brain. (4-7)Inositol (vitamin B8) is essential for calcium transduction and healthy blood sugar levels and may improve mood. It's actually not a vitamin, but has vitamin-like properties and is often added to higher-quality B-complex supplements.Please note: This formula has been aligned with European standards for food supplements, ensuring the maximum dosage of ingredients permitted in the Netherlands and other EU countries.How to use:Take two (2) capsules daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Two-Per-Day Capsules, 120 caps EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension's Two-Per-Day Capsules have the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin formula that can fit inside two daily capsules.This gives you far greater availability of the essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients than many regular store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can support your health in a myriad of ways, and they do so at a standout economical price. Why it works:Researchers have demonstrated that unless you are taking the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day, you will not fully receive their benefits, which can lead to better health and well-being.So, if you want to receive an ideal dose of vitamins every day of the year, why not take one that is worth it? The ultra-low cost of Two-Per-Day Capsules makes it a standout product on the European supplement market.Two-Per-Day Capsules pack a potent punch of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients, which can provide many different health benefits. The science behind the product:Most notably, the soy-free Two-Per-Day Multivitamin contains a bioactive form of the B-vitamin folate 5-MTHF, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more.Selenium – can promote heart and brain health, a healthy immune response, and help quench free radical activity. Two-Per-Day contains two forms of selenium: Se-methyl L-selenocysteine and sodium selenite. (1, 2)Bioactive quercetin – Two-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. (3)Vitamin D – can provide significant support for healthy bone density. Vitamin D also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it also plays a role in immunity. Insufficient intake of vitamin D can be linked to common age-related problems. (4,5)Vitamin C – it can scavenge free radicals in the body and can protect tissues from oxidative stress. Vitamin C is a vital cofactor in the formation of collagen. Collagen is a type of connective tissue that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C is also involved in supporting the immune system. This can be done by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes. These are cells that make up about 25% of all white cells in the blood. (6-8)B vitamins – your body uses several B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. Life Extension Two-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more. (9)Alpha-lipoic acid – is a universal antioxidant that can also help boost glutathione levels already in the normal range. (10-12)Bioactive 5-MTHF folate – Two-Per-Day formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. (13, 14)Mixed vitamin E tocopherols – there are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and Two-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is better than taking either nutrient alone. The formula provides more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. (15)Chromium – can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. (16)Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health – standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in our Two-Per-Day formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress.High-potency minerals, antioxidants, and extracts – a multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. Two-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron. Please note: This formulation has been aligned with EU ingredient standards for food supplements, ensuring the highest possible ingredient potency allowed in the Netherlands and other countries of the EU. How to use: Take two (2) capsules daily in divided doses with meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Two-Per-Day Capsules deliver the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin that fits into just two daily capsules. This means you receive far greater availability of essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients compared to many conventional store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can promote your health in numerous ways at an exceptional economic price. Are you looking for comprehensive daily nutrition without taking handfuls of pills?

Why this formula works: Scientific research demonstrates that unless you consume the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals daily, you won't fully experience their benefits for better health and well-being. Two-Per-Day Capsules pack a powerful combination of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients that can provide diverse health advantages. The ultra-low cost of this formula makes it a standout product on the European supplement market. Why settle for less when you can get optimal doses every day of the year?

Backed by science: This soy-free multivitamin contains bioactive forms of key nutrients, including 5-MTHF folate, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more. Each ingredient has been selected based on scientific evidence to maximize your health outcomes. Selenium for heart, brain & immune health Selenium can promote cardiovascular and cognitive wellness, encourage a robust immune response, and help neutralize free radical activity. This formula contains two forms of selenium: Se-methyl L-selenocysteine and sodium selenite for comprehensive support. Bioactive quercetin for cellular & cardiovascular health Two-Per-Day multivitamin delivers 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin forms. This powerful bioflavonoid can support cellular health, cardiovascular function, endothelial integrity, immune defenses, and more. Vitamin D for bone density & cellular regulation Vitamin D can provide significant support for optimal bone density and plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it contributes to immunity. Insufficient vitamin D intake has been linked to common age-related concerns. Vitamin C for antioxidant protection & collagen formation Vitamin C can scavenge free radicals throughout your body and protect tissues from oxidative stress. It serves as a vital cofactor in collagen formation, a connective tissue type that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C also contributes to immune system function by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes, cells that comprise about 25% of all white blood cells. B vitamins for energy metabolism Your body uses several B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fats, and proteins – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. This formula contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more for optimal metabolic support. Alpha-lipoic – antioxidant Alpha-lipoic acid is a naturally occurring compound and a universal antioxidant. It can help boost glutathione levels already within the normal range, providing comprehensive cellular protection. Bioactive 5-MTHF folate for enhanced bioavailability This formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for individuals with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. Mixed vitamin E tocopherols for oxidative stress management There are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and Two-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a balanced inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is more effective than taking either nutrient alone. The formula delivers more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. Chromium for blood sugar balance Chromium can help maintain blood sugar levels already within the healthy range, supporting your metabolic wellness. Lutein & zeaxanthin for eye health Standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in this formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress to protect your vision. High-potency minerals, antioxidants & extracts A multivitamin isn't complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. Two-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron. Please note: This formulation has been aligned with EU ingredient standards for food supplements, ensuring the highest possible ingredient potency allowed in the Netherlands and other countries of the EU. Please note: This formulation has been aligned with EU ingredient standards for food supplements, ensuring the highest possible ingredient potency allowed in the Netherlands and other countries of the EU.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

The ultra-low cost of Two-Per-Day Capsules makes it a standout product on the European supplement market.Two-Per-Day Capsules pack a potent punch of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients, which can provide many different health benefits. The science behind the product:Most notably, the soy-free Two-Per-Day Multivitamin contains a bioactive form of the B-vitamin folate 5-MTHF, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more.Selenium – can promote heart and brain health, a healthy immune response, and help quench free radical activity. Two-Per-Day contains two forms of selenium: Se-methyl L-selenocysteine and sodium selenite. (1, 2)Bioactive quercetin – Two-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. (4)Vitamin D – can provide significant support for healthy bone density. Vitamin D also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it also plays a role in immunity. Insufficient intake of vitamin D can be linked to common age-related problems. (5, 6)Vitamin C – it can scavenge free radicals in the body and can protect tissues from oxidative stress. Vitamin C is a vital cofactor in the formation of collagen. Collagen is a type of connective tissue that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C is also involved in supporting the immune system. This can be done by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes. These are cells that make up about 25% of all white cells in the blood. (7-9)B vitamins – your body uses several B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. Life Extension Two-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more. (10)Alpha-lipoic acid – is a universal antioxidant that can also help boost glutathione levels already in the normal range. (11-13)Bioactive 5-MTHF folate – Two-Per-Day formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. (14, 15)Mixed vitamin E tocopherols – there are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and Two-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is better than taking either nutrient alone. The formula provides more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. (16)Chromium – can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. (17)Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health – standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in our Two-Per-Day formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress.High-potency minerals, antioxidants, and extracts – a multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. Two-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron. Please note: This formulation has been aligned with EU ingredient standards for food supplements, ensuring the highest possible ingredient potency allowed in the Netherlands and other countries of the EU. How to use: Take two (2) capsules daily in divided doses with meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Two-Per-Day Capsules, 60 caps delivers the highest nutritional potency of any science-based multivitamin formula that fits inside two daily capsules. This comprehensive blend can provide far greater availability of essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients than many standard formulas. With bioactive ingredients working together, this formula can support your health in numerous ways at an outstanding economical price.

Why this formula works: Are you taking the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day? Research demonstrates that without optimal daily doses, you won't fully receive their potential benefits for better health and well-being. This soy-free multivitamin packs a potent combination of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients into just two capsules. The ultra-low cost makes it a standout choice on the supplement market. Most notably, Two-Per-Day Capsules contains bioactive forms of key nutrients, including 5-MTHF folate, quercetin phytosome, zinc citrate, mixed vitamin E tocopherols, and three forms of selenium for comprehensive nutritional support.

Backed by science: Selenium for heart, brain, and cellular protection Selenium promotes heart and brain health, encourages a balanced inflammatory and immune response, and helps quench free radical activity. This formula provides two forms of selenium: Se-methyl L-selenocysteine and sodium selenite. Bioactive quercetin for cellular health Two-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. Vitamin D for bone density and immune function Vitamin D can provide significant support for optimal bone density while playing a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. It also plays an important role in immunity, as insufficient intake has been linked to common age-related concerns. Vitamin C for antioxidant protection and collagen formation Vitamin C can scavenge free radicals throughout your body and protect tissues from oxidative stress. As a vital cofactor in collagen formation, vitamin C supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. It also encourages immune system function by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes, which make up about 25% of all white blood cells. B vitamins for cellular energy production Your body uses B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein for your cells to carry out daily functions. This formula contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more for optimal energy metabolism. Bioactive 5-MTHF folate for enhanced absorption The formula features 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. Antioxidant alpha-lipoic acid This naturally occurring compound is a universal antioxidant that helps maintain glutathione levels already in the normal range. Mixed vitamin E tocopherols for comprehensive protection Two-Per-Day provides all four forms of tocopherol vitamin E. Evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is more effective than either nutrient alone for biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a balanced inflammatory response. The formula delivers over 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. Chromium for blood sugar support Chromium helps maintain blood sugar levels already within the healthy range. Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health Standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in this formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress, supporting your vision as you age. High-potency minerals and trace elements A complete multivitamin requires minerals and nutrients essential to healthy living. Two-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands, plus 100 mg of magnesium, 150 mcg of iodine, and trace minerals like manganese and boron for comprehensive nutritional support. Please note: This formulation has been aligned with EU ingredient standards for food supplements, ensuring the highest possible ingredient potency allowed in the Netherlands and other countries of the EU.
