product.title: Herbal Sleep PM
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:The Herbal Sleep PM formula contains natural calming ingredients such as lemon balm, honokiol and apigenin which is found in the chamomile plant. Using natural ingredients, Herbal Sleep PM offers a hormone-free alternative sleep support formula for high-quality sleep. Why it Works:Sleep is crucial to our overall health and well-being. But many of us experience difficulty calming down, as well as falling and staying asleep after a long and demanding day. Melatonin is a hormone known for its sleep-promoting qualities —but some people don’t like supplementing with melatonin.That’s why Life Extension® has created an alternative with the melatonin-free formula Herbal Sleep PM. This formula contains all-natural ingredients, combining lemon balm, honokiol and the chamomile compound apigenin to calm the mind and promote high-quality sleep throughout the night. That way, the ingredients in the Herbal Sleep support formula contributes actively to peaceful night-time rest and revitalization. The Science Behind the Product:Scientific studies of the ingredients in the Herbal Sleep PM formula indicate that the ingredients in this formula help people fall asleep more easily and improve sleep quality, thereby offering an alternative to a melatonin-based sleep support formula: Lemon balmLemon balm is a perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been scientifically studied to help promote sleep and relaxation. In one study, 85% of subjects who took lemon balm extract for 15 days saw a significant improvement in healthy sleep, and the remaining 15% were much improved [1]. HonokiolHonokiol is a lignan compound that has been used in Asia for centuries. Pre-clinical research shows that honokiol supports the "calming" GABA receptors in the brain to promote sleep [2]. GABA receptors also affect the way the brain perceives discomfort [3]. In addition to this, pre-clinical models indicate that honokiol is quickly taken up into the brain [4]. This makes it an ideal ingredient to include in a formula designed to help you get your well-deserved rest. Apigenin-standardized chamomile extractFinally, our formula contains apigenin, a powerful botanical bioflavonoid found in chamomile. Chamomile tea is a popular choice for relaxation. Computer models as well as pre-clinical studies suggest apigenin might promote healthy sleep patterns similar to those caused by naturally-occurring neurologically active compounds in the body [5-6].Add Herbal Sleep PM to your nighttime routine and get the rest you need to stay fresh the following day. How to Use: Take one (1) capsule 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.One (1) additional capsule may be taken if needed.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Optimized Broccoli with Myrosinase
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Broccoli compounds like sulforaphane are thought to have many health benefits. However, it can be challenging to get from broccoli alone and is also notoriously difficult to take in supplement form.Optimized Broccoli with Myrosinase can offer enhanced sulforaphane bioavailability and make it easier for you to get this health-promoting nutrient.Why it works:It’s common knowledge that eating broccoli is beneficial for your health. However, it’s not easy for the body to get the benefits of broccoli’s nutrients, such as sulforaphane, because the cooking process breaks them down.Life Extension’s advanced formula contains a clinically studied combination of a glucoraphanin-rich broccoli extract and the enzyme myrosinase from white mustard seed that has demonstrated increased conversion into sulforaphane and uptake during digestion.The science behind the product:A clinical trial confirmed that supplementation with nutrient extracts can help enhance sulforaphane delivery to the body.Participants who took the broccoli seed extract combined with myrosinase (from mustard seed extract) showed an approximately 63% increase in the conversion of glucoraphanin to sulforaphane.Most subjects experienced more than a 50% increase, with some individuals seeing up to a three-fold increase! (1)How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Cognitex® Elite, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:A healthy adult brain has an astonishing 100 billion nerve cells, each of which needs specific nutrients every day in order to perform optimally. The Cognitex® Elite formula provides a comprehensive supply of specially selected nutrients that have been clinically shown to support brain health.Together, the natural ingredients in this formula can support important cognitive abilities such as attention, focus, memory, and mood and can also counteract inflammation.Why it works:Keeping your brain fit means that you have to keep it supplied with all the nutrients it needs to perform daily.Cognitex® Elite contains a state-of-the-art sage extract known as SIBELIUS™. This extract helps promote an essential neurotransmitter which can enhance communication between brain cells.With no less than five powerful, benificial nutrients and plant extracts, Cognitex® Elite offers a multifaceted approach to support your brain. By adding brain health-boosting nutrients to your diet such as, blueberries, phosphatidylserine and Uridine-5’-Monophosphate, you support key cognitive abilities.Supporting your brain has never been easier than with Cognitex® Elite!The science behind the product:Containing a true treasure trove of nutrients Cognitex® Elite is an extremely advanced brain health support formula from Life Extension®. The formula offers:SIBELIUS™: SAGE extract for attention and memorySage extract is known to promote healthy levels of the essential neurotransmitter acetylcholine and other neurochemicals needed for optimal brain function. It also supports mood and cognitive performance. (1,2)Cognitex® Elite formula uses SIBELIUS™: Sage, a novel type of sage extract, which has been clinically shown to encourage healthy brain and cognitive function. In a randomized, placebo-controlled, double-blind clinical study, SIBELIUS™: Sage improved accuracy of attention, working memory, and recognition and recall. (3) SIBELIUS™: Sage has even been clinically shown to enhance feelings of calmness and contentedness. (1)Optimal support brain cell function with phosphatidylserinePhosphatidylserine, an essential component of healthy cell membranes, is critical to brain metabolism and function and supports brain-cell-to-brain-cell communication. (4,5)It can promote healthy cognitive function, healthy memory, concentration, attention and more. (6-10)Ashwagandha for mental performance and stress managementThe ashwagandha plant (Withania somnifera) is one of the most studied Indian herbs. Clinical trials indicate that ashwagandha promotes both brain and mood health. It can increase “stress resilience,” promoting calmness and making it easier to handle daily challenges. (11-13)Ashwagandha has been clinically shown to encourage aspects of healthy memory, cognition and mental performance such as attention, executive function and information processing speed. (14,15)Blueberry for enhanced brain functionBlueberry phytonutrients can help inhibit age-related decline in cognitive and motor function. (16,17) Wild blueberry extracts have been shown to inhibit oxidative and inflammatory factors in brain cells to support memory health. (18,19) Uridine-5'-Monophosphate for healthy brain functionPre-clinical studies have found that uridine-5’-monophosphate supports the essential neurotransmitters acetylcholine and dopamine, and can encourage healthy learning and memory. (20-22)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Your brain contains approximately 100 billion nerve cells that require specific nutrients daily to function at their best. Cognitex® Elite can provide comprehensive nutritional support to help maintain optimal brain health throughout your life. This advanced formula combines five clinically studied ingredients that can promote essential cognitive abilities including attention, focus, memory, and mood. The natural nutrients in this blend can also help counteract inflammatory factors in the brain.

Why this formula works: Wondering how to keep your mind sharp as you age? Maintaining cognitive wellness requires consistent nutritional support for your brain cells. Cognitex® Elite features SIBELIUS™: SAGE, a state-of-the-art sage extract that promotes optimal levels of acetylcholine, an essential neurotransmitter. This helps enhance communication between brain cells for improved mental performance. With five powerful botanical extracts and brain-supporting nutrients working together, this formula offers a multifaceted approach to cognitive health. Adding these science-backed ingredients to your daily routine can help protect and nourish your brain.

Backed by science: Are you looking for research-backed ingredients that truly make a difference? Cognitex® Elite contains a comprehensive blend of nutrients validated by clinical studies. SIBELIUS™: SAGE extract for attention and memory Sage extract promotes optimal levels of acetylcholine and other neurochemicals needed for peak brain function. This herb can also encourage balanced mood and enhanced cognitive performance. SIBELIUS™: SAGE is a novel type of sage extract that has been clinically shown to encourage optimal brain function. In a randomized, placebo-controlled, double-blind clinical study, SIBELIUS™: SAGE improved accuracy of attention, working memory, and recognition and recall. This extract has even been clinically shown to enhance feelings of calmness and contentedness. Phosphatidylserine for optimal brain cell function Phosphatidylserine is an essential component of cell membranes and is critical to brain metabolism and function. It encourages brain-cell-to-brain-cell communication, promoting healthy cognitive abilities including memory, concentration, and attention. Ashwagandha for mental performance and stress management The ashwagandha plant (Withania somnifera) is one of the most studied Indian herbs. Clinical trials indicate that ashwagandha can promote both brain health and emotional balance. This adaptogenic herb can increase stress resilience, promoting calmness and making it easier to handle daily challenges. Ashwagandha has been clinically shown to encourage aspects of memory, cognition, and mental performance such as attention, executive function, and information processing speed. Blueberry for enhanced brain function Blueberry phytonutrients can help inhibit age-related decline in cognitive and motor function. Wild blueberry extracts have been shown to inhibit oxidative and inflammatory factors in brain cells to maintain healthy memory function. Uridine-5'-Monophosphate for brain health Pre-clinical studies have found that uridine-5'-monophosphate encourages the essential neurotransmitters acetylcholine and dopamine. This compound can promote optimal learning and memory throughout your life.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Vitamin D3, 120 softgels, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce - especially during the winter.A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.Why it works:Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. Because of weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range may be inhibited. Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 75 µg/mcg (3000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel. Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Vitamins D & K, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Your bones need a lot of nutrients to stay strong throughout your life. Vitamin D and vitamin K are both highly important for building bone tissue and thereby maintaining health. So instead of taking two different supplements, these two crucial nutrients are collected in one science-backed formula.Moreover, this formula can also support immune, heart, and brain health.Why it works:Some of the most important nutrients for maintaining bone health are vitamin D and K. These two nutrients help you to maintain bone health, even in old age. The thing is that the older you get, the more fragile your bones can become. That’s why it makes sense adding a combination of vitamin D and K to your diet so that you can keep your bones strong and youthful.Vitamins D and K are crucial for many aspects of health, including support for arterial health (vitamin K), brain health (vitamin D3), and immune health (vitamin D3).The science behind the product:The vitamin K and vitamin D in this formula have all been scientifically researched in order to meet their optimal dosages. Both in unison and individually, they offer many different health benefits:Vitamin K1 & vitamin K2Vitamin K helps inhibit calcium buildup in your arteries while promoting healthy calcium absorption into your bone matrix. Vitamin K1 is the most common form of vitamin K in the diet. It comes primarily from leafy green vegetables. However, there is a catch here as vitamin K1 isn’t well absorbed from these foods.Vitamin K2 is found in cheese, eggs, and fermented soybeans. It has been shown to be more bioavailable than K1 and to remain active in the body far longer. The MK-7 form of vitamin K2 was demonstrated to stay available in the body for up to 48 hours.This formula contains both forms of vitamin K.Vitamin D3Studies show that healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better cognitive function. And, together with vitamin K, vitamin D3 is necessary for facilitating the transportation of calcium into the bone matrix for strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D3 also plays a critical role in healthy immune function, which is why it is also a good idea to supplement with vitamin D3 in winter.Moreover, vitamin D supports cardiovascular health and encourages healthy endothelial function. As it goes to show, vitamin D3 is overall an important nutrient for both bone health and arterial health.Ensure you get enough of these two essential nutrients with Life Extension's Vitamins D & K.Please note: This vitamin D3 supplement has been reformulated in cooperation with Life Extension in the US to fit European supplementation guidelines, delivering 75 mcg (3000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per capsule.How to use: Take one (1) capsule once daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Once-Daily Health Booster, 30 gels
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Once-Daily Health Booster is the perfect nutritional complement to the bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day. Use Once-Daily Health Booster to provide additional nutrient support for your eyes, cardiovascular system, bones, and more. Once-Daily Health Booster also contains unique antioxidants which can help fight free radicals protect DNA and thereby fight the natural aging process.Why it works:Our bestselling all-round nutritional multivitamin formulas One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day brings you all the nutrients you must-have on a daily basis.But if you really want to upscale your daily nutrient intake to get additional coverage, Once-Daily Health Booster is an extension of the supplement formulas found in Life Extension Mix and One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day.In other words, Once-Daily Health Booster contains a lot of beneficial nutrients that are not found in most multivitamin supplement formulas.Taken in combination with One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day, Once-Daily Health Booster is a highly cost-effective and perfect nutritional companion to these bestselling, multivitamin supplement and nutrient products.Bringing in a variety of nutrients, Once-Daily Health Booster is a popular add-on to our science-backed multivitamin formulas and can support your eyes, promote bone- and cardiovascular health and provide additional protection against free radicals which promote the natural aging process. Furthermore, the Once-Daily Health Booster formula can also help maintain normal DNA function, promote a healthy prostate and help maintain a healthy nervous system.The science behind the product:Once-Daily Health Booster provides:Three kinds of vitamin KVitamin K1 is the most common form of vitamin K found in leafy green vegetables. Although they are healthy, many people do not enjoy these vegetables. In addition to this, vitamin K1 from these sources may be poorly absorbed. Once-Daily Health Booser formula contains 1,500 mcg of vitamin K1, the same dosage found to encourage heart health in a randomised, placebo-controlled trial. (1)Vitamin K2 comes in many forms, including MK-4 and -7. Although vitamin K2 is present in smaller amounts in the average diet, it is better absorbed and stays in the bloodstream longer than K1 vitamin. Moreover, vitamin K2 also has valuable heart and bone health benefits. (2)Menaquinone-4 (MK-4) promotes bone health. (3,4) This supplement delivers 1,000 mcg of MK-4.Trans-menaquinone-7 (MK-7) is a type of vitamin K which maintains bone strength and arterial flexibility. (5,6) This supplement delivers 100 mcg. Also, MK-7 is well-absorbed and has been found to remain in the bloodstream over a sustained period of time. (7,8) Once-Daily Health Booster provides a potent dose of a pure, ultra-absorbable form of MK-7, made with a bio-fermentation process.MacuGuard®MacuGuard® is a proprietary nutrient blend containing the compounds trans-zeaxanthin, meso-zeaxanthin, lutein, and alpha-carnotene, which provide support for the eyes. (9) Lutein is a carotenoid which is an important part of your macular pigment. Lutein helps protect the eyes from the effects of blue and ultraviolet light. (10-12) Furthermore, lutein also supports macular health. Lutein also defends against oxidative stress which can help to keep your eyes functioning youthfully over time. (12-14) Saffron helps maintain visual acuity. (15-17)Mixed tocotrienols: Life Extension’s Once-Daily Health Booster contains tocotrienols, which are special forms of vitamin E that provide potent benefits throughout the body. Tocotrienols can boost defences against oxidative stress, promote a healthy lipid profile, protect the brain and cognition and even support healthy hair growth. (18,19)D-alpha tocopherol is another form of vitamin E, which suppresses lipid peroxidation. (5, 6) Lycopene supports prostate health and also protects against LDL oxidation. (20-23) Chlorophyllin protects the DNA against environmental damage. (24-26)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Once-Daily Health Booster, 60 softgels is the perfect nutritional complement to bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day. This formula can provide additional support for your eyes, cardiovascular system, bones, and cellular health beyond standard multivitamin coverage. The advanced softgel contains unique antioxidants that can help combat free radicals, protect DNA integrity, and support your body's natural defense against the aging process. This targeted nutrient blend fills nutritional gaps that most multivitamins don't address.

Why this formula works: Bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day deliver essential nutrients you need daily for baseline health. However, if you want to elevate your nutrient intake with additional specialized coverage, this formula extends the benefits found in Life Extension Mix and standard multivitamins. Once-Daily Health Booster, 60 softgels contains beneficial nutrients not typically found in most multivitamin formulas. When taken alongside One-Per-Day or Two-Per-Day, it becomes a highly cost-effective nutritional companion to these science-backed supplements. Are you ready to maximize your wellness potential? This popular add-on can support eye health, promote bone and cardiovascular function, provide antioxidant protection, maintain normal DNA function, encourage prostate wellness, and help sustain a balanced nervous system.

Backed by science: Three forms of vitamin K Vitamin K1 is the most common form found in leafy green vegetables, though many people don't consume enough of these foods and the K1 from dietary sources may be poorly absorbed. This formula contains 1500 mcg of vitamin K1, the same dosage shown to encourage cardiovascular health in randomized, placebo-controlled trials. Vitamin K2 exists in multiple forms including MK-4 and MK-7. Although present in smaller dietary amounts than K1, vitamin K2 is better absorbed and remains in your bloodstream longer, offering valuable heart and bone health benefits. This supplement delivers 1000 mcg of menaquinone-4 (MK-4) that promotes bone health. Trans-menaquinone-7 (MK-7) maintains bone strength and arterial flexibility. The formula provides 100 mcg of this well-absorbed form that remains in your bloodstream over sustained periods, made through a bio-fermentation process for optimal purity and absorption. MacuGuard® for eye support MacuGuard® is a proprietary nutrient blend containing trans-zeaxanthin, meso-zeaxanthin, lutein, and alpha-carotene that provide comprehensive eye support. Lutein, a crucial carotenoid in macular pigment, helps protect your eyes from blue and ultraviolet light effects while supporting macular health and defending against oxidative stress to maintain youthful eye function. Saffron contributes to maintaining visual acuity, complementing the protective effects of the carotenoid blend for comprehensive vision support. Mixed tocotrienols and vitamin E Tocotrienols are special forms of vitamin E that provide potent benefits throughout your body. They can boost defenses against oxidative stress, promote optimal lipid profiles, protect brain and cognitive function, and even encourage healthy hair growth. D-alpha tocopherol, another vitamin E form, suppresses lipid peroxidation for additional cellular protection. Lycopene and chlorophyllin Lycopene supports prostate health and helps protect against LDL oxidation for cardiovascular wellness. Chlorophyllin protects DNA against environmental damage, providing an additional layer of cellular defense for long-term health maintenance.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Prenatal Advantage
product.description:
Benefits at a glance:Women who are trying to become pregnant, are already pregnant, or who are nursing have unique nutritional needs. That’s why Life Extension® has developed a science-backed prenatal nutrition formula: Prenatal Advantage. This formula provides the latest recommended dosages of vitamins and minerals (vitamin A, B, C, D3, K, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, folate, iron, iodine, zinc, selenium, copper, potassium) as well as extra nutrients like choline, lutein, zeaxanthin and DHA omega-3, which can benefit mum and her baby.Why it works:As a mother-to-be or a new mother, it’s extra important that you choose a prenatal formula that delivers all the daily nutrients that you and your baby need.The Prenatal Advantage formula from Life Extension® delivers a wealth of clinically studied nutrients that are perfectly calibrated to deliver the optimal prenatal nutrient formula:These include essential vitamins such as vitamin A, several kinds of vitamin B (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6 and B12), vitamin C, vitamin D3, vitamin K, and folate.Furthermore, this formula also offers important minerals such as iron, iodine, zinc, selenium, copper, potassium and more.And on top of that, this formula also packs additional nutrients such as DHA, lutein, zeaxanthin, and choline for good measure, as they add extra benefits.By packing all of these nutrients into one formula, Prenatal Advantage goes beyond standard prenatal nutrient coverage and offers comprehensive nutrient support – for both you and your baby!The science behind the product:Aside from a wealth of vitamins and minerals, this product also contains added nutrients that enhance nutrient coverage for both of you:DHA (docosahexaenoic acid)DHA is an omega-3 fatty acid that, among other things, promotes healthy brain and visual development. Consuming the omega-3 fatty acid type DHA during pregnancy and nursing goes a long way toward promoting healthy brain and eye development. (1)Unlike most DHA, which comes from fish oil, the DHA in our Prenatal Advantage Formula is sourced from marine algae. Lutein and zeaxanthinThis innovative prenatal formula also includes carotenoids like lutein and zeaxanthin. These valuable phytonutrients support healthy eye and brain development. (2)CholineCholine is an essential nutrient. Studies show that many pregnant and nursing women don’t get enough choline from their diets. Prenatal Advantage delivers 50% of the recommended daily choline intake to help support healthy brain and nervous system development during pregnancy. (3)How to use: Take four (4) softgels daily in divided doses with meals.

Health benefits overview: Women trying to become pregnant, those already expecting, or nursing mothers have unique nutritional needs. Prenatal Advantage delivers a science-backed prenatal nutrition formula designed specifically for these critical life stages. This formula provides the latest recommended dosages of essential vitamins and minerals, plus additional nutrients like choline, lutein, zeaxanthin, and DHA omega-3. These carefully calibrated ingredients can benefit both you and your developing baby.

Why this formula works: As a mother-to-be or new mother, choosing the right prenatal formula is extra important for ensuring you and your baby receive all necessary daily nutrients. This formula goes beyond standard prenatal coverage to deliver comprehensive nutritional support. Prenatal Advantage features clinically studied nutrients perfectly calibrated for optimal prenatal nutrition. It includes essential vitamins such as A, B-complex, C, D3, K, and bioactive folate. Furthermore, this formula delivers important minerals including iron, iodine, zinc, selenium, copper, and potassium. Additional nutrients like DHA, lutein, zeaxanthin, and choline provide extra benefits for both mother and child.

Backed by science: Beyond a comprehensive vitamin and mineral blend, this formula contains added nutrients that enhance nutritional coverage for you and your baby. DHA omega-3 from marine algae DHA is an omega-3 fatty acid that promotes healthy brain and visual development. Consuming DHA during pregnancy and nursing can significantly support optimal brain and eye development for your growing baby. Unlike most DHA supplements derived from fish oil, the DHA in Prenatal Advantage comes from marine algae. This provides a clean, sustainable source of this essential fatty acid for fetal development. Lutein and zeaxanthin for visual development This innovative prenatal formula includes carotenoids like lutein and zeaxanthin. These valuable phytonutrients support healthy eye and brain development throughout pregnancy and infancy. Choline for nervous system development Choline is an essential nutrient, yet studies show many pregnant and nursing women don't obtain adequate amounts from their diets alone. Prenatal Advantage delivers 50% of the recommended daily choline intake to help support healthy brain and nervous system development during this crucial period.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Black Cumin Seed Oil with Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Curcumin is an extract of turmeric root known to promote healthy inflammatory and immune responses.That makes it an excellent complement to black cumin seed oil, which has been shown to promote immune response and help inhibit inflammation to support whole-body health.Get your daily dose of both nutrients in this one convenient formula. Why it works:Managing a healthy immune and inflammatory response is critical for maintaining your health. Finding a way to balance these two aspects of your physiology is a very important part of maintaining optimal health.Black Cumin Seed Oil with Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract contains both black cumin seed oil and a unique curcumin extract and has been carefully developed to deliver targeted nutrient support for immune health and the inflammatory response in equal measure. Curcumin Elite™Curcumin is an extract of the turmeric root. Native to the Indian subcontinent, it has been used in Ayurvedic treatments for centuries - and for good reasons.Curcumin is a potent nutrient packed with compounds called curcuminoids. These compounds are known to help inhibit inflammation, which in turn supports a healthy heart and joint health. It also encourages a healthy immune response.The proprietary Curcumin Elite™ turmeric extract is rooted in scientific studies and has been carefully developed to deliver 45 times more free curcuminoids and over 270 times more total curcuminoids than standard turmeric extracts. That translates to more health benefits for your entire body. Black cumin seed oilBlack cumin seed oil has been shown to support the body’s healthy inflammation response. It does so by moderating the effect of critical cell-signalling chemicals and hormone-like messengersMaintaining healthy cell signalling as you age is key to both a healthy inflammatory response and immune system function.Together, the ingredients in Black Cumin Seed Oil and Curcumin Elite™ from Life Extension® can help you maintain a healthy immune system while promoting a healthy inflammation response with a single capsule/product.Coming in two daily easy-to-swallow softgels, this formula allows you to support both of these important health aspects with a convenient supplement formula. The science behind the product:The active ingredients in this science-backed formula have been scientifically studied to provide the optimal dosage that this formula can offer. All ingredients have been chosen for this formula to offer science-backed support for the immune system and the inflammatory response.Black cumin seed oil supports the body’s natural defences by encouraging the optimal function of a healthy immune system. It does so by helping to maintain the vital defensive activities of macrophages and helper T-cells that work together to bolster your immune system.Furthermore, curcumin promotes immune system health and supports a healthy inflammatory response.The free curcuminoids in turmeric extract, which is also part of this formula, support the body’s healthy inflammation response as well.Moreover, they also help inhibit inflammatory factors like arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase, and cytokine compounds to support heart health, brain health, and whole-body health. How to use: Take one (1) softgel twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract, 30 caps
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Turmeric root contains compounds known as curcuminoids which offer a wealth of health benefits. Because this formula supports more curcuminoids and higher absorbability than standard curcumin, this formula can "amplify" the health benefits for your heart, mind, joints, cardiovascular system, immune health, and more.Why it works:Curcuminoids are compounds in curcumin that have multiple health benefits. They help inhibit inflammation to support joint health and vital organ health, promote a healthy immune response, support cardiovascular health and encourage heart health and more. But the total amount of free curcuminoids delivered by standard curcumin supplements is low.Life Extension® has spent years searching for a superior, more available form of curcumin. Now, they have developed the powerful Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract formula, which delivers the maximum health benefits of curcuminoids.It does so, by using sophisticated technologies that protect curcuminoids during digestion and deliver more free curcuminoids per dose.The tricky part about delivering curcumin that can be used by the body is that curcuminoid compounds undergo conjugation once they enter the body.This a normal chemical reaction where one compound attaches to another. However, the conjugation of curcuminoids is problematic, because conjugated curcuminoids do not necessarily provide the same health benefits as non-conjugated ones. (1,2).This formula protects curcuminoids from conjugation by combining curcumin with a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seeds called galactomannans. That way, it enhances both the availability and absorbability of curcuminoids so that you can enjoy all of the wonderful health benefits that this turmeric extract provides.The science behind the product:Clinical and pre-clinical data shows that combining curcuminoids with galactomannans produces 45.5 times more bioavailability and broader distribution of free curcuminoids compared to unformulated, standardised products. (3,4)In one clinical study, more than 70% of total plasma curcuminoids were still in their free form five hours after they had been ingested. (4)Several studies have shown or indicated that this type of turmeric extract can have multiple health benefits, which include:Inhibiting inflammationTurmeric extract inhibits inflammatory factors and thereby promotes joint health and vital organ health. (5,6) Moreover, it also inhibits the metabolism of several compounds that can enhance the inflammatory response. These include arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase and cytokines. By inhibiting the activities of these compounds, this turmeric extract promotes a healthy inflammation response. (7-9)Brain health and immune system healthCurcumin extract inhibits inflammatory factors in the body and thereby promotes immune system health. (10-12) It can also benefit your mind: studies indicated that it supports brain health by supporting a healthy brain function and even offers neuro-protective benefits as well. (7,13-15)Digestive, joint health and pancreatic healthEvidence suggests that this turmeric extract helps promote healthy bowel function and joint health. (16-19) It also supports healthy pancreatic function by encouraging pancreatic islet health. (7,20)Cellular support against free radicals Curcumin also provides cellular protection by offering support from antioxidants. (5, 21-23) Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range, inhibits inflammation to promote cardiovascular health and more. (7,24)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Mood Improve
product.description:
Health benefits with a glance FLORASSIST® Mood Improve combines innovative probiotics Lactobacillus helveticus strain R0052 and Bifidobacterium longum strain R0175 with a standardized saffron extract to support emotional health and help maintain a balanced mood. Why it works:How you feel is closely related to digestive health because of the bi-directional communication between the gut (gastrointestinal tract) and the brain.A dual-probiotic combination has been demonstrated to influence this connection by enhancing a healthy mental outlook and promoting natural relaxation. The science behind the product:Emotional health & probioticsClinical and pre-clinical studies indicate that gut microbes can support mood and behavior by affecting the gut-brain axis (GBA), a complex communication network that links your gut with your brain. And the two probiotics in this formula are particularly effective for your emotional health support. In two randomized controlled trials, participants taking a blend of Lactobacillus helveticus Rosell-52 and Bifidobacterium longum Rosell-175 reported significant improvements in mood, reduction in perceived stress, and emotional balance support as compared to placebo. (1,2) These strains showed relieved stress-related gastrointestinal discomfort as well. (3) Standardized saffron extract Life Extension® has developed a proprietary extract of the popular spice saffron that is standardized for the two compounds safranal and crocin because compelling research indicates saffron compounds promote mood health. Meta-analyses of up to eight trials have found that the use of saffron extract is associated with improved mood test scores relative to placebo or active controls. (4-7) The highest level of standardization in the above clinical studies was 11% for crocin and 2% for safranal. Since those concentrations are not readily available on the market, Life Extension® worked with saffron sources to create a proprietary blend specifically for this formulation.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: H2 Elite, 60 tabs
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:H2 Elite delivers molecular hydrogen, one of nature’s most targeted and powerful antioxidants. The quick-dissolving tablet turns water into a refreshing, lightly fizzy drink that can support energy, fight oxidative stress, and encourage a balanced inflammatory response, promoting daily recovery and resilience any time you need it.Why it works:H2 Elite is a highly bioavailable formula that can offer:Antioxidant protection, neutralizing oxidative stress and safeguarding cells from damage.Cellular boost, supporting mitochondrial function and energy production.Recovery & resilience, promoting a healthy inflammatory response for daily vitality.Rapid & refreshing, delivering high-quality molecular hydrogen in a convenient, fast-dissolving tablet. It’s an easy way to access the benefits of hydrogen therapy and support your health from the inside out. The science behind the product:An important aspect of having a healthy body is to get rid of free radicals. Antioxidants are abundant in youthful human bodies but markedly declines with age. An imbalance between free radicals and antioxidants can lead to a general state of oxidative stress that can damage lipids, proteins, DNA, and cell mitochondria. Research even suggests that minimizing free radical activity by increasing the number of antioxidants can play a role in extending life. Certain studies have shown that people who live to be a hundred years old or more often have higher antioxidant levels in blood samples than in younger people.H2 Elite provides a potent dose of molecular hydrogen, one of nature’s purest antioxidants. Hydrogen molecules are so small that they easily enter the cells. Once inside the cells, they can inhibit specific free radicals and turn them into water. Hence, the free radicals are easily flushed out of the body.Because H2 Elite hydrogen tablets are easily dissolved in non-carbonated liquids, they are also very easy to use.How to use:Drop tablet in any 8-12 oz non-carbonated beverage.Wait until the tablet has completely dissolved before consuming. Suggested use on empty stomach, repeat up to four times daily based on individual needs. Drink as soon as possible for best results.Do not swallow tablet.

Health benefits overview: H2 Elite, 60 tabs delivers molecular hydrogen, one of nature's most targeted and powerful antioxidants. The quick-dissolving tablet turns water into a refreshing, lightly fizzy drink that can help you combat oxidative stress and maintain daily vitality. This formula can encourage a balanced inflammatory response while promoting recovery and resilience whenever you need it. Are you looking for natural antioxidant protection that works at the cellular level?

Why this formula works: H2 Elite is a highly bioavailable formula that can offer powerful antioxidant protection by neutralizing oxidative stress and safeguarding your cells from damage. It provides a cellular boost, supporting mitochondrial function and energy production throughout your body. The formula promotes recovery and resilience by encouraging a balanced inflammatory response for daily vitality. Delivering high-quality molecular hydrogen in a convenient, fast-dissolving tablet, it's an easy way to access the benefits of hydrogen therapy. This refreshing approach can help you maintain optimal wellness from the inside out. Your cells receive targeted antioxidant support exactly where it's needed most.

Backed by science: Molecular hydrogen for antioxidant protection An important aspect of maintaining wellness is eliminating free radicals from your body. Antioxidants are abundant in youthful bodies but decline markedly with age. An imbalance between free radicals and antioxidants can lead to oxidative stress that damages lipids, proteins, DNA, and cell mitochondria. Research suggests that minimizing free radical activity by increasing antioxidants may play a role in supporting longevity. Certain studies have shown that people who live to be one hundred years old or more often have higher antioxidant levels in blood samples than younger individuals. How hydrogen molecules work in your cells H2 Elite, 60 tabs provides a potent dose of molecular hydrogen, one of nature's purest antioxidants. Hydrogen molecules are so small that they easily enter cells where conventional antioxidants may struggle to reach. Once inside your cells, hydrogen molecules can neutralize specific free radicals and convert them into water. This means harmful free radicals are easily flushed out of your body through natural elimination processes, protecting your cellular structures from oxidative damage. Quick-dissolving tablet technology Because H2 Elite, 60 tabs hydrogen tablets are easily dissolved in non-carbonated liquids, they are very convenient to use. Simply drop a tablet into 8-12 ounces of any non-carbonated beverage and wait until it has completely dissolved. The quick-dissolving format creates a lightly fizzy, refreshing drink that delivers molecular hydrogen efficiently. For best results, drink the solution as soon as possible after the tablet has fully dissolved. This ensures maximum hydrogen content reaches your cells. Cellular energy and mitochondrial support Mitochondria are the powerhouses of your cells, responsible for producing the energy you need for every bodily function. Oxidative stress can damage these critical structures, reducing their efficiency over time. By providing targeted antioxidant protection at the cellular level, molecular hydrogen can help maintain optimal mitochondrial function. This support translates to better energy production and improved cellular performance throughout your entire body. Balanced inflammatory response Inflammation is your body's natural response to various stressors and challenges. While acute inflammation serves protective purposes, maintaining a balanced inflammatory response is essential for daily wellness and recovery. Molecular hydrogen can help encourage this balance, promoting resilience and supporting your body's natural recovery processes. This makes H2 Elite, 60 tabs an excellent choice for daily antioxidant support and overall vitality maintenance.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Antioxidants are abundant in youthful bodies but decline markedly with age. An imbalance between free radicals and antioxidants can lead to oxidative stress that damages lipids, proteins, DNA, and cell mitochondria. Research suggests that minimizing free radical activity by increasing antioxidants may play a role in supporting longevity. Certain studies have shown that people who live to be one hundred years old or more often have higher antioxidant levels in blood samples than younger individuals. How hydrogen molecules work in your cells H2 Elite, 60 tabs provides a potent dose of molecular hydrogen, one of nature's purest antioxidants. Hydrogen molecules are so small that they easily enter cells where conventional antioxidants may struggle to reach. Once inside your cells, hydrogen molecules can neutralize specific free radicals and convert them into water. This means harmful free radicals are easily flushed out of your body through natural elimination processes, protecting your cellular structures from oxidative damage. Quick-dissolving tablet technology Because H2 Elite, 60 tabs hydrogen tablets are easily dissolved in non-carbonated liquids, they are very convenient to use. Simply drop a tablet into 8-12 ounces of any non-carbonated beverage and wait until it has completely dissolved. The quick-dissolving format creates a lightly fizzy, refreshing drink that delivers molecular hydrogen efficiently. For best results, drink the solution as soon as possible after the tablet has fully dissolved. This ensures maximum hydrogen content reaches your cells. Cellular energy and mitochondrial support Mitochondria are the powerhouses of your cells, responsible for producing the energy you need for every bodily function. Oxidative stress can damage these critical structures, reducing their efficiency over time. By providing targeted antioxidant protection at the cellular level, molecular hydrogen can help maintain optimal mitochondrial function. This support translates to better energy production and improved cellular performance throughout your entire body. Balanced inflammatory response Inflammation is your body's natural response to various stressors and challenges. While acute inflammation serves protective purposes, maintaining a balanced inflammatory response is essential for daily wellness and recovery. Molecular hydrogen can help encourage this balance, promoting resilience and supporting your body's natural recovery processes. This makes H2 Elite, 60 tabs an excellent choice for daily antioxidant support and overall vitality maintenance.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ and Resveratrol Elite™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is critical to healthy cellular energy, meaning it's necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside can increase your levels of NAD+. Resveratrol may promote a variety of health and longevity mechanisms, quercetin can support heart and immune health, and fisetin can encourage your body to clear senescent cells.This formula combines ultra-bioavailable forms of all four nutrients, creating an unrivaled supplement for energy, vitality, and defense against cellular aging.Why it works:An age-related decline in cellular metabolism and energy production can lead to a feeling of fatigue and can also negatively affect motivation. NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside found in NAD+ Cell Regenerator and Resveratrol Elite™ can increase cellular levels of NAD+, which is essential to normal cellular energy production.Increasing NAD+ levels can also encourage normal cognitive function and contribute to maintaining blood sugar levels already within the normal range.Life Extension® was among the first to point out the amazing health benefits of both resveratrol and later NIAGEN®, which is the first commercially available form of nicotinamide riboside.NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ and Resveratrol Elite™ combines NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside with trans-resveratrol, quercetin and fisetin.Now, all of these powerful bioavailable longevity nutrients are available in a single, convenient anti-aging formula to support cellular metabolism, fight fatigue, help regulate genes that control aging, and much more.The science behind the product:Resveratrol's anti-aging benefitsResveratrol is a polyphenol that can promote numerous health and longevity mechanisms, and it's a well-known supplement for anti-aging benefits. (1) Life Extension’s Resveratrol Elite™ formulas contain trans-resveratrol (from Japanese knotweed), the form associated with significant biological effects. (2-5>It can promote healthy insulin sensitivity, support a healthy inflammatory response, and contributes to optimal endothelial function for a healthy cardiovascular system. (4,6,7)Enhanced bioavailability of resveratrolYou’ve probably heard about research that red wine is good for you. Research has shown that grapes used to produce red wine contain resveratrol. But ordinary resveratrol has low bioavailability. This problem is solved with special delivery technologies that protect these nutrients once ingested, resulting in a massive boost in bioavailability. To maximize the absorption of trans-resveratrol, the formula also contains galactomannanfibers derived from fenugreek seeds.This combination increases the bioavailability of Resveratrol Elite™ up to 10 times, ensuring higher levels of trans-resveratrol in the bloodstream and extended circulation compared to unformulated resveratrol.Cardiovascular health and resveratrolResveratrol can promote heart health by protecting the body from oxidative stress at the cellular level. (8)By inhibiting oxidative stress in the cardiovascular system, resveratrol can support endothelial health, which is essential for a long and healthy life. (9)Brain function, glucose metabolism, and resveratrolFurthermore, resveratrol's ability to support cerebrovascular blood flow suggests benefits for brain health and healthy cognition. Clinical evidence indicates that resveratrol can help maintain youthful neurological function.Moreover, the same trial also showed that resveratrol may encourage healthy glucose metabolism, a vital aspect of overall well-being and longevity. (10)NIAGEN® for fighting general fatigueNicotinamide riboside can increase your body’s levels of the coenzyme NAD+, which is critical to healthy cellular function and essential for combating fatigue. (11)In a randomized controlled trial published in 2017, older adults taking a daily dose of 250 mg of nicotinamide riboside had a 40% increase in NAD+ levels after just 30 days. (2)Improved resveratrol support with bioavailable quercetinTo further amplify the benefits of resveratrol, this supplement includes quercetin, a powerful phytonutrient that complements resveratrol. In a randomized clinical study, researchers found that quercetin formulated with fenugreek fibers (Bio-Quercetin) achieved serum levels up to 62 times higher than standard quercetin. Levels of free (unconjugated) quercetin were 18 times higher. (12)Quercetin can promote both cardiovascular and endothelial health and support healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (13,14)It can also help combat oxidative stress, contributing to a balanced inflammatory response. Moreover, quercetin is well known for its strong immune-supporting properties. (15-17)Bio-fisetin: Next-level fisetin absorptionBy combining the phytonutrient fisetin with fenugreek fibers, it has been possible to create a formula that is up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard fisetin. Fisetin can help inhibit inflammation and induce autophagy. (18) Elevate your fight against aging at the cellular level with a best-in-class formula. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ and Resveratrol Elite™ can support your cellular energy by boosting NAD+ levels, a coenzyme critical for ATP production. This formula can help combat fatigue while promoting youthful vitality at the cellular level. Do you want to fight aging from within? This advanced blend combines NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside with highly bioavailable trans-resveratrol, quercetin, and fisetin – creating an unmatched supplement for energy, wellness, and defense against cellular aging.

Why this formula works: Age-related decline in cellular metabolism and energy production can lead to feelings of fatigue and reduced motivation. NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside found in this formula can increase cellular NAD+ levels, which are essential for normal energy production. Boosting NAD+ levels can also encourage normal cognitive function and help maintain blood sugar levels already within the normal range. Are you looking for a scientifically backed approach to longevity? This formula was among the first to combine NIAGEN® – the first commercially available form of nicotinamide riboside – with trans-resveratrol, quercetin, and fisetin. All of these powerful bioavailable longevity nutrients work together in a single, convenient anti-aging formula to support cellular metabolism, fight fatigue, help regulate genes that control aging, and much more.

Backed by science: Want to understand what makes this formula so effective? Let's explore the science behind each key ingredient and how they work together to support your health. Resveratrol for anti-aging and longevity Resveratrol is a polyphenol that can promote numerous health and longevity mechanisms, making it a well-known supplement for anti-aging benefits. This formula contains trans-resveratrol from Japanese knotweed, the form associated with significant biological effects. It can promote healthy insulin sensitivity, support a balanced inflammatory response, and contribute to optimal endothelial function for a healthy cardiovascular system. Your heart health matters, and resveratrol offers comprehensive support. Enhanced resveratrol bioavailability You've probably heard that red wine contains resveratrol, but ordinary resveratrol has low bioavailability. This problem is solved with special delivery technologies that protect these nutrients once ingested, resulting in a massive boost in absorption. To maximize the uptake of trans-resveratrol, this formula also contains galactomannan fibers derived from fenugreek seeds. This combination increases bioavailability up to 10 times, ensuring higher levels of trans-resveratrol in your bloodstream and extended circulation compared to unformulated resveratrol. Resveratrol for cardiovascular health Resveratrol can promote heart health by protecting the body from oxidative stress at the cellular level. By inhibiting oxidative stress in the cardiovascular system, resveratrol can support endothelial health, which is essential for a long and vibrant life. Brain function and glucose metabolism support Furthermore, resveratrol's ability to support cerebrovascular blood flow suggests benefits for brain health and cognitive function. Clinical evidence indicates that resveratrol can help maintain youthful neurological function. Moreover, the same trial also showed that resveratrol may encourage optimal glucose metabolism, a vital aspect of overall well-being and longevity. Are you concerned about maintaining mental sharpness as you age? NIAGEN® for fighting general fatigue Nicotinamide riboside can increase your body's levels of the coenzyme NAD+, which is critical to optimal cellular function and essential for combating fatigue. In a randomized controlled trial published in 2017, older adults taking a daily dose of 250 mg of nicotinamide riboside had a 40% increase in NAD+ levels after just 30 days. Bioavailable quercetin amplifies resveratrol benefits To further amplify the effects of resveratrol, this supplement includes quercetin, a powerful phytonutrient that complements resveratrol. In a randomized clinical study, researchers found that quercetin formulated with fenugreek fibers (Bio-Quercetin) achieved serum levels up to 62 times higher than standard quercetin. Levels of free (unconjugated) quercetin were 18 times higher. Quercetin can promote both cardiovascular and endothelial health while supporting blood pressure already within the normal range. It can also help combat oxidative stress, contributing to a balanced inflammatory response. Moreover, quercetin is well known for its strong immune-supporting properties. Fisetin for next-level cellular health By combining the phytonutrient fisetin with fenugreek fibers, it has been possible to create a formula that is up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard fisetin. Fisetin can help inhibit inflammation and induce autophagy – your body's natural cellular cleanup process. Elevate your fight against aging at the cellular level with a best-in-class formula designed for modern longevity.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.NAD+ Gold® is a unique new-generation elixir that blends NMN with the methyl donor TMG. Besides that, the formula can support replenishing and rejuvenating the cells and metabolism. A true game-changer in how to age. Why it works:QuickSilver Scientific® unique liposomal delivery system help supports the rapid replenishment of intracellular NAD+, the body’s celebrated age management molecule.NMN is the only direct precursor to NAD+. Along with this, TMG can fully support balanced and continuous NAD+ metabolism. Natural aging brings changes in cells, tissues, and organs. Ultimately, this process also affects the entire body. Meaning, NMN and NAD+ levels fall with age. By refreshing NMN along with NAD+, you can naturally de-age your body and stimulate the brain. Endurance and energy can be improved, the blood flow may be enhanced, memory and focus can be activated. Youthful metabolism can be within your reach.The science behind the product:QuickSilver Scientific® state-of-the-art liposomal delivery technology offers the possibility of rapid uptake into the bloodstream for fast-acting results you may feel.Utter simplicity with 21st-century delivery systems: it can be your fountain of youth in a bottle.How to use:2 pumps by mouth and hold for 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or consult with a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before a meal.Use within 90 days of opening.If pregnant, consult with a physician before using.Refrigerate upon receipt.

product.title: NAD+ Gold®, 50 ml
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.NAD+ Gold® is a unique new-generation elixir that blends NMN with the methyl donor TMG. Along with this, TMG can fully support balanced and continuous NAD+ metabolism. Natural aging brings changes in cells, tissues, and organs. Ultimately, this process also affects the entire body. Youthful metabolism can be within your reach.The science behind the product:QuickSilver Scientific® state-of-the-art liposomal delivery technology offers the possibility of rapid uptake into the bloodstream for fast-acting results you may feel.Utter simplicity with 21st-century delivery systems: it can be your fountain of youth in a bottle.How to use:2 pumps by mouth and hold for 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or consult with a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before a meal.Use within 90 days of opening.If pregnant, consult with a physician before using.Refrigerate upon receipt.

Health benefits overview: NAD+ is a cellular coenzyme found in every cell of your body, necessary for creating ATP – the compound your body uses for fuel. NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, affecting cellular energy and function. NAD+ Gold®, 50 ml is a unique next-generation elixir that blends NMN with the methyl donor TMG. This formula can help replenish and rejuvenate your cells and metabolism, offering a true transformation in how you age.

Why this formula works: Quicksilver Scientific's unique liposomal delivery system can rapidly replenish intracellular NAD+, your body's celebrated age management molecule. NMN serves as the only direct precursor to NAD+, providing the most efficient pathway for boosting cellular levels. Along with this, TMG can fully support balanced and continuous NAD+ metabolism. Natural aging brings changes in cells, tissues, and organs, ultimately affecting your entire body as NMN and NAD+ levels fall. By refreshing NMN along with NAD+, you can naturally support youthful function throughout your body and stimulate brain performance. Endurance and energy can be improved, blood flow may be enhanced, while memory and focus can be activated, bringing youthful metabolism within your reach.

Backed by science: NMN as the direct NAD+ precursor Nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN) is recognized as the only direct precursor to NAD+, meaning it converts to NAD+ through a single enzymatic step. This direct conversion pathway makes NMN the most efficient way to boost cellular NAD+ levels. As you age, your body's ability to produce NAD+ diminishes, leading to decreased cellular energy production and metabolic function. By supplementing with NMN, you can help restore NAD+ levels to more youthful ranges, supporting the cellular processes that depend on this vital coenzyme. TMG for continuous NAD+ metabolism Trimethylglycine (TMG) serves as a methyl donor, supporting the continuous recycling and metabolism of NAD+. When NAD+ is used in cellular reactions, it must be regenerated to maintain optimal levels throughout your body. TMG provides the methyl groups necessary for this regeneration process, ensuring balanced and sustained NAD+ metabolism. Are you looking for comprehensive support that goes beyond just boosting NAD+ levels? This synergistic combination ensures your cells can maintain optimal NAD+ function over time. NAD+ for cellular energy production NAD+ plays a central role in cellular energy metabolism by facilitating the production of ATP in your mitochondria. ATP is the energy currency that powers virtually every process in your body, from muscle contraction to brain function. Without adequate NAD+, your mitochondria cannot efficiently convert nutrients into usable energy. This decline in energy production contributes to the fatigue and decreased vitality many people experience with age. By supporting NAD+ levels, you can help maintain robust cellular energy production. Brain function and cognitive performance Your brain is one of the most energy-demanding organs in your body, requiring substantial amounts of NAD+ to maintain optimal function. NAD+ supports neuronal health, neurotransmitter production, and the cellular processes that underlie memory and focus. Research suggests that maintaining adequate NAD+ levels can help support cognitive performance as you age. The brain-specific benefits of NAD+ supplementation may include enhanced mental clarity, improved focus, and better memory recall. Physical endurance and blood flow NAD+ plays important roles in cardiovascular function and physical performance. It supports the health of blood vessels, helping maintain optimal circulation throughout your body. Enhanced blood flow means better oxygen and nutrient delivery to your muscles and organs. This can translate to improved physical endurance, faster recovery from exercise, and better overall stamina in your daily activities. Liposomal delivery for rapid absorption Quicksilver Scientific's state-of-the-art liposomal technology transforms how your body absorbs and utilizes NMN and TMG. Traditional oral supplements must survive harsh digestive processes before reaching your bloodstream, often resulting in degraded effectiveness. The liposomal delivery system encapsulates active ingredients in tiny lipid spheres that protect them during digestion. This technology enables rapid uptake directly into your bloodstream for fast-acting results you may feel. It's your fountain of youth in a bottle, delivered with 21st-century absorption technology.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Liver Restore™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Probiotics are beneficial bacterial strains that support health, on the other hand, a prebiotic is a nutrient that encourages the growth of those health-promoting strains. Synbiotic refers to a combination of those two types of ingredients — like the seven special probiotic strains + plant-based fructooligosaccharide prebiotic you’ll find in FLORASSIST® Liver Restore.Why it works:The liver and the digestive system are connected — literally — by a blood vessel called the portal vein. This vein brings blood from the digestive tract directly to the liver.This blood contains nutrients from food intake. But it also contains toxins and other unwanted compounds—stuff that’s often created by undesirable bacteria in the gut. The more unwanted bacteria, the more these compounds may end up filtering through the liver. (1-3)This is where FLORASSIST® Liver Restore comes in. This clinically studied combination help encourage a healthy ratio of gut bacteria by providing 7 liver-friendly probiotic strains along with a prebiotic called a fructooligosaccharide. Together, this synbiotic formula helps crowd out the unwanted bacteria that create the stuff a liver doesn’t like. (4,5)The science behind the product:The following studies indicate confident outcomes:Study 1—overweight: in a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial, two groups of overweight subjects followed an energy-balanced diet and physical activity regimen and took two capsules of the same synbiotic blend found in FLORASSIST® Liver Restore capsules every day for 28 weeks. (6)The study measured enzymes that are commonly used to judge liver health. While statistical differences between the placebo and synbiotic groups appeared in just 7 weeks, at the end of the study, the synbiotic group had shown remarkable improvement. (6)The probiotic-prebiotic combo in FLORASSIST® Liver Restore also helped improve measurements of C-reactive protein, a biomarker produced in the liver. Healthy hsCRP levels can be consistent with liver health. (7) In this study, hsCRP measurements improved by 54% after 28 weeks. (6)Study 2—healthy BMI: a second study mimicked the first, except subjects were with a normal body mass index. The placebo group exhibited an improvement in liver enzyme biomarkers by only 3%, while the synbiotic group improved by 17% after 28 weeks of supplementation. In this study, hsCRP improved by 46% after 28 weeks. (4)How to use: Take two capsules per day, with or without food, and/or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: GEROPROTECT® Stem Cell
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension® has partnered up with Insilico Medicine, Inc., who used artificial intelligence to identify piceatannol from passion fruit, trans-resveratrol, and garcinol from kokum fruit from a database of ingredients tested in human cell lines to support stem cell health.Why it works:Stem cells are invaluable to health and vitality. This is because they can transform into other kinds of cells when the body needs them, a process called differentiation. Stem cells can also create more copies of themselves, which is called self-renewal. Both of these properties are essential to tissue rejuvenation.A healthy balance between these two actions promotes healthy tissue maintenance, growth, and longevity. But aging can cause stem cells to no longer function optimally, often losing the ability to self-renew, or differentiate into other cells, or both. (1) Thus GEROPROTECT® Stem Cell can help maintain youthful stem cell function.The science behind the product:Nutrients to encourage balanced stem cell healthGEROPROTECT® Stem Cell can promote healthy stem cell function and encourage balanced stem cell differentiation and self-renewal. It does so with nutrients that promote the cellular pathways that help maintain youthful stem cell behavior: a healthy, functional protein pool, DNA health, AMPK signaling, and more.These compounds were identified in partnership with Insilico Medicine, Inc., a machine learning company whose proprietary algorithm is based on 21st Century artificial intelligence computing techniques.Presveratrol™ proprietary blendPresveratrol™ is a proprietary blend of resveratrol and piceatannol, an extract of passion fruit. In vivo and in vitro studies indicate that piceatannol promotes stem cell differentiation as well as proteostasis, the quality control network that helps ensure the integrity of proteins within our cells. (2-4)Resveratrol is a phytonutrient with well-known benefits for longevity and health. In vivo and in vitro studies indicate that resveratrol has beneficial effects on stem cell health. (6,7)Additionally, the combination of resveratrol and piceatannol promotes DNA health as well as encourages the body’s natural pathways for managing senescent stem cells. (8)Livinol™ kokum extract (garcinol)Garcinol is a compound derived from the kokum (garcinia indica) fruit. In vitro studies indicate that garcinol helps to positively regulate healthy stem cell self-renewal and differentiation. (9-11) Garcinol inhibits an enzyme called histone acetyltransferase, or HAT. This enzyme is part of a process called histone acetylation, one of the main causes of stem cell aging and loss of function. By inhibiting this enzyme, garcinol helps restore youthful stem cell function and longevity.How to use: Take two (2) capsules daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: GEROPROTECT® Stem Cell can promote optimal stem cell function by supporting the cellular pathways that help maintain youthful stem cell behavior. This advanced formula combines nutrients identified through artificial intelligence to encourage balanced stem cell differentiation and self-renewal. Are you looking for cutting-edge support for cellular rejuvenation? This formula can help maintain tissue vitality by supporting healthy DNA, a functional protein pool, AMPK signaling, and the body's natural pathways for managing aging cells.

Why this formula works: Stem cells are invaluable to health and vitality because they can transform into other kinds of cells when your body needs them, a process called differentiation. Stem cells can also create more copies of themselves, which is called self-renewal. A balanced combination of these two actions promotes optimal tissue maintenance, growth, and longevity. However, aging can cause stem cells to no longer function optimally, often losing the ability to self-renew, differentiate into other cells, or both. Do you want to support your body's natural regenerative processes? This formula can help maintain youthful stem cell function through scientifically identified nutrients that work at the cellular level.

Backed by science: Want to understand the innovative science behind this formula? These nutrients were identified in partnership with Insilico Medicine, Inc., a machine learning company whose proprietary algorithm is based on 21st-century artificial intelligence computing techniques. Presveratrol™ proprietary blend for stem cell support Presveratrol™ is a proprietary blend of resveratrol and piceatannol, an extract of passion fruit. In vivo and in vitro studies indicate that piceatannol promotes stem cell differentiation as well as proteostasis, the quality control network that helps ensure the integrity of proteins within our cells. Resveratrol is a phytonutrient with well-known benefits for longevity and health. In vivo and in vitro studies indicate that resveratrol has beneficial effects on stem cell health, helping maintain youthful cellular function. Additionally, the combination of resveratrol and piceatannol promotes DNA health and encourages your body's natural pathways for managing senescent stem cells. Are you ready to support cellular aging from the inside out? Livinol™ kokum extract (garcinol) for self-renewal Garcinol is a compound derived from the kokum fruit. In vitro studies indicate that garcinol helps to positively regulate optimal stem cell self-renewal and differentiation, two essential processes for tissue rejuvenation. Garcinol inhibits an enzyme called histone acetyltransferase, or HAT. This enzyme is part of a process called histone acetylation, one of the main causes of stem cell aging and loss of function. By inhibiting this enzyme, garcinol helps restore youthful stem cell function and longevity.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.
