product.title: QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir 3.3, 30
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Electrolytes are important for hydration and are needed to sustain total body water and good Ph balance. Electrolyte deficiency can cause an imbalance and may degrade health and aerobic performance. Staying hydrated, in general, and especially during exercise is vital for optimal health, performance, and recovery. Optimal health and performance require a consistent and adequate supply of these important minerals and nutrients.QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir, in travel-friendly packaging, helps keep you hydrated on-the-go. Using it daily can help support your body, including before, during and after any energetic activity.Why it works:Whether you wish to promote or maintain your health, QuintEssential® delivers the perfect blend of organic ocean minerals to support whole-body health and rejuvenating rehydration, which can benefit every organ in the body.Quintessential® Hypertonic Elixir is a perfect re-mineralization supplement, by offering 100% pure seawater full of electrolytes and trace elements.It is typically used by individuals looking for an immediate revitalizing effect that can support exertion from major physical or mental tasks as it offers the minerals needed to help cell renewal and contribute to normal muscle and digestive functions. All the minerals and nutrients come without any added sugars, flavors, or dyes.The science behind the product:QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir is an organic-based bioavailable and complete mineral supplement extracted from the center of a protected vortex plankton bloom in the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of France. This marine plasma is processed according to founder Rene’ Quinton’s original protocol, which has stood the test of time for over 120 years.The nutrient-rich, raw marine fluid is harvested from the depths of plankton-rich ocean blooms and cold-sterilized to retain its properties. It contains up to 78 bioavailable ionic minerals to help replenish our cells with the same mineral-rich bath that nourished life on earth for so many millions of years. Quintessential® is harvested from a permanent upwelling of nutrients metabolized by phytoplankton off the coast of France. It contains rare and organically complex minerals, nucleic acids and phytochemicals.Difference between Hypertonic and Isotonic:Quinton's Isotonic Elixir has an equal mineral concentration to blood plasma and provides gentle mineralization and hydration. Quinton's Hypertonic Elixir is a more concentrated formula providing more minerals to the body which is is especially beneficial for exercise support.How to use: Serving size, one drinkable sachet is 10ml of liquid form. As a food supplement, take 1 sachet (10mL) a day. Additional sachets, up to a total of 3 per day, may be consumed in divided doses prior to meals and strenuous physical and mental activity.Note: Store product at room temperature.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: QuintEssential® Isotonic 0.9
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Electrolytes are important for hydration and are needed to sustain total body water and good Ph balance. Electrolyte deficiency can cause an imbalance and may degrade health and aerobic performance.Staying hydrated, in general, and especially during exercise is vital for optimal health, performance, and recovery. Optimal health and performance require a consistent and adequate supply of these important minerals and nutrients. QuintEssential® Isotonic supports natural rehydration and helps to activate the body's elimination processes for a totally natural type of detoxification.Why it works:Whether you wish to restore or maintain your health, QuintEssential® delivers the perfect blend of organic ocean minerals to promote whole-body health and rejuvenating rehydration, which can benefit every organ in the body.The Isotonic solution is diluted with natural Alpine Spring Water to achieve the same consistency as your blood plasma, making this an ideal product to help restore your biological-terrain. QuintEssential® Isotonic can also help support normal digestion and production of hydrochloric acid in the stomach.Due to its composition, QuintEssential® Isotonic is associated with weighted and biological effects through a large number of its bio-components. It can offer profound nourishment to our cells, helping to restore balance, detoxify our bodies, support cellular communication, and encourage the healthy flow of lymphatic fluid. Because it undergoes only cold sterilization, all the marine-rich complexes in Quintessential® retain their original form and potency.The science behind the product:QuintEssential® Isotonic is a nutrient-rich, raw marine fluid harvested from the depths of plankton-rich ocean blooms and cold-sterilized to retain its healing properties. It contains up to 78 essential minerals and trace elements the body relies on for supporting cellular health. help support homeostasis and natural rehydration. It helps support the biological terrain, supplying ionic minerals to the extracellular fluid. A fluid is said to be isotonic when it has the same molecular concentration as blood plasma. In the case of a saline solution, this is equal to 9 parts per thousand of pure water. Therefore this isotonic concentration contains only a third of the salt content of water in oceans.QuintEssential® delivers a beneficial, comprehensive blend of sea minerals, extracted from the centre of a protected vortex plankton bloom in the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of France. This marine plasma is processed according to founder Rene’ Quinton’s original protocol, which has stood the test of time for over 120 years. Quintessential® is harvested from a permanent upwelling of nutrients metabolized by phytoplankton off the coast of France. It contains rare and organically complex minerals, nucleic acids and phytochemicals.Difference between Hypertonic and Isotonic:Isotonic, hypertonic and hypotonic are terms that describe how one solution compares to another in terms of concentration of solutes, such as salt or sugar. For instance, the fluid inside our bodily cells has the same concentration of solutes than the fluid outside our cells, and thus the fluids are isotonic. Seawater has more solutes than blood, it´s hypertonic to blood.How to use: Serving size, one drinkable sachet is 10ml of liquid form. Serving per container: 6Note: Store product at Room Temperature.

product.title: Vitamin C+ Elderberry
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Vitamin C+ Elderberry offers a fast-acting tonic powered by liposomal delivery technology. This formula can promote your immune defenses throughout the year, helping you stay prepared for all seasons.Why it Works:Vitamin C This is a powerful water-soluble nutrient with antioxidant and immunity-enhancing properties that has been shown to strengthen and build resiliency in the body. Vitamin C is known as an essential component for immune health, supporting the production of white blood cells to keep common seasonal bugs in check.The lungs are highly susceptible to invaders along with the resulting elevation in free radicals. Vitamin C supports lung cell defenses to optimize respiratory health. Black elderberryThis dark purple berry has a rich history of use in traditional herbalism to support immune defenses. It's long celebrated for its ability to help promote a healthy microbial balance in the body. It can coordinate an efficient immune response by promoting cellular defenses against foreign invaders, the production of vital immune molecules.Elderberry has also been found to help impede the replication of invaders within the cell, shortening the duration of common viral infections.The Haschberg European elderberry is rich in anthocyanin flavonoids, which can block the spike proteins on the invader’s membranes that are needed to gain entry into host cells.Morover, elderberry has been found to support upper respiratory tract health.Vitamin E Vitamin E (DeltaGOLD Tocotrienols) safeguards your delicate cell membranes to reduce the negative impact caused by seasonal challenges. Together, vitamin C, black elderberry, and vitamin E support cellular antioxidant potential to diminish the effects of free radical caused by invaders.The Science Behind the Product:The Quicksilver Delivery Systems® can provide product with clear consistency only achieved with liposomes that are small (20-100 nanometers) and stable enough to pass between cells.These small vesicles begin absorbing as soon as they hit your mouth, so you can get high absorption of the product before it is altered by the harsh processes in the digestive system.How to Use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Methyl Charge+™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Methylation is a biochemical process that, when optimal, has a positive impact on your overall health as it´s involved in the regulation of our cardiovascular, neurological, reproductive, and detoxification systems.Boosting NAD+ through supplementation has become a valued aspect of a healthy aging protocol; however, the need for methyl groups increases in response to NAD+ production.Pairing Methyl Charge+ with your NAD+ boosting supplement will ensure that NAD+ and methylation cycles are fully supported and balanced for optimum health.Why it works:This liposomal blend includes vitamins B2, B6, methyl B-12, TMG, and folate to support the methylation cycle, which in turn supports NAD+ and glutathione production, detoxification, and DNA repair. Methyl Charge+™ also addresses the needs of undermethylators with its thoughtful blend of four key B vitamins.While this formulation can be a stand-alone supplement to safely increase methylation dynamics in undermethylators, it was originally developed to pair with our NAD+ Gold™ product to keep the wheels of the methylation and NAD+ cycles turning for optimum energy and health.The science behind the product:Methyl Charge+™ represents a second-generation methylation formulation, focusing on the catalytic activity of methyltransferases, a large class of important enzymes that activate the transfer of methyl groups and thus modify DNA and gene expression.First-generation methylation supplements focused solely on raising 5-MTHF, the naturally occurring, active form of folic acid, to counter methylation issues arising from variations in the MTHFR gene.Unfortunately, imbalanced supplementation with only pro-methylation compounds often resulted in short-term benefits, which ultimately gave way to a “crash” that is now understood to be mitochondrial dysfunction in response to low NAD+ production.Methyl Charge+™ provides unsurpassed absorption: a state-of-the-art liposomal delivery offers quick uptake through the cells of the mouth and directly into the bloodstream after ingestion, for fast-acting absorption.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: SOD Booster
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:The body makes its own antioxidants: glutathione, catalase and importantly, superoxide dismutase. This powerhouse antioxidant helps protect your cells from cellular stress caused by free radicals. (1) Cellular stress can increase the process of natural aging, and levels of superoxide dismutase production have been shown to decrease with age. (2)Why it Works:SOD Booster combines plant-derived Aronia melanocarpa (chokeberry) extract with Extramel® melon concentrate to promote the production of one of the body’s critical antioxidants: superoxide dismutase.The Science Behind the Product:Chokeberry (A. melanocarpa) ExtractChokeberries have one of nature’s highest polyphenol counts, even greater than blueberries. (3) Specifically, chokeberries are packed with polyphenol compounds called anthocyanins. (4) Why does this matter? Because chokeberry anthocyanins promote SOD production.During a two-month study, participants were given 300 mg of the same chokeberry extract in SOD Booster every day. By study’s end, supplementation resulted in a 29% increase in superoxide dismutase. Interestingly, levels of glutathione — another powerful antioxidant — increased as well. (5)Extramel® melon pulp concentrateExtramel® is a concentrate of a special variety of a French melon. This melon has a long shelf-life, theorized to be in part because of high SOD activity (and therefore cellular longevity) in the living fruit.And Extramel® is specially formulated to withstand your body’s digestive juices as well, giving this novel ingredient more time to promote superoxide dismutase production. In pre-clinical models, consuming Extramel® melon concentrate increased SOD levels in various organ tissues. (6)The health benefits of Extramel® extend beyond cellular antioxidant protection and healthy aging. This ingredient appears to support overall quality of life as well.In not one, but two studies, subjects consuming 10 mg a day of this melon concentrate reported decreased feelings of general fatigue and increased feelings of wellbeing and healthy stress response. (7,8)Clinically-studied dosagesSOD Booster contains clinically studied dosages of both chokeberry extract and Extramel® melon concentrate. It is non-GMO, allergen free, gluten free and manufactured in the United States.Promote your body’s natural antioxidant defenses. Add SOD Booster to your regimen today.How to Use: Take one (1) capsule daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Quick Brain Nootropic
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:We’ve all heard the term “think fast.” But what does that mean?There are measurable processes in your brain that govern retention, recall, and processing – and the right nutrients can support them all. A “nootropic” is a nutrient that helps enhance learning, cognition, and mental processing speed.Why it works:Lutein and zeaxanthin are carotenoid compounds found in high concentrations in the macula of your eye. In fact, measuring lutein and zeaxanthin levels in your eyes is an excellent indicator of how much of these beneficial nutrients are present in your brain.That’s important because new research indicates these carotenoid compounds encourage quick thinking, memory, and cognitive function. Quick Brain Nootropic combines three clinically studied ingredients that promote neural processing speed/fast thinking, memory and concentration: carotenoid-rich marigold extract (lutein and zeaxanthin), standardized gotu kola extract, and whole-herb BaCognize® bacopa extract.The science behind the product:Lutein and zeaxanthin carotenoidsBecause they are heavily concentrated in macular pigment, lutein and zeaxanthin are associated with eye health, but they are also found in the brain. This is significant because three, year-long, independent studies indicate that these carotenoids can also encourage improved spatial memory, reasoning skills and complex attention scores. (1-3)These positive cognitive results appeared regardless of age: healthy older adults taking lutein and zeaxanthin saw increased measurements of their ability to filter out irrelevant information while multitasking — as well as increased activity in the left prefrontal area of the brain involved in understanding verbal information, forming long-term memories, focusing on challenges and more. (1,2)Young people (ages 18 to 25) taking these carotenoid nutrients for six months also showed improved cognitive performance, as well as healthy levels of brain-derived neurotrophic factor, a neurotransmitter modulating compound essential to healthy learning and memory formation. (4)Gotu kola (Centella asiatica)Gotu kola has been the subject of extensive research. 11 different studies showed that C. asiatica can help improve both alertness and mood health. (5)However, it’s important to understand that traditional gotu kola extracts aren’t standardized—and this makes a big difference when you look at the results.A two-month study had healthy adults either take a gotu kola extract standardized to a naturally occurring compound called “asiaticoside" or a placebo.The first group showed significant improvements in their working memory, word recognition, spatial memory and alertness. They also reported feeling calmer. (6)Water hyssop (Bacopa monnieri)Bacopa monnieri extract is a very popular study aid, and for good reason. In one study, a group that ranged between 18 and 60 years old was given bacopa, daily.After only three months, they began processing visual information faster, had better learning rates and easier memory consolidation – and even reported worrying less. (7)Several studies of adults between the ages of 45 and 65 also indicated improved working memory, attention, and memory quality – in as little as four weeks. Additional improvements included visual processing speeds, verbal learning, as well as memory retention. (8-11)How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Quick Brain Nootropic can support the measurable processes in your brain that govern retention, recall, and processing speed. A nootropic is a nutrient that helps enhance learning, cognition, and mental performance. Do you want to think faster and remember more? This formula combines three clinically studied ingredients that can promote neural processing speed, memory, and concentration for optimal cognitive function.

Why this formula works: Lutein and zeaxanthin are carotenoid compounds found in high concentrations in the macula of your eye. Measuring these carotenoid levels in your eyes is an excellent indicator of how much is present in your brain. That's important because new research indicates these compounds encourage quick thinking, memory, and cognitive function. Are you ready to support your brain health with nutrients backed by science? This formula combines carotenoid-rich marigold extract with standardized gotu kola extract and whole-herb BaCognize® bacopa extract. Together, these ingredients can help support fast thinking, memory, and mental clarity.

Backed by science: Want to understand how these nutrients work together to support your cognitive performance? Let's explore the science behind each clinically studied ingredient in this advanced nootropic formula. Lutein and zeaxanthin carotenoids for brain health Because they are heavily concentrated in macular pigment, lutein and zeaxanthin are associated with eye health, but they are also found in the brain. This is significant because three year-long independent studies indicate that these carotenoids can also encourage improved spatial memory, reasoning skills, and complex attention scores. These positive cognitive results appeared regardless of age. Healthy older adults taking lutein and zeaxanthin saw increased measurements of their ability to filter out irrelevant information while multitasking, as well as increased activity in the left prefrontal area of the brain involved in understanding verbal information, forming long-term memories, and focusing on challenges. Young people ages 18 to 25 taking these carotenoid nutrients for six months also showed improved cognitive performance, as well as optimal levels of brain-derived neurotrophic factor, a neurotransmitter modulating compound essential to learning and memory formation. Are you getting enough of these brain-supporting nutrients? Gotu kola (Centella asiatica) for alertness and mood Gotu kola has been the subject of extensive research. Eleven different studies showed that Centella asiatica can help improve both alertness and mood health. However, it's important to understand that traditional gotu kola extracts aren't standardized, and this makes a big difference when you look at the results. A two-month study had healthy adults either take a gotu kola extract standardized to a naturally occurring compound called asiaticoside or a placebo. The first group showed significant improvements in their working memory, word recognition, spatial memory, and alertness. They also reported feeling calmer, supporting both mental performance and emotional well-being. Water hyssop (Bacopa monnieri) for memory and learning Bacopa monnieri extract is a very popular study aid, and for good reason. In one study, a group that ranged between 18 and 60 years old was given bacopa daily. After only three months, they began processing visual information faster, had better learning rates and easier memory consolidation, and even reported worrying less. Do you want to enhance your learning capacity naturally? Several studies of adults between the ages of 45 and 65 also indicated improved working memory, attention, and memory quality in as little as four weeks. Additional improvements included visual processing speeds, verbal learning, as well as memory retention.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: AMPK Charge+™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: AMPK is a metabolic pathway important for blood sugar balance, healthy body weight, detoxification, and longevity that can be activated by exercise, caloric restriction, and fasting mimetics. AMPK Charge+™ is an innovative and powerful blend of well-researched fasting mimetics and other phytonutrients designed to help activate the AMPK pathway. This unique formula facilitates the process by flipping your master “metabolic switch” from burning sugar for energy, to fat. It can be used alone or in concert with intermittent fasting or carb-restricted diets to support metabolic balance, healthy body weight regulation and fat breakdown, normal inflammatory responses, energy production, cellular autophagy (cell "housekeeping"), and longevity. Why it works: Most people in the Western world live in a chronically “fed” and sedentary state, rarely entering the fasted state necessary for AMPK activation. The bioavailable, nanoemulsified AMPK Charge+™ blend can support activation of this vital pathway to promote metabolic balance and flexibility. The science behind the product: Active AMPK helps your body access fat stores, turning fat into ketones through a process called lipolysis. AMPK Charge+ facilitates this process by flipping your master “metabolic switch” from burning sugar primarily to burning fat for energy, a cleaner-burning fuel for your body. Additionally, AMPK activation supports longevity by increasing autophagy, a “housekeeping” process that cleans out old and damaged cells to make room for new, healthy cells. The blend of AMPK Charge+™ contains: Resveratrol is a fasting mimetic phytocompound that has been shown to stimulate AMPK, activate sirtuins, and support autophagy. Resveratrol works synergistically with cellular NAD+ and mitochondrial biogenesis, supporting robust cellular energy production. Berberine is a bioactive compound, best known for supporting healthy blood sugar metabolism. Berberine supports AMPK activation and aids in safeguarding the liver by supporting healthy fat breakdown. Quercetin is a versatile fasting mimetic phytonutrient that has been shown to support several aspects of metabolism and healthy aging. It is a powerful antioxidant due to its role in AMPK activation. Research shows that quercetin supports mitochondrial biogenesis and is a powerful immune-modulating compound. It has been well studied as a senolytic supporting healthy cellular senescence. Milk thistle, or Silybum marianum, is a revered member of the traditional herbal medicine compendium. Silymarin, a group of active phytochemicals in milk thistle, supports AMPK activity and has been shown to restore healthy NAD+ levels in the liver. Diindolylmethane (DIM) is a compound derived from indole-3-carbinol, which is found in cruciferous vegetables. DIM has been shown to influence healthy gene expression by activating AMPK. It also plays a role in supporting a healthy immune response and the upregulation of detoxification pathways. Cinnamon bark oil is a warming, aromatic essential oil derived from Cinnamomum cassia bark. Cinnamon has been shown to activate AMPK, support healthy lipid levels, help regulate blood sugar, and have cardio-protective properties. Use alone or with fasting: This formula complements intermittent fasting and keto or carb-restricted diets (and may allow for more flexible fasting protocols). A patent-pending delivery technology:The formula uses Quicksilver Scientific Delivery Systems(R) to create small, stable delivery vesicles (between 20-70 nm) that begin absorbing as soon as they hit the mouth.The difference is clear: this product’s liquid transparency can only be achieved with nanoparticles that are smaller than the wavelengths of light. How to use: Each 1 tsp serving of AMPK Charge+ contains a 415 mg proprietary and bioavailable blend of DIM, quercetin, milk thistle, resveratrol, berberine, and cinnamon The supplement is safe to take daily and complements intermittent fasting and ketogenic or carb-restricted diets.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Black Elderberry + Vitamin C
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:This formula combines standardized black elderberry extract, which has been shown in clinical and preclinical research to support immune health, with the tried-and-true immune support benefits of vitamin C.Why it works:This formula gives your immune system intense nutritional support for when you need it most, so you stay at your best.Unlike the 5-Day Elderberry Immune formula, Black Elderberry + Vitamin C is designed to be taken every day, all year long.The science behind the product:Standardized elderberry extractBlack elderberry has a reputation for its ability to promote a healthy immune response, a reputation that research seems to confirm. It's also known for fast immune health support, showing natural anti-viral activity. A meta-analysis of four separate studies indicated that supplementation with a standardized elderberry extract, which is rich in anti-inflammatory and antioxidant polyphenols, reduced duration and response to an immune challenge — with results noticed in as little as 2 days in one study. (1-3)Each two-capsule serving of Black Elderberry + Vitamin C has 720 mg of elderberry extract (Sambucus nigra) standardized to anthocyanins to provide daily support for healthy immune response and respiratory health.200 mg of vitamin CAnother meta-analysis of research into vitamin C revealed that taking vitamin C helped reduce duration and response to immune challenges. (4)Vitamin C also provides potent antioxidant protection. Each two-capsule serving of Black Elderberry + Vitamin C delivers 200 mg of vitamin C.How to use:Take two (2) capsules daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: NAD+ Platinum®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ levels decline with age. NAD+ Platinum® is an all-in-one formula designed to power the pathways of energy and longevity. This highly bioavailable nutraceutical blend synergizes key compounds to charge healthy aging, energy currency, and cellular integrity by helping to empower three vital processes that help keep youthfulness along with NAD+ generation, sirtuin activation, and methylation.Why it works:NAD+ is the most essential molecule found in every body cell. NAD+ is the term used in the scientific literature to describe a cellular compound called nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide. The newest addition to the healthy aging and longevity formula has included: Highly stable master phytocompounds, quercetin and resveratrol, to help supercharge the longevity proteins sirtuins and support the actions of NAD+.The precursory compound NMN to advance NAD+ production.B vitamins to support balanced methylation, the biochemical process that keeps the NAD+ cycle turning.The science behind the product:Present in every cell in the body and a coenzyme in 500 chemical and biological reactions, NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) is a critical molecule for energy generation.NAD+, sirtuin, and methylationHealthy aging is supported by activating key pillars: NAD+ production, sirtuin activation, and methylation support. NAD+ production supports energy production and graceful aging. Methylation may help with balancing the NAD+ cycle. Sirtuin activation promotes the longevity proteins in our bodies.What is the difference between NAD+ Gold® and NAD+ Platinum®? NAD+ Gold®, also known as the next generation anti-aging elixir, is the liposome precursor of NMN that reinforces the supply of the NAD+ molecule. NAD+ Platinum® is the most complete blend that supports the body’s physical and foundational performance.How to use: Take 1/2 tsp. and hold it in the mouth for 30 seconds before swallowing. Repeat the dosage, if needed, or as directed by a healthcare professional. Take 10 minutes before meals and on an empty stomach. Use within 90 days from opening the bottle.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Geroprotect® Autophagy Renew
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:As we age, our bodies become less efficient at autophagy, which is the natural process that clears out cellular waste that can interfere with normal function. Support this vital cellular clean-up process to help promote a longer, healthier life. GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew contains the plant flavonoid luteolin and piperlongumine, an alkaloid from pepper. Both these ingredients are shown to help maintain your body’s natural renewal system.Why it works:We all know recycling is good for the environment, but did you know it’s good for your cells too? Autophagy is the body’s natural process for clearing out intracellular waste and metabolic debris. Specialized cellular structures called lysosomes break down and repurpose this material. Why is autophagy important? Because it helps your body conserve energy and maintain optimal function, which is key to encourage a long, healthy life. Geroprotect® Autophagy Renew help you with this!The science behind the product:Keep your cells clean and functioningWithout autophagy, our cells would become overwhelmed with waste, eventually losing their ability to function properly. The challenge is that autophagy naturally declines over time. But the right nutrients can encourage youthful, healthy autophagy at the cellular level, the hard part is figuring out which nutrients do the best job.Powered by Insilico Artificial IntelligenceGEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew was developed in collaboration with Insilico Medicine, Inc., using their extensive database of geroprotector research. Through advanced analysis they identified luteolin, sourced from the Japanese sophora flower, for its strong potential to promote autophagy. This has been further backed by several pre-clinical studies.Life Extension® has added piperlongumine, a pepper alkaloid, because of their own extensive scientific review. Together, these nutrients have the potential to encourage healthy cellular autophagy – and with it, longevity. Luteolin: The flavonoid for cellular renewalLuteolin is a natural flavonoid found in fruits, vegetables, and nutritious herbs. While we get small amounts of luteolin from our diet, it’s far from enough to promote cellular renewal. GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew provides 165 mg of luteolin per serving. Pre-clinical studies show that luteolin promotes autophagy, leading to a variety of health benefits, particularly for brain health. (1)Luteolin can support key cellular pathways, such as AMPK signaling, that encourages autophagy. It can also help generate new lysosomes, which is the "recycling plants" inside your cells that break down waste. (2) Additionally, can inhibit the processes that discourage autophagy, such as mTOR signaling, a central regulator of cellular metabolism and proliferation. (2) Piperlongumine: A potent pepper alkaloid Piperlongumine is an biologically active compound found in certain pepper plants. Pre-clinical research shows that it helps trigger autophagy. This was indicated by increased levels of LC3-autophagosomes, tructures involved in initiating autophagy within cells. (3,4)Piperlongumine activates Beclin-1, which is a gene that plays a key role in the formation of these autophagosomes. (5) Beclin-1 dependent autophagy is shown to protect delicate mitochondria and help inhibit inflammation to support cardiovascular health. (5) This longevity supplement contains 10 mg of piperlongumine. Take alone or with Senolytic Activator While cellular housekeeping orchestrated by autophagy is a different process than the ones that govern the removal of senescent cells, they are complementary. Therefore, GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew can be taken alone, or in conjunction with Senolytic Activator formula.How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bloat Relief
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Gas and bloating can quickly take the joy out of a good meal, and millions of people suffer from uncomfortable gas and bloating after meals.Bloat Relief can support digestive comfort by promoting healthy motility, helping keep things moving.Why it works:Your digestive tract stretches over 30 feet, so it’s no surprise things can slow down. When food doesn’t move smoothly, gas and bloating can follow. Bloat Relief targets the aspects of digestion that are responsible for occasional gas and bloating: Gastrointestinal motility and excessive gas production in your GI tract.Supporting your body in breaking down and moving food efficiently can help reduce gas production, so you can enjoy eating without discomfort or that heavy, overly full feeling. Bloat Relief contains plant-based ingredients such as artichoke and ginger extract, fennel seed oil, and turmeric, designed to help ease bloating and digestive discomfort while supporting healthy digestion.The science behind the product:Artichoke leaf and ginger root extractFoods move naturally from the mouth to the stomach and down into your lower digestive tract. This is called “GI or gut motility.” The first step in relieving bloating is supporting healthy gut motility.Prodigest® is a patented blend of artichoke leaf and ginger root extracts. Ginger can help speed up gastric emptying, supporting the natural movement of food through the digestive tract by stimulating the migrating motor complex. Artichoke extract can complement this by promoting healthy bile flow from the liver, further supporting digestion.In a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, participants taking Prodigest® reported improvements in stomach comfort and reduced bloating after just 2 weeks. Another study used ultrasound to assess stomach size before and after meals, showing a significant reduction in stomach size in the Prodigest® group, indicating better gastric motility.Fennel seed oil + turmericFennel has long been used to ease occasional gas and bloating. This traditional use is supported by clinical research, showing that fennel seeds, fennel tea, and fennel seed oil, especially when combined with turmeric, can encourage digestive comfort and decrease bloating. Fennel is shown to encourage regular, healthy muscle contractions in your digestive system, and also to inhibit the activity of the digestive bacteria that produce gas during digestion.A large placebo-controlled clinical trial demonstrated significant reduction in bloating and other digestive discomforts for people taking a combination of fennel seed oil and turmeric.Not getting along with your favourite foods? Stay comfortable after you eat with Bloat Relief! How to use:Take one (1) softgel twice daily before the heaviest meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Immune Charge+®Throat Spray
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Immune Charge+®Throat Spray can support the key immune activities and the upper respiratory tract. It contains a unique blend of zinc and plant compounds helps fortify the body against external threats. This is a convenient on-the-go spray that can help temper airway irritation and fortifies the immune all year long. Why it works:Zinc can be found throughout the body in all organs and tissues. It is an essential component for hundreds of enzymatic reactions and it plays a fundamental role in immune health. Quercetin aids the immune response and promotes barrier function. Studies indicate that it supports cellular health, and immune response during seasonal changes. Luteolin supports healthy airways and propolis helps to balance the microbial environment.The science behind the product:Zinc can be difficult to absorb. The blend in Immune Charge+®Throat Spray can bind zinc to quercetin and luteolin creating an “ionophore” – an advanced way to help get zinc into cells.QuickSilver Scientific® state-of-the-art liposomal delivery technology offers the possibility of rapid uptake for fast-acting results you may feel.How to use:Spray 3 pumps towards the back of your throat. Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional. If pregnant, consult a physician before useRepeat to desired dosage or advise with a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Optimized Folate
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Folate is a member of the B-complex family as vitamin B9 and can promote heart and brain health. Optimized Folate offers 1700 mcg of folate in the form of 5-MTHF (L-methylfolate), which is the metabolically active form of folic acid. The formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.Why it works:The vitamin B folate helps keep homocysteine levels within a healthy range. Homocysteine is a natural byproduct of metabolism, and maintaining normal levels is important for both cardiovascular and cognitive health.The science behind the product: Folate for homocysteine & heart healthFolate is essential for maintaining normal homocysteine levels. By helping to inhibit excess homocysteine, folate promotes healthy levels of this important cardiovascular health biomarker. (1)5-MTHF, homocysteine levels & cognitionHigh homocysteine levels are linked to an increased risk of cognitive decline. Ensuring sufficient folate intake, especially in its active form 5-MTHF, is particularly important for maintaining brain health as we age. (2,3)Flexible dosing alone or with B vitamins for enhanced effectThe recommended daily intake for folate is 400 mcg for most adults (non-pregnant). This folate supplement provides 1700 mcg of 5-MTHF. For added support, you can pair folate with vitamin B12 (methylcobalamin), vitamin B6 (pyridoxal 5’-phosphate or pyridoxine HCl), and/or riboflavin (vitamin B2). How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you concerned about maintaining your heart and brain health as you age? Optimized Folate delivers 1,700 mcg of 5-MTHF (L-methylfolate), the metabolically active form of folate that your body can use immediately without conversion. This vegetarian, gluten-free, non-GMO formula can help maintain balanced homocysteine levels, which is crucial for both cardiovascular wellness and cognitive function throughout your life.

Why this formula works: Folate, also known as vitamin B9, plays a vital role in helping your body keep homocysteine levels within a normal, optimal range. Homocysteine is a natural byproduct of metabolism, and maintaining balanced levels is important for protecting both your heart and brain. Unlike synthetic folic acid that requires conversion in your body, 5-MTHF is the ready-to-use form of folate. This means your body can utilize it immediately for essential metabolic processes. The formula provides a potent 1,700 mcg dose that can be taken alone or combined with other B vitamins like B12, B6, and riboflavin for comprehensive support.

Backed by science: Folate for homocysteine balance and heart health Folate is essential for maintaining normal homocysteine levels in your body. By helping to keep homocysteine balanced, folate promotes optimal cardiovascular wellness and protects this important biomarker of heart health. 5-MTHF and cognitive function support Research shows that elevated homocysteine levels are linked to increased risk of cognitive decline as we age. Ensuring sufficient folate intake, especially in its active 5-MTHF form, becomes particularly important for maintaining sharp mental function and brain health throughout the aging process. Superior bioavailability of 5-MTHF Unlike synthetic folic acid found in many supplements, 5-MTHF doesn't require metabolic conversion. This active form is immediately available for your body to use, making it especially beneficial for individuals who may have difficulty converting synthetic folic acid into its usable form. Flexible dosing for personalized needs While the recommended daily intake for folate is 400 mcg for most adults, this formula provides 1,700 mcg to offer enhanced support. You can easily adjust your intake or pair it with complementary B vitamins like methylcobalamin (B12), pyridoxal 5'-phosphate (B6), or riboflavin (B2) for synergistic effects on homocysteine metabolism.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: BioActive Complete B-Complex, 60 vegetarian capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Get the most of one of nature’s best metabolism and energy supporters: Vitamin B. BioActive Complete B-Complex offers a wide spectrum of the benefits that different types of vitamin B can provide in just two vegetarian capsules – and that at a much higher potency than many regular vitamin B supplements. From metabolic support to supporting heart- and nerve health, the versatility of vitamin B makes it a true nutritional wonder. The product contains all of the many health benefits associated with vitamin B in a single formula.Why it works:Your body needs B vitamins to help release energy from the foods you eat, such as carbohydrates, fat and protein. In other words, B vitamins help to optimize the conversion from foods to energy in your system. (1-3) BioActive Complete B-Complex packs a punch of different types of vitamin B, making sure that you can get all the benefits that vitamin B can provide your body. It provides a high potency at dosages that are scientifically studied and formulated with bioactive forms of every single nutrient found in BioActive Complete B-Complex, which ultimately can help inhibit vitamin B deficiency and provide you with an unparalleled product.The science behind the product:Vitamins participate in many critical metabolic functions in the body. Folic acid and Vitamin B12 play a role in red blood cell production. (2)BioActive Complete B-complex can help to maintain proper organ function and provide other important benefits. This is why you should choose this vitamin B complex to receive the ideal dose of daily B-vitamins.BioActive Complete B-Complex contains:Thiamine (vitamin B1 converts food into usable energy for your body, playing an essential role in metabolism.Riboflavin (vitamin B2) is converted to its active form called riboflavin-5'-phosphate which the body uses for energy production. It also provides antioxidant activity.Niacin (vitamin B3) helps produce hormones and supports healthy energy transfer reactions within the cells. It also affects healthy metabolism of glucose, fat, and alcohol. Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels.Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) promotes the synthesis of hemoglobin (red blood cells), hormones, neurotransmitters, and the oxidation of carbohydrates and fatty acids.Pyridoxine HCI & Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate (vitamin B6) helps metabolize amino acid and fat. Along with vitamin B5, it produces neurotransmitters and hemoglobin (red blood cells). Additionally, B6 also plays a role in gluconeogenesis, the formation of glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.Biotin (vitamin B7) regulates gene expression and is required for the metabolism of fatty acids and carbohydrates. Moreover, it plays a role in maintaining metabolic homeostasis or the balance between your body's many unique chemical pathways and processes.Folate/folic acid (vitamin B9, or for superior absorption, 5-MTHF) is vital for cell growth, amino acid metabolism, production of red and white blood cells, healthy cell division, and proper fetal growth and development to reduce the risk of birth defects. It also helps your body make and maintain healthy DNA. Furthermore, BioActive Complete B-Complex contains the compound para-aminobenzoic acid (PABA), which can encourage the synthesis of folic acid.Vitamin B12 (cobalamin or methylcobalamin) is important for neurological function, heart health, development of red blood cells, production of DNA, and promoting healthy homocysteine levels. Methylcobalamin is the form of B12 that is biologically active in the brain. (4-7)Inositol (vitamin B8) is essential for calcium transduction and healthy blood sugar levels and may improve mood. It's actually not a vitamin, but has vitamin-like properties and is often added to higher-quality B-complex supplements.How to use:Take two (2) capsules daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Immune Charge+®
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: During seasonal changes, but also all year round, our immune system might be out of balance, and defending it against unexpected health challenges is important.Immune Charge+® may accelerate your immunity with natural compounds from vitamins A, C, D, E, K1, K2, and the powerful botanical elderberry. Why it works: Immune Charge+® offers a specially selected combination of six bioavailable vitamins that can work synergistically to promote respiratory strength, cellular integrity, and year-round resiliency.When combined with elderberry, known for its immune system benefits, the result can give powerful support for immune defenses.Many vitamins and herbs have poor bioavailability. The formula of Immune Charge+® combines immune-supportive vitamins and elderberry in Quicksilver Scientific's proprietary liposomal delivery system that can help provide rapid absorption of these high-dosed ingredients. The science behind the product: The potent blend for fasting-acting support against seasonal immune challenges contains: Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) offers multifaceted support to the immune system, supporting cellular integrity, antioxidant status, and respiratory health function during viral infection. Vitamin A maintains epithelial barriers in the human body, including the epithelial lining of the lungs and the gut mucosa, where a significant portion of the immune system resides. Vitamin A deficiency compromises immunity in the lungs, rendering them more susceptible to respiratory infections. (1,2) Vitamin D has pleiotropic benefits for immunity. Vitamin D receptors (VDR) are present on most immune cells, indicating their indispensability as components of the immune system.24 Vitamin D deficiency has repeatedly been independently associated with an increased risk of viral infections. (3) Vitamin E is a fat-soluble antioxidant that protects the polyunsaturated fatty acids in cell membranes from oxidative damage, which can be triggered by microbial infections. It increases white blood cell proliferation, immunoglobulin levels, natural killer cell activity, and antibody activity, thus supporting broad-spectrum immune function. (4,5) The formula of Immune Charge+® uses a special form of vitamin E called DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols, which may offer fifty times the antioxidant activity of tocopherols, the form of vitamin E normally used. (6) Vitamins K1 and K1 are fat-soluble vitamins that work in synergy with vitamins A, D, and E to support healthy immune function. Vitamin K1 (phylloquinone) has anti-inflammatory properties through inhibition of the NF-κB pathway. (7) Vitamin K2 modulates the immune system, decreasing immune reactivity and helping to manage the inflammatory response. (8) Elderberry (Sambucus nigra) is a small dark purple berry that has been used for centuries in traditional herbalism as an aid to the immune system. This formula uses Haschberg variety European black elderberry, known for its high potency in anthocyanin flavonoids. Immune Charge+® offers a union of science and nature — an elegantly blended shot that can support respiratory health and antioxidant potential while nurturing the immune system. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Bio-Fisetin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is fisetin? Fisetin is a flavonoid! And flavonoids are the little chemicals that provide the colors to vegetables and fruits. You find fisetin, in small amounts in, for example, strawberries, apples, and onions.It has many health benefits, such as anti-aging and brain-support properties. Even though we all love sweet strawberries, you will have to eat a lot of them each day for your body to benefit from fisetin. Bio-Fisetin makes it easier to obtain an optimal amount of fisetin.Why it works:Fisetin has loads of health benefits. But fisetin in itself is rapidly broken into various metabolites by the enzymes in your digestive system. Bio-Fisetin is fisetin combined with galactomannan compounds from fenugreek seeds. Doing so protects fisetin during digestion. Bio-Fisetin is up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard fisetin supplements. Meaning it lasts longer and works longer for your system.The science behind the product:Fistin can promote cellular longevityWe age, and so do our cells. Senescent cells are aged cells that do absolutely nothing for you. They do not grow or divide but can cause damage to cells around them. Fortunately, fisetin can work as a senolytic. Senolytics are compounds that can destroy the senescent cells in our bodies. Fisetin can fight these aging cells by encouraging the body’s natural pathways for clearing senescent cells, which allows healthy cells to thrive (1). By that fisetin can help to improve your longevity.Another important aspect of cellular longevity is sirtuin function. Sirtuin proteins keep your cells performing at their best, but sirtuin activity declines with age. Fisetin has been shown in preclinical studies to encourage youthful, healthy sirtuin function (2-6).Keep your mind fresh with fisetinA research study shows that fisetin helps protect the brain's delicate nerve cells (7-9). It has also shown promise for encouraging healthy cognitive function in preclinical studies. The key is absorbing enough fisetin for it to matter.Support for your kidneys and eyesGlucose metabolism is essential for everything from kidney function to how your body gains or loses weight. However, maintaining a healthy blood sugar can get more challenging as we get older.Studies indicate that fisetin acts as a kind of metabolism control switch. This may help your body maintain healthy glucose levels and can positively affect your kidney health and vision health (10, 11).How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Bio-Fisetin can deliver optimal amounts of fisetin, a flavonoid found naturally in strawberries, apples, and onions. Fisetin has many health benefits, including anti-aging and brain-support properties. Are you looking for an easier way to get the benefits of fisetin without eating large amounts of fruit daily? This enhanced formula makes it simple to obtain the fisetin your body needs for cellular longevity and cognitive health.

Why this formula works: Fisetin has loads of health benefits, but fisetin in itself is rapidly broken into various metabolites by the enzymes in your digestive system. Bio-Fisetin is fisetin combined with galactomannan compounds from fenugreek seeds. Doing so protects fisetin during digestion. Bio-Fisetin is up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard fisetin supplements, meaning it lasts longer and works longer for your system. Do you want to ensure you're getting the most from your supplement? Enhanced bioavailability means better absorption and more effective cellular support throughout the day.

Backed by science: Want to understand how fisetin supports your cellular health and longevity? Let's explore the science behind this powerful flavonoid and its multiple benefits for your body. Fisetin promotes cellular longevity We age, and so do our cells. Senescent cells are aged cells that no longer grow or divide but can cause damage to cells around them. Fortunately, fisetin can work as a senolytic. Senolytics are compounds that can destroy the senescent cells in our bodies. Fisetin can fight these aging cells by encouraging your body's natural pathways for clearing senescent cells, which allows optimal cells to thrive. By doing so, fisetin can help improve your longevity. Another important aspect of cellular longevity is sirtuin function. Sirtuin proteins keep your cells performing at their best, but sirtuin activity declines with age. Fisetin has been shown in preclinical studies to encourage youthful sirtuin function. Keep your mind fresh with fisetin A research study shows that fisetin helps protect the brain's delicate nerve cells. It has also shown promise for encouraging optimal cognitive function in preclinical studies. Are you ready to support your brain health naturally? The key is absorbing enough fisetin for it to matter, which is why the enhanced bioavailability of Bio-Fisetin makes such a difference for cognitive support. Support for your kidneys and eyes Glucose metabolism is essential for everything from kidney function to how your body gains or loses weight. However, maintaining blood sugar levels already within the normal range can get more challenging as we get older. Studies indicate that fisetin acts as a kind of metabolism control switch. This may help your body maintain optimal glucose levels and can positively affect your kidney health and vision health.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Dopamine Advantage
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is dopamine? It is a “feel good” neurotransmitter also essential for cognitive function and mental drive. Dopamine Advantage’ formula of phellodendron bark powder and Adenosylcobalamin B12 can help your brain maintain normal dopamine levels.Why it works: Dopamine is a brain chemical and has many essential functions. It’s produced in your brain and released into synaptic clefts, the microscopic spaces between your neurons, to relay signaling information from one neuron to the next.Unfortunately, factors such as nutrition, aging, environmental changes and stress can though cause a decline in dopamine levels, affecting cognitive performance, motivation and even lead to a wide variety of health issues.Both of the nutrients in our brain-friendly formula of Dopamine Advantage can maintain youthful dopamine levels in the brain by actively inhibiting enzymes that break down or affect dopamine, which leaves more dopamine available to the brain.The science behind the product: Our innovative formula can support motivation and focus, thanks to a combination of phellodendron bark powder and a special neurologically active form of vitamin B12:Phellodendron bark and MAO-B: Phellodendron amurense, commonly known as amur cork tree, has many health benefits, including neuroprotective properties. In a detailed 2016 screening study, Phellodendron amurense ranked as one of the most potent extracts for inhibiting the activity of monoamine oxidase-B (MAO-B), an enzyme involved in the metabolism of dopamine. (1)Adenosylcobalamin and LRRK2: Adenosylcobalamin is a neurologically active form of vitamin B12—it can cross the brain-blood barrier and it’s more readily available to the brain. A 2019 study showed vitamin B12 also protects the brain from oxidative stress and that it modulates Leucine-Rich Repeat Kinase 2’s (LRRK2) activity, an enzyme that regulates dopamine levels. (2-4) Add Dopamine Advantage to your daily regimen and “motivate” your brain to stay sharp and focused.Together, these nutrients can protect your brain cells from cellular stress and encourage healthy dopamine levels, promoting concentration and helping you stay focused on your task at hand.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Glucosamine Sulfate
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is glucosamine? It is an amino sugar found in joint cartilage. This nutrient has many potential health benefits, such as maintaining the connective tissue between the bones of your joints, promoting knee joint function and freedom of movement.Not all glucosamine is the same though: you’re looking for glucosamine sulfate - the same kind used in clinical studies. Why it works: Glucosamine has been shown in clinical studies to support healthy cartilage and joint function. (1,2) The science behind the product: Glucosamine is an important component of cartilage, and an analysis of multiple randomized controlled trials found that glucosamine supplementation helps support healthy joint structure and encourages comfortable knee function. (1,2)In laboratory models, glucosamine has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory effects. (3,4) In addition, preclinical research suggests that glucosamine may support cartilage integrity by modulating synthesis of cartilage structural components by chondrocytes. (5)Glucosamine is often combined with chondroitin because both of these nutrients, including in combination support significant preservation of healthy joint structure and comfort. (6-9)For the convenience of our customers, we are proud to offer glucosamine as a stand-alone supplement. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Zinc is essential for overall immune function, gut health, inflammatory and hormonal balance, brain function, and more, but this vital trace mineral is traditionally difficult to absorb.Upgrade your zinc supplement: With its ground-breaking transport and delivery technologies, Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore can help increase cellular zinc levels throughout the body. Why it works: Zinc is nature’s classic immune-supporting mineral and has many benefits, though it can’t pass through a cell membrane on its own. Cellular transporters can be less effective at getting zinc into cells due to genetic makeup and/or damage.The Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore complex can diffuse through the cell membrane without a need for a transporter. Once they are inside the cell, the complex releases the zinc so it can move freely inside the cell and go wherever it's needed. In this way zinc is delivered straight to the cells and can promote healthy gut, immune cells, hormone balance and inflammatory response in a powerful way.The science behind the product: The exceptionally bioavailable ionophore-based formula of Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore easy-to-swallow capsules:Powerful delivery Inside zinc is combined with the plant compounds quercetin, luteolin, and hesperetin, forming an advanced “ionophore” complex for enhanced zinc absorption. These specific zinc-binding plant compounds can act as sophisticated “chaperones,” shuttling zinc through cell membranes for powerful direct delivery of nature’s classic immune-supporting mineral. Optimized immune system Best known for its vital, multi-pronged role in immune system function, zinc holds the potential to power frontline defences against invaders.Systemic-level zinc reinforces our most susceptible entry points – the upper respiratory and gut barriers – and can promote healthy immune cells, hormone balance, and inflammatory response. Gut protection against outside stressors Approximately 70 % of the human immune system resides in the GI tract, making it essential for optimal immune function. Zinc and quercetin can support the gut’s natural barrier integrity and safeguard the body from outside environmental stressors. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Membrane Mend™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is cell membrane? It is the biological boundary that separates the inside of the cell from its environment and lets only selected material enter and exit the cell. In other words, it keeps the interior of the cell safe so it can function properly.Unhealthy, compromised membranes can lead to whole-body dysfunction. The daily formula of Membrane Mend™ includes the master cell fortifier phosphatidylcholine (PC), essential fatty acids, vitamin E, and a powerful antioxidant – all working together to help promoting the health of membranes throughout the body. Why it works: Modern life is rife with factors that compromise cell membranes, also referred to as “the brain of the cell”. We need this smart barrier to maintain a healthy, energy-producing environment and keep out unwanted molecules, ions, and oxidative threats. Potentially harmful inflammatory activity - a hallmark of aging - happens within our cells, too. The unique combination of powerful ingredients in Membrane Mend™ can help feed “the brain of your cells” and promote your energy potential by building and repairing the cell membranes. Also, the formula can support cellular longevity by balancing inflammation at a cellular level. The science behind the product: The formula behind Membrane Mend™ liquid supplement: High-grade PC (phosphatidylcholine) and Ahiflower® fatty acid complex sync perfectly to help build and repair cell membranes, thereby maintaining a healthy, energy-producing environment and helping keep out unwanted molecules, ions, and oxidative threats. The mini energy factories of our cells, mitochondria, have their own biological membranes. Because these powerhouses produce ATP, the energy “currency” used by every cell and tissue in the body, we need mitochondrial membranes to remain intact and functioning well at all times. The powerful antioxidant effects of astaxanthin, vitamin E and fatty acids in this supplement work fluidly to help balance inflammation at a cellular level and in that way support longevity within your cells.The liposomes we use are so small they begin absorbing as soon as they hit the mouth.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: NAD+ Cell Formula, 100 mg EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.Many older people are experiencing fatigue and lack of motivation which might be because of an age-related decline in NAD+ levels which can impair healthy cellular metabolism. (1,2) The active ingredient in this formula can boost NAD+ which promotes systemic youthful functions and can be found in every cell in the body. (3)Why it works:As the body undergoes natural aging, one may experience having less energy and motivation to do different everyday tasks. This may be due to declining levels of NAD (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide). NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ can promote systemic youthful functions by providing nicotinamide riboside — a patented compound which plays a role in reversing age-related decline of NAD+ levels. Found in every cell in the body, this enzyme plays a role in helping to maintain healthy cell metabolism. With the highly innovative NAD+ Cell Regenerator™, there is finally a product designed to promote higher NAD+ enzyme levels for refreshed vitality.The science behind the product:Nicotinamide riboside can increase cellular levels of NAD+ in the body. (4,5) Nicotinamide riboside has been shown to help replenish cellular NAD+ and can: (6-9)Promote sirtuin (SIRT1 and SIRT3) „longevity“ gene activationSupport energy levels and physical performance by enhancing growth and efficiency of mitochondriaRegulate metabolism Support cognitive function during aging by contributing to neuronal healthSupport healthy blood sugar levels in those within the normal range by promoting insulin sensitivityHow to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Daily Skin Defense
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:It’s possible to beautify and fortify your skin at the same time. Daily Skin Defense can help hydrate and keep your skin beautiful, fight the appearance of wrinkles and bolster your skin’s natural defenses against the oxidative stress caused by pollutants and UV exposure. Why it works: Your skin is beautiful and protects you from the elements. But those protective efforts take their toll, and we’re not just talking about cosmetic changes.Maintaining youthful skin structure and function can not only keep your skin looking healthy and beautiful, but help your skin do its primary job: protect you from the everyday elements of oxidative stress around you. Daily Skin Defense was formulated to do just that. The science behind the product: The three-part nutrient booster formula of Daily Skin Defense capsules:Zeropollution®: Four plant extracts for your skin The patented Zeropollution® blend combines rosemary and olive leaf with lemon verbena and Japanese pagoda tree. Why these four? We’ll show you:Lemon verbena and rosemary: Lemon verbena compounds as well as rosemary polyphenols both help fight free radical compounds—which reduces oxidative stress: making this combo good for your delicate skin.Olive leaf and Japanese pagoda tree: Olives are another strong source of polyphenols. So why Pagoda tree? This tree is packed with quercetin, a phytonutrient known for its cellular stress fighting properties.Over 90% improvement: In a 12-week study, a hundred women with sensitive skin were given Zeropollution® or a placebo. Measurements of oxidative stress, hydration, elasticity, firmness and smoothness were taken. The results were measurable differences in skin health, moisture, improvements in skin radiance as well as reductions in the appearance of dark spots and wrinkles. (1)Myoceram®: highly concentrated rice ceramidesCeramides help retain moisture in your skin. They also help maintain your skin’s healthy barrier function, which not only improves skin texture and appearance, but helps keep out pollutants and other elements of your environment that are best kept outside of your body.Myoceram® is a gluten and allergen free ceramide derived from rice that helps inhibit trans epidermal water loss from your skin. In a 12-week study, 123 healthy volunteers received either Myoceram® or placebo. Those getting the rice ceramide recorded significant improvements in skin hydration. (2,3)Vitamin C: the beauty vitaminThe last part of our formula is vitamin C. Vitamin C can scavenge free radicals, which can take their toll on the look and overall health of your skin. (4) Vitamin C also encourages collagen production in preclinical studies. Collagen is the most common protein in your body and one of the primary building blocks of your skin.How to use: Try Daily Skin Defense: a once daily formula to help protect your skin from the inside out.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Mushroom Immune with Beta Glucans
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:What are beta glucans/β-glucans? They are types of fiber found in the cells of certain types of yeast, mushrooms, and cereal grains and are well-known for their ability to promote a healthy immune response. The unique combination of the different immune system-supportive mushrooms makes this formula a powerful contribution to an effective immune response.Why it Works:Mushroom Immune with Beta Glucans can provide a variety of immune-modulating natural substances including three types of mushrooms well-recognized for their immune health benefits, as well as Wellmune®—a best-in-class beta-glucan ingredient known for its immune-supportive properties. This all-in-one formula can support the balance between the different aspects of immune function—which in turn can help your body mount a balanced and effective immune system.The Science Behind the Product:Our unique formula can support an effective immune response, thanks to a combination of the:Benefits of three types of mushrooms: You probably have heard of shiitake and maitake mushrooms, but did you know that they are highly recognized for their immune benefits? We also added the lesser known but equally impressive chaga mushroom. This combination can provide the equivalent of nearly one and a half servings of fresh mushrooms to support your healthy immune response.Highly specialized β-glucan polysaccharide from yeast: β-glucans are well-recognized for their ability to promote a balanced immune response—a reputation that research now confirms. Several clinical studies have shown their immune promoting benefits.Although beta glucans are found in small amounts in foods as baker’s yeast, mushrooms, and cereal grains, it is easier to achieve clinically studied levels with a daily supplement. Our experts evaluated more than 14 β-glucan ingredients from various sources, and Wellmune® stood out because this patented β-glucan from brewer’s yeast had the most clinical support for promoting the body’s healthy immune response.Together, all these natural substances can provide a unique support to help maintain a healthy, effective and balanced immune response.How to Use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Vitamin C and Quercetin, 250 tabs, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin C and Quercetin brings a shot of vitamin C into the body that it can’t provide by itself.These compounds can help protect your body from oxidative stress, promote collagen formation, promote healthy immune function, and improve iron absorption.Vitamin C's biological activity is complemented by an ultra-absorbable form of the antioxidant quercetin. Vitamin C and bioflavonoids such as quercetin often occur together in healthy foods.Why it works:Vitamin C's health benefits are well known to nutritional researchers, but at the same time, it's an essential nutrient, meaning humans can’t create it internally. This means that we must get all of our vitamin C from our diet and supplements.Vitamin C and Quercetin's unique formulation combines high-quality vitamin C with bio-quercetin that uses fibers from fenugreek seeds to increase bioavailability up to 62x.This in turn can help maintain healthy blood concentrations and enhance vitamin C whole body health benefits.The science behind the product:Vitamin CResearch has shown that vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant.It can scavenge free radicals and can provide protection from oxidative stress. Vitamin C can also stimulate iron absorption.;Furthermore, it can also participate in the formation of collagen that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C also plays a role in protection against environmental and physical stresses such as ingestion of heavy metals, cigarette smoking, compromised immunity, and extreme temperatures. QuercetinThere is scientific evidence that specialized compounds in fruits and vegetables provide critical protection against free radical assault. Quercetin:Is a bioflavonoid found in grape skins, onions, apples, buckwheat and other food sources.Has a long tradition of use relieving the effects of seasonal immune challenges.Has been shown in clinical trials to encourage a healthy immune response in physically fit adults.Can help inhibit oxidative stress and inflammation.May promote both cardiovascular and endothelial health.Can help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Vitamin C and Quercetin, 250 tabs, EU delivers essential vitamin C that your body cannot produce on its own, combined with ultra-absorbable quercetin for powerful antioxidant protection. This formula can help protect against oxidative stress, promote collagen formation, encourage immune function, and enhance iron absorption. The specialized bio-quercetin formulation complements vitamin C to provide comprehensive whole-body health support.

Why this formula works: Are you getting enough vitamin C from your diet alone? Since vitamin C is an essential nutrient that humans cannot create internally, we must obtain all of it from food and supplements. This formula combines high-quality vitamin C with bio-quercetin that uses fenugreek seed fibers to increase bioavailability up to 62 times. This enhanced absorption can help maintain optimal blood concentrations and amplify vitamin C's whole-body health benefits. Vitamin C and bioflavonoids like quercetin naturally occur together in many fruits and vegetables, making this combination particularly effective for supporting your health.

Backed by science: Vitamin C for antioxidant protection and collagen support Research demonstrates that vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant that can scavenge free radicals and provide protection from oxidative stress. It can also stimulate iron absorption, which is essential for cellular function throughout your body. Furthermore, vitamin C participates in collagen formation that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. It also plays a protective role against environmental and physical stresses such as heavy metal ingestion, cigarette smoking, compromised immunity, and extreme temperatures. Quercetin for immune and cardiovascular health Quercetin is a bioflavonoid found in grape skins, onions, apples, buckwheat, and other food sources with a long tradition of use for seasonal immune challenges. Clinical trials have shown that quercetin can encourage a balanced immune response in physically fit adults. This powerful bioflavonoid can help inhibit oxidative stress and inflammation while promoting both cardiovascular and endothelial health. Additionally, quercetin can help maintain blood pressure levels already within the normal range. Enhanced bioavailability for maximum benefits The bio-quercetin phytosome in this formula utilizes fenugreek seed fibers to dramatically increase absorption compared to standard quercetin. With up to 62 times greater bioavailability, you receive more of quercetin's beneficial compounds with each dose, making this an exceptionally efficient approach to antioxidant and immune support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.
