product.title: Vitamin D3, 250 softgels, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce - especially during the winter.A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.Why it works:Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. Because of weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range may be inhibited. Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel. Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you getting enough of the sunshine vitamin throughout the year? Vitamin D3, 250 softgels, EU can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels, which can be difficult for your body to produce, especially during winter months. A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote optimal bone density, encourage cognitive health, help maintain healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better overall wellness.

Why this formula works: Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. However, weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock use may inhibit the body's ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range. This is why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day. Vitamin D3 is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Along with vitamin K and essential minerals, vitamin D is vital for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth throughout your life.

Backed by science: Want to understand why vitamin D3 is considered one of the most important nutrients for your health? Let's explore the comprehensive research behind this essential vitamin. Cognitive health and brain function Vitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Optimal serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. This brain-protective effect makes vitamin D3 particularly valuable for maintaining mental clarity and cognitive performance throughout your lifetime. Bone and immune health support Vitamin D, along with vitamin K and essential minerals, is crucial for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. This is an important step in maintaining strong bones and teeth as you age. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in optimal immune function. By encouraging balanced immune system activity, vitamin D can help you maintain overall wellness and resilience. Heart health and blood pressure balance Vitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream. It promotes a balanced inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages optimal endothelial function. Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Optimal renin levels help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range, supporting your cardiovascular wellness. Optimal dosing and blood level monitoring This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D, though elderly adults may benefit from higher doses. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: AMPK Metabolic Formula, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: The active ingredients Gynostemma pentaphyllum extract and citrus flavonoid hesperidin in AMPK Metabolic Formula can activate AMPK enzyme.This can help reduce unwanted abdominal fat, by targeting this kind of fat specifically for cellular energy production, thereby reducing belly fat.Why it works: One might think that all body fat is the same, but in fact, specific types of body fat causes greater health concerns than others. One of the worst kinds of fat is belly fat. Belly fat can actually escalate various natural aspects of the aging process that takes place in the body. (1) This is because abdominal fat can create compounds that may cause inflammation and oxidative stress. (2)AMPK is an enzyme found in each and every cell in your body. As a result of natural aging, AMPK levels are lowered, which is a major cause of increased amounts of unwanted belly (abdominal) fat.However, studies show that increasing AMPK activity can encourage the cells to stop storing fat and start using it to produce energy instead.AMPK Metabolic Formula contains two powerful ingredients ActivAMP® Gynostemma pentaphyllum and citrus flavonoid hesperidin, which it uses to trigger the AMPK enzyme. (2,3) This, in turn, causes the body to start burning unwanted abdominal fat. (4,5)This is because the increased levels of AMPK enzyme are telling the body to stop storing belly fat and instead use it to create ATP, the main source of energy for cells.Furthermore, it can also help maintain cholesterol levels already within the normal range and also promote the vascular function.The science behind the product: Gynostemma pentaphyllumG. pentaphyllum, or jiaogulan, is a plant used in traditional Asian medicine for longevity promotion, and is distantly related to the cucumber. (7)Today, scientists have uncovered the reason why Asian doctors prescribed G. pentaphyllum to inhibit various age-related health issues; the reason is that it promotes AMPK activation. (6, 8)Not only does G. pentaphyllum activate AMPK, but it also transports excess fats into the mitochondria, which are the “powerhouses” of the cell. Here it is utilized for energy production. (8) This results in a highly efficient cellular energy production and therefore a sharp reduction in unnecessary fat storage.Furthermore, extracts of G. pentaphyllum have other beneficial properties. This includes the ability to prolong the lives of cells which are put under pressure from stresses induced by oxidation and fat accumulation. (9,10)Studies have confirmed what researchers found in lab research: G. pentaphyllum can boost AMPK activity and also provide important longevity benefits.Citrus flavonoid hesperidinHesperidin is a flavonoid naturally found in citrus fruits. Large studies associate increased consumption of flavonoid-rich foods, such as citrus, with reduced risk for cardiovascular problems.Hesperidin has been shown to promote AMPK activation, help regulate inflammatory factors, and support blood vessel function. (11, 12) Thus, hesperidin complements G. pentaphyllum to modulate abdominal fat distribution.Hesperidin can also help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels and encourage healthy vascular function.Try AMPK Metabolic Activator and take the fight against belly fat to the cellular level.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: AMPK Metabolic Formula, EU features powerful ingredients that can activate the AMPK enzyme in your cells. This activation can help reduce unwanted abdominal fat by targeting it specifically for cellular energy production. Beyond fat metabolism, this formula can help maintain cholesterol levels already within normal range and promote optimal vascular function.

Why this formula works: Did you know that not all body fat is the same? Belly fat is particularly concerning because it can create compounds that may cause inflammation and oxidative stress, potentially escalating various natural aspects of aging in your body. AMPK is an enzyme present in every cell. As a natural result of aging, AMPK levels decline, which is a major factor in increased amounts of unwanted abdominal fat. Research demonstrates that increasing AMPK activity can encourage cells to stop storing fat and start using it to produce energy instead. This formula contains two powerful ingredients that work together to trigger the AMPK enzyme, causing your body to burn unwanted abdominal fat by converting it into ATP, the main source of energy for cells.

Backed by science: Gynostemma pentaphyllum for AMPK activation and longevity Gynostemma pentaphyllum, also known as jiaogulan, is a plant traditionally used in Asian medicine for longevity promotion. Scientists have discovered that it inhibits various age-related concerns by promoting AMPK activation. Not only does Gynostemma pentaphyllum activate AMPK, but it also transports excess fats into the mitochondria, your cells' powerhouses, where they're utilized for energy production. This results in highly efficient cellular energy production and a sharp reduction in unnecessary fat storage. Additionally, extracts of this plant can prolong the lives of cells under stress from oxidation and fat accumulation, providing important longevity benefits. Citrus flavonoid hesperidin for complementary metabolic support Hesperidin is a flavonoid naturally found in citrus fruits. Large studies associate increased consumption of flavonoid-rich foods with reduced cardiovascular concerns. Hesperidin promotes AMPK activation, helps regulate inflammatory factors, and encourages blood vessel function. This ingredient complements Gynostemma pentaphyllum to modulate abdominal fat distribution while helping maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels. Are you ready to take the fight against belly fat to the cellular level? This dual-ingredient approach offers a comprehensive strategy for metabolic support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

AMPK is an enzyme present in every cell. As a natural result of aging, AMPK levels decline, which is a major factor in increased amounts of unwanted abdominal fat. Research demonstrates that increasing AMPK activity can encourage cells to stop storing fat and start using it to produce energy instead. This formula contains two powerful ingredients that work together to trigger the AMPK enzyme, causing your body to burn unwanted abdominal fat by converting it into ATP, the main source of energy for cells.
product.backed_by_science: Gynostemma pentaphyllum for AMPK activation and longevity Gynostemma pentaphyllum, also known as jiaogulan, is a plant traditionally used in Asian medicine for longevity promotion. Scientists have discovered that it inhibits various age-related concerns by promoting AMPK activation. Not only does Gynostemma pentaphyllum activate AMPK, but it also transports excess fats into the mitochondria, your cells' powerhouses, where they're utilized for energy production. This results in highly efficient cellular energy production and a sharp reduction in unnecessary fat storage. Additionally, extracts of this plant can prolong the lives of cells under stress from oxidation and fat accumulation, providing important longevity benefits. Citrus flavonoid hesperidin for complementary metabolic support Hesperidin is a flavonoid naturally found in citrus fruits. Large studies associate increased consumption of flavonoid-rich foods with reduced cardiovascular concerns. Hesperidin promotes AMPK activation, helps regulate inflammatory factors, and encourages blood vessel function. This ingredient complements Gynostemma pentaphyllum to modulate abdominal fat distribution while helping maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels. Are you ready to take the fight against belly fat to the cellular level? This dual-ingredient approach offers a comprehensive strategy for metabolic support.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The health benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids are manyfold and include support for heart health, brain function, and balancing of the inflammatory response. Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract adds sesame lignans and olive extract to the essential fatty acids EPA and DHA from fish oil for enhanced health benefits.Why it works:The health benefits of eating cold-water fish are robust. However, concerns remain about contaminants found in wild and farm-raised fish in public. This ought not to stop consumers from including fish in their diet. The longevity advantages of consuming cold-water fish instead of foods like beef are remarkable.Omega-3 derived from fish oil supports heart health, brain function, and helps to balance the inflammatory response. There is no debate about the broad-spectrum benefits of omega-3 fatty acids.The fish oil in this formula is made with Pure+™, a wild fish oil concentrate derived from South Pacific Ocean anchovy. Processed in Chile within hours of harvest, you can be confident that you’re getting an exceptionally fresh fish oil formula.The high quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants. The science behind the product:IFOS™ 5-star-rated formulaLife Extension's Super Omega-3 is using a fish oil concentrate made from South Pacific anchovy. Caught off the coast of Chile in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, this fish oil is processed within hours of harvest for exceptional freshness. The fish oil in the Super Omega-3 formula has earned the highest, 5-star rating from IFOS™, an independent organization that sets the standard for fish oil purity, potency and freshness.High-quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants that are present in the fish itself. The enhanced molecular distillation method utilizes redundant processes to gently remove detectable environmental toxins.Enriched with olive extract & sesame lignans There are literally hundreds of fish oil supplements on the market. Only the formula in Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract product incorporates omega-3, olive fruit extract, and sesame lignans to enhance the health benefits of the omega-3 fatty acids. Polyphen-Oil™ olive extract (fruit and lead): 2 softgels supply the polyphenol content equivalent to that of more than 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil. Research indicates that a combination of fish oil and olive oil can support a healthy inflammatory response better than fish oil aloneSesame lignans and natural lemon flavor: The role of sesame lignans is to augment the benefits of fish oil by several mechanisms such as guarding the unsaturated fatty acids in the body against oxidation and directing them towards pathways that help with inflammatory reactions. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

It's a comprehensive omega-3 formula with synergistic nutrients that enhance the omega-3 benefits.Why it works:Researchers have long known the health benefits of omega-3 fatty acids, which are abundant in the Mediterranean diet. What are the health benefits of astaxanthin? Astaxanthin is a red-orange carotenoid pigment naturally found in microalgae and krill oil. It's a powerful antioxidant shown to have widespread health benefits such as support joint, DNA, brain, heart, the immune system and mitochondrial health.Furthermore, it has also been shown to encourage healthy blood glucose levels for those already in the normal range and can protect sensitive cells in the eye.Polyphen-oil™ olive extract & sesame lignans The Mediterranean diet, full of olive oil and seafood, is associated with heart health and a healthy life span. The polyphenol-rich olive extract is concentrated and standardized to provide the benefits of olives’ heart health-promoting polyphenols. product.title: Pyridoxal 5'-Phosphate Caps, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is pyridoxal 5ˈ-phosphate? It is the active form of vitamin B6, a coenzyme participating in over 100 enzymatic reactions in the body. (1)Pyridoxal 5’-phosphate has been shown to protect against glycation reactions (2,3), thus supporting many aspects of health.Why it works:By inhibiting formation of advanced glycation end products (AGEs) throughout the body and working as a coenzyme in biochemical reactions, pyridoxal 5’-phosphate can support a healthy nervous system, cardiovascular and kidney function, immune and eye health, and more. (1,7,8) The science behind the product:Glycation reactions occur when sugar in the blood reacts with proteins and lipids in the body. These reactions are a natural consequence of aging and result in the formation of AGEs throughout the body. AGEs accumulate with time and contribute to some of the effects of aging. (4,5) Pyridoxal 5’-phosphate has been shown to protect lipids and proteins against glycation reactions. (2,3) Inhibiting the formation of AGEs can thus help support many aspects of your health. (6)In addition to this standalone product, Life Extension offers pyridoxal 5’-phosphate in two premier formulations: Mitochondrial Energy Optimizer with PQQ.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you getting the most bioavailable form of vitamin B6? Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate is the active coenzyme form of vitamin B6, participating in over 100 enzymatic reactions throughout your body. This formula has been shown to protect against glycation reactions, the process where sugar reacts with proteins and lipids. By inhibiting these harmful reactions, this advanced B6 form can encourage many aspects of your health and wellness.

Why this formula works: By inhibiting formation of advanced glycation end products (AGEs) throughout the body and working as a coenzyme in biochemical reactions, pyridoxal 5'-phosphate can promote a balanced nervous system. It also encourages optimal cardiovascular and kidney function. Additionally, this active form can help maintain immune and eye health. Unlike standard B6 supplements, pyridoxal 5'-phosphate requires no conversion and is immediately ready for use by your cells. As a coenzyme, it plays an essential role in hundreds of biochemical processes that keep you functioning at your best throughout the day.

Backed by science: Want to understand how this advanced B6 form protects your health? Let's explore the science behind glycation and enzymatic function. Understanding glycation reactions Glycation reactions occur when sugar in the blood reacts with proteins and lipids in your body. These reactions are a natural consequence of aging and result in the formation of AGEs throughout the body. AGEs accumulate with time and contribute to some of the effects of aging. By protecting against these reactions, you can help maintain youthful cellular function as the years go by. Protection for proteins and lipids Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate has been shown to protect lipids and proteins against glycation reactions. This protective effect is particularly important because glycation can damage cellular structures and impair their function. By inhibiting the formation of AGEs, this formula can help encourage many aspects of your health. This protection extends to multiple organ systems, from your heart to your eyes. Multi-system health support As a coenzyme participating in over 100 enzymatic reactions, pyridoxal 5'-phosphate plays a crucial role in maintaining your nervous system. It helps ensure that nerve signals are transmitted properly throughout your body. The formula also promotes cardiovascular and kidney function, helping these vital organs perform their essential roles. Additionally, it encourages balanced immune system activity and helps maintain optimal vision and eye health as you age.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols formula provides gamma tocopherol, a critically important form of vitamin E which can quench some of the most common free radicals. For an enhanced antioxidative effect and anti-ageing support, sesame lignans have been added to the formula to elevate the tissue levels of vitamin C and E, which both have antioxidative qualities.Why it works:Most commercial vitamin E supplements contain very small amounts if any gamma tocopherol (a specific type of vitamin E) at all. Special for this type of vitamin E is that it´s highly effective against one of the most dangerous free radicals in the body: peroxynitrite. This free radical is a big culprit in encouraging age-related decline why using gamma tocopherol to inhibit this type of free radical can help counteract the aging process.Life Extension has fortified its Gamma E Tocopherol supplement with standardized sesame lignans. Sesame lignans have been shown to promote antioxidative activity in tissues by increasing the levels of two antioxidative vitamins, vitamin C and E. In combination with tocopherols this provides a dual defense against free radicals. The Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols formula provides a potent dose of gamma tocopherol along with an extract from sesame lignans to help defend against free radicals, protect cells and inhibit the aging process.The science behind the product:Gamma tocopherol is considered very important because gamma tocopherol and not the ubiquitary alpha-tocopherol scavenges a particularly serious type of free radical called peroxynitrite. Human studies demonstrated that a combination of gamma tocopherol with sesame lignans was 25% more effective than gamma tocopherol/tocotrienols in suppressing tissue measurements for free radical and inflammatory response. Tocotrienols, another member of the vitamin E family, are recognized as nature’s most potent antioxidants. How to use:Take one (1) softgel once or twice daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: MSM, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is MSM? Methylsulfonylmethane or dimethyl sulfone (MSM) is a sulfur-containing molecule present in different plants and some body tissues. This natural compound has been studied for years. Over time, post-workout discomfort can start to detract from the healthy benefits of staying in shape. MSM has been shown to help relieve muscle and joint discomfort and promote healthy muscle structure after exercise. (1-3)Why it works: MSM is a crucial building block of joint tissue, cartilage, skin, hair, and nails. It is also an efficient source of sulfur which is used by many of the structural molecules in the body. (4) As you age you may experience decreased joint mobility and flexibility as well as increased joint stiffness and pain. Clinical research has shown that MSM can help counter all of these joint health issues and increase joint comfort for better movement, joint flexibility, and mobility and thereby help sustain the quality of life. The science behind the product:Relieving exercise-induced discomfortDespite its many benefits, exercise also generates oxidative stress. It is important for the body to maintain a healthy free radical balance. In clinical trials, MSM has helped maintain comfortable muscles and joints and promote healthy muscle structure after exercise. It does this, in part, by defending against the effects of exercise-induced oxidative stress. (1-3)Promoting joint health and comfortMSM is well-known as a supplement that can support joint comfort and promote joint mobility and function, and this has been shown in clinical trials. (5-7) One clinical study even demonstrated that the addition of MSM to the traditional joint health compounds glucosamine and chondroitin resulted in additive benefit. (8) In preclinical studies it helped inhibit inflammation to promote joint health. (9) How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Staying active is essential for your vitality, but post-workout discomfort can interfere with your fitness goals. This formula can help relieve muscle and joint discomfort that may occur after exercise while promoting optimal muscle structure. MSM, EU can encourage comfortable joint mobility and flexibility for better movement. This natural compound has been studied for years and shows promising results in maintaining joint comfort.

Why this formula works: MSM serves as a vital building block for joint tissue, cartilage, skin, hair, and nails. It provides an efficient source of sulfur, which is used by many structural molecules throughout your body. As you age, you may experience decreased joint mobility and increased stiffness. Clinical research demonstrates that MSM can help counter these joint health challenges and enhance comfort for better movement. This formula can promote joint flexibility and mobility, helping you maintain quality of life.

Backed by science: Do you want to understand how MSM works at a deeper level? Let's explore the research behind this powerful compound. Relieving exercise-induced discomfort Exercise generates oxidative stress in your body. Maintaining a balanced free radical environment is crucial for optimal recovery. In clinical trials, MSM helped maintain comfortable muscles and joints while promoting healthy muscle structure after physical activity. This compound defends against the effects of exercise-induced oxidative stress, which is why many active individuals incorporate it into their wellness routines. Promoting joint comfort and mobility MSM is well-known for its ability to encourage joint comfort and promote mobility and function. Multiple clinical studies have confirmed these benefits, making it a trusted choice for joint health support. One clinical study demonstrated that combining MSM with the traditional joint health compounds glucosamine and chondroitin resulted in additive benefits. In preclinical studies, it helped inhibit inflammation to promote optimal joint health.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Vitamin C and Quercetin, 60 tabs, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin C and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome brings a shot of vitamin C into the body that it can’t provide by itself. These compounds can help protect your body from oxidative stress, promote collagen formation, promote healthy immune function, and iron absorption. Vitamin C's biological activity is complemented by an ultra-absorbable form of the antioxidant quercetin. Vitamin C and bioflavonoids such as quercetin often occur together in healthy foods.Why it works:Vitamin C's health benefits are well known to nutritional researchers but at the same time it's an essential nutrient, meaning humans can’t create it internally. This means that we must get all of our vitamin C from our diet and supplements.Vitamin C and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome's unique formulation combines high-quality vitamin C with bio-quercetin that uses fibers from fenugreek seeds to increase bioavailability up to 62x.This in turn can help maintain healthy blood concentrations and enhance vitamin C whole body health benefits.The science behind the product:Vitamin CResearch has shown that vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant. It can scavenge free radicals and can provide protection from oxidative stress. Vitamin C can also stimulate iron absorption. Furthermore, it can also participate in the formation of collagen that supports arterial walls, skin, bones and teeth. Vitamin C also plays a role in protection against environmental and physical stresses such as ingestion of heavy metals, cigarette smoking, compromised immunity and extreme temperatures. Quercetin There is a scientific evidence that specialized compounds in fruits and vegetables provide critical protection against free radical assault. Quercetin: Is a bioflavonoid found in grape skins, onions, apples, buckwheat and other food sources.Has a long tradition of use relieving the effects of seasonal immune challenges.Has been shown in clinical trials to encourage a healthy immune response in physically fit adults. Can help inhibit oxidative stress and inflammation.May promote both cardiovascular and endothelial health. Can help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Vitamin C and Quercetin, 60 tabs, EU delivers essential vitamin C that your body cannot produce on its own, combined with ultra-absorbable quercetin for powerful antioxidant protection. This formula can help protect against oxidative stress, promote collagen formation, encourage immune function, and enhance iron absorption. The specialized bio-quercetin formulation complements vitamin C to provide comprehensive whole-body health support.

Why this formula works: Are you getting enough vitamin C from your diet alone? Since vitamin C is an essential nutrient that humans cannot create internally, we must obtain all of it from food and supplements. This formula combines high-quality vitamin C with bio-quercetin that uses fenugreek seed fibers to increase bioavailability up to 62 times. This enhanced absorption can help maintain optimal blood concentrations and amplify vitamin C's whole-body health benefits. Vitamin C and bioflavonoids like quercetin naturally occur together in many fruits and vegetables, making this combination particularly effective for supporting your health.

Backed by science: Vitamin C for antioxidant protection and collagen support Research demonstrates that vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant that can scavenge free radicals and provide protection from oxidative stress. It can also stimulate iron absorption, which is essential for cellular function throughout your body. Furthermore, vitamin C participates in collagen formation that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. It also plays a protective role against environmental and physical stresses such as heavy metal ingestion, cigarette smoking, compromised immunity, and extreme temperatures. Quercetin for immune and cardiovascular health Quercetin is a bioflavonoid found in grape skins, onions, apples, buckwheat, and other food sources with a long tradition of use for seasonal immune challenges. Clinical trials have shown that quercetin can encourage a balanced immune response in physically fit adults. This powerful bioflavonoid can help inhibit oxidative stress and inflammation while promoting both cardiovascular and endothelial health. Additionally, quercetin can help maintain blood pressure levels already within the normal range. Enhanced bioavailability for maximum benefits The bio-quercetin phytosome in this formula utilizes fenugreek seed fibers to dramatically increase absorption compared to standard quercetin. With up to 62 times greater bioavailability, you receive more of quercetin's beneficial compounds with each dose, making this an exceptionally efficient approach to antioxidant and immune support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: EU Ultra Binder
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: All bodies contain toxins, and a big part of detoxifying the body takes place in the gut. Many kinds of toxins reside here, including metals and endotoxins. Binders are compounds that are used to target specific types of toxins. Ultra Binder EU Formula, however, is a proprietary combination that combines the abilities of individual binders to target multiple kinds of toxins. This formula searches the gut for toxins and binds them, whereafter they are disposed of by being transported out of the body.Why it works: Detoxifying the body is a multi-step process where toxins are transported out of the body. Very often, these toxins reside in the gastrointestinal tract because they have been eliminated from other tissues via the liver or were present in the diet. Without a binding compound that can capture the toxins present in the gut, many of these will be absorbed or reabsorbed into the body. This can lead to increased levels of toxicity in the body. There are many binders out there that target specific types of toxins such as heavy metals, endotoxin (LPS), etc. The best kind of binder is a mixture that combines the utilities of each individual binder in a “multipurpose” toxin binder compound. Ultra Binder EU Formula has a unique optimized formula consisting of a combination of multiple binders to safely cleanse the body of many contaminants and support the body's purification processes.The science behind the product: Toxins are heavy metals, pesticides, herbicides, drug residues, food additives, mold, and bacterial metabolites. Ultra Binder EU Formula contains an optimal blend of the following ingredients to target the toxins: Activated charcoal – can bind LPS, pesticides, herbicides, persistent organic pollutants, and also mold toxins. Sodium Bentonite clay – can both bind aflatoxin and other mold toxins BiAloe® (Aloe vera) – has a soothing effect on the gastrointestinal mucosa, and minimizes gastric side effects which can occur when binders are taken alone. Chitosan – can bind to the bile and toxins which are being secreted together with it. This also includes heavy metals, BCPs (polychlorinated biphenyls), phthalates, as well as BPA. Fibregum™ (Acacia Gum) – supports the health of the gastrointestinal mucosa, supports the growth of a “good” bacterial flora, and promotes normal gastrointestinal function. Fibregum™ (Acacia Gum) is a low FODMAP-friendly prebiotic fiber. Modified citrus pectin – can bind to mercury and other heavy metals and help eliminate them from the body, without disrupting essential minerals Ultra Binder EU Formula can optimize the natural removal of debris and toxins such as heavy metals, endotoxin (LPS), and other unwanted microbial by-products located in the intestines.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Ultra Binder®ᴱᵁ can support your body's natural cleansing processes by targeting multiple types of toxins in the gastrointestinal tract. This proprietary blend combines the unique abilities of individual binders to capture heavy metals, mold toxins, pesticides, and other unwanted compounds that accumulate in your gut. Are you concerned about environmental toxins affecting your health? This comprehensive formula searches your digestive system for harmful substances and binds them, enabling your body to transport these contaminants out safely and effectively.

Why this formula works: Detoxification is a multi-step process where your body works to eliminate toxins, many of which reside in the gastrointestinal tract after being released from other tissues via the liver or consumed in your diet. Without effective binders to capture these substances, many toxins can be reabsorbed into your system, potentially increasing your body's toxic burden. While single-ingredient binders target specific types of toxins, the most effective approach combines multiple binding compounds into one multipurpose formula. Ultra Binder®ᴱᵁ features an optimized blend of complementary binders that work together to safely cleanse your body of various contaminants and encourage optimal purification processes. What makes this different from other detox products? The synergistic combination ensures comprehensive coverage across different toxin categories, while soothing ingredients protect your digestive comfort throughout the cleansing process.

Backed by science: Activated charcoal This powerful adsorbent binds to LPS (endotoxin), pesticides, herbicides, persistent organic pollutants, and mold toxins. Activated charcoal has been used for centuries as a natural purifier, working by trapping toxins and chemicals in its millions of tiny pores, preventing your body from absorbing them. Sodium bentonite clay This natural clay binds aflatoxin and other mycotoxins produced by mold. Bentonite clay carries a negative electrical charge that attracts positively charged toxins, creating an effective binding mechanism. When consumed, it swells and acts like a sponge, absorbing toxins and carrying them out of your system. BiAloe® (aloe vera) This ingredient provides a soothing effect on your gastrointestinal lining and helps minimize any gastric discomfort that can sometimes occur when taking binders alone. Aloe vera contains polysaccharides that coat and protect the digestive mucosa, promoting comfortable detoxification. Chitosan Derived from shellfish, chitosan binds to bile and the toxins secreted along with it, including heavy metals like mercury and lead, PCBs (polychlorinated biphenyls), phthalates, and BPA (bisphenol A). This fiber-like substance has a positive charge that attracts negatively charged compounds, facilitating their removal from your digestive tract. Fibregum™ (acacia gum) This prebiotic fiber encourages the health of your gastrointestinal mucosa, promotes the growth of beneficial bacterial flora, and supports normal digestive function. Fibregum™ is a low FODMAP-friendly ingredient, making it gentle on sensitive digestive systems while nourishing your gut microbiome. Modified citrus pectin This specialized form of pectin binds to mercury and other heavy metals, helping to eliminate them from your body without disrupting essential minerals like calcium, magnesium, and zinc. Modified citrus pectin has a unique molecular structure that allows it to enter the bloodstream and bind metals throughout your system, not just in the gut. Together, these ingredients create a comprehensive formula that can optimize the natural removal of debris and toxins from your intestines, including heavy metals, endotoxin, and unwanted microbial by-products.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.health_benefits_overview: Ultra Binder®ᴱᵁ can support your body's natural cleansing processes by targeting multiple types of toxins in the gastrointestinal tract. Are you concerned about environmental toxins affecting your health? This comprehensive formula searches your digestive system for harmful substances and binds them, enabling your body to transport these contaminants out safely and effectively.
product.why_this_formula_works: Detoxification is a multi-step process where your body works to eliminate toxins, many of which reside in the gastrointestinal tract after being released from other tissues via the liver or consumed in your diet. Without effective binders to capture these substances, many toxins can be reabsorbed into your system, potentially increasing your body's toxic burden. While single-ingredient binders target specific types of toxins, the most effective approach combines multiple binding compounds into one multipurpose formula. Ultra Binder®ᴱᵁ features an optimized blend of complementary binders that work together to safely cleanse your body of various contaminants and encourage optimal purification processes. What makes this different from other detox products? The synergistic combination ensures comprehensive coverage across different toxin categories, while soothing ingredients protect your digestive comfort throughout the cleansing process.
product.backed_by_science: Activated charcoal This powerful adsorbent binds to LPS (endotoxin), pesticides, herbicides, persistent organic pollutants, and mold toxins. Activated charcoal has been used for centuries as a natural purifier, working by trapping toxins and chemicals in its millions of tiny pores, preventing your body from absorbing them. Sodium bentonite clay This natural clay binds aflatoxin and other mycotoxins produced by mold. Bentonite clay carries a negative electrical charge that attracts positively charged toxins, creating an effective binding mechanism. When consumed, it swells and acts like a sponge, absorbing toxins and carrying them out of your system. BiAloe® (aloe vera) This ingredient provides a soothing effect on your gastrointestinal lining and helps minimize any gastric discomfort that can sometimes occur when taking binders alone. Aloe vera contains polysaccharides that coat and protect the digestive mucosa, promoting comfortable detoxification. Chitosan Derived from shellfish, chitosan binds to bile and the toxins secreted along with it, including heavy metals like mercury and lead, PCBs (polychlorinated biphenyls), phthalates, and BPA (bisphenol A). This fiber-like substance has a positive charge that attracts negatively charged compounds, facilitating their removal from your digestive tract. Modified citrus pectin has a unique molecular structure that allows it to enter the bloodstream and bind metals throughout your system, not just in the gut. Together, these ingredients create a comprehensive formula that can optimize the natural removal of debris and toxins from your intestines, including heavy metals, endotoxin, and unwanted microbial by-products.

product.title: Vegan Vitamin D3
product.description:
Serving size: 1 capsuleServings per container: 60Amount per day (1 capsule):%RI*Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol from algae) (5000 IU†)125 µg2500*RI = EU reference intake **No RI availableINGREDIENTS:Bulking agent (microcrystalline cellulose/ cellulose gel)), cholecalciferol (vitamin D), capsule (hydroxypropylmethylcellulose), anti-caking agents (silicon dioxide [nano], magnesium salts of fatty acids)†IU = international unitsNon-GMO DIRECTIONS:Take one (1) capsule daily with food.CAUTION:Individuals consuming more than 2,000 IU (50 µg) per day of vitamin D (from diet and supplements) should periodically obtain a serum 25-hydroxy vitamin D measurement. Vitamin D supplementation is not recommended for individuals with high blood calcium levels. WARNINGS:Keep out of reach of children.Do not exceed recommended daily dose.Do not purchase if outer seal is broken or damaged.Consult with your physician if you are undergoing treatment for a medical condition or if you are pregnant or lactating.A food supplement should not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.Store tightly closed in a cool, dry place.

Health benefits overview: Vegan Vitamin D3 can provide 5000 IU (125 mcg) of plant-based cholecalciferol sourced from algae. This essential vitamin affects nearly every cell in your body and is critical for optimal health. Are you following a vegan or vegetarian lifestyle but still want the benefits of vitamin D3? This formula delivers the same bioavailable form of vitamin D3 your body naturally produces from sunlight, making it perfect for those seeking plant-based nutrition.

Why this formula works: Vitamin D is a fat-soluble prohormone that affects the expressions of more than 200 genes in your body. Nearly every cell in your body has receptors for vitamin D, which is why it's considered one of the most important vitamins for overall health. Traditional vitamin D3 supplements are derived from lanolin in sheep's wool, making them unsuitable for vegans. This formula uses cholecalciferol extracted from algae, providing the same highly absorbable D3 form in a completely plant-based formula. Do you want optimal vitamin D levels without compromising your dietary choices? Each vegetarian capsule delivers a potent 5000 IU dose to support your health needs.

Backed by science: Want to understand why vitamin D3 is so essential for your body? Let's explore the science behind this vital nutrient and its wide-ranging health benefits. Vitamin D3 for immune system support Vitamin D is especially known for immune health support. It can help support a balanced inflammatory response and optimal immune function throughout your body. Research shows that maintaining adequate vitamin D levels is essential for your immune system to work properly. Are you getting enough vitamin D to support your immune defenses? Many people have insufficient levels, especially those who spend limited time outdoors or live in northern climates. Bone health and calcium absorption Most notably, vitamin D3 enhances crucial calcium delivery by increasing the absorption of calcium through the intestinal walls. In fact, in the absence of vitamin D3, we only absorb 10 to 15% of calcium from the food we eat, but when vitamin D3 is present, the calcium absorption is increased to 30 to 40%. This makes vitamin D3 essential for maintaining strong, dense bones throughout your life. It can help support bone remodeling and keep your skeleton strong and adaptable. Cardiovascular and cognitive support Vitamin D3 can help maintain youthful cognitive function and supports brain health. The vitamin also helps maintain blood pressure already within the normal range, contributing to cardiovascular wellness. Recent findings show this vitamin is vital for many normal body processes beyond just bone health, including promoting optimal cardiovascular and neurological function. Plant-based cholecalciferol from algae This formula provides cholecalciferol – the same active form of vitamin D3 your skin produces when exposed to sunlight – but sourced entirely from algae. This makes it an ideal choice for vegans, vegetarians, and anyone seeking plant-based supplements without sacrificing bioavailability or effectiveness.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Skin Supporting Ceramides, EU
product.description:
What are ceramides? When it comes to healthy, supple, youthful-looking skin, moisture is key. Ceramides are natural lipids (fats) that make up over 50% of your skin's barrier. They are the "glue", helping to bind skin cells together. (1,2) These cells are essential for healthy and smooth skin, helping to retain moisture and protect it against external stressors. (3) However, as we age, ceramide levels naturally decline, leading to dryness, roughness, and fine lines. (4) Clinically studied ceramides for smoother, supple skinIn a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, healthy women who took 350 mg of wheat oil extract (rich in ceramides) once daily for 12 weeks. They reported (5):Visible reduction of wrinklesImproved skin hydrationHealthier-looking skinAnother placebo-controlled clinical trial found that 51 women taking 350 mg of wheat oil extract daily for 3 months showed measurable enhancements in skin hydration on arms and legs, along with smoother, more supple skin. (6) A third clinical evaluation showed significant improvements in skin roughness, scaling, and overall comfort in the ceramide group versus placebo. Electrochemical analysis also confirmed better skin hydration. (7) Nourishing healthy skin from withinSkin Restoring Ceramides is made with the exact same ultra-pure ceramide wheat oil as the studies. Add Skin Restoring to your daily beauty routine to support your skin from within.

Health benefits overview: Looking for radiant, youthful-looking skin that feels soft and supple? Skin Supporting Ceramides, EU can help maintain optimal skin hydration while encouraging the visible reduction of fine lines and wrinkles. This formula features clinically studied phytoceramides that can promote your skin's natural protective barrier from within.

Why this formula works: Ceramides are essential lipids that make up over 50% of your skin's barrier, acting as the "glue" that binds skin cells together. However, as we age, ceramide levels naturally decline, leading to dryness, roughness, and visible signs of aging. This formula delivers 350 mg of ultra-pure wheat oil extract rich in phytoceramides. These plant-derived ceramides can help replenish your skin's natural ceramide levels, supporting moisture retention and encouraging smoother, healthier-looking skin. By nourishing your skin from within, this supplement offers a unique approach to maintaining youthful skin appearance.

Backed by science: Clinically studied wheat oil ceramides for visible skin benefits In a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, healthy women took 350 mg of wheat oil extract (rich in ceramides) once daily for 12 weeks. The results were impressive: participants experienced visible reduction of wrinkles, improved skin hydration, and overall healthier-looking skin. Another placebo-controlled clinical trial with 51 women taking 350 mg of wheat oil extract daily for 3 months demonstrated measurable enhancements in skin hydration on arms and legs, along with smoother, more supple skin. A third clinical evaluation showed significant improvements in skin roughness, scaling, and overall comfort in the ceramide group versus placebo, with electrochemical analysis confirming better skin hydration. Ultra-pure quality for your skin health Skin Supporting Ceramides, EU is formulated with the exact same ultra-pure ceramide wheat oil used in clinical studies. Each liquid vegetarian capsule provides 350 mg of this specialized ingredient, making it easy to incorporate into your daily beauty routine. Are you ready to nourish your skin from within? This science-backed approach can complement your topical skincare routine by supporting skin health at a deeper level.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Zinc Caps, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Zinc supplementation can effectively support the aging immune defense.Zinc Caps provides a highly absorbable zinc formula containing a 15-milligram dose in each capsule.Moreover, Zinc Caps is a vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO zinc supplement.Why it works: Zinc is well known for its immune health benefits, supporting your body’s natural immune response.Unfortunately, research shows that zinc deficiency is widespread. (1,2) This can contribute to aging-related decline in immune function. Adding a zinc supplement to the daily routine can promote the aging immune systems as well as a healthy inflammatory response. (2-5)The science behind the product:Other crucial properties of zincThe benefits of zinc go beyond immune support:Zinc plays a key role in superoxide dismutase, one of your body's most powerful natural antioxidant enzymes.This mineral is required for the activity of over 300 enzymes that carry out essential biochemical reactions in your body. (2,6,7) Furthermore, zinc is essential for hormone production and regulate protein and DNA synthesis, insulin production, as well as thyroid and bone metabolism. (6,8)Zinc also promotes neurological health and vision, especially for older people. (7,9,10) A bioavailable formulaThe absorption of zinc can be limited, and specific compounds in plant sources and grains can inhibit absorption even more. (11)Zinc Caps contains a combination of highly bioavailable OptiZinc® and zinc citrate to provide a 15 milligram dose of zinc. OptiZinc® is a bioavailable form of zinc. (12,13) How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking to strengthen your immune defense as you age? Zinc Caps, EU can help maintain optimal immune function with 15 milligrams of highly absorbable zinc per vegetarian capsule. This essential trace mineral formula is designed to counteract age-related zinc deficiency, which can compromise your body's natural immune response. Each capsule combines bioavailable zinc forms to promote a healthy inflammatory response and encourage cellular protection.

Why this formula works: Zinc is widely recognized for its crucial role in immune health, helping your body's natural defense mechanisms function at their best. Research indicates that zinc deficiency is surprisingly common, particularly as we age, and this can lead to declining immune function. By incorporating a zinc supplement into your daily routine, you can help maintain your aging immune system. This essential mineral also encourages a balanced inflammatory response throughout the body.

Backed by science: Have you noticed your immune resilience isn't what it used to be? The science behind zinc reveals why this mineral is so essential for your health. Essential functions of zinc in the body Zinc plays a vital role in superoxide dismutase, one of the most powerful natural antioxidant enzymes your body produces. This mineral is required for the activity of over 300 enzymes that perform essential biochemical reactions throughout your system. Furthermore, zinc is critical for hormone production and regulates protein and DNA synthesis, insulin production, as well as thyroid and bone metabolism. The mineral also promotes neurological health and vision, which becomes increasingly important as we age. OptiZinc® and zinc citrate for optimal absorption Absorption of zinc can be challenging, and certain compounds found in plant sources and grains can inhibit uptake even further. This formula contains a combination of highly bioavailable OptiZinc® and zinc citrate, delivering 15 milligrams of zinc in each capsule. OptiZinc® is a bioavailable form of zinc that enhances absorption, ensuring your body receives the full benefits of this essential mineral. This dual-form approach maximizes effectiveness and helps overcome common absorption barriers.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Low Dose Vitamin K2, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin K found in Low-Dose Vitamin K2 can help contribute to counter calcification of the arteries thereby helping to maintain a healthy cardiovascular system. Vitamin K2 is also vital in transporting calcium from the bloodstream into the bone.Why it works:Calcification of the arteries can be a natural consequence of the aging process. Luckily, vitamin K can contribute to counter this phenomenon. Without adequate vitamin K levels, calcium in the blood can bind to the arterial wall resulting in calcification. As people age, even a minor deficiency of vitamin K can pose risks to the vascular system. An abundance of clinical data also reveals that vitamin K plays a role in maintaining normal and healthy bone density; vitamin K helps this by facilitating the transport of calcium from the bloodstream into the bones. Furthermore, vitamin K also helps calcium-regulating proteins function better in the arteries. Inadequate levels of vitamin K can also result in increased circulating levels of undercarboxylated osteocalcin which is associated with an increased bone loss in postmenopausal women.Vitamin K2 remains biologically active in the body longer than other K forms.The science behind the product:Human clinical studies report that vitamin K has an important role to maintain healthy bone density. This is done by facilitating the transport of calcium from the bloodstream into the bone. Matrix Gla-protein (MGP) is a vitamin K-dependent protein and has to be carboxylated to work effectively. Insufficient amounts of vitamin K can result in inactive uncarboxylated MGP which can accumulate at sites of arterial calcification. Since MGP can potentially inhibit arterial calcification, MGP plays a role in the aging cardiovascular system. Insufficient vitamin K in our body can lead the calcium in the blood to bind to the arterial wall resulting in calcification of the arteries.Researchers in Rotterdam conducted a large clinical trial study on heart health, about vitamin K2. 4,800 study participants were enrolled in the seven-year-long study. Study participants who received the highest amount of vitamin K2 in their diet experienced better cardiovascular condition. Studies report that proper intake of vitamin K can block the progress of further calcium accumulation. Furthermore, it was also shown to trigger up to 37% regression of preformed arterial calcification.How to use: Take one (1) softgel daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Gamma E with Tocopherols & Tocotrienols, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin E is not a single vitamin but a family of eight related, lipid-soluble, antioxidants that are present in different parts of plants. Unlike most vitamin E supplements, Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols & Tocotrienols contains all eight forms of vitamin E, providing the full impact of vitamin E’s free radical fighting antioxidant power. It can also inhibit cell aging, promote immune health, nervous system health, eye health, cognitive health, and more.Why it works:The tocopherol and tocotrienol subfamilies are each composed of alpha, beta, gamma, and delta fractions having unique biological effects.Along with other nutrients, tocopherols and tocotrienols are concentrated in the bran layers of the rye grain and are only present at low levels in the flour endosperm. Tocopherols are also present in algae, mint teas, and other foods. (1-4)Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols & Tocotrienols is an oral formula that provides a full spectrum vitamin E for potent antioxidant protection that can fight free radicals.The science behind the product:As a family of antioxidant compounds that fight free radicals, vitamin E is one of the most researched and most important nutrients to consume daily. One or more members of the vitamin E family may:Maintain cell membrane integrity and reduce cellular aging (5-7)Act as a free radical scavenger (8-11)Maintain healthy platelet aggregation (12-15)Promote a healthy nervous system and retina of the eye (16-19)Maintain healthy cognitive function (20-25)Enhance immune function (26-29)Gamma Tocopherol – fights free radicals implicated in agingPrestigious scientific journals have highlighted gamma tocopherol as one of the most critically important forms of vitamin E for those seeking optimal health benefits. In fact, studies show the combination of alpha- and gamma-tocopherol supplementation appears to be superior to either supplementation alone on biomarkers of oxidative stress and on inflammatory factors. (30,31) Most commercial vitamin E supplements contain little, if any, gamma tocopherol. They instead rely on alpha-tocopherol as the primary ingredient. However, it is gamma tocopherol (not the alpha form) that quenches peroxynitrite, the free radical that plays a major role in the development of age-related decline. (32)Tocotrienols – support arteries and nervesTocotrienols have shown superior action in maintaining arterial health. (33-36) In 2010, a team of Asian scientists demonstrated that this class of nutrients, which are difficult to obtain in sufficient quantities through dietary sources alone, may provide superior support in maintaining triglyceride levels already within the healthy range in aging individuals. Just 120 mg per day of gamma-delta tocotrienols (provided in 3-4 softgels) induced a 28% decline in triglyceride levels in the blood after just one month. This wonder nutrient is so effective because of its structure of double bonds in the isoprenoid side chain, making it a great scavenger of free radicals. (37)Research has shown that tocotrienols display potent neuroprotective properties and in particular, alpha-tocotrienol is being touted as the most potent neuroprotective form of vitamin E. (38-42)How to use: Take one (1) softgel once or twice daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.The natural separation of active ingredients may occur.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Enzymes, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Do you often experience digestive discomfort after eating?Digestive enzymes help you break down the foods you eat, as well as help you stay comfortable after meals. But your body doesn’t produce the enzymes you need to digest plant fiber – bad news for vegans, vegetarians, or anyone trying to up their intake of hard-to-digest veggies, legumes, fruit, or leafy greens.Super Enzymes can help support digestive comfort. This digestive health formula provides 10 vegetarian enzymes that help digest plant-based diets (leafy greens, legumes, and more) as well as staple macros such as protein, dairy, starches, and fat.Why it works:Research has shown that supplementing with digestive enzymes can promote optimal digestion and absorption of nutrients from the foods you eat. (1-3)Not every enzyme works on every nutrient. Super Enzymes contains alpha galactosidase that can help digest legumes and cruciferous vegetables (notorious for causing occasional abdominal bloating and discomfort), protease 3.0 that can help digest proteins, and lipase that can help digest fat.These digestive enzymes work in a variety of pH conditions. This is important because different parts of your gastrointestinal tract (stomach, intestines, etc.) have different pH levels, which can also affect digestion.The science behind the product:This innovative vegetarian and non-GMO formula can promote healthy digestion of hard-to-digest starches, sugars, and cellulose from vegetables, as well as proteins, fats, carbohydrates, and lactose. (2,3)It contains powerful digestive enzymes like alpha-galactosidase, protease 3.0, and lipase, as well as a 10-plant-based enzyme blend: Plant-derived sugar & starch – Alpha-galactosidase promotes carbohydrate digestion and supports GI comfort by breaking down oligosaccharides found in foods such as legumes (beans) and cruciferous vegetables such as cauliflower, broccoli, cabbage, and others which are notorious for causing occasional abdominal bloating and discomfort.Dietary fiber – Hemicellulase, xylanase, and pectinase help break down plant cell components to promote optimal digestion and nutrient absorption.Protein – Protease 3.0 helps digest proteins at acidic pH, like in the stomach. This enzyme helps break down stubborn protein and promotes the digestion of gliadin (a compound found in wheat). Protease SP helps break down most soluble proteins into smaller molecular weight peptides and free amino acids.Fats – Lipase is an enzyme that helps break down dietary fats.Dairy – Lactase is essential for digesting lactose from dairy products..How to use: Take one (1) capsule one to two times daily before the heaviest meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:All healthy people have billions of beneficial bacteria in the gastrointestinal tract (gut) that are essential for healthy digestion, nutrient absorption, and waste removal. Probiotics supply specific strains of these beneficial microbes through foods or supplements.The probiotic supplement FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance provides a powerful proprietary blend for maximum digestive health support.Why it works:FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance delivers 15 billion CFUs of friendly bacteria to your gut, containing seven probiotic strains of Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium to promote optimal digestion and whole-body health. The science behind the product:Benefits for the entire body People usually use probiotics just for digestive health, but scientific research is making it increasingly clear that they have other health benefits as well. For example, probiotics can modulate cell-signaling pathways and promote healthy immune and inflammatory responses. (1-3)Diets high in foods that contain probiotics have been shown to promote health and longevity. But we often don’t get enough probiotics from diet alone.A proprietary blend of probioticsFLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance delivers: B. breve Bbr8L. plantarum 14DB. animalis ssp. lactis BLC1L. paracasei IMC 502L. rhamnosus IMC 501L. acidophilus LA1B. longum ssp. longum SP54These probiotic strains are especially acid-resistant, which gives them the best chance of getting past the stomach. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Your gut houses billions of beneficial bacteria that are crucial for healthy digestion, nutrient absorption, and efficient waste elimination. FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance delivers 15 billion CFUs of these friendly microorganisms through a proprietary blend of seven powerful probiotic strains. This advanced formula goes beyond digestive wellness to promote whole-body health. Research shows that probiotics can influence cellular pathways and encourage healthy immune and inflammatory responses throughout your body.

Why this formula works: This science-backed probiotic delivers seven carefully selected strains of Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium bacteria to your digestive tract. Each capsule provides 15 billion colony-forming units designed to rebalance your gut flora. The strains in this formula are specially chosen for their exceptional acid resistance. This characteristic allows them to survive the harsh stomach environment and reach your intestines where they can flourish and provide maximum benefit.

Backed by science: Seven powerful probiotic strains for comprehensive gut support FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance contains a proprietary blend featuring B. breve Bbr8, L. plantarum 14D, B. animalis ssp. lactis BLC1, L. paracasei IMC 502, L. rhamnosus IMC 501, L. acidophilus LA1, and B. longum ssp. longum SP54. Each strain contributes unique benefits to your digestive ecosystem. Beyond digestive comfort: whole-body wellness While many people associate probiotics solely with gut health, scientific evidence demonstrates their far-reaching effects. These beneficial bacteria can modulate cellular signaling pathways and encourage balanced immune and inflammatory responses throughout your entire body. Acid-resistant strains for maximum effectiveness The probiotic strains in this formula are selected specifically for their superior acid resistance. This critical feature ensures they can withstand your stomach's acidic environment, allowing the live bacteria to reach your intestines where they establish colonies and deliver their health-promoting benefits. Dietary wisdom supported by modern science Populations consuming diets rich in probiotic-containing foods have demonstrated enhanced health and longevity. However, modern dietary patterns often fail to provide sufficient probiotic intake, making supplementation a practical solution for maintaining optimal gut flora balance.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Whole Food Multivitamin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: If you are looking for a vegetarian multivitamin, the searching can stop here. Whole Food Multivitamin was created for people who follow vegetarian and vegan diets. This potent formula combines a healthy dose of minerals with sustainably sourced, plant-derived vitamins to provide the nutrients your body needs to keep you healthy – without compromising your food choices. Why it works: As a child, you were probably told to eat your fruits and vegetables, and you still need to. To stay healthy, your body needs nutrients from fruits and vegetables, but it can be challenging to eat enough of them. Whole Food Multivitamin can help you fill the nutritional gaps by providing a healthy dose of minerals, phytonutrients, and vitamins taken from 13 plant-derived powders and extracts that can deliver 100% of the daily value of vitamins. The science behind the product: Everyone should be getting the most out of their multivitamin. Whole Food Multivitamin complements your plant-based diet, and you don't have to compromise your food choices. VITAMINS Vitamins from 13 plant-derived powders and extracts deliver the nutrition your body needs, from A to E: Vitamin A – this vitamin can support vision, healthy cell division, and a healthy immune response. (1) This formula contains a form of vitamin A derived from mixed carotenoids from African oil palm (fruit) extract, beta-carotene. African oil palm fruit is high in carotenoids, including alpha-carotene and beta-carotene. Vitamin C – this nutrient is considered a free radical scavenger and can help protect against oxidative stress, which is why it is associated with immune system health. Your body also uses vitamin C for collagen production, and the health of connective tissue found in arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. (2-4) Vitamin C is added from amla fruit extract, which is one of the richest plant-derived sources of vitamin C. Vitamin D3 – "The sunshine vitamin" is essential for maintaining cognitive health and performance. (5-8) It is also crucial for supporting calcium absorption into the bone matrix, promoting strong, healthy bones and teeth. (9) Vitamin D is also involved in heart health and in maintaining already-healthy blood pressure. (6,9) Vitamin E – is famous for offering antioxidant protection and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, and it is crucial for heart, brain, and immune health. (10,11) D-alpha tocopherol is added from sunflowers. It is a non-synthetic and highly bioavailable form of vitamin E for maximum whole-body health benefits. B-Complex – B-vitamins can help you maintain youthful metabolism. They help your body release the energy stored in the foods you eat to support the many biological processes that keep you healthy. (12-14) There is more than one "vitamin B", and because they are metabolically codependent, B vitamins work together to maintain overall health. This multivitamin formula features a B complex from quinoa sprouts. The formula also contains additional bioavailable forms of B vitamins like riboflavin 5'-phosphate, folate in the form of L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate calcium, and methylcobalamin for maximum "B" benefits. (15) MINERALS A multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. Whole Food Multivitamin provides: 150 mcg of iodine, 11 mg of zinc, 50 mg of magnesium, 55 mcg of selenium, as well as trace minerals like manganese, chromium, and molybdenum. Magnesium – is a helper cofactor or molecule in hundreds of enzyme systems that support different biological processes in the body. It can help maintain protein synthesis, muscle and nerve function, as well as support already-healthy blood sugar and already-healthy blood pressure levels. (16) The formula contains magnesium oxide, a form of magnesium that is high in elemental magnesium. Zinc – is an essential trace mineral your body uses for cellular metabolism and healthy immune function. (17) Eating a healthy diet, plus taking a multivitamin, should give you all the zinc your body needs. Selenium – can support heart and brain health, promote a healthy inflammatory and immune response, and encourage longevity. It can also help quench free radical activity. (18) The selenium in our multivitamin comes from selenium yeast. This form of selenium has been shown to increase the activity of specialized proteins that play an important role in protecting cells from oxidative stress. (19,20) PHYTONUTRIENTS This multivitamin includes phytonutrients equivalent to three servings of vegetables and two servings of fruit. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Theanine XR™ Stress Relief
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is L-theanine? It’s a naturally occurring amino acid that has been shown to support a healthy stress response. (1)Action-packed days demand a lot from our bodies. Over time, unmanaged stress can leave us feeling frazzled. (2) And most people are familiar with the notion “it’s just one of those days”.Green tea is rich in L-theanine, and for many, drinking a freshly brewed cup of green tea can help soothe the mind when life is hectic. A green tea break isn’t always an option though, and that’s why Life Extension created Theanine XR™ Stress Relief.Theanine XR™ Stress Relief can provide all-day stress support with extended-release technology, so you can stay calm and collected all day long – without drowsiness.Why it works: Theanine XR™ Stress Relief formula provides 400 mg of green tea’s amino acid L-theanine over a six-hour period. This is to promote a prolonged state of wakeful relaxation and in that way helping the body manage daytime stress. (1,3) L-theanine is shown to significantly increase brain wave activity that can help promote a state of wakeful rest. (4) It can also help decrease glutamate signaling, effectively calming the mind – even during those days where you feel you have too much on your plate. (1,3,6)The science behind the product:L-theanine and a relaxed mind Studies indicate that L-theanine can cross the brain-blood barrier, positively affecting the brain’s pathways associated with mental relaxation and calmness. It has been shown to help protect brain areas associated with your stress response from oxidative stress. (4) It can also help modulate the activity of excitatory neurotransmitters like glutamate and increase levels of GABA (5), another neurotransmitter that helps keep the mind calm and relaxed, especially when you’re having “one of those days.” (1,3,6) Formula with extended-release of l-theanine Your body metabolizes L-theanine quickly. You would need to drink several cups of green tea during the day or take multiple doses of regular L-theanine to maintain a steady supply of L-theanine, and green tea by itself contains very low levels of theanine. Using an immediate- and extended-release technology, scientists have found a way to allow L-theanine to stay in the body for up to six hours. One study in moderately stressed adults found that a single dose of this form of L-theanine led to a greater increase in indicators of relaxation compared to placebo. (7)This unique technology allow Theanine XR™ Stress Relief to provide a steady supply of the stress-modulating amino acid. Each vegetarian tablet is gluten-free and non-GMO.This supplement can be the perfect complement to your busy, modern lifestyle.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Theanine XR™ Stress Relief can provide all-day stress support through extended-release technology, allowing you to stay calm and collected all day long without drowsiness. L-theanine is a naturally occurring amino acid that has been shown to support a healthy stress response. Are you experiencing action-packed days that demand a lot from your body? Over time, unmanaged stress can leave you feeling frazzled, and this formula offers a convenient solution for maintaining mental calmness throughout your busy schedule.

Why this formula works: This formula provides 400 mg of green tea's amino acid L-theanine over a six-hour period. Do you wish you could enjoy the calming benefits of green tea without drinking multiple cups throughout the day? This innovative extended-release technology solves that problem by providing steady L-theanine levels for hours.

Backed by science: Want to understand how L-theanine supports your mental calmness and stress management? Let's explore the science behind this remarkable amino acid and its extended-release delivery system. L-theanine and a relaxed mind Studies indicate that L-theanine can cross the brain-blood barrier, positively affecting the brain's pathways associated with mental relaxation and calmness. Extended-release formula for lasting calm Your body metabolizes L-theanine quickly. You would need to drink several cups of green tea during the day or take multiple doses of regular L-theanine to maintain a steady supply, and green tea by itself contains very low levels of theanine. Using immediate- and extended-release technology, scientists have found a way to allow L-theanine to stay in the body for up to six hours. One study in moderately stressed adults found that a single dose of this form of L-theanine led to a greater increase in indicators of relaxation compared to placebo. Are you ready to experience sustained calmness throughout your day? This unique technology allows this formula to provide a steady supply of the stress-modulating amino acid, making it the perfect complement to your busy, modern lifestyle.
