product.title: Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Vitamin C is one of the most popular vitamins for a reason. It is a powerful antioxidant that can support immune health, fight free radicals and oxidative stress, help keep your skin healthy, and more. Humans are unable to synthesize vitamin C, and many people take high doses of this important nutrient to maximize its benefits. The primary objective, however, is not big doses but to achieve higher and sustained vitamin C levels in the bloodstream and cells. There is only so much vitamin C your body can absorb and use simultaneously. If you take a high-dose vitamin C supplement, some or much of it may be going to waste, literally, your body will flush out what it can’t use right away. Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula contains fenugreek hydrogel to protect vitamin C once ingested. The result is better absorption and vitamin C benefits that will remain longer for optimal effects.Why it works: The liposomal vitamin C is encased in sunflower-derived lipid spheres that support absorption. This vital nutrient is further protected by a hydrogel made from fenugreek fibers, so it remains active in your body longer than a conventional vitamin C supplement. Therefore, Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula can be a great way to maximize your vitamin C.The science behind the product: Protected vitamin C for an optimized result Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula can give your body more than 24 hours to make use of the essential nutrient vitamin C. To accomplish this Life Extension has combined 350 mg of vitamin C with an innovative liposomal delivery system: a lipid sphere made from sunflower oil that can support absorption. After that this liposomal vitamin C is infused into a hydrogel made of galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds. The liposomal coating and galactomannan fibers can allow vitamin C to be absorbed over a prolonged period. Health benefits for 24-hour Because your body will have time to absorb the liposomal vitamin C at a steady rate, your system can always have vitamin C on hand — for up to 24 hours. This can result in 7 times greater total plasma levels than a standard vitamin C supplement. This means your body can enjoy the benefits of vitamin C all day long. Vitamin C and your health Immune health: Vitamin C has a well-deserved reputation for immune support; it can help encourage a healthy immune response, so you can have more days feeling your best. (1-4) Cardiovascular health: Several clinical studies show that vitamin C can help promote healthy circulation, supporting everything from healthy arterial blood flow to healthy blood vessel function. (5-7) Respiratory health: Vitamin C may also support healthy lung function. In one clinical study, daily vitamin C intake encouraged breathing quality after exercise. (8) In another, vitamin C helped maintain healthy breathing when experiencing an immune response to a respiratory challenge. (9) Skin & cellular health: Vitamin C can help scavenge free radicals, which can take their toll on the appearance and overall health of your skin. (10) Daily vitamin C intake encouraged free radical scavenging in the skin — in fact, the benefits were dose-dependent, so the more vitamin C you absorb, the better. Vitamin C has also been shown in pre-clinical studies to encourage the production of collagen, one of the primary building blocks of your skin, tendons, and more. (11) Obviously, there are plenty of reasons to take a daily vitamin C supplement. And if you are going to do so, Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ is a good way to maximize your vitamin C.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant that can encourage immune function, combat free radicals and oxidative stress, and help maintain vibrant skin. However, humans cannot produce vitamin C internally, making supplementation essential for optimal health. Are you getting the most from your vitamin C supplement? Many high-dose formulas pass through your system before your body can fully utilize them. Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula can provide superior absorption and extended-release benefits, keeping vitamin C active in your body for up to 24 hours.

Why this formula works: The liposomal vitamin C is encased in sunflower-derived lipid spheres that can enhance absorption. This essential nutrient is further protected by a hydrogel made from fenugreek fibers, allowing it to remain active in your body significantly longer than conventional vitamin C supplements. This innovative delivery system can maximize your vitamin C benefits. Instead of flushing excess nutrients that your body cannot use immediately, the extended-release formula provides a steady supply throughout the day for optimal effectiveness.

Backed by science: Why does extended release matter for vitamin C? Your body can only absorb and utilize a certain amount of vitamin C at one time, which is why this innovative formula was designed to work differently. Protected vitamin C for optimized results This formula combines 350 mg of vitamin C with an advanced liposomal delivery system – a lipid sphere made from sunflower oil that can promote absorption. The liposomal vitamin C is then infused into a hydrogel made of galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds. The liposomal coating and galactomannan fibers allow vitamin C to be absorbed over a prolonged period, giving your body more than 24 hours to utilize this essential nutrient. This can result in up to 7 times greater total plasma levels compared to standard vitamin C supplements, meaning you can enjoy the advantages of vitamin C all day long. Immune health support Vitamin C has earned its reputation for immune support. It can help encourage a robust immune response, allowing you to experience more days feeling your best. During immune challenges, your body rapidly depletes vitamin C stores, making consistent supplementation especially valuable. Cardiovascular wellness Several clinical studies demonstrate that vitamin C can help promote optimal circulation. It encourages everything from arterial blood flow to blood vessel function, supporting your cardiovascular system's vital operations throughout your body. Respiratory health benefits Vitamin C may also encourage healthy lung function. In clinical research, daily vitamin C intake promoted breathing quality after physical activity. Additional studies showed that vitamin C helped maintain comfortable breathing during immune responses to respiratory challenges. Skin and cellular health Vitamin C can help neutralize free radicals, which can affect both the appearance and overall vitality of your skin. Daily vitamin C intake has been shown to encourage free radical defense in the skin, with dose-dependent effects – meaning the more vitamin C you absorb, the greater the potential results. Vitamin C has also been demonstrated in preclinical studies to promote collagen production, one of the primary building blocks of your skin, tendons, and connective tissues. This makes vitamin C essential for maintaining youthful-looking skin and structural health throughout your body.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Youthful Legs
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is diosmin? Diosmin is a compound derived from a sweet orange peel extract that has been recognized for its health qualities in Europe for over 30 years. This diosmin extract has been shown to promote healthy, comfortable legs. Why it works: The function of your vascular system is crucial for healthy, beautiful legs. With age, this complex circulatory system in your legs can weaken. Studies indicate that diosmin extract from orange peels can encourage healthy circulation the in legs by helping to maintain the elasticity and tone of your leg veins. (1) This in turn can promote leg comfort. Diosmin can also support your vascular system by helping inhibit inflammatory factors, which can affect vascular health. (2,3) The science behind the product: The unique formula of Youthful Legs provides a nutritional supplement that takes good care of your aging legs, promoting healthy, youthful veins — especially in your legs. Diosmin benefitsYouthful Legs uses diosmin from sweet orange peel extract. This form of diosmin has been micronized, that is broken into very fine particles. This is done to closely match clinically studied diosmin formulations. Study resultsAfter just two weeks a double-blind, placebo-controlled study of micronized diosmin recorded significant improvement in leg comfort from the participant's reports. (4) Convenient softgelThis well-studied unique compound is now available in a gluten-free, non-GMO and easy-to-swallow softgel. Take a step and enjoy healthy venous circulation and comfortable legs again.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Joint Mobility
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Does your joint discomfort keep you on the sidelines? Over 30% of adults experience joint discomfort, especially knee discomfort and challenges in everyday activities. For a healthy knee flexion (the term for the measurable degree to which your knee can bend) the Joint Mobility formula uses TamaFlex™, a clinically studied combination of tamarind seed and turmeric rhizome extracts. It’s shown to relieve minor knee and joint discomfort and improve range of motion. Why it works Aside from making sitting, standing, and other everyday activities uncomfortable, knee discomfort can slow you down, literally. Life Extension created the Joint Mobility formula in order to get you moving and back in the game. Tamarind and turmeric both may help inhibit inflammation to support joint comfort. Joint Mobility contains a powerful combination of these extracts, TamaFlex™, to help reduce discomfort in joints and knees, resulting in a better range of motion and increased walking speed and distance. The science behind the product: Joint Mobility uses a clinically studied combination of tamarind seed and turmeric rhizome extracts to help inhibit inflammation to support joint mobility and comfort: Turmeric (Curcuma longa) is a spice with a long history of traditional use. It’s shown to promote a healthy inflammatory response as well as whole-body health. Tamarind (Tamarindus indica) is a kind of tree native to tropical regions in Africa. It can produce edible fruit and is also prized for its health benefits. Relief from discomfort The first step to staying active is to encourage joint comfort. In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical study, people taking a turmeric-tamarind combination for 90 days showed significant improvements in knee and joint comfort compared to placebo. (1) Joint mobility and activity Staying active is a big part of staying healthy, and regular exercise has benefits for your mind, body, and mood. But it can be hard to stay active if your knees are giving you trouble. The group taking the combination of the turmeric and tamarind extracts had significantly better walking speeds and distance compared to those taking a placebo supplement. (1) Walking speed is relevant because it’s one of the most basic forms of human mobility, and higher walking speed is a good health indicator. A study found that men who were over 70 and able to walk at over 3 mph were less likely to die. (2) We can’t say Joint Mobility will help you live longer, but living an active, healthy lifestyle with plenty of regular exercise will help you. That’s why Life Extension created this unique formula. Knee flexion (range of knee motion) If your knees aren’t comfortable or flexible, you will have a hard time for instance lifting your knees. Joint Mobility may help with that. In the same 90-day study, people taking a turmeric-tamarind combination reported improved knee flexion. (1) How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.description:

The multivitamins are delivered in a soft, scrumptious raspberry-flavored, and chewable gummy, making it pleasant to eat and maybe easier to remember to take every day for both adults and children. In addition, it contains no artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives, it is dairy- and lactose-free, gluten-free, and has no soy – which can make it suitable for practically everybody, including children aged 3 and above. The science behind the product: The specially chosen selection of essential vitamins and micronutrients in Chewwies Multivitamins: Vitamin A can support vision, healthy cell division, and healthy immune response. (1) Vitamin B6, or pyridoxine, is a component of the vitamin B complex and necessary for optimal health. (2-4) Vitamin B12 is important for healthy energy levels and cognition and brain health. Vitamin C is considered a free radical scavenger and can help protect against oxidative stress; it also supports immune health in different ways. (8-10) Vitamin D3 is crucial for supporting calcium absorption into the bone matrix, promoting strong, healthy bones and teeth. It also supports immune function and healthy growth and development. (11) Vitamin E is famous for offering antioxidant protection throughout the body and thereby supporting the health of our cell membranes. (12,13) Biotin, also referred to as vitamin B7, is used as a cofactor in the body, supporting the activities of enzymes involved in the fatty acid synthesis, gluconeogenesis, and amino acid breakdown. (14,15) Calcium is the most abundant mineral in the body and is primarily found in the bones and teeth. In bone formation, calcium forms crystals that provide strength to maturing bone. Folic acid plays an important role in DNA function. It also supports the production of red blood cells, and healthy homocysteine and energy levels. (16) Chewwies Multivitamins contains no artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, lactose, gluten, or soy. In addition, it is UK's no. 1 gelatine-free and sugar-free vitamin and manufactured in accordance with Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). product.description:

This is especially true for children who are more vulnerable to unprotected sun exposure.A supplement of vitamin D3 can support healthy teeth and bone density, plus help maintain immune- and muscle function.Chewwies Vitamin D3 can help your child to sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year. As an adult, you may also take this supplement, especially if you are interested in a vegan gummy and chewable, tasty alternative.The science behind the product:Vitamin D is needed for the normal growth and development of your children. It supports the development of healthy bones, teeth, and a healthy immune function.Vitamin D deficiency is common among European children and adolescents, especially in certain risk groups such as children without adequate sun exposure. Supplementation with vitamin D is a convenient way to sustain sufficient 25-hydroxy vitamin D levels of >20 ng/ml.A daily supply of at least 600 IU is recommended for children in Europe, while children ages 3-10 requiring more vitamin D can safely consume up to 2000 IU of vitamin D per day, and adolescents and adults up to 4000 IU per day.Chewwies Vitamin D3 contains no artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, lactose, gluten, or soy. product.title: Chewwies Iron & Vitamin C
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Iron is an essential part of supporting oxygen transport and overall health, and deficiency can cause fatigue. Chewwies Iron & Vitamin C can offer a vegan iron formula to support your energy levels and reduce -tiredness and fatigue. Vitamin C is added for better absorption and normal function of the immune system. Why it works: Iron is crucial for blood production, and a deficiency of iron limits oxygen delivery to cells, resulting in fatigue, poor work performance, and decreased immunity. People who have trouble getting enough iron from food sources, for instance from a vegan vegetarian diet, may need an iron supplement. Chewwies Iron & Vitamin C is served in a delicious cherry-flavored sugar-free vegan gummy, which makes it more fun and easier to eat (and to remember). With this gummy format, Iron & Vitamin C offer a convenient way for anyone, from vegans to busy-mums and children 3 aged and above, to maintain their iron intake with a single one-a-day serving. The science behind the product: The importance of iron The human body needs iron as an essential part of supporting hemoglobin production and overall health, and deficiency can cause fatigue. Hemoglobin is an oxygen-carrying protein abundant in red blood cells. Maintaining healthy iron levels helps encourage oxygen delivery to cells, which in turn can support body energy and immune health. Iron is also an integral part of many proteins and enzymes that maintain good health, plus important for helping maintain cell growth and differentiation. (1) The role of vitamin C with iron Vitamin C has been shown to enhance iron absorption. In the digestive tract, it can support a chemical form of iron that is more easily absorbed by the body. (2) Suitable for vegans and children This product is suitable for adults and children aged 3 and above, including people with vegan and halal diets. Chewwies Iron & Vitamin C contains no artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, lactose, gluten, or soy. In addition, it is UK's no. 1 gelatine-free and sugar-free vitamin and manufactured in accordance with Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Chewwies Multi & Beauty
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Chewwies Multi & Beauty gummy contains the perfect blend of nutrients and antioxidants to promote thicker, healthier hair, stronger nails, and glowing skin, plus support overall health and wellbeing.Why it works:The vitamin supplement Chewwies Multi & Beauty offers a multi-blend of vitamin Bs, C, D3, folic acid, zinc, biotin, and more to help support energy and metabolism, immune function, bone health, fertility, and healthier hair, skin, and nails.It is served in delicious strawberry-flavored gummies suitable for vegan, halal, gelatine-free, and sugar-free diets. The science behind the product: The nutrients of the Chewwies multi-blend: Vitamin Bs can help you maintain youthful metabolism. They help your body release the energy stored in the foods you eat to support the many biological processes that keep you healthy. (1-3) There is more than one “vitamin B”, and because they are metabolically codependent, B vitamins work together to maintain overall health.Vitamin C is considered a free radical scavenger and can help protect against oxidative stress, which is why it is associated with immune system health. Your body also uses vitamin C for collagen production, and the health of connective tissue found in arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. (4-6)Vitamin D3 is essential for supporting calcium absorption into the bone matrix, promoting strong, healthy bones and teeth. Besides, vitamin D supports healthy immune and muscle function. (7)Folic acid plays an important role in DNA function. (8) Folic acid supplementation is recommended for pregnant women.Zinc can support the aging immune defense, and support a normal zinc balance in the body, thereby counteracting age-related impairment of immune function. (9-12)Selenium is an essential micronutrient for human health. Maintaining optimal selenium status can help ensure proper regulation of the immune system. (13)Biotin is a natural compound essential for maintaining healthy skin and hair, especially for people who are deficient in this compound (14). Biotin is also needed for cellular energy production.Chewwies Multi & Beauty contains no artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, lactose, gluten, or soy. In addition, it is UK's no. 1 gelatine-free and sugar-free vitamin and manufactured in accordance with Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Fast Acting Relief
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Is occasional discomfort getting you down or even ruining your day? Those days are over. Now you can fight back with a clinically studied combination of turmeric, Boswellia, and sesame extracts.How? By helping support a healthy inflammatory response and promote muscle, bone, and joint health, and wherever else you need it.Why it works:Leading an active, healthy lifestyle is key to a more fulfilling life. But discomfort can make daily activities challenging. Turmeric and Boswellia are first-class when it comes to promoting joint and muscle comfort. Clinical data indicate that they are even more effective when combined with black sesame extract. This super-powered blend has been clinically studied to quickly encourage comfort where you need it most — muscle tissue, bones, joints, ligaments, and beyond. The science behind the product: Fast Acting Relief is a novel formula that uses black sesame, turmeric, and Boswellia to help you relieve discomfort faster: The powerful combination of three potent extractsTurmeric and Boswellia can both inhibit inflammatory factors to help support bone, muscle, and joint health.A study from 2020 shows that combining these two extracts with black sesame can make them even more effective. The clinically-studied combination of these three extracts indicated relief for joint, bone, and muscle discomfort in only two and a half hours. (1)Striking results from the clinical studyParticipants were given a combination of black sesame seed oil, turmeric, and Boswellia extracts in a seven-day randomized, active-controlled study.On day one, participants taking the sesame, turmeric, and Boswellia blend reported comfort relief within two hours and a half. And by day seven, there was a 72% reduction in total discomfort. (1)Next time discomfort gets you down, reach for Fast Acting Relief formula, and kick occasional discomfort to the curb.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Testosterone Elite
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Testosterone is an essential hormone the body uses to maintain sex drive, bone mass, muscle mass and strength, and more.Age, poor nutrition, and stress are factors that can cause the body to produce less of this important hormone, and the result is less testosterone than your body needs. Men need testosterone to build muscles and maintain sexual health, but levels decline over time.Are you a man looking for a way to feel like yourself again? Life Extension Testosterone Elite formula combines high-quality nutrients to support different mechanisms of action associated with healthy testosterone levels.Why it works: Maintaining healthy testosterone levels can help support a man’s mood, healthy weight, and sexual health. Testosterone Elite offers a proprietary blend of pomegranate and cacao extracts with luteolin. These nutrients can complement each other’s impact, supporting healthy testosterone production and promoting youthful free and total testosterone levels.The science behind the product: Testosterone Elite can be ideal for men looking to support youthful testosterone levels: Why are men’s testosterone levels declining? There are a couple of reasons men may experience a decline in testosterone levels. Aging is the most common reason; the testes don’t produce the same amount of testosterone as they did before. (1-3) Another reason is the increased activity of SHBG (sex hormone-binding globulin), a testosterone binding protein that has been shown to increase with age. (1-3) The activity of the enzyme aromatase is also something that can affect testosterone levels. This enzyme converts testosterone into estradiol (estrogen). Estrogen is necessary for male health, but an excess conversion can deprive the body of needed testosterone and leave it in an estrogen-dominant state. Life Extension testosterone-friendly formula – what is in it?Tesnor®: This proprietary blend of pomegranate and cacao seed extracts has been shown to promote testosterone production in laboratory studies. A clinical study indicated that it encouraged healthy levels of free and total testosterone and supported physical strength and other benefits of healthy testosterone levels.Luteolin: Is a flavonoid or plant compound that’s well known for its powerful antioxidant properties, which can support a healthy inflammatory response, and protect against cellular stress. (4) In a preclinical study, luteolin was shown to help inhibit the activity of the aromatase enzyme, and it was indicated to promote testosterone production by promoting the conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone, the precursor hormone for testosterone production.This convenient, once-daily formula is gluten-free and non-GMO, a perfect complement to a testosterone-friendly lifestyle.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Testosterone is a vital hormone that plays a key role in maintaining muscle mass, bone density, sex drive, and overall vitality in men. As you age, factors like stress and poor nutrition can lead to declining testosterone levels, leaving you feeling less energetic and vital than before. Testosterone Elite can help men maintain youthful testosterone levels through a science-backed combination of premium ingredients. This formula can promote physical strength, enhance sexual wellness, and encourage balanced mood for overall well-being.

Why this formula works: Maintaining optimal testosterone levels can help encourage a man's vitality, sexual function, and body composition. This formula offers a proprietary blend of pomegranate and cacao extracts combined with luteolin to promote healthy testosterone production while supporting youthful free and total testosterone levels. These nutrients work together synergistically, complementing each other's beneficial effects on hormonal balance. The ingredients can help inhibit excess estrogen conversion while promoting your body's natural testosterone production for comprehensive hormonal support.

Backed by science: Have you ever wondered why men's testosterone levels decline with age? Multiple factors contribute to this natural process, and understanding them can help you make informed decisions about your hormonal health. Tesnor®: proprietary pomegranate and cacao blend This unique combination of pomegranate and cacao seed extracts has demonstrated the ability to encourage testosterone production in laboratory studies. In a clinical trial, participants showed improvements in free and total testosterone levels along with enhanced physical strength. The blend can promote athletic performance and encourage the multiple advantages associated with balanced testosterone levels. Pomegranate extract is rich in polyphenols that provide antioxidant protection, while cacao contributes bioactive compounds that work together to optimize hormonal function. Luteolin: flavonoid for aromatase support Luteolin is a plant compound celebrated for its remarkable antioxidant properties. This flavonoid can help protect your cells against oxidative stress while encouraging a balanced inflammatory response throughout the body. In preclinical research, luteolin showed the ability to help inhibit aromatase enzyme activity. Aromatase converts testosterone into estradiol (estrogen), and while some estrogen is necessary for male health, excessive conversion can deprive your body of needed testosterone. Luteolin may also encourage testosterone production by promoting the conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone, the precursor hormone for testosterone synthesis. Understanding testosterone decline Aging naturally leads to reduced testosterone production as the testes produce less of this essential hormone over time. Another factor is increased activity of SHBG (sex hormone-binding globulin), a protein that binds to testosterone and has been shown to increase with age, making less testosterone available for your body to use. This convenient once-daily formula is gluten-free and non-GMO, making it an excellent complement to a testosterone-friendly lifestyle that includes regular exercise, adequate sleep, and stress management.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Rest & Renew
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:An estimated 45 million people in Europe have problems with sleeping. (1)Even if you do get to bed at a decent hour, it's not always easy to get the quality sleep you need for your body to restore itself for the coming day. The amount of sleep you get is important, but the quality of your sleep plays an important role in your health as well. Poor sleep quality can affect cognitive health, metabolic health, and more.The Rest & Renew formula combines a clinically-studied ashwagandha extract with a dual-melatonin to help you get restorative and restful sleep, so you can wake up well-rested.Why it works: Not all sleep is the same. Sometimes getting the recommended hours of sleep isn’t enough. The quality of your sleep is just as important as the quantity. Shoden® ashwagandha has been clinically studied to support restorative sleep, cognitive function, energy, and vitality. (2) Immediate and extended-release melatonin can help you fall asleep quickly and stay asleep all night. So, when you wake up in the morning, this unique combination can support that you not only feel well-rested but also mentally attentive, with a more positive perspective, and ready for the day.The science behind the product: Restorative sleep — what is that? Do you experience that even though you get enough sleep, you’re still struggling to maintain focus and energy throughout your day? Your body goes through a restorative process during sleep, and if the various stages of sleep are interrupted, you may experience general fatigue as well as stress, lack of focus, and energy. Shoden® Ashwagandha Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) has been used in India for centuries. Shoden® ashwagandha has been shown to support several aspects of healthy sleep, such as how long it takes to fall asleep, how long you remain asleep, and the ultimate goal of restorative sleep. (2) Life Extension Rest & Renew formula includes the clinically studied dose of Shoden® ashwagandha (120 mg). MicroActive® Melatonin Our bodies naturally produce melatonin (also called the sleep hormone) to keep our day/night rhythm in tune. But if you struggle with sleep, it’s possible your body isn’t producing enough. Each capsule of Rest & Renew contains 1.5 mg of MicroActive® Melatonin. This novel blend of immediate- and extended-release melatonin can help you fall asleep quickly and stay asleep all night long. It’s time to feel refreshed. It’s time for Rest & Renew. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: One-Per-Day Tablets
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension's One-Per-Day Tablets have the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin formula that can fit inside one daily tablet. This gives you far greater availability of the essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients than many regular store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can support your health in a myriad of ways, and they do so at a standout economical price.Why it works:Researchers have demonstrated that unless you are taking the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day, you will not fully receive their benefits, which can lead to better health and well-being.So, if you want to receive an ideal dose of vitamins every day of the year, why not take one that is worth it? The ultra-low cost of One-Per-Day makes it a standout product on the European supplement market. One-Per-Day Tablets pack a potent punch of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients which can provide many different health benefits.The science behind the product:Most notably, the soy-free One-Per-Day Multivitamin contains a bioactive form of the B-vitamin folate 5-MTHF, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more.Selenium – supports heart and brain health, promotes a healthy inflammatory and immune response, and helps quench free radical activity. One-Per-Day has three forms of selenium (200 mcg total): SelenoExcell®, Se-methyl L-selenocysteine, and sodium selenite. (1, 2)Apigenin – is a powerful bioflavonoid present in many vegetables and fruits, which can increase cell protection. (3)Bioactive quercetin – One-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. (4)Vitamin D – can provide significant support for healthy bone density. Vitamin D also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it also plays a role in immunity. Insufficient intake of vitamin D can be linked to common age-related problems. (5, 6)Vitamin C – it can scavenge free radicals in the body and can protect tissues from oxidative stress. Vitamin C is a vital cofactor in the formation of collagen. Collagen is a type of connective tissue that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C is also involved in supporting the immune system. This can be done by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes. These are cells that make up about 25% of all white cells in the blood. (7-9)B vitamins – your body uses a number of B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. Life Extension One-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more. (10)Alpha-lipoic acid – can promote liver health, nerve health and more. This universal antioxidant can also help boost glutathione levels already in the normal range. (11-13)Bioactive 5-MTHF folate – One-Per-Day formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. (14, 15)Mixed vitamin E tocopherols – there are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and One-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is better than taking either nutrient alone. The formula provides more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. (16)Crominex® 3+ biologically active chromium – chromium helps maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. Crominex® 3+ is a highly stable and biologically active form of chromium optimized with Capros® amla Indian gooseberry extract to promote endothelial health and PrimaVie® shilajit for supporting cellular energy. (17)Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health – standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in our One-Per-Day formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress.High-potency minerals, antioxidants, and extracts – a multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. One-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: One-Per-Day Multivitamin deliver the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin formula that fits inside one daily tablet. This gives you far greater availability of essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients compared to many standard store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can support your health in numerous ways. This comprehensive formula does so at an outstanding economical price, making optimal nutrition accessible for daily wellness.

Why this formula works: Are you receiving the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day? Research demonstrates that unless you obtain optimal amounts of essential nutrients daily, you won't fully experience their benefits for health and well-being. If you want optimal vitamin intake throughout the year, why not choose a formula that's truly worthwhile? The exceptional value of One-Per-Day makes it a standout product in the supplement market. One-Per-Day pack a potent combination of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients that can provide comprehensive health benefits throughout your body.

Backed by science: This soy-free multivitamin contains bioactive forms of essential nutrients including 5-MTHF folate, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more. Selenium for cellular protection Selenium encourages heart and brain health while promoting a balanced inflammatory response and robust immune function. It also helps neutralize free radical activity. One-Per-Day features three forms of selenium totaling 200 mcg: SelenoExcell®, Se-methyl L-selenocysteine, and sodium selenite. Apigenin and ultra-absorbable quercetin Apigenin is a powerful bioflavonoid found in many vegetables and fruits that can enhance cellular protection. This formula also contains 5 mg of quercetin integrated into a phytosome – a phospholipid sphere that encases the botanical compound to enhance absorption. This quercetin delivers up to 50 times greater bioavailability than standard forms, supporting cellular health, endothelial function, and immune activity. Vitamin D for bone density and cellular health Vitamin D can provide significant support for maintaining optimal bone density throughout your life. It also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, vitamin D contributes to immune system function, making it essential for whole-body wellness. Vitamin C for antioxidant protection Vitamin C scavenges free radicals in your body and helps protect tissues from oxidative stress. As a vital cofactor in collagen formation, vitamin C supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. It also encourages immune system function by increasing glutathione levels in lymphocytes – cells comprising about 25% of white blood cells. B vitamins for energy metabolism Your body uses B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use for daily functions. One-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more to support optimal metabolic processes. Alpha-lipoic acid and bioactive folate Alpha-lipoic acid can promote liver health, nerve health, and more as a universal antioxidant. It also helps maintain glutathione levels already within normal range. The formula features 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid – particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants affecting folate metabolism. Mixed vitamin E tocopherols and biologically active chromium One-Per-Day provides all four forms of tocopherol vitamin E. Evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is more effective than either nutrient alone for addressing oxidative stress biomarkers and promoting a balanced inflammatory response. The formula delivers more than 80 mg of mixed tocopherols. Additionally, Crominex® 3+ chromium helps maintain blood sugar levels already within the healthy range, optimized with Capros® amla extract and PrimaVie® shilajit. Eye health nutrients and essential minerals Standardized marigold extract provides both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin to promote ocular health and help inhibit oxidative stress. The comprehensive mineral blend includes 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands, plus 100 mg magnesium, 150 mcg iodine, and trace minerals like manganese and boron.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Mega Green Tea Extract, EU
product.description:
Polyphenols Compounds & EGCGGreen tea is loaded with plant compounds called polyphenols, the most well-characterized of which is EGCG. EGCG forms a powerful antioxidant, which has been subjected to extensive scientific research and found to be much more potent than vitamins C and E. Among the abundant health-promoting properties of EGCG is healthy cell reproduction, (1) metabolic function, and cardiovascular health support. (2)EGCG can also help protect brain health, (3) benefit immune system function, and help promote a healthy body weight. (4,5)One cup of green tea provides roughly 150-300 mg of polyphenols (6) and has antioxidant effects that are greater than a serving of broccoli, spinach, carrots, or strawberries. Each capsule of Decaffeinated Mega Green Tea Extract provides 725 mg of green tea extract, which is the equivalent of more than three cups of green tea. This 98% green tea extract is standardized to provide high antioxidant potency, using the most important polyphenol of green tea. Moreover, green tea powdered extracts have been shown to absorb 60%-90% better into the bloodstream and to be far more bioavailable than drinking green tea. The Benefits of Green TeaGreen tea has been shown to provide many benefits including: Protects against oxidation: Green tea polyphenols are capable of directly neutralizing destructive free radicals and are also thought to boost the body's own internal oxidative stress defenses. They've also been shown to inhibit oxidative stress. (7-9)Cellular health support: Green tea supports healthy cellular proliferation. (1) In fact, the green tea polyphenol EGCG has a remarkably broad array of cellular health benefits, exerting a positive influence on mitochondrial health, intracellular signaling pathways, intracellular messengers, transcription factors, healthy gene expression and more. (10)Cholesterol management: Green tea, green tea extracts and EGCG can help maintain already-healthy blood cholesterol, LDL and triglyceride levels. (11,12)Neuroprotection and metabolic health: Green tea and its polyphenols, including EGCG, help protect nerve cells and nerve function, have been shown to help preserve metabolic health, and help maintain already-healthy glucose levels. (13-15)Also: Fluid-stabilising properties, promoting weight loss, boosting the effectiveness of enzymatic phase II detoxification, and enhancing immune function. An Advanced ExtractDecaffeinated Mega Green Tea Extract has been concentrated and dual standardised to ensure the highest quality, consistency and biological activity. This advanced extract contains 98% total polyphenols and 45% epigallocatechin-3-gallate (EGCG).

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for a powerful way to protect your cells from daily oxidative stress? Green tea is loaded with plant compounds called polyphenols, with EGCG being the most well-researched. This formula can encourage optimal cellular health, promote cardiovascular wellness, and help maintain metabolic function. EGCG forms a potent antioxidant that is much more powerful than vitamins C and E, offering you comprehensive protection for your overall well-being.

Why this formula works: Each capsule of Mega Green Tea Extract, EU provides 725 mg of concentrated green tea extract. This is equivalent to more than three cups of green tea, delivering optimal polyphenol content in a convenient form. This 98% green tea extract is standardized to provide high antioxidant potency using the most important polyphenol of green tea. One cup of green tea provides roughly 150–300 mg of polyphenols and has antioxidant effects greater than a serving of broccoli, spinach, carrots, or strawberries. Green tea powdered extracts have been shown to absorb 60–90% better into the bloodstream and to be far more bioavailable than drinking green tea. This means your body can utilize these beneficial compounds more effectively.

Backed by science: Want to understand the science behind green tea's remarkable health benefits? Let's explore how EGCG and polyphenols work to support your health. Protection against oxidative stress Green tea polyphenols are capable of directly neutralizing destructive free radicals that can damage your cells. They are also thought to boost the body's own internal oxidative stress defenses, providing dual-action protection. Studies have shown that these compounds can inhibit oxidative stress, helping to maintain cellular integrity and promote longevity. This makes green tea extract a cornerstone nutrient for anyone focused on healthy aging. Cellular health and mitochondrial support Green tea encourages optimal cellular reproduction and function. The green tea polyphenol EGCG has a remarkably broad array of cellular health advantages, exerting a positive influence on mitochondrial health and intracellular signaling pathways. It also promotes healthy gene expression and supports intracellular messengers and transcription factors. These mechanisms work together to help maintain youthful cellular function as you age. Cardiovascular and cholesterol management Green tea, green tea extracts, and EGCG can help maintain blood cholesterol, LDL, and triglyceride levels that are already within the normal range. This cardiovascular support is backed by extensive clinical research. By promoting healthy blood lipid profiles, green tea extract can help you maintain optimal heart health throughout your life. Neuroprotection and brain health Green tea and its polyphenols, including EGCG, help protect nerve cells and nerve function. They have been shown to encourage cognitive wellness and support brain health as you age. These neuroprotective effects make green tea extract particularly valuable for maintaining mental clarity and cognitive performance over time. Metabolic health and glucose balance Green tea polyphenols help preserve metabolic health and can assist in maintaining glucose levels that are already within the normal range. This metabolic support is crucial for overall vitality and energy levels. Additionally, green tea has fluid-stabilizing properties that can promote weight management, boost the effectiveness of phase II detoxification enzymes, and enhance immune function. Advanced extract quality Mega Green Tea Extract, EU has been concentrated and dual-standardized to ensure the highest quality, consistency, and biological activity. This advanced extract contains 98% total polyphenols and 45% EGCG. This level of standardization guarantees that you receive consistent, therapeutic amounts of the most beneficial compounds in every capsule you take.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Green tea is loaded with plant compounds called polyphenols, with EGCG being the most well-researched. This formula can encourage optimal cellular health, promote cardiovascular wellness, and help maintain metabolic function. EGCG forms a potent antioxidant that is much more powerful than vitamins C and E, offering you comprehensive protection for your overall well-being.
product.why_this_formula_works: Each capsule of Mega Green Tea Extract, EU provides 725 mg of concentrated green tea extract. This is equivalent to more than three cups of green tea, delivering optimal polyphenol content in a convenient form. This 98% green tea extract is standardized to provide high antioxidant potency using the most important polyphenol of green tea. One cup of green tea provides roughly 150–300 mg of polyphenols and has antioxidant effects greater than a serving of broccoli, spinach, carrots, or strawberries. Green tea powdered extracts have been shown to absorb 60–90% better into the bloodstream and to be far more bioavailable than drinking green tea. This means your body can utilize these beneficial compounds more effectively.

product.title: Body Trim and Appetite Control
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Losing weight and keeping it off is a process and a lot about making healthy choices. Body Trim & Appetite Control can support you in achieving a healthy weight, by helping you master your appetite and avoid overeating.Clinical research shows that the (1) combination of lemon verbena and hibiscus extracts can help you feel satisfied, so you can walk away from the dinner table without wanting another portion. Why it works:A global study from 2021 carried out across 30 countries, finds that 45% of people globally say that they are currently trying to lose weight. (2)They are right to do so because research shows that a 5% reduction in your total body weight can lead to significant health benefits.Fewer calories, healthier foods — the formula for losing weight The simple fact is; you need to burn more calories than you get from the food you eat, every day. This is called a caloric deficit. When you achieve this daily, your body turns to burn stored fat to make up the difference. Why is achieving and maintaining weight loss hard? Your body is used to eating a certain amount every day. So, when it’s not getting its usual number of calories, it will send you signals to keep eating. Maintaining a caloric deficit can also be difficult, and for many, the numbers increase again on the scale after reaching the goal weight. The answer has less to do with “dieting” and more to do with the choices that you make, every day – and you might need a little help. That’s where Metabolaid® can help you; by helping control your appetite. Metabolaid® is a proprietary formula of hibiscus flower and lemon verbena leaf extracts.This clinically studied combination is shown to help promote satiety, the feeling you get when you’re “full”. This can make it easier to keep your weight-loss plan.The science behind the product:Clinical research shows that a little encouragement to stick to a healthy eating plan goes a long way towards lasting weight loss.Studies with Metabolaid® lemon verbena and hibiscus extract In a real-world study, men and women took the Metabolaid® extract combination for 90 days and tracked their food intake and weight loss progress on a mobile app. 85% of the participants reported a weight reduction, and they averaged also lost over 12 pounds in 3 months. (1) Clinical research can back up this finding: in two separate studies following overweight women, 500 mg of Metabolaid® produced a significant reduction in body weight, BMI, and body fat percentage compared to placebo. (3,4)The next step is keeping the weight loss, and this is where most “diet plans” fail. Once you’ve lost some pounds/kilos, it can be easy to go back to the old habits of eating too much, not getting enough exercise, or just choosing the wrong foods. By helping “tame the hunger hormones”, the supplement can facilitate achieving a long-term result in maintaining a healthy weight.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: B12 Elite
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is B12 (also called cobalamin)? It’s a water-soluble vitamin that plays a vital role in the health of your nervous system, blood cells, and your DNA (B12 helps protect delicate parts of your chromosomes). Life Extension B12 Elite can deliver 500 mcg each of adenosylcobalamin and methylcobalamin: two neurologically active forms of B12 that can help protect your brain at the cellular level. Why it works: What causes B12 deficiency since many people don’t get sufficient amounts of this crucial vitamin? Reasons range from age-related insufficiency to dietary intake. B12 comes primarily from animal sources, so those following a vegetarian diet may not get enough. The formula B12 Elite combines two bioactive forms of cobalamin, and they are both essential for proper bodily and neurological function. These “active” forms make it possible for the body to use them right away, in other words; they make it easier for your body to absorb and access the health benefits of vitamin B12. The science behind the product: The combination of methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin in B12 Elite can offer optimal cognitive support and promote brain health and function. The benefits of these two bioactive forms of B12 are: Adenosylcobalamin This active form of cobalamin B12 helps preserve neuronal function. Leucine-Rich Repeat Kinase 2 (LRRK2) is a type of enzyme that modifies other proteins by adding phosphate groups. (1) Inhibiting the activity of this enzyme has been associated with helping to preserve neuronal tissue. (2) A series of preclinical studies indicate that the adenosylcobalamin form of B12 can inhibit the activity of multiple LRRK2 variants in neurons by decreasing phosphorylation (the addition of phosphate groups to amino acids). (3) These studies found that adenosylcobalamin helped regulate the healthy release of dopamine, a neurotransmitter that plays an important role in cognitive functions such as motor control, arousal, reinforcement, and reward. (3-6) Adenosylcobalamin is also a cofactor for energy metabolism. It’s active in the mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells. It’s required as a cofactor for the synthesis of succinyl-CoA, a compound that supports cellular energy metabolism. (7-9) Methylcobalamin This is another neurologically active form of B12 (though in different ways than adenosylcobalamin) that is important for cellular health and much more. Methylcobalamin supports the central nervous system, and it’s essential for the replication and growth of cells. (10) It also helps to maintain already healthy homocysteine levels. (11-14) A key to maintaining healthy cardiovascular and neurological function is inhibiting excess levels of homocysteine. Please note, that Life Extension also offers BioActive Complete B-Complex formula: a wide spectrum of B vitamins for whole-body health.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Essential Youth L-Ergothioneine
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is ergothioneine? It’s an amino acid present throughout your body, but the levels have been shown to decline as we age. (1) You must get ergothioneine through your diet as the body can’t produce it, and it’s found in a variety of food sources, but the highest concentrations are in certain types of mushrooms. This food-derived amino acid is thought to play a crucial role in supporting long-term health through its cell-protective benefits and inhibition of free radicals. (2) Why it works: Ergothioneine has the interest of the scientific community due to its properties that contribute to cell protection and its great promise in supporting healthy aging. A new proprietary fermentation method has made it possible to provide supplementation of this nutrient. Studies have shown that the body has a specific mechanism to transport the amino acid ergothioneine into cells, indicating it’s crucial for overall health. (3,4) Life Extension’s innovative formula can help maintain healthy ergothioneine levels to help ensure your body gets enough of this cell-protecting amino acid. The science behind the product: Healthy aging and longevity Studies indicate that ergothioneine can delay telomere shortening due to oxidative stress. (5) Your telomeres are like protective caps at the end of your chromosomes. As time goes by, these telomeres shorten naturally, in step with your aging process. In a preclinical study, L-ergothioneine had a protective effect on telomere length and slowed the rate of telomere shortening under oxidative stress conditions, and in that supporting longevity. (5) Cognitive and vision health Low levels of ergothioneine in older adults have been linked with cognitive decline. In preclinical studies, ergothioneine showed beneficial neuroprotective properties from oxidative stress, supporting overall cognitive health. (1) The cell-protecting properties of ergothioneine have also been linked to vision health. (6) Supporting heart health A 2020 clinical study found that higher ergothioneine levels were associated with healthier diets and with heart health. (7) If mushrooms aren’t for you, you can still get the longevity-promoting benefits of ergothioneine with the innovative Essential Youth L-Ergothioneine formula. One daily capsule provides as much L-ergothioneine as 2 to 5 cups of white button mushrooms. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Brain Fog Relief
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is brain fog? Brain fog is often described as mental fatigue, lack of mental clarity, poor concentration, a feeling of being scatterbrained, and an inability to focus.The causes of brain fog can vary from stress and nervous tension, poor sleep, hormonal changes, diet, medication, and medical conditions.Nootropics are substances that can support mental endurance and performance. Caffeine is undoubtedly the most widely used nootropic, but this is a short-lived stimulant.This innovative formula is caffeine-free and specially designed to be fast-acting and relax the nerves. Why it works:You aren’t productive when your mental focus is thrown off, for whatever reason. Your cup of morning coffee may offer a temporary energy boost, but running on caffeine comes with an inevitable energy decline, dragging your focus and attention along with it.Brain Fog Relief can help relax and thereby strengthen the nerves. How? This product provides 300 mg of polyphenol-rich mango leaf extract and 100 μl of standardized peppermint oil.The science behind the product:Brain Fog Relief formula combines powerful, clinically studied nutrients. Polyphenol-rich mango leaf extractMango leaves, extracts, and teas have long been used in Asian and African countries. Mangiferin is a compound found in mango leaves that is believed to be largely responsible for reported effects.Scientists conducted several controlled human trials to evaluate the effects of a special mango extract found in Brain Fog Relief. (1-4)Standardized peppermint oilThe herb peppermint has been traditionally used for its supportive properties, including as a digestive aid and to promote calming.Its oil contains a high concentration of monoterpene compounds, including menthol and menthone. Various studies have shown peppermint's beneficial effects on the nervous system. (5-8)Let Brain Fog Relief be part of your daily routine – take one a day! How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Waistline Control™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Are you ready to lose those love handles but wonder how to get a smaller waist? Clinical studies show that a patented blend of two herbal extracts can help control your waistline. The Meratrim® blend in the Waistline Control™ formula can help you reduce your waist size and achieve a healthy weight — when combined with a healthy diet and regular exercise.Why it works: We accumulate fat in different places, but we typically care most about the fat around our middle, wishing for a little reduced size and circumference around our waist and hips. The good news is that a healthy diet, regular exercise, and the patented blend of Sphaeranthus indicus flower and Garcinia mangostana (mangosteen) fruit rind extracts in Waistline Control™ can help you do just that. In clinical studies, people who took this blend of extracts lost 5% or more of their total weight, along with significant reductions in waist and hip circumferences. The patented blend Meratrim® is shown to produce both weight loss and waistline reduction in clinical studies when combined with diet and exercise. How does it work? In cell cultures, this combo of herbal extracts is indicated to inhibit the expression of proteins that trigger adipogenesis (fat cell growth). It is also shown to promote multiple pathways that encourage fat breakdown. The results are a slimmer waist and a healthy weight. The science behind the product: Clinical study of waist reduction Participants took one 400 mg capsule of the Sphaeranthus indicus flower and Garcinia mangostana (mangosteen) extract combo 30 minutes before breakfast and dinner. This was repeated for 16 weeks and combined with a structured diet and regular exercise. (1) The results showed over 3 inches down in waist circumference and just over 4 inches down in hip circumference. In both measurements, the Meratrim® combo outperformed the placebo group, so it wasn’t just the diet and exercise. (1) Mechanisms of fat metabolism and weight loss The goal isn’t just a slimmer waist and hips but also achieving a healthy weight. In the same study as mentioned, the Meratrim® group lost an average of 11 pounds compared to the placebo group by the end of week 16, with noticeable results beginning just four weeks after the study’s inception. (1) Bonus: the Meratrim® group also recorded healthier lipid profiles than they had at the beginning of the study. (1) Meratrim® may support weight loss by targeting the different mechanisms of fat metabolism. In vitro studies show that the S. indicus and G. mangostana (mangosteen) extract combo reduced the expression of proteins associated with adipogenesis (fat production). (2) It also promoted fat breakdown. (2) When it comes to your mission to slim down around the middle you’re no longer alone; add our Waistline Control™ formula to your healthy weight loss regimen today. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.

product.title: Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin B12, also called cobalamin, is a water-soluble vitamin. It is important for nerve and blood cell health and also plays a role in DNA synthesis.What causes B12 deficiency? Vitamin B12 is present in foods of animal origin, including dairy products and eggs, but digestive challenges that can come with aging can affect absorption. Vegetarians and the elderly are therefore the groups tending to be most challenged with maintaining healthy levels of this essential vitamin. (1-2)The lozenges of Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin can be dissolved in your mouth or chewed – making them a convenient way to ensure optimal levels of B12.Why it works:There are eight B vitamins, each with their own set of important roles in maintaining health throughout the body.Methylcobalamin is a form of vitamin B12 that is active in the central nervous system. It is essential for cellular health, to the growth and replication of cells.Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin can supply 1000 µg of methylcobalamin and help support healthy homocysteine levels, brain health, and cognition.The science behind the product:Vitamin B12, or cobalamin, works synergistically with vitamin B6 and folate to convert homocysteine into the amino acid methionine. (3) This helps to maintain healthy levels of homocysteine, an emerging marker of neurological, cardiovascular health, and general health. (4)Vegetarians and the elderly are especially susceptible to deficiency of this important nutrient, which may be caused by low dietary intake, inadequate bioavailability, or poor absorption of B12. (1,2) The age-related decrease in hydrochloric acid production can also affect B12 bioavailability. (5,6)Recent research shows that supplementing with B12, even at moderate doses, can improve both B12 and folate status in older individuals. (7)Please note, that Life Extension also offers BioActive Complete B-Complex formula: a wide spectrum of B vitamins for whole-body health. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Calm-Mag
product.description:
Health benefits with a glance:First of all, why can magnesium help you stay calm? This powerful mineral supports more than 300 biochemical reactions in the body and plays a role in managing stress. Yet, not all forms of magnesium are as readily bioavailable to your brain. Calm-Mag contains a special form of magnesium with enhanced bioavailability that’s easy for your brain to use. Life Extension’s Calm-Mag may therefore help the brain promote a healthy response to stress. Why it works:;Many of us have experienced that busy schedules can affect our well-being. It’s common to turn to magnesium supplements to help the body fend off the effects of daily stress. But unless this mighty mineral goes where it’s needed – aka your brain – it won’t help the body manage stress. Magnesium acetyl taurinate in Calm Mag is a patented form of magnesium that is well absorbed and can access the brain where it works with the brain to support stress management, encouraging relaxation and feelings of calmness. The science behind the product Magnesium is an important essential mineral in the body, and stress and magnesium levels are correlated. People suffering from stress-related symptoms often have low blood levels of magnesium. (1)Magnesium acetyl-taurinate supports magnesium levels in the brain A preclinical study compared how magnesium levels in brain tissue were affected by different magnesium compounds: magnesium glycinate, magnesium acetyl-taurate, magnesium citrate, and magnesium malate. The results of this study showed that magnesium brain tissue levels were significantly increased by magnesium acetyl-taurate. (3) Life Extension’s Calm-Mag Magnesium Acetyl Taurinate is designed to help calm your mind by delivering this special form of magnesium that can readily cross the blood-brain barrier and positively impact the brain pathways associated with stress management. Magnesium has been shown to help support the activity of neurotransmitters like serotonin and GABA. (4)Supporting the feelings of tranquility and relaxation A clinical trial of 19 women with an inadequate dietary intake of magnesium showed improved feelings of relaxation and emotional calmness after supplementing with magnesium acetyl-taurate. (5) Studies show unmanaged stress leads to increased levels of stress hormones and low levels of magnesium, making it more difficult for the body to manage healthy stress response. (2) Supplementing with magnesium can therefore be very helpful to combat the effects of stress, but it has to be a form of magnesium that can brain can use.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

A clinical trial of 19 women with an inadequate dietary intake of magnesium showed improved feelings of relaxation and emotional calmness after supplementing with magnesium acetyl taurate. Supplementing with magnesium can be very helpful to combat the effects of stress, but it has to be a form of magnesium that your brain can use effectively.

product.title: Kidney Care
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: The liver and the kidneys are some of the most essential and hardworking organs in the body. They carry out numerous functions, one of which is filtering the toxins we are exposed to throughout our lives.Our delicate kidneys are highly susceptible to damage throughout our lifetime and can be difficult to repair. However, supporting kidney health is often an overlooked aspect of detoxification, putting our kidneys at risk of irreparable damage.Kidney Care contains a blend of botanicals and nutraceuticals and is developed to target kidney health and regeneration. Why it works:The kidney filters an astounding 150 quarts of blood daily to clear harmful contaminants and byproducts from the body. The filtration is done by very specialized blood vessels, and vitamins, amino acids, glucose, hormones, and other vital substances are returned to the bloodstream.Quicksilver Scientific’s potent proprietary blend includes astragaloside IV extract, zhu ling, goldenrod, dandelion leaf, he shou wu root, fu ling, and ferulic acid to support healthy kidney function, lymphatic drainage, and improved detoxification.Kidney Care contains nanoemulsified liquid, offering a highly bioavailable formula for fast-acting absorption. The science behind the product:The intentionally targeted blend of botanicals and nutraceuticals offered in Kidney Care contains: Regenerative & protective ingredients Astragaloside IV extract (Astragalus membranaceous root) is shown to help reduce oxidative stress in renal tubular cells, protect podocytes from damage (damaged podocytes are a hallmark of kidney disease), and have a protective and regenerative effect on the kidneys by upregulating the Klotho pathway. (1) Ferulic acid is an antioxidant phytochemical found in various fruits and vegetables. It’s found to combat oxidative damage, inflammation, and damaging levels of autophagy in the kidneys. (2,3) Draining ingredients Dandelion leaf extract is considered an anti-toxin herb. It acts as a diuretic and can support kidney drainage. This extract is rich in phytochemicals, including β-sitosterol, α-amyrin, stigmasterol, quercetin glycosides, chicoric acid, and sesquiterpene lactones. (4,5) Goldenrod extract (Solidago aerial parts) can support drainage through diuretic activity. It’s historically used for kidney stones, UTIs, and an overactive bladder. It contains quercetin. (6) Fu ling (poria cocos) sclerotium extract is an eastern medicine fungus that grows around the roots of pine trees. It acts as a diuretic and is shown to have kidney-protective and reparative properties. (7,8) Zhu ling (polyporus umbellatus) fruiting body extract comes from edible mushroom species that grow on old beech or oak trees. In traditional Chinese medicine, it’s used to address urinary and kidney dysfunction. It’s a diuretic that is shown to regulate transmembrane proteins that act as molecular water channels in the kidneys. This extract may also protect against kidney injury and fibrosis by regulating fatty acyl metabolism. (9) Citrus and juniper berry essential oils are diuretics. Nurturing ingredient He shou wu (fo-ti) root extract is a big tuberous root with tonifying and kidney protective properties. It can support the liver, kidneys, and blood. (10) How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Performance Cardio+
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Healthy circulation is key to vitality! Your heart has an important job in keeping your body running; it pumps blood through your circulatory system to nourish organs and tissues in the body.Supplementing for circulation is not just for the elderly or “at-risk groups,” though. Food choices, lack of exercise, genetic makeup – and aging – all play a role in impeding healthy macro and microcirculation and oxygenation in the body, putting the cardiovascular system at risk.Performance Cardio+ is an advanced whole-body circulation formula designed to promote healthy blood flow and optimize your overall health using Quicksilvers-delivery system technology for optimal absorption. Why it works:Quicksilver Scientific’s proprietary blend contains an array of time-honored Eastern herbs/botanicals and modern Western nutraceuticals that are found to improve macro and microcirculation throughout the body and support cardiovascular function.This power-packed formula may thus support energy, athletic performance, cognition, longevity, and healthy sexual function.Moreover, the product uses proprietary Quicksilver Delivery Systems® technology to create small, stable delivery vesicles (between 20-70 nm) that begin absorbing as soon as they (the liquid supplement) hit the mouth. The science behind the product:Performance Cardio+ is a vegan cardio- and cerebrovascular tonic that consists of targeted ingredients shown to promote nitric oxide levels, healthy blood flow, and circulation to every tissue in the body. These circulatory herbs/botanicals and nitric oxide building nutraceuticals are: Dan sheen root extract (Salvia miltiorrhiza) Salvia is the most frequently and widely used blood vitalizing herb in traditional Chinese medicine (TCM). It’s known to increase capillary vascular net, inhibit coagulation of blood and activate fibrinolysis, lower blood pressure and cholesterol, and support blood flow and microcirculation (capillary). (1-3) Ginseng plus panax notoginseng root extract This botanical (TCM) is shown to support microcirculation to remove stagnant blood and improve circulation (including cerebral circulation) and inhibit chronic cellular senescence. It’s also a strong antioxidant with anti-inflammatory benefits. (4,5) Hawthorn berry extract (Crataegus monogyna/Fructus crataegi) In Western herbalism, Hawthorn is considered the “king” of heart herbs. It may improve micronutrition to the heart and surrounding capillaries via microcirculation, support the dilation of arteries, improve blood flow to the heart, and lower blood pressure and serum cholesterol. (6) Ginkgo leaf extract (Ginkgo biloba) This herb contains an array of phytochemicals (including bilobalide, ginkgolide A, ginkgolide B, and ginkgolide C) indicated to exert beneficial effects on the circulatory system. Studies show that this extract can support memory and cognition, the cardiovascular system, healthy blood, venous integrity, healthy tissue fluid levels, and promote antioxidant activity for nerves and tissue. (6,7) He shou wu root extract (Fo-ti) This is considered a great longevity herb in TCM and contains a powerful phytochemical called tetrahydroxystilbene 2-O-β-D-glucoside (TSG) with cardioprotective effects. It’s known as a diuretic and has been shown to lower blood cholesterol. (9-11) Boswellia resin extract/Boswellia serrata root extract (frankincense, mastic, olibanum) This herbal extract is used in Indian Ayurvedic medicine to treat chronic inflammatory illnesses. Often combined with Myrrh to improve blood circulation. It’s known to be analgesic, emmenagogue, and antiseptic. (12) Myrrh resin extract (Commiphora myrrh gum/resin)Research indicates that myrrh protects the cardiovascular system from damage during inflammatory events by activating anti-inflammatory and antioxidant signaling pathways. It’s shown to lower blood cholesterol and prevent plaque deposition. Moreover, myrrh is known to be analgesic and emmenagogue, and to increase peristalsis. (13,14) Cinnamon bark oil Studies show that cinnamon supports cardiovascular health by lowering blood lipids, suppressing vascular smooth muscle growth, and platelet aggregation. It’s also known to be antibacterial, antiviral, and anti-fungal, and to improve digestive function. (15) L-citrulline The organic compound citrulline is an α-amino acid. Its name is derived from citrullus, the Latin word for watermelon. L-citrulline is known to increase levels of nitric oxide, protect against the progression of atherosclerosis and against endothelial senescence, and restore telomerase activity under normal glucose conditions. (16) How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.
