product.title: D3K2 EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Vitamin K and vitamin D deficiency can lead to less calcium being deposited in the bone matrix and the calcification of tissue. D3K2 contains two super-absorbable forms of vitamin D and vitamin K, which can work together to support normal, healthy bones and counteract calcification of tissues. This liquid supplement contains 2,500 international units (IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per spray and 90 µg of vitamin K2. Why it works: Vitamin D3 for the immune system, bones, muscles & teeth Vitamin D is one of the most important vitamins in the body and is essential for overall health and mood. It contributes to the normal function of the immune system, supports muscle function, and helps maintain healthy bones and teeth.It is also essential for the absorption and utilisation of calcium and phosphorus, which in turn contribute to normal blood calcium levels. Vitamin D also plays an important role in cell division . Vitamin K2 complements vitamin D3 Vitamin K is a group of fat-soluble vitamins that contribute to maintaining healthy bone density, promoting arterial health, and supporting heart health . Both vitamins are essential for the body, and they are also dependent on each other to function optimally. A deficiency in vitamin K and vitamin D has been linked to the calcification of soft tissue and reduced bone mineral density. This is because vitamin D promotes the absorption of calcium, while vitamin K plays a role in directing calcium into the bones. D3K2 by Quicksilver Scientific offers an effective way to replenish these vitamins. By using an advanced nanoemulsion system for maximum absorption, this formulation combines ideal ratios of vitamin D (cholecalciferol D3) and vitamin K2 (menaquinone MK-7) to support and maintain healthy levels year-round. The science behind the product: Vitamin D is mostly recognized as being essential to the function of the human immune system and to maintaining healthy bones. However, the health benefits of vitamin D stretch much further than covering these two areas of concern. Vitamin D receptors can be found in at least 36 types of body tissue and can also influence the gene expression of thousands of genes. Some of these genes include those that are associated with detoxification enzymes in the body. Research has indicated that vitamin D3 is better at raising the body’s serum 25(OH)D concentration than vitamin D2 (calciferol).Liposomal delivery bypasses GI absorption barriers and begins circulating the body as soon as it hits the tongue. How to use:Take 1 to 2 pumps by mouth once daily.Hold in the mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach, at least 10 minutes before meals.Use within 6 months of opening.If pregnant, consult a physician before use.

Health benefits overview: D3K2ᴱᵁ can help prevent vitamin K and vitamin D deficiency, which are associated with reduced calcium deposition in your bone matrix and unwanted calcification of soft tissues. This advanced formula combines super absorbable forms of vitamin D3 and vitamin K2 that work together to support normal bone health and counteract tissue calcification. Are you getting enough of these two critical vitamins? Deficiency in either vitamin can compromise your bone density and cardiovascular wellness, making supplementation essential for optimal health.

Why this formula works: Vitamin D is one of the most important vitamins in your body, supporting bones, muscles, immune function, mood, and much more. Vitamin K refers to a group of fat-soluble vitamins that help maintain bone density, encourage arterial health, and support cardiovascular function. These two essential vitamins depend on each other to work at their best capacity. Vitamin D promotes calcium absorption in your gut, while vitamin K plays a crucial role in depositing that calcium into your bones rather than soft tissues where it doesn't belong. Why choose nanoemulsion delivery? This advanced delivery system bypasses digestive absorption barriers and begins circulating in your body as soon as it contacts your tongue, providing superior bioavailability compared to traditional supplements.

Backed by science: Vitamin D for comprehensive health support Vitamin D is primarily recognized for its essential role in immune system function and maintaining strong bones. However, the health benefits extend far beyond these two areas. Vitamin D receptors can be found in at least 36 types of body tissues and can influence the expression of thousands of genes, including those associated with detoxification enzymes in your body. Research indicates that vitamin D3 is more effective than vitamin D2 at raising your body's serum levels. Vitamin K for bone and cardiovascular health Vitamin K helps maintain optimal bone density by ensuring calcium is properly deposited in your skeletal system. This nutrient encourages arterial health by preventing calcium from accumulating in blood vessel walls, which can compromise cardiovascular function. Vitamin K2, specifically in the form of menaquinone MK-7 used in this formula, provides long-lasting activity in your body for continuous support. Synergistic vitamin interaction Deficiency of vitamin K and vitamin D together is particularly problematic, leading to both calcification of soft tissues and lowered bone mineral density. This occurs because vitamin D increases calcium absorption from your diet, but without adequate vitamin K to direct that calcium into bones, it can deposit in arteries and other soft tissues. These two vitamins working together ensure calcium goes where you need it most. Advanced nanoemulsion delivery system This formula uses an advanced nanoemulsion delivery system for maximum absorption. Unlike traditional supplements that must pass through your digestive system, this liposomal delivery begins circulating your body immediately upon contact with mucous membranes in your mouth. The formula combines ideal ratios of vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) and vitamin K2 (menaquinone MK-7) to help you maintain optimal levels throughout the year.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Thermo Weight Control
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:“Consume fewer calories and lose weight” — that’s the conventional wisdom. While calorie deficit is key to weight loss, it’s not that simple. You have maybe reduced your daily calorie intake but can’t seem to reach your weight goals. One reason is that your body compensates by saving calories for a “rainy day”, which can be very frustrating if you’re trying to get rid of them.Life Extension’s Thermo Weight Control can promote healthy fat-burning. This novel formula offers Capsifen®, which is a patented red chili extract that can help “keep your fires burning”. The capsules are vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO. Why it works:Reducing caloric intake isn't always enough to reach your weight loss goals. Calorie restriction can slow energy expenditure, which makes maintaining a healthy weight more difficult. So how do you keep your body burning fat? You have to encourage thermogenesis — the metabolic process where stored fat is turned into energy. Capsaicin is a compound in red chili that can help burn energy by activating a type of body fat called brown adipose tissue. This makes it an ideal companion to a healthy diet and exercise regimen. The science behind the product: Increase caloric expenditure and burn fat For the body to continue burning fat, you have to promote and maintain the metabolic process of thermogenesis, where your cells turn stored fat into energy. The compound capsaicin in red chili does exactly this: it can encourage your body’s existing pathways for burning fat for energy by activating brown fat (brown adipose tissue). This special type of fat burns calories and stores energy, among other, and essentially it signals your body to keep on burning fat instead of “save some for later”. Digestive comfort for the stomach Capsaicin is the key factor when it comes to “spicy” food. Therein lies the obvious problem; getting enough capsaicin to trigger and maintain your body’s fat burning machines can be challenging. Thermo Weight Control formula has combined a standardized capsaicin red chili extract with special galactomannan fibers, which are carbohydrate (soluble fiber) fractions representing 45–60% of the fenugreek seed. The combination can protect your delicate digestive system from the potentially harsh effects of concentrated red chili extract and slows the digestion of capsaicin. This again can give your body more time to utilize and absorb the active compounds in Thermo Weight Control. Studies show results of healthy weight results A galactomannan-red chili combination was tested in a small clinical study over a period of 28 days and compared with placebo. The study participants who took 200 mg a day exhibited a significant reduction in body weight. (1) Moreover, they displayed a reduction in body mass index. (1) In addition, unlike other harsher forms of capsaicin-based supplements, there was little to no stomach discomfort reported by those taking the galactomannan-red chili combo. Weight management with the science behind The Thermo Weight Control supplement is created to help you continue to burn fat, even when you’re consuming fewer calories. Each serving delivers 4 mg of capsaicinoids combined with galactomannan fibers for digestive comfort — the same dose observed to be effective in the clinical study mentioned above. So, spice up your approach to weight management now and boost your metabolism!How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program. Individual results are not guaranteed, and results may vary.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Healthy Lungs
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Respiratory health is an often-overlooked part of aging graciously, but it’s not too late to breathe well. In fact, better lung function can be a need, no matter age, for various reasons.Healthy Lungs contains four clinically studied nutrients shown to support healthy respiratory function in different ways. Together, they make a powerful lung support supplement. Why it works:Life Extension’s daily respiratory health product Healthy Lungs can help you breathe easier.The synergistic combination of Boswellia serrata and Indian bael fruit (Aegle marmelos) can help inhibit inflammatory factors to support lung health.Saffron can help relax your airways. Andrographolide can help fight cellular stress, supporting healthy lung tissue and function. The science behind the product:Boswellia & Aegle marmelosIn two clinical studies, the botanical combination of Boswellia and Indian bael fruit was found to help inhibit inflammatory factors to support lung health. (1,2) SaffronMost people know that the orange-yellow saffron spice adds color to the food – but it does so much more. In a clinical study, it was shown to help relax the airways, promoting healthy breathing patterns. (3,4) AndrographolideAndrographolide is an active compound in andrographis or Indian echinacea. In preclinical studies, this plant compound indicated protective effects against cellular stress, which again can encourage healthy lung tissue and function. (5-10) It’s time to take a deep breath and show your lungs some love and support!How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: EpiAge epigenetic age test
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is chronological vs biological age? Chronological age is years in number, but we don't just age chronologically. Biological years is the age of the cells that make up your body based on various properties and biomarkers that have been researched to correlate with aging and decline.Biological age is thus an important benchmark on your way to a long and healthy life. But many factors, such as daily habits or stress levels, affect it.If you want to know your true age and are wondering what impacts your lifestyle choices have had on your biological age, you can first take a reliable and accurate biological age test.epiAge™ is a next-generation epigenetic age test for home use designed to determine our biological age. Using the latest research findings in biotechnology, it enables the detection of how fast you have aged so far.Based on a simple saliva test, you will receive the result of your epigenetic age within just a few weeks. epiAge™ collaborates with the biotech laboratory of Professor Dr. Moshe Szyf, one of the world's leading epigeneticists at McGill University in Montreal. Your sample is analyzed in his research laboratory according to the latest scientific and technological standards.The test result, your calculated epigenetic age, will either confirm that you are on the right track or provide momentum to do meaningful lifestyle changes.Why it works:Aging is a complex biological process, and sometimes people may age at an accelerated or slower rate as compared to the actual number of years they have lived. This means that their biological age is different from their chronological one.The influence we have over our biological age can in other words be a positive impact, but also a negative one if we are not making healthy lifestyle choices, as many unhealthy choices are correlated with higher biological ages.epiAge epigenetic age test EU/UK offers an easy-to-use DNA analysis kit to calculate your scientifically precise years. Its patented test procedure uses the methylation markers on your DNA to determine your actual biological/epigenetic age – with utmost scientific accuracy.Methylation changes are associated with age, but the good news is that studies suggest that methylation processes are generally reversible. With the advantage of cutting-edge scientific expertise from a biotech laboratory, you have the possibility to plan new health-promoting and anti-aging strategies as well as regularly monitor their effectiveness.The science behind the product:Laboratory with Prof. Dr. Moshe SzyfThe HKG epiTherapeutics laboratory analyses your samples according to state-of-the-art research findings.The estimation of your epigenetic age is based on your saliva test, and you will receive it within a few weeks. Your biological age is calculated from your epiAge™ score in relation to a representative control group. Deliberately, you are not being asked about your chronological age during test registration to avoid any bias. Please note, that the genetic data is not collected.Next-generation sequencing (NGS)The methodology for determining epigenetic age developed for epiAge epigenetic age test EU enables a precise evaluation based on exactly 13 specific so-called CpG islands on your DNA.The test uses Illumina® Next Generation Sequencing, DNA sequencing diagnostic technique previously reserved for biochemical scientific research.Triple Sequencing Method (TSM)Another special feature of the epiAge™ test is the triple analysis of your DNA. Relative deviations in the reading of the DNS are technically unavoidable.With triple sequencing, the DNA is analyzed three times separately and the average value is determined from the individual results in order to present as accurate a picture as possible of the methylations of your genome, which correlate with age.The procedures increase the accuracy of the analysis of your DNA methylations to determine your epigenetic age and enable very precise results with 2 decimal places. Utmost technical accuracyepiAge epigenetic age test EU performs three independent tests on your saliva sample.To compensate for relative deviations, your epiAge score (from which your biological age is derived) is determined from the average of these three test cycles.If your biological age is significantly higher than your chronological ageA significantly higher biological age is an abnormality suggesting that it may be advisable to implement certain changes in your lifestyle. But please keep in mind that epigenetic age is also subject to fluctuation. If you had a bad cold a few weeks ago, it may suffice to influence the test result.If your biological age is lower than your chronological ageA lower biological age may suggest that you have done some things right in the past. You should see this as an incentive to maintain your health routines and possibly even expand them.Depending on whether your biological age is higher or lower than your chronological age, you can evaluate your own lifestyle, and if needs be, draw conclusions for changes. With sustainable health routines, you can influence your aging process step by step and develop positively.Your own well-being will certainly confirm whether you are making progress. In addition, changes can be accurately determined with a follow-up test after a few months.Your age is more than a number – change it! Day by day and year by year. How to use: The age test comes with a detailed manual in English, all materials required to collect the saliva sample, and a return envelope (postage not included ) for the saliva sample. Upon registration of the test kit with the included secure ID via the epiAge website, you will be informed by email when your test result is available, usually after 4 weeks. If you have questions about your test result, our team of health advisors will be happy to assist you. A sample test result can be found here.Note:epiAge epigenetic age test EU test is not a medical health analysis and should not be construed as a medical examination, diagnosis, treatment, preventative, measure, or risk assessment of disease. The test is solely intended to determine epigenetic age and is based on the analysis of the DNA methylations around your DNA.

Health benefits overview: Chronological age measures years lived, but biological age reveals the true condition of your cells based on biomarkers that correlate with aging. Biological age serves as an important benchmark on your path to longevity and optimal wellness, influenced by daily habits, stress levels, and lifestyle choices. EpiAge epigenetic age test is a next-generation home test that can determine your biological age using cutting-edge biotechnology. Based on a simple saliva sample, you receive results within weeks that reveal how fast you have aged, providing insights to guide meaningful health improvements.

Backed by science: Laboratory analysis with Professor Dr. Moshe Szyf The HKG epiTherapeutics laboratory analyzes your sample according to state-of-the-art research findings. Professor Dr. Moshe Szyf, one of the world's leading epigeneticists at McGill University in Montreal, oversees the analysis process. Your biological age is calculated from your epiAge score in relation to a representative control group. Are you curious about how your lifestyle choices have impacted your aging? The test deliberately doesn't ask for your chronological age during registration to avoid bias, and genetic data is not collected. Next-generation sequencing technology The methodology developed for EpiAge epigenetic age test enables precise evaluation based on exactly 13 specific CpG islands on your DNA. These are locations where methylation patterns change predictably with age. The test uses Illumina Next Generation Sequencing, a DNA sequencing diagnostic technique previously reserved for advanced biochemical scientific research. This sophisticated technology ensures accurate measurement of the methylation patterns that correlate with biological aging. Triple sequencing method for accuracy A special feature of EpiAge epigenetic age test is triple analysis of your DNA. Relative deviations in DNA reading are technically unavoidable with any sequencing technology. With triple sequencing, your DNA is analyzed three times separately and the average value is determined from individual results. This approach presents the most accurate picture possible of the methylations in your genome that correlate with age, enabling very precise results with two decimal places. Understanding your results If your biological age is significantly higher than your chronological age, this suggests it may be advisable to implement certain lifestyle changes. However, keep in mind that epigenetic age can fluctuate – recent illness may influence test results. If your biological age is lower than your chronological age, this suggests you've made positive choices supporting cellular health. Use this as motivation to maintain your wellness routines and possibly expand them further. Depending on whether your biological age is higher or lower than chronological age, you can evaluate your lifestyle and draw conclusions for beneficial changes. With sustainable health routines, you can influence your aging process step by step. Changes can be accurately determined with follow-up testing after several months.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Omega-3 Fish Oil Gummy Bites
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, why make a tastier way to take your fish oil? The health benefits of omega-3 EPA and DHA fatty acids are many, and instead of swallowing large soft gels (and tasting the fishy burps that sometimes follow them), you can now enjoy tropical-flavored gummy bites.Omega-3 Fish Oil Gummy Bites can support heart-, brain, and joint health, promote blood vessel function, and help inhibit inflammation to support whole body health.Why it works:Often, omega-3 gummies are low in fish oil levels. Omega-3 Fish Oil Gummy Bites were formulated with advanced technology to deliver levels of fish oil more than four times greater than most gummies, providing 300 mg of EPA and 225 mg of DHA in each bite.Even though most fish oil comes in soft gels, there are fish oil gummies out there (as mentioned). The problem is finding a gummy with a high potency of omega-3s that is also low in sugar.The reason for this is the gummy itself; in most scenarios, you can have great taste, or you can have health benefits. Life Extension’s product, on the other hand, is a game-changer. These bites are delicious, sugar-free*, chewable — and at the same time packed with EPA and DHA fatty acids and all their health benefits. *Not a low-calorie foodThe science behind the product:A unique formulation technologyNormally, gummies are made by mixing nutrients with gelatin and sugar and pouring them into a mold. Life Extension® uses a special formulation technology that suspends billions of tiny droplets of omega-3s within a tasty chewable bite.Cardiovascular health and omega-3sResearch shows that EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids help maintain a healthy heart. (1) The health benefits of fish oil support more than just the heart and vascular system, though.Promoting healthy cognitive and brain functionFish oil is good for the brain. Omega-3 fatty acids can encourage healthy cognitive function, help maintain your mood, and promote healthy blood flow in the brain. (2-5) Fighting inflammation and supporting joints Omega-3s can inhibit inflammatory factors to support joint health. (6,7) Getting enough omega-3 fatty acids every day is, in other words, important for any joint health regimen.Free from gluten and sugar-freeUnlike many other products, Omega-3 Fish Oil Gummy Bites are delicious, gluten-free, non-GMO, and completely sugar-free. But please note that it’s not a low-calorie food.So, take care of your heart and cognitive health with a high-potency gummy bite version of EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids — and delivered with a great taste of tropical fruit.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.

Health benefits overview: EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids offer numerous advantages for your wellbeing, from encouraging cardiovascular function to promoting brain vitality and joint comfort. Instead of swallowing large softgels and experiencing unpleasant fishy aftertaste, you can now enjoy these essential nutrients in delicious tropical-flavored gummy bites. Omega-3 Fish Oil Gummy Bites can encourage heart health, promote brain function, maintain comfortable joints, help inhibit inflammation, and support blood vessel wellness. Are you looking for a more enjoyable way to get your daily omega-3s?

Why this formula works: Many omega-3 gummies on the market contain disappointingly low levels of fish oil. This formula was developed with advanced technology to deliver fish oil levels more than four times greater than most competing gummies, providing 300 mg of EPA and 225 mg of DHA in each bite. Finding a gummy with high potency omega-3s that remains low in sugar is challenging. Most formulas offer either great taste or substantial benefits, but rarely both. This product is different – it delivers delicious flavor and meaningful omega-3 content in a convenient, chewable format that's completely sugar-free.

Backed by science: Why choose gummies over traditional fish oil capsules? The answer lies in both convenience and compliance – when supplements are enjoyable to take, you're more likely to maintain consistent daily intake for optimal results. Unique formulation technology Traditional gummies are manufactured by mixing nutrients with gelatin and sugar, then pouring the mixture into molds. This formula utilizes specialized technology that suspends billions of tiny omega-3 droplets within each tasty, chewable bite, allowing for significantly higher fish oil concentrations while maintaining excellent flavor. Cardiovascular health and omega-3s Research demonstrates that EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids help maintain optimal heart function. Published data support higher omega-3 intake for both prevention and management of cardiovascular wellness. Higher levels of omega-3s have been found to encourage healthy cardiovascular function and promote overall heart vitality. Brain function and cognitive support Fish oil is remarkably beneficial for your brain. Omega-3 fatty acids can encourage optimal cognitive function, help maintain balanced mood, and promote healthy blood flow in the brain. These essential fats are key components of brain cell membranes that generate and conduct electrical signals, playing vital roles in movement, language, reasoning, and memory. DHA, in particular, provides exceptional advantages for brain wellness. Studies show that omega-3 intake can help maintain brain structure integrity and encourage levels of brain growth factors that support neuron survival, development, and adaptability. Fighting inflammation and supporting joints Omega-3s can help inhibit inflammatory factors to encourage joint comfort and flexibility. EPA and DHA work in complementary ways to help manage and resolve inflammation, providing greater advantages together than either one alone. Getting adequate omega-3 fatty acids daily is essential for any comprehensive joint wellness regimen. Gluten-free and sugar-free Unlike many competing products, these gummy bites are delicious, gluten-free, non-GMO, and completely sugar-free. However, please note this is not a low-calorie food. Experience the benefits of high-potency EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids delivered with the delightful taste of tropical fruit – no fishy burps, no large capsules to swallow.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Easy Fiber
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Easy Fiber is a plant-based glucomannan fiber supplement from konjac root and an easy way to meet your daily dietary fiber needs. It can provide similar benefits to psyllium husk fiber — with a lower daily dose. This powdered fiber mix has a lightly orange-flavored taste. Unlike other fiber supplements, Easy Fiber contains no artificial flavors, colors, or sweeteners. Furthermore, it’s plant-based / vegetarian, sugar-free, gluten-free, and non-GMO.Why it works:“Get more fiber” is age-old advice that is still going strong! (1) A fiber-rich diet is important for the digestive health process!Fiber is probably the best digestive health supplement for regularity; soluble fiber gets broken down in the gut to help move things along at a healthy rate. The fiber helps with bowel movements by absorbing water into the stool (making it easier to pass). It might seem contradictory, but fiber also bulks stool so it's not "loose".Moreover, fiber can also work as a prebiotic to feed healthy gut bacteria, probiotics — helping them aid everything from digestion to immune defenses and in this way promote overall digestive health. But fiber goes beyond gut health and digestion. Easy Fiber powder contains a glucomannan low-dose dietary fiber that moves through the digestive tract like other fibers with some other great health benefits. It can support satiety, healthy blood sugar levels, and heart health.The science behind the product: Adjustable dose & konjac rootMany fiber supplements are made with psyllium husk, but this form of fiber tends to be bulkier and requires a larger daily dose to achieve the same benefits as Easy Fiber. Life Extension’s formula contains konjac root (Amorphophallus konjac), a form of fiber often used in Asian cuisine. Konjac can deliver the same benefits (including regularity, satiety, heart, and gut health) as other fibers, but at a lower dose. (2) Clinical trials, regularity, digestion & satiety Easy Fiber can help promote regularity and support your digestive health partially through its role as a prebiotic. Healthy regularity and a prebiotic effect were observed in clinical trials that provided supplemental glucomannan fiber to adults on a low-fiber diet. (3,4) Another reason people take fiber is to promote satiety — the feeling of fullness and being satisfied after eating. And if you’re not hungry, you’ll eat less. Glucomannan fiber from konjac root excels at promoting satiety. (2,5)Blood sugar levels & already-healthy cholesterol Glucomannan soluble fiber is also known for its heart health benefits. In a meta-analysis of 12 randomized controlled trials, consumption of two or more grams of glucomannan fiber daily for three to 12 weeks helped to maintain already-healthy LDL and HDL cholesterol levels. (6)In a group of 25 healthy middle-aged men, adding glucomannan to rice before eating it helped maintain healthy blood sugar levels, compared to simply eating rice by itself.Furthermore, when study participants increased the amount of glucomannan ingested it produced even better results. (7) So, get help keeping things moving in the right direction with Easy Fiber – and all the other benefits!How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program.Individual results are not guaranteed, and results may vary.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Glucosamine/Chondroitin Capsules, EU
product.description:
Glucosamine & Chondroitin benefitsGlucosamine and chondroitin are major components of cartilage that support the joints. They have been shown in clinical studies to support healthy cartilage and joint function. (1-3)GlucosamineGlucosamine is an important component of cartilage and a key element for joint function and repair. It is naturally produced by our bodies, but the amount decreases as we age. As a result, cartilage in areas such as the knees, hips, and hands begins to dry out, until it hardens. That, in turn, creates joint discomfort and stiffness. An analysis of multiple randomized controlled trials found that glucosamine supplementation helps support healthy joint structure and encourages comfortable knee function. (2)ChondroitinChondroitin is a major natural component of cartilage. It contains essential building blocks for healthy comfortable cartilage and helps to stimulate its production. Acting as a carrier of liquid nutrient to the joints, it supports healthy fluid balance for better joint movement and mobility.Similarly, a comprehensive review of studies on chondroitin supplementation found that it also helps maintain healthy joints and supports joint comfort. (4)Results from a six-year trial using the combination of glucosamine and chondroitin showed that in those who used the combined supplement for greater than two years, there was a significant preservation of healthy joint structure. (5)

Health benefits overview: Are your joints feeling less flexible as you age? Glucosamine and chondroitin are major cartilage components that can encourage optimal joint function and comfort. Clinical studies demonstrate that this formula can promote comfortable cartilage and enhance joint movement. Whether it's your knees, hips, or hands, this combination can help maintain the joint comfort you need for daily activities.

Why this formula works: Glucosamine serves as a vital element for joint function and repair. Your body naturally produces it, but production decreases with age. As glucosamine levels decline, cartilage in areas like the knees, hips, and hands begins to dry out and harden. This can create joint discomfort and stiffness that impacts your quality of life. Chondroitin is another natural cartilage component that contains essential building blocks for comfortable cartilage. It acts as a carrier of fluid nutrients to the joints, promoting optimal fluid balance for better movement and mobility.

Backed by science: Want to understand how these ingredients work together? Let's explore the research behind this powerful combination. Glucosamine for joint structure and knee comfort Glucosamine is a crucial component of cartilage and a key element for joint function and repair. As we age, the amount our bodies produce naturally decreases, leading to cartilage that begins to dry out until it hardens. An analysis of multiple randomized controlled trials found that glucosamine supplementation helps encourage optimal joint structure and promotes comfortable knee function. This makes it particularly valuable for maintaining the mobility you enjoy in your daily life. Chondroitin for cartilage health and joint mobility Chondroitin is a major natural component of cartilage that contains essential building blocks for comfortable cartilage health. It helps stimulate cartilage production, which is vital for maintaining joint integrity as you age. Acting as a carrier of liquid nutrients to the joints, chondroitin encourages optimal fluid balance for better joint movement and mobility. A comprehensive review of studies on chondroitin supplementation found that it helps maintain comfortable joints and promotes joint ease. The synergistic combination Results from a six-year trial using the combination of glucosamine and chondroitin showed impressive outcomes. In those who used the combined supplement for greater than two years, there was a significant preservation of optimal joint structure. This demonstrates that combining these two ingredients provides additive advantages for your long-term joint health and comfort.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Magnesium (Citrate), EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:If you are looking for a supplement that covers and supports a wide range of organs vulnerable to the aging process, look no further. Magnesium in Magnesium Citrate can promote heart- and vascular health, contribute to strengthening your bones, help maintain normal muscle and nerve function, and much more. Simply put, magnesium is one of the body’s most important minerals – so let magnesium help you take charge of the aging process! (1,2) Why it works:As your body ages, your bones may begin to lose strength. It’s also common that your cardiovascular system can experience a certain level of fatigue and that nerve function is not as speedy as before.Because magnesium citrate supports bone strength, cardiovascular- and nerve function, it’s exactly where Magnesium Citrate comes into the picture.In fact, magnesium supports over 300 hundred bodily functions, including enzymatic processes within cells, helping to keep them strong and healthy. Moreover, it can also help keep your heart rhythm steady and help support a healthy immune system. (3)Magnesium can also contribute to maintaining blood sugar and blood pressure levels already within normal range and is known to be involved in energy metabolism and protein synthesis. (1,2)All of these support functions play a role in fighting the natural aging process, because they combat many different age-related woes at the same time. The science behind the product:Magnesium can positively support bone mineral matrix and its ability to metabolize minerals which are necessary for repair and rebuilding. (4,5)Scientists reported that people need to get sufficient amount of minerals including calcium and magnesium. They are essential for your body and therefore, they can help to maintain strong and healthy bones.Additionally, studies reported that dietary magnesium intake and supplementation indeed can improve the metabolic profile. It was shown that magnesium can positively influence insulin resistance, serum lipid profiles, inflammation, endothelial function, oxidative stress. (6-9) How to use: Take one (1) capsule one to two times daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Can be taken all at once or in divided doses.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for a supplement that covers and supports a wide range of organs vulnerable to the aging process? Magnesium in Magnesium (Citrate), EU can promote heart and vascular health, contribute to strengthening your bones, help maintain normal muscle and nerve function, and much more. Simply put, magnesium is one of the body's most important minerals. Let magnesium help you take charge of the aging process and maintain vitality throughout your life.

Why this formula works: As your body ages, your bones may begin to lose strength. It's also common that your cardiovascular system can experience a certain level of fatigue and that nerve function is not as speedy as before. Because magnesium citrate encourages bone strength, cardiovascular function, and nerve health, it addresses multiple age-related concerns simultaneously. In fact, magnesium participates in over 300 bodily functions, including enzymatic processes within cells, helping to keep them strong and healthy. Magnesium can also help keep your heart rhythm steady and encourage a balanced immune system. Additionally, it can contribute to maintaining blood sugar and blood pressure levels already within normal range and is known to be involved in energy metabolism and protein synthesis.

Backed by science: Want to understand how magnesium protects so many different aspects of your health? Let's explore the research behind this essential mineral. Bone health and mineral metabolism Magnesium can positively encourage bone mineral matrix and its ability to metabolize minerals which are necessary for repair and rebuilding. This is crucial as your bones naturally lose density with age. Scientists have reported that people need to get sufficient amounts of minerals including calcium and magnesium. They are essential for your body and can help maintain strong and healthy bones throughout your lifetime. Metabolic and cardiovascular support Studies have reported that dietary magnesium intake and supplementation can indeed enhance the metabolic profile. This means better overall metabolic health and efficiency as you age. Research has shown that magnesium can positively influence insulin resistance, serum lipid profiles, inflammation, endothelial function, and oxidative stress. All of these factors play important roles in maintaining your cardiovascular wellness and overall vitality. Multi-system protection The comprehensive support functions of magnesium play a crucial role in fighting the natural aging process. By addressing many different age-related concerns simultaneously, magnesium offers you whole-body protection. From cellular energy production to heart rhythm regulation, from bone strength to nerve signal transmission, magnesium works throughout your body to maintain optimal function across multiple systems.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Vitamin D3, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce - especially during the winter.A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.Why it works:Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. Because of weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range may be inhibited. Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel.Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Do you struggle to get enough sunshine, especially during the winter months? Vitamin D3, EU can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for your body to produce. A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, encourage cognitive health, help maintain optimal cell differentiation, and support immune function for better overall wellness.

Why this formula works: Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. However, weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock use may inhibit the body's ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range. This is why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day. Vitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Along with vitamin K and essential minerals, vitamin D is crucial for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. This is an important step in maintaining strong bones and teeth throughout your life.

Backed by science: Want to understand why vitamin D3 is considered such a vital nutrient for your wellbeing? Let's explore the extensive research behind this sunshine vitamin. Cognitive health and mental clarity Vitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Optimal serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. This brain-protective effect makes vitamin D3 particularly valuable for maintaining mental sharpness and cognitive performance as the years go by. Bone health and immune function Vitamin D, along with vitamin K and essential minerals, is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. This is a vital step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth as you age. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in optimal immune function. By encouraging balanced immune system activity, vitamin D helps you maintain overall wellness and resilience against daily challenges. Cardiovascular health and blood pressure support Vitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream. It promotes a balanced inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages optimal endothelial function. Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Optimal renin levels help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range, which is crucial for your cardiovascular wellness. Optimal dosing recommendations This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Mega EPA/DHA, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: EPA and DHA can promote cardiovascular and brain health and help inhibit inflammatory factors.Mega EPA/DHA is made with fish oil sustainably sourced from anchovy caught wild in the South Pacific. Caught in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, these fish are processed in a facility located close to the fisheries to preserve freshness.This pure, fresh fish oil provides the omega-3 fatty acids you need in easy-to-swallow softgels. Why it works:There are two common omega fatty acids in our diets: omega-3s and omega-6s. They’re both essential to health, but balancing the two is even more important, especially since Westerners generally eat foods high in omega-6s and don’t get enough omega-3s.That makes omega-3 supplementation essential. For optimum health, the ratio of omega-6 to omega-3 fatty acids should be between 1:1 and 4:1. (1) Each two-softgel serving of Mega EPA/DHA contains 720 mg of EPA (eicosapentaenoic acid) and 480 mg of DHA (docosahexaenoic acid), making it an affordable and convenient way to get your daily omega-3s.The science behind the product:Omega-3s & heart healthResearch shows that consumption of EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids can help maintain a healthy heart and promote the vascular system. (2)Cognitive & joint health supportOmega-3s can promote healthy cognition, help maintain your mood, and encourage healthy blood flow in the brain. (3-5) Omega-3s also inhibit inflammatory factors to support joint health. (6) That makes taking an omega-rich fish oil supplement an important part of any joint health regimen. How to use:Take two (2) softgels one to three times daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA Fish Oil, Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The health benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids are manyfold and include support for heart health, brain function, and balancing of the inflammatory response. Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract adds sesame lignans and olive extract to the essential fatty acids EPA and DHA from fish oil for enhanced health benefits.The product provides 240 easy-to-swallow softgels.Why it works:The health benefits of eating cold-water fish are robust. However, concerns remain about contaminants found in wild and farm-raised fish in public. This ought not to stop consumers from including fish in their diet. The longevity advantages of consuming cold-water fish instead of foods like beef are remarkable.Omega-3 derived from fish oil supports heart health, brain function, and helps to balance the inflammatory response. There is no debate about the broad-spectrum benefits of omega-3 fatty acids.The fish oil in this formula is made with Pure+™, a wild fish oil concentrate derived from South Pacific Ocean anchovy. Processed in Chile within hours of harvest, you can be confident that you’re getting an exceptionally fresh fish oil formula.The high quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements. The science behind the product:IFOS™ 5-star-rated formulaLife Extension's Super Omega-3 is using a fish oil concentrate made from South Pacific anchovy. Caught off the coast of Chile in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, this fish oil is processed within hours of harvest for exceptional freshness. The fish oil in the Super Omega-3 formula has earned the highest, 5-star rating from IFOS™, an independent organization that sets the standard for fish oil purity, potency and freshness.High-quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants that are present in the fish itself. The enhanced molecular distillation method utilizes redundant processes to gently remove detectable environmental toxins.Enriched with olive extract & sesame lignans There are literally hundreds of fish oil supplements on the market. Only the formula in Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract product incorporates omega-3, olive fruit extract, and sesame lignans to enhance the health benefits of the omega-3 fatty acids. Polyphen-Oil™ olive extract (fruit and lead): Each servings (four softgels) supply the polyphenol content equivalent to that of more than 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil. Research indicates that a combination of fish oil and olive oil can support a healthy inflammatory response better than fish oil aloneSesame lignans: The role of sesame lignans is to augment the benefits of fish oil by several mechanisms such as guarding the unsaturated fatty acids in the body against oxidation and directing them towards pathways that help with inflammatory reactions.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Cortisol-Stress Balance
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is cortisol? It's a steroid hormone produced by your adrenal glands. Your body releases cortisol in response to a wide variety of stress factors. When you under stress, your body may produce elevated cortisol levels, affecting your blood pressure, mood, sleep patterns, and also weight management. To support healthy cortisol levels, the scientists at Life Extension combined two stress-fighting extract blends, formulating Cortisol-Stress Balance. The supplement offers a once-daily vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO formula.Why it works:Millions of people just accept stress as a typical aspect of our modern lives. Yet, stress can have a measurable negative effect on your body.Cortisol-Stress Balance can help maintain already-healthy cortisol levels, inhibit factors that promote cortisol release, calm your body, and encourage a healthy response to stress with two innovative blends. The science behind the product:The proprietary blends in Cortisol-Stress Balance deliver:Relora® magnolia & phellodendron extractThe bark of magnolia and phellodendron trees (also known as Amur cork) contain compounds that promote a beneficial response to stress. Research indicates that Relora® influences salivary cortisol levels. (1) The active ingredients in this blend can bind to neurochemical receptors that support mood and stress, leading to improved mood scores measured through standardized testing. (2)Oligonol® lychee fruit & green tea extractsNumerous individuals attest to the soothing effects of tea. Oligonol® combines lychee fruit extracts with green tea-derived compounds. In a randomized, placebo-controlled study, Oligonol® demonstrated its ability to inhibit the proinflammatory IL1β and IL6 cytokines, promoting a positive stress response and maintaining already-healthy cortisol levels (3). Cortisol-Stress Balance combines not one but two proprietary extract blends into a single, groundbreaking stress-support supplement. Life keeps moving forward, and stress doesn't take a break. Empower your body to respond healthily with once-daily Cortisol-Stress Balance.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Men's Vitality Packs
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Men’s Vitality Packs provide tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of men’s health. Each box of product contains 30 servings of Male Vascular Sexual Support, Testosterone Elite*, and PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol. Moreover, these daily servings come in convenient single-serve packets, perfect to take on the go.*This supplement is intended to promote testosterone levels but does not contain testosterone.Why it works:The physiology of men requires customized nutrition to function optimally. To address this, Men's Vitality Packs combine three science-based formulations to support sexual health, testosterone levels, and prostate and urinary function. With a single day’s dose of these three formulas in each packet, you’re free to take your man-centered nutrition with you on the road, to the gym, or to work without the need to carry multiple bottles.The science behind the product:Men’s Vascular Sexual SupportK. parvifloraThis supplement contains K. parviflora, also known as Thai Black Ginger. Although K. parviflora has been used to promote male sexual health for years, only recently has the ingredient has been studied in the Western world. The results have been remarkable: two clinical studies show promise for male sexual function, response, performance, and satisfaction, with results seen after 30 days. (1,2)K. parviflora works by enhancing nitric oxide synthesis; relaxing blood vessels and enabling healthy flow, which is key to healthy male sexual response. (3,4) Additionally, it can promote a healthy brain response to sexual stimuli and help inhibit an enzyme that can affect male sexual function. (2,5)Testosterone Elite*Pomegranate peel & cacao seed extractAccording to a clinical study, a blend of pomegranate and cacao seed extracts can encourage healthy levels of free and total testosterone and support physical strength and other benefits of balanced testosterone levels. (6)LuteolinLuteolin is a flavonoid or plant compound well known for its powerful antioxidant properties. In preclinical studies, luteolin was shown to inhibit the activity of the aromatase enzyme and promote testosterone production by promoting the conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone, the precursor hormone for testosterone production. (7-9)*This product is intended to promote testosterone levels but does not contain testosterone.PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-SitosterolExtracts of the saw palmetto berry The extracts of the saw palmetto berry (Serenoa repens) in this supplement have been found to support men’s urinary flow and comfort. (10,11)Beta-sitosterol from palmetto and pineThe saw palmetto berry is rich in the bioactive compound beta-sitosterol, which has also been found to help promote a healthy urinary stream in men. (12,13)PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol combines high-potency saw palmetto extract with beta-sitosterol (from pine). Boron and rosemary extractThe mineral boron has been added to support healthy hormonal metabolism, and a small amount of rosemary extract provides antioxidant activity. (14)FAQ:What’s included in the Men’s Vitality Packs?Men's Vitality Packs are convenient single-serve packets that include Testosterone Elite for promoting youthful testosterone production; Male Vascular Sexual Support, which can support male sexual function; and PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol to help maintain prostate function and healthy urinary patterns.What ingredients are in the Men’s Vitality Packs?Each formula within the Men's Vitality Packs contains nutrients that have been scientifically studied for their effectiveness in supporting men's health. Testosterone Elite combines pomegranate, cacao, and luteolin. Male Vascular Sexual Support primarily features black ginger extract. PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol combines saw palmetto, beta-sitosterol, and other beneficial nutrients.When should you take Men’s Vitality Packs — before or after a meal?This product can be taken at any time of the day, with or without food, depending on personal preference. It’s important to always follow the directions on the product label.When can I expect to see results?For testosterone support, the best effects were observed after eight weeks. Regarding male sexual health and function, some effects were noticeable as early as four weeks, with the best results seen after eight weeks. For prostate function and healthy urinary patterns, the optimal effects were seen after 12 weeks. However, individual response time may vary due to unique biochemistries and lifestyles.Will this supplement interact with my medications?There is no indication that the nutrients within these formulas would have negative interactions with prescription medications. However, if you are taking any prescription medications and have concerns about potential interactions when taking this supplement, it’s advisable to consult with your physician.Is this product suitable for seniors?The Men's Vitality Packs can be taken by men of all ages who wish to support youthful testosterone production, prostate health, and urinary health. Are there any major allergens in this product? The three products within the Men's Vitality Packs do not contain any of the major 9 allergens. This means they are free of milk, eggs, nuts, fish, crustaceans, shellfish, wheat, soy, and sesame. Where is this product manufactured? Men’s Vitality Packs are manufactured in the USA. Is this product suitable for vegetarians? While Testosterone Elite and Male Vascular Sexual Support are vegetarians, PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol is not. The softgel of the latter contains bovine gelatin. Can this product be taken by other than men? This product was designed and intended for adult men. The studies for these products were done exclusively on men. If you are a woman and interested in the nutrients in this product, please consult with your primary care provider to discuss the best methods for supporting your health.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Men's Vitality Packs deliver targeted nutrition designed specifically to address the unique physiological needs of men. Each convenient packet contains three science-backed formulas to encourage sexual wellness, promote optimal testosterone levels, and maintain prostate and urinary function. Are you looking for a comprehensive approach to men's health? With a complete daily serving of these three formulas in each single-serve packet, you can take your man-centered nutrition anywhere – to work, the gym, or on the road – without juggling multiple supplement bottles.

Why this formula works: Male physiology requires specialized nutrition to function at its best. Men's Vitality Packs combine three targeted formulations that work together to address the core aspects of men's vitality – sexual health, hormonal balance, and prostate wellness. Each packet provides Testosterone Elite to promote youthful testosterone production, Male Vascular Sexual Support to encourage optimal sexual function, and PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol for prostate and urinary support. This convenient single-packet system ensures you get comprehensive daily nutrition without the hassle of carrying multiple bottles wherever your day takes you.

Backed by science: Why do men need specialized nutritional support? As you age, changes in hormone production, blood flow, and prostate health can affect your vitality, making targeted supplementation increasingly valuable for maintaining optimal wellness. Male Vascular Sexual Support: black ginger extract This formula features K. parviflora, commonly known as Thai black ginger. While this botanical has been used traditionally for years to encourage male sexual wellness, Western scientific research has only recently validated its remarkable potential. Two clinical studies demonstrate promising results for male sexual function, response, performance, and satisfaction, with noticeable effects observed after just 30 days. Black ginger works by enhancing nitric oxide production, which relaxes blood vessels and enables optimal blood flow – a key factor in supporting your sexual response. Additionally, it can promote a balanced brain response to sexual stimuli and help inhibit an enzyme that may affect male sexual function. Testosterone Elite: pomegranate and cacao blend According to clinical research, a proprietary blend of pomegranate and cacao seed extracts can encourage optimal levels of both free and total testosterone. Study participants experienced improvements in physical strength along with other advantages associated with balanced testosterone levels. Testosterone Elite: luteolin for hormonal balance Luteolin is a plant compound celebrated for its powerful antioxidant properties. In preclinical studies, luteolin demonstrated the ability to help inhibit aromatase enzyme activity. Aromatase converts testosterone into estradiol (estrogen), and while some estrogen is necessary for male health, excessive conversion can reduce available testosterone in your system. Luteolin may also encourage testosterone production by promoting the conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone, which serves as the precursor hormone for testosterone synthesis. PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto: prostate and urinary support The saw palmetto berry extracts (Serenoa repens) in this formula have been found to encourage comfortable urinary flow in men. These berries are naturally rich in beta-sitosterol, a bioactive compound that has also been shown to help promote a strong, steady urinary stream. PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol combines high-potency saw palmetto extract with additional beta-sitosterol from pine for comprehensive prostate support. Additional supportive nutrients The mineral boron has been included to encourage optimal hormonal metabolism, while a small amount of rosemary extract provides beneficial antioxidant activity to protect your cells from oxidative stress.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is ashwagandha? It's an exotic herb, also known as Indian ginseng or winter cherry, that has been used for thousands of years to promote health. The herb ashwagandha is an adaptogen, which means it can help the body adapt to stress and provide well-being.It’s hard to manage the to-do list when you have a lot on your mind. However, you don’t have to be caught up in the hustle and bustle. Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus can help you stay cool under pressure. The combination of clinically studied ashwagandha and spearmint extracts can help you relax and at the same time sharpen your focus, so you'll have the presence of mind to tackle every task. Why it works:Staying on top of your game requires focus. But how do you remain attentive to your goals in a world filled with so many distractions? That’s why Ashwagandha Plus Calm and Focus was created. Studies indicate that ashwagandha can promote a calm, relaxed state of mind while encouraging emotional well-being. Other research shows that spearmint works with the brain to support attention and concentration, without any of the nervousness that people can experience with caffeine.Life Extension combines ashwagandha and spearmint extracts into one formula to help you stay calm and focused, so you can concentrate on what’s important.The science behind the product:Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus contains a powerful combination that can support you in dealing with the demands of everyday life: Ashwagandha helping to relieve stressSeveral clinical trials indicate that ashwagandha can provide multiple benefits and help balance the body’s response to the pressure of day-to-day living. Ashwagandha has in fact become one of the most desired botanicals for stress management. Human and animal research shows that it can encourage a healthy response to stress, cognition and memory, overall well-being, and more. (1-6)In a 60-day clinical trial, 130 adults took ashwagandha extract once or twice daily, or placebo. After 60 days, all stress-related parameters were significantly improved in the groups receiving ashwagandha. (1) Ashwagandha Plus Calm and Focus delivers 250 mg of ashwagandha extract per dose. The ashwagandha extract also helped balance biological markers of stress and promoted a healthy balance of stress-related hormones such as cortisol.Ashwagandha for mood and cognitive healthStress may affect memory, concentration, and mood. (7) In the 60-day study, at each dosage ashwagandha showed improved self-rated scores of mood and cognition. (5) Ashwagandha especially helped relieve feelings of everyday stress, occasional irritability, and promoted healthy concentration. Moreover, clinical studies suggest that ashwagandha can encourage healthy cognitive function. (6) Spearmint for concentration and memorySpearmint contains special phenolic compounds in spearmint extract that have been shown to support working memory, as well as reaction time, concentration, and short-term memory. (8-10) Ashwagandha Plus provides 900 mg of a type of spearmint extract standardized for these phenolic compounds.In a placebo-controlled, double-blind trial, participants taking a high-phenolic spearmint extract for 90 days, expressed better and more accurate working memory than placebo groups did. FAQ:What is in Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus?Ashwagandha Plus combines two clinically studied ingredients:Sensoril® ashwagandha extract to support healthy cortisol levels and a healthy mood.Neumentix™ patented extract of spearmint to promote alertness and attention. This formula can encourage a calming effect besides a stimulant-free boost in cognitive function. Does this product contain caffeine?No. The spearmint extract in this formula can support attention and memory recall, but it does not contain caffeine, which means it can keep you alert and focused without nervousness.When should I take Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus, before or after a meal? This product can be taken any time of the day, with or without food depending on your preferences. Always take any product as directed on the label.Do you take two capsules at once or in divided doses?It’s recommended to take two capsules once per day rather than individually throughout the day because scientific research indicates this is the best way to benefit from this supplement.When can I expect an effect?Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is designed to be taken for a sustained period of time.Effects on focus were seen as quickly as 2,25 hours, but the best effects were achieved after 90 days.The calming effects were seen as early as 30 days, with the best effects seen after 60 days.However, due to our unique biochemistries and lifestyles, the time it takes to notice the benefits can vary from person to person.Will this supplement interact with my medication negatively?There is no indication that the nutrients within these formulas would negatively interact with prescription medications.Nevertheless, if you take any prescription medications and want to know more about potential interactions when taking this supplement, it’s suggested to discuss the decision with your physician.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?Yes. All of the raw materials go through stringent testing to meet Life Extenion’s high-quality standards.Testing is performed for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, potency, and quantity of active ingredients in the finished product.Raw materials are released for production only when they meet Life Extension’s specifications.Are there any major allergens in this product?This product does not contain any of the major 9 allergens. This means it’s free of milk, eggs, nuts, fish, crustaceans, shellfish, wheat, soy, and sesame.Where is this product manufactured?Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is manufactured in the USA. Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18. Please consult with your child’s physician before giving them any supplements.How is Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus different from Optimized Ashwagandha?Optimized Ashwagandha is a standalone ashwagandha formula (without other extracts) that uses the same clinically studied extract as Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus.While they both include the same amount of ashwagandha per capsule, the suggested serving size for Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is two capsules once per day compared to one capsule twice daily for Optimized Ashwagandha.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is an exotic herb known as Indian ginseng that has been used for thousands of years. This adaptogen can help your body adapt to stress and provide a sense of well-being. Are you struggling to stay focused with a busy schedule? The combination of clinically studied ashwagandha and spearmint extracts can help you relax while sharpening your concentration, giving you the mental clarity to tackle every task.

Why this formula works: Maintaining focus requires mental energy, but how do you stay attentive when distractions are everywhere? Studies show that ashwagandha can promote a calm, relaxed mindset while encouraging emotional balance. Research also demonstrates that spearmint works with your brain to enhance attention and concentration, without the jittery feelings associated with caffeine. This formula combines both botanicals to help you stay composed and focused on what truly matters.

Backed by science: Ashwagandha for stress relief Multiple clinical trials indicate that ashwagandha can provide numerous advantages and help balance your body's response to everyday pressure. Ashwagandha has become one of the most sought-after botanicals for stress management. Human and animal research shows that it can encourage optimal response to stress, cognition, and memory, along with overall well-being. In a 60-day clinical trial, 130 adults took ashwagandha extract once or twice daily, or placebo. After 60 days, all stress-related parameters were significantly improved in the groups receiving ashwagandha. Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus delivers 250 mg of ashwagandha extract per dose. The ashwagandha extract also helped balance biological markers of stress and promoted optimal levels of stress-related hormones such as cortisol. Ashwagandha for mood and cognitive health Stress may affect memory, concentration, and mood. In the 60-day study, at each dosage ashwagandha showed improved self-rated scores of mood and cognition. Ashwagandha especially helped relieve feelings of everyday stress, occasional irritability, and promoted optimal concentration. Moreover, clinical studies suggest that ashwagandha can encourage cognitive function. Spearmint for concentration and memory Spearmint contains special phenolic compounds that have been shown to enhance working memory, as well as reaction time, concentration, and short-term memory. Ashwagandha Plus provides 900 mg of a type of spearmint extract standardized for these phenolic compounds. In a placebo-controlled, double-blind trial, participants taking a high-phenolic spearmint extract for 90 days expressed better and more accurate working memory than placebo groups did. Do you want to stay alert without relying on stimulants? This caffeine-free approach helps you maintain focus and mental sharpness throughout your day.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
