product.title: PushCatch® Liver Detox
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Inadequately designed detox protocols can result in toxin recirculation throughout the body. PushCatch® Liver Detox is a simple and effective two-step liver cleanse that can help “push” toxins to the gut and “catch” them with binding agents for safe removal from the body. This cleansing system consists of Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®, a comprehensive botanical formula that can support all stages of liver detoxification (1-3), along with EU Ultra Binder®, a broad-spectrum binder that can help capture toxins in the gut and facilitate their elimination through the stool. Why it works:PushCatch® Liver Detox kit contains Dr. Shade’s Liver Sauce and EU Ultra Binder®. This two-step cleanse can support a healthy liver detox: PUSH: Dr. Shade’s Liver Sauce® combines phytonutrients and four potent bitters that can promote the phases of detox and help “push” toxins through the body.CATCH: Binders are a crucial step in “catching” and removing toxins from the body, helping to prevent toxic recirculation. Metals, pesticides, hormone mimics, mold toxins, and more: EU Ultra Binder® is designed to help remove them all.The science behind the product: Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce® This product contains powerful nutrients and bitter phytochemicals like R-lipoic acid and milk thistle that can promote critical detoxification pathways and encourage healthy bile flow (4), preparing toxins for excretion. Additionally, these nutrients and botanicals can offer antioxidant and immune support by activating the Nrf2 pathway and boosting glutathione levels. (5) Read more about the product EU Ultra Binder® This supplement complements the detoxification process by supporting efficient toxin removal through the digestive system. Toxins are heavy metals, pesticides, herbicides, drug residues, food additives, mold, and bacterial metabolites. EU Ultra Binder is an all-in-one formula for toxin binding and elimination. It contains a combination of multiple binders; an optimal blend of ingredients to target toxins. (6) Read more about the product Complete detoxification support When the two formulas Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce® and EU Ultra Binder® are used together, they can provide efficient and comprehensive support for detoxification. This innovative detox program builds on 10+ years of experience developing better detox protocols. It can be adapted for very light, frequent detoxification or slowly scaled up for more intensive cleanses. Quicksilver Delivery Systems Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce® uses Quicksilver Scientific’s signature liposomal delivery format for enhanced absorption and nearly instantaneous effect. This delivery system improves upon liposomal technology with smaller, more stable particles made from the highest-grade ingredients available. In addition to exceptional absorption rates, these tiny liposomal particles increase diffusion across mucous membranes, enhance lymphatic circulation of nutrients, and support cellular delivery. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: PushCatch® Liver Detox can help you safely eliminate toxins from your body through a simple and effective two-step liver cleanse. This comprehensive system works by first pushing toxins to your gut and then catching them with binding agents for safe removal, preventing harmful recirculation throughout your system. Are you concerned about toxins accumulating in your body? Inadequately designed detox protocols can lead to toxin recirculation, but this innovative cleanse combines Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®ᴱᵁ and Ultra Binderᴱᵁ to support all stages of liver detoxification.

Backed by science: Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®ᴱᵁ for detoxification support This formula contains powerful nutrients and bitter phytochemicals like R-lipoic acid and milk thistle that can promote critical detoxification pathways in your liver. These ingredients encourage healthy bile flow, preparing toxins for excretion from your body. The bitter botanicals including dandelion, solidago, gentian, and myrrh stimulate your digestive system and support drainage pathways that are essential for effective toxin removal. Antioxidant and immune support The nutrients and botanicals in Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®ᴱᵁ can offer additional protection by activating the Nrf2 pathway, your body's master antioxidant switch. This activation boosts glutathione levels, your body's most important internal antioxidant, providing comprehensive cellular protection while your system processes and eliminates toxins. Ultra Binderᴱᵁ for toxin elimination This comprehensive formula complements the detoxification process by supporting efficient toxin removal through your digestive system. Heavy metals, pesticides, herbicides, drug residues, food additives, mold toxins, and bacterial metabolites all accumulate in your body over time. Ultra Binderᴱᵁ contains an optimal blend of multiple binding agents including activated charcoal, sodium bentonite clay, chitosan, and modified citrus pectin that work together to target various types of toxins. Broad-spectrum binding action Each binder in Ultra Binderᴱᵁ serves a specific purpose. Activated charcoal captures endotoxins, pesticides, and mold toxins. Bentonite clay binds aflatoxin and other mycotoxins. Chitosan attaches to bile and the toxins secreted with it, including heavy metals, PCBs, phthalates, and BPA. Modified citrus pectin binds mercury and other heavy metals without disrupting essential minerals your body needs. Complete synergistic support When Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®ᴱᵁ and Ultra Binderᴱᵁ are used together, they provide efficient and comprehensive support for your body's natural detoxification processes. The push-catch system ensures that toxins mobilized from your tissues are effectively captured and eliminated rather than reabsorbed, maximizing the safety and effectiveness of your cleanse. product.title: Melatonin, 1 mg, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports.Natural production of this hormone declines with age. (1-3) This can disturb your circadian rhythm and, as a result thereof, your quality of sleep. (4-6) Research shows that it does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health.Why it works:Melatonin is a hormone that is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock”. (7,8) Melatonin is primarily synthesized in your pineal gland and is released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, studies show that it also has many other health advantages: Sleep support The body’s own production of melatonin is reduced with the natural aging process. That’s why supplementation with this hormone can be a natural solution for people in advanced age who have trouble sleeping. Supplementing with this hormone can help people who deal with sleep trouble and help them balance their circadian rhythm. Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl), and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it also supports other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it provides protection against a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11) Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin can therefore support the immune system as a whole. (12,13) Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20) The science behind the product:Melatonin can be delivered in a variety of ways, from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery.This melatonin product contains a medium level 1 mg dose of melatonin.How to use:Take one (1) capsule 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Melatonin is naturally secreted from the pineal gland at night, and should be taken at night for optimal results.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders).Use caution if combining with alcohol.This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant.Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Health benefits overview: A good night's sleep is essential for bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin can support naturally. Natural production of this hormone declines with age, potentially disturbing your circadian rhythm and sleep quality. Research shows melatonin can offer not only sleep support but also antioxidant protection, DNA defense, immune system activation, and cognitive health benefits.

Backed by science: Sleep support and circadian rhythm regulation Melatonin plays a central role in regulating your body's internal clock, signaling when it's time to sleep. As you age, natural melatonin production decreases, which can disrupt sleep patterns and make it harder to fall asleep or stay asleep throughout the night. Supplementing with melatonin can help restore balanced circadian rhythm function. By taking this supplement 30-60 minutes before bedtime, you work with your body's natural timing to promote easier sleep onset and more restful nights. Powerful antioxidant protection Research demonstrates that melatonin possesses strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges some of the most common free radicals, including hydroxyl and peroxyl radicals, doing so more efficiently than many other antioxidants. Furthermore, melatonin can enhance other antioxidants in your body, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection throughout your system. This comprehensive antioxidant activity makes melatonin valuable beyond its sleep-promoting effects. Cellular DNA protection Melatonin provides important support for cellular DNA integrity. It offers protection against peroxynitrite, a specific type of free radical that attacks DNA strands inside cells. By defending against this damaging free radical, melatonin can help inhibit oxidative damage to your cells. This protective effect contributes to maintaining cellular health as you age. Immune system activation Melatonin can help activate T-helper cells, which play a regulatory role in immune response. T-helper cells coordinate how other immune cells respond to foreign molecules entering your body. By activating these crucial immune cells, melatonin can therefore support your immune system as a whole. This immune-supportive property adds another dimension to melatonin's health benefits. Cognitive health support Cognitive decline is a normal consequence of natural aging, but the onset of age-related cognitive issues may correlate with melatonin levels in the body. Melatonin can support the brain's own antioxidant protection system. Additionally, melatonin can help inhibit factors in the brain that may contribute to age-related cognitive decline, such as free radicals. Are you concerned about maintaining mental sharpness as you age? This protective effect makes melatonin beneficial for long-term brain health.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Vitamin B12, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin B12, also called cobalamin, is a water-soluble vitamin that supports nerve function, red blood cell formation, and DNA synthesis.There are eight B vitamins, each with its own set of important roles in maintaining health throughout the body. Methylcobalamin is a form of vitamin B12 that is active in the central nervous system. It is essential to the growth and replication of cells. This formula supplies 500 mcg of methylcobalamin per lozenge. Why it works:Vitamin B12 is naturally found in animal-based foods, including dairy products and eggs. However, vegetarians and older adults are especially at risk for B12 deficiency, often due to:Low dietary intake, poor absorption of B12 (digestive challenges), or inadequate bioavailability. (1,2) With age, the body produces less hydrochloric acid, which can also affect B12 absorption. (3,4)Life Extension's Vitamin B12 lozenges can be quickly dissolved in your mouth or chewed as a convenient way to ensure optimal B12 levels. The science behind the product:To overcome obstacles to vitamin B12 absorption, the Institute of Medicine recommended in 1998 that older adults meet their B12 needs through fortified foods or dietary supplements. (5) More recent studies confirm that even moderate B12 supplementation can enhance both B12 and folate status in aging individuals. (6)Vitamin B12, or cobalamin, works together with vitamin B6 and folate to convert homocysteine into the amino acid methionine. (7) This helps to maintain healthy levels of homocysteine, which is a recognized marker of cardiovascular, neurological, and general health. (8)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Vitamin B12, also called cobalamin, is a water-soluble vitamin that can support nerve function, red blood cell formation, and DNA synthesis. Methylcobalamin is the bioactive form of vitamin B12 that is active in the central nervous system. It is essential to the growth and replication of cells. This formula supplies 500 mcg of methylcobalamin per lozenge, providing comprehensive support for your neurological, cardiovascular, and overall health needs.

Backed by science: Methylcobalamin for nervous system support Methylcobalamin is the form of vitamin B12 that is directly active in your central nervous system. Unlike other forms of B12 that require conversion in the body, methylcobalamin is immediately available for neurological functions. This bioactive form can support nerve cell communication, myelin sheath integrity, and neurotransmitter function. Your nervous system relies on adequate B12 levels to maintain optimal signaling and communication between nerve cells throughout your body. Red blood cell formation and oxygen transport Vitamin B12 plays a crucial role in the production of red blood cells. These cells carry oxygen from your lungs to tissues throughout your body, making them essential for energy production and cellular function. Without sufficient B12, red blood cell production can become impaired, potentially leading to fatigue and decreased vitality. Adequate B12 levels can help maintain healthy red blood cell formation and optimal oxygen delivery to all your organs and tissues. DNA synthesis and cellular replication Vitamin B12 is essential for DNA synthesis, the process by which your cells create the genetic material needed for replication and repair. Every cell in your body depends on this process for growth and maintenance. This fundamental role makes B12 vital for tissue repair, immune cell production, and overall cellular health. Are you supporting your cells with adequate B12 for optimal function? Homocysteine metabolism for cardiovascular health Vitamin B12 works synergistically with vitamin B6 and folate to convert homocysteine into methionine, a beneficial amino acid. This conversion helps maintain healthy levels of homocysteine, which is recognized as an important marker of cardiovascular, neurological, and general health. Elevated homocysteine levels have been associated with various health concerns. By supporting healthy homocysteine metabolism, B12 can contribute to cardiovascular wellness and overall vitality as you age. Enhanced absorption for older adults The Institute of Medicine recommended in 1998 that older adults meet their B12 needs through fortified foods or dietary supplements. More recent studies confirm that even moderate B12 supplementation can enhance both B12 and folate status in aging individuals. This lozenge format offers an advantage by beginning absorption in your mouth, potentially bypassing some of the digestive challenges that come with age. The convenient delivery ensures you get the B12 support you need regardless of digestive function.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super R-Lipoic Acid, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:R-lipoic acid is a truly unique antioxidant that safeguards the cells against free radicals, supports healthy mitochondria, and promotes energy production. (1)This means that Super R-Lipoic Acid allows cells to produce energy and function under better-than-normal conditions, providing your body with the power it needs while protecting the cells for better cell function. The product is non-GMO, gluten-free, and vegetarian.Why it works:Alpha lipoic acid is an important part of cellular energy production and maintenance. Super R-Lipoic Acid is a cellular energy health support supplement. The active “R” form of lipoic acid is an antioxidant powerhouse, far more than conventional alpha-lipoic acid products. This bestselling lipoic acid product provides a powerful 240 mg dose of this “active” form of alpha lipoic acid (R-lipoic acid) in each capsule.The science behind the product:Two different forms of alpha-lipoic acidAlpha-lipoic acid consists of two different forms of isomers (R and S) have greatly different properties: The “R” form is the biologically active component that is amenable for lipoic acid’s phenomenal antioxidant effect. The “S” form is produced from chemical manufacture. Alpha-lipoic acid supplements typically consist of the "R" and "S" form in a 50/50 ratio.The "R" form of lipoic acid is normally produced and used by the human body. R-lipoic acid plays a role in, scavenging free radicals. Furthermore, it has been shown that “R” form of lipoic acid is more potent than the combined "R" and "S" forms that ordinarily comprise alpha-lipoic acid supplements. (1-11)Next generation antioxidantResearch has indicated that a newer form of R-lipoic acid has been found. This sodium-R-lipoate can be seen as the "next-generation" antioxidant powerhouse. R-lipoic acid already has shown better bioavailability, stability, and provide a vast majority of health benefits. It was shown that the newer lipoic acid formulation reached higher peak blood levels and it also achieves them sooner, assuring rapid uptake from the plasma into the tissues. (12) How to use:Take one (1) to two (2) capsules daily as tolerated, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Take capsules at the same time, preferably on an empty stomach.Suitable for vegetarians.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for powerful cellular energy support and antioxidant protection? R-lipoic acid is a truly unique antioxidant that safeguards cells against free radicals, encourages optimal mitochondrial function, and promotes energy production. Super R-Lipoic Acid, EU allows your cells to produce energy and function under better-than-normal conditions. This means providing your body with the power it needs while protecting cells for enhanced cellular function and vitality.

Why this formula works: Alpha-lipoic acid is a vital part of cellular energy production and maintenance. Super R-Lipoic Acid, EU is a cellular energy health support supplement that harnesses the power of the active R-form. The active R-form of lipoic acid is an antioxidant powerhouse, far more potent than conventional alpha-lipoic acid products. This bestselling formula provides a powerful 240 mg dose of this active form in each capsule. What makes this formula special? It uses sodium-R-lipoate, a next-generation form that reaches higher peak blood levels sooner, assuring rapid uptake from your plasma into tissues for maximum benefit.

Backed by science: Want to understand why the R-form of lipoic acid is superior? Let's explore the science behind this remarkable antioxidant. Understanding the two forms of alpha-lipoic acid Alpha-lipoic acid consists of two different forms (R and S) that have greatly different properties. The R-form is the biologically active component that provides lipoic acid's phenomenal antioxidant effects, while the S-form is produced from chemical manufacture. Typical alpha-lipoic acid supplements consist of R and S forms in a 50/50 ratio. However, the R-form is the one normally produced and used by your body, making it far more effective for supporting your health. Superior potency of the R-form The R-form of lipoic acid plays a crucial role in scavenging free radicals throughout your body. Research has shown that the R-form is more potent than the combined R and S forms that ordinarily comprise alpha-lipoic acid supplements. This means you get more antioxidant power per milligram when using pure R-lipoic acid, making it the smart choice for comprehensive cellular protection. Next-generation antioxidant technology Research has identified that sodium-R-lipoate represents a newer form of R-lipoic acid with enhanced properties. This sodium-R-lipoate can be seen as the next-generation antioxidant powerhouse with superior characteristics. While R-lipoic acid already demonstrates better bioavailability, stability, and health advantages, the newer formulation reaches higher peak blood levels and achieves them sooner. This assures rapid uptake from the plasma into your tissues where it's needed most. Comprehensive cellular protection R-lipoic acid provides multi-faceted cellular protection by defending against free radical damage. It works in both water-soluble and fat-soluble environments throughout your body, offering comprehensive antioxidant defense. This unique characteristic makes R-lipoic acid particularly effective at protecting your mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells. By safeguarding these vital structures, this formula can help maintain optimal energy production as you age.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Pycnogenol®, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is pycnogenol? Pycnogenol® is the trademark for a French maritime pine bark extract with powerful, scientifically validated benefits for longevity and overall health. Pycnogenol® has a long history of clinical research. For a healthy heart, eyes, cells, DNA, and lifespan; there are few nutritional supplements that have been studied as extensively.Why it works:Pycnogenol®, French maritime pine bark extract, is shown to help the body fight normal aging by supporting vascular health and healthy circulation. (1-3) It can also can provide powerful antioxidant protection and help prevent inflammatory factors to support whole-body health. (4-7)The science behind the product:Unlike other forms of pine bark extract, Pycnogenol® is a patented ingredient that has undergone extensive human clinical research over 40 years to substantiate its numerous anti-ageing properties.Antioxidant and blood sugar supportPycnogenol® has demonstrated an ability to help maintain already-healthy glucose levels. (8) It also may bolsters the body’s antioxidant defenses with powerful phytonutrient compounds, preventing the free-radical activity that can be damaging to cells, tissue, organs and DNA, as well as inhibiting stress on delicate vascular walls and more. (9)Vascular health and healthy circulationPycnogenol® can support endothelial and arterial health by helping to prevent inflammatory factors called cytokines. It may also encourage healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, which can support endothelial function and arterial blood flow and has been shown to promote a healthy inflammatory response and platelet function. (10-13)Available as a single-nutrient supplementLife Extension believe in this extract’s health benefits so much that it has incorporated it into our arterial, circulatory and ocular health formulas, but you can also add Pycnogenol® to your supplement regimen with this stand-alone product.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for a time-tested extract with decades of clinical validation? Pycnogenol® is a patented French maritime pine bark extract with powerful, scientifically validated benefits for longevity and overall health. Pycnogenol® has a long history of clinical research spanning over 40 years. For a healthy heart, eyes, cells, DNA, and lifespan, there are few nutritional supplements that have been studied as extensively as this remarkable extract.

Why this formula works: Pycnogenol®, French maritime pine bark extract, has been shown to help your body fight normal aging by encouraging vascular health and optimal circulation. Unlike other forms of pine bark extract, Pycnogenol® is a patented ingredient that has undergone extensive human clinical research. This formula can also provide powerful antioxidant protection throughout your body. It helps prevent inflammatory factors to support whole-body wellness and vitality. The comprehensive anti-aging properties of Pycnogenol® make it a cornerstone nutrient for maintaining your health as you age.

Backed by science: Want to understand why Pycnogenol® stands apart from other pine bark extracts? Let's explore the decades of research behind this patented formula. Antioxidant protection and blood sugar support Pycnogenol® has demonstrated an ability to help maintain glucose levels already within the normal range. This metabolic support is crucial for maintaining your energy and overall wellness. It also bolsters the body's antioxidant defenses with powerful phytonutrient compounds. These compounds work to prevent the free radical activity that can be damaging to your cells, tissues, organs, and DNA, as well as inhibiting stress on delicate vascular walls. Vascular health and healthy circulation Pycnogenol® can encourage endothelial and arterial health by helping to prevent inflammatory factors called cytokines. The endothelium is the inner lining of your blood vessels, and maintaining its health is essential for optimal circulation. It may also promote healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, which can enhance endothelial function and arterial blood flow. Studies have shown it promotes a balanced inflammatory response and optimal platelet function for comprehensive cardiovascular support. Decades of clinical validation Unlike other forms of pine bark extract, Pycnogenol® is backed by over 40 years of extensive human clinical research. This extensive validation substantiates its numerous anti-aging properties and ensures you're receiving a truly tested formula. Life Extension believes in this extract's health benefits so much that it has been incorporated into arterial, circulatory, and ocular health formulas. You can also add Pycnogenol® to your supplement regimen with this stand-alone product for targeted support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

It may also promote healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, which can enhance endothelial function and arterial blood flow. Studies have shown it promotes a balanced inflammatory response and optimal platelet function for comprehensive cardiovascular support. Decades of clinical validation Unlike other forms of pine bark extract, Pycnogenol® is backed by over 40 years of extensive human clinical research. This extensive validation substantiates its numerous anti-aging properties and ensures you're receiving a truly tested formula. Life Extension believes in this extract's health benefits so much that it has been incorporated into arterial, circulatory, and ocular health formulas. You can also add Pycnogenol® to your supplement regimen with this stand-alone product for targeted support.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Super Vitamin E, EU
product.description:
Superior absorption with natural vitamin EThe Super Vitamin E features the non-synthetic form of alpha-tocopherol, which your body absorbs and utilizes more efficiently than synthetic alternatives. Specialized carrier proteins in the liver selectively bind to this natural form of vitamin E, transporting it through the blood to your cells. These carrier proteins only recognize a portion of synthetic vitamin E, ignoring the rest. (1-4) Clinically proven difference In a study by Japanese researchers, young women were supplemented with either natural or synthetic vitamin E for one month. Just 100 mg of the natural form achieved the same blood concentration as 300 mg of the synthetic version. (5) Why does the bioavailability matter?Efficient absorption means better support! Vitamin E offers plenty of health benefits, it can: (6-8)Help boost immune functionCounter inflammationReduce oxidative stressPromote brain healthSupport whole body health

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Astaxanthin with Phospholipids, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Astaxanthin is a very versatile antioxidant loaded with health benefits. It can support joint, immune, brain, cardiovascular, DNA, mitochondrial health, and vascular health within the eye. Astaxanthin with Phospholipids combines natural astaxanthin with a proprietary blend of four phospholipids to facilitate maximum absorption of astaxanthin into the bloodstream to get as much as possible out of the health benefits that astaxanthin can give your body.Why it works:Astaxanthin can support over all body health and is a very important nutrient for eye health support. The reason for that is that this powerful carotenoid can cross the blood-eye barrier and thereby support vascular health within the eye and protect the eyes’ sensitive cells. (1)However, astaxanthin is a fat-soluble nutrient, so it is crucial to take it in a highly absorbable form. To optimize absorption, Life Extension has blended 4 mg of astaxanthin with a proprietary 80 mg blend of phospholipids, obtained from sunflower. The phospholipids enhance absorption of carotenoids like astaxanthin, so you can enjoy the full benefits of this antioxidant. The science behind the product:Astaxanthin is a red pigment molecule that is a member of the carotenoid family found in certain marine algae. Research has revealed that astaxanthin plays a role in optimizing the health of joints, immune, brain, cardiovascular system, muscle, DNA, and mitochondria. (2-24) Science has also demonstrated that astaxanthin can help promote healthy blood sugar levels for people who are in the normal range. (25-27) Astaxanthin can also promote the activity of white blood cells (lymphocytes) and natural killer cells (NK) that play a role in the innate immune system. (28-30)Additionally, astaxanthin plays a role in fighting aging, promoting the heart muscle and eye health. (31,32)This formulation is designed to enhance astaxanthin absorption by several fold. (33)How to use:Take one (1) softgel once or twice daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Extend-Release Magnesium, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Magnesium plays a key role in supporting cardiovascular health, building strong bones, and much more. It's an essential mineral, meaning that the body needs to get magnesium from food sources regularly. Extend-Release Magnesium prolongs the period during which magnesium is released and absorbed directly. Why it works:Although the body needs the trace mineral magnesium for more than 300 important biochemical reactions, most of us don't get enough magnesium from dietary sources alone. Extend-Release Magnesium is formulated with magnesium oxide for longer release and magnesium citrate for immediate absorption. Combining magnesium optimized for immediate and prolonged uptake, this advanced formula can support the body with the magnesium it needs for longer.The science behind the product:Magnesium relaxes the smooth muscles within the blood vessels, why sufficient magnesium levels promote protect heart muscle, blood vessel walls, and blood vessel linings. (1-4, 12) Furthermore, magnesium positively influences the bone mineral matrix and its ability to metabolize minerals needed for maintaining strong, healthy bones. (5,6) Dietary magnesium also plays a role in improving the metabolic profile and beneficially impacts insulin resistance as well as serum lipid profiles. (7,9) Furthermore, it also promotes a healthy inflammatory response, supports healthy endothelial function, and protects against oxidative stress. (10,11)Magnesium oxide and Magnesium citrate found in Extend-Release Magnesium Formula were shown to play a role in diminishing platelet (thrombocyte) aggregation. (12)Indeed, people with the highest blood levels of magnesium, and/or the highest dietary intake of magnesium can promote longevity. (12) How to use:Take one (1) capsule once or twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Magnesium plays a vital role in cardiovascular health, bone strength, and over 300 biochemical reactions throughout your body. Extend-Release Magnesium, EU can help ensure you maintain optimal magnesium levels with its advanced dual-release formula. This essential mineral supports heart muscle function, blood vessel health, and strong bones while promoting metabolic balance.

Why this formula works: Are you getting enough magnesium from your diet alone? Most people don't, despite the body needing this trace mineral for more than 300 important biochemical reactions. Extend-Release Magnesium, EU features an innovative combination of magnesium oxide for extended release and magnesium citrate for immediate absorption. This dual-action approach ensures your body receives steady magnesium support throughout the day. By combining magnesium optimized for both immediate and prolonged uptake, this advanced 6-hour formula can provide your body with the magnesium it needs for longer periods.

Backed by science: Magnesium oxide and citrate for cardiovascular support Magnesium relaxes the smooth muscles within blood vessels, which is why sufficient magnesium levels can help protect your heart muscle, blood vessel walls, and vessel linings. Both magnesium oxide and magnesium citrate found in this formula have been shown to play a role in diminishing platelet aggregation, supporting optimal cardiovascular function. Essential mineral for bone health and metabolic balance Magnesium positively influences the bone mineral matrix and its ability to metabolize minerals needed for maintaining strong, resilient bones. Additionally, dietary magnesium plays a role in improving your metabolic profile and beneficially impacts insulin resistance as well as serum lipid profiles. Supporting longevity through optimal magnesium levels Beyond cardiovascular and bone health, magnesium promotes a balanced inflammatory response, encourages optimal endothelial function, and protects against oxidative stress. Research indicates that people with the highest blood levels of magnesium and the highest dietary intake of magnesium can promote longevity. The 6-hour extended-release technology in this formula ensures sustained magnesium delivery, maximizing the benefits you receive from each capsule.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: NAD+ Cell Formula 300 mg, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.Many older people are experiencing fatigue and lack of motivation which might be because of an age-related decline in NAD+ levels which can impair healthy cellular metabolism. (1,2) The active ingredient in this formula can boost NAD+ which promotes systemic youthful functions and can be found in every cell in the body. (3)Why it works:As the body undergoes natural aging, one may experience having less energy and motivation to do different everyday tasks. This may be due to declining levels of NAD (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide). NAD+ Cell Formula can promote systemic youthful functions by providing nicotinamide riboside — a patented compound which plays a role in reversing age-related decline of NAD+ levels. Found in every cell in the body, this enzyme plays a role in helping to maintain healthy cell metabolism. With the highly innovative NAD+ Cell Formula, there is finally a product designed to promote higher NAD+ enzyme levels for refreshed vitality.The science behind the product:Nicotinamide riboside can increase cellular levels of NAD+ in the body. (4,5) Nicotinamide riboside has been shown to help replenish cellular NAD+ and can: (6-9)Promote sirtuin (SIRT1 and SIRT3) „longevity“ gene activationSupport energy levels and physical performance by enhancing growth and efficiency of mitochondriaRegulate metabolism Support cognitive function during aging by contributing to neuronal healthSupport healthy blood sugar levels in those within the normal range by promoting insulin sensitivityHow to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

As you age, NAD+ levels naturally decline, which may contribute to feelings of fatigue and reduced motivation. NAD+ Cell Formula 300 mg can help boost NAD+ levels to promote systemic youthful functions. This formula can encourage vital cellular metabolism throughout every cell in your body.

Why this formula works: Have you noticed feeling less energetic and motivated to tackle daily tasks as the years go by? This common experience may be linked to declining NAD+ levels in your cells. This formula can help promote youthful cellular functions by providing nicotinamide riboside, a patented compound that plays a key role in reversing age-related decline of NAD+ levels. This essential coenzyme is found in every cell and helps maintain optimal cell metabolism. With the innovative NAD+ Cell Formula 300 mg, you can finally support higher NAD+ enzyme levels for renewed vitality and energy. The 300 mg dose provides comprehensive cellular support for your wellness goals.

Backed by science: Looking for evidence-based nutrients that truly deliver results? This formula features nicotinamide riboside, clinically shown to increase cellular levels of NAD+ in the body. Nicotinamide riboside for cellular energy and longevity Nicotinamide riboside helps replenish cellular NAD+ levels throughout your body. This powerful compound can: Promote sirtuin (SIRT1 and SIRT3) longevity gene activation Enhance energy levels and physical performance by supporting mitochondrial growth and efficiency Encourage balanced metabolism Maintain cognitive function during aging by contributing to neuronal health Help maintain blood sugar levels already within normal range by promoting insulin sensitivity

product.title: Adrenal Energy Formula, 120 caps
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: The body naturally strives for homeostasis, which is a balanced state across its physiological systems. Maintaining this equilibrium is vital for health, but stress can disrupt the body’s ability to maintain homeostasis. This formula provides four botanical adaptogens shown to help the body adapt to stress and relieve its physical effects. Why it works Adrenal Energy Formula brings together four stress-balancing botanicals, such as: Holy basil (Ocimum tenuiflorum) is a plant used as an adaptogen because it can support your body in adapting to the effects of stress. Cordyceps (Paecilomyces hepialid) is a type of fungus long and an adaptogen. Bacopa Bacopa monnieri is known for supporting memory, focus, learning, and stress resilience. Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) is an Indian herb that can help inhibit some of the oxidative effects generated by nervous tension. These complementary botanical compounds can help support a healthy stress response. The science behind the product: The importance of maintaining homeostasis Up to 80% of visits to primary care physicians may be linked to stress-related effects. (1) One key reason to seek help is that stress can challenge the body’s ability to maintain homeostasis (balance and resilience), which is essential for health and well-being. Helping the body maintain homeostasis can therefore promote a healthy physiological response to stress. Adaptogenic botanicals for stress-relief Each of the four potent stress-modulating extracts, holy basil, cordyceps, bacopa, and ashwagandha, is clinically studied for the ability to support homeostasis, even on the most stressful days. (2-8) Combined, they can complement each other to provide comprehensive adaptogenic stress defense, easing the effects of stress. The benefits of balancing the stress response Stress has been linked with shorter telomeres, the protective caps on chromosome ends, suggesting a connection between stress and aging. (9) Stress impacts neurotransmitter production. In pre-clinical research, it was shown to reduce neural plasticity, which is the capacity of neurons to build new connections in response to experiences. (10) Therefore, reducing stress may help maintain cognitive health. If you are seeking relief from the effects of stress, Adrenal Energy Formula is a comprehensive and potent supplement for maintaining healthy energy and overall vitality.

Health benefits overview: Do you feel like stress is disrupting your natural balance? Your body naturally strives for homeostasis, which is a balanced state across its physiological systems. Maintaining this equilibrium is vital for your health, but stress can disrupt the body's ability to maintain homeostasis. This formula provides four botanical adaptogens shown to help the body adapt to stress and relieve its physical effects.

Why this formula works: Adrenal Energy Formula, 120 caps brings together four stress-balancing botanicals that work in harmony. These complementary botanical compounds can help encourage a balanced stress response in your body. Holy basil is used as an adaptogen because it can help your body adapt to the effects of stress. Cordyceps is a type of fungus that has been used for centuries as an adaptogen. Bacopa is known for encouraging memory, focus, learning, and stress resilience. Ashwagandha is an Indian herb that can help inhibit some of the oxidative effects generated by nervous tension.

Backed by science: Want to understand why maintaining homeostasis is so crucial for your wellbeing? Let's explore the scientific research behind these adaptogenic botanicals. The importance of maintaining homeostasis Up to 80% of visits to primary care physicians may be linked to stress-related effects. One key reason to seek help is that stress can challenge the body's ability to maintain homeostasis, which is balance and resilience. Homeostasis is essential for your health and wellbeing. Helping the body maintain this balance can therefore promote a healthy physiological response to stress and support your overall vitality. Holy basil for stress adaptation Holy basil has been clinically studied for its ability to encourage homeostasis, even on the most stressful days. This traditional adaptogenic herb can help your body maintain balance when facing daily challenges. By promoting a healthy stress response, holy basil works as a foundational component of this comprehensive formula. Cordyceps for energy and resilience Cordyceps is a unique fungus that has been valued for centuries for its adaptogenic properties. Clinical research demonstrates its ability to help maintain homeostasis and encourage resilience during stressful periods. This botanical can work synergistically with the other ingredients to provide comprehensive stress defense. Bacopa for cognitive support Bacopa has been clinically studied for its effects on memory, focus, and learning. It can help maintain cognitive function even when you're experiencing stress, supporting mental clarity and performance. The stress-resilience properties of bacopa make it particularly valuable for maintaining optimal brain function during challenging times. Ashwagandha for oxidative defense Ashwagandha is an Indian herb that has been shown to help inhibit some of the oxidative effects generated by nervous tension. This protective effect is crucial for maintaining cellular health during stressful periods. Clinical studies support ashwagandha's ability to promote homeostasis and encourage a balanced stress response in your body. The benefits of balancing the stress response Stress has been linked with shorter telomeres, the protective caps on chromosome ends, suggesting a connection between stress and aging. By promoting a balanced stress response, you may help maintain youthful cellular function. Stress impacts neurotransmitter production and has been shown to reduce neural plasticity, which is the capacity of neurons to build new connections in response to experiences. Therefore, reducing stress may help maintain your cognitive health as you age.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Are you looking for a solution to lose weight in a healthy way? Take 1 (or 2) bites at a time with Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management and get good support. These gummies can help combat fat cell size and accumulation, especially abdominal fat.Gummy supplements often contain extra sugar for the sake of tasting good. Although adding sugar would defeat the point of a formula designed to help you achieve a healthy weight. Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management has no added sugar. These non-stimulant gummies come with a great blueberry flavor, and they are vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.Why it works: Healthy weight loss takes time. A blood orange extract (Citrus sinensis) found in Mediterranean Weight Management is shown to help you lose belly fat by reducing both visceral and subcutaneous fat. In a six-month study, persons taking this extract combined with diet and exercise lost weight, and 35% of them lost 5% or more of their body weight. Moreover, by month three, those taking the extract had lost significantly more total and abdominal fat than those in the placebo group.The science behind the product: The story behind Mediterranean Weight Management The Mediterranean diet is healthy for the whole body, focusing on a limited intake of red meats and a higher intake of herbs and spices, lean proteins such as fish and poultry, a lot of vegetables, whole grains, nuts, legumes, and not to mention nutrient-packed fruits such as oranges and other citrus fruits. While Life Extension cannot squeeze the healthy benefits of an entire diet plan into a single supplement, the inspiration from the diet is applicable. That is the story behind Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management gummies. The “secret” ingredient to target fat cells – Moro red oranges “Fat” is a type of cell, similar to other cells in your body. A fat cell is called an adipocyte, and its primary job is to store fuel from the food you eat in case you run out of calories to consume. Running out of food is fortunately rarely a problem in this part of the world — which means we often end up accumulating more fat than we would prefer, especially around the waist. Life Extension’s gummies are made using an extract derived from Moro red oranges. This is a kind of blood orange with a deep red color due to the high level of anthocyanins found in it. These blood oranges were shown to reduce fat accumulation as well as fat cell size in preclinical studies — with convincing results! The studies demonstrated a nearly 50% reduction in abdominal fat mass, along with reduced fat cell size. (1) Morosil® – a patented extract with clinical studies To imitate the results of the preclinical studies mentioned, you would need fresh-squeezed Moro blood orange juice, which not only takes a lot of effort, but orange juice is pretty high in calories. These new gummies are an easier and more sensible solution – and come with effective clinical research of their own. They contain Morosil®, a patented extract of Moro blood oranges, that has been clinically studied to help reduce hip and waist circumference in both long and short-term studies. In one study, 60 overweight volunteers took 400 mg of this patented Moro blood orange extract once a day for twelve weeks. There were no changes to either their 1,500-2,000 calorie-a-day diets or their exercise routines, but there was a change in their waistlines. Those taking Moro blood orange extract lost 7 centimeters off their waists and nearly 6 centimeters off their hips, which is significantly more than the placebo group. (2) The key to healthy weight management over time Long-term healthy weight loss takes time, and Moro blood orange extract shows great results there as well. Over 100 volunteers took Moro blood orange extract for six months in a randomized, double-blind study. This was combined with a calorie-restricted diet and 30 minutes of walking, three times a week. Not only did the Moro blood orange group show significant weight loss at four months compared to the placebo group, but at six months their results were even better: losing fat (especially abdominal fat) without losing lean muscle mass. They also recorded reduced waistlines. (3)Reduction of the visceral fat Moro blood orange extract also helps reduce visceral as well as subcutaneous fat. (3) Visceral fat is the fat that wraps around your abdominal organs deep inside your body. It differs from what we typically think of as belly fat (called subcutaneous fat because it lies just underneath the skin) because it’s behind your abdominal wall. And while no one wants excess fat in either place, visceral fat is concerning because it can affect arterial health and blood sugar management. (4) Tasty gummies with no added sugar Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management has no added sugar but comes with a tasty blueberry flavor. In addition, the gummies are also vegetarian, gluten-free, and contain no genetically modified ingredients. Please note, that they are not low-calorie food. See nutrition information for sugar and calorie content.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts. This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program.Individual results are not guaranteed, and results may vary.

Health benefits overview: Are you ready to take control of your weight management goals in a natural way? Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management can help you achieve a balanced body composition with clinically researched ingredients. These delicious gummies feature Moro blood orange extract that can support fat reduction, particularly around the waist and hips. When combined with a balanced diet and regular exercise, this formula can promote meaningful progress toward your wellness objectives.

Why this formula works: Achieving lasting weight management takes dedication, but the right nutritional support can make your journey more effective. This formula contains blood orange extract that has been clinically studied for its ability to target stubborn abdominal fat. In a six-month clinical trial, participants taking this extract combined with moderate diet and exercise experienced significant weight reduction. Notably, 35% achieved at least 5% body weight loss, while measurements showed reduced waistlines and trimmer hips. By month three, those taking the extract had lost considerably more total fat and abdominal fat than the placebo group. Best of all, this happened without the use of stimulants or harsh ingredients.

Backed by science: What makes this formula different from typical weight management supplements? The answer lies in its Mediterranean-inspired approach and evidence-based ingredients. The Mediterranean diet connection The Mediterranean dietary pattern emphasizes nutrient-rich fruits, vegetables, whole grains, lean proteins, and limited red meat consumption. This approach has long been associated with optimal body composition and overall wellness. While we cannot compress an entire dietary philosophy into a single supplement, the inspiration behind these gummies draws from the Mediterranean tradition of incorporating vibrant, antioxidant-rich citrus fruits. Moro blood oranges and anthocyanins Have you ever wondered why certain foods naturally support weight management better than others? Moro blood oranges, with their distinctive deep red color, contain exceptional levels of anthocyanins, which are powerful plant compounds that give the fruit its rich hue. These anthocyanins have been scientifically studied for their effects on fat cells. Preclinical research demonstrated that blood orange extract reduced fat accumulation by nearly 50% and decreased the size of fat cells. The compounds in Moro oranges work at the cellular level to influence how your body stores and manages fat tissue. Morosil® – clinically validated extract Consuming fresh Moro blood orange juice daily would require significant effort and add unwanted calories to your diet. That's where Morosil® comes in – a patented extract standardized from Moro blood oranges that has undergone rigorous clinical testing. In a twelve-week study, 60 volunteers with excess weight took 400 mg of this extract daily without changing their moderate calorie intake or exercise routines. The results were impressive: participants lost an average of 7 centimeters from their waists and nearly 6 centimeters from their hips , which is significantly more than the placebo group. Long-term fat reduction results Quick fixes rarely deliver sustainable outcomes. In a six-month randomized, double-blind study involving over 100 volunteers, those taking Moro blood orange extract followed a calorie-conscious diet and walked for 30 minutes three times weekly. At four months, the blood orange group showed meaningful weight reduction compared to placebo, and by six months, the results were even more pronounced. Importantly, participants lost fat while preserving lean muscle mass – a crucial distinction for healthy body composition. They also experienced reduced waistline measurements throughout the study period. Targeting visceral fat Not all body fat affects health equally. Moro blood orange extract helps reduce both visceral and subcutaneous fat. Visceral fat wraps around your internal organs deep within the abdominal cavity, differing from the subcutaneous fat that sits just beneath your skin. Why does this matter to you? Visceral fat can influence cardiovascular wellness and metabolic balance more significantly than other fat deposits. Reducing this type of fat can promote better overall health outcomes. Sugar-free gummy delivery Many gummy supplements sacrifice nutritional integrity for taste by adding excessive sugar – an approach that contradicts weight management goals. Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management contains no added sugar while delivering a delightful blueberry flavor. These vegetarian, gluten-free gummies contain no genetically modified ingredients, making them suitable for various dietary preferences. Please note they are not low-calorie food; refer to nutrition information for complete details.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Morosil® – clinically validated extract Consuming fresh Moro blood orange juice daily would require significant effort and add unwanted calories to your diet. That's where Morosil® comes in – a patented extract standardized from Moro blood oranges that has undergone rigorous clinical testing. In a twelve-week study, 60 volunteers with excess weight took 400 mg of this extract daily without changing their moderate calorie intake or exercise routines. The results were impressive: participants lost an average of 7 centimeters from their waists and nearly 6 centimeters from their hips , which is significantly more than the placebo group. Long-term fat reduction results Quick fixes rarely deliver sustainable outcomes. In a six-month randomized, double-blind study involving over 100 volunteers, those taking Moro blood orange extract followed a calorie-conscious diet and walked for 30 minutes three times weekly. At four months, the blood orange group showed meaningful weight reduction compared to placebo, and by six months, the results were even more pronounced. Importantly, participants lost fat while preserving lean muscle mass – a crucial distinction for healthy body composition. They also experienced reduced waistline measurements throughout the study period. Targeting visceral fat Not all body fat affects health equally. Moro blood orange extract helps reduce both visceral and subcutaneous fat. Visceral fat wraps around your internal organs deep within the abdominal cavity, differing from the subcutaneous fat that sits just beneath your skin. Why does this matter to you? Visceral fat can influence cardiovascular wellness and metabolic balance more significantly than other fat deposits. Reducing this type of fat can promote better overall health outcomes. Sugar-free gummy delivery Many gummy supplements sacrifice nutritional integrity for taste by adding excessive sugar – an approach that contradicts weight management goals. Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management contains no added sugar while delivering a delightful blueberry flavor. These vegetarian, gluten-free gummies contain no genetically modified ingredients, making them suitable for various dietary preferences. Please note they are not low-calorie food; refer to nutrition information for complete details.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Serene Sleep
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension’s Serene Sleep is an herbal formula to support restorative sleep and a healthy stress response, so you can wake up refreshed.The product contains a combination of the clinically studied Shoden® ashwagandha extract and BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract. Each ingredient is demonstrated to help support sleep onset, duration, and efficiency. Why it works:Serene Sleep provides a melatonin-free way to “drift into dreamland”. This dual-herb formula offers extracts (ashwagandha and black cumin seed) renowned for clinical effectiveness in encouraging stress relief and sleep quality.The combo can help promote calm before bedtime and a night of restful sleep, so you can be ready to take on the day the next morning! The science behind the product:Restorative sleep, what is that?Do you feel that you’re not getting "adequate sleep"? It’s not just about the quantity of hours you rest, but also the quality.As you sleep, your body undergoes a rejuvenating process. If these different stages of sleep are disrupted, you might feel overall tiredness and stress.Ashwagandha extract, clinically studiedAshwagandha (Withania somnifera) has a long history of use in India. This supplement features a unique type of ashwagandha known to support several aspects of healthy sleep, including the time it takes to fall asleep, the duration of sleep, and achieving restorative sleep. (1) Two clinical studies of this unique ashwagandha extract demonstrated to improve restorative sleep by 72%, reduce stress by 62%, and lower levels of cortisol (the "stress hormone") by 67%.Additionally, Life Extension’s formula uses the same dose of ashwagandha (120 mg) as used in clinical studies.Black cumin seed extract, standardizedIn clinical research, a particular standardized black cumin extract has been evaluated for its impact on sleep.This study, which was randomized, double-blind, and placebo-controlled, involved healthy participants taking either 200 mg of this standardized black cumin extract or a placebo over a 90-day period. (2)By day 7, 70 percent of those in the black cumin group noted increased satisfaction with their sleep patterns, which increased to 79% by day 14.The black cumin seed extract was shown to improve sleep efficiency by 74% and reduce the time needed to fall asleep by 56% – leading to better daytime functioning. Moreover, the black cumin group showed a healthy response to stress and there were beneficial effects on the natural (internally produced) levels of melatonin, orexin, and cortisol in the black cumin group as compared to the placebo group. (2) So, put to bed and say goodnight to restless nights: welcome to the sleep of your dreams! How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQWhen should you take Serene Sleep, before or after a meal?For optimal results, take this product 20-30 minutes before bedtime, with or without food, according to personal preference. Remember to always take any product as directed on the label.Is it okay to take two softgels?This is a once-daily formulation, and it is advised to take only one softgel daily to promote restorative sleep.Will Serene Sleep make me drowsy? Unlike certain sleep formulas, Serene Sleep is not designed to make you drowsy. This product was formulated to promote a calm state of mind before bedtime to help you better ease into a restful night’s sleep, rather than immediately induce sleepiness.When can I expect an effect?Studies indicate that improvements in sleep parameters with BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract were observed as early as 7 days, with optimal effects seen after 90 days. Shoden® ashwagandha studies showed some effects as early as 22 days, with the best results after 6 weeks. However, individual responses may vary.How is Serene Sleep different from Rest & Renew, melatonin, and other sleep supplements?Rest & Renew is a restorative sleep formula that combines Shoden® ashwagandha extract with immediate- and extended-release melatonin. Serene Sleep uses the same Shoden® ashwagandha extract as Rest & Renew, but instead of melatonin, it’s combined with BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract. This makes it a great alternative for those who are sensitive to formulas containing melatonin.What’s the difference between the Shoden® ashwagandha used in Serene Sleep and Sensoril® ashwagandha used in some of your other formulas? Can they be taken together?Shoden® and Sensoril® are both trademarked ashwagandha extracts that are standardized differently and used for different primary purposes. Shoden® ashwagandha is intended to help support restorative sleep, while Sensoril® ashwagandha is meant to help support a healthy response to stress and overall well-being. Serene Sleep can be used in conjunction with our other ashwagandha formulas.Will this supplement negatively interact with my medication?There is no indication that the nutrients in this formula will negatively interact with prescription medications. If you have concerns, consult your physician.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?Yes, rigorous testing ensures that raw materials meet the high-quality standards of Life Extension before production. Testing is performed for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, potency, and quantity of active ingredients in the finished product.Are there any major allergens in this product?Serene Sleep is free of the 9 major allergens specified by the FASTER Act of 2021, including milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product manufactured?Serene Sleep is manufactured in the USA.Is this product vegetarian?No. This product contains bovine gelatin.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Glutathione, 500 mg
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all; what is glutathione? It’s an antioxidant compound in the body made up of three amino acids.It’s a natural detoxifier and is nicknamed the “master antioxidant” – with good reasons! In your body, glutathione safeguards cells against oxidative stress and contributes to many other biochemical reactions.This supplement offers 500 mg per dose of the requested reduced version of glutathione, which is the active form.Why it works:Glutathione holds many anti-aging benefits and is one of the most powerful antioxidant compounds in your body.However, glutathione levels decrease as you age, and natural production can also be slowed because of disease, medications, stress, trauma, infections, a poor diet, pollution, and radiation.The reduced form of glutathione functions best as a free radical scavenger in your body, effectively fulfilling its role as an antioxidant.So, if you want to protect yourself against oxidative stress and all its negative consequences, this reduced form of glutathione is a perfect complement to a wellness-oriented lifestyle.The science behind the product:The antioxidant benefits of glutathioneYour body produces glutathione with three amino acids: glycine, cysteine, and glutamate. (1)The reason it’s considered the body’s master antioxidant is that:Glutathione protects cellular activity from within the cells. (1-3)It regenerates/restores the activity of other antioxidants, helping them get back to their active forms, so they can continue their antioxidant functions. (1-3)This antioxidant acts as a cofactor for many essential enzymes. (1-3)Glutathione is also involved in the metabolism of certain compounds that can increase free radical activity, helping break down these compounds (that can cause oxidative stress). (4)The inactive versus active form (reduced glutathione)In the body, glutathione exists in two forms: reduced and oxidized states. (5)When it’s in its reduced form, glutathione actively scavenges for free radicals.When it’s oxidized, glutathione is inactive and cannot fulfill its role as an antioxidant.Life Extension’s glutathione formula with 500 mg provides the active form of glutathione, meaning the reduced glutathione.What are free radicals and antioxidants?In our daily lives, the body generates molecules known as free radicals, which circulate within. While they are normally the result of stress, various environmental factors such as smoke and pollutants can also trigger their formation.When the body produces too many free radicals, it can cause oxidative stress – unwanted cellular reactions – which negatively impact the body and its cells.Antioxidants are substances that inhibit cellular-level oxidation. They function by neutralizing free radicals.Glutathione is outstanding at scavenging free radicals before they can cause cellular stress, thereby protecting the cells so they can function optimally.How to use and FAQ:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.What is the dosage of this product?This product provides 250 mg of reduced glutathione per capsule, and it’s suggested to take two capsules a day.When is the best time to take Glutathione, 500 mg?This product can be taken any time of the day, with or without food, based on your preference.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that the glutathione in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications.However, if you take any prescription medications and want to know more about potential interactions when taking this supplement, you should discuss supplementing with your physician.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Liposomal Vitamin C, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin C is a powerful water-soluble nutrient with multiple functions and is exclusively obtained from the diet. As an antioxidant, vitamin C neutralizes free radicals in the body and protects tissues from oxidative stress.This essential vitamin also encourages the formation of collagen, the connective tissue that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Furthermore, vitamin C promotes the immune system health, helps regenerate other antioxidants (including vitamin E9), and more. The Liposomal Vitamin C formula contains no gluten and is tested vegan, soy protein-free, and non-GMO. Why it works:Generally, the absorption of oral vitamin C is limited, and capsules often have poor bioavailability. It falls to less than 50 percent at doses greater than 1 gram, diminishing the benefits of this essential nutrient. This has made it difficult to achieve therapeutic levels of vitamin C in the body. However, the liposomal delivery of this supplement can improve the bioavailability of vitamin C, enhancing the absorption of this critical nutrient to cells. Moreover, Liposomal Vitamin C contains a buffered form (liquid) of vitamin C, which is often better tolerated by people with gastrointestinal sensitivity. Each 5 mL serving delivers 1000 mg in the form of sodium ascorbate, with each bottle providing 24 servings. The science behind the product:Quicksilver Scientific's liposomal technology can provide superior absorption by bypassing the usual absorption barriers in the gut, enabling direct nutrient delivery to the cells for rapid uptake. The transparency of the product speaks of its quality because only liposomes small enough to navigate between cells can achieve such a clear consistency. These small, stable liposome vesicles can provide a more efficient delivery than large particle liposomes, and they start to absorb as soon as they enter the mouth! How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Want to maximize your vitamin C intake for stronger immunity and vibrant wellness? Liposomal Vitamin Cᴱᵁ can help maintain optimal levels of this essential nutrient throughout your body. This powerful water-soluble antioxidant neutralizes free radicals, protects tissues from oxidative stress, and encourages collagen formation for healthy skin, bones, arterial walls, and connective tissue. This formula can promote immune system resilience, helping your body maintain its natural defenses against seasonal challenges. Vitamin C also regenerates other antioxidants like vitamin E and plays vital roles in cardiovascular health, making it an indispensable nutrient for your overall wellness.

Why this formula works: Traditional vitamin C supplements face a significant absorption challenge that limits their effectiveness for you. Oral vitamin C absorption drops below 50 percent at doses exceeding 1 gram, preventing you from achieving therapeutic levels in your body. This limited bioavailability means much of the vitamin C from standard capsules or tablets never reaches your cells where it's needed most. Liposomal delivery technology transforms vitamin C supplementation by dramatically enhancing absorption. Quicksilver Scientific's advanced system encapsulates vitamin C within tiny phospholipid spheres that bypass usual digestive barriers, enabling direct nutrient delivery to your cells for rapid uptake. This innovative approach makes it possible to achieve and maintain optimal vitamin C levels that traditional supplements cannot match. Additionally, this formula provides vitamin C in buffered sodium ascorbate form, which is often better tolerated by people with digestive sensitivity. Each 5 mL serving delivers 1,000 mg of highly absorbable vitamin C in a gentle liquid format that's easy on your stomach.

Backed by science: Vitamin C: an essential antioxidant nutrient Vitamin C functions as one of the most important water-soluble antioxidants in the human body, but unlike most animals, humans cannot produce it internally. This makes dietary intake and supplementation absolutely essential for maintaining adequate levels. Vitamin C directly neutralizes reactive oxygen species and free radicals that can damage cellular structures, proteins, lipids, and DNA throughout your body. Research demonstrates that vitamin C plays critical roles in immune function, particularly in supporting white blood cell activity and antibody production. During times of immune challenge or infection, your body rapidly depletes vitamin C stores as immune cells use it to combat pathogens. Maintaining optimal levels through supplementation can help promote resilient immune defenses and reduce the duration and severity of common respiratory infections. Beyond immune support, vitamin C serves as an essential cofactor for collagen synthesis. Collagen is the most abundant protein in your body, providing structural integrity to skin, blood vessels, bones, tendons, and connective tissues. Without adequate vitamin C, collagen production falters, potentially affecting skin elasticity, vascular health, and tissue repair processes. Liposomal technology: achieving superior bioavailability The bioavailability challenge with oral vitamin C has frustrated researchers and health practitioners for decades. Standard supplements deliver diminishing returns as dosage increases because intestinal absorption mechanisms become saturated. Above 1 gram, absorption efficiency plummets, with much of the vitamin C passing through your digestive system unused. Quicksilver Scientific's liposomal encapsulation solves this problem through cutting-edge delivery technology. The process creates nano-sized liposomal vesicles, measuring just 20–70 nanometers, that are small enough to navigate between cells and begin absorbing immediately upon contact with mucous membranes in your mouth. This means nutrient uptake starts before the vitamin C even reaches your stomach, bypassing the primary site of degradation. The transparency of this liquid formula indicates its exceptional quality. Only liposomes small enough to achieve true nano-particle size can produce such clear consistency. Larger particle liposomes appear cloudy or opaque, signaling inferior absorption potential. These small, stable vesicles provide more efficient delivery than traditional liposomal products, bringing therapeutic-level vitamin C directly to your cells where it exerts its beneficial effects. Buffered sodium ascorbate for gentle tolerance This formula uses sodium ascorbate, a buffered form of vitamin C that offers advantages for digestive comfort. Ascorbic acid, the standard form found in most supplements, has high acidity that can irritate sensitive stomachs, particularly at higher doses. Sodium ascorbate maintains a neutral pH, making it significantly gentler on your digestive system while delivering the same vitamin C benefits.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
