product.title: Liposomal Glutathione, EU
product.description:
Benefits of the body's master detoxifierGlutathione is our most powerful internal antioxidant, and it's present in almost every cell of the body with high concentrations in the liver. It's produced in the body from the three amino acids cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine and serves as the body's main detoxification compound. Glutathione is constantly processing and removing toxins through the phase II detoxification pathway. This antioxidant and its associated enzymes can efficiently bind a wide range of toxins, including reactive oxygen species, peroxides, lipid peroxides, and heavy metals. Once captured and neutralized by glutathione, these toxins can be safely eliminated through the liver and gut.Moreover, glutathione can also recycle important antioxidants such as vitamins E and C can promote proper immune function.Supplemental glutathione with optimal absorptionHowever, with age, stress, and disease states, the production of glutathione declines. Supplemental glutathione can support healthy cell function, but its absorption is greatly inhibited by breakdown in the stomach. Liposomal encapsulation protects glutathione from destruction by digestive enzymes, and the tiny particles of Quicksilver Scientific's advanced delivery system provide exceptionel absorption.

Health benefits overview: Looking for powerful cellular protection against everyday oxidative stress? Liposomal Glutathioneᴱᵁ can help maintain your body's master antioxidant at optimal levels. This formula delivers reduced glutathione in an advanced liposomal form for exceptional absorption, addressing the challenge that traditional oral glutathione faces when exposed to digestive enzymes. This formula can support three essential areas of wellness: antioxidant defense throughout your cells, natural detoxification processes in the liver and tissues, and balanced immune system function. The liposomal delivery technology ensures glutathione reaches your cells intact, maximizing its beneficial effects where you need them most.

Why this formula works: Glutathione is naturally produced in every cell of your body from three amino acids: cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine. However, glutathione levels decline with age, stress, poor nutrition, environmental toxins, and various health challenges. Your body needs adequate glutathione to neutralize free radicals, eliminate toxins, and maintain optimal cellular function. Traditional oral glutathione supplements face a significant obstacle: breakdown in the digestive system before reaching your cells. Stomach acids and digestive enzymes can destroy glutathione, limiting its effectiveness. This is where advanced delivery technology makes all the difference for you. Quicksilver Scientific's liposomal encapsulation protects glutathione molecules within tiny phospholipid spheres. These nano-sized liposomes begin absorption as soon as they contact the mucous membranes in your mouth, bypassing much of the digestive breakdown. The result is superior bioavailability and fast-acting cellular delivery that traditional supplements simply cannot match.

Backed by science: Glutathione: the body's master antioxidant and detoxifier Glutathione functions as one of the most critical molecules for cellular health and longevity. Present in virtually every cell, glutathione acts as a powerful antioxidant that directly neutralizes reactive oxygen species and free radicals before they can damage cellular components. This tripeptide molecule also plays an essential role in recycling other antioxidants like vitamins C and E, extending their protective effects throughout your body. The liver contains particularly high concentrations of glutathione, where it serves as the primary compound for phase II detoxification. Glutathione binds to toxins, heavy metals, and harmful compounds, making them water-soluble so your body can safely eliminate them through bile and urine. Without adequate glutathione, toxic substances can accumulate in tissues, potentially contributing to oxidative stress and cellular dysfunction. Research demonstrates that glutathione supports immune cell function, particularly in lymphocytes and natural killer cells. Maintaining optimal glutathione levels can help promote a balanced immune response and cellular defense mechanisms. Additionally, glutathione protects mitochondria from oxidative damage, supporting the energy production that powers every function in your body. Liposomal delivery technology: maximizing absorption and effectiveness The challenge with oral glutathione supplementation has always been bioavailability. When you take standard glutathione capsules or tablets, digestive enzymes in your stomach and intestines break down much of the molecule before it can reach your bloodstream. This significantly limits the amount of intact glutathione that actually enters your cells where it's needed. Quicksilver Scientific's advanced liposomal technology solves this absorption problem elegantly. The process encapsulates glutathione molecules within phospholipid vesicles that are structurally similar to your cell membranes. These tiny liposomes, measuring 20–70 nanometers, are small enough to begin absorption immediately upon contact with the mucous membranes in your mouth and throat. This innovative delivery system offers several advantages for you: the phospholipid coating protects glutathione from stomach acid degradation, the nano-sized particles facilitate rapid absorption directly into cells, and the liposomal structure enhances transport across cell membranes. The clear transparency of this formula indicates true nano-particle size, ensuring maximum bioavailability compared to larger, less effective liposomal products on the market. The three amino acids that build glutathione While your body produces glutathione internally, understanding its building blocks helps explain why direct supplementation can be beneficial. Glutathione synthesis requires adequate levels of cysteine (often the limiting factor), glutamic acid, and glycine. Various factors can deplete these amino acids or impair your body's ability to produce sufficient glutathione, making supplementation a practical approach to maintaining optimal levels.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Liposomal GABA with L-Theanine, EU
product.description:
A potent blend of two amino acidsLiposomal GABA with L-Theanine (vegan, gluten-free, and non-GMO) provides a potent blend of the following two amino acids:GABA (Gamma-aminobutyric acid)This is an amino acid derivative produced in the human body that functions as a neurotransmitter in the central nervous system. Neurotransmitters are chemical messengers that carry messages between cells.GABA has an inhibitory effect on neurons, helps balance our nervous system, and supports a calm mood. It's associated with that calming effect that slows us down, so we’re not going, going, going all the time. In other words, GABA can help your racing thoughts to turn off. (1)Unlike powdered GABA, which is poorly absorbed and does not easily cross the blood-brain barrier, Quicksilver Scientific’s liposomal GABA can produce a very quick and powerful effect. Try this “busy-ness” antidote once, and you will know!The amino acid L-theanineL-theanine is found naturally in tea that produces calming effects in the brain. Research has found that even when it comes in a form other than a comforting cup of warm liquid, L-theanine can cross the blood-brain barrier and support better mood, improved sleep, healthy cognition, and calmness. (2)After supplementing with L-theanine, brain wave patterns are shown to smooth out, and it plays a role in inducing a calm feeling of well-being without drowsiness.Unsurpassed absorptionSome liposomal products use large, less effective liposomes 200-1000 nanometers. Quicksilver Scientific's liposomes are 20-100 nanometers, offering superior effectiveness and bioavailability.This technology is designed to bring the power of intravenous delivery into convenient oral supplements.

Health benefits overview: Liposomal GABA with L-Theanineᴱᵁ offers a potent blend of two amino acids that can help calm your mind and promote rest and relaxation. GABA has an inhibitory effect on neurons, helping balance your nervous system and supporting a calm mood, while L-theanine produces calming effects that cross the blood-brain barrier. Do you experience racing thoughts that won't turn off? This formula provides a powerful antidote to constant mental busyness, combining ingredients that work together to smooth out brain wave patterns and induce a sense of well-being without drowsiness.

Why this formula works: GABA is an amino acid derivative your body produces naturally that functions as a neurotransmitter in your central nervous system, carrying messages between cells. Unlike powdered GABA that is poorly absorbed and does not easily cross the blood-brain barrier, this liposomal GABA can produce quick and powerful effects. L-theanine is found naturally in tea and produces calming effects in your brain. Research shows that even outside of a comforting cup of warm liquid, L-theanine can cross the blood-brain barrier and support better mood, improved sleep quality, optimal cognition, and calmness without causing drowsiness. Why choose liposomal delivery for these amino acids? Traditional supplements struggle to reach your brain where they're needed most, but this advanced delivery system ensures these calming nutrients effectively penetrate the blood-brain barrier for maximum benefit.

Backed by science: GABA for nervous system balance GABA (gamma-aminobutyric acid) is an amino acid derivative produced in your body that functions as a chemical messenger carrying signals between cells in your central nervous system. GABA has an inhibitory effect on neurons, which means it helps slow down overactive brain activity. This helps balance your nervous system and supports a calm mood, providing that calming effect that slows you down so you're not constantly in high-gear mode. In other words, GABA can help turn off racing thoughts that keep your mind spinning. L-theanine for mood and cognitive support L-theanine is an amino acid found naturally in tea that produces calming effects in your brain. Research has found that L-theanine can cross the blood-brain barrier and support better mood, improved sleep quality, healthy cognition, and calmness. After supplementing with L-theanine, brain wave patterns smooth out, and it plays a role in inducing a calm feeling of well-being without drowsiness, making it ideal for daytime use when you need to stay alert. Superior liposomal absorption Some liposomal products use large, less effective liposomes measuring 200 to 1000 nanometers. This formula uses liposomes that are only 20 to 100 nanometers, offering superior effectiveness and bioavailability. This advanced technology is designed to bring the power of intravenous delivery into convenient oral supplements, ensuring that GABA and L-theanine reach your brain quickly and effectively where they can provide the calming support you need.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
product.health_benefits_overview: Liposomal GABA with L-Theanineᴱᵁ offers a potent blend of two amino acids that can help calm your mind and promote rest and relaxation. GABA has an inhibitory effect on neurons, helping balance your nervous system and supporting a calm mood, while L-theanine produces calming effects that cross the blood-brain barrier. Do you experience racing thoughts that won't turn off? This formula provides a powerful antidote to constant mental busyness, combining ingredients that work together to smooth out brain wave patterns and induce a sense of well-being without drowsiness.
product.why_this_formula_works: GABA is an amino acid derivative your body produces naturally that functions as a neurotransmitter in your central nervous system, carrying messages between cells. Unlike powdered GABA that is poorly absorbed and does not easily cross the blood-brain barrier, this liposomal GABA can produce quick and powerful effects. L-theanine is found naturally in tea and produces calming effects in your brain. Research shows that even outside of a comforting cup of warm liquid, L-theanine can cross the blood-brain barrier and support better mood, improved sleep quality, optimal cognition, and calmness without causing drowsiness. Why choose liposomal delivery for these amino acids? Traditional supplements struggle to reach your brain where they're needed most, but this advanced delivery system ensures these calming nutrients effectively penetrate the blood-brain barrier for maximum benefit.
product.backed_by_science: GABA for nervous system balance GABA (gamma-aminobutyric acid) is an amino acid derivative produced in your body that functions as a chemical messenger carrying signals between cells in your central nervous system. GABA has an inhibitory effect on neurons, which means it helps slow down overactive brain activity. This helps balance your nervous system and supports a calm mood, providing that calming effect that slows you down so you're not constantly in high-gear mode. In other words, GABA can help turn off racing thoughts that keep your mind spinning. L-theanine for mood and cognitive support L-theanine is an amino acid found naturally in tea that produces calming effects in your brain. Research has found that L-theanine can cross the blood-brain barrier and support better mood, improved sleep quality, healthy cognition, and calmness. After supplementing with L-theanine, brain wave patterns smooth out, and it plays a role in inducing a calm feeling of well-being without drowsiness, making it ideal for daytime use when you need to stay alert. Superior liposomal absorption Some liposomal products use large, less effective liposomes measuring 200 to 1000 nanometers. This formula uses liposomes that are only 20 to 100 nanometers, offering superior effectiveness and bioavailability. This advanced technology is designed to bring the power of intravenous delivery into convenient oral supplements, ensuring that GABA and L-theanine reach your brain quickly and effectively where they can provide the calming support you need.
product.how_to_take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Liposomal Vitamin C with R-Lipoic Acid, EU
product.description:
The benefits of vitamin CVitamin C is an essential vitamin, meaning your body can't produce it. It's also a powerful antioxidant that neutralizes free radicals in the body and protects tissues from oxidative stress. Moreover, vitamin C promotes the formation of collagen, which is the connective tissue that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. It supports the immune system and helps regenerate other antioxidants, including vitamin E.This formula features a buffered, well-tolerated form of vitamin C. Buffered to help minimize any GI discomforts associated with vitamin C.The benefits of r-lipoic acid R-lipoic acid is a potent molecule that can support healthy mitochondrial function, glutathione production, and may help the body remove metals, stimulating the bodily defense and detox system.A fully functional glutathione system synergistically supports the avtivity of vitamin C. Unsurpassed absorptionThe absorption of conventional oral vitamin C diminishes rapidly as the dose increases and only a small amount makes it into your cells where it's needed most.Liposomal Vitamin C with R-Lipoic Acid combines the power of pharmaceutical-grade vitamin C with a proprietary fast-acting liposomal delivery.

Health benefits overview: Liposomal Vitamin C with R-Lipoic Acidᴱᵁ can provide powerful antioxidant protection that neutralizes free radicals and shields your tissues from oxidative stress. This essential vitamin promotes collagen formation, supporting the connective tissue that maintains the integrity of your skin, bones, teeth, and arterial walls. Are you looking for comprehensive immune and detoxification support? This formula combines pharmaceutical-grade buffered vitamin C with potent R-lipoic acid to enhance your body's natural defense systems and cleansing pathways.

Why this formula works: Vitamin C is an essential nutrient your body cannot produce on its own, making supplementation crucial for optimal health. This formula features buffered vitamin C that is well-tolerated and minimizes any digestive discomfort that can sometimes occur with regular vitamin C supplements. R-lipoic acid works synergistically with vitamin C to support mitochondrial function and boost glutathione production, your body's most important internal antioxidant. Together, these nutrients can help your body remove metals and stimulate natural defense and detoxification systems more effectively than either ingredient alone. Why choose liposomal delivery? The absorption of conventional oral vitamin C decreases rapidly as dosage increases, and only small amounts reach your cells where they're needed most, making liposomal technology essential for maximum benefit.

Backed by science: Vitamin C for immune and structural support Vitamin C acts as a powerful antioxidant that neutralizes harmful free radicals throughout your body, protecting tissues from oxidative damage. It plays a vital role in supporting your immune system function and helps regenerate other antioxidants, including vitamin E, creating a comprehensive antioxidant network. Additionally, vitamin C promotes the formation of collagen, the essential connective tissue that provides structure and strength to your skin, bones, teeth, and blood vessel walls. R-lipoic acid for cellular energy and detoxification R-lipoic acid is a potent molecule that supports healthy mitochondrial function, helping your cells produce energy more efficiently. This nutrient enhances glutathione production, which is critical for your body's natural detoxification processes. R-lipoic acid may also help your body eliminate metals and other toxins, stimulating your natural defense and cleansing systems for comprehensive protection. Synergistic antioxidant action A fully functional glutathione system synergistically enhances the activity of vitamin C in your body. When these nutrients work together, they create a more powerful antioxidant defense than either compound provides alone. This synergy ensures that your cells receive maximum protection against oxidative stress while supporting efficient detoxification pathways throughout your entire system. Liposomal delivery for superior absorption This formula combines the power of pharmaceutical-grade vitamin C with proprietary fast-acting liposomal delivery technology. Conventional oral vitamin C has limited absorption, especially at higher doses, with only a fraction actually entering your cells. The liposomal delivery system encapsulates nutrients in tiny phospholipid spheres that protect them during digestion and deliver them directly to your cells, ensuring maximum bioavailability and effectiveness compared to traditional vitamin C supplements.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Liposomal Melatonin, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Melatonin is a hormone that is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock” (1,2) Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, research shows that it also has many other health benefits. These include support for the immune system, cognitive health, and even cell DNA.Why it works:Research shows that melatonin offers a range of health benefits:Sleep support:Sleep patterns are regulated by out circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports. Natural production of this hormone declines with age. This can disturb the circadian rhythm and as a result thereof our quality of sleep. (3-8) Supplementation with the hormone melatonin can help balance the circadian rhythm and support sleep.Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl) and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it can support other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it helps inhibit a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11)Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin thereby supports the immune system as a whole. (12,13)Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20)The science behind the product:Scientific research has in recent years demonstrated that there is more to melatonin than it merely being helpful in promoting high-quality sleep. What is also interesting about melatonin, is that it can be delivered in a variety of fashions, ranging from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery.Quicksilver Delivery Systems® utilizes modern science to unleash the curative power of nature. With the highly advanced phospholipid delivery system, Quicksilver Scientific supplements can help to nourish your cells with effective ingredients both faster and more efficiently. That means that with liposomal melatonin you can optimize cellular uptake and effectiveness.How to use:Take 1 pump by mouth, hold for 30 seconds before swallowing, or as directed. May be stirred into a small amount of water. Once opened, use within 180 days. Store at room temparature, away from light.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders).Use caution if combining with alcohol. This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant. Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Health benefits overview: Liposomal Melatoninᴱᵁ can support your body's natural sleep-wake cycle while offering comprehensive health benefits that extend far beyond sleep quality. This naturally occurring hormone, derived from tryptophan, helps regulate your circadian rhythm and provides powerful antioxidant protection to cells throughout your body. Do you struggle with falling or staying asleep? Melatonin production naturally declines as you age, which can disrupt sleep patterns and affect overall wellness, making supplementation an effective way to maintain optimal levels.

Why this formula works: Melatonin plays a crucial role in regulating your body's internal clock, signaling when it's time to wind down for the night and when to wake in the morning. Natural production of this hormone decreases with age, which can disturb your circadian rhythm and compromise sleep quality. Beyond sleep support, melatonin offers remarkable antioxidant properties, scavenging harmful free radicals more efficiently than many other antioxidants. It also activates T-helper cells that regulate immune responses and helps protect cellular DNA from oxidative damage. What makes this liposomal delivery special? The advanced phospholipid system enhances absorption and bioavailability significantly compared to traditional melatonin supplements, allowing your cells to utilize this beneficial hormone more effectively.

Backed by science: Sleep and circadian rhythm support Melatonin helps balance your body's natural sleep-wake cycle by supporting the circadian rhythm. As production of this hormone declines with age, supplementation can help restore healthy sleep patterns, making it easier for you to fall asleep and stay asleep throughout the night. Research demonstrates that melatonin promotes both the onset and duration of quality sleep. Antioxidant protection Melatonin possesses powerful antioxidant properties, efficiently neutralizing common free radicals like hydroxyl and peroxyl radicals. Studies show it provides even more antioxidant capacity than vitamin E. Additionally, melatonin enhances the effectiveness of other antioxidants in your body, raising overall antioxidant defense and helping combat oxidative stress that accelerates aging. Cellular DNA support One of melatonin's most important functions is protecting cellular DNA from damage. It inhibits peroxynitrite, a particularly harmful free radical that attacks DNA strands inside cells. By defending against this oxidative damage, melatonin helps maintain cellular integrity and supports healthy cell function throughout your body. Immune system enhancement Melatonin activates T-helper cells, which play a central role in coordinating immune responses. These cells help your immune system respond effectively to foreign molecules and potential threats. Through this mechanism, melatonin strengthens overall immune function and helps maintain balanced immune activity. Cognitive health benefits Age-related cognitive decline may be linked to decreasing melatonin levels in the body. Melatonin supports your brain's natural antioxidant defense system and helps inhibit factors that contribute to cognitive aging, such as free radical activity in brain tissue. Research suggests this protection may help maintain memory, cognitive function, and the formation of new brain cells. Quicksilver Delivery Systems® This formula utilizes advanced phospholipid encapsulation to optimize cellular uptake and effectiveness. The liposomal delivery system nourishes your cell membranes with phosphatidylcholine while delivering melatonin faster and more efficiently than conventional supplements. This means you can experience the full range of melatonin's benefits with enhanced bioavailability.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Dr. Shade’s Liver Sauce®, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Dr. Shade's LiverSauce® contains a blend of four classic drainage botanicals with a potent effect on bitter receptors, along with a synergistic medley of powerful phytonutrients to control the inflammatory response and amplify detoxification reactions. Why it works:1) The liposomal quartet in Dr. Shade's LiverSauce® includes dandelion, solidago, gentian, and myrrh. This “bitter” boost blend can keep drainage pathways open and: Stimulate digestionBoosts liver healthPromote gallbladder and kidney functionSupport healthy bile flowOffer broad balancing action of microbia2) Morover, a mix of powerful targeted nutraceuticals offers detoxification, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and histamine-controlling support. It includes: The unique flavonoids quercetin and luteolin to modulate pro-inflammatory mast cell activity DIM (Diindolylmethane) for gentle hormone-regulating action, promotion of T-regulatory dominance (immune moderating), and stimulation of Nrf2, our own master antioxidant switch R-Lipoic acid, a strong Nrf2 upregulator and major driver in this formula, to increase production of glutathione and facilitate the liver’s excretion of metals and Milk thistle for potent liver protection and bile flow stabilization. The science behind the product:Quicksilver Delivery Systems® utilizes modern science to unleash the curative power of nature. With the world’s most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific® supplements actually nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.Each 5 mL of Dr. Shade’s LiverSauce® delivers 750 mg of a proprietary blend, and 48 mg of R-Lipoic Acid. A serving size is one teaspoon. Each bottle contains 20 servings. How to use: Take 1 tsp. as needed. Hold in mouth for 30 seconds before swallowing. May be mixed into water.Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by healthcare professional.Best taken on an empty stomach at least 20 minutes before meals.Use within 60 days of opening. If pregnant, consult physician before use.

Health benefits overview: Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®ᴱᵁ can support your body's natural detoxification pathways with a powerful blend of four classic drainage botanicals. This formula combines dandelion, solidago, gentian, and myrrh with targeted phytonutrients to help control inflammatory responses and amplify your body's cleansing reactions. Are you looking for comprehensive liver support? This advanced formula delivers bitter compounds alongside antioxidant and anti-inflammatory nutrients to promote optimal liver function, healthy bile flow, and balanced immune responses.

Why this formula works: The liposomal quartet of dandelion, solidago, gentian, and myrrh delivers bitter-tasting compounds that can stimulate digestion and keep your body's drainage pathways open. These classic herbs work together to promote liver health, encourage gallbladder and kidney function, and support healthy bile flow while offering broad balancing action throughout your system. A synergistic blend of powerful targeted nutrients provides detoxification, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-balancing support. This carefully selected combination can help modulate inflammatory activity, promote gentle hormonal balance, and enhance your body's natural antioxidant production. What makes this formula different? The unique liposomal delivery system ensures superior absorption, allowing these beneficial compounds to reach your cells more effectively than conventional supplements.

Backed by science: Dandelion, solidago, gentian, and myrrh These four drainage botanicals activate bitter receptors to stimulate digestive secretions and promote healthy elimination pathways. Dandelion can support liver function and encourage healthy bile production. Solidago (also known as goldenrod) promotes kidney health and urinary tract function. Gentian root extract contains some of the most potent bitter compounds found in nature, which can stimulate digestive enzyme secretion. Myrrh extract offers additional support for healthy inflammatory responses and microbial balance. Quercetin and luteolin These unique flavonoids can help modulate pro-inflammatory mast cell activity and support healthy histamine levels. Your body naturally produces histamine as part of immune responses, but maintaining balanced levels promotes comfortable inflammatory responses and overall wellness. These compounds work together to encourage immune system moderation and cellular protection. DIM (Diindolylmethane) This compound derived from cruciferous vegetables can provide gentle hormone-regulating action by supporting healthy estrogen metabolism. DIM also promotes T-regulatory cell dominance, which helps moderate immune responses, and stimulates Nrf2, your body's master antioxidant switch that triggers production of protective compounds. R-lipoic acid R-lipoic acid acts as a major driver in this formula. It is a strong Nrf2 upregulator that can increase glutathione production, your body's most important internal antioxidant. This powerful nutrient facilitates your liver's ability to process and excrete metals and other compounds, supporting optimal detoxification capacity and cellular energy production. Milk thistle Milk thistle contains silymarin compounds and can provide potent liver protection and help stabilize bile flow. This time-tested botanical supports liver cell regeneration, offers antioxidant protection, and promotes healthy liver enzyme levels, making it an essential component for comprehensive liver health support. Quicksilver Delivery Systems® This advanced phospholipid delivery system unlocks the full potential of botanical compounds. By encapsulating nutrients in liposomes made from phosphatidylcholine, this formula enhances absorption and bioavailability significantly compared to conventional supplements. The phospholipids themselves nourish your cell membranes while delivering active ingredients faster and more efficiently to where they're needed most.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Pomegranate Fruit Extract, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Pomegranate contains polyphenols, which are some of the most powerful antioxidants that nature can offer. They are known for their impressive properties, including a wide range of cardiovascular and metabolic health benefits.Each dose of Life Extension® Pomegranate Fruit Extract delivers an amount of polyphenol (punicalagins) comparable to what's found in approximately 3,5 dl of pomegranate juice.Why it works:The potent polyphenols and other compounds in Pomegranate Fruit Extract can: (1-11)Promote cardiovascular health:Provide support for healthy circulationEncouraging healthy metabolismSupport already-normal blood pressurePromote a balanced inflammatory responseInhibit oxidative stressPreserve a healthy endothelial functionThe science behind the product:Heart, blood vessel health & metabolic support By supporting healthy blood pressure and endothelial function, pomegranate can promote overall blood vessel health. (11–16) Research also shows that pomegranate can benefit heart health directly, support healthy lipid, sugar and insulin metabolism and inhibit inflammation to support cardiovascular health. (3,4,17-20) Advanced extraction methodPomegranate Fruit Extract features POMELLA® pomegranate extract, produced using a proprietary method that preserves the pomegranate polyphenols, including punicalagins, in a concentrated powder form. Enjoy the powerful health benefits of pomegranate without the added sugar or calories. Add Pomegranate Fruit Extract once daily as part of your heart-healthy routine.How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Are you looking for nature's most powerful antioxidant support for your heart? Pomegranate contains polyphenols that offer impressive cardiovascular and metabolic health advantages. Each dose of Pomegranate Fruit Extract, EU delivers an amount of polyphenols (punicalagins) comparable to what's found in approximately 3.5 dl of pomegranate juice. This formula can promote optimal heart health, encourage comfortable circulation, and help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range.

Why this formula works: The potent polyphenols and other compounds in pomegranate work together to promote your cardiovascular wellness. By encouraging optimal blood pressure and endothelial function, pomegranate can help maintain overall blood vessel health. Research demonstrates that pomegranate can benefit heart health directly. It encourages balanced lipid, glucose, and insulin metabolism while promoting a healthy inflammatory response to support your cardiovascular system. This formula features POMELLA® pomegranate extract, produced using a proprietary method that preserves the pomegranate polyphenols, including punicalagins, in a concentrated powder form. You can enjoy the powerful health benefits of pomegranate without the added sugar or calories found in juice.

Backed by science: Want to understand how pomegranate protects your heart and blood vessels? Let's explore the clinical research behind this remarkable fruit extract. Cardiovascular protection and blood vessel health By encouraging optimal blood pressure and endothelial function, pomegranate can promote overall blood vessel wellness. The endothelium is the inner lining of your blood vessels, and maintaining its health is crucial for cardiovascular function. Clinical studies show that pomegranate helps maintain blood pressure levels already within the normal range. It can also help prevent and reverse endothelial dysfunction, potentially reducing atherosclerotic plaque formation for healthier arteries as you age. Direct heart health support Research shows that pomegranate can benefit your heart health directly through multiple mechanisms. The polyphenols in pomegranate work at the cellular level to promote optimal cardiac function and vitality. This direct heart support complements the blood vessel benefits, creating comprehensive cardiovascular protection that addresses multiple aspects of heart wellness. Metabolic health and lipid management Pomegranate encourages balanced lipid, glucose, and insulin metabolism. It can help decrease the oxidation of lipids, which in turn helps maintain healthy lipid levels already within the normal range. Additionally, pomegranate can enhance insulin sensitivity and promote optimal blood glucose control. These metabolic advantages are essential for maintaining your overall health and energy levels throughout the day. Antioxidant protection and inflammation balance The antioxidants in pomegranate can inhibit oxidative stress throughout your body. Pomegranate polyphenols are among nature's most powerful antioxidants, offering cellular protection against free radical damage. Pomegranate also promotes a balanced inflammatory response, which is vital for cardiovascular health and overall wellness. By addressing both oxidative stress and inflammation, this formula provides dual-action protection for your long-term vitality. Advanced extraction for maximum benefit POMELLA® pomegranate extract is produced using a proprietary method that preserves the beneficial pomegranate polyphenols in a concentrated powder form. This advanced extraction ensures you receive consistent, therapeutic amounts of punicalagins and other polyphenols. This extraction method maintains the integrity of the active compounds, so you get the full spectrum of pomegranate's cardiovascular benefits in every capsule you take.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

It can also help prevent and reverse endothelial dysfunction, potentially reducing atherosclerotic plaque formation for healthier arteries as you age. Direct heart health support Research shows that pomegranate can benefit your heart health directly through multiple mechanisms. The polyphenols in pomegranate work at the cellular level to promote optimal cardiac function and vitality. This direct heart support complements the blood vessel benefits, creating comprehensive cardiovascular protection that addresses multiple aspects of heart wellness. Metabolic health and lipid management Pomegranate encourages balanced lipid, glucose, and insulin metabolism. It can help decrease the oxidation of lipids, which in turn helps maintain healthy lipid levels already within the normal range. Additionally, pomegranate can enhance insulin sensitivity and promote optimal blood glucose control. These metabolic advantages are essential for maintaining your overall health and energy levels throughout the day. Antioxidant protection and inflammation balance The antioxidants in pomegranate can inhibit oxidative stress throughout your body. Pomegranate polyphenols are among nature's most powerful antioxidants, offering cellular protection against free radical damage. Pomegranate also promotes a balanced inflammatory response, which is vital for cardiovascular health and overall wellness. By addressing both oxidative stress and inflammation, this formula provides dual-action protection for your long-term vitality. Advanced extraction for maximum benefit POMELLA® pomegranate extract is produced using a proprietary method that preserves the beneficial pomegranate polyphenols in a concentrated powder form. This advanced extraction ensures you receive consistent, therapeutic amounts of punicalagins and other polyphenols. This extraction method maintains the integrity of the active compounds, so you get the full spectrum of pomegranate's cardiovascular benefits in every capsule you take.

product.title: Hip + Joint for Dogs
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Hip + Joint for Dogs is a powerful formula designed by veterinarians for dogs experiencing joint-related issues.This fun and easy-to-use powder supplement can be sprinkled over your dog's favorite food and has a roast beef flavor. Moreover, it can be combined with other supplements, it's grain-free, fun and is suitable for dogs of any age, size, and breed. Why it Works:This Pets Park dog supplement formulated to help with common joint-related problems such as arthritis, hip dysplasia, and growing pains. Every scoop is grain-free and provides a perfect balance of active ingredients known to improve and maintain joint health in puppy, adult, and senior dogs. By keeping their joints lubricated, you can boost your dog's mobility and strength. This supplement has shown benefits to dogs displaying signs of joint diseases such as:Difficulty getting up after lying downLameness in one or more legsDifficulty climbing stairsUnwillingness to exerciseIrritation when touched or petted The Science Behind the Product: Pets Park’s Hip + Joint for Dogs provides the best ingredients known for joint pain relief and to promote joint health: MSMThis supplement includes high quantities of MSM (methylsulfonylmethane), which is a natural anti-inflammatory and analgesic (painkiller). Reduction of inflammation in the dog’s joints can help relieve pain from their joint-related issue.GlucosamineGlucosamine is a natural compound and a part of cartilage. Glucosamine for dogs used in this product is known to lubricate dogs’ joints and repair cartilage that has been worn down because of aging, arthritis, hip dysplasia, or even trauma.ChondroitinChondroitin, also a component of cartilage, is known to naturally promote water retention and elasticity in cartilage. Because of that, it can help lubricate joints and build and repair the tissue lining these joints. How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your dog's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your dog's food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 11 kgs 11-27 kgs 27-26 kgs Over 36 kgs Dosage ½ scoop daily 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily 3 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Dog's weight 45 scoops 0-11 kgs 13 weeks 11-27 kgs 6 weeks 27-36 kgs 3 weeks 36 kgs+ 2 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from dog to dog. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your dog.Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your dog.Do you have any feeding tips or tricks?Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try adding your powder to a spoonful of yogurt, mixing it in with banana or even peanut butter – whatever your dog's favorite treat is.You can always try adding a small amount of powder to their food too and slowly building to the recommended dosage. Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.Are joint supplements good for dogs?A joint supplement for dogs may minimize the existing symptoms and prevent further deterioration of joints.Unfortunately, many dogs develop joint problems long before showing any signs. Start with supplements early on to keep your dog healthy and moving.What supplement can I give my dog for arthritis?Pet owners can use different joint supplements for dogs to boost their mobility and improve joint health. A joint supplement for dogs should include active ingredients such as glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, vitamin C, manganese, L-glutathione, and vitamin E, to name a few. Petz Park's Hip + Joint for Dogs offers a unique formula for dogs with joint-related problems such as arthritis and hip dysplasia.Do supplements for dogs with arthritis work?Dog arthritis supplements are an essential, drug-free part of helping your furry companion fight arthritis. This product acts as a natural anti-inflammatory agent and helps protect cartilage. Start with supplements that contain MSM and glucosamine.Are all the ingredients listed per scoop?Yes, all ingredients and their amounts listed are PER SCOOP.Where is this product produced?Hip + Joint for Dogs is manufactured in Australia. This powerful formula is suited to dogs of all ages, breeds, and sizes and is grain-free.

product.title: Probiotic for Cats
product.description:
Health Benefits at a Glance:Probiotics for Cats is a product designed by veterinarians featuring a powerful blend of prebiotics and probiotics for your kitty. It can help promote a healthy gut and immune system plus provide support against allergies. This fun, grain-free, and easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s favorite wet or dry food. Moreover, it can be combined with other supplements and is suitable for cats of any age or breed. Why it Works:The targeted ingredients in Petz Park’s digestive formula can help:Promoting digestive and immune healthA healthy microflora (beneficial gut bacteria) is essential for well-functioning digestion, and probiotics play an important role in promoting a healthy balance of intestinal flora in the small and large intestines.Moreover, 70% of cats’ immunity is in the digestive tract, which means that their immune system is dependent on a healthy gut. Incorporating Probiotics for Cats into your pet's daily nutrition can help them achieve optimal digestive health and maintain a strong immune system to fight diseases.Preventing hairball problemsCommon signs of hairballs in cats include decreased appetite, retching, and gagging (which usually precedes the actual vomiting of the hairball).However, probiotics can help prevent cat hairballs from forming. As probiotics help improve cat digestion, they also help to pass any undigested food attached to the hair sitting on the digestive tract easily before it even becomes a hairball.Reducing allergies and overgroomingAllergy symptoms in cats include scratching, rubbing, or shaking their head, wheezing, sneezing, coughing, gas, bloating, diarrhea, or vomiting.Cats groom themselves to relieve itching. Overgrooming occurs when your kitty starts grooming excessively – licking their fur so much that it causes skin inflammation, sores, or hair loss. In extreme cases, a cat might even start to bite areas of skin. Excessive grooming often occurs as a result of allergies. The mix of Probiotics for Cats can strengthen your cat's immune system and their first line of defense against allergies to help reduce overgrooming. Product quality ensured by encapsulationPetz Park employs micro-encapsulation to ensure the probiotic strains' stability and viability, allowing them to survive stomach acid and maintain their effectiveness.The micro-encapsulation of Probiotics for Cats’ content protects its bacteria from heat, moisture, and light and is created to become active in the small intestine. This makes the formula extremely potent. The Science Behind the Product:Probiotics for Cats provides 1,3 billion CFU (colony forming units) per scoop of powder and contains:ProbioticsBacillus subtilisBacillus coagulansSaccharomyces cerevisiae boulardiiBifidobacterium longumPrebioticsBeta-glucansOrganic pea fiberOrganic green banana fiber How to Use:If this is your first time using Petz Park Probiotic, please start with half a scoop and slowly increase over a few days to the recommended dosage.For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last?? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat! Does it contain any fish or meat?The fish flavors included in our products are just that, a flavor! No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park’s flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies. Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.Are human probiotics safe for cats?No, human probiotics are not safe for cats. Cat digestive system and dietary needs differ from humans, so it's best to provide them with cat probiotics.How to get rid of cat allergies naturally?To naturally alleviate cat allergy symptoms, try keeping their environment clean and free of dust and allergens. Use hypoallergenic bedding, vacuum regularly, and provide a well-balanced diet.You can also consider using natural remedies like coconut oil, herbal supplements, and probiotics for cats to help reduce allergy symptoms.How to build immunity for cat allergies?To build a cat's immune system to allergies, provide a balanced diet, ensure proper hydration, minimize exposure to allergens, and keep a clean environment.Regular veterinary check-ups and vaccinations can help strengthen their immune system.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Urinary + Kidney for Cats is a powerful formula designed by veterinarians for cats experiencing urinary tract infections, bladder stones, incontinence, and kidney disease.This fun, grain-free, and easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s favorite wet or dry food.Moreover, it comes with a tasty fish flavor, can be combined with other supplements, and is suitable for cats of any age or breed. Why it Works:The targeted ingredients in Urinary + Kidney for Cats can help:Promoting urinary tract healthThe cat’s urinary tract includes kidneys, ureters, bladder, and urethra. Urinary tract infections (UTIs) can be painful for cats, particularly if they happen repeatedly. This supplement can help:Decrease crystal formation and bacterial infectionsAnd by that prevent recurring urinary tract infectionsPromote a well-functioning, healthy urinary tractEncourage a proper mineral balanceSupport a normal flow of urineOptimizing the kidney function and healthPreventing infections from entering the urinary tract, can also help protect the kidneys from developing kidney disease over time or slow deterioration if kidney disease is already present.However, renal failure is a common problem for cats and incidences increase with the cat’s age. This powder supplement uses a blend to help promote healthy kidney function as your cat ages. Furthermore, it can increase circulation in the kidneys and in general provide superior kidney support.The Science Behind the Product:The active ingredients in Petz Park's formula are:Nettle seed extract has mild anti-inflammatory benefits known to reduce swelling of the urinary tract. The ingredient is an antimicrobial, meaning it helps to slow the spread of bacteria and viruses.Marshmallow root extract is used for the protection of the lining of the urinary tract from bacteria.Cranberry extract is a native American wetland fruit that is known for stopping infections such as E. coli from entering the urinary tract and causing UTIs. Using cranberry makes it harder for bacteria to stick to the wall of a cat's bladder, which means that bacteria can be flushed out of a cat's system more quickly.D-mannose is the main nutrient in cranberries, and it can help fight UTIs. When consumed, D-Mannose becomes part of the urine where it can collect bad bacteria out of the bladder. The bacteria bind to the D-mannose rather than the lining of the urinary tract and are safely eliminated.Dandelion root extract is a mild diuretic that can help protect against kidney problems.Sodium citrate anhydrous: The salt used in this urinary tract supplement can help to keep the urine pH alkaline. Infections such as E. coli often create a more acidic environment in the urinary tract. How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat! Does it contain any fish or meat?The fish flavors included in our products are just that, a flavor! No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park’s flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies. Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.How to prevent crystals in the cat’s urine?To prevent crystals in cat urine and any cat symptoms of UTI, ensure your cat stays hydrated by providing fresh water and a balanced diet. Avoid feeding them exclusively dry food and consider incorporating wet food into their diet. Regular veterinarian check-ups and monitoring of their litter box can help detect and address any kidney disease in cats early on. What causes kidney disease in cats?Various factors, including aging, infections, high blood pressure, toxins, and certain medications can cause cat kidney disease. Additionally, underlying conditions like diabetes or high blood pressure can contribute to the development of kidney disease or kidney failure in cats.

How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat! Is glucosamine good for cats?Glucosamine is commonly used as a joint supplement for cats, especially those with arthritis or joint issues. It can help improve joint health and mobility in cats. Consult with a veterinarian before giving any cat joint supplements to your cat to ensure proper dosage and suitability for their specific needs.Is glucosamine safe for cats?Glucosamine supplements are generally safe for cats, but it's important to consult a veterinarian before administering any drugs.They can provide the appropriate dosage for your cat's specific needs and ensure no underlying health conditions could be affected by glucosamine. The majority of these supplements also contain chondroitin for cats as an active ingredient.How long can a cat live with arthritis?Cats with arthritis can live for many years, but the severity of the condition and the effectiveness of treatment will determine their quality of life. With proper care, joint supplements, pain management, and medication, cats with arthritis can lead comfortable lives well into their senior years.Does it contain any fish or meat? The fish flavors included in our products are just that, a flavor. No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park’s flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies.Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract 60, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:The health benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids are manyfold and include support for heart health, brain function, and balancing of the inflammatory response. Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract adds sesame lignans and olive extract to the essential fatty acids EPA and DHA from fish oil for enhanced health benefits.Why it works:The health benefits of eating cold-water fish are robust. However, concerns remain about contaminants found in wild and farm-raised fish in public. This ought not to stop consumers from including fish in their diet. The longevity advantages of consuming cold-water fish instead of foods like beef are remarkable.Omega-3 derived from fish oil supports heart health, brain function, and helps to balance the inflammatory response. There is no debate about the broad-spectrum benefits of omega-3 fatty acids.The fish oil in this formula is made with Pure+™, a wild fish oil concentrate derived from South Pacific Ocean anchovy. Processed in Chile within hours of harvest, you can be confident that you’re getting an exceptionally fresh fish oil formula.The high quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants. The science behind the product:IFOS™ 5-star-rated formulaLife Extension's Super Omega-3 is using a fish oil concentrate made from South Pacific anchovy. Caught off the coast of Chile in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, this fish oil is processed within hours of harvest for exceptional freshness. The fish oil in the Super Omega-3 formula has earned the highest, 5-star rating from IFOS™, an independent organization that sets the standard for fish oil purity, potency and freshness.High-quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants that are present in the fish itself. The enhanced molecular distillation method utilizes redundant processes to gently remove detectable environmental toxins.Enriched with olive extract & sesame lignans There are literally hundreds of fish oil supplements on the market. Only the formula in Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract product incorporates omega-3, olive fruit extract, and sesame lignans to enhance the health benefits of the omega-3 fatty acids. Polyphen-Oil™ olive extract (fruit and lead): 2 softgels supply the polyphenol content equivalent to that of more than 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil. Research indicates that a combination of fish oil and olive oil can support a healthy inflammatory response better than fish oil aloneSesame lignans and natural lemon flavor: The role of sesame lignans is to augment the benefits of fish oil by several mechanisms such as guarding the unsaturated fatty acids in the body against oxidation and directing them towards pathways that help with inflammatory reactions. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements. How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract, 60 caps, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Turmeric root contains compounds known as curcuminoids which offer a wealth of health benefits. Because this formula supports more curcuminoids and higher absorbability than standard curcumin, this formula can "amplify" the health benefits for your heart, mind, joints, cardiovascular system, immune health, and more.Why it works:Curcuminoids are compounds in curcumin that have multiple health benefits. They help inhibit inflammation to support joint health and vital organ health, promote a healthy immune response, support cardiovascular health and encourage heart health and more. But the total amount of free curcuminoids delivered by standard curcumin supplements is low.Life Extension® has spent years searching for a superior, more available form of curcumin. Now, they have developed the powerful Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract formula, which delivers the maximum health benefits of curcuminoids.It does so, by using sophisticated technologies that protect curcuminoids during digestion and deliver more free curcuminoids per dose.The tricky part about delivering curcumin that can be used by the body is that curcuminoid compounds undergo conjugation once they enter the body.This a normal chemical reaction where one compound attaches to another. However, the conjugation of curcuminoids is problematic, because conjugated curcuminoids do not necessarily provide the same health benefits as non-conjugated ones. (1,2).This formula protects curcuminoids from conjugation by combining curcumin with a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seeds called galactomannans. That way, it enhances both the availability and absorbability of curcuminoids so that you can enjoy all of the wonderful health benefits that this turmeric extract provides.The science behind the product:Clinical and pre-clinical data shows that combining curcuminoids with galactomannans produces 45.5 times more bioavailability and broader distribution of free curcuminoids compared to unformulated, standardised products. (3,4)In one clinical study, more than 70% of total plasma curcuminoids were still in their free form five hours after they had been ingested. (4)Several studies have shown or indicated that this type of turmeric extract can have multiple health benefits, which include:Inhibiting inflammationTurmeric extract inhibits inflammatory factors and thereby promotes joint health and vital organ health. (5,6) Moreover, it also inhibits the metabolism of several compounds that can enhance the inflammatory response. These include arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase and cytokines. By inhibiting the activities of these compounds, this turmeric extract promotes a healthy inflammation response. (7-9)Brain health and immune system healthCurcumin extract inhibits inflammatory factors in the body and thereby promotes immune system health. (10-12) It can also benefit your mind: studies indicated that it supports brain health by supporting a healthy brain function and even offers neuro-protective benefits as well. (7,13-15)Digestive, joint health and pancreatic healthEvidence suggests that this turmeric extract helps promote healthy bowel function and joint health. (16-19) It also supports healthy pancreatic function by encouraging pancreatic islet health. (7,20)Cellular support against free radicals Curcumin also provides cellular protection by offering support from antioxidants. (5, 21-23) Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range, inhibits inflammation to promote cardiovascular health and more. (7,24)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract, 60 caps, EU contains curcuminoids from turmeric root that offer a wealth of health benefits. Because this formula provides more curcuminoids with higher absorbability than standard curcumin, it can amplify the advantages for your heart, mind, joints, cardiovascular system, immune health, and more.

Why this formula works: Are you getting the full benefits from your curcumin supplement? Curcuminoids have multiple health advantages, but the total amount of beneficial free curcuminoids delivered by standard supplements is low due to conjugation during digestion. This formula uses sophisticated technology that protects curcuminoids from conjugation by combining curcumin with galactomannans, a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seeds. This approach enhances both the availability and absorbability of curcuminoids. Clinical data shows this combination produces 45.5 times more bioavailability compared to unformulated products. In one study, more than 70% of total plasma curcuminoids were still in their free form five hours after ingestion, ensuring you receive maximum health benefits.

Backed by science: Inflammation support for joint and organ health Turmeric extract inhibits inflammatory factors and thereby promotes joint health and vital organ health. It also inhibits the metabolism of several compounds that can enhance inflammatory response, including arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase, and cytokines. By inhibiting these compounds, this turmeric extract encourages a balanced inflammation response throughout your body. Brain health and cognitive function support Curcumin extract inhibits inflammatory factors in the body, promoting immune system health. It can also benefit your mind: studies indicate that it encourages brain health by supporting optimal brain function and offering neuroprotective benefits. Are you looking to maintain mental clarity as you age? This advanced curcumin formula delivers targeted support for cognitive health. Digestive, joint and pancreatic health Evidence suggests that this turmeric extract helps promote comfortable bowel function and joint mobility. It also encourages optimal pancreatic function by supporting pancreatic islet health, contributing to your overall metabolic balance. Cellular protection and cardiovascular support Curcumin provides cellular protection through powerful antioxidant support, helping defend against free radical activity. Furthermore, it can help maintain cholesterol levels already within normal range, inhibits inflammation to promote cardiovascular health, and encourages heart function for comprehensive wellness support.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Hair, Skin & Nails Collagen Plus Formula, EU
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Hair, Skin & Nails Collagen Plus Formula is a truly unique nutritional supplement.It contains a variety of nutrients that can help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and it also provides proteins and other compounds responsible for rejuvenating healthy hair and skin.Why it works:Supporting your hair, skin, and nails with nutrients is essential to maintaining a healthy and youthful look. Many natural ingredients in your diet can benefit the health and appearance of your skin, hair, and nails which are all key to a youthful and healthy feel and look.The clinically studied ingredients in this one-of-a-kind rejuvenation formula have been selected to do just that to support beauty from within.Containing keratin, zinc, vitamin B3 (niacin), vitamin B5 (pantothenic acid), vitamin B6, copper, biotin, collagen peptides, and more, this amazing formula contains state-of-the-art ingredients that can all contribute to healthy hair, skin, and nails a unique way.The science behind the product:Scientific research has revealed impressive findings about several of the compounds in this product.VERISOL® Bioactive Collagen Peptides®These peptides can support your skin’s extracellular matrix. They can stimulate collagen and elastin formation, which can encourage skin suppleness and elasticity. (1,2)They can also support skin growth and repair, encourage skin thickness and hydration, and support resilience to sunlight. (2,3) Moreover, clinical research has shown that taking bioactive collagen peptides can support youthful skin elasticity and architecture. (4-8) In a clinical study, women taking Verisol® experienced a 20% reduction in eye wrinkle volume on average after just eight weeks, as well as increased skin elastin and collagen. (9)Another study confirmed that Verisol® can promote skin elasticity, most profoundly for women over age 50. (10) Verisol® was also found to support healthy nails by maintaining nail growth rate and helping to avoid nail chipping and breakage in women with brittle nails. (11)Cynatine® HNS PlusCynatine® HNS Plus provides solubilized keratin, zinc, vitamins B3 (Niacin), vitamin B5 (Pantothenic acid) vitamin B6, copper, and biotin. All of these nutrients can promote the formation of keratin, which is necessary for strong hair, skin, and nails.Clinical studies using Cynatine® showed an impressive 11,5% decrease in the appearance of wrinkles and an almost 50% change in hair brightness and luster. (12,13)BiotinBiotin is essential for the metabolism of proteins and fatty acids supportive of healthy skin, hair, and nails. (14,15)SiliconSilicon is a mineral that is vitally important to maintaining healthy collagen, a compound that is crucial to the formation of strong and youthful hair, skin, and nails. (16)Enhance your hair’s beauty, achieve radiant skin, and maintain strong, healthy nails for lasting beauty!How to use:Take four (4) tablets daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Hair, Skin & Nails Collagen Plus Formula, EU features a unique blend of nutrients that can help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. This formula provides proteins and other compounds responsible for rejuvenating healthy hair and skin from within. The clinically studied ingredients work together to support beauty at the cellular level.

Why this formula works: Are you nourishing your hair, skin, and nails with the right nutrients? Supporting these with targeted nutrition is essential to maintaining a healthy and youthful appearance. Many natural ingredients can benefit the health and look of your skin, hair, and nails, which are all key to feeling and looking vibrant. The clinically studied ingredients in this one-of-a-kind rejuvenation formula have been selected to support beauty from within. Containing keratin, zinc, vitamin B3, vitamin B5, vitamin B6, copper, biotin, collagen peptides, and more, this advanced formula features state-of-the-art ingredients that can all contribute to healthy hair, skin, and nails in unique ways.

Backed by science: VERISOL bioactive collagen peptides for skin elasticity and wrinkle reduction These specialized peptides can support your skin's extracellular matrix by stimulating collagen and elastin formation, which encourages skin suppleness and elasticity. They can also promote skin growth and repair, enhance skin thickness and hydration, and support resilience to sunlight. Clinical research demonstrates that taking bioactive collagen peptides can support youthful skin elasticity and architecture. In a clinical study, women taking VERISOL experienced an impressive 20% reduction in eye wrinkle volume on average after just eight weeks, along with increased skin elastin and collagen. Another study confirmed that VERISOL can promote skin elasticity, with the most profound effects for women over age 50. VERISOL was also found to support healthy nails by maintaining nail growth rate and helping to avoid nail chipping and breakage in women with brittle nails. Cynatine HNS Plus for hair strength and radiance Cynatine HNS Plus provides solubilized keratin, zinc, vitamins B3, B5, B6, copper, and biotin. All of these nutrients can promote the formation of keratin, which is necessary for strong hair, skin, and nails. Clinical studies using Cynatine showed an impressive 11.5% decrease in the appearance of wrinkles and an almost 50% improvement in hair brightness and luster. Do you want shinier, healthier-looking hair? This specialized keratin complex delivers measurable results. Biotin for protein metabolism and beauty support Biotin is essential for the metabolism of proteins and fatty acids that are supportive of healthy skin, hair, and nails. This vital nutrient plays a fundamental role in maintaining the structural integrity of these tissues. Silicon for collagen formation Silicon is a mineral that is vitally important to maintaining healthy collagen, a compound that is crucial to the formation of strong and youthful hair, skin, and nails. By supporting collagen structure, silicon contributes to the overall health and appearance of these beauty-related tissues.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.
