product.title: Lower Back Relief, 60 capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Lower Back Relief contains a novel, clinically studied botanical duo demonstrated to help relieve lower back pain and occasional lower back stiffness.Take one capsule in the morning and one in the evening to begin experiencing results in as little as seven days. This gluten-free formula is ideal for those seeking a plant-based solution for lower back support.Why it works:Is your back bothering you? Don’t let it hold you back! The combination of Chinese chaste tree (Vitex negundo) and common ginger (Zingiber officinale) extracts can help. It showed a significant relief from discomfort in the lower back in clinical research.The science behind the product:Resume your daily activitiesIncreasingly more adults express lower back pain and discomfort, often interfering with daily tasks and impacting overall well-being and quality of life. (1)Support lower back flexibility and mobility with the vegetarian formula of Lower Back Relief.Placebo-controlled clinical trialIn a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial, as much as 79% of participants taking the Chinese chaste tree and ginger combination experienced a notable reduction in lower back pain, with results starting in as little as seven days. (2)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQ:What is in Lower Back Relief?This botanical formula includes 200 mg of a proprietary blend featuring five-leaf Chinese chaste tree extract (Vitex negundo) and ginger extract.Who should take Lower Back Relief?Lower Back Relief is designed for individuals experiencing occasional lower back discomfort and stiffness. It enhances overall well-being, enabling users to engage in daily activities more comfortably.Why are Chinese chaste tree and ginger extracts included in this formula? Ginger has been researched for its effects on exercise-induced discomfort and muscle soreness, and for its ability to inhibit inflammation, supporting whole-body health. Chinese chaste tree has also been studied for its anti-inflammatory properties and its role in relieving discomfort, contributing to overall well-being. What is the dosage of Lower Back Relief?How should it be taken? Each vegetarian capsule of Lower Back Relief contains 200 mg of a proprietary blend of Chinese chaste tree and ginger extracts. We recommend taking one capsule in the morning and one in the evening with food. Always follow the proper labeling instructions when using supplements.When can I expect an effect?According to studies, those who took the blend of Chinese chaste tree and ginger extracts in this formula experienced improved lower back relief within 7 days, with optimal effects observed after 30 days. However, since everyone is unique, the time to notice benefits may vary from person to person. Consistency with your supplement intake is key for the best results.Where is this product produced?Lower Back Relief is manufactured in the USA. Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this is a vegetarian, plant-based formula and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this supplement gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that the nutrients in this product would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, if you are taking any prescription medications and have concerns about potential interactions with this supplement, you should consult your physician before use.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?All Life Extension’s raw materials undergo rigorous testing to meet their high-quality standards. The product is tested for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, and the quantity of active ingredients in the final product. Raw materials are only approved for production once they meet Life Extension’s specifications. A Certificate of Analysis (COA) is available upon request for all their products.Are there any major allergens in this product?Lower Back Relief does not contain any of the 9 major allergens, which means it is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Can children take this product?This product is intended for adults over 18 and is not suitable for children.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Aged Black Garlic, 30 capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:With Life Extension’s Aged Black Garlic, you can discover garlic’s great cardiovascular benefits. Aged black garlic is shown to help maintain healthy blood pressure, cholesterol, and triglyceride levels. Each dose provides 500 mg of this clinically studied ingredient, containing 2.5 mg of S-allyl-cysteine.Moreover, the formula provides an odorless extract in a once-daily, vegetarian, non-GMO, gluten-free product. Why it works: Garlic not only enhances the flavor of meals, but it’s also very beneficial for your heart. This is due to a compound and powerful antioxidant called S-allyl-cysteine (SAC) – and it gets better with age! Extract of aged garlic extract, which is rich in SAC, has been clinically studied for its cardiovascular health benefits. However, it’s not found in significant amounts in raw garlic. The unique aging process can not only boost the SAC levels but also reduce or eliminate the strong “garlic” odor found in some other garlic supplements.The science behind the product: Results of clinical research In a placebo-controlled, randomized study, healthy adults were given 500 mg of garlic extract standardized to contain 2.5 mg of S-allyl cysteine (SAC). The participants’ blood lipids such as cholesterol and triglycerides were measured, as well as blood pressure and fasting blood sugar levels. After 12 weeks, the group taking the SAC-enriched garlic extract experienced help in maintaining normal levels of triglycerides, LDL cholesterol, and total cholesterol. The ratio of total cholesterol to HDL was reduced by 20.8%, compared to 0.4% for placebo. (1)Support for normal blood pressure and fasting glucose levels was likewise reported. (1) Demonstrate that some things get better with age – try Aged Black Garlic!How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ:What is in Aged Black Garlic?This supplement contains 500 mg of a trademarked aged garlic extract standardized to 2.5 mg of S-allyl-cysteine (SAC). SAC can support cardiovascular health and is an active compound naturally occurring in aged black garlic. While raw garlic typically has low levels of SAC, the aging process significantly boosts its concentration per serving.How is the garlic in this product aged?Raw garlic undergoes a 15-to-90-day aging process with heat and humidity treatments to increase SAC content. This method provides almost twice the SAC amount compared to standard garlic formulations.How does this formula promote heart health?The aged black garlic in this supplement, standardized to 0.5% SAC, has been clinically studied to support healthy blood pressure, cholesterol, triglyceride levels, HDL, and fasting blood glucose.Does this garlic supplement have a strong odor or taste?No. The aging process used for this extract reduces garlic's natural odor and taste, compared to standard garlic formulations. There might be a stronger smell when first opening the bottle due to odor accumulation in the free space, but it should diminish with continued use.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Vegan Pro Collagen, 189 g
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Are you following a vegetarian or vegan diet? Many collagen supplements aren't suitable for that. However, there is no need to choose between a plant-based lifestyle and beautiful skin! There's a new vegan alternative: Vegan Pro Collagen.The ingredient blend in this formula is demonstrated to promote healthy collagen formation in the body and promote youthful and radiant-looking skin.This powder supplement is gluten-free, plant-based, and offers a natural orange flavor. Why it works: Type 1 is the main collagen found in the skin, making up 80%-90% of the subsurface layer of the skin by weight. Starting around age 25, collagen production decreases about 1-1.5% per year, leading to wrinkles, roughness, and dry, sagging skin. (1,2)Vegan Pro Collagen delivers the identical amino acid building blocks that your body uses to create type I collagen, which is the most common type in the skin. The amino acids are combined with vitamin C and botanical ingredients that can promote the body's collagen synthesis.This blend has been clinically studied to help reduce common signs of skin aging and the appearance of wrinkles. The science behind the product:The nutrient combination of this Life Extension formula has been scientifically formulated to provide the same skin benefits as other collagen supplements.Encouraging clinical studiesIn placebo-controlled, pilot randomized study, participants took the amino acids and collagen-boosting ingredients in the Vegan Pro Collagen supplement for four weeks.The vegan collagen group experienced an increase in collagen density and a reduction in the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. (3,4)In a second pilot study, the vegan collagen group observed improvements in skin texture and hydration after four weeks. (4)In a larger placebo-controlled trial, this vegan collagen blend was compared to traditional fish-derived collagen. The vegan collagen group reported similar improvements in collagen density, wrinkle appearance, and overall skin hydration and health.Remarkably, the results for the vegan collagen group were nearly identical to those of the marine collagen group. (2) Moreover, of those showing wrinkle reduction in the collagen group, most (63%) had a remarkable average 33% reduction in the size of the wrinkles. (2)Stimulating collagen productionAlthough this vegan collagen can deliver the right amino acids in the right proportions, the scientists needed to make sure that the body would optimally gather these building blocks into collagen.Therefore, a blend of three triggering compounds has been added to further stimulate the body's own collagen production:Vitamin CGinseng root extractGotu kola (Centella asiatica) leaf extractIn a cell study, human skin fibroblasts (primarily responsible for collagen synthesis) were treated with this blend of amino acids and triggering compounds.After 48 hours, collagen levels in the fibroblasts increased by 135%, demonstrating that this combination could stimulate new collagen production. (3) Add Vegan Pro Collagen to your dietary regime and support your beauty naturally! How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ:What is in Vegan Pro Collagen?Vegan Pro Collagen is a supplement designed to support skin health. It features a trademarked vegan alternative to collagen, containing a blend of amino acids, vitamin C, ginseng, and gotu kola extracts. These ingredients are shown to help reduce the appearance of wrinkles.What form of collagen is in this product?While this product doesn't contain actual collagen, it includes amino acids in the same ratio found in human type I collagen, the most prevalent form of collagen in the skin. Vegan Pro Collagen can promote the body's natural collagen production.Who is Vegan Pro Collagen intended for?Vegan Pro Collagen is ideal for individuals looking to maintain healthy skin and minimize signs of aging. It serves as a vegan substitute for traditional collagen supplements.How does Vegan Pro Collagen support skin health?The blend of amino acids and botanical extracts in Vegan Pro Collagen can stimulate normal collagen production and provide targeted support for reducing wrinkles and other common signs of skin aging.Can I take Vegan Pro Collagen to support my joints?The nutrients in Vegan Pro Collagen are specifically studied for skin health. This supplement is not intended for joint health.When can I expect an effect?In studies, participants noticed improvements in their skin's appearance after 4-8 weeks of taking Vegan Pro Collagen.Does this product have a flavor? Are there any added sugars or sweeteners?Vegan Pro Collagen is orange-flavored, contains no added sugars, and is sweetened with stevia. How should I take Vegan Pro Collagen? Dissolve one scoop of Vegan Pro Collagen in any cold or room-temperature drink of your choice. It can be taken at any time of day, with or without food.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?All raw materials undergo rigorous testing for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, and active ingredient quantity to meet Life Extension's high-quality standards. Testing is performed for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, and the quantity of active ingredients in the finished product.Are there any major allergens in this product?Vegan Pro Collagen does not contain any of the 9 major allergens. This includes being free of milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product manufactured?Vegan Pro Collagen is produced in the USA.

product.title: SAMe+ 200 mg, 60 capsules
product.description:
What is SAMe?S-adenosyl-methionine (SAMe) is an amino acid-like substance that is present in virtually all living organisms and is one of the most important compounds in metabolism.Your body naturally produces SAMe from the amino acid methionine. While all body cells can create SAMe, the liver accounts for most of the endogenous production, which requires cofactors such as folate and vitamin B12. Besides folate and vitamin B12, the SAMe metabolism also involves vitamin B6. These nutrients are required to keep the SAMe cycle running and generate the amount of SAMe your body requires.A deficiency of vitamin B6, B12, and folate, as well as dietary methionine, can affect the production of SAMe and impact its many essential functions. Different factors, such as oxidative stress, can interfere with SAMe metabolism, and lower levels have been found in various health conditions.While the diet contains only a small amount of SAMe, which is also unstable, supplementation has been proven to be an effective way to restore SAMe levels.What are the functions of SAMe?SAMe assists the body in producing a variety of essential substances, such as mood-related neurotransmitters, the liver-protective antioxidant glutathione, and proteoglycans, which are cartilage elements that keep our joints healthy.In addition, SAMe plays a central role in epigenetics, which is the modification of our genetic material DNA. Such modifications are intimately linked to aging, and healthy aging depends on healthy epigenetic processes, such as healthy DNA methylation.SAMe fulfills these functions mainly by donating a chemical entity called a methyl group to other compounds in the body, thereby enabling biochemical reactions such as the production of dopamine, serotonin, and glutathione, as well as epigenetic DNA-methylation.How is Vitalized SAMe+ unique? SAMe+ is a vegan, gluten-free, and non-GMO. A complete formulaSAMe metabolism depends on vitamins B6, B12, and folate. For optimal results, and to make it easier for you, these ingredients are already included in Vitalized SAMe+.*Folate, vitamins B6 and B12 contribute to normal psychological function and normal function of the nervous system. Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of cartilage.Premium SAMeVitalized uses branded SAMe material of European origin: Adonat® Premium SAMe from the French company Gnosis, which has 30 years of expertise producing high-quality SAMe.Adonat® Premium SAMe offers the highest content of biologically active SAMe, in the form of (S, S) isomer for a better beneficial effect and a more reliable experience. Slow-release capsulesDRcaps™ protects the sensitive ingredient from stomach acid for optimal bioavailability.By choosing Vitalized SAMe+, you're investing in a superior product that can deliver exceptional benefits for your health and well-being.

product.title: Lactoferrin+ 200 mg, 60 capsules
product.description:
What is lactoferrin & how does it work?Immune proteinLactoferrin is a multifunctional protein made by the body. It has been researched in numerous human studies and is well-known as a natural part of the immune system.This immune protein is present in/on body fluids such as milk, saliva, tears, and mucosal surfaces. It also interacts with bodily structures and foreign organisms.Iron balanceA major immune support mechanism of lactoferrin is the binding of iron, which is an important mineral for the body. Lactoferrin can support healthy iron levels by promoting iron absorption.** The name indicates its origins and properties: "lacto" signifies "milk," while "ferrin" represents "iron".Why choose Vitalized Lactoferrin+?Outstanding qualityVitalized uses Biotis® lactoferrin from Friesland Campina. With 25 years of experience, this company is a pioneer in lactoferrin production. Their lactoferrin was the first to be approved by EFSA. It’s made from fresh Dutch milk and processed quickly and carefully to preserve its excellence. Biotis® scores very high in functional efficacy among lactoferrin sources and contains among the lowest levels of unwanted endotoxins. This lactoferrin contains 96% protein of which 95% is pure lactoferrin, which is among the highest purity levels in the market! The iron binding capacity is approximately 80%.Scientific studies confirm that 200 mg is an effective dose. Moreover, special DRcaps® can protect the sensitive ingredient from stomach acid, ensuring it reaches its target in the body intact.Sustainable practiceFriesland Campina promotes environmentally friendly farming using mostly grass-fed and free-range cows. Enhanced immune supportTo deliver additional immune benefits, Vitalized has included 80 mg of vitamin C in this formulation, providing 100% of the nutrient reference value (NRV), which is a recommended daily nutritional intake. Unlike regular vitamin C, this vitamin is derived from plants and not created synthetically. That makes this product entirely natural, aligning with the growing demand for non-synthetic supplements.Enjoy these renowned ingredients in an immune-supporting product with remarkable quality! *Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system. **Vitamin C increases iron absorption.

product.title: Omega-3 Vegan, 60 softgels
product.description:
What are the benefits of omega-3?Omega-3 fatty acids are healthy fats that offer many advantages for your:Heart healthBrain functionEyes and retinaCirculation EPA and DHA are two of the most important omega-3 fatty acids:EPA (Eicosapentaenoic acid) is a component of cell membranes and can be converted by the body into several important bioactive compounds involved in various functions, including the regulation of inflammatory processes. Together with DHA, EPA supports healthy heart function, triglyceride levels, and blood pressure. DHA (Docosahexaenoic acid) is the predominant omega-3 fatty acid in the brain and the eye. It’s a structural constituent of nerve and retinal cells and plays an important role in the function of membranes. It’s also involved in the normal development of the brain and eye and supports healthy vision and cognitive function. Why choose Vitalized Omega-3 Vegan?A true vegan alternative to fish oilVegetarian alternatives from algae have become more available in recent years, but they rarely deliver the full benefits of fish oil, as they mainly consist of DHA. The clinically documented benefits of fish oil relate to the combination of EPA and DHA, with EPA typically prepondering. Vegetarians and vegans are therefore often excluded from these proven benefits, and customers may also be concerned about the sustainability of fish oil.Vitalized now brings a real and unique vegan alternative to fish oil to the market made from algae, with a typical ratio of EPA and DHA of high-quality fish oil, 1,5:1! Moreover, studies show that omega-3 fatty acids from algae have the same bioavailability as those from high-quality fish oil. This means you can achieve the same blood levels of EPA and DHA with algae oil as you would with fish oil.Environmental responsibility and purityOmega-3 Vegan is made from algae cultivated indoors with a much lower impact on the environment.Vitalized uses a premium French algae material which is treated gently to preserve freshness. This patented technology yields a highly stable and clean vegan alternative to fish oil, with no compromise on bioavailability.A potent formula and dosageEach capsule of Omega-3 Vegan provides 450 mg of EPA/DHA combined, closely mirroring the benefits of high-potency fish oil. Two capsules per day will provide you with 900 mg of EPA/DHA, supporting heart health and overall wellness. No fish oil burp!Avoid the fishy aftertaste: With this product, you never have to worry about tasting fish the rest of your day when taking a capsule in the morning.Vitalized Omega-3 Vegan offers a premium product worth the investment for both your health and the environment!

product.title: Collagen Caps, 60 capsules
product.description:
What is collagen?Connective tissue is found everywhere in the body, in organs, blood vessels, the skin, bones, cartilage, tendons, and ligaments. It provides structure and strength to the body. Besides cells and ground substances, connective tissue contains protein fibers, and collagen makes up a large proportion of these fibers. Most of the collagen in your body is type I, II, or III:Type I collagen makes up 90% of your organic bone mass and 80% of your skin without cells, and is also found in your tendons and ligaments.Type II collagen represents 90% of all collagen in cartilage, it supports your joints. Likewise, it’s present in your spine and the clear gel inside your eyes.Type III collagen accounts for 10-15% of your skin without cells and is found in vital organs like the lungs, liver, and spleen. Other types of collagen: Type V collagen collaborates with type I to build and stabilize collagen fibrils (small filaments or fibers) in the skin, hair, and more.Type X collagen provides structural support in articular cartilage, helping cushion joints and maintain smooth movement.What are the benefits of collagen supplements?The production of collagen in the body declines with age. This affects tissue integrity, which is visible in the skin as fine lines and wrinkles. Collagen is an increasingly popular ingredient for promoting beauty from within. Research-backed branded collagen has been shown to:Improve skin elasticity, firmness, and hydrationVisibly reduce wrinkles and fine linesOffer absorbable fragments of the collagen that make up skin and jointsThese benefits make collagen a perfect supplement for skin care and well-being! Why choose Vitalized Collagen Caps?Different collagen types & more benefits Collagen Caps provides a blend of different collagen types, mainly I and II, from two clinically proven ingredients:Marine collagen: mainly type II collagen, which is found in cartilageEggshell membrane: type I, which is found in the skin, plus types V and X collagenAdditional nutrientsVitamin C is required for collagen formation in the body. A daily dose delivers 100 mg in a highly absorbable form of vitamin C.The mineral zinc is involved in keratin production and supports hair and nail health. Sustainably sourced & cleanOne of the standout features of Vitalized’s collagen is the commitment to responsibility and purity. Unlike most collagen products on the market, which are often derived from less eco-friendly bovine and porcine sources, Vitalized uses collagen from sustainably harvested fish and from eggshell membranes.The eggshell membrane provider, Eggnovo, is dedicated to farm animal welfare throughout their supply chain and chooses suppliers locally in Spain to ensure a low-carbon footprint.These suppliers are meant to adhere to cage-free, organic, and free-range production practices. Most of the eggshells used for Ovomet®/Ovoderm® are coming from free-range chicken eggs.Furthermore, Collagen Caps contains only acacia fiber as a natural filler and has no unnecessary additives such as sweeteners, flavors, and colors.Convenient collagen formatMost collagen products come as messy, inconvenient powders for drinks or ready-made shots full of unwanted ingredients. Some of these may also have an unpleasant aftertaste. There are more handy products on the market, but often several tablets/capsules per serving.Vitalized has developed a cutting-edge small-format collagen supplement that delivers the same science-supported results packed into just two capsules!Vitalized Collagen Caps is a premium choice for you if you value scientifically validated results without compromising ethical standards. * Zinc contributes to the maintenance of normal skin, hair, and nails. Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for normal cartilage function.

product.title: Greens & Protein, 30 sachets
product.description:
Why the need for greens and protein? Greens combined with protein can help keep you feeling fuller for longer and provide the energy you need to get through the day. The nourishing power of greens Here are three strong reasons for embracing the advantages: Fruits and vegetables are essential for a healthy diet, and a lack of them is linked to poor health. They provide a rich mix of vitamins, minerals, dietary fiber, and beneficial compounds like flavonoids and antioxidants. Eating a variety of them ensures you get a broad range of essential nutrients. The WHO recommends eating over 400 grams of fruits and vegetables daily to support better overall health. However, official statistics show there is still a long way to go to reach the minimum recommendation of fresh fruit and vegetables per day. The powdered blends of green leafy vegetables are gaining traction and are celebrated for helping increase vegetable intake, enhancing vitality*, and supporting detoxification naturally**. Protein for muscles and bones Protein energizes your cells and strengthens your body: Muscle mass Protein contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscles. So, whether you're pushing your limits at the gym or managing everyday activities, protein works consistently to promote muscle development. Over time, protein helps preserve muscle mass, keeping you active, resilient, and strong as you age. Bone strength Protein helps maintain normal bones, providing the structure they need to stay healthy. Depending on your need, adding even a little protein to your diet by supplementation can offer essential nutrients for your strength, recovery, and overall well-being. Why choose Vitalized Greens & Protein? Vitalized Greens & Protein is a unique formula and an excellent food source for energy* and detox** support. It combines first-class powdered green superfoods with a suitable dose of bioavailable plant protein. Leafy greens blend and fruit extract Vitalized's 6 grams mix of greens nourishes your body with premium ingredients that can help with your vegetable intake: Barley grass is a good source of many nutrients, including chlorophyll, fiber, polyphenols, flavonoids, enzymes, and vitamins A, C, and E. Spinach contains carotenoids such as lutein and zeaxanthin, vitamins A, C, and K1, folic acid, iron, and calcium. It’s also high in insoluble fiber. Broccoli offers important nutrients such as vitamins A, C, and E, potassium, calcium, and iron. It´s also a rich source of antioxidants and bioactive compounds such as glucosinolates, sulforaphane, and indole-3-carbinol Spirulina is a blue-green and highly nutritious algae containing protein, copper, iron, and B vitamins. A main component is called phycocyanin, which is an antioxidant that also gives it its unique color. Wheatgrass is an excellent source of chlorophyll, antioxidants, enzymes, and many important nutrients, including vitamins A, B, C, and E and iron, magnesium, calcium, and amino acids. Kale delivers antioxidants, fiber, vitamins K, C, A, riboflavin/B2, and minerals such as potassium, manganese, magnesium, and calcium. Chlorella provides many nutrients including protein, B vitamins, iron, vitamin C, antioxidants, magnesium, zinc, copper, potassium, calcium, fiber, and omega-3 fats. Acerola fruit extract is a rich source of vitamin C and contains beta-carotene, lutein, and B vitamins. Branded plant protein with optimal bioavailability Greens & Protein provides a moderate yet impactful amount of protein per serving. It’s perfect for greens-only lovers and for those seeking a bit of additional protein. With 8 grams of protein, the serving is comparable to a protein bar and can very well replace a snack or light meal. The formula contains superior vegan protein from fava beans, rice, and chickpeas. This branded blend of vegan protein sources, Vital Pro XP™, provides the same bioavailability and completeness of protein as whey protein!All-natural with a pleasant taste This vegan and non-GMO supplement contains no unnecessary ingredients or fillers. It’s not gluten-free (because of barley and wheat grass) or organic but thoroughly tested and controlled for contaminants. The powder is optimized with a little natural flavor and sweetened with stevia for a fresh and enjoyable taste. Convenient serving sizes To avoid the mess with 420 grams of green dusty powder, the product comes with handy single-serve sachets/sticks of 14 grams, which makes it: Easy to take every day Suitable for travel Protected, preserving the quality compared to an opened bottle Enjoy Vitalized Greens & Protein and help make healthy living simpler and more effective! *Vitamin C contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue. **Chlorella helps eliminate heavy metals from the body.

Health benefits overview: Struggling to meet your daily vegetable intake while maintaining energy levels throughout the day? Greens and Protein can help you boost your nutrient intake with 6 grams of premium green superfoods combined with 8 grams of complete plant protein. This formula can support reduced tiredness and fatigue with vitamin C, while protein contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscle mass and normal bones. Chlorella in this blend can help eliminate heavy metals from your body, providing natural detoxification support.

Why this formula works: The World Health Organization recommends eating over 400 grams of fruits and vegetables daily for optimal health, yet many people fall short of this target. Greens provide essential vitamins, minerals, dietary fiber, antioxidants, and beneficial plant compounds that your body needs to function at its best. Protein plays a crucial role in maintaining muscle strength and bone structure as you age. Whether you're active at the gym or managing everyday tasks, adequate protein intake helps preserve muscle mass and skeletal integrity throughout life. Are you tired of messy powder containers and complicated measuring? Our formula comes in convenient single-serve sachets that make it simple to get your greens and protein every day, even when traveling.

Backed by science: Seven nutrient-dense green superfoods This formula delivers 6 grams of carefully selected green vegetables and algae that provide diverse nutritional benefits: Barley grass offers chlorophyll, fiber, polyphenols, flavonoids, enzymes, and vitamins A, C, and E. Spinach contains carotenoids like lutein and zeaxanthin, vitamins A, C, and K1, folic acid, iron, and calcium, plus high levels of insoluble fiber for digestive health. Broccoli provides vitamins A, C, and E, potassium, calcium, iron, and antioxidants. It's particularly rich in bioactive compounds including glucosinolates, sulforaphane, and indole-3-carbinol that have been studied for their health-promoting properties. Spirulina, a blue-green algae, contains protein, copper, iron, B vitamins, and phycocyanin, an antioxidant that gives it its distinctive color. Wheatgrass delivers chlorophyll, antioxidants, enzymes, vitamins A, B, C, and E, plus iron, magnesium, calcium, and amino acids. Kale supplies antioxidants, fiber, vitamins K, C, A, riboflavin, and minerals including potassium, manganese, magnesium, and calcium. Chlorella provides protein, B vitamins, iron, vitamin C, antioxidants, magnesium, zinc, copper, potassium, calcium, fiber, and omega-3 fatty acids. Acerola fruit extract for vitamin C Acerola serves as a rich natural source of vitamin C, which contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue. This tropical fruit also contains beta-carotene, lutein, and B vitamins, providing additional nutritional value beyond just vitamin C content. Complete plant protein with optimal bioavailability Each serving provides 8 grams of protein from Vital Pro XP™, a branded blend of vegan protein sources including fava beans, rice, and chickpeas. This combination offers the same bioavailability and amino acid completeness as whey protein, ensuring your body can fully utilize the protein you consume. The 8-gram serving is comparable to a protein bar and can effectively replace a snack or light meal. Protein contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscle mass, helping you stay strong and active. It also contributes to the maintenance of normal bones, providing structural support for skeletal health. Natural detoxification support with chlorella Chlorella can help eliminate heavy metals from the body, supporting your natural detoxification processes. This microscopic algae has been studied for its ability to bind to and assist in removing unwanted substances, making it a valuable component for overall wellness. All-natural formula in convenient sachets Have you ever opened a large tub of green powder only to struggle with messy scoops and spoilage? This vegan, non-GMO formula comes in 30 individual 14-gram sachets that preserve freshness and eliminate mess. The powder is naturally sweetened with stevia and enhanced with a touch of natural flavor for an enjoyable, fresh taste. It contains no unnecessary ingredients or fillers, though it's not gluten-free due to barley and wheatgrass. All ingredients are thoroughly tested and controlled for contaminants to ensure quality and safety.

product.title: Iron+ / Eisen+ 15 mg, 90 capsules
product.description:
What are the benefits of iron?The mineral iron is a crucial component of many proteins and enzymes that maintain good health. It’s essential for making hemoglobin, a protein in red blood cells that carries oxygen from the lungs to the rest of the body.Healthy iron levels support the body’s energy production, immune function, and proper cell growth and development. On the other hand, an iron deficiency can lead to a range of health issues, including anemia, weakened immune function, impaired cognitive development, and reduced muscle performance. However, it's important to manage your iron intake carefully because consuming too much can be toxic and pose health risks. Why choose Vitalized Iron+ / Eisen+ 15 mg? Microencapsulation – designed to deliverLipofer® microcapsules can deliver iron with superior bioavailability. Research has demonstrated that the iron source is 3,5x more bioavailable than ferric pyrophosphate and 2,7x than ferrous sulfate.Additionally, this state-of-the-art micronized iron is highly tolerable and does not irritate the digestive tract, which is a frequent complaint for iron products.Important & complementary ingredientsVitalized’s formulation also features nutrients that work synergistically with iron: Vitamin C, which is demonstrated to promote the absorption of iron.Vitamin B2: Mild vitamin B2 (riboflavin) deficiency might be more common in developed countries than previously thought. A deficiency in vitamin B2 can affect iron metabolism, such as iron utilization for the synthesis of hemoglobin. Improving riboflavin levels has been shown to help increase hemoglobin in the blood.Copper: Nutritionally, copper is an essential trace mineral that occurs naturally in certain foods. Copper is necessary for normal iron metabolism and the production of healthy red blood cells. A copper deficiency can cause anemia, similar to iron lack. High iron intake may, in turn, reduce copper absorption and lead to a shortage of copper. An ideal, balanced doseVitalized Iron+ / Eisen+ offers a flexible dose of 15 mg of iron per capsule, which is a good, moderate dose for the prevention of iron deficiency. Additionally, the supplement contains 100 mg of vitamin C, 0,5 mg of vitamin B2, and 0,15 mg of copper. A pure formulaThis EU-made supplement is vegan/vegetarian, non-GMO, and gluten-free. Furthermore, it doesn’t contain additives except natural acacia fiber as filler. Experience for yourself the benefits of this clever combination for effective iron support!

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Spermidine & Resveratrol, 30 capsules
product.description:
Supporting the process of cellular renewalWhat is autophagy?The name comes from the Greek words "self" and "eating”, and autophagy can be viewed as your cells' built-in housekeeping system. That means it’s your body’s way of cleaning and renewing its cells, removing damaged proteins and parts of the cell to make room for new, healthy ones.With time, autophagy tends to decrease, and maintaining a healthy cellular function is essential for overall well-being as we grow older. Both spermidine and resveratrol have been extensively researched for their role in cellular processes and active aging. What is spermidine?Spermidine is a polyamine, an organic compound with two or more amino groups. It was first identified in human seminal fluid (hence its name), but this fascinating cellular nutrient is also widespread throughout nature. It’s found in foods such as wheat germ, soybeans, mushrooms, and aged cheese, but in varying levels. As spermidine levels naturally decline with age, taking a quality supplement daily can complement your dietary intake, helping to maintain optimal levels.What is resveratrol?Resveratrol is a polyphenol, which is an antioxidant found in small amounts in foods like grapes, berries, and certain nuts. This clinically studied nutrient has been examined for its ability to support healthy aging.Why choose Vitalized Spermidine & ResveratrolOptimal cell function for longevity & active agingVitalized combines two remarkable naturally occurring compounds, making up an advanced supplement that goes beyond the benefits of the studied spermidine and resveratrol alone. These popular nutrients are shown to work synergistically and complementarily to promote the body's cellular processes.Spermidine & Resveratrol is created specifically for adults 40+ who are actively supporting their longevity journey. As part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle, this formula can provide nutritional support for those looking to maintain vitality as they age.Premium, pure & clinically validatedBoth spermidine and resveratrol are found naturally in certain plant foods, but in small or inconsistent amounts. Vitalized’s formula delivers a consistent daily dose of concentrated nutrients:Spermidine: 3 mg from gluten-free soybean extract.Resveratrol: 150 mg, which is a science-backed dose per day. The formula features Veri-Te™ resveratrol, which is European and represents the gold standard in purity and quality assurance, offering 98% of nature-identical trans-resveratrol. It’s produced by using innovative natural yeast fermentation and is supported by many clinical trials and research studies.Zinc: This essential trace mineral is added for antioxidant and cellular renewal support. *No additives: This vegan, non-GMO supplement is free from unnecessary ingredients and contains only natural acacia fiber as filler. The carefully selected ingredients in this formula reflect Vitalized’s commitment to evidence-informed nutrition that can complement your daily wellness routine. Vitalized Spermidine & Resveratrol – an advanced approach to promote optimal health! *Zinc has a role in the process of cell division and contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress.

product.title: Cardio Peak™, 30 capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Stay young at heart with Cardio Peak™! The formula contains 400 mg of a standardized Terminalia arjuna bark extract. This clinically studied ingredient is shown to support several aspects of cardiovascular health. Cardio Peak™ is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO. Why it works:The arjuna bark in Cardio Peak™ is rich in polyphenols and glycosides and has been used to support cardiovascular health for centuries. This ingredient has been clinically studied to promote a strong, healthy heart and encourage a healthy cardiac output: the strength and efficiency of your heart’s ability to pump blood. Moreover, research shows that arjuna can help reduce physical fatigue and enhance exercise performance for active adults.The science behind the product:Ways to measure heart healthOne approach to measure heart health is to observe cardiac output, or how well your heart performs its primary function – pumping blood. Another is to evaluate cardiovascular endurance, which reflects how long you can exercise before reaching exhaustion. The active compounds in Terminalia arjuna bark extract are shown to support both these aspects of cardiovascular health. Cardiovascular studies of arjunaLeft ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) is a test used to measure the efficiency of the heart’s left ventricle, which is the largest chamber responsible for pumping oxygen-rich blood throughout the body. Both older adults and active younger men took 400 mg of arjuna extract daily for eight weeks in randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled studies. In both groups, LVEF measurements and physical fatigue scores improved for those taking arjuna extract compared to placebo. (1,2) Support keeping your heart strong and resilient – it’s the most crucial muscle you have!How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQWhat sets this product apart from the previous formulation? Life Extension has updated the formula by replacing the arjuna bark extract with a standardized Terminalia arjuna extract that has been clinically studied for its cardiovascular health benefits. Additionally, hawthorn has been removed to allow for a more convenient once-daily dosing.What does Cardio Peak™ contain?Cardio Peak™ features 400 mg of arjuna bark extract, standardized to deliver 30% polyphenols and 15% glycosides.Who is Cardio Peak™ intended for?The formula is ideal for individuals seeking to support heart muscle health, cardiac endurance, and output. It’s also suitable for young, active adults looking to enhance their exercise performance.Can I use this for fatigue?Clinical studies show that arjuna bark extract not only supports heart muscle health but also helps reduce physical fatigue.How does this Cardio Peak™ work?The arjuna bark extract in Cardio Peak™ has been shown to promote the volume of oxygen-rich blood pumped from the heart to the body each time it contracts. This process is known as cardiac output.When can I expect results?In a study on individuals taking the arjuna bark extract used in Cardio Peak™, improvements in cardiac output were observed after 56 days (8 weeks). However, everyone is different, so the time to notice benefits may vary.When is the ideal time to take Cardio Peak™? Should I take it with food or on an empty stomach?Depending on your preference, you can take this product at any time of the day, with or without food.Could this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that arjuna bark extract in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it’s recommended that you inform your physician about any supplements you are taking. Where is this product manufactored?Cardio Peak™ is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”). Is this product suitable for children?This product is specifically designed for adults aged 18 and older. Always consult your child’s physician before giving them any supplements. Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet the company's high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Cardio Peak™ is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.

product.title: Estrogen Balance Elite, 60 tablets
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Estrogen is essential for maintaining a woman's overall well-being. Estrogen Balance Elite contains a clinically studied fenugreek seed extract that has been shown to help the body maintain estrogen production and relieve discomfort. Fenugreek is an herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its health-supporting properties and hormone-like plant compounds. Why it works: Achieving optimal women’s health starts with balanced estrogen production. Fenugreek is shown to be a powerhouse for supporting female well-being.A standardized extract of this well-known botanical has been demonstrated to boost natural estradiol production (endogenous estrogen) and help relieve discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and more. This, in turn, can encourage healthy sleep patterns and a balanced mood. Estrogen Balance Elite is a hormone-free, plant-based formula that offers this researched extract of fenugreek seed. The formula also includes red clover, chaste tree, and black cohosh extracts to promote the health of women as they age. The science behind the product: Fenugreek and its role in estrogen productionFenugreek seeds contain active compounds like trigonelline, a phytoestrogen, and protodioscin, a flavonoid structurally similar to DHEA. DHEA is a precursor (building block) to estrogen and other sex hormones. (1)Clinical studies have shown that the standardized fenugreek seed extract in Estrogen Balance Elite effectively promoted estradiol production, the primary form of estrogen produced by the ovaries. Results demonstrated a statistically significant increase in estradiol levels compared to both baseline measurements and placebo groups. (2-4)Fenugreek and hormone balance reliefFenugreek has also been shown to help ease many hormone-related discomforts. In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial involving 29 women aged 45 to 58, participants who took the standardized fenugreek seed extract found in Estrogen Balance Elite reported relief from symptoms like hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and leg discomfort. They also reported improved sleep quality and mood support compared to those taking a placebo. (5) Botanical extracts for comprehensive supportLike fenugreek (seed), the red clover powder (leaf) in Estrogen Balance Elite is rich in phytoestrogens. This formula also includes highly valued extracts of black cohosh (rhizome) and chaste tree (berry), offering well-rounded support for women’s health.Enjoy a powerful botanical blend for hormonal support & overall vitality.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ:What’s inside Estrogen Balance Elite?Estrogen Balance Elite is designed to support hormone balance in women. Each serving contains:500 mg of fenugreek seed extract80 mg of red clover leaf extract60 mg of chaste tree berry extract40 mg of black cohosh rhizome extractDoes Estrogen Balance Elite contain estrogen? No, this product does not contain estrogen. However, fenugreek in the formula can help support the body’s natural estrogen production. Who is Estrogen Balance Elite for?This formula is intended for women seeking to:Support healthy estrogen productionRelieve hormone-related discomfortsPromote a balanced mood and healthy sleep patternsWhat hormone-related discomforts does it help relieve? The clinically studied fenugreek seed extract can help ease: Hot flashesNight sweatsVaginal drynessLeg discomfortCan men take this product?No, Estrogen Balance Elite is specifically formulated to support estrogen production in adult women. It is not recommended for men.When can I expect an effect?In clinical studies, participants who took the fenugreek extract used in Estrogen Balance Elite experienced improvements in hormone-related discomforts after 6 weeks of consistent use. However, results may vary from person to person.When is the best time to take Estrogen Balance Elite? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? Dosage: Take two (2) tablets in the evening.With food: Yes, it’s recommended to take it with food for optimal absorption.Always read the full label and follow the directions carefully.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we recommend consulting your healthcare provider before starting any new supplement.Who should not take Estrogen Balance Elite?As stated on the product label, please consult your healthcare practitioner if you have a history of estrogen-dependent tumors or related health conditions.Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Estrogen Balance Elite is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product made?Estrogen Balance Elite is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this supplement vegetarian?Yes, this formula is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free and non-GMO?Yes, Estrogen Balance Elite is gluten-free and Life Extension-verified non-GMO.

Health benefits overview: Estrogen Balance Elite can support women's wellness through every stage of life with a clinically studied fenugreek seed extract. This botanical formula can help maintain your body's natural estrogen production while encouraging relief from hormone-related discomforts. Are you looking for plant-based hormone support? This formula combines time-honored botanicals to promote balanced estrogen levels and overall vitality naturally.

Why this formula works: Optimal women's health begins with balanced hormone production, and fenugreek has emerged as a botanical powerhouse for female well-being. A standardized extract of this well-researched plant can help boost your body's natural estradiol production – the primary form of estrogen produced by the ovaries. Clinical research demonstrates that this formula can help ease common discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and leg discomfort. This, in turn, can encourage restful sleep patterns and balanced mood support throughout your day. Estrogen Balance Elite offers a hormone-free, plant-based approach that includes fenugreek seed along with red clover, chaste tree, and black cohosh extracts to promote comprehensive women's health as you age.

Backed by science: Fenugreek seed extract and natural estrogen production Fenugreek seeds contain active plant compounds like trigonelline, a phytoestrogen, and protodioscin, a flavonoid structurally similar to DHEA. DHEA serves as a building block for estrogen and other hormones in your body. Clinical studies have shown that the standardized fenugreek seed extract in this formula effectively promoted estradiol production. Results demonstrated a statistically significant increase in estradiol levels compared to both starting measurements and placebo groups. Fenugreek and relief from hormone-related discomforts How can fenugreek help ease the discomforts you may experience during hormonal transitions? In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial involving 29 women aged 45 to 58, participants who took the standardized fenugreek seed extract found in Estrogen Balance Elite reported relief from symptoms like hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and leg discomfort. They also experienced improved sleep quality and mood support compared to those taking a placebo. Botanical extracts for comprehensive women's health support Like fenugreek seed, the red clover powder (leaf) in Estrogen Balance Elite is rich in phytoestrogens – plant compounds that can support hormone balance. This formula also includes highly valued extracts of black cohosh (rhizome) and chaste tree (berry), offering well-rounded support for your wellness journey through different life stages.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase (DAO), 60 vegetarian delayed release capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is food sensitivity? The short answer is that food sensitivity, sometimes referred to as a food intolerance, is when the body responds to compounds in the food you eat. It’s not an allergic reaction, but it can lead to gastrointestinal discomfort and is often challenging to identify.Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase is formulated to ease non-allergy digestive discomfort linked to dietary histamine sensitivity. The formula is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO. Why it works: Stay comfortable after you eatNon-allergy food sensitivities are more common than you might think: Nearly 20% of people in Westernized countries experience some form of food intolerance. (1)Histamine is a compound present in foods like cured meats, cheese, oily fish, certain fruits and vegetables, fermented foods, and wine – and not everyone can digest these treats comfortably. Histamine-rich foods are often associated with sensitivities such as occasional gas, stomach upset, and other digestive discomforts.The plant-based DAO in this product can support a healthy breakdown of intestinal histamine to help alleviate occasional gas and stomach upset and promote digestive comfort. Moreover: many DAO formulas utilize enzymes derived from animals, usually pork. Food Sensitivity Relief uses diamine oxidase from pea sprouts. The science behind the product:Clinical studies with diamine oxidaseDiamine oxidase (DAO) is the primary enzyme responsible for breaking down intestinal histamine, promoting healthy digestion and comfort. In a randomized clinical study, participants who took DAO supplements 20 minutes before a main meal for eight weeks reported relief from occasional gastrointestinal discomfort. (2)Research also highlights the effectiveness of DAO supplementation in reducing both the frequency and severity of discomfort due to occasional food sensitivities linked to dietary histamine. (3,4)Plant-based DAOWhile many DAO products are sourced from pig kidneys, Life Extension’s formula delivers DAO derived from pea sprouts. It has the same histamine-breaking capacity as animal-based DAO (demonstrated in clinical studies)! Experience digestive comfort again – and freedom to enjoy your meals!How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ:What is histamine?Histamine is a compound involved in the body's immune response. It is naturally released in the body and can also be produced by gut bacteria. Additionally, histamine is present in many foods and drinks or may be increased by them. High levels of histamine in the gut can lead to occasional gastrointestinal discomfort, such as gas and bloating. The body relies on specific enzymes to break down this compound.What foods are high in histamine?Histamine-rich foods and drinks are quite common. Examples include cured and deli meats, various cheeses, fermented foods, alcoholic beverages such as wine and beer, oily fish, and certain fruits and vegetables like citrus fruits, tomatoes, and strawberries.Is histamine sensitivity the same as an allergy?No, histamine sensitivity is not considered an allergy. It is a reaction to histamine from foods, often classified as a food sensitivity or intolerance. They may manifest in the form of occasional gastrointestinal discomforts.Does this product break down histamine throughout the body?No, this product is specifically designed to support the breakdown of intestinal histamine related to non-allergy histamine food sensitivity.What is diamine oxidase (DAO)?Diamine oxidase (DAO) is an enzyme naturally produced by the body to break down histamine, primarily in the gastrointestinal (GI) tract. Its activity is measured in histamine degrading units (HDU). It can be more difficult for people with low levels of DAO to maintain a healthy balance of histamine.What does Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase (DAO) contain?Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase provides 20,000 HDU of the enzyme diamine oxidase (DAO), sourced from pea sprouts. HDU, or histamine degrading units, is a measurement of the enzyme's activity.Who is Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase for?This product is designed for individuals who need support in breaking down and metabolizing histamine in the gut, helping to relieve occasional discomfort related to dietary histamine sensitivity.When will I expect an effect?In a study, individuals who took DAO immediately after consuming histamine-rich foods experienced benefits right away. Longer-term effects were observed after daily use for 4–8 weeks. However, as everyone is different, the time it takes to notice benefits may vary.When is the best time to take Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach?It is suggested to take one capsule before your heaviest meals, up to three times daily.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we always recommend informing your physician about any supplements you are taking.Are there any precautions associated with this product?Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase comes with the following precaution: While this product helps break down histamine, it does not prevent severe allergic reactions or gluten-related (celiac) responses. Avoid consuming foods you are allergic to.Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product made?Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Can children take this product?No. This product was designed for adults over 18.

Health benefits overview: What is food sensitivity? Food sensitivity, sometimes referred to as a food intolerance, is when your body responds to compounds in the food you eat. It's not an allergic reaction, but it can lead to gastrointestinal discomfort and is often challenging to identify. Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase is formulated to ease non-allergy digestive discomfort linked to dietary histamine sensitivity. The formula is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why this formula works: Non-allergy food sensitivities are more common than you might think: Nearly 20% of people in Westernized countries experience some form of food intolerance. Histamine is a compound present in foods like cured meats, cheese, oily fish, certain fruits and vegetables, fermented foods, and wine. Not everyone can digest these treats comfortably. Histamine-rich foods are often associated with sensitivities such as occasional gas, stomach upset, and other digestive discomforts. The plant-based DAO in this product can help promote optimal breakdown of intestinal histamine to help alleviate occasional gas and stomach upset and encourage digestive comfort. Do you want a vegetarian option? Many DAO formulas utilize enzymes derived from animals, usually pork. Food Sensitivity Relief uses diamine oxidase from pea sprouts.

Backed by science: Clinical studies with diamine oxidase Diamine oxidase (DAO) is the primary enzyme responsible for breaking down intestinal histamine, promoting optimal digestion and comfort. In a randomized clinical study, participants who took DAO supplements 20 minutes before a main meal for eight weeks reported relief from occasional gastrointestinal discomfort. Research also highlights the effectiveness of DAO supplementation in reducing both the frequency and severity of discomfort due to occasional food sensitivities linked to dietary histamine. If you struggle with digestive discomfort after certain meals, this evidence-based approach can provide the support you need. Plant-based DAO While many DAO products are sourced from pig kidneys, Life Extension's formula delivers DAO derived from pea sprouts. It has the same histamine-breaking capacity as animal-based DAO, demonstrated in clinical studies.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: WOMEN'S HEALTH Sexual Health for Her*, 60 vegetarian capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Stress, age, hormonal changes, nutrition, and a hectic lifestyle can impact women’s sexual desire. Are you looking for something to ignite the passion in the bedroom?Sexual Health for Her can help maintain a healthy sex drive by promoting sexual satisfaction with clinically studied botanical extracts. The formula is plant-based, gluten-free, and non-GMO. Why it works:Keeping a healthy sex drive is an essential part of a woman's well-being. You’re not alone in losing that “lovin’ feeling”! A survey of 32,000 women, published in Obstetrics & Gynecology, revealed that nearly half wanted to feel more sexual desire. This was across all ages, not just postmenopausal. Life Extension’s Sexual Health for Her contains standardized fenugreek and saffron extracts, both researched to encourage libido, arousal, and lubrication. The science behind the product:Supporting healthy sexual desire & function in womenIt’s normal for women to occasionally experience low libido and desire. In a survey on sexual function, 44% of women reported experiencing low sexual desire and arousal. And, this isn't just a concern for women in menopause or post-menopause. Many adult women can experience sexual frustrations at various stages of life, which can affect the intimacy of the relationship. (1-4) Sexual Health for Her is created to enhance sexual drive and satisfaction by encouraging a healthy libido and promoting arousal, and lubrication. (5,6)Botanical blend for sexual desire & satisfactionFenugreek seed extract: In a randomized, double-blind, and placebo-controlled trial of 80 women aged 29 to 40, those who took fenugreek seed extract for eight weeks (two menstrual cycles) starting in the follicular phase reported improved sexual satisfaction and maintained healthy sex hormone levels (estradiol and free testosterone) compared to the placebo group. (5)Saffron extract: In a study of 74 women aged 18 to 55 (parallel-group, double-blind, randomized, and placebo-controlled), individuals taking saffron extract for six weeks noted enhanced sexual function scores compared to baseline. (6)Make room on your nightstand for Sexual Health for Her and let every night feel like ladies' night.How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What does this supplement contain?Sexual Health for Her features two standardized extracts designed to support female sexual function. Each capsule delivers 300 mg of fenugreek seed extract and 15 mg of saffron extract.Is this product designed for a specific age group?Yes, Sexual Health for Her is formulated for adult women aged 18 and older.Who should take Sexual Health for Her?The product is ideal for women looking to support their sexual satisfaction, including desire, libido, lubrication, enjoyment, and overall fulfillment.How does this supplement work?The active compounds in fenugreek may help maintain healthy levels of estradiol and free testosterone, two key hormones for encouraging female sexual response, arousal, and sex drive. Saffron's bioactive compounds have been clinically studied for their role in improving female sexual satisfaction. Combined, they create a well-rounded formula for supporting female sexual health.When can I expect an effect?Research on the ingredients in Sexual Health for Her reported improvements in sexual health as early as 4 weeks with the best effects noticed between 6 and 8 weeks. But, since everyone is unique, the time needed to experience benefits may vary.When is the best time to take this product? Should it be ingested with food or on an empty stomach?It's recommended to take one capsule in the morning with food and a second capsule in the evening with food.Can I take both capsules at once?As with any supplement, you should take Sexual Health for Her as directed on the product label to ensure the best results. Will this supplement interact with my medication?There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in Sexual Health for Her would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it’s always recommended to inform your physician about any supplements you are taking.Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Sexual Health for Her is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is Sexual Health for Her produced?This product is made in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?Yes, Sexual Health for Her is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, Sexual Health for Her product is both gluten-free and non-GMO.

Health benefits overview: WOMEN'S HEALTH Sexual Health for Her* can help you maintain a vibrant intimate life with clinically studied botanical extracts. Stress, age, hormonal changes, nutrition, and a busy lifestyle can all impact your sexual desire, but this formula is designed to support sexual satisfaction naturally. Looking for something to reignite the passion? This plant-based formula combines standardized fenugreek and saffron extracts, both researched to encourage libido, arousal, and lubrication.

Why this formula works: Maintaining a fulfilling sex drive is an essential part of your well-being as a woman. You're not alone in wanting to feel more desire – a survey of 32,000 women, published in Obstetrics & Gynecology, revealed that nearly half wanted to feel more sexual desire, across all ages, not just postmenopausal. Sexual Health for Her contains standardized fenugreek and saffron extracts, both clinically researched to encourage libido, arousal, and lubrication. This formula is created to enhance your sexual drive and satisfaction by promoting healthy hormone levels and supporting natural intimacy. Are you ready to experience renewed passion? Clinical studies demonstrate that this formula can help you rediscover fulfilling intimate moments.

Backed by science: Supporting healthy sexual desire and function in women It's completely normal for women to occasionally experience low libido and desire. In a survey on sexual function, 44% of women reported experiencing low sexual desire and arousal. And this isn't just a concern for women in menopause or post-menopause. Many adult women can experience these challenges at various stages of life, which can affect the intimacy of your relationship. Sexual Health for Her is created to enhance sexual drive and satisfaction by encouraging healthy libido and promoting arousal and lubrication. Fenugreek seed extract: supporting hormones for sexual wellness How can fenugreek help support your intimate life? In a randomized, double-blind, and placebo-controlled trial of 80 women aged 29 to 40, those who took fenugreek seed extract for eight weeks (two menstrual cycles) starting in the follicular phase reported improved sexual satisfaction and maintained healthy sex hormone levels (estradiol and free testosterone) compared to the placebo group. The active compounds in fenugreek may help maintain optimal levels of estradiol and free testosterone, two key hormones for encouraging female sexual response, arousal, and sex drive. Saffron extract: enhancing female sexual function In a study of 74 women aged 18 to 55 (parallel-group, double-blind, randomized, and placebo-controlled), individuals taking saffron extract for six weeks noted enhanced sexual function scores compared to baseline. Saffron's bioactive compounds have been clinically studied for their role in improving female sexual satisfaction.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Do you want to feel more energized? Both creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine support cellular energy function. Creatine is renowned for enhancing exercise performance and improving body composition. Acetyl-L-carnitine has been shown to promote both mental and physical energy as well as cognitive function. Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus combines these two compounds in a convenient, unflavored, gluten-free powder. It’s perfect for mixing with your protein shake, juice, water, or favorite beverage.Why it works:Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus contains clinically studied creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine. Both these ingredients are derived from amino acids and play key roles in supporting the body's energy production processes.This powerful combination can help you to stay mentally and physically refreshed and is a great solution for energy and performance, whether you are at the gym, in the office, or on the go.The science behind the product:Potent duo for energy supportBoth creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine help brain and body cells generate ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the primary energy source essential for numerous biological processes that maintain your health. (1,2) Creatine and carnitine content in muscle is lower in vegetarians and the elderly. (3-5) CREATINE: Exercise performance & lean musclesIt is naturally present in muscles, the brain, and other high-energy-demand cells. Creatine forms a compound inside cells that provides the power required to ‘recycle’ ATP. Creatine is essential for an active lifestyle: it fuels exercise performance, endurance, and recovery. The creatine in Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus can help maintain lean muscle mass, strength, and power and help improve body composition with regular exercise. (2,6)CARNITINE: Healthy function of the brain & nervesCarnitine supports the transport of fatty acids into mitochondria (the tiny powerhouses in every cell), boosting ATP production. Research shows that carnitine helps fight both mental and physical fatigue, supports healthy cognitive function, and promotes efficient cellular energy metabolism. (7) Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus can therefore help keep your mind as strong as your body. Enjoy mind and muscle power support in one convenient formula!How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What contains Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus?Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus is a powdered supplement designed to promote cellular energy for both mind and body. It features 5 g of creatine monohydrate and 2 g of acetyl-L-carnitine, helping to fight general physical and mental fatigue.Who is Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus for?This supplement is ideal for individuals looking to enhance physical strength and endurance while boosting mental energy and cognitive performance. The formula can support both mind and body by promoting ATP energy production. When is the best time to Take Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach?You can take this supplement at any time of the day, with or without food, depending on your preference. We recommend mixing it with your protein shake, juice, water, or favorite beverage. What does this product taste like? Are there any added sugars?Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus is unflavored and free of added sugars. It blends effortlessly with smoothies, shakes, juice, or water. Will this supplement interact with my medication? There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking. Is this product tested for heavy metals and contaminants?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product manufactured?Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?Yes, Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free and non-GMO?Yes, Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus is gluten-free and all its ingredients are Life Extension-verified non-GMO. Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

Health benefits overview: Do you want to feel more energized throughout your day? Both creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine can enhance cellular energy function. Creatine is renowned for improving exercise performance and body composition. Acetyl-L-carnitine has been shown to promote both mental and physical energy as well as cognitive function. This convenient, unflavored, gluten-free powder is perfect for mixing with your protein shake, juice, water, or favorite beverage.

Why this formula works: Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus contains clinically studied creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine. Both these ingredients are derived from amino acids and play essential roles in supporting your body's energy production processes. This powerful combination can help you stay mentally and physically refreshed. Whether you're at the gym, in the office, or on the go, this formula provides a great solution for energy and performance support.

Backed by science: Potent duo for energy support Both creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine help brain and body cells generate ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the primary energy source essential for numerous biological processes that maintain your health. Are you getting enough of these vital nutrients? Creatine and carnitine content in muscle is lower in vegetarians and the elderly. Creatine for exercise performance and lean muscles It is naturally present in muscles, the brain, and other high-energy-demand cells. Creatine forms a compound inside cells that provides the power required to recycle ATP. Creatine is essential for an active lifestyle: it fuels exercise performance, endurance, and recovery. The creatine in this formula can help maintain lean muscle mass, strength, and power and help improve body composition with regular exercise. If you're looking to enhance your physical performance, this ingredient delivers the support you need. Carnitine for optimal function of the brain and nerves Carnitine enhances the transport of fatty acids into mitochondria (the tiny powerhouses in every cell), boosting ATP production. Research shows that carnitine helps fight both mental and physical fatigue, encourages optimal cognitive function, and promotes efficient cellular energy metabolism. Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus can therefore help keep your mind as strong as your body.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.
