product.title: Daily PMS Relief, 60 vegetarian capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Imagine if “that time of the month” felt just like any other day, free from premenstrual discomfort. PMS affects about half the world’s women of childbearing age. You don’t have to be one of them.Daily PMS Relief is created for daily use to help balance the menstrual cycle by combining clinically studied nutrients shown to relieve various PMS-related symptoms.Why it works:Ginger extract has been researched to help ease PMS-related cramps, fatigue, nausea, and lower back discomfort. Vitamin B6 and magnesium have been shown to support a balanced mood. Daily PMS Relief combines all three of these nutrients, supporting both physical and emotional PMS symptoms. PMS looks different for everyone and even changes month to month. That’s why you need a supplement that tackles a range of symptoms for all-around relief. The science behind the product:What is premenstrual discomfort?Premenstrual syndrome (PMS) refers to physical and emotional discomforts that occur during the luteal phase of the menstrual cycle. PMS-related symptoms can affect a woman's quality of life. They are unfortunately quite common: around 48% of the world’s female population experience PMS in some form. (1-4)Ginger extract for physical reliefA randomized controlled study of 50 women aged 18 to 35 found that ginger extract supplementation significantly reduced premenstrual discomforts, such as menstrual cramps, lower back pain, tiredness, and PMS-related nausea compared to a placebo. (4)The unique ginger extract Ginfort® demonstrated an average reduction of 84% in menstrual cramp discomfort. Mood support with studied nutrientsClinical research has demonstrated that combining magnesium glycinate and vitamin B6 significantly helped relieve PMS-related mood swings. (5,6)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQ:Who is Daily PMS Relief for?This supplement is designed for women of reproductive age who experience discomfort associated with the start of menstruation. What’s inside Daily PMS Relief?Each capsule contains:100 mg of clinically studied ginger extract60 mg of magnesium (from magnesium glycinate)25 mg of vitamin B6How soon before the start of my menstrual cycle should I take this product? Should I take it with food?This supplement is designed for daily use, even if you’re not currently experiencing PMS symptoms. Take one capsule in the morning and one in the evening with food, as directed on the label.Why is this a daily supplement?Though PMS occurs monthly, this supplement can support the entire menstrual cycle and should be taken every day for best results. Consistent daily use can help the nutrients in this formula work effectively to relieve PMS-related discomforts when they arise.When can I expect an effect?Studies on the ingredients in Daily PMS Relief showed initial improvements after 28 days, with the best effects seen around two months. Individual results may vary.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does Daily PMS Relief contain allergens?The product is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product made?Daily PMS Relief is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?Yes, it contains no animal-derived ingredients.Is it gluten-free?Yes, 100% gluten-free.Is it non-GMO?Yes, all ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.

product.title: Liposomal Magtein™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Liposomal Magtein™ can promote immediate, short-term brain function and long-term mental clarity by reducing stress and supporting neurotransmitter regulation.The formula comes with exceptional bioavailability and absorption due to Quicksilver Scientific’s liposomal delivery technology. It's sugar-free, vegan, tested allergen-free, and gluten-free.Why it works:This brain supplement contains patented magnesium L-threonate (Magtein) and 450 mg of highly purified phosphatidylcholine (PC) per serving.An overstimulated nervous system floods the body with stress hormones, disrupting focus, sleep, and calm. The studied Magtein is shown to work by calming the overactive side of the brain, encouraging the body to transition from a fight-or-flight response into a more relaxed state.PC is a well-known phospholipid for supporting neuronal membranes and healthy neurotransmission, supercharging the brain function.Together, these effective nutrients can support balanced brain signaling and stress management, helping to create optimal conditions for:Cognitive power: Sharper memory, focus, and learningStress relief: Calmer nervous system, quality sleep, and general well-beingThe science behind the product:Clinically proven “smarter" magnesiumThe mineral magnesium is essential for brain health, playing a key role in nerve cell communication, memory, and protecting against overstimulation. However, not all magnesium supplements are readily absorbed into the central nervous system.Magtein, as magnesium L-threonate, is developed from MIT research and is the only scientifically validated magnesium to cross the blood-brain barrier.Increased magnesium level in the brain supports its natural balance and synaptic plasticity (the brain's ability to change), neural connections, and neurotransmitter balance. This again can promote optimal brain health and peak performance. Liposomes & superior deliveryIngredient absorption and bioavailability are essential for achieving real health results. Liposomes can provide efficient uptake, but not every liposomal supplement is created equal.Quicksilver Scientific’s liquid liposomes have a clear consistency, which can only be achieved with nanoparticle sizing between 20-100 nanometers. These small liposomes allow absorption of ingredients as soon as they hit the mouth.The advanced delivery of Liposomal Magtein® can provide a formula with fast-acting benefits.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits overview: Struggling with brain fog or feeling overwhelmed by daily stress? Liposomal Magtein™ can help promote immediate brain function and long-term mental clarity by reducing stress and supporting balanced neurotransmitter activity. This advanced formula combines magnesium L-threonate with phosphatidylcholine for comprehensive brain and nervous system support. The formula can enhance cognitive power through sharper memory, improved focus, and better learning abilities. Additionally, it may encourage stress relief by calming your nervous system, promoting quality sleep, and supporting overall well-being.

Why this formula works: This brain supplement contains patented magnesium L-threonate (Magtein®) and 450 mg of highly purified phosphatidylcholine per serving. An overstimulated nervous system floods your body with stress hormones, disrupting focus, sleep, and calm throughout your day. Magtein works by calming the overactive side of the brain, encouraging your body to transition from a fight-or-flight response into a more relaxed state. This shift creates the optimal conditions for clear thinking and restful sleep. Phosphatidylcholine is a well-known phospholipid for supporting neuronal membranes and healthy neurotransmission, essentially supercharging brain function. Together, these effective nutrients can promote balanced brain signaling and stress management, helping you feel calmer and think more clearly.

Backed by science: Magnesium L-threonate: the brain-targeted form Magnesium is essential for brain health, playing a key role in nerve cell communication, memory, and protecting against overstimulation. However, not all magnesium supplements are readily absorbed into the central nervous system where they're needed most. Magtein, as magnesium L-threonate, is developed from MIT research and represents a breakthrough in magnesium supplementation. Unlike other forms, this patented compound can cross the blood-brain barrier effectively, delivering magnesium directly to brain tissue. Increased magnesium levels in the brain promote natural balance and synaptic plasticity, which is the brain's ability to form new connections and adapt to new information. This enhanced brain magnesium can encourage neural connections and neurotransmitter balance, supporting optimal brain health and peak performance. Research demonstrates that maintaining adequate brain magnesium levels may help with memory formation, learning capacity, and cognitive resilience as you age. Phosphatidylcholine: building blocks for brain cells Phosphatidylcholine serves as a critical component of cell membranes throughout your body, with particularly high concentrations in brain tissue. This phospholipid helps maintain the structural integrity of neurons and supports the efficient transmission of signals between brain cells. By providing 450 mg of highly purified phosphatidylcholine per serving, this formula nourishes your brain's cellular infrastructure. This support is essential for neurotransmitter production and release, helping your brain communicate effectively and respond appropriately to various stimuli. Liposomal delivery: maximizing absorption Ingredient absorption and bioavailability are essential for achieving real health results with any supplement. Liposomes can provide efficient uptake, but not every liposomal supplement delivers the same quality. Quicksilver Scientific's liquid liposomes have a clear consistency, which can only be achieved with nanoparticle sizing between 20–100 nanometers. These small liposomes allow absorption of ingredients as soon as they hit your mouth, beginning the delivery process before the formula even reaches your stomach. The advanced delivery of Liposomal Magtein™ provides a formula with fast-acting benefits you may notice quickly.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Ergo-Thione+
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is ergothioneine? It’s a sulfur-containing amino acid found naturally in certain foods like mushrooms, black beans, and oat bran.Ergothioneine is an adaptive antioxidant that has its own dedicated transporters in the body. This allows the nutrient to concentrate in tissues and then go where it’s needed the most. However, this extraordinary nutrient is difficult to absorb in its pure form. The advanced liposomal delivery of Ergo-Thione+ improves upon the absorption of ergothioneine and the formula's other antioxidants for fast-acting effects. This supplement is vegan, sugar-free, and tested non-GMO, allergen-free, soy protein-free, and gluten-free.Why it works:A formula for cutting-edge antioxidant supportErgothioneine is gaining popularity in antioxidant supplementation, and this "blue zone vitamin" is recognized for its powerful anti-aging benefits. Ergo-Thione+ also includes glutathione, vitamin C, and selenium for synergistic support. This unique blend can neutralize free radicals and work intelligently within the body's antioxidant network to:Restore glutathione levelsProtect cells from oxidative stressEncourage a healthy inflammatory responsePromote mitochondrial functionProvide detoxification supportActivate key longevity pathways for optimal healthThe science behind the product:Immediate action & ongoing resilienceThe ergothioneine in Ergo-Thione serves as a hub that connects the other antioxidants and has an extremely unique ability to deliver “on-demand” antioxidant action, concentrating in damaged tissues.Moreover, the concentration of ergothioneine in cells can provide a reserve of antioxidant support useful for long-term wellness.Liposomal delivery for exceptional absorptionQuicksilver’s proprietary technology can ensure high bioavailability and absorption of the ingredients to achieve maximum benefits and impact of this innovative formula.By encapsulating the antioxidant blend within protective liposomes, the ingredients are secure from the harsh environment of the digestive tract and can easily pass through cell membranes to reach their cellular targets intact. The liposomes allow the uptake of ingredients as soon as they hit the mouth.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Magnesium Hydroxide, 120 capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Magnesium Hydroxide, 120 capsules, is formulated to promote healthy bowel movements for people experiencing occasional constipation.Each two-capsule serving delivers 700 mg of magnesium hydroxide to help support regular elimination. The capsules are vegan, sugar-free, gluten-free, and tested allergen-free.Why it works:Lack of regularity, a chain reactionA healthy digestive system and balanced gut microbiome start with regularity and consistent elimination.Natural binders such as charcoal and bentonite clay may slow down digestion, which can cause constipation.Moreover, constipation can disturb the gut’s natural balance, leading to an unhealthy microbiome.Again, an imbalanced gut can trigger unwanted immune responses and contribute to various health issues.Constipation reliefMagnesium hydroxide is a well-established compound for supporting relief from constipation by promoting smooth and healthy bowel motility.The science behind the product:Natural binders such as activated charcoal, bentonite clay, and zeolite can cause constipation, especially when used without adequate hydration.If you are taking Ultra Binder (for instance), adding 1–2 capsules of magnesium hydroxide can promote regularity and encourage effective toxin elimination through the gastrointestinal tract (GI tract).Unlike stimulant laxatives, magnesium hydroxide works by drawing water into the intestines, helping to soften stool and increase its volume, which can encourage natural elimination. Moreover, using such a mild osmotic agent can help maintain the microbiome’s natural balance and contribute to long-term gastrointestinal health.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Hair Growth for Men
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Are you struggling with thinning hair? Research shows that specific plants can promote hair health. Hair Growth for Men combines two clinically researched extracts shown to support hair growth, thickness, and overall appearance. This supplement is gluten-free and non-GMO.Why it works:Supporting hair growthThis formula is designed for men’s thinning hair and can promote hair fullness, thickness, and volume. It delivers two standardized hair-supporting extract blends: ActriSave®: A duo of black rice and prickly pearVispo®: Featuring saw palmettoReducing hair lossHealthy hair growth starts at the roots, and supporting hair follicles, the hair root cells, is essential for hair health. The hormone DHT is involved in sustaining the condition of hair follicle health, and an increase in DHT is associated with hair loss and decreased hair growth. Hair Growth for Men can help reduce shedding by maintaining normal levels of DHT.The science behind the product:An extract combo of black rice & prickly pearIn a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial, 86 men aged 18 to 55 took 250 mg of the combination of black rice and prickly pear extracts daily for 6 months. The results were measured using participant questionnaires and phototrichogram analysis, a clinical scoring of hair growth by an expert.Photographic assessments reviewed by experts showed positive results in 95% of hair regrowth scores for those taking this extract combination, versus only 34% in the placebo group. (1)The questionnaire also revealed positive feedback; 75% of participants in the extract group were satisfied with their hair after six months. Over 63% reported seeing results within the first two months of taking the black rice and prickly pear combo. (2) Standardized extract of Saw PalmettoIn a randomized, double-blind study, either a special, standardized saw palmetto extract or a placebo was given to participants between 18 and 50 years old.The results were measured at both the 8- and 16-week marks, using expert-administered hair counts (including hair comb and hair pull tests), self-evaluation, and photographic analysis.Expert assessments of the saw palmetto group showed promising results in both the hair-comb test (measuring loose hairs after combing) and the hair-pull test. (2)The self-evaluation questionnaire gathered appearance-related scores, with 50% of the saw palmetto group reporting a visible improvement in hair thickness. Impact on DHT (dihydrotestosterone)In the same 4-month study, researchers sought to measure saw palmetto’s effect on DHT. The outcome showed that the saw palmetto extract helped achieve DHT levels within the normal range compared with the placebo group, helping to minimize hair loss. (2)How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQWhat is in Hair Growth for Men?This formula combines standardized black rice extract, prickly pear flower extract, and saw palmetto oil extract to support healthy hair.How does this supplement work?The blend of extracts can help nourish the health of hair follicles, which are the root cells responsible for activating and supporting new hair growth. In a clinical study, men taking this combination spent more time in the growth (anagen) phase of the hair cycle, helping reduce hair thinning. The formula also includes standardized saw palmetto oil extract that can help maintain already normal dihydrotestosterone (DHT) levels.Who is Hair Growth for Men for?This product is designed for men who want to support their hair’s health, thickness, fullness, density, and growth. When can I expect an effect?In studies of people who took the nutrients in Hair Growth for Men, effects on hair thickness and hair growth were seen in 3-4 months, with the best effects seen after 6 months of consistent use. When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? The suggested use is one (1) softgel daily after dinner. Always follow the instructions on the supplement label. Can I take this if my hair isn’t thinning?This formula can help support the hair health of both those who are experiencing thinning hair and those who are not.Can women take this product?This product was intended to be used by men to support their hair growth.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Hair Growth for Men is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?No, this product is not vegetarian. It was made with bovine-derived gelatin softgels.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

Health benefits overview: Are you struggling with thinning hair? Hair Growth for Men can support your hair's thickness, fullness, and overall appearance with clinically researched botanical extracts. This formula combines two standardized extract blends that have been shown to promote hair growth and help reduce shedding. Research demonstrates that specific plants can enhance your hair health naturally.

Why this formula works: This formula is specifically designed for men experiencing thinning hair and can promote hair fullness, thickness, and volume. It delivers two standardized hair-supporting extract blends: ActriSave® (a combination of black rice and prickly pear) and Vispo® (featuring saw palmetto). Optimal hair growth starts at the roots, and supporting your hair follicles – the hair root cells – is essential for maintaining vibrant hair. The hormone DHT is involved in sustaining hair follicle health, and an increase in DHT is associated with hair loss and decreased hair growth. How does this formula help you maintain fuller hair? Hair Growth for Men can help reduce shedding by maintaining normal levels of DHT.

Backed by science: Black rice and prickly pear extract combination In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial, 86 men aged 18 to 55 took 250 mg of the combination of black rice and prickly pear extracts daily for 6 months. The results were measured using participant questionnaires and phototrichogram analysis, a clinical scoring of hair growth by an expert. Photographic assessments reviewed by experts showed positive results in 95% of hair regrowth scores for those taking this extract combination, versus only 34% in the placebo group. The questionnaire also revealed positive feedback: 75% of participants in the extract group were satisfied with their hair after six months. Over 63% reported seeing results within the first two months of taking the black rice and prickly pear combo. Standardized saw palmetto extract for hair health In a randomized, double-blind study, either a special, standardized saw palmetto extract or a placebo was given to participants between 18 and 50 years old. The results were measured at both the 8- and 16-week marks, using expert-administered hair counts (including hair comb and hair pull tests), self-evaluation, and photographic analysis. Expert assessments of the saw palmetto group showed promising results in both the hair-comb test (measuring loose hairs after combing) and the hair-pull test. The self-evaluation questionnaire gathered appearance-related scores, with 50% of the saw palmetto group reporting a visible improvement in hair thickness. Impact on DHT (dihydrotestosterone) In the same 4-month study, researchers sought to measure saw palmetto's effect on DHT. The outcome showed that the saw palmetto extract helped achieve DHT levels within the normal range compared with the placebo group, helping to minimize your hair loss.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: Magnesium Glycinate
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Magnesium is crucial for a strong heart, steady nerves, flexible muscles, and resilient bones. These body systems use magnesium in different ways, and magnesium glycinate is a highly bioavailable form that allows the different parts of your body to make use of it.Life Extension’s Magnesium Glycinate offers 105 mg of elemental magnesium, which means the effective, absorbable dose you're getting. The formula is gluten-free and vegan/vegetarian.Why it works:Just like you need the right tool for a specific task (a screwdriver for screws and a hammer for nails), your body needs different nutrients to perform various functions. It can even make use of the same nutrient (such as magnesium) in multiple ways, depending on the job.What makes magnesium glycinate so unique? It combines this essential mineral with the amino acid glycine. The result is a gentle, well-absorbed type of magnesium that your body can effectively use, making it a smart choice for daily magnesium intake.The science behind the product:Magnesium & glycine: Highly absorbable typeMagnesium glycinate is a form bound to two glycine amino acids, which is why it’s technically called magnesium bisglycinate. This combination creates a type of magnesium that can be easily absorbed and used by the body. (1) Maintaining healthy magnesium levels is important for overall well-being, and taking a dietary supplement is an easy way to support that.When choosing a magnesium supplement, consider the following:Concentration of elemental magnesium per doseGastrointestinal tolerance: how well your body tolerates it These individual factors can help you find the form of magnesium that works best for you. The two key benefits of magnesium glycinate:Superior absorption: Magnesium glycinate is known for its excellent bioavailability. (1)Gentle on the GI-tract: Magnesium glycinate delivers a lower amount of elemental magnesium per dose, which can help reduce gastrointestinal discomfort that some people experience when taking magnesium. (1)Magnesium supports your entire bodyMagnesium plays a role in over 300 biochemical processes, including:Bone health: Magnesium promotes strong bones and teeth by helping regulate calcium balance, which is vital for maintaining healthy bone density. (2)Muscles & nerves: Magnesium supports the communication between nerve and muscle cells, helping to maintain a healthy nervous system and proper muscle function and control. (2)Cardiovascular health: Magnesium encourages a steady heartbeat, normal blood pressure levels, and healthy function of blood vessels and the endothelium. (2)FAQWhat does magnesium do in the body?Magnesium is involved in over 300 vital processes that keep your body running smoothly, from supporting your muscles and nerves to maintaining strong bones and a healthy heart.What’s inside Life Extension’s Magnesium Glycinate?Each capsule delivers 105 mg of elemental magnesium from the highly absorbable form of magnesium bisglycinate. What makes magnesium glycinate so well-absorbed?In magnesium glycinate, the magnesium is bound to glycine, which is a non-essential amino acid. This unique structure allows it to be absorbed through amino acid pathways in the body, making it a more bioavailable and gentle form of magnesium.Who is Magnesium Glycinate for?This form is ideal for anyone seeking this popular, well-tolerated, highly absorbable magnesium supplement to help maintain healthy magnesium levels.I’m already taking another magnesium, should I switch?The best magnesium for you depends on your personal needs. There are several effective forms, but magnesium glycinate stands out for its absorption and digestive tolerance. Regardless of the type you choose, what matters most is taking this important mineral consistently and at the right dosage to support your overall health.How is magnesium glycinate different from magnesium citrate?The key difference lies in which compound the magnesium is bound to. Magnesium glycinate is paired with the amino acid glycine, known for its calming properties, while magnesium citrate is combined with citric acid. Both are bioavailable and support bone and whole-body health, but your choice may depend on personal preference and goals.When should I take Magnesium Glycinate, and with or without food?You can take one capsule one to three times daily, at any time, morning or night, with or without food. Just be sure to follow the dosage and usage guidelines on the label for best results.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Magnesium Glycinate is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?Magnesium Glycinate formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian/vegan?Yes, this product is vegetarian/vegan and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is it non-GMO?Yes, all ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.Are there other magnesium forms?Yes, there are, and they can be combined for different purposes, which can be found in these products and forms: Neuro-Mag®: Magnesium threonate capsules is perfect for short-term memory, quick thinking, and cognitive support. Brain health, memory, cognition.Calm-Mag: Magnesium taurate can support a healthy stress response, which helps to calm your mind. Heart health, calming effects.Magnesium Hydroxide: Healthy bowel motility and GI regularity.Liposomal Magtein®: Liquid magnesium L-threonate with superior absorption.Magnesium Caps: Whole-body health: Delivers 3 forms of magnesium: oxide, citrate (whole-body, well-absorbed), succinate (energy metabolism, high absorption).Magnesium Glycinate: This popular form of magnesium is well-absorbed, so it's easy for the body to use it. Sleep, stress, muscle recovery, and long-term use.How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Hair Growth for Women
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:Hair loss and thinning can affect women at any age, impacting confidence and well-being. Hair Growth for Women combines two clinically researched plant extracts demonstrated to promote fuller hair and help prevent hair loss, supporting the roots of the hair. This supplement is gluten-free and non-GMO.Why it works:Supporting hair growthHair Growth for Women is specially developed for women who are seeking a solution for strong and healthy hair. The product provides two scientifically studied plant extracts shown to stimulate the hair to grow faster: Ceramosides™ Oil Neutra: Phytoceramide extract (wheat polar lipids, seed) Vispo®: Featuring saw palmetto extract (fruit) Healthy hair starts at the roots; therefore, it’s important to support the hair follicles, which are the hair root cells. DHT is a hormone that helps regulate hair follicle health, and elevated levels of DHT are linked to hair loss and reduced growth.This hair supplement can help keep existing hair and reduce shedding by maintaining normal levels of DHT. The science behind the product:Healthy hair growth cycle with phytoceramides Ceramides are essential lipids that play a key role in cellular structure, development, and renewal, including hair cells. They also help preserve collagen integrity, which is a vital building block for strong, shiny hair.The wheat phytoceramide extract in Hair Growth for Women is clinically studied to promote hair health. In a trial, 24–64-year-old women took either 30 mg of extract or a placebo daily for 84 days. (1)Hair examinations were done on days 56 and 84 through expert tests, including a pull test for hair fall, clinical scoring of density and volume, participant questionnaires, hair cycle analysis, measurements of hair diameter and growth, and scalp sebum evaluation.Expert reports showed that up to 64% in the wheat phytoceramide group experienced improved hair density and volume compared to baseline. Self-reported results revealed that up to 90% reported less shedding, improved hair growth, and healthier hair after 12 weeks. Both pre- and postmenopausal women experienced similar benefits.Saw palmetto for visibly thicker hairIn a study, participants took either a special, standardized saw palmetto oil extract or a placebo. Analysis found that the saw palmetto extract group showed reduced hair shedding and hair loss, as measured by the hair comb test (counting loose hairs after combing) and the hair pull test. (2)Results were measured at intervals of 8 and 16 weeks, using hair counts done by experts (including hair comb and hair pull tests), self-evaluation, and photographic analysis. In the self-evaluation questionnaire, participants in the saw palmetto group reported increased hair thickness.Saw palmetto effects on DHTIn the same study, researchers examined how saw palmetto influences dihydrotestosterone (DHT). They discovered that supplementation helped stabilize DHT levels, keeping them within the normal range throughout the trial. (2)Renew your hair care from within Hair Growth for Women and enjoy your hair again!How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQWhat is in this product?Hair Growth for Women is a nutritional supplement formulated with a combination of standardized saw palmetto oil extract and wheat phytoceramides to support healthy hair growth and overall hair health.Who is Hair Growth for Women intended for?This formula is for women of all ages who want to promote fuller, denser hair, encourage healthy growth, and minimize shedding.How does Hair Growth for Women work?This formula can help maintain collagen integrity with wheat phytoceramide extract. It also includes saw palmetto extract, which has been shown to influence dihydrotestosterone (DHT) levels, a hormone that plays a key role in hair follicle health.When will I see results?In studies on the nutrients in Hair Growth for Women, improvements in hair thickness and growth were observed after two months, with the most noticeable results after four months of consistent use.When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? The suggested use is one softgel at any time of day, with or without food. Always follow the instructions on the supplement label. Can I take this if my hair isn’t thinning?Yes, this formula can help support hair health regardless of hair status.Can men take this product?This product was intended to be used by women to support their hair growth.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Supplements are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Hair Growth for Women is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?No, this product is not vegetarian. It was made with bovine-derived gelatin softgels.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

Health benefits overview: Hair loss and thinning can affect women at any age, impacting your confidence and well-being. Hair Growth for Women can help you achieve fuller hair and prevent hair loss with two clinically researched plant extracts that support the roots of your hair. Looking for a natural solution for strong and vibrant hair? This formula combines botanical ingredients demonstrated to promote hair health from within.

Why this formula works: Hair Growth for Women is specially developed for women seeking a solution for strong and beautiful hair. This product provides two scientifically studied plant extracts shown to stimulate faster hair growth: Ceramosides™ Oil Neutra (wheat phytoceramide extract) and Vispo® (saw palmetto extract). Optimal hair starts at the roots, which is why it's important to support your hair follicles – the hair root cells. DHT is a hormone that helps regulate hair follicle health, and elevated levels of DHT are linked to hair loss and reduced growth. How can this supplement help you maintain your beautiful hair? This formula can help keep existing hair and reduce shedding by maintaining normal levels of DHT.

Backed by science: Wheat phytoceramides for healthy hair growth cycle Ceramides are essential lipids that play a key role in cellular structure, development, and renewal, including hair cells. They also help preserve collagen integrity, which is a vital building block for strong, shiny hair. The wheat phytoceramide extract in Hair Growth for Women is clinically studied to promote hair health. In a trial, women aged 24–64 took either 30 mg of extract or a placebo daily for 84 days. Hair examinations were done on days 56 and 84 through expert tests, including a pull test for hair fall, clinical scoring of density and volume, participant questionnaires, hair cycle analysis, measurements of hair diameter and growth, and scalp sebum evaluation. Expert reports showed that up to 64% in the wheat phytoceramide group experienced improved hair density and volume compared to baseline. Self-reported results revealed that up to 90% reported less shedding, improved hair growth, and healthier hair after 12 weeks. Both pre- and postmenopausal women experienced similar benefits. Saw palmetto for visibly thicker hair In a study, participants took either a special, standardized saw palmetto oil extract or a placebo. Analysis found that the saw palmetto extract group showed reduced hair shedding and hair loss, as measured by the hair comb test (counting loose hairs after combing) and the hair pull test. Results were measured at intervals of 8 and 16 weeks, using hair counts done by experts (including hair comb and hair pull tests), self-evaluation, and photographic analysis. In the self-evaluation questionnaire, participants in the saw palmetto group reported increased hair thickness. Saw palmetto effects on DHT In the same study, researchers examined how saw palmetto influences dihydrotestosterone (DHT). They discovered that supplementation helped stabilize DHT levels, keeping them within the normal range throughout the trial.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid)
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is GABA? It is a naturally occurring amino acid, clinically studied for its ability to relieve occasional stress while promoting a relaxed state of mind. Doctor’s visits, public speaking, and job interviews all share one thing: they can stir up stress or worry. Unlike standard stress relief supplements, GABA can promote a calm response to stress in as little as 30 minutes.The supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.Why it works:Gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) is produced in the body and serves as the brain’s main inhibitory neurotransmitter. It helps regulate the brain’s “let’s go” (excitatory) and “slow down” (inhibitory) signals, keeping communication between neurons in balance. By maintaining healthy GABA levels, the brain is better equipped to handle life’s stressors.Life Extension’s GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid) can ease tension, promote relaxation and calm, a balanced mood, and healthy sleep without that drowsy feeling the next day.The science behind the product:Help your body respond to anticipated stressDemanding situations like job interviews, medical appointments, public speaking, upcoming travels, etc., can bring on stress that impacts your well-being. This high-quality supplement with clinically studied GABA, derived from Lactobacillus hilgardii K-3 fermentation, can promote a healthy response to such occasional stress.Occasional stress and GABAIn a placebo-controlled clinical trial, healthy participants with a self-reported fear of heights took 100 mg of GABA before crossing a suspension bridge. (1) Researchers evaluated their stress response by measuring levels of salivary immunoglobulin A (IgA), an immune protein that typically decreases during stressful situations. (2-5) Results showed that those who took GABA maintained normal salivary IgA levels compared to placebo. (1)GABA and challenging tasksStressful mental tasks can be demanding. In a single-blind, randomized, crossover, placebo-controlled study, participants faced a combined stress load: A 10-minute arithmetic test plus a 5-minute auditory target detection task (DT). Three sessions were conducted at approximately 10, 40, and 70 minutes after participants took either 100 mg of GABA or a placebo. (6)Then a subjective survey evaluated six dimensions of stress, including tension and anger. Researchers also recorded participants’ brainwave activity. (6)Those who took GABA reported feeling less strained after completing the tasks compared to placebo. Brainwave data also indicated a healthy physiological stress response in the GABA group. (6)“Fight-or-flight” reaction and heart rateIn another randomized, double-blind, crossover, placebo-controlled study, also using an arithmetic stress test, heart rate was measured to determine sympathetic and parasympathetic nervous system activity after GABA intake. (7) The results showed that GABA produced a quick return to a healthy baseline following the stress response.GABA for better sleep support*GABA can also influence sleep. In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial, healthy adults aged 24–57 took 100 mg of GABA 30 minutes before bedtime. (8) Over one week, multiple sleep quality index scores were collected. Individuals in the GABA group reported falling asleep more quickly than those taking a placebo, and they did not experience next-day drowsiness. (8)*For occasional sleeplessnessTake it slow with GABA when you need it most! How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQWhat is inside GABA?Each capsule delivers 100 mg of PharmaGABA®, a clinically studied, trademarked form of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA).What is GABA, and how does it work?Gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) is a key inhibitory neurotransmitter that helps balance excitatory (“start”) and inhibitory (“stop”) signalling between brain cells. By supporting this balance, GABA promotes a sense of calm. Life Extension’s formula provides clinically studied GABA, derived from the natural fermentation of Lactobacillus hilgardii K-3, to help ease occasional stress, support mood balance, and promote healthy sleep.Who is GABA for?This supplement is ideal for anyone looking for quick relief from occasional stress. GABA can also encourage a relaxed state of mind and provide sleep support.When can I expect results?In clinical studies, GABA supported a healthy stress response within just 30 minutes, while sleep benefits were observed after one week of use. Individual experiences may vary, as everyone responds differently.When is the best time to take GABA? Should it be with food or on an empty stomach?If you expect a stressful situation, take one capsule as needed, any time of day, with or without food, up to twice daily. Always follow the directions on your supplement label for proper use.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Life Extension’s GABA is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This supplement is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this supplement is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This formula was designed for adults over the age of 18. Always consult with your child’s physician before giving them any supplements.

Ingredients: Sale

product.title: Creatine Powder
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is creatine? It is produced naturally in the body from glycine and arginine, helped by S-adenosylmethionine. Creatine is crucial for maintaining muscle health and is a foundation for an active life. However, the natural creatine levels decrease over time.This powder supplement is pure, unflavored, and easily absorbed. Add it to eight ounces of water, smoothies, or your favorite drink. Moreover, the formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.Why it works:Strong muscles are not enough; you also need lasting energy for demanding activities, such as powerlifting, resistance training, or even moving furniture.Creatine is one of the best researched nutrients for supporting lean muscle mass, strength, and power.Each scoop of Creatine Powder offers 5 grams of clinically studied creatine monohydrate to promote muscle health, cellular energy, exercise, and recovery – making it simple to improve your performance at work, in the gym, or wherever you need it the most.The science behind the product:Creatine is mainly produced in the liver and kidneys from the amino acids arginine and glycine, with support from S-adenosylmethionine. It circulates through the bloodstream to supply energy to cells across the body, though natural levels decline with age. (1)Exercise performance, recovery & lean muscleCreatine is one of the most studied nutrients for building lean muscle mass and boosting strength and power. It’s widely used by both professional and amateur athletes, making it a must-have for nearly any exercise routine. (2,3)Energy at the cellular levelCreatine plays a key role in producing ATP (adenosine triphosphate), which is the cell’s primary energy source. By recycling ATP in the body, creatine helps provide the energy cells need to support multiple biological processes, essential to keep us healthy.Creatine for womenNaturally, women have 70–80% lower internal creatine stores than men and often get less from their diet. During hormone-related changes, creatine metabolism in the body may also change. Creatine supplementation can help support strength and exercise performance in both pre- and postmenopausal women. (4,5)Creatine & healthy agingMany clinical studies show that creatine can promote upper- and lower-body strength, physical and muscular performance, and body composition in older adults, especially when paired with resistance training. The most notable results are often seen after about 12 weeks. (3, 5-7)For strength and stamina, both inside and outside the gym, think creatine!How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQ:What is in Creatine Powder?Each scoop of Creatine Powder contains 5 grams of creatine monohydrate, an amino acid derivative studied for muscle strength and recovery support.Who is Creatine Powder for?It’s designed for anyone looking to support muscle function, exercise performance, and energy metabolism by fueling ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the body’s primary energy source.Can women benefit from creatine monohydrate?Yes, studies indicate that creatine can increase strength and performance throughout hormone-related changes in pre- and postmenopausal women.Creatine monohydrate vs. micronizedBoth forms of creatine promote muscle strength, stamina, performance, and recovery. The difference lies only in particle size: Micronized creatine has smaller particles that may dissolve more quickly, but research shows no added effectiveness over standard creatine monohydrate. Creatine Powder is unflavored and mixes smoothly in 8 ounces of water or your preferred beverage.When will I notice results?In studies, creatine users experienced improvements in physical and mental energy within 10–12 weeks. Since everyone is unique and results can vary, we recommend following the study duration to evaluate effectiveness.When and how should I take Creatine Powder?You can take this product any time of day, with or without food, whatever works best for you. Mix one scoop into 8 ounces of water, juice, a shake, or a smoothie.What does Creatine Powder taste like? Are there any added sugars?This powder is unflavored and does not contain added sugars.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it’s always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Creatine Powder is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this formulation vegetarian?Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this supplement gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child’s physician before giving them any supplements.

product.title: Melatonin+ Liposomal
product.description:
WHAT IS MELATONIN?Melatonin is a natural hormone produced by your pineal gland in response to darkness. It‘s called the "sleep hormone“ and plays a crucial role in regulating your body's circadian rhythm, which is your internal biological clock.Your body naturally produces melatonin in the evening hours, signaling that it's time to prepare for sleep. But factors like age, stress, and irregular schedules can disrupt your natural melatonin production and affect sleep quality and duration.Additionally, exposure to blue light from screens and devices can suppress melatonin release, making it harder to fall asleep.WHY CHOOSE LIPOSOMAL MELATONIN?Do you struggle with melatonin supplements that take too long to work? Traditional melatonin forms often have limited bioavailability and slow absorption, requiring you to take them 30-60 minutes before your intended sleep time.Liposomal delivery changes everything by encapsulating melatonin in liposomes (lipid spheres) that protect it during digestion and facilitate direct cellular uptake. This cutting-edge technology can provide quicker action and more efficient absorption compared to standard tablets or capsules.The handiness of a spray means you can take it right in your bedroom without needing water or worrying about timing your dose perfectly.WHY CHOOSE VITALIZED MELATONIN SLEEP SPRAY?Revolutionary TINYsphere® technologyMelatonin+ Liposomal uses clinically studied TINYsphere® technology:Up to 3 times faster absorption compared to standard melatoninImproved bioavailability with exceptional cellular uptakeThe effects start in minutes rather than hoursProtected delivery that bypasses digestionPersonalized, flexible dosingAre you looking for personalized melatonin support? Each spray delivers exactly 500 mcg of melatonin, allowing you to adjust your dose according to your individual needs. Start with one spray and optimize as needed. With 200 sprays per bottle, you have a long-lasting supply.Enriched with lemon balmThe formula includes 1.25 mg of lemon balm extract (Melissa officinalis) per spray. It‘s a traditional herb that can promote relaxation and healthy sleep. product.title: Active Vitality & Strength
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: The word "vitality" refers to your overall sense of how alive and energized you feel, and this feeling may decrease as you age. The clinically studied nutrients in this once-daily formula work alongside regular exercise to support muscle strength and functional fitness, which are foundations of long-term vitality. Active Vitality & Strength can help you feel stronger, steadier, and more ready for everyday movement. This supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO. Why it works: Research shows that more than 55% of adults aren't getting enough physical activity, and maintaining muscle strength and vitality becomes increasingly important with age.This product is formulated to complement regular exercise. It contains a patented combo of Sphaeranthus indicus and Mangifera indica extract that has been shown to promote vitality, physical strength, and functional fitness – keeping you able for the things you love. Whether you're keeping up with the kids, carrying groceries, or enjoying a good moment, Active Vitality & Strength can support you to live life on your terms. The science behind the product: As we age, physical and functional changes can affect muscle strength, daily mobility, independence, and overall quality of life. (1)Benefits and support for older adults In a randomized, placebo-controlled study, men and postmenopausal women took 650 mg of a patented S. indicus and M. indica extract blend. They reported improvements in vitality and functional fitness. These benefits included better muscle strength, hand-grip strength, aerobic performance, and muscle endurance compared to the placebo group.Participants also completed a simple at-home routine three times per week, performing body-weight resistance exercises in three sets of 10 repetitions for both upper- and lower-body movements. The researchers measured results at the start of the study and again at weeks 4, 8, and 12.The researchers measured results at the start of the study and again at weeks 4, 8, and 12: General vitality: The participants were asked a series of questions to measure perceived vitality, such as whether they felt "full of life," as well as questions about energy levels and fatigue. By the end of the study, those taking the S. indicus and M. indica extract blend experienced notable improvements in these areas compared to placebo. Strength of leg muscle: The individuals also showed better results in leg extension strength of 3.22%, 4.86%, and 6.86% at weeks 4, 8, and 12, compared to the placebo group. (2) Muscle endurance: The women showed a stronger response to the S. indicus and M. indica extract blend than men, but both groups experienced improved muscle endurance compared to the placebo. (2) Strength of hand grip: The patented S. Indicus and M. indica extract blend also showed enhancements in hand grip strength by 6.10%, 8.56%, and 9.21% at weeks 4, 8, and 12 compared to the placebo group. (2) Test: Six-minute walk: The participants taking the patented S. indicus and M. indica extract blend increased their average walking distance over the 12-week study. (2) Test: Sit to stand: Those in the extract blend group also improved their number of sit-to-stand repetitions over the course of the study. (2) With Active Vitality & Strength, you can go for the gold in your golden years, keeping your liveliness, energy, and physical independence. How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ What is in Active Vitality & Strength? Active Vitality & Strength provides 650 mg of STRENGTHERA™, a trademarked blend of East Indian globe thistle (S. Indicus) flower and mango tree (M. Indica) bark. These extracts are standardized to deliver consistent levels of their key active compounds, 7-hydroxy frullanolide and mangiferin. Who is the supplement intended for? Active Vitality & Strength is made for adults who want to support vitality, maintain muscle strength, and promote everyday endurance and performance as they age, all in one convenient, once-daily supplement. Vitality, what is it? Vitality refers to how "alive" you feel, the overall sense of energy and balance, both physically and mentally. Supporting vitality helps you stay strong, handle daily demands with ease, and feel your best at every stage of life. How does the product work? Active Vitality & Strength can promote vitality, endurance, and muscle strength through two non-stimulant plant extracts shown to promote healthy blood flow, defend against everyday oxidative stress, and support the body's natural resilience. When can I expect to notice an effect? In a clinical study using this ingredient blend, participants began experiencing support for endurance, muscle function, and overall well-being after about 4 weeks, with the most pronounced benefits appearing around 12 weeks. Individual responses may vary, so your experience may differ. For the best evaluation, we recommend following the full study duration. When is the best time to take the supplement? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? Please follow the instructions on the product label. We suggest taking one capsule daily with food, at whatever time of day fits naturally into your routine. Will Active Vitality & Strength interact with my medication? There is no evidence that the nutrients in this supplement negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we always recommend informing your healthcare provider about any supplements you take. Does Active Vitality & Strength contain caffeine? No. This product is free of caffeine and other stimulants. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? Active Vitality & Strength is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this formulation vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

product.title: Biological Aging Defense
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance Chronological age is fixed, but biological age is shaped by lifestyle and nutrient intake. Biological Aging Defense once-daily formula contains a standardized extract of scarlet beebalm (Monarda didyma) and a lemon balm extract (Melissa officinalis) to help maintain telomere length and DNA methylation age, two key biomarkers of how aging affects the body's cells, tissues, and organ systems. The formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO. Why it works: A variety of factors influence the natural aging process, including the gradual buildup of oxidative stress in the body. (1-3) Aging can be viewed in two distinct ways: Chronological age Chronological age is simply the number of years you've lived, the age marked by birthdays, experiences, memories, personal milestones, and wisdom accumulated throughout your lifetime Biological age Biological age offers a different perspective, a laboratory-based estimate that reflects how your cells and systems are functioning over time. It tells whether your body is aging faster or slower than your chronological age and can support you in lifestyle changes to keep you young at the cellular level. (4,5) This supplement is designed to support healthy biological aging by targeting two core mechanisms that influence how cells age. The science behind the product: Preserving the length of the telomeres Your telomeres function like protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes. Over time, they naturally shorten, and as they do, cells lose their ability to divide and perform optimally, contributing to normal aging. In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study, the individuals taking a standardized scarlet beebalm extract maintained notably longer telomere length compared with placebo by the end of the study. (6) Supporting healthy DNA methylation What is DNA methylation? The biological process of DNA methylation plays a powerful role in how your body functions. It helps regulate gene activity, acting as an on/off switch for certain genes through epigenetics, which is the processes that influence gene expression and overall health. Because DNA methylation patterns shift as we age, researchers use this biomarker to estimate biological age and evaluate healthy aging at the cellular level. In the same clinical study, those taking standardized scarlet beebalm extract showed a lower DNA methylation age compared with the placebo group. (6) Life quality support Participants in this study also reported improvements in overall quality of life while taking standardized scarlet beebalm extract. (6) Time moves forward, but Biological Aging Defense can support healthy biological aging How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ What is in Biological Aging Defense? Biological Aging Defense features a standardized scarlet beebalm extract along with a lemon balm extract providing at least 4% didymin (4 mg). Scarlet beebalm is rich in active compounds, including didymin, that promote healthy aging and overall well-being. Lemon balm serves as a complementary botanical for additional support. Who is Biological Aging Defense for? This supplement is ideal for adults who want to support healthy aging from within. It is especially suited for those seeking to maintain important markers of biological age, including youthful gene expression (epigenetics) and telomere length. What is biological age? Biological age indicates how well your cells and body systems are functioning, offering a deeper view than chronological age, the number of years you have lived. Lifestyle, genetics, nutrition, and environmental factors all influence biological age, meaning your body can age faster or slower than your actual chronological age. Epigenetics is the way your body controls which genes are active and which are not — without changing your DNA. What is DNA methylation & epigenetics? DNA methylation is a natural process that helps regulate healthy gene expression (through epigenetics), influencing whole-body health and cellular function. As we age, DNA methylation changes, which can affect how genes are expressed and how efficiently cells operate. Scientists measure these methylation patterns as biomarkers to estimate biological age and assess how the body is aging at the cellular level. Epigenetics is the whole set of gene-control mechanisms, the overall system your body uses to turn genes "on" or "off" without changing your DNA. It includes several mechanisms that influence how your genes behave. DNA methylation is one of those mechanisms used to measure biological ageng. What are telomeres? Telomeres are protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes that help safeguard DNA stability. Longer telomeres are associated with youth and longevity. Telomere length, together with epigenetics, plays a central role in how your cells age and function over time. When can I expect an effect? In a clinical study using a scarlet beebalm extract standardized to 4% didymin, participants showed a more youthful biological age and longer telomere length after 12 weeks compared with placebo. Individual responses may vary, but following the study's 12-week duration is a good benchmark for evaluating the product's effectiveness.When is the best time to take Biological Aging Defense? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach?We suggest taking one capsule daily with food. Can this supplement interact with my medication? There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it's always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? Biological Aging Defense is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this formulation vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

product.title: Bee Immune Propolis Capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: Honeybees produce propolis, also called bee glue, from plant compounds to build, seal, and help protect the health of their hive. As it turns out, propolis offers similar benefits for your health, too. Bee Immune Propolis Capsules can provide reliable, year-round support for everyday respiratory challenges. The supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO. Why it works: Bee propolis has been used for generations to fight respiratory challenges by promoting a balanced immune response in the respiratory system. But, because honeybees create propolis from the plants around them, its polyphenol content can vary from hive to hive. As a result, raw propolis or traditional propolis supplements may not always provide consistent results. (1) That is why Life Extension uses a standardized bee propolis with the same polyphenol content in every dose, along with clinically studied support for immune response and respiratory health. The bee propolis in this formula is found to reduce the frequency and duration of everyday respiratory challenges. The science behind the product: Beneficial standardized propolis Promunel™ is a clinically studied brown propolis ingredient standardized to 12% polyphenols, with a consistent and stable profile of active compounds. This means you get the same amount of useful propolis compounds in every serving. (2,3) Promunel® & higher propolis level In a clinical trial (double-blind, crossover), individuals who consumed 400 mg of standardized propolis had higher levels of propolis phenolic biomarkers in their blood plasma and urine than those taking a placebo. This shows improved bioavailability of these propolis compounds, which means they are well absorbed and available in the body. (4) Respiratory immune challenges & Promunel® In another study (randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled), participants taking 200 mg of standardized bee propolis twice daily reported a 31% decreased chance of experiencing respiratory discomfort compared to those taking a placebo. The participants also observed 29% fewer seasonal respiratory discomfort episodes and a shorter duration of symptoms, 34% decrease, compared to the placebo group. (3) Don't let an unprepared immune defense "sting" you – support your respiratory immune health every day and "bee" ready all year! How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in Bee Immune Propolis Capsules? Each daily serving provides 400 mg of Promunel® bee propolis extract, clinically studied and standardized to 12% polyphenols (48 mg). These bioactive compounds have been researched for their role in supporting respiratory and immune health. What is propolis and its function? Propolis is a resin-like substance honeybees make from plant saps and waxes. Bees use it to seal and protect their hive and maintain colony health. In humans, polyphenols in propolis have been studied for their ability to support a healthy immune response, upper respiratory tract health, and overall daily wellness. Who is this product for? Bee Immune Propolis Capsules is designed for adults looking to support immune function, respiratory health, and wellness. What sets Bee Immune Propolis Capsules apart from other propolis products? Raw and traditional propolis products can vary widely depending on region and season. This formula uses Promunel®, produced with a patented extraction process and standardized to 12% polyphenols, ensuring consistent quality and potency. Clinical studies show that Promunel® has 72% bioavailability and identified 72 phenolic compounds in the blood and 85 in the urine after ingestion, demonstrating good absorption from the GI tract. When can I expect results? In a clinical study of people who took Promunel®, respiratory comfort and support were observed after 12 weeks of use. Individual results may vary, and we recommend following the study duration for the best evaluation of product efficacy. When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? We suggest taking one capsule twice daily, any time of day, with or without food. Can this product be taken as needed? For ongoing respiratory and immune support, daily use is recommended. Will this supplement interact with my medication? There is no indication that the nutrients within this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we always suggest that you inform your physician of any supplements you are taking. Can it be combined with other immune supplements? Yes, Bee Immune Propolis Capsules can be taken alongside other immune-supporting supplements. There is no indication that this formula interacts with other ingredients. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Who should not take Bee Immune Propolis Capsules? As stated on the product label, avoid this formula if allergic to bees or bee products. Does this supplement contain allergens? Bee Immune Propolis Capsules is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this formulation vegetarian? Yes, Bee Immune Propolis Capsules is vegetarian. It is not suitable for vegans, as propolis is a product made by bees. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

product.title: Bio-Luteolin™
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is luteolin? It is a naturally occurring plant-derived flavonoid with well-studied antioxidant properties. Luteolin is gaining growing attention in scientific research and popularity among healthy aging enthusiasts for its many potential cellular benefits. However, like many health-promoting flavonoids, it is difficult to absorb. Bio-Luteolin™ combines luteolin with galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds to significantly improve bioavailability and maximize its effects. Why it works: The function of the cells is the foundation for aging well. Luteolin is known for supporting cellular health, such as autophagy (cellular "housekeeping"). But, in most forms, it is poorly absorbed, limiting its potential health benefits. (1,3)The encapsulated coating of galactomannan fibers in Bio-Luteolin™ protects and helps luteolin pass through the digestive system intact, allowing more of it to circulate in the body. The result is up to 14× higher bioavailability and up to 10x free luteolin than compared to regular forms of luteolin. (3) The science behind the product: Study of luteolin absorption In a study (randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled), participants received luteolin either in its standard form or with the fenugreek fiber coating used in Bio-Luteolin™. Blood plasma levels of both total and free luteolin were measured and found to be significantly higher with the formulated version than with regular luteolin. (3) Promising clinical evidence In another trial (randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled), Bio-Luteolin™ demonstrated clinical efficacy. These results suggest that better absorption allows luteolin to have stronger, more noticeable effects. (4)Include in your healthy aging plan today: Bio-Luteolin™, designed for absorption How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What does Bio-Luteolin™ contain? Each capsule provides 100 mg of the Bio-Luteolin™ Proprietary Blend, including 20 mg of luteolin from Japanese sophora extract and 25 mg of galactomannans derived from fenugreek seed. How does Bio-Luteolin™ work? As we age, the body's natural cellular "clean-up" process, known as autophagy, becomes less efficient. Luteolin has been shown to support components in autophagy, such as AMPK and mTOR, to activate this process and allow for healthy cell clean-up and function. Bio-Luteolin™ delivers luteolin in a form that is up to 14× more bioavailable than standard luteolin, helping the body make better use of it. What makes this supplement more bioavailable? Many flavonoids, including luteolin, are broken down in the digestive system before the body can fully use them. Bio-Luteolin™ includes galactomannans from fenugreek seed, which form a protective matrix around luteolin. This helps slow its breakdown and elimination, allowing higher absorption. As a result, the 20 mg of luteolin in Bio-Luteolin™ can provide exposure comparable to up to 280 mg of unformulated luteolin. Who is Bio-Luteolin™ for? Bio-Luteolin™ is designed for those who want to promote healthy aging with a more absorbable and bioavailable form of luteolin. When is the best time to take Bio-Luteolin™? Take one capsule daily, at any time of day. It can be taken with or without food, depending on your preference. Will this supplement interact with medications? There is no indication that the ingredients in this formula negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we recommend informing your healthcare professional about any supplements you are taking. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? Bio-Luteolin™ is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

In humans, polyphenols in propolis have been studied for their ability to support a healthy immune response, upper respiratory tract health, and overall daily well-being. Who is this product for? How does the Bee Immune Propolis Spray compare to the Bee Immune Propolis Capsules?
