However, these products should be taken for different uses, dosages, and time periods, based on their clinical studies on immune and respiratory health: For fast-acting immune and respiratory support: The Bee Immune Propolis Spray should be taken for 5 days. product.title: Biosil® 60 liquid capsules
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: The only active ingredient in this supplement is ch-OSA®, which is a patented and uniquely effective compound. The two other ingredients are purified water and microcrystalline cellulose (plant fiber). Quick benefits of Biosil®'s liquid capsules: Supporting natural collagen production while protecting existing collagen A tasteless formula – no fishy aftertaste The supplement is clinically proven, 100% vegan & non-GMO Convenient daily use with just 1 capsule twice daily Why it works: Unlike traditional collagen supplements, the Biosil® formula does not contain collagen. Instead, it can help your body produce its own collagen, making it a perfect vegan-friendly alternative. And not only that, but ch-OSA® can also help generate elastin and keratin naturally. This science-backed supplement has been shown to promote smoother skin, stronger nails, fuller, healthier-looking (shinier) hair – and even joint comfort. The science behind the product: 20-week study: Smoother, tighter skin This randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial involved 50 women (aged 40-65) and took place at Vrije Universiteit Brussel, Belgium. Compared to the placebo group, the women taking ch-OSA® reported: 30% reduction in depth of fine lines & wrinkles 89% improvement in skin elasticity Hair & nail brittleness were rated to be significantly improved 9-month trial: Stronger, thicker hair Another randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study of 48 women (aged 18-65) took place at the University of Cincinnati, USA. Compared to the placebo group, the women taking ch-OSA® were measured to have: 12,8% thicker hair fiber diameter (thickness) 13,1% increased strength (higher break load) 12 weeks: More joint comfort Yet another randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, multi-center study of 166 people, led by researchers at the University of Hasselt, Belgium. This research showed a significant improvement in men taking ch-OSA® compared to men in the placebo group: 26% less knee discomfort 35% less knee stiffness 25% better daily function How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in Biosil® liquid capsules This supplement is vegan and GMO-free. It does not contain soy, dairy, egg, corn, wheat, gluten, fish/shellfish, peanuts/nuts/tree nuts, animal-derived ingredients, ingredients from genetically modified organisms, artificial colors, artificial preservatives, or any flavors or sweeteners. Who can benefit from taking Biosil®? Biosil® can benefit anyone wanting to support healthy collagen levels. Natural collagen production typically peaks in early adulthood (21 years old) and gradually declines with age, although the rate can vary depending on genetics and lifestyle. Over time, this decline may become noticeable in the skin, hair, nails, bones, and joints. BioSil can support collagen formation to help maintain these collagen-dependent tissues at any age. † When can I expect results with Biosil®? After 1 month: Faster-growing nails are often one of the first noticeable changes. After 2 months: Hair may appear fuller, shinier, and healthier looking. After 3 months: Some people report brighter, more radiant-looking skin. Clinical research also showed improvements in joint comfort, mobility, flexibility, and cartilage condition within this timeframe. After 4–5 months: Clinical studies have shown visible improvements in skin elasticity, wrinkles, and fine lines. After 4–6 months: Research has shown reduced nail brittleness, along with smoother-looking nails and fewer vertical ridges over time. After 9 months: Clinical studies reported stronger, thicker, and more elastic hair. After 12 months: Research showed increased bone collagen production and improved hip bone density. † However, individual results may vary. Can I trust these clinical studies? The effects of Biosil® for skin, hair, nails, bones, and joints are supported by randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled human clinical trials published in peer-reviewed medical journals – considered the gold standard in clinical research. It's also important to understand the difference between "clinically tested" and "clinically proven". Many products can be clinically tested, but only products that demonstrate statistically significant results in well-designed studies can claim to be clinically proven. Biosil® has demonstrated such results in placebo-controlled, double-blind human clinical trials. † How is Biosil® different than supplements that contain collagen? Biosil® does not contain collagen; it helps your body produce its own collagen. When collagen is consumed, the body breaks it down into amino acids and digests it like any other source of protein, such as meat, fish, or poultry. In that sense, many collagen supplements function similarly to a protein shake. Biosil® works differently. By supporting the body's natural collagen-producing cells, called fibroblasts, in the skin and osteoblasts in the bones. As these cells become less active with age, collagen production gradually declines. Clinical studies have shown that Biosil® can help stimulate collagen formation by supporting these cells and helping them function more efficiently. It can also help protect both newly formed and existing collagen from damage. † Is Biosil® evaluated and approved by authorities? Biosil® has been available in the USA since 1994 and is manufactured according to strict quality and safety standards that meet or exceed FDA requirements for dietary supplements. The manufacturing facility in Belgium is inspected by the FDA. In Europe, the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) has evaluated and approved ch-OSA®, confirming its safety and bioavailability. EFSA is widely recognized for its rigorous scientific review standards. In Canada, Biosil® products have also been evaluated under Health Canada's regulatory framework and granted Natural Product Numbers (NPNs) following review of their safety, scientific support, and claim substantiation. †These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.

Health benefits overview: What if a single daily capsule could help your skin, hair, nails, and joints look and feel their best? Biosil® 60 liquid capsules can promote natural collagen production and help protect the collagen your body already has, thanks to its patented active compound, ch-OSA®. Unlike most beauty supplements, this formula works with your body's own biology rather than simply adding collagen from the outside. The only active ingredient is ch-OSA®, a uniquely effective compound delivered alongside purified water and plant-based cellulose.

Why this formula works: Have you ever wondered why traditional collagen supplements may not deliver the results you expect? When you consume collagen directly, your body simply breaks it down into amino acids and processes it like any other protein source. Biosil® takes a fundamentally different approach. Rather than supplying collagen externally, ch-OSA® can help activate your body's own collagen-producing cells – known as fibroblasts in the skin and osteoblasts in the bones – encouraging them to work more efficiently. Beyond collagen, ch-OSA® can also help stimulate the natural formation of elastin and keratin, two additional structural proteins that contribute to skin firmness and hair strength. This inside-out approach makes Biosil® a vegan-friendly alternative to conventional collagen products.

Backed by science: Are you looking for a supplement with real, measurable results? Biosil® is backed by multiple randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled human clinical trials – widely regarded as the gold standard in research. Skin elasticity & fine line reduction A 20-week trial at Vrije Universiteit Brussel, Belgium, enrolled 50 women aged 40–65. Compared to the placebo group, those taking ch-OSA® achieved a 30% reduction in fine line and wrinkle depth, an 89% improvement in skin elasticity, and significantly better ratings for hair and nail brittleness. Hair strength & thickness A 9-month study at the University of Cincinnati, USA, followed 48 women aged 18–65. Participants taking ch-OSA® showed a 12.8% increase in hair fiber diameter and a 13.1% improvement in hair strength compared to those receiving a placebo. Joint comfort & mobility A multi-center trial led by the University of Hasselt, Belgium, involving 166 participants, found that men taking ch-OSA® experienced 26% less knee discomfort, 35% less knee stiffness, and 25% better daily function compared to the placebo group.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale

Health benefits overview: Biosil® 120 liquid capsules features ch-OSA®, a patented compound that can help your body produce its own collagen, elastin, and keratin. This makes it a compelling vegan-friendly alternative to traditional collagen supplements. Can you imagine supporting smoother skin, fuller hair, stronger nails, and more comfortable joints – all from a single daily capsule? This formula is clinically proven, 100% vegan, and non-GMO.

Why this formula works: Unlike conventional collagen supplements, Biosil® does not contain collagen itself. Instead, ch-OSA® works by activating the body's own collagen-producing cells, known as fibroblasts in the skin and osteoblasts in the bones. As these cells naturally slow down with age, collagen levels gradually decline. Biosil® can help stimulate these cells to function more efficiently, while also helping to protect both newly formed and existing collagen from damage. What makes this formula stand out for you is that it can also encourage the natural production of elastin and keratin – two proteins essential for skin firmness and hair strength.

Backed by science: Wondering whether the results are real? The effects of Biosil® on skin, hair, nails, bones, and joints are backed by randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled human clinical trials published in peer-reviewed medical journals, the gold standard in clinical research. 20-week study: Smoother, tighter skin A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial conducted at Vrije Universiteit Brussel, Belgium, involved 50 women aged 40–65. How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

product.title: AmpliQ CoQ10™ 100 mg
product.description:
Health benefits at a glance: First, what is CoQ10? It's a vital, naturally occurring, fat-soluble antioxidant and coenzyme (found in nearly every cell in the body) that supports cardiovascular health, powers the cells' energy production, and helps defend against oxidative stress. However, its natural levels decline as we age. Bioavailability has long been the defining challenge in CoQ10 supplementation, but the advanced AmpliQ CoQ10™ changes that. It's clinically backed to deliver higher circulating CoQ10 levels throughout the body, ensuring you get the full benefit of every dose. This supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO. Why it works: CoQ10 has multiple functions throughout the body. As a key component of cellular energy production, this coenzyme is crucial to the heart, kidneys, liver, muscles, and other energy-demanding tissues. The challenge is getting as much CoQ10 to those cells as possible. AmpliQ CoQ10™ combines CoQ10 with fenugreek fibers for increased absorption. This patented delivery technology can deliver up to 24x greater bioavailability than standard ubiquinone and up to 3x greater bioavailability than standard ubiquinol. The science behind the product: Heart health and CoQ10 CoQ10 is especially important for the heart, one of the body's most energy-demanding organs. Studies have shown that CoQ10 supplementation can support cardiovascular health, particularly in people with lower CoQ10 levels or increased needs. Research has shown in numerous studies that CoQ10 can support healthy cholesterol levels already within the normal range and promote endothelial health, the inner lining of blood vessels. (1,2) CoQ10 and antioxidant protection CoQ10 can protect cells from oxidative stress and support the activity of other antioxidants in the body, including vitamins E and C and SOD (superoxide dismutase). (3,4) Fighting fatigue with CoQ10 CoQ10 can help relieve general fatigue. (5) It's vital for mitochondrial energy production, helping cells generate ATP, which is the body's primary source of energy. (6) A balanced inflammatory response Studies suggest that CoQ10 can help inhibit inflammatory factors to promote whole-body health and well-being. (7) Glucose health and CoQ10 Clinical research demonstrates that CoQ10 can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. (8) How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in AmpliQ CoQ10™ and why should I use it? AmpliQ CoQ10™ is Life Extension's most advanced coenzyme formula. It provides 50/100 mg of CoQ10, combined with galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds to enhance bioavailability, supporting higher circulating CoQ10 levels. The result is a next-generation CoQ10 supplement for heart health, cellular energy, and beyond. What makes AmpliQ CoQ10™ more bioavailable? Exclusively from Life Extension, AmpliQ CoQ10™ uses a patented FenuMat® technology that can increase CoQ10 levels in the bloodstream. This means up to 24x better bioavailability than standard ubiquinone and up to 3x better bioavailability than standard ubiquinol. What does CoQ10 do for the body? Coenzyme (CoQ10) is present in every cell and essential for cellular energy production, particularly in organs with high energy demands such as the heart, kidneys, and liver. It also supports healthy aging, cardiovascular health, a healthy inflammatory response, and healthy blood sugar metabolism. Who is AmpliQ CoQ10™ meant for? AmpliQ CoQ10™ has been studied in adults aged 30 to 73 and shown to increase circulating CoQ10 levels. Whether you're looking to support heart health, cellular energy, or healthy aging, this advanced formula is designed to help at every stage of life. How and when should I take AmpliQ CoQ10™? We recommend taking one capsule daily with food. AmpliQ CoQ10™ can be taken at any time of day, making it easy to fit into your routine. Why doesn't AmpliQ CoQ10™ contain ubiquinol? AmpliQ CoQ10™ was developed to deliver exceptional bioavailability without the need for ubiquinol. Its patented delivery technology has been shown to increase circulating CoQ10 levels, allowing us to offer advanced CoQ10 support in a more cost-effective formula for the customers. When is the best time to take AmpliQ CoQ10™? Take one capsule daily, at any time of day. It can be taken with or without food, depending on your preference. Will this supplement interact with medications? There is no indication that the ingredients in this formula negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we recommend informing your healthcare professional about any supplements you are taking. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? AmpliQ CoQ10™ is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

Health benefits overview: CoQ10 is a naturally occurring antioxidant and coenzyme found in virtually every cell of the body, playing a vital role in cardiovascular health, cellular energy production, and protection against oxidative stress. Its levels naturally decline with age, making supplementation increasingly relevant for those looking to maintain optimal vitality. AmpliQ CoQ10™ addresses the longstanding challenge of CoQ10 absorption with a clinically backed formula that can deliver higher circulating CoQ10 levels throughout the body. You can trust that this gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO formula is designed to ensure you get the full advantage of every dose.

Why this formula works: Have you ever wondered why so many CoQ10 products fall short? The answer often comes down to absorption. CoQ10 plays multiple roles throughout the body. As a key component of cellular energy production, it is essential to the heart, kidneys, liver, muscles, and other tissues with high energy demands. AmpliQ CoQ10™ 100 mg combines CoQ10 with galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds to significantly enhance uptake. This patented FenuMat® delivery technology can achieve up to 24x greater bioavailability than standard ubiquinone and up to 3x greater bioavailability than standard ubiquinol.

Backed by science: What does the research actually say about CoQ10? Here is a breakdown of the key findings behind this formula. CoQ10 and heart health The heart is one of the body's most energy-demanding organs, and CoQ10 is especially critical for its function. Studies have shown that CoQ10 can promote cardiovascular health, particularly in individuals with lower CoQ10 levels or elevated needs. Research also indicates that CoQ10 can help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels within the normal range and encourage endothelial health, the inner lining of blood vessels. CoQ10 and antioxidant protection CoQ10 can help protect your cells from oxidative stress and enhance the activity of other antioxidants in the body, including vitamins E and C and SOD (superoxide dismutase). This makes it a valuable component of the body's natural defense system. CoQ10 and energy levels Feeling persistently tired? CoQ10 can help relieve general fatigue by supporting mitochondrial energy production, helping cells generate ATP, the body's primary fuel source. CoQ10 and inflammatory balance Studies suggest that CoQ10 can help inhibit certain inflammatory factors, contributing to whole-body health and overall well-being. CoQ10 and blood sugar Clinical research demonstrates that CoQ10 can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels, making it a well-rounded addition to a balanced lifestyle.

How to take: Please follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Ingredients: Sale
